Matthew18:29 Umusha mubiye amufukamina alamupapata ati, ‘Mpeelako mune akashita, nkakubwesesha.’" 
Matthew18:30 Lelo wena akaana ukusumina. Amuposa mu cifungo, mpaka akasuke akabweshe inkongole." 
Matthew18:31 Abasha banankwe pakumona ifyacitika, cabapesha amano. Elyo baima baya shimikila imfumu yabo fyonse ificitike." 
Matthew18:32 Imfumu yabo epakwita ulya musha kumwakwe. Yamweba aiti, ‘We mubi wa musha we! Ine nalisuulile ku nkongole shobe shonse shilya, ico wampapete." 
Matthew18:33 Bushe na iwe tawaciba nakubelela umusha mubiyo uluse, nga filya ine nakubelele uluse?’" 
Matthew18:34 Awe imfumu yafulwa nganshi. Yamuposa mu cifungo umo bali nokumucusha mpaka akabweshe inkongole shakwe shonse. 
Matthew18:35 Efyo na imwe Tata wa mu mulu akamucita kumfwa nga tamulebeleshanya uluse ne mitima yenu yonse.” 
Matthew19:1 Ilyo Yesu apwile ukusosa aya mashiwi, afumine mu Galile, aile na ku calo ca Yudeya, kwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani." 
Matthew19:2 Amabumba ya bantu ayakalamba yamukonka, nao kulya kwine alaposha na balwele." 
Matthew19:3 Abafalise bamo baisa kuli Yesu, balamwesha abati, “Bushe calisuminishiwa ukuti umwaume aleke umukashi wakwe pa mulandu cikulufye mulandu?”" 
Matthew19:4 Yesu abasuka ati, “Bushe tamwabelenga ukuti, Lesa uwabumbile abantu pa citendekelo, abumbile umwaume no mwanakashi!" 
Matthew19:5 Kabinge atile, ‘Kanshi eco umwaume ashiila wishi na nyina, no kuminkana no mukashi wakwe, elyo aba babili baba umubili umo.’" 
Matthew19:6 Kanshi nomba tabali babili, balifye umubili umo. Ico Lesa alundinkanya, umuntu ecilekanya.”" 
Matthew19:7 Abafalise nabo bamwipusha abati, “Nga kanshi cinshi ico Mose atupeelele ili ifunde ilyakuti, umwaume ali nokulemba kalata wakulekelapo umukashi wakwe, epakumutamfya?”" 
Matthew19:8 Yesu abasuka ati, “Ico Mose amupeelele ulusa lwakuleka abakashi benu, mulandu wakumalala kwa mitima yenu. Lelo ukufuma ku citendekelo tacali ifi iyoo." 
Matthew19:9 Nomba ine ndemweba nati, uwaleka umukashi wakwe, apashili mulandu wa bulalelale, aupa na umbi, ninshi lubembu acita.”" 
Matthew19:10 Elyo abasambi bamweba abati, “Kanshi nga efyo caba pakati ka mulume no mukashi, ninshi cawamapo no kukanaupa.”" 
Matthew19:11 Yesu abasuka ati, “Te bonse bengapokelela aya mashiwi, kanofye kubo capeelwa." 
Matthew19:12 Kwaliba abantu abashaba na maka yakuupa pantu efyo bafyalwa. Bambi ni bamutungwi ico abantu ebabacita ifyo. Bambi bena basala ukukanaupa pa mulandu wa Bufumu bwa mu mulu. Uwingapokelela aya mashiwi, nayapokelele.”" 
Matthew19:13 Abantu bamo baletele utwaice kuli Yesu, pakuti atutambalikilepo amaboko no kutupepelako. Nomba abasambi bena balakalipila abantu." 
Matthew19:14 Yesu ena asosa ati, “Lekeni utwaice twise uko ndi, mwitulesha iyoo. Pantu ababa ngotu twaice, e bene ba Bufumu bwa mu mulu.”" 
Matthew19:15 Elyo atambalikilapo amaboko pa twaice, afumapo alaya." 
Matthew19:16 Elyo kwaishile umuntu umo kuli Yesu, amwipwishe ati, “Kafundisha, fisuma nshi ndi nokucita pakumona umweo wape?”" 
Matthew19:17 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Cinshi ico wanjipushisha pa mulandu wa busuma? Umusuma abafye umo mpo. Nga ulefwaya ukumona umweo ulekonka amafunde.”" 
Matthew19:18 Nao umuntu aipusha ati, “Mafunde nshi?” Yesu amwasuka ati, “Wilaipaya, wilabembuka, wilaiba, wilabepa bufi," 
Matthew19:19 ulecindika wiso na noko, uletemwa no mubiyo ngefyo waitemwa we mwine.”" 
Matthew19:20 Umulumendo ayasuka Yesu ati, “Ifi fyonse ndafikonka. Nga kanshi finshi fimbi ifyo ndi nokucita?”" 
Matthew19:21 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Nga ulefwaya ukuba uwapwililika, kabiye uye shitisha ifyo wakwata. Upeele ne ndalama ku balanda, lyena ninshi ukakwata icuma mu mulu. Elyo wise unkonke.”" 
Matthew19:22 Awe umulumendo ati omfwe aya mashiwi, aya alelanguluka, pantu ali ne fyuma ifingi." 
Matthew19:23 Elyo Yesu aebele abasambi bakwe ati, “Ndemweba icine cine, cintu cayafya ku wafyuma ukwingila mu Bufumu bwa mu mulu." 
Matthew19:24 Nakabili ndemweba nati, cayangukapo ingamila ukupula mu linso lya nshindano, ukucila umuntu uwafyuma ukwingila mu Bufumu bwakwa Lesa.”" 
Matthew19:25 Abasambi pakumfwa ifi basunguka nganshi. Balasosa abati, “Nga kanshi nani engapusuka?”" 
Matthew19:26 Yesu abalolesha, abeba ati, “Abantu bena kuti bafilililwafye, lelo Lesa ena tafilwa kantu.”" 
Matthew19:27 Elyo Petelo aipusha Yesu ati, “Mona, ifwe twalisha ifyuma fyesu fyonse, twalikukonka. Bushe finshi tukamwenapo?”" 
Matthew19:28 Yesu abeba ati, “Ndemweba icine cine, ilyo fyonse fikaluka cipya cipya, no Mwana wa muntu aisa ikala pa cipuna cakwe icabufumu icacindama, elyo imwe mwe bamukonka, mukekala pa fipuna fyabufumu ikumi limo na fibili. Mukaleputula imilandu ya nko ikumi limo na shibili isha bena Israeli." 
Matthew19:29 Na onse uwasha amayanda, nangu bamunyina, nangu inkashi, nangu wishi, nangu nyina, nangu abana, nangu amabala, pa mulandu wakukonka ine, akapokelapo pali conse umwanda umo. Elyo akakwata no mweo wape." 
Matthew19:30 Lelo abengi abantanshi, bakaba abakulekelesha, na bengi abakulekelesha, bakaba e bantanshi." 
Matthew20:1 “Ubufumu bwa mu mulu bwaba ngo mwine ibala, uwafumine lucelocelo kukufwaya abancito abakubomba mwibala lya myangashi." 
Matthew20:2 Baumfwana na bancito ukubalipila amalipilo ya pa bushiku bumo. Elyo abatuma na kwibala lyakwe ilya myangashi. 
Matthew20:3 Kabili cilya akasuba kasansama, pa nshita ya 09:00, afuma asanga bambi nabeminina pa lubansa lwa cisankano baleambakalafye." 
Matthew20:4 Nabo abeba ati, ‘Na imwe kabiyeni kukubomba mwibala lyandi ilya myangashi. Ndeisa mupeela amalipilo ayalingile.’" 
Matthew20:5 Awe nabo eko baya. Kabili cilya akasuba kafika pakati ka mutwe, pa nshita ya 12:00, na cilya akasuba kasendama, pa nshita ya 15:00, atumako na bambi." 
Matthew20:6 Cilya akasuba kaya kukuwa, pa nshita ya 17:00, asanga na bambi bemininefye. Abepusha ati, ‘Ngeco mwimininefye pano akasuba konse muleambakalafye cinshi?’" 
Matthew20:7 Bamwasuka abati, ‘Nici pashili uwakutwingisha incito.’ Abeba ati, ‘Na imwe bene kabiyeni mukubomba mwibala lyandi ilya myangashi.’" 
Matthew20:8 “Cilya kwaba icungulo, umwine ibala lya myangashi aeba kangalila wa bancito ati, ‘Ita abancito ubapeele amalipilo yabo. Utampilepo abakulekelesha, elyo ulekeleshe na bacibalilapo.’" 
Matthew20:9 Abacingila incito cilya akasuba kaba kukuwa, pa nshita ya 17:00, baisa. Cila umo alipilwa amalipilo ya pa bushiku bumo." 
Matthew20:10 Abacibalilapo ukwingila incito nabo baisa. Balesubila ukulipilwa ukucilapo. Nomba nabo balipilwafye amalipilo ya pa bushiku bumo. 
Matthew20:11 Cilya balipilwa balailishanya ku mwine ibala lya myangashi abati," 
Matthew20:12 ‘Abo aba pakulekelesha ababombafye insa imo, ebo watulinganya nabo? Nomba ifwe twacululuka mukubomba akasuba konse no kupya ku kasuba!’" 
Matthew20:13 Umwine ibala pakubasuka aebapo umo ati, ‘Mune nshikufyengele, bushe te malipilo ya pa bushiku bumo twacumfwana nobe?" 
Matthew20:14 Senda amalipilo yobe, akuya. Nine ne mwine ndefwaya ukulipila uyu wakulekelesha ngefyo nkulipile." 
Matthew20:15 Bushe nshikwete nsambu shakubomfya icuma candi umusango ndefwailamo? Nangu, bushe mufimbilafye pa mulandu wa cikuuku candi?’" 
Matthew20:16 Eico kanshi abakulekelesha ebakaba abantanshi, elyo abantanshi nabo bakaba abakulekelesha.”" 
Matthew20:17 Yesu ali pa bulendo bwakuninika ukuya ku Yerusalemu, asendele abasambi bakwe ikumi limo na babili beka. Mu nshila alabeba ati," 
Matthew20:18 “Moneni, twalaya ku Yerusalemu, elyo Umwana wa muntu alaya poswa kuli bashimapepo bacindami na bakafundisha bamafunde. Balaya mupingwila ukufwa." 
Matthew20:19 Balaya muposa mu minwe ya Benafyalo, nabo bakamuseka no kumuma ifikoti no kumutanika pa musalaba. Elyo ubushiku bwalenga shitatu akabuuka ku bafwa.”" 
Matthew20:20 Elyo nyina wa bamwana Sebede aishile na bamwane kuli Yesu. Aisa fukama apali Yesu, alamulombako cimo." 
Matthew20:21 Yesu amwipusha ati, “Finshi ulefwaya?” Nao amweba ati, “Ndelomba ukuti usuminishe abana bandi aba babili ukuti, umo akaleikala ku kulyo kobe, umbi nao ku kuso kobe nga waba Imfumu.”" 
Matthew20:22 Yesu ayasuka ati, “Tamwishibe ico mulelomba. Bushe kuti mwanwena mu lukombo lwamacushi ulo ndi nokunwenamo?” Bamwasuka abati, “Ee, kuti twacita.”" 
Matthew20:23 Yesu abeba ati, “Ee, ukunwa kwena mukanwena mu lukombo lwandi, nomba ukwikala ku kulyo kwandi nangu ku kuso, teine mpeela. Ni Tata eupeela abo afipekanishisha.”" 
Matthew20:24 Ilyo abasambi balya bambi ikumi baumfwa ifi, bafulilwa aba bamunyina babili." 
Matthew20:25 Yesu abeta bonse, alabeba ati, “Mwalishiba ukuti bashamfumu ba Benafyalo balomya ubufumu bwabo, na bakalamba babo nabo babateeka no mucusha." 
Matthew20:26 Imwe tacili nakuba ifi iyoo. Pali imwe onse uulefwaya ukuba umukalamba, abe ewakumutumika." 
Matthew20:27 Kabili onse uulefwaya ukuba uwantanshi, ali nokuba umusha wenu." 
Matthew20:28 Ngefyo no Mwana wa muntu wine taisa pakuti bamutumike, lelo ni kukutumika, no kuleka umweo wakwe pakupususha abengi.”" 
Matthew20:29 Cilya Yesu na basambi bakwe balefuma mu Yeriko, ibumba ilikalamba lyalemukonka." 
Matthew20:30 Impofu shibili ninshi shikele mumbali ya nshila. Ilyo shaumfwa ukuti ni Yesu eulepita, shalapunda ashiti, “We Mfumu, mwana Davidi, shi wingatulangulukilako!”" 
Matthew20:31 Elyo ibumba lyalashikalipila, lyalasheba ukuti shitalale. Lelo shena elyo shacishamo ukupunda ashiti, “We Mfumu, we mwana Davidi, shi wingatulangulukilako!”" 
Matthew20:32 Elyo Yesu aiminina, ashiita, alashipusha ati, “Finshi mulefwaya ukuti mucitile?”" 
Matthew20:33 Shamwasuka ashiti, “We Mfumu tulefwaya ukulalolesha!”" 
Matthew20:34 Yesu uluse lwamwikata, ashikumya na pa menso. Awe apopene shalalolesha, shalamukonka no kumukonka." 
Matthew21:1 Cilya Yesu na basambi bakwe baile balepalama ku Yerusalemu, bafikile na ku Betifage, ku lupili lwa Miolifa. Yesu atuma abasambi babili," 
Matthew21:2 abeba ati, “Kabiyeni pa mushi ulya pantanshi. Pakwingilafye pene, muleya sanga punda nakulikwa pamo na kamwane. Mubakakule, mubandetele." 
Matthew21:3 Nomba umo nga alafwaya ukumulesha, mumwebe amuti, ‘Imfumu eilebafwaya, kabili yalababwesha nombalinefye.’ ”" 
Matthew21:4 Kanshi ifi fyacitike pakufikilisha ifyasosele kasesema ati," 
Matthew21:5 “Mwebe umwana mwanakashi Sioni amuti, ala mona Imfumu yobe iyi, yakufikilila iyamutembo, ininine pali punda, pa musepela, umwana wa punda.”" 
Matthew21:6 Awe abasambi baya citila ngomo Yesu abebele. 
Matthew21:7 Baleta punda na kamwane. Elyo bayanshikapo insalu shabo na Yesu epo aikala. 
Matthew21:8 Na bantu ibumba likalamba balayansa insalu shabo mu nshila. Elyo bambi bena balakontaula imisambo ya miti, balayansa mu nshila." 
Matthew21:9 Amabumba ya bantu abali pantanshi na balemukonka panuma balapunda abati, “Hosana, nakalebalika Mwana Davidi! Lesa apaale uyu waisa uo Imfumu yatuma! Lumbanyeni Lesa Mukulu!”" 
Matthew21:10 Ilyo Yesu aingila mu Yerusalemu, mu musumba onse mwakaba na see ku congo. Abantu balaipusha abati, “Nga uyu nani?”" 
Matthew21:11 Amabumba ya bantu bakonkele Yesu, yalayasuka ayati, “Uyu ni Yesu, kasesema uwafuma ku Nasaleti mu Galile.”" 
Matthew21:12 Ilyo Yesu aingile mwi Tempele, atamfishe panse bonse abaleshitamo na baleshitishamo ifintu. Kabili alapenaula amatebulo ya balekabushanya indalama, ne fipuna fya baleshitisha inkunda." 
Matthew21:13 Abeba ati, “Ala calembwa ukuti, ‘Iŋanda yandi ikalaitwa ukuti ni ŋanda ya mapepo’, lelo imwe muisangwile icifulo ca bapupu!”" 
Matthew21:14 Kabili impofu na balemana baisa kuli Yesu mwi Tempele, nao abaposha." 
Matthew21:15 Nomba bashimapepo bacindami na bakafundisha bamafunde bafulwa nganshi pakumona ifipeshamano acita, elyo no kumfwa uko abaice balepunda mwi Tempele baleti, “Hosana, nakalebalika Mwana Davidi!”" 
Matthew21:16 Epakwipusha Yesu abati, “Bushe tauleumfwa ifyo aba baice balesosa?” Yesu nao abasuka ati, “Ee, nintesha. Nomba bushe tamwabelenga ukuti, ‘Ku tunwa twa twaice no twa kwibele, eko waipekanishisha amalumbo yene yene?’ ”" 
Matthew21:17 Awe afumapo, abasha, aya na ku musumba wa Betani, eko aya sendama." 
Matthew21:18 Ulucelo ilyo Yesu alebwelela ku musumba wa Yerusalemu, insala yamwikete." 
Matthew21:19 Cilya amona umukunyu umo mumbali ya nshila, eko aya. Asangakofye amabula yeka yeka, takwatwala nangu kamo. Elyo aeba umuti ati, “We muti we, wikatala autwala ifitwalo nakabili!” Awe apopene no mukunyu wauma." 
Matthew21:20 Abasambi bati bamone ifi, basunguka nganshi. Balasosa abati, “Nga kanshi umukunyu wauma shani apa pene?”" 
Matthew21:21 Yesu abasuka ati, “Ndemweba icine cine, nga namusumina tamuletwishika nelyo panono, kuti mwacita ico nacita ku mukunyu. Kuti mwaeba nolu lupili amuti, ‘Fuma apa, uipose muli bemba’, no kucitika kuti cacitika." 
Matthew21:22 Nga muli bacisumino, fyonse ifyo mwakulalomba mu mapepo mwakulapeelwa.”" 
Matthew21:23 Elyo Yesu aingilile mwi Tempele. Ilyo alefunda abantu, bashimapepo bacindami na bakalamba ba bantu baisa kuli Yesu. Balamwipusha abati, “Bushe ni ku maka nshi ucitilako ifi fintu? Nga uwakupeela aya maka nani?”" 
Matthew21:24 Yesu abasuka ati, “Na ine nalamwipushapo icipusho cimo. Na imwe nga mwayasuka, na ine nalamwebako ukufuma amaka ayo ncitilako ifi fintu." 
Matthew21:25 Bushe ulubatisho lwakwa Yoani lwafumine kwi? Bushe lwafumine ku mulu, atemwa ku bantu?” Awe balapingushanya abati, “Nga twatila lwafumine ku mulu, ninshi aletweba ati, ‘Ngeco mushamusuminine cinshi?’" 
Matthew21:26 Conse nga twatila ni ku bantu lwafumine, awe abantu tabatupanye, pantu bonse balishininkisha ukuti Yoani ali ni kasesema.”" 
Matthew21:27 Kanshi epakwasuka Yesu abati, “Awe tatwishibe.” Yesu nao abeba ati, “Kanshi na ine nshamwebe ukufuma amaka ncitilako ifi fintu.”" 
Matthew21:28 “Nga imwe kuti mwatilapo shani? Kwaliko umuntu umo uwali na bana abaume babili. Uyu muntu aya ku wamukalamba, amweba ati, ‘We mwana, kabiye kukubomba lelo mwibala lyandi lya myangashi.’" 
Matthew21:29 Ena ayasuka ati, ‘Awe nshayeko.’ Nomba panuma ashala alanguluka, aya na kukubomba mwibala." 
Matthew21:30 Kabili uyu muntu aya ku wamwaice, nao amweba cimo cine. Ena amwasuka ati, ‘Ee mukwai, nalaya.’ Lelo taileko iyoo." 
Matthew21:31 Bushe pali aba babili, uwacitile ifyo wishi alefwaya nani?” Bamwasuka abati, “Wamukalamba.” Yesu abasuka ati, “Ndemweba icine cine, bakasonkesha bamusonko na bacilende balemutangilila ukwingila mu Bufumu bwakwa Lesa." 
Matthew21:32 Pantu Yoani ilyo aishile kukumulanga inshila yabololoke, tamwamusumine. Lelo bakasonkesha bamusonko na bacilende bena balimusumine. Kabili nelyo mwamwene ifi, awe nalyo line tamwalapile no kusumina Yoani.”" 
Matthew21:33 Yesu ati, “Umfweniko umulumbe na umbi. Kwaliko umuntu uwalimine ibala lya myangashi. Apindako ne linga, aimbilamo ne cakukaminamo umwangashi, akuulilamo no lupungu. Elyo aseekesha ibala lya myangashi ku balimi, ena aima aya pa bulendo." 
Matthew21:34 Cilya ulwakulobolola ifisabo lwafika, atumako abasha ku balimi, pakuti bese bamupokeleko ifisabo fimo." 
Matthew21:35 Nomba abalimi bena baikata abasha bakwe. Umo bamupumaula, umbi bamwipaya, elyo umbi nao bamulasaula amabwe." 
Matthew21:36 Kabili atumako abasha na bambi abengi ukucila pa bantanshi. Nabo bene, abalimi babacita ngefyo bacitile ababiye." 
Matthew21:37 Pakulekelesha atumako umwana wakwe ati, ‘Wena balaya mucindika.’" 
Matthew21:38 Lelo abalimi bashimona mwane, balaebana abati, ‘Impyani iyi! Aleni, iseni natuipaye, uleke nifwe tukamubuulile ibala.’" 
Matthew21:39 Awe bamwikata, bamuposa kunse ye bala lya myangashi, bamwipaya." 
Matthew21:40 “Nomba umwine ibala lya myangashi nga abwela, bushe akesa bacita shani abo balimi?”" 
Matthew21:41 Bayasuka Yesu abati, “Abo bantu babi, umwine ibala akabonaula icabipisha. Akaseekesha ne bala lyakwe ku balimi bambi abakuti balemupeela ifisabo fyakwe pa nshita yakulobolola.”" 
Matthew21:42 Elyo Yesu abeba ati, “Bushe tamwatala amubelenga mu Malembo Yamushilo ayatila, “‘Ilibwe ilyo bakakuula basuulile, elyaisa ba ilyakwikasha petungi. Ifi efyo Imfumu yacita, kabili cakupapa kuli fwe baleimwena.’" 
Matthew21:43 “Eico ndemweba nati, imwe bakamupoka Ubufumu bwakwa Lesa bakabupeela na ku bantu abacita ubufwayo bwa Mfumu." 
Matthew21:44 [Umuntu onse uukaponena pali ili libwe, akafunaika, na uo likaponena likamushonaula.]”" 
Matthew21:45 Bashimapepo bacindami na Bafalise, pakumfwa iyi milumbe, bailuka ukuti ebo alelandapo." 
Matthew21:46 Balafwaya ukumwikata, nomba batiina amabumba ya bantu, pantu abantu bena baleti Yesu ni kasesema." 
Matthew22:1 Yesu nakabili abalandile mu milumbe ati," 
Matthew22:2 “Ubufumu bwa mu mulu kuti twabupalanya ku mfumu iyacitile mwane imitebeto ya bwinga. 
Matthew22:3 Awe yatuma abasha baiko ukuya eba abalalikwe ku bwinga. Nomba bakaana ukwisako. 
Matthew22:4 Elyo yatuma abasha bambi aiti, ‘Kebeni abalalikwe amuti, ala nimpekanya imitebeto yandi. Ninjipaya bacilume wa ŋombe ne ŋombe ishaina. Fyonse nafipekanishiwa, isenifye ku bwinga!’" 
Matthew22:5 Lelo abalalikwe ku bwinga tabasakamene. Umo aya ku mabala yakwe, umbi nao ku fya makwebo yakwe." 
Matthew22:6 Bambi abalalikwe baikata abasha ba mfumu, balabacusha, babepaya." 
Matthew22:7 Imfumu yafulwa nganshi. Yatumako ne fita fyaiko, fyaya ipaya filya fipondo, fyafyocela no musumba." 
Matthew22:8 Elyo imfumu yaeba abasha baiko aiti, ‘Ubwinga nabupekanishiwa, lelo abalalikwe tabalingile." 
Matthew22:9 Kanshi kabiyeni ku masansa ya misebo, bonse abo mulesanga mubete ku bwinga.’" 
Matthew22:10 Awe abasha basalanganina mu misebo, balalonganya bonse ababi na basuma. Awe ne ŋanda ya bwinga yaisula abantu." 
Matthew22:11 “Elyo imfumu yaisamo kukumona abalalikwe. Yaisa sangamo umuntu umo ushafwele insalu sha bwinga. 
Matthew22:12 Elyo yamwipusha aiti, ‘Mune, nga wingile shani muno, ukwabula ukufwala insalu sha bwinga?’ Awe ena alifye tondolo." 
Matthew22:13 Elyo imfumu yaeba ababomfi aiti, ‘Mukakeni amaboko na molu, mumupose panse mu mfifi, ukukalaba imisowa no kusumanya ameno.’" 
Matthew22:14 Pantu abetwa bengi, lelo abasalwa banono.”" 
Matthew22:15 Elyo Abafalise baile kukupandana amano, pakuti bafwaye umwakumwikatila mu milandile yakwe." 
Matthew22:16 Awe batuma abasambi babo na bena Herodi kuli Yesu. Bamweba abati, “Kafundisha, twalishiba ukuti uli mufumacumi, ufunda fyonse ifyo Lesa afwaya mu cishinka. Kabili tautiina muntu nelyo umo, pantu tawaba na kapatulula." 
Matthew22:17 Kanshi twebeko ifyo iwe utontonkanya. Bushe calilinga ukulasonka umusonko kuli Kesalo nangu iyoo?” 
Matthew22:18 Nomba Yesu ico eshibe imitontonkanishishe yabo ibi, abasuka ati, “Mwe mfundabuteshi mwe! Cinshi ico mulenjesesha?" 
Matthew22:19 Nangeni indalama mupeela ku musonko?” Awe nabo bamuletela imo. 
Matthew22:20 Elyo Yesu abepusha ati, “Ngoyu balengelepo nefi filembelwepo fyakwani?”" 
Matthew22:21 Nabo bayasuka abati, “Fyakwa Kesalo.” Elyo Yesu abeba ati, “Eyo, kanshi akupeeleni Kesalo, ifyakwa Kesalo. Elyo akupeeleni Lesa, ifyakwa Lesa.”" 
Matthew22:22 Bati bomfwe ifi, awe balapapa. Kanshi epakumusha." 
Matthew22:23 Ubushiku ubo bwine Abasaduki bamo baishile kuli Yesu. Abasaduki bena batila, “Takwaba kushukuka kwa bafwa.” Balaipusha Yesu abati," 
Matthew22:24 “Kafundisha, Mose asosa ati, ‘Umuntu nga afwa, nomba tafyelepo abana, munyina ali nokuupa mukamfwilwa pakuti afyalileko munyina abana.’" 
Matthew22:25 Nomba kumwesu kwaliko bamunyina cine lubali, abaume beka beka. Umukalamba wabo ewabalilepo ukuupa, lelo afwa ukwabula ukufyalamo umwana. Epakushila munyina umukashi wakwe." 
Matthew22:26 Uwabubili no wabutatu nabo bamuupa, nomba nabo lumo lwine, mpakafye bonse cine lubali bafwa ukwabula ukufyalamo abana." 
Matthew22:27 Elyo pakulekelesha nao umwanakashi asuka afwa. 
Matthew22:28 Nomba pakushukuka kwa bafwa, bushe umwanakashi akaba umukashi wakwani pali aba bonse cine lubali aupilweko?”" 
Matthew22:29 Yesu abasuka ati, “Mwaliluba, pantu tamwaishiba Malembo Yamushilo, nangu amaka yakwa Lesa." 
Matthew22:30 Pantu ilyo abantu bakashukuka ku bafwa, tabakaleupa nangu ukulaupwa. Lelo bakaba nga bamalaika ba mu mulu." 
Matthew22:31 Kabinge pa mulandu wakushukuka ku bafwa, bushe tamwabelenga ifyo Lesa umwine amweba ati," 
Matthew22:32 ‘Nine Lesa wakwa Abrahamu, Lesa wakwa Isaki, Lesa wakwa Yakobo?’ Kanshi ni Lesa wa bomi, te Lesa wa bafwa iyoo.”" 
Matthew22:33 Ilyo amabumba yaumfwa ifi, yalapapa imifundile yakwe." 
Matthew22:34 Ilyo Abafalise baumfwile ukuti Yesu aputula Abasaduki umulomo, nabo balilongene." 
Matthew22:35 Elyo umunabo umo kafundisha wamafunde, alamwesha ati," 
Matthew22:36 “Kafundisha ifunde ilyacilapo pa mafunde yonse ayakwa Lesa, lifunde nshi?”" 
Matthew22:37 Yesu amwasuka ati, “‘Uletemwa Imfumu Lesa obe no mutima obe onse, no mweo obe onse, na mano yobe yonse.’" 
Matthew22:38 Ili e funde ilyacila pali yonse, kabili elyakubalilapo." 
Matthew22:39 Elyo ilyabubili ilyapalana neli line, lyakutila, ‘Uletemwa umubiyo ngefyo waitemwa we mwine.’" 
Matthew22:40 Pali aya mafunde yabili, epashinta Amafunde yonse ayakwa Mose na fyonse ifyo bakasesema balembele.”" 
Matthew22:41 Ilyo acili na Bafalise abalongene, Yesu abepwishe ati, “Nga imwe mutontonkanya shani pali Kristu? Bushe mutila ni mwana ani?”" 
Matthew22:42 Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Ni mwana Davidi.”" 
Matthew22:43 Yesu nao abeba ati, “Nga kanshi Davidi ilyo asanikilwe na Mupashi, amwitile shani ‘Imfumu?’ Ilyo atile ati," 
Matthew22:44 ‘Imfumu yaeba Imfumu yandi aiti, ikala ku kulyo kwandi, mpaka abalwani bobe nkabacita apakunyanta amakasa yobe.’" 
Matthew22:45 Nga kanshi apo Davidi aita Kristu ati ni Mfumu, bushe Kristu kuti aba shani mwane?”" 
Matthew22:46 Awe tapali nangu umo uwakwasukapo. Ukufuma ubo bwine bushiku, tapali nangu umo uwakupama ukwipusha Yesu na fimbi." 
Matthew23:1 Elyo Yesu aebele amabumba ya bantu na basambi bakwe ati," 
Matthew23:2 “Bakafundisha bamafunde na Bafalise ebabuula amalo yakwa Mose. 
Matthew23:3 Eico kanshi mulekonka no kucita fyonse ifyo balemweba. Nomba mwilabapashanya mu micitile yabo, pantu tabakonka ifyo bafunda." 
Matthew23:4 Bakaka ifipe ifyafinisha, batwika na bantu ukusenda pa mabeya yabo. Nomba abene teti batenshemo nelyo panono." 
Matthew23:5 Ifintu fyonse ifyo bacita, baficitafye pakuti abantu babatambe. Bena pakulanga ukunakila Lesa, mulya bakakila utupande tumo utwa Malembo Yamushilo, uto bakakila pa mpumi na pa maboko, balafikusha nganshi. Elyo ne nsenkebele sha nsalu shabo nasho bashilefya lefyafye." 
Matthew23:6 Batemwa ifipuna ifyamucinshi pa malila, elyo ne ficindamishepo mu masinagoga." 
Matthew23:7 Kabili batemwa ukuti abantu balebaposha mu mansa sha fisankano balebeta nokuti, ‘Bakafundisha.’" 
Matthew23:8 Nomba imwe, mwilaleka abantu balemwita kafundisha, pantu mwakwatafye kafundisha umo, ico imwe bonse muli bwananyina." 
Matthew23:9 Pano isonde mwilaita nangu umo amuti, ‘Shifwe,’ pantu mwakwatafye Shinwe umo, uwaba mu mulu." 
Matthew23:10 Mwilaleka nelyo umo alemwita, ‘intungulushi,’ pantu mwakwatafye intungulushi imo, ni Kristu." 
Matthew23:11 Umukalamba pali imwe bonse, afwile ukuba ewakutumika." 
Matthew23:12 Pantu onse uuikusha, bakamucefya, no uicefya, bakamusansabalika." 
Matthew23:13 “Mukacimona, mwe bakafundisha bamafunde, na imwe mwe Bafalise, mwe mfundabuteshi! Mwalisalila abantu pakuti beingila mu Bufumu bwa mu mulu. Mwe bene tamwingilamo, elyo mwalesha na bambi abalefwaya ukwingilamo." 
Matthew23:14 [Mukacimona, mwe bakafundisha bamafunde, na imwe mwe Bafalise, mwe mfundabuteshi! Muliila bamukamfwilwa ifyuma fyabo, kabili mwatemwa ukuilanga mukupepa amapepo ayatali. Mwandi Lesa akamukandisha ukucila!]" 
Matthew23:15 “Mukacimona, mwe bakafundisha bamafunde, na imwe mwe Bafalise, mwe mfundabuteshi! Mupwa impanga ne mpanga, pali bemba na pa milundu, pakutifye munashe umo asumine mwipepo lyenu. Nomba ilyo asumina mwipepo lyenu, mulenga nokuti abipishepo no kucila, wakuyafye kukupya mu mulilo wa pe nga imwe!" 
Matthew23:16 “Mukacimona, mwe ntungulushi shapofula mwe! Mwe batila amuti, ‘Umuntu uwalapa ati, napali Tempele, ninshi tapali nelyo cimo. Lelo uwalapa ati, napali golide uwa mwi Tempele, wena ninshi ali nokufikilisha umulapo wakwe.’" 
Matthew23:17 Mwe mpelwamano mwe! Mwe mpofu mwe! Nga icacindamapo cinshi? Bushe ni golide, atemwa Litempele ililenga ukuti golide abe icintu catuulwa kuli Lesa?" 
Matthew23:18 Kabili mutila amuti, ‘Umuntu nga alapa ati, napali ubulambo bwakwa Lesa, ninshi tapali nelyo cimo. Lelo uwalapa ati, napali umutuulo uuli pa bulambo bwakwa Lesa, ninshi ali nokufikilisha umulapo wakwe.’" 
Matthew23:19 Mwe mpofu mwe! Nga icacindamapo cinshi? Bushe mutuulo, atemwa bulambo bwakwa Lesa ubulenga ukuti umutuulo ube icintu catuulwa kuli Lesa?" 
Matthew23:20 Kanshi uwalapa ati, ‘Napali ubulambo bwakwa Lesa’, ninshi alapa ubulambo bwine na fyonse ifilipo." 
Matthew23:21 Ilyo umuntu alapa ati, ‘Napali Itempele’, ninshi Litempele alapa, alapa na Lesa wine uwikalamo." 
Matthew23:22 Kabili ilyo muntu alapa ati, ‘Napali umulu,’ ninshi alapa icipuna cakwa Lesa, alapa na Lesa wine uwikalapo." 
Matthew23:23 “Mukacimona, mwe bakafundisha bamafunde, na imwe, mwe Bafalise, mwe mfundabuteshi! Mwe batuula Lesa cimo pekumi lyonse, na pa misalufye iyakuwamya ifyakulya. Lelo mwalisuula ukukonka amafunde ayakalamba mu Mafunde yakwa Mose, ayali ngo mulinganya, uluse ne cishinka. Aya e mafunde mwaba nokukonka, elyo na yambi yene tamuli nakuyasuulako." 
Matthew23:24 Mwe ntungulushi shapofula mwe! Mufwisa akashishi, lelo mucibula ingamila!" 
Matthew23:25 “Mukacimona, mwe bakafundisha bamafunde, na imwe mwe Bafalise, mwe mfundabuteshi! Muwamya inkombo ne mbale kunse, lelo mukati mwaisulafye ubulili no bukakashi." 
Matthew23:26 We mpofu ya Mufalise we! Shitala wamya mukati ka lukombo ne mbale, elyo lyena na kunse kulewama." 
Matthew23:27 “Mukacimona, mwe bakafundisha bamafunde, na imwe mwe Bafalise, mwe mfundabuteshi! Mwaba nge nindi bashingulako impemba, kunse shimoneka ishayemba, lelo mukati mwaisulamo amafupa ya bafwa, na fimbi fyonse ifyakowela." 
Matthew23:28 Kanshi na imwe kunse mumoneka ku bantu, nga bantu abololoke, lelo mukati mwaisulamo ubufi no bubi bonse." 
Matthew23:29 “Mukacimona, mwe bakafundisha bamafunde, na imwe mwe Bafalise, mwe mfundabuteshi! Mukuulilila inindi sha bakasesema no kuwaminisha inindi sha bantu abololoke." 
Matthew23:30 Kabili mutila amuti, ‘Ifwe atusangwako, pa nshita ya fikolwe fyesu, awe ifwe nga tatwaiposelemo mukwipaya bakasesema.’" 
Matthew23:31 Kanshi mwaliishinina ukuti, muli bana ba fipondo fyaipeye bakasesema!" 
Matthew23:32 Aleni kanshi, konkanyenipo mupwishishe umulimo ifikolwe fyenu fyatampile." 
Matthew23:33 Mwe nsoka mwe, mwe bana ba nsoka mwe! Nga muleti mukapusuka shani ku bupingushi bwakuposwa mu mulilo wape?" 
Matthew23:34 Eico na ine nakulamutumina bakasesema na bamano na bakafundisha bamafunde. Pali aba bamo mwakulabepaya no kubatanika. Bambi bena mwakulaboma ifikoti mu masinagoga no kulabasapika muli uyu musumba na muli uyu. 
Matthew23:35 Epakuti mukaponenwe ne shamo lyakusumya umulopa wa bakaele mwaipaya pano isonde. Ukufuma pa mfwa ya wakaele Abeli, ukufika na ku mfwa yakwa Sakaria mwana Balakiya, uo mwaipeye mwi Tempele lubali lwa pantanshi ya bulambo bwakwa Lesa." 
Matthew23:36 Ndemweba icine cine, fyonse ifi fikaponena pa bantu ba ino nkulo." 
Matthew23:37 “Yerusalemu, we Yerusalemu, we wipaya bakasesema no kwipaya ku mabwe inkombe Lesa akutumina! Yangu imiku ubwingi iyo nalefwaya ukulonganya bamwano, nga filya nankoko afukatila tumwane mu mapindo, nomba tawalefwaya." 
Matthew23:38 Mona, iŋanda yobe ikakushalila icipompa!" 
Matthew23:39 Lelo ndekweba nati, ine tawakamone nakabili, mpaka ilyo ukasosa auti, ‘Napaalwe uyu waisa uo Imfumu yatuma.’ ”" 
Matthew24:1 Yesu afumine mwi Tempele. Cilya aleya, abasambi bakwe bapalama, balefwaya ukuti amone ifyo Itempele lyakuulwa." 
Matthew24:2 Yesu ena abeba ati, “Bushe nifi fikuulwa mulemona? Ndemweba icine cine, tapakashale libwe pa mulu wa libwe libiye. Yakabongololwafye yonse.”" 
Matthew24:3 Kabili cilya Yesu ekele pa lupili lwa Miolifa, abasambi balamwipusha ilyo bali nankwe beka, abati, “Twebeko, bushe ifi fintu fikabako lilali? Nga cishibilo nshi cikalanga ilyo ukesa nokuti icalo calapwa?”" 
Matthew24:4 Yesu epakubasuka ati, “Mulecenjela, pakuti umuntu nangu umo ekamubepaika." 
Matthew24:5 Pantu abengi bakesa balesosa abati, ‘Nine Kristu’ kabili bakabepa abengi." 
Matthew24:6 Elyo mukalaumfwa inkondo ne ntulubundi sha nkondo, mwikasakamikwa. Ala ifi fintu fili nokucitika, lelo ukupwa kwa calo ninshi takulati." 
Matthew24:7 Pantu umushobo umo ukemina umushobo ubiye, elyo ne mfumu imo ikemina imfumu ibiye. Kukaba ifipowe ne finkunkuma mu ncende ishalekana lekana." 
Matthew24:8 Ifi fyonse fikabafye e citendekelo ca macushi. 
Matthew24:9 Kabili bakamutwala ku bakumucusha no kumwipaya. Elyo ne mishobo yonse ikamupata pa mulandu wa ine. 
Matthew24:10 Elyo abengi bakasuula ku cisumino cabo. Abantu bakapatana no kulabepeshanya pakuposa umubiye. 
Matthew24:11 Elyo kukesa bakasesema babufi abengi, bakalabepaika abengi." 
Matthew24:12 Ico ububi bukafulisha, eico ne citemwiko cakutemwana cikacepa." 
Matthew24:13 Lelo uukashipikisha mpaka na ku mpela, eukapusuka." 
Matthew24:14 Kabili iyi Mbila Nsuma ya Bufumu ikatala ikabilwa pano isonde ponse, pakuti ipeele bukambone bwakushinina abantu ba mishobo yonse, elyo no kupwa kwa calo kukesa." 
Matthew24:15 “Kanshi ilyo mukamona umupamba wabonaushi uo kasesema Daniele alandapo uli mwi Tempele, ‘uulebelenga naeluke’," 
Matthew24:16 elyo abakaba mu Yudeya bakafulumukile ku mpili. 
Matthew24:17 Uukaba pa mutenge wa ŋanda yakwe, ekeka kukuya buula ifintu fyakwe mu ŋanda." 
Matthew24:18 Uukaba mwibala, ekabwela kukubuula insalu shakwe." 
Matthew24:19 We shamo we ku banakashi abakaba pabukulu, na bakalaonsha abana muli shilya nshiku!" 
Matthew24:20 Mulelomba Lesa ukuti mwikafulumuka mu nshita yampepo, nangu pa bushiku bwe Sabata." 
Matthew24:21 Pantu ukufumafye apo Lesa abumbile isonde ukufika na pali nomba, tapatala apaba, kabili takwakatale akuba ubucushi ubwabipisha ngobo." 
Matthew24:22 Kabili Lesa akaanacefyako isho nshiku, nga tekuti kube umuntu nangu umo uwingapusuka. Lelo pa mulandu wa basalwa bakwe, isho nshiku Lesa alishicefyako." 
Matthew24:23 “Eico kanshi, umo nga amweba ati, ‘Moneni Kristu uyu ali kuno!’ nangu ‘Ulya ali kulya!’ mwikasumina." 
Matthew24:24 Pantu kukamoneka ba Kristu babufi na bakasesema babufi. Bakalacita ifishibilo ne finjelengwe, ifyakuti bengabepaikilako na basalwa bene nga cingacitika." 
Matthew24:25 Kanshi imwe namusokako libela. 
Matthew24:26 “Eico nga bamweba abati, ‘Ala Kristu ulya mu matololo!’ mwikayako. Nangu nga batila, ‘Ala Kristu ulya ali mukati ka ŋanda!’ Mwikasumina." 
Matthew24:27 Pantu nga filya umwele wa mfula utula ku kabanga wabyatila na ku masamba, efyo ne mishile ya Mwana wa muntu ikaba." 
Matthew24:28 “Uko konse ukuba icitumbi, eko na makubi yalongana." 
Matthew24:29 “Ubucushi bwa nshiku shilya bukatila nga bwapita, apopene akasuba kakafiita, umweshi nao ukaleka ukubalika. Intanda nasho shikapona ku mulu na maka ya ku mulu yakatenkana." 
Matthew24:30 Elyo ku mulu kukamoneka icakwishibilako Umwana wa muntu, na bantu ba pano calo bakaililila ubulanda. Elyo bakamona Umwana wa muntu uko aleisa mu makumbi na maka no bucindami nganshi." 
Matthew24:31 Elyo akatuma bamalaika bakwe ne penga ilya ciunda icikalamba, kukulonganika abasalwa bakwe ukufuma mu tupinda tonse tune twa pano isonde. Ukufuma uko umulu watendekela, ukufika noko wapelela." 
Matthew24:32 “Kanshi ku mukunyu eko musambilile. Imisambo yauko itila nga yapuka ululembelya, ninshi mwaishiba ukuti amainsa yali mupepi." 
Matthew24:33 Eifyo fine na imwe nga mwamona ifi fintu fyonse fyalacitika, ninshi mukeshibe ukuti Kristu ali mupepi, alifye pa mwinshi." 
Matthew24:34 Ndemweba icine cine ukuti, ino nkulo tayakapite, ninshi ifi fintu fyonse fyalicitika." 
Matthew24:35 Umulu ne calo fikapita, lelo amashiwi yandi yena tayakapite iyoo.”" 
Matthew24:36 “Lelo tapaba uwaishiba ilyo ubo bushiku bukafika, nangu ni nshita ine. Bamalaika ba mu mulu tabaishiba, nangufye Umwana taishiba, kanofye Tata eka ewaishiba." 
Matthew24:37 Kanshi nga filya cali mu nshiku shakwa Noa, efyo cikaba nelyo Umwana wa muntu akesa." 
Matthew24:38 Ilyo ilyeshi talilati lise, abantu balelya no kunwa balenwa, baleupa no kuupwa, mpaka no kufikafye ku bushiku Noa aingile mu cibwato." 
Matthew24:39 Abantu tabaenekele nelyo cimo mpaka ilyeshi lyaisa balofya bonse. Ifyo fine efyo cikaba na pa nshita ya kwisa kwa Mwana wa muntu. 
Matthew24:40 Abaume babili bakaba mwibala, umo akasendwapo, umubiye akashala." 
Matthew24:41 Abanakashi babili bakalapela ku libwe, umo akasendwapo, umubiye akashala." 
Matthew24:42 Kanshi mulelola, pantu tamwaishiba ubushiku Imfumu yenu ikeshilapo." 
Matthew24:43 Cena ici muli nokushininkisha ukuti, umwine ŋanda nga cakuti aishiba inshita ya bushiku ilyo umupupu aleishilapo, ala kuti alalola, tekuti aleke umupupu amwingilile ebe mu ŋanda yakwe." 
Matthew24:44 Eico na imwe kanshi muli nokuba abaiteyanya, pantu Umwana wa muntu akesa pa nshita mushenekele." 
Matthew24:45 “Bushe ali kwi umusha wacishinka, kabili uwamano, uwakuti shikulu wakwe amupeela ukwangalila abanankwe, alebapeela icakulya pa nshita iyilingile?" 
Matthew24:46 Alishuka uyu musha, uo shikulu wakwe akasanga alebombela umo mwine." 
Matthew24:47 Ndemweba icine cine, shikulu wakwe akamucita kangalila wa fyuma fyakwe fyonse." 
Matthew24:48 Lelo umusha umuwelewele, ena nga atila ati, ‘Shikulu akokola ukubwela,’" 
Matthew24:49 elyo atendeka ukulapuma abasha banankwe no kulalya no kunwa na bacakolwa. 
Matthew24:50 Ala shikulu wa uyu musha akesa pa bushiku ashenekele, pa nshita ashishibe." 
Matthew24:51 Shikulu wakwe akamukanda, akamuposa uko akaya cimona pamo ne mfundabuteshi. Ekukaba imisowa no kusumanya ameno." 
Matthew25:1 “Ubufumu bwa mu mulu kuti twabupashanya ku bakashana ikumi limo. Batile bashibuula ifisaniko fyabo, baya balekonkela shibwinga." 
Matthew25:2 Kanshi aba basano ni mpelwamano, elyo basano nabo bena bamano." 
Matthew25:3 Abakashana impelwamano bena basenda ifisaniko fyabo, ukwabula ukusenda amafuta." 
Matthew25:4 Abamano bena basenda ifisaniko fyabo, na mafuta mu misashi yabo." 
Matthew25:5 Nomba ico shibwinga akokola ukwisa, awe balashipula bonse, basuka bapona mu tulo." 
Matthew25:6 “Nomba ubushiku pakati baumfwa utupundu ukuti, ‘Shibwinga uyo aisa, kamusengeleni.’" 
Matthew25:7 Elyo abakashana bonse babuuka balayasha ne fisaniko fyabo. 
Matthew25:8 Abakashana impelwamano balaeba abamano abati, ‘Tupeniko amafuta, pantu ifwe ifisaniko fyesu fyalashima.’" 
Matthew25:9 Abamano babasuka abati, ‘Awe, tayakumane bonse ifwe na imwe. Kabiyenifye ku bashitisha amafuta, eko muyeishitila.’" 
Matthew25:10 Ilyo abakashana impelwamano baleya kukushita, awe na shibwinga ashala afika. Elyo abakashana bamano abaipekenye epakwingila pamo na shibwinga mu ŋanda ya bwinga. Awe ne ciibi baisalako." 
Matthew25:11 “Elyo panuma abakashana balya bambi nabo baisa. Balasosa abati, ‘Mukwai! Mukwai! Shitwiswileniko!’" 
Matthew25:12 Nao shibwinga abasuka ati, ‘Cine cine ndemweba, imwe nshimwishibe.’" 
Matthew25:13 Kanshi muleikala abaibukila, pantu tamwaishiba ubushiku nangu inshita.”" 
Matthew25:14 Kabili Yesu alabeba ati, “Kanshi caba ngo muntu uuleya pa bulendo, atala aita abasha bakwe, abaseekesha ne fyuma fyakwe fyonse." 
Matthew25:15 Umo amupeela indalama amakana yasano, umbi amakana yabili, umbi nao amupeela ikana limo. Abapeela ukulingana na maka yabo. Epakwima aya na pa bulendo." 
Matthew25:16 Umuntu uwapokele indalama amakana yasano, alashibomfya apopene, amwenapo na shimbi amakana yasano." 
Matthew25:17 Elyo uwapokele indalama amakana yabili, nao acita ifyo fine, amwenapo na shimbi amakana yabili." 
Matthew25:18 Nomba uwapokele indalama ikana limo, wena aimba icilindi mu mushili, emo afisa indalama shakwa shikulu wakwe." 
Matthew25:19 “Elyo pa nshita ntali shikulu wa abo basha asuka abwela. Aita na basha bakwe ukuti balondolole ifyo babomfya icuma cakwe. 
Matthew25:20 Uwapokele indalama amakana yasano aisa, aletelapo na shimbi amakana yasano. Asosa ati, ‘Shikulu, mwanseekeshe indalama amakana yasano, moneni nimwenapo na shimbi amakana yasano.’" 
Matthew25:21 Shikulu wakwe amweba ati, ‘Eya mwandi mwabombeni, we musha musuma, kabili uwacishinka! Walanga pa fintu ifinono ukuti uli wacishinka, na ine nalakupa ukwangalila ifingi. Kanshi isa wingile mulesansamuka pamo na sokulu.’" 
Matthew25:22 Elyo uwapokele indalama amakana yabili nao aisa. Alasosa ati, ‘Shikulu, ine mwanseekeshe indalama amakana yabili, moneni nimwenapo na shimbi amakana yabili.’" 
Matthew25:23 Shikulu wakwe amweba ati, ‘Eya mwandi, mwabombeni, we musha musuma kabili uwacishinka! Walanga pa fintu ifinono ukuti uli wacishinka, na ine nalakupa ukwangalila ifingi. Kanshi isa wingile mulesansamuka pamo na sokulu.’" 
Matthew25:24 Elyo paisa no wapokele indalama ikana limo. Alasosa ati, ‘Shikulu, iwe nalikwishiba ukuti uli muntu uwayafya, useepa noko ushatanda, ututila ne fisabo ushabyala." 
Matthew25:25 Kanshi eco natiinine, epakufisa indalama shobe mu mushili! Ala icuma cobe ici, buula.’" 
Matthew25:26 Lelo Shikulu wakwe ena amwasuka ati, ‘We musha mubi we! Bushe iwe niwe waishiba ukuti nseepa uko nshatanda, kabili ntutila ne fisabo nshabyala?" 
Matthew25:27 Shikanshi nga wabikile indalama kulya babikisha indalama, pakuti ilyo nabwela naisa fumyako na kambikilapo." 
Matthew25:28 Kanshi mupokeni indalama, mupeele uyo akwete indalama amakana ikumi limo." 
Matthew25:29 Pantu umuntu onse uwakwata, akapeelelwapo na fimbi, pakuti akwate ifingi. Lelo uushakwata, bakamupoka noto akwata." 
Matthew25:30 Nomba ici cinangwa camusha ciposeni kunse mu mfifi emwakulaba imisowa no kusumanya ameno.’ 
Matthew25:31 “Ilyo Umwana wa muntu akesa no bucindami bwakwe, ali na bamalaika bakwe bonse, elyo akekala pa cipuna cakwe icabufumu." 
Matthew25:32 Elyo bakalonganika abantu ba mishobo yonse pantu ali. Elyo akalapatulula abantu nga filya kacema apatulula impaanga pakushifumya ku mbushi. 
Matthew25:33 Akabika impaanga ku kulyo, imbushi shena ku kuso." 
Matthew25:34 Elyo Imfumu ikeba abali ku kulyo aiti, ‘Iseni imwe, mwebo Tata asenamina! Iseni mukwate ubufumu ubo Tata amuteyanishisha ukufumafye apo isonde lyatendekele." 
Matthew25:35 Pantu ilyo nali ne nsala, imwe mwalimpeeleko icakulya. Ilyo nali ne cilaka, imwe mwalimpeeleko amenshi yakunwa. Ilyo nali umweni, imwe mwalimpokelele." 
Matthew25:36 Ilyo nshakwete cakufwala, imwe mwalimpeele icakufwala. Ilyo nali umulwele, mwalimpempwile, nelyo nali mu cifungo mwalishile kukumona.’" 
Matthew25:37 Elyo abantu abololoke bakamwasuka abati, ‘We Mfumu, nga ni lilali twakumwene uli ne nsala, twakupeela icakulya, nangu ilyo wali ne cilaka, twakupeela amenshi yakunwa?" 
Matthew25:38 Ni lilali twakumwene umweni, twakupokelela, nangu ilyo ushakwete cakufwala, na ifwe twakupeela icakufwala?" 
Matthew25:39 Ni lilali wali umulwele, nangu mu cifungo, na ifwe twaisa kupempula?’" 
Matthew25:40 Imfumu elyo ikabasuka aiti, ‘Ndemweba icine cine, ukuti lyonse ilyo mwakumbuswike munyinane umo, nangu engacepa shani, ninshi nine wine mwakumbuswike.’" 
Matthew25:41 “Elyo Imfumu ikeba abali ku kuso aiti, ‘Fumeni apa, mwebalapishiwa! Kabiyeni ku mulilo wape, uo bapekanishisha Ciwa ne fiwa finankwe!" 
Matthew25:42 Pantu nali ne nsala, imwe tamwampeeleko icakulya. Nali ne cilaka, imwe tamwampeeleko amenshi yakunwa." 
Matthew25:43 Ilyo nali umweni, imwe tamwampokelele. Ilyo nshakwete cakufwala, imwe tamwampeele cakufwala. Nali umulwele, nali na mu cifungo, imwe tamwampempwile.’" 
Matthew25:44 Elyo nabo bakasuka abati, ‘We Mfumu nga ni lilali twakumwene uli ne nsala, nangu uli ne cilaka, nangu umweni, nangu taukwete na cakufwala, nangu umulwele, nangu mu cifungo, na ifwe twakaana ukukwafwa?’" 
Matthew25:45 Imfumu ikabasuka ati, ‘Ndemweba icine cine, lyonse ilyo mwakeene ukwafwilisha umo pali aba nangu engacepesha shani, ninshi nine mwakeene ukwafwa.’" 
Matthew25:46 Elyo aba bakaya kukucula kwape, abololoke bena bakaya ku mweo wape.”" 
Matthew26:1 Ilyo Yesu apwile ukulanda fyonse ifi, elyo aebele abasambi bakwe ati," 
Matthew26:2 “Namwishiba ukuti kwashalafye inshiku shibili, ninshi twaingila mu nshikunkulu ye Pasaka. Elyo Umwana wa muntu bakamuposa pakuti bamutanike.”" 
Matthew26:3 Kanshi bashimapepo bacindami na bakalamba ba bantu baya longana kwisano kwa Shimapepo mukalamba, uo baleti Kayafa." 
Matthew26:4 Balaumfwana pafyo bengekata Yesu mu bucenjeshi no kumwipaya. 
Matthew26:5 Balasosa abati, “Awe mu nshikunkulu mwena temo, epali kwaisa buuka icimfulunganya mu bantu.”" 
Matthew26:6 Yesu ali mu Betani mu ŋanda yakwa Simoni Wafibashi. 
Matthew26:7 Ilyo ali pakulya, mwaisa umwanakashi nasenda ibotolo umwali amafuta aya cena cisuma, aya mutengo ukalamba nganshi. Uyu mwanakashi akonkomwena na mafuta pa mutwe wakwa Yesu." 
Matthew26:8 Abasambi bati bamone ifi, bafulwa, balasosa abati, “Ngobu bonaushi bwalola mwi?" 
Matthew26:9 Aya mafuta nga kuti bashitisha pa ndalama ishingi nganshi, elyo bashipeela na ku balanda.”" 
Matthew26:10 Yesu ena ico eshibe ifyo balelanda, abeba ati, “Nga cinshi mwalasakamikila uyu mwanakashi? Ala namombela umulimo uusuma nganshi." 
Matthew26:11 Abalanda bena mwakulaba nabo lyonse, lelo ine tatwakabe na imwe lyonse." 
Matthew26:12 Uyu mwanakashi pakukonkomwena amafuta pa mubili wandi, ala alepekanya ukushiikwa kwandi." 
Matthew26:13 Ndemweba icine cine, konse uko bakalashimika Imbila Nsuma pano isonde ponse, bakalashimika ne fyacita uyu mwanakashi pakumwibukisha.”" 
Matthew26:14 Elyo umo pa basole ikumi limo na babili, uo baleita Yuda wa ku Kelyoti, aimine aile kuli bashimapepo bacindami." 
Matthew26:15 Alabepusha ati, “Bushe mukampeela nshi nga cakuti namuletela Yesu pakuti mumwikate?” Nabo epakumupendela indalama sha silifa amakumi yatatu (30), bamupeela." 
Matthew26:16 Awe ukufuma palya pene Yuda alafwailishafye inshita ingalinga ukumuposelapo. 
Matthew26:17 Pa bushiku bwakubalilapo ubwakulyamo Imikate Iyishatutumuka, abasambi baishile kuli Yesu bamwipusha abati, “Bushe ni kwi ulefwaya tuye tukupekanishishe ukwakulila Ipasaka?”" 
Matthew26:18 Yesu abasuka ati, “Kabiyeni kuli kampanda ulya mu musumba. Mumwebe amuti, ‘Kafundisha atila, inshita yandi naipalama. Ni kumobe eko ndeliila Ipasaka, pamo na basambi bandi.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Awe abasambi bacita fyonse ngomo Yesu abebele, bapekanya ne Pasaka." 
Matthew26:20 Cilya kwaba icungulo, Yesu na basole ikumi limo na babili baandama pakulya." 
Matthew26:21 Ilyo bacili pakulya, Yesu asosa ati, “Ndemweba icine cine, umo pali imwe alamposa ku balwani.”" 
Matthew26:22 Nabo baikatwa no bulanda, balaipusha Yesu umo umo abati, “Ndesubila teine we Mfumu?”" 
Matthew26:23 Yesu ayasuka ati, “Uo nalatumpika nankwe pamo iminwe mu mbale, eulemposa." 
Matthew26:24 Ukuba kwena Umwana wa muntu alaya kukufwa, ngomo calembelwa. Lelo umuntu uwalaposa Umwana wa muntu, ena alishama. Uyu muntu akaanafyalwa nga kuti camuwamina.”" 
Matthew26:25 Yuda uwali nokumuposa nao aipusha ati, “Kwena teine we Kafundisha?” Yesu amwasuka ati, “Eya, wailandila we mwine.”" 
Matthew26:26 Ilyo bali pakulya, Yesu abuulile umukate, atashishe Lesa, aumokawile, apeele na basambi bakwe ati, “Buuleni mulye. Uyu mubili wandi.”" 
Matthew26:27 Elyo abuula ulukombo, atasha Lesa, abapeela ati, “Nwenimo bonse." 
Matthew26:28 Pantu uyu mulopa wandi uwa cipangano, uulesuumina pa bengi kukubafumisha ifyabubifi fyabo." 
Matthew26:29 Ndemweba nshakanwe nakabili ifya ku fisabo fya myangashi, mpaka no bushiku bulya ilyo nkanwa na imwe umwangashi upya mu Bufumu bwakwa Tata.”" 
Matthew26:30 Elyo cilya bapwa ukwimba ulwimbo, bafumamo baya na ku lupili lwa Miolifa." 
Matthew26:31 Kabili Yesu elyo abebele ati, “Muli buno bushiku, imwe bonse mulembutuka. Pantu calembwa ukuti, ‘Nkakoma kacema no mukuni wa mpaanga ukapashika.’" 
Matthew26:32 Nomba ilyo nkabuuka ku bafwa nkamutangilila ku Galile.” 
Matthew26:33 Elyo Petelo ayankula ati, “Nangufye bonse balekubutuka, awe ine iyoo nshakubutuke.”" 
Matthew26:34 Yesu amweba ati, “Ndekweba icine cine, lelo line buno bwine bushiku ilyo mukolwe talalila, ninshi iwe naunkaana imiku itatu.”" 
Matthew26:35 Petelo nao amwasuka ati, “Ine nshakukaane nakalya, nga kufwa tulefwa nobe.” Na basambi bambi bonse nabo balasosafye cimo cine." 
Matthew26:36 Elyo Yesu aile na basambi bakwe ku ncende iyo beta, Getisemani. Abebele ati, “Ikaleni pano, natala naya kulya kukupepa.”" 
Matthew26:37 Asendapo Petelo na bamwana Sebede babili, aya nabo. Elyo atampa ukumoneka uwasakamikwa, kabili uwabulanda." 
Matthew26:38 Elyo aeba abasambi bakwe ati, “Ine umutima wandi waikatwa no bulanda ni cikangafye mfwe. Shaleni pano, mulelola pamo na ine.”" 
Matthew26:39 Awe ati endeleleko cinono akatalamukila, awa panshi ubukupeme. Alapepa ati, “Tata wandi, mpokololako kuli ubu bucushi, nga nacilinga. Lelo ifyo ine ndefwaya tefyo, kano ifyo iwe ulefwaya.”" 
Matthew26:40 Kabinge abwelela ku basambi bakwe, asanga bali mu tulo. Elyo aeba Petelo ati, “Yangu mwe bantu mwe, bushe mwafilwafye ukulola na ine insa imofye?" 
Matthew26:41 Mulelola, no kupepa mulepepa, epakukanawila mu ntunko. Umutima wena ulefwaya, lelo umubili wena naunakuka.”" 
Matthew26:42 Kabili Yesu abwelelamo kukupepa umuku wabubili. Alapepa ati, “Tata wandi, nga cakuti teti umpokololeko kuli ubu bucushi, kanofye ncule, cisuma cita ico ulefwaya.”" 
Matthew26:43 Nakabili abwelela ku basambi, asanga bali mu tulo, pantu amenso yabo nayekatwa ku tulo." 
Matthew26:44 Nakabili Yesu abasha aya kukupepa umuku wabutatu, alasosafye amashiwi yamo yene." 
Matthew26:45 Elyo abwelela ku basambi, abeba ati, “Bushe kanshi na nomba mucili mu tulo, muletuusha? Moneni nomba inshita yapalama, ilyo Umwana wa muntu alaposwa mu minwe ya bantu babi." 
Matthew26:46 Imeni, natuleya, uwakumposa alafika.”" 
Matthew26:47 Ilyo Yesu acili alelanda, Yuda, umo uwa pa basole ikumi limo na babili, alifikile. Ali ne bumba lya bantu ilikalamba, nabaipangasha impaanga ne nkonto, bafuma kuli bashimapepo bacindami na bakalamba ba bantu." 
Matthew26:48 Uwakuposa Yesu wena, ninshi nabapeela icishibilo ati, “Uo nalaya tomona pakumuposha, euyo wine, mumwikate.”" 
Matthew26:49 Apopene cilya Yuda afika, alungama kuli Yesu, asosa ati, “Mwapoleni Kafundisha!” Elyo amutomona." 
Matthew26:50 Yesu amweba ati, “Mune ale cita ico wishiile!” Awe abantu Yuda ali nabo bapalama, bafukukila na Yesu, bamwikata." 
Matthew26:51 Elyo umo pa bali na Yesu, asomona ulupanga, akoma umusha wakwa Shimapepo mukalamba, amusempako ukutwi." 
Matthew26:52 Yesu wena amweba ati, “Bwesesha ulupanga lobe mu citubo, pantu bonse ababomfya ulupanga, ni ku lupanga bakafwa." 
Matthew26:53 Bushe iwe uleti tekuti nombe Tata angafweko? Ala kuti apopene atuma imilalo ya bamalaika ukucila amabumba ikumi limo na yabili. 
Matthew26:54 Nga kanshi ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo ukuti fili nokucitika, kuti fyafikilishiwa shani?”" 
Matthew26:55 Elyo pa nshita ine iyo, Yesu alaeba ibumba ati, “Bushe ine ndi cipondo pakuti mwise ne mpanga ne nkonto kukunjikata? Inshiku shonse naleikala mwi Tempele ndefunda, nokuti munjikate iyoo." 
Matthew26:56 Lelo ifi fyonse fyalacitika, epakuti ifyalemba bakasesema fifikilishiwe.” Elyo abasambi bamusha eka, bafulumuka." 
Matthew26:57 Abaikete Yesu epakumutwala kuli Kayafa, Shimapepo mukalamba, ukwalongene bakafundisha bamafunde na bakalamba." 
Matthew26:58 Petelo wena alekonka lutonuma, asuka afika na mu lubansa lwe sano lyakwa Shimapepo mukalamba. Aingila mukati, aikala na pali ifita fye Tempele, pakuti amone uko umulandu ulepelela." 
Matthew26:59 Bashimapepo bacindami bonse na bashicilye bene bonse balafwailisha bukambone bwabufi, pakuti bapingwilepo Yesu ukufwa." 
Matthew26:60 Lelo bafilililwafye, nangu kwaishile bakambone babufi abengi. Awe kwasuka kwaisa bakambone babili." 
Matthew26:61 Balasosa abati, “Uyu muntu aletila, nalikwata amaka yakubongolole Tempele, kabili kuti nalikuula pa nshiku shitatu.”" 
Matthew26:62 Shimapepo mukalamba elyo aiminina, aipusha Yesu ati, “Tauleyasuka nelyo cimo? Ngeyi milandu yonse aba bantu balekwebelela?”" 
Matthew26:63 Nomba Yesu ena aikalafye tondolo. Elyo Shimapepo mukalamba aeba Yesu ati, “Nakweba na pali Lesa wamweo, twebe nga niwe Kristu Umwana wakwa Lesa.”" 
Matthew26:64 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Ee, nausosa. Kabili ndemweba ukuti, ukufuma pali nomba mukamona Umwana wa muntu naikala lwa ku kulyo kwa Mwine wa maka yonse. Elyo mukamona noko aleisa pa makumbi ya mu mulu!”" 
Matthew26:65 Elyo Shimapepo mukalamba alepula insalu shakwe, ati nokuti, “Asaalula Lesa! Bushe cinshi tulefwaila bakambone na bambi? Mwayumfwila mwe bene ifyo asaalula Lesa." 
Matthew26:66 Bushe imwe muletipo shani?” Bayasuka abati, “Alingilefye ukufwa.”" 
Matthew26:67 Elyo balasaka Yesu amate pa menso, balemuma ne fimfunshi." 
Matthew26:68 Bambi balamutoba amapi baleti, “Kristu, sesema, nani wakuma?”" 
Matthew26:69 Kanshi Petelo ena aikele panse pa lubansa, elyo umukashana umubomfi aishile apo ali. Amweba ati, “Na iwe waciba na Yesu umwina Galile.”" 
Matthew26:70 Awe Petelo akaana pa menso ya bantu bonse ati, “Ine nshishibe ico ulelandapo.”" 
Matthew26:71 Elyo Petelo afuma mu lubansa aya ku mpongolo. Umukashana umubomfi umbi amumona, alaeba na bantu abalipo ati, “Uyu muntu nao baciba na Yesu umwina Nasaleti.”" 
Matthew26:72 Awe nakabili Petelo akaana, alapa no kulapa ati, “Ine nshimwishibe uyo muntu.”" 
Matthew26:73 Cilya papita akashita, abemininepo bapalama apali Petelo, balamweba abati, “Cine cine uli munabo, pantu ne milandile yobe ine nayo ya bena Galile.”" 
Matthew26:74 Elyo Petelo atampa ukulaitipwila, alapa no kulapa ati, “Ine uyo muntu nshimwishibe iyoo!” Awe apopene na mukolwe alila no kulila." 
Matthew26:75 Elyo Petelo aibukisha ifyo Yesu acimweba ati, “Ilyo mukolwe talalila, ninshi iwe naunkaana imiku itatu.” Elyo afumina panse alila nganshi." 
Matthew27:1 Ilyo bwaca, bashimapepo bacindami bonse na bakalamba ba bantu batekele icilye, bapingushenye ukuti Yesu ali nokufwa." 
Matthew27:2 Awe bamukaka, bamusenda, bamutwala na ku mulashi Pilato." 
Matthew27:3 Elyo Yuda uwaposele Yesu, ati amone ukuti bamupingwila ukufwa, alalanguluka. Abwesesha bashimapepo bacindami na bakalamba indalama sha silifa amakumi yatatu (30)." 
Matthew27:4 Abeba ati, “Nimbifya pakulenga ukuti bepaye umuntu uwakaele!” Nabo bayasuka abati, “Bushe ifwe uyo mulandu wesu? Uyo mulandu obe we mwine!”" 
Matthew27:5 Yuda epakuya posa indalama mwi Tempele. Elyo afumako, ayaikulika." 
Matthew27:6 Bashimapepo bacindami batola indalama abati, “Ishi ni ndalama shamisoka, amafunde yesu yalilesha ukushibika mu cipao ce Tempele.”" 
Matthew27:7 Kanshi bati bapingushanye, babuula indalama, bashitamo ibala lya muntu uwalebumba inongo, umwakuti baleshiika abeni." 
Matthew27:8 Eico ukufika na lelo ili bala balita, “Ibala lyamisoka.”" 
Matthew27:9 Kanshi epakufikilishiwa ifyo kasesema Yeremia asosele ati, “Babuulile indalama sha silifa amakumi yatatu (30) e mutengo abena Israeli bamo bamushitishishepo." 
Matthew27:10 Elyo bashitamo ibala lyakwa kabumba wa nongo, ngomo Imfumu yanjebele.”" 
Matthew27:11 Elyo baletele Yesu ku mulashi. Umulashi amwipusha ati, “Bushe iwe niwe mfumu ya Bayuda?” Yesu amwasuka ati, “Nausosa.”" 
Matthew27:12 Nomba ilyo bashimapepo bacindami na bakalamba balamwebelela ifintu, awe Yesu wena tewakwasukapo kantu." 
Matthew27:13 Elyo Pilato aipusha Yesu ati, “Bushe tauleumfwa ifintu bwingi balekwebelela?” Lelo Yesu wena no kwasuka nakalya." 
Matthew27:14 Awe umulashi asunguka nganshi, pakumona ukuti Yesu taswikepo nelyo cimo pa fintu balemwebelela." 
Matthew27:15 Nomba cila nshikunkulu ya Cakucilila iye Pasaka, lyonse umulashi abelele ukubakakwilapo umufungwa umo, uo abantu balefwaya." 
Matthew27:16 Kanshi pali iyo nshita kwaliko umufungwa umo ishina lyakwe Balaba uwaishibikwe nganshi kuli buntalamisoka. 
Matthew27:17 Ilyo abantu balongana, Pilato alabepusha ati, “Bushe nani uo mulefwaya ukuti mukakwile, Balaba nangu Yesu uo batila Kristu?”" 
Matthew27:18 Pantu Pilato alishibe ukuti, ni ku mufimbilafye bamuletele Yesu." 
Matthew27:19 Nomba ilyo Pilato ekele pa cipuna cakupingwilapo imilandu, umukashi amutumina amashiwi yakumweba ati, “Wiibika mu mulandu wa uyo muntu wakaele. Pantu lelo ubushiku mu ciloto nacicula nganshi pa mulandu wakwe.”" 
Matthew27:20 Lelo bashimapepo bacindami na bakalamba bena balasokawila ibumba lya bantu ukuti babakakwile Balaba, Yesu ena bamwipaye." 
Matthew27:21 Umulashi abepusha ati, “Pali aba babili, bushe nani mulefwaya ukuti mukakwilepo?” Bayasuka abati, “Ni Balaba!”" 
Matthew27:22 Pilato abepusha ati, “Nga kanshi ndecita shani Yesu uo batila Kristu?” Bonse bayasuka abati, “Mutanikenifye!”" 
Matthew27:23 Pilato nao ati, “Nga kanshi cinshi ico abifya?” Nabo elyo bacishamo ukupunda abati, “Mutanikenifye!”" 
Matthew27:24 Pilato ashimona ukuti aleicushafye, kabili limbi palabuuka impasase, abuula amenshi, alasamba iminwe pa cinso ce bumba. Asosa ati, “Ine nshilimo mu mfwa ya uyu muntu! Mulandu wenu mwe bene!”" 
Matthew27:25 Elyo abantu bonse bayasuka abati, “Ee, umulandu wa mfwa yakwe ube pali ifwe na pa bana besu!”" 
Matthew27:26 Elyo Pilato abakakwila Balaba. Abeba no kuma Yesu ifikoti, elyo abalubwila ukuti baye mutanika." 
Matthew27:27 Elyo ifita fya mulashi fyatwele Yesu mukati ka lubansa lwa kwisano. Fyalonganike ne mpuka yonse ya fita, fyamushinguluka." 
Matthew27:28 Fyamufula insalu shakwe, fyamufwika no mwingila uwakashika." 
Matthew27:29 Elyo fyalema iŋana ya myunga, fyamufwika ku mutwe. Kabili fyamufumbatika itete ku kulyo. Elyo fyalamufukamina, fyalamupumya, fileti, “Tupole mulopwe, we mfumu ya Bayuda!”" 
Matthew27:30 Kabinge fyalamusaka amate, elyo fyabuula itete fyalamufupaula ku mutwe." 
Matthew27:31 Cilya fyaleka ukumupumya, fyamufula insalu yakashika, fyamufwika ne nsalu shakwe. Elyo fyamusenda, fyamutwala na kukumutanika." 
Matthew27:32 Ilyo baleya, mu nshila bakumenye umuntu umwina Kurene, ishina lyakwe ni Simoni, eo bapatikishe ukuti asendeleko Yesu umusalaba." 
Matthew27:33 Elyo basuka bafika na pa ncende iyo beta Gologota, emukutila, “Pa cipanga.”" 
Matthew27:34 Elyo bapeela Yesu umwangashi uo basanshishemo indusha ukuti anwe, lelo ati amyangeko, akaana ukunwa." 
Matthew27:35 Cilya bamutanika, elyo balapendula pakwakana ifyakufwala fyakwe." 
Matthew27:36 Elyo baikala panshi kulya kwine, balamulinda." 
Matthew27:37 Lwa pa mulu wa mutwe wakwe ku cimuti ca musalaba, babikapo icalembwapo umulandu balemwipailapo ukuti, “Uyu ni Yesu Imfumu ya Bayuda.”" 
Matthew27:38 Elyo batanikapo ne fipondo fibili, cimo ku kulyo, cimbi naco ku kuso." 
Matthew27:39 Kanshi abantu abalepitapo, balemutuka, balekunta ne mitwe baleti," 
Matthew27:40 “Eya! Teiwe waleti nkabongolola Itempele, elyo nkalikuula mu nshiku shitatu! Kanshi ipusushe we mwine, nga uli Mwana wakwa Lesa, ika pa musalaba!”" 
Matthew27:41 Mu musango umo wine bashimapepo bacindami, bakafundisha bamafunde na bakalamba nabo balamuseka." 
Matthew27:42 Balesosa baleti, “Alepususha bambi, nomba afilwa ukuipususha umwine! Apo ni Mfumu ya bena Israeli, naike ukufuma pa musalaba, uleke tusumine!" 
Matthew27:43 Atetekela muli Lesa, kanshi Lesa kamupusushe nga alimutemwa, kabili aleti ndi Mwana wakwa Lesa!”" 
Matthew27:44 Ne fipondo filya ifyatanikwe nankwe, nafyo fyalamusaalula." 
Matthew27:45 Cilya akasuba kafika pakati ka mutwe pa nshita ya 12:00, imfifi yakupile icalo conse, ukufikafye na lilya kasendama pa nshita ya 15:00." 
Matthew27:46 Elyo lilya akasuba kasendama pa nshita ya 15:00, Yesu apunda ne shiwi likalamba ati, “Eloi, Eloi lama sabakatani?” Ekutila, “Lesa wandi, Lesa wandi, cinshi wandekelesesha?”" 
Matthew27:47 Elyo abantu bamo abaiminine mupepi baumfwa ifi, balasosa abati, “Uyu muntu aleita Eliya!”" 
Matthew27:48 Elyo umo abutuka ayabuula umwepu. Autumpika mu mwangashi uwakantuka. Elyo autunga kwitete, amutambika ukuti anwe." 
Matthew27:49 Bambi bena balasosa abati, “Pembeleni, lekeni tumone nga Eliya alaisa mupususha!”" 
Matthew27:50 Elyo Yesu apunda ne shiwi ilikalamba, aleka no mweo." 
Matthew27:51 Apopene icisalu balecinga mwi Tempele calepuka pakati ukufuma pamulu ukufika na panshi. Elyo icalo calatenta, na mabwe yalalepauka." 
Matthew27:52 Amabwe ya pa nindi yaisuka, na bamushilo abengi abafwile bashukuka." 
Matthew27:53 Bafuma na mu nindi. Nomba panuma ya kushukuka kwakwa Yesu, aba bantu baisa mu musumba wa Yerusalemu, bamonekela na ku bengi." 
Matthew27:54 Umukalamba wa fita umwanda umo, pamo pene ne fita ifyalelinda Yesu, bati bamone icinkukuma na fyonse ifyacitike, baikatwa no mwenso. Balasosa abati, “Cine cine uyu ni Mwana Lesa!”" 
Matthew27:55 Palipo na banakashi abengi akatalamukila, baletamba. Bafumine ku Galile, balekonka Yesu no kumutangata." 
Matthew27:56 Pali aba palipo Maria Mandalena, Maria nyina kwa Yakobo na Yosefu, na nyina wa bamwana Sebede." 
Matthew27:57 Cilya caba ku cungulo, kwaishile umuntu umo umukankala umwina Alimateya, ishina lyakwe ni Yosefu. Uyu muntu nao ali musambi wakwa Yesu." 
Matthew27:58 Kanshi aya kuli Pilato, aya mulomba icitumbi cakwa Yesu. Pilato nao aeba ukuti bamupeele." 
Matthew27:59 Yosefu epakubuula icitumbi, acipomba na mu nsalu iyisuma." 
Matthew27:60 Acibika na mu nindi yakwe iyipya, iyo afukwile mu cilibwe. Elyo akunkulushishapo ilibwe likalamba pa mwinshi wa nindi, afumapo aya nokuya." 
Matthew27:61 Maria Mandalena, na Maria mubiye, bena epo bali, nabekala apalungatene ne nindi." 
Matthew27:62 Ilyo bwaisaca, ninshi ubushiku bwakupekanya ubushiku bwe Sabata nabupita, bashimapepo bacindami na Bafalise baya longana kwa Pilato." 
Matthew27:63 Balamweba abati, “Kanabesa, natwibukisha ukuti ulya muntu wabufi ilyo acili umumi alandile ati, ‘Nkashukuka panuma ya nshiku shitatu.’" 
Matthew27:64 Kanshi konkomesheni ukuti kube abakulonda inindi mpaka na pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu. Pantu limbi kuti abasambi bakwe baisa mwiba, elyo abati, nashukuka ku bafwa. Ninshi ubu bufi bwa pakulekelesha bukabipisha ukucila ubwantanshi.”" 
Matthew27:65 Pilato abeba ati, “Kanshi sendeni abakulonda. Mumone ukuti balalinda bwino bwino ifyo mwishibe.”" 
Matthew27:66 Awe baya bakomenena inamba pa cilibwe ca pa nindi, bashapo na bakulonda." 
Matthew28:1 Ilyo ubushiku bwe Sabata bwapitile, cali na ku macaca ya bushiku bwakutampa umulungu, Maria Mandalena na Maria mubiye baile kukumona inindi." 
Matthew28:2 Awe apopene icinkukuma icikalamba capita. Malaika wa Mfumu aika ukufuma ku mulu, aisa kunkulushapo ne cilibwe pa nindi, no kwikala epo aikala." 
Matthew28:3 Pa menso yakwe palebengeshima ngo mwele wa mfula, elyo insalu shakwe shabuutafye tuutu ngo bunga bwa mfula." 
Matthew28:4 Abalelonda umwenso wabekata, balatutumafye, bafwa umutombo." 
Matthew28:5 Malaika alaeba abanakashi ati, “Mwitiina, ninjishiba ukuti mulefwaya Yesu, uo batanike." 
Matthew28:6 Ala talimo muno, nabuuka ku bafwa nga filya fine asosele. Iseni mumone apo bamulalike." 
Matthew28:7 Kanshi kabiyeni muye eba abasambi bakwe amuti, ‘Yesu nabuuka ku bafwa, kabili namutangilila ku Galile. Eko mukaya mumona!’ Efyo ine namweba.”" 
Matthew28:8 Awe abanakashi bafuma bwangu bwangu ku nindi nabasansamuka, nomba lubali no mwensomo. Baya balebutuka ulubilo kukuya shimikilako abasambi bakwa Yesu." 
Matthew28:9 Awe apopene Yesu abakumanya abaposha ati, “Shimwapoleni!” Abanakashi epakupalama bafukatila amakasa yakwe balamupakata." 
Matthew28:10 Elyo Yesu abeba ati, “Mwitiina, kabiyeni muye eba bamunyinane, ukuti baye ku Galile, eko tukesa monana nabo.”" 
Matthew28:11 Ilyo abanakashi baleya ku basambi, abalelonda bamo baile mu musumba, baya shimikila bashimapepo bacindami fyonse ificitike." 
Matthew28:12 Bashimapepo bacindami balongana na bakalamba pakuti bomfwane ifyakucita. Awe bapeela abalelonda inindi indalama ishingi. 
Matthew28:13 Babeba abati, “Mulesosa amuti, abasambi bakwe nabeba icitumbi ubushiku ilyo twaciba mu tulo." 
Matthew28:14 Nangu nga cakuti umulashi aumfwako uyu mulandu, imwe mwisakamana nelyo cimo, ifwe tukamona ukuti fyonse fyaba bwino.”" 
Matthew28:15 Awe nabo abalelonda bapoka indalama, bacita nefyo babakonkomeshe. Kanshi ukufika na lelo, ili e lyashi lyasabankana ku Bayuda." 
Matthew28:16 Elyo abasambi ikumi limo na umo baile ku Galile, ku lupili ulo Yesu abebele ukuyako." 
Matthew28:17 Cilya bamumona, bawa panshi, balamupakata, lelo kwena bamo balatwishika." 
Matthew28:18 Elyo Yesu apalama, alabeba ati, “Nalipeelwa amaka yonse mu mulu na pano isonde." 
Matthew28:19 Kanshi kabiyeni muleyalula abantu ba mishobo yonse pakuti babe abasambi bandi. Mulebabatisha mwishina lyakwa Tata ne lya Mwana ne lyakwa Mupashi Wamushilo. 
Matthew28:20 Mulebafunda ukulakonka fyonse ifyo namukonkomesha. Kabili nakulaba na imwe lyonse mpakafye na ku kupwa kwa calo.” 
Mark1:1 Ici e citendekelo ca Mbila Nsuma iyakwa Yesu Kristu, Umwana wakwa Lesa." 
Mark1:2 Yatendeke ukulingana nefyo Esaya kasesema alembele ati, “Mona nkatuma inkombe yandi iyakukutangilila, iyakukupekanishisha inshila." 
Mark1:3 Ishiwi lya ulebilikisha mu matololo lileti, ‘Pekanyeni umwakwisapita Imfumu, lungamikeni inshila yaiko.’ ”" 
Mark1:4 Kanshi Yoani Kabatisha aishile mu matololo, alebila imbila ati, “Lapileni no kupilibuka, mubatishiwe, na Lesa alemubelela uluse ku fyabubifi fyenu.”" 
Mark1:5 Elyo abantu bonse aba mu calo ca Yudeya, naba mu musumba wa Yerusalemu, balaya mukubatishiwa mu mumana wa Yordani baleisoselela ifyabubifi fyabo." 
Mark1:6 Yoani alefwala insalu ishapikulwa na masako ya ngamila. Alekaka no mushipi wa mpapa mu musana. Kabili ifilyo alelya, ni makanta no buci bwa mu mpanga." 
Mark1:7 Alebila ati, “Uwacindama ukuncila alakonka panuma uo ine nshilingile ukwinama no kukakula inshinga sha pa ndyato shakwe.”" 
Mark1:8 Ine ndemubatishisha ku menshi, lelo ena akamubatishisha kuli Mupashi Wamushilo." 
Mark1:9 Muli shilya nshiku Yesu afumine ku Nasaleti, umushi wa mu calo ca Galile, aisa batishiwa na kuli Yoani mu mumana wa Yordani." 
Mark1:10 Ashifumafye mu menshi no kwisa ku mulundu, amona umulu waisuka na Mupashi amwikila kwati ni nkunda." 
Mark1:11 Awe ne shiwi lyafuma mu mulu aliti, “Niwe Mwana wandi uo natemwa, niwe nsekelamo.”" 
Mark1:12 Apopene Mupashi amusenda amutwala na ku matololo. 
Mark1:13 Mu matololo, aya ikalamo inshiku amakumi yane aletunkwa na Satana. Ali pamo ne fiswango, elyo na bamalaika balemutumika." 
Mark1:14 Ilyo Yoani bamuposele mu cifungo, Yesu aile ku calo ca Galile alebila Imbila Nsuma yakwa Lesa." 
Mark1:15 Aletila, “Inshita naifika, Ubufumu bwakwa Lesa nabupalama, lapileni no kupilibuka, sumineni Imbila Nsuma.”" 
Mark1:16 Kabili ilyo Yesu aleenda alekonka ululamba lwa bemba wa Galile amona Simoni na munyina Andele baleteya amasumbu muli bemba ico bali balondo. 
Mark1:17 Elyo Yesu abeba ati, “Nkonkeni, nkamucita abalondo ba bantu.”" 
Mark1:18 Apopenefye basha amasumbu yabo, balamukonka no kumukonka." 
Mark1:19 Kabili cilya Yesu aendelelako kuntanshi panono, amona bamwana Sebede, Yakobo na munyina Yoani, bali mu bwato balelunda amasumbu yabo." 
Mark1:20 Nabo bene abeta, apopene basha shibo Sebede mu bwato na babomfi bakwe, balamukonka." 
Mark1:21 Kabili baingila mu musumba wa Kapenamu. Elyo pa bushiku bwe Sabata, Yesu aingila mu sinagoga alafunda." 
Mark1:22 Awe abantu balapapa nganshi pa mifundile yakwe, pantu imifundile yakwe tayali nga iya bakafundisha bamafunde, wena alefunda nga uwakwata amaka." 
Mark1:23 Nomba mu sinagoga, mwalimo umuntu uwali no mupashi wakowela. Noyu muntu wa mupashi wakowela apunda ati," 
Mark1:24 “Cinshi ulefwaya kuli ifwe iwe Yesu wa ku Nasaleti? Bushe waisa kukutulofya? Nalikwishiba iwe, uli Wamushilo uwafuma kuli Lesa!”" 
Mark1:25 Lelo Yesu aukalipila ati, “Talala! Fuma muli uyu muntu!”" 
Mark1:26 Elyo umupashi wakowela walamufulumfunsha, wapunda ne shiwi ilikalamba, wamufumamo." 
Mark1:27 Abantu bonse balapapa, balaipushanya abati, “Bushe ici naco calola mwi? Iyi mifundile ipya! Pantu ku maka alekalipila imipashi yakowela nayo ilemubeela.”" 
Mark1:28 Awe bwangu bwangu ululumbi lwakwe lwasalanganina na mu calo conse ica Galile. 
Mark1:29 Kabili bashifumafye mu sinagoga, baya ku ŋanda yakwa Simoni na Andele. Bali pamo na Yakobo na Yoani." 
Mark1:30 Nomba basanga nafyala Simoni nalala, nalwala impepo. Apopene baeba Yesu abati, “Nafyala Simoni mulwele.”" 
Mark1:31 Awe Yesu aya apo alele, amwikata ku minwe amwimya. Apopene ne mpepo yamuleka, alabatebeta no kubatebeta." 
Mark1:32 Cilya kwaba icungulo, ilyo akasuba kawa, abantu balaleta kuli Yesu bonse abalwele, na bali ne mipashi yakowela." 
Mark1:33 Kabili na bantu bonse aba mu musumba balongana pa mwinshi. 
Mark1:34 Nao Yesu aposha abengi abali na malwele ya misango misango, atamfya ne mipashi yakowela iyingi mu bantu, kabili talekele mipashi yakowela ukulanda, pantu yalimwishibe." 
Mark1:35 Ku macaca Yesu abuuka, afuma mu ŋanda, aya ku ncende ukwakuti ali eka kukupepa." 
Mark1:36 Simoni na banankwe baima baya balemufwaya. 
Mark1:37 Ilyo bamusanga, bamweba abati, “Abantu bonse balekufwaya.”" 
Mark1:38 Elyo Yesu abasuka ati, “Natuleya kumbi, ku mishi yamupepi, uleke nako nje nshimikileko, pantu eco naishila.”" 
Mark1:39 Awe aya alapitana mu calo conse ica Galile, aleshimikila mu masinagoga, aletamfya ne mipashi yakowela." 
Mark1:40 Umuntu uwafibashi aishile kuli Yesu afukama, alamupapata ati, “Nga nautemwa kuti wamposha.”" 
Mark1:41 Yesu amulangulukila, elyo atambalika ukuboko, amukumya, amweba ati, “Cisuma, nintemwa, pola!”" 
Mark1:42 Awe apopene ifibashi fyaloba, no kupola apola." 
Mark1:43 Elyo Yesu amweba ati, “Kabiye lino linefye.” Amukonkomesha ati," 
Mark1:44 “Umfwa, wiebako umuntu nelyo umo. Lelo kabiye uilange kuli shimapepo, uye tuula no mutuulo uo Mose amukonkomesha, uleke cibashinine ukuti naupola.”" 
Mark1:45 Lelo wena ashifumapofye, atendeka ukwalasha umulandu kuli bonse. Asuka Yesu alafilwa ukwingila mu mishi pa lwalala pa mulandu wa mabumba, lelo alaikalafye ukushaleikala bantu. Nomba nalyo line abantu baleisa uko ali ukufumafye mpanga yonse." 
Mark2:1 Pati papite inshiku shinono, Yesu abwelele ku Kapenamu, kabili caumfwike ukuti nabwela ali mu ŋanda mumwakwe." 
Mark2:2 Elyo mwalongana abantu abengi nganshi icakuti tamwali ncende nakalya nangufye ni pa mwinshi pene, ninshi Yesu alefunda abantu ishiwi lyakwa Lesa." 
Mark2:3 Kabili kwaisa abantu bane, bapingile icite, bacileta kuli Yesu." 
Mark2:4 Ku mulandu we bumba, bafilwa ukumufisha apali Yesu. Basuka bafimbula umutenge lubali apabelele Yesu, pashala icipunda. Elyo pa cipunda pene epo baishisha umusengele apalele icite." 
Mark2:5 Yesu pakumona icisumino cabo, aeba icite ati, “Mwana wandi naubelelwa uluse ku fyabubifi fyobe.”" 
Mark2:6 Lelo bakafundisha bamafunde bamo abalipo balatontonkanya mu mitima yabo abati," 
Mark2:7 “Cinshi ico uyu muntu alandila ifi? Musaalula kuli Lesa! Nga nani engabelela umuntu uluse ku fyabubifi acita? Shikanofye Lesa eka.” 
Mark2:8 Nomba Yesu, ico eshibe mu mutima wakwe ifyo baletontonkanya, abepusha ati, “Cinshi muletontonkanisha ifi mu mitima yenu?" 
Mark2:9 Bushe cinshi icayangukapo, ukweba icite ukutila, naubelelwa uluse ku fyabubifi fyobe, nangu ukutila, ima, buula umusengele obe akwenda?" 
Mark2:10 Kanshi lekeni mulange ukuti Umwana wa muntu alikwata amaka pano isonde ayakubelela umuntu uluse ku fyabubifi fyonse.” Elyo aeba icite ati," 
Mark2:11 “Nakweba, ima, senda umusengele obe, akuya kumobe.”" 
Mark2:12 Awe aima apopene, abuula no musengele wakwe, afuma alaya no kuya, na bonse balatamba. Awe bonse balapapafye, balalumbanya Lesa abati, “Tatwatala atumona ica musango uyu.”" 
Mark2:13 Awe Yesu afuma aya nakabili ku lulamba lwa bemba. Elyo ibumba lya bantu lyaisa uko ali, nao alabafunda." 
Mark2:14 Kabili ilyo aleya, amona Levi mwana Alufeyo ekele mu ŋanda ya musonko. Yesu amweba ati, “Nkonka.” Nao Levi aima, alamukonka." 
Mark2:15 Nomba cilya Yesu ali pakulya mu ŋanda mwa Levi, bakasonkesha bamusonko na bampulamafunde abengi baisa mukulya pamo na Yesu na basambi bakwe, pantu abantu abengi balemukonka." 
Mark2:16 Nomba ilyo bakafundisha bamafunde bamo abali na mwibumba lya Bafalise bamona ukuti Yesu alelya pamo na bampulamafunde na bakasonkesha, balaipusha abasambi bakwe abati, “Bushe cinshi ico Yesu alila no kunwena pamo na bakasonkesha na bampulamafunde?”" 
Mark2:17 Ilyo Yesu aumfwa, abeba ati, “Abali umutende tabakabila shiŋanga iyoo, kano abalwele. Ine nshaisa mukwita abakaele, lelo ababifi.”" 
Mark2:18 Ilyo abasambi bakwa Yoani na Bafalise balefunga ukulya, abantu bamo baile kuli Yesu bamwipwishe abati, “Abasambi bakwa Yoani na basambi ba Bafalise balafunga ukulya, nga abasambi bobe bena cinshi bashifungila ukulya?”" 
Mark2:19 Yesu abasuka ati, “Bushe inshindishi shakwa shibwinga kuti shafunga shani ukulya ilyo shicili na shibwinga? Awe iyoo! Inshita yonse ilyo shicili na shibwinga tekuti shifunge ukulya." 
Mark2:20 Lelo inshita ikesa ilyo bakashipoka shibwinga, lyena muli isho nshiku elyo shikalafunga ukulya." 
Mark2:21 “Takwaba nelyo umo uubilila icikamba icipya pa nsalu iyikote, pantu nga acita ifi, icikamba cipya kuti calepula insalu, ne cipunda cakulilako." 
Mark2:22 Kabili takwaba nelyo umo uubika umwangashi uushilabila mu nyambi ishikote, nga bacita ifyo ninshi umwangashi kuti walenga inyambi ukupuka. Elyo umwangashi kuti waonaika ne nyambi nasho kuti shaonaikila kumo. Lelo umwangashi uushilabila baubika mu nyambi shipya.”" 
Mark2:23 Ubushiku bumo ubwe Sabata, Yesu alepita mu mabala ya ŋanu. Cilya baleya, abasambi bakwe batendeka ukulatimpula imisonso ya ŋanu." 
Mark2:24 Abafalise baeba Yesu abati, “Mona! nga cinshi ico abasambi bobe balecitila icaleshiwa pa bushiku bwe Sabata?”" 
Mark2:25 Yesu abasuka ati, “Bushe tamwatala amubelenga ifyo Davidi umwine acitile, pamo nabo ali nabo, ilyo baiketwe ne nsala ico bashakwete ifyakulya?" 
Mark2:26 Aingile mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa, ilyo Abiyata ali Shimapepo mukalamba, no kulya imikate iyatuulilwe kuli Lesa, iyo abantu bambi bashasuminishiwe kulyako kanofye bashimapepo beka. Kabili apeelako nabo ali nabo pamo.”" 
Mark2:27 Kabili Yesu abeba ati, “Ni pa mulandu wa muntu ubushiku bwe Sabata bwabelako, lelo te pa mulandu wa bushiku bwe Sabata umuntu abelako." 
Mark2:28 Kanshi Umwana wa muntu e mwine wa bushiku bwe Sabata.” 
Mark3:1 Yesu nakabili aingile mu sinagoga, mwali no muntu uwa cisansa icalemana." 
Mark3:2 Awe balabesha Yesu ukuti bamone nga alemuposha pa bushiku bwe Sabata pakuti bamupeelelepo umulandu. 
Mark3:3 Elyo Yesu aeba umuntu uwa cisansa calemana ati, “Ima, iminina apa pakati.”" 
Mark3:4 Kabili abepusha ati, “Bushe calisuminishiwa ukucita icisuma pa bushiku bwe Sabata nangu ukucita icibi? Ukupususha ubumi nangu ukwipaya?” Lelo bena batalalafye tondolo." 
Mark3:5 Elyo alatandanya amenso bukali bukali, camukalipa pa mulandu wakumalala kwa mitima yabo. Epakweba umuntu ati, “Fungulula icisansa cobe.” Awe nao afungulula icisansa cakwe no kuba cabafye bwino." 
Mark3:6 Apopene Abafalise bafumamo, baya mukumfwana na bena Herodi pakuti bamone umwakumulofesha." 
Mark3:7 Yesu na basambi bakwe bafumineko, baya na ku lulamba lwa bemba wa Galile. Ibumba ilikalamba ukufuma mu Galile lyalamukonka. Kabili pali aba bantu, bamo bafumine ku Yudeya," 
Mark3:8 ku Yerusalemu, ku calo ca Idumeya, na ku calo ca kwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani elyo na mu ncende shimbi isha mumbali ya misumba ya Turi na Sidoni. Aba bantu baishile kuli Yesu ico baumfwile ifintu alecita." 
Mark3:9 Yesu ashimona ibumba lya bantu aeba abasambi bakwe ati, “Mpekanishisheniko ubwato, epali ibumba lyaisa ntitikisha.”" 
Mark3:10 Nomba ico Yesu aposeshe abantu abengi abali na malwele ayalekana lekana, balasunkana pakulwila ukuti bamukumye." 
Mark3:11 Kabili lyonse ilyo imipashi yakowela yalemumona, yalewa panshi no kukuuta aiti, “Niwe Mwana wakwa Lesa!”" 
Mark3:12 Nomba Yesu aleikalipila nganshi no kuilesha ati, “Mwilansokolola ku bantu.”" 
Mark3:13 Kabili Yesu aninine ulupili, aitile abo umwine alefwaya, nabo baisa uko ali." 
Mark3:14 Asalapo ikumi limo na babili, abenika abasole, abeba ati, “Imwe twakulaba na imwe, nakulamutuma na kukushimikila," 
Mark3:15 kabili namupeela na maka ayakutamfya imipashi yakowela.” 
Mark3:16 Abantu ikumi limo na babili abo asalile ni aba, Simoni uo Yesu ainike ishina limbi ilya Petelo," 
Mark3:17 Yakobo na munyina Yoani bamwana Sebede, abo Yesu ainike ishina lya Boanerge, emukutila, “Abakalipa kwati ni nkuba,”" 
Mark3:18 na Andele, na Filipo, na Batolomeo, na Mateo, na Toma na Yakobo mwana Alufeyo, na Tandeo, na Simoni uwa mwibumba lya Baselote," 
Mark3:19 na Yuda uwa ku Kelyoti ulya wine uwaposele Yesu ku balwani. 
Mark3:20 Yesu kabinge aile kumwakwe ne bumba ilikalamba lyaishile longana nakabili, calengele nokuti Yesu na basambi bafilwe ukulya icakulya." 
Mark3:21 Nomba ilyo ba lupwa lwakwe baumfwa, baya kukumufumyako, pantu baletila, “Napena.”" 
Mark3:22 Bakafundisha bamafunde abafumine ku Yerusalemu batile abati, “Aba na Belesebu, kabili ni kuli uyu mukalamba wa mipashi yakowela eko atamfisha imipashi yakowela.”" 
Mark3:23 Yesu epakwita abantu alabeba mu milumbe ati, “Bushe Satana kuti atamfya shani Satana munankwe?" 
Mark3:24 Mu buteko bwa mfumu imo nga mwaba ukulwishanya, ninshi ubo buteko tekuti butwalilile." 
Mark3:25 Aba mu ŋanda imo nga balalwishanya abene beka, ninshi iyo ŋanda tekuti itwalilile." 
Mark3:26 Kanshi Satana nga alailwisha umwine, ninshi apatulukana, kuti afilwa ukutwalilila, lyena kuti yaba e mpela yakwe." 
Mark3:27 “Kabili tekuti pabe nangu umo uwingengila mu ŋanda ya wamaka no kutapa ifyuma fyakwe, kano ninshi abala akaka uwamaka, elyo engatapa ifyuma fyakwe." 
Mark3:28 “Ndemweba icine cine nati, abantu kuti babelelwa uluse ku fyabubifi fyabo bacita elyo na ku musaalula onse bengacita kuli Lesa." 
Mark3:29 Lelo uwasaalula Mupashi Wamushilo takabelelwe uluse nakalya, umulandu wakwe wakubelelela pe.”" 
Mark3:30 Ico Yesu asosele aya mashiwi nico baletila abati, “Aba no mupashi wakowela.”" 
Mark3:31 Elyo nyina na bamunyina bakwa Yesu bafika, baiminina panse batuma no wakumwita." 
Mark3:32 Kwali ibumba ilikalamba nalimushinguluka, elyo bamweba abati, “Ala banoko na bamunonko na bankashi yobe bali panse balekufwaya.”" 
Mark3:33 Yesu abasuka ati, “Nga bamayo ni bani? Bamunyinane nabo ni bani?”" 
Mark3:34 Elyo alolesha pa bantu abekele nabamushinguluka ati, “Ala moneni, aba, e bamayo, kabili e bamunyinane!" 
Mark3:35 Onse uucita ifyo Lesa afwaya, e munyinane, e nkashi yandi, kabili e mayo.”" 
Mark4:1 Nakabili Yesu atampile ukufunda pa lulamba lwa bemba. Elyo ibumba ilikalamba nganshi lyalongana lyamushinguluka. Elyo Yesu aingila mu bwato emo aikala pali bemba, abantu bonse bena bashala ku mulundu pa lulamba lwa bemba." 
Mark4:2 Awe alabafunda ifintu ifingi mu milumbe, elyo na mu kufunda kwakwe alabeba ati," 
Mark4:3 “Umfweni! Katanda wa mbuto aile kukutanda. 
Mark4:4 Cilya aletanda, imbuto shimo shaponena mumbali ya nshila, ne fyuni fyaisa shikompaula." 
Mark4:5 Shimbi shaponena mu mushili wa nsakalabwe umushali mushili wingi. Awe bwangu bwangu shamena ico pashali mushili wingi. 
Mark4:6 Ilyo akasuba kabalika shabonsa, shauma no kuma, ico shishali na mishila ine ine." 
Mark4:7 Shimbi shaponena mu myunga, ne myunga yati ikule, yashitabilila, shatusa, shafilwa no kutwala ifisabo." 
Mark4:8 Shimbi shena shaponena mu mushili usuma. Shamena, shakula, shatwala ne fisabo. Shimo shatwala amakumi yatatu (30), shimbi amakumi mutanda (60), shimbi shena umwanda umo (100).”" 
Mark4:9 Elyo Yesu asosa ati, “Uuli na matwi yakumfwa naomfwe!”" 
Mark4:10 Nomba cilya Yesu ashala eka, abo abali nankwe pamo na basole ikumi limo na babili balamwipusha umulolele imilumbe." 
Mark4:11 Yesu abasuka ati, “Imwe mwalipeelwa ukumfwa inkaama sha Bufumu bwakwa Lesa, lelo ku ba kunse, fyonse bali nokufyumfwila mu milumbe." 
Mark4:12 Pakuti, “‘Ukulolesha nangu baloleshe, lelo bemona iyoo. Kabili ukumfwa nangu bomfwe lelo beiluka, epali bapilibukila kuli Lesa no kubelelwa uluse.’ ”" 
Mark4:13 Kabili Yesu abeba ati, “Bushe tamumfwile umwalola uyu mulumbe? Nga kanshi imilumbe imbi yena mukayumfwa shani?" 
Mark4:14 Katanda ico atanda lishiwi lyakwa Lesa. 
Mark4:15 Imbuto ishaponene mumbali ya nshila, bantu batila baumfwa ishiwi, apopene Satana aisa fumya ne shiwi lyatandilwe mu mitima yabo." 
Mark4:16 Kabili abantu bambi baba nge mbuto ishaponene mu mushili wa nsakalabwe, e bantu abomfwa ishiwi, apopene balipokelela ne nsansa." 
Mark4:17 Nomba lyaikalamofye akashita akanono, ico lyafilwa ukwanda imishila. Kanshi ilyo paisa ubwafya nangu amacushi pa mulandu we shiwi, awe bwangu bwangu banenuka." 
Mark4:18 Bambi nabo baba nge mbuto ishaponene mu myunga. 
Mark4:19 Aba ebomfwa ishiwi, lelo isakamika lya fya pano calo, no mukonkelelo wa fyuma, no lunkumbwa lwa fintu fimbi, fyatusha ishiwi, lyafilwa no kutwala ifisabo." 
Mark4:20 Lelo bambi baba nge mbuto ishaponene mu mushili uusuma. Aba ebomfwa ishiwi no kulipokelela balipokelela, epakutwala ifisabo, bamo amakumi yatatu (30), bambi amakumi mutanda (60), bambi nabo umwanda umo (100).”" 
Mark4:21 Kabili Yesu alabeba ati, “Bushe babula icisaniko pakuti bacikupikile mu nongo nangu ukucibika mwifungu? Bushe tekucibika apasanseme?" 
Mark4:22 Pantu takwaba icafisama nelyo cimo icishakasokoloke, kabili takwaba icankaama nelyo cimo icishakaletwe pa bwelu." 
Mark4:23 Uuli na matwi yakumfwa naomfwe!” 
Mark4:24 Kabili Yesu abeba ati, “Muleposako amano ku fintu muleumfwa. Icipimo ico mupiminako abanenu, eco na imwe bakamupiminako, elyo no kucishapo." 
Mark4:25 Pantu uwakwata, akapeelelwapo na fimbi, lelo uushakwata, bakamupoka noto akwata.”" 
Mark4:26 Kabinge abeba ati, “Ubufumu bwakwa Lesa bwaba kwati muntu uwatanda imbuto mwibala." 
Mark4:27 Akasuba no bushiku, ilyo alelola nangu ilyo asendeme, imbuto shena shilemena no kukula, lelo wena teshiba ifyo shilemena no kukula." 
Mark4:28 Umushili wine eumesha imbuto. Umusonga eubalilapo, elyo pakonka umutwe, elyo ne nseke ishituntulu mu mutwe." 
Mark4:29 Nomba ilyo ifisabo fyapya, lyena acincila abuula umwele pantu inshita ya kuseepa yafika.”" 
Mark4:30 Kabili Yesu atila ati, “Bushe Ubufumu bwakwa Lesa kuti twabupalanya kuli cinshi? Kabili mulumbe nshi twingabomfya pakubulondolola?" 
Mark4:31 Bwaba nga kalubuto ka lubanga, akacepesha pa mbuto shonse babyala mu mushili." 
Mark4:32 Lelo ilyo bakabyala, kalakula, kasuka kacila ne fimpusa fyonse, elyo kakwata ne misambo iyikalamba icakuti ne fyuni fya mu mulu fyaisa mukwikala mu cintelelwe cakako.”" 
Mark4:33 Yesu alebeba ishiwi lyakwa Lesa mu milumbe iyingi iyi uyu musango, ukulingana nefyo bakwete amano yakutesha." 
Mark4:34 Talebeba nelyo cimo kano mu milumbe, lelo uko bali beka alelondolola fyonse ku basambi bakwe." 
Mark4:35 Nomba icungulo ubushiku bwine ubo, Yesu aebele abasambi bakwe ati, “Natwabukile kwishilya.”" 
Mark4:36 Elyo bafuma pebumba, bamusendela mu bwato umo mwine ali. Kabili kwali amato na yambi ayali pamo no bwato ubo alimo." 
Mark4:37 Elyo kwaima icikuuku ica maka nganshi, na matamba yaima yalapuma mu bwato, na menshi yalaingilamo icakuti ni cikanga no bwato bwisule." 
Mark4:38 Yesu ninshi ali mu tulo ku cisolo ca bwato kunuma, nasaila na pa musao. Awe bamushibusha abati, “We Kafundisha bushe tausakamene ukuti twalafwa?”" 
Mark4:39 Awe Yesu abuuka, akalipila ne cimwela, aeba na bemba ati, “Talala, ikala tondolo!” Apopene no mwela wapona, patalala na tondolo." 
Mark4:40 Elyo abepusha ati, “Bushe cinshi ico mwatiinina? Bushe kanshi na nomba tamulasumina?”" 
Mark4:41 Awe baikatwa no mwenso ukalamba, elyo balaipushanya abati, “Ngoyu nani, uwakuti icimwela na bemba filemubeela?”" 
Mark5:1 Awe basuka bafika kwishilya lya bemba mu calo ca bena Gerasa. 
Mark5:2 Cilyafye Yesu afuma mu bwato, no muntu uwali ne mipashi yakowela uwaleikala mu nshinshi, aisa mukumukumanya." 
Mark5:3 Uyu muntu aleikala mu nshinshi, kabili takwali nangu umo uwingamukaka nangufye ku minyololo ine." 
Mark5:4 Pantu imiku iyingi balemukaka amaboko na makasa, lelo aleputula iminyololo balemukaka ku maboko, alefunaula ne fyela balemukaka ku makasa. Eico takwali nangu umo uwali na maka yakumunasha." 
Mark5:5 Kabili lyonsefye akasuba no bushiku aleendauka mu nshinshi na mu mpili, alekuuta, aleitetaula ku mabwe." 
Mark5:6 Nomba cilya amona Yesu akatalamukila abutukilako, amufukamina." 
Mark5:7 Apunda ne shiwi likalamba ati, “Cinshi ulefwaya kuli ine, iwe Yesu Mwana Lesa mukulu? Nakupapata na pali Lesa, wincusha!”" 
Mark5:8 Ico asosele aya mashiwi, nico Yesu amwebele ati, “Fuma mu muntu we mupashi wakowela!”" 
Mark5:9 Elyo Yesu amwipusha ati, “Ishina lyobe niwe ani?” Nao amwasuka ati, “Ishina lyandi nine Mulalo, pantu twabamo abengi.”" 
Mark5:10 Kabili yalapapata Yesu apakalamba nganshi ukuti eitamfya muli cilya calo. 
Mark5:11 Nomba mumbali ya lupili mwali umukuni ukalamba uwa nkumba ishalelya.
