Mark5:12 Elyo imipashi yakowela yalapapata Yesu aiti, “Tutamfishe mu nkumba, emo tuye twingile.”" 
Mark5:13 Nao aisuminisha. Elyo ne mipashi yakowela yafuma yaingila na mu nkumba. Awe no mukuni wa nkumba, cikangafye amakana yabili, wakunkunyala pa mukunkuluko, waipuupa na muli bemba, wanwena no kunwena." 
Mark5:14 Elyo bakacema ba nkumba bafulumuka, baya shimika no mulandu mu musumba na mu mishi ya mumbali. Abantu epakuya kukumona ificitike." 
Mark5:15 Ilyo bafika kuli Yesu, basanga umuntu uwali no mulalo wa mipashi yakowela naikala nafwala, na mano yonse nayabwela. Awe umwenso wabekata." 
Mark5:16 Abo abaimwenene balashimikilako abantu ificitike ku wali ne mipashi yakowela, na ku nkumba." 
Mark5:17 Elyo batendeka ukupapata Yesu ukuti afume mu calo cabo. 
Mark5:18 Ilyo Yesu alaingila mu bwato, ulya muntu atamfishemo imipashi yakowela alamupapata ukuti nao akonke." 
Mark5:19 Yesu amukaanya, lelo amweba ati, “Kabiye kumwenu ku bantu bobe, uye mukulabashimikilako fyonse ifyo Imfumu yakucitila nefyo yakumfwila uluse.”" 
Mark5:20 Awe nao aya alashimika mu calo conse ica Dekapoli fyonse ifyo Yesu amucitile, na bantu bonse balapapa nganshi." 
Mark5:21 Elyo Yesu nakabili ayabukile kwishilya lya bemba mu bwato. Ibumba ilikalamba lyalongana lyamushinguluka ninshi acili pa lulamba lwa bemba. 
Mark5:22 Kwaisa no muntu umo, intungulushi ya mu sinagoga, ishina lyakwe ni Yailo. Ilyo amona Yesu, aisa mufukamina." 
Mark5:23 Alamupapata nganshi ati, “Akamwana kandi akakashana ni mfwafye. Shi wingesa katambalikilapo amaboko yobe, uleke kapole, kabe no bumi.”" 
Mark5:24 Awe Yesu epakuya nankwe. Kabili ibumba ilikalamba lyamukonka, lilemutitikisha konse konse." 
Mark5:25 Elyo mwibumba mwalimo umwanakashi uwalwele umukunko pa myaka ikumi limo na ibili. 
Mark5:26 Aculile nganshi nangu bashiŋanga abengi baeseshe ukumuposha. Kabili aposele ifyuma fyakwe fyonse nokuti apole iyoo, ubulwele bwaleyafye ntanshi." 
Mark5:27 Uyu mwanakashi alyumfwile ifyo balelanda pali Yesu. Kanshi epakwisa alepeka mwibumba, apalama na kuli Yesu kunuma, akumya na ku nsalu shakwe." 
Mark5:28 Pantu wena mu mutima wakwe aletila, “Nga nakumyafye nangu ni ku nsalu shakwe, ninshi ndepola.”" 
Mark5:29 Awe apopene no mukunko waleka, aumfwa na mu mubili wakwe ukuti ubulwele bwakwe bwapola." 
Mark5:30 Apopene Yesu aishiba mu mutima wakwe ukuti amaka yamo yafuma muli wena. Elyo acebukila kunuma mwibumba aipusha ati, “Nani uwankumya ku nsalu?”" 
Mark5:31 Abasambi bamwasuka abati, “Bushe taumwene ibumba lilekutitikisha konse konse, kabili wipushe auti, ‘Uwankumya nani?’ ”" 
Mark5:32 Lelo Yesu ena akonkanyapofye ukulolesha konse konse ukuti amone uumukumishe. 
Mark5:33 Awe umwanakashi alatutumafye ku mwenso, ico eshibe icimucitikile. Aisa mufukamina alondolola ne fishinka fyonse." 
Mark5:34 Nao Yesu amweba ati, “We mwana, icisumino cobe ecakuposha, kabiye umutende, upolelele na ku bulwele bobe.”" 
Mark5:35 Ilyo acili alelanda, kwaisa abantu bamo ukufuma ku ŋanda yakwa Yailo, intungulushi ya mu sinagoga. Balamweba abati, “Umwana obe umukashana nafwa. Cinshi ulepamfisha kafundisha?”" 
Mark5:36 Lelo Yesu wena no kuposako amano nakalya ku mashiwi ayo balelanda, aebafye intungulushi ya mu sinagoga ati, “Iwe suminafye witiina.”" 
Mark5:37 Elyo alesha abantu bonse ukumukonka, asuminishafye Petelo na Yakobo na Yoani munyina kwa Yakobo." 
Mark5:38 Cilya bafika ku ŋanda ya ntungulushi ya mu sinagoga, Yesu asanga kukabile na see, abantu balelila no kuloosha." 
Mark5:39 Elyo aingila mu ŋanda abeba ati, “Cinshi mulekafisha ifi, no kulila imisowa? Umwana tafwile, alifye mu tulo.”" 
Mark5:40 Awe bena balamuseka. Elyo abafumya bonse, abuula wishi na nyina na basambi bakwe abo ali nabo, aingila nabo umwali umwana." 
Mark5:41 Aikata no mwana ku minwe amweba ati, “Talita, kumi!” Calola mukutila, “We kakashana, nakweba nati buuka!”" 
Mark5:42 Apopene akakashana kaima kalaenda no kwenda. Pantu kali ne myaka ikumi limo na ibili. Abantu pakumona ifi, cabapesha amano." 
Mark5:43 Elyo abakonkomesha nganshi ati, “Mwileka umuntu nangu umo eshibe ici cintu.” Kabili abeba ati, “Mupeeleniko icakulya.”" 
Mark6:1 Elyo Yesu afumine ku ncende ilya, aile ku mushi kumwabo ali na basambi bakwe." 
Mark6:2 Ilyo ubushiku bwe Sabata bwafika, atampa no kufunda mu sinagoga, na bantu abengi abaleumfwako balapapa abati, “Ngoyu muntu aishiba shani ifi fyonse? Kabili nga amano apeelwa ya musango nshi? Na maka yakucita ifipeshamano ifya uyu musango yafuma kwi?" 
Mark6:3 Bushe uyu te kabasa wambao, mwana Maria, kabili bamunyina bushe te Yakobo na Yose na Yuda na Simoni? Bankashi yakwe bushe teaba bene twikala nabo kuno?” Awe cabansha no kumusumina." 
Mark6:4 Elyo Yesu abeba ati, “Kasesema kumbi balamucindika, kanofye ku ba mu calo cakwe, ku ba mu lupwa lwakwe, na ba mu ŋanda yakwe.”" 
Mark6:5 Awe afilwa ukucitako icipeshamano nangu cimo. Aposhakofye abalwele banono mukubatambalikilapo amaboko. 
Mark6:6 Kabili asunguka pali ico bakaana ukumusumina. Elyo alapita mu mishi ya mumbali alefunda. 
Mark6:7 Kabili aita abasole ikumi limo na babili, alabatuma babili babili, abapeela na maka yakutamfya imipashi yakowela." 
Mark6:8 Kabili abakonkomesha ati, “Pa lwendo mulesendafye inkonto epela. Mwilasenda mukate nangu imbukuli nelyo indalama." 
Mark6:9 Indyato shena mulefwala, lelo mwilasenda imingila ibili.”" 
Mark6:10 Kabili abeba ati, “Mu ŋanda yonse iyo mwaingilamo, mwikale umo mwine mpaka napo mukafumina muli iyo ncende." 
Mark6:11 Na konse uko bakaana ukumusekelela no kumumfwa, pakufumako mulekunta ulukungu ku makasa yenu pakubashinina.”" 
Mark6:12 Awe baima, baya baleshimikila baletila, “Lapileni no kupilibuka!”" 
Mark6:13 Baletamfya ne mipashi yakowela iyingi, kabili baleposha na balwele abengi pa kubasuba amafuta." 
Mark6:14 Kabili imfumu Herodi yaumfwile ululumbi lwakwa Yesu, pantu pa nshita iyi ishina lyakwe lyalilumbwike. Na bantu bamo baletila, “Yoani Kabatisha eubuukile ku bafwa, eco akwatile aya maka yakucita ifipeshamano.”" 
Mark6:15 Bambi bena balati, “Ni Eliya.” Bambi nabo balati, “Ni kasesema, ali nga umo uwa pali bakasesema bakale.”" 
Mark6:16 Lelo Herodi wena ashumfwa ifi, asosa ati, “Ni Yoani uo naputwileko umutwe eubuukile ku bafwa!”" 
Mark6:17 Ni uyu wine Herodi ewatumine abakwikata Yoani ukuti bamukake no kumuposa mu cifungo pa mulandu wakwa Herodia muka Filipo, pantu Herodi aupile muka munyina Filipo." 
Mark6:18 Yoani aleeba Herodi ati, “Calileshiwa ukuupa muka munonko.”" 
Mark6:19 Herodia epakufulilwa Yoani, alafwaya no kumwipaya. Nomba afilwa," 
Mark6:20 pantu Herodi aletiina Yoani, ico aishibe ukuti muntu umololoke kabili wamushilo, eico alemubaka bwino. Kabili lyonse ilyo Herodi alemumfwa, calemupesha amano nganshi, lelo kwena aletemwa ukumumfwa." 
Mark6:21 Bwasuka ubushiku ubwalinga bwamoneka. Pa bushiku bwakucindika ukufyalwa kwakwe, Herodi atebeta bacilolo bakwe, abakalamba ba fita fyakwe na basambashi ba mu Galile." 
Mark6:22 Elyo umukashana mwana Herodia aingilamo, alacinda. Awe asansamusha nganshi Herodi na bonse abo ali nabo pa mitebeto. Imfumu elyo yaeba umukashana aiti, “Lomba consefye ico utemenwe, ndekupeela.”" 
Mark6:23 Yalapa no kulapa, yasosa aiti, “Conse ico ulelomba ndekupeela, nangufye kukwakanyako icalo candi pakati!”" 
Mark6:24 Awe umukashana afuma, aya ipusha na nyina ati, “Bushe ico ningalomba cinshi?” Nao ayasuka ati, “Umutwe wakwa Yoani Kabatisha.”" 
Mark6:25 Apopene umukashana aingila bwangu bwangu, aya ku mfumu, alomba ati, “Ndefwaya mumpeele lino linefye pa mbale umutwe wakwa Yoani Kabatisha!”" 
Mark6:26 Awe imfumu yalanguluka nganshi, lelo pa mulandu wa mulapo na beni abo ili nabo, yafilwa ukumukaanya." 
Mark6:27 Apopene imfumu yatuma icita cimo aiti, “Kalete umutwe wakwa Yoani.” Naco icita, caya putula Yoani umutwe mu cifungo." 
Mark6:28 Cauleta pa mbale, capeela no mukashana, umukashana nao apeela nyina." 
Mark6:29 Ilyo abasambi bakwa Yoani baumfwa, baisa senda icitumbi cakwe, baya cishiika na mu nindi." 
Mark6:30 Abasole babwelele kuli Yesu bamushimikile na fyonse ifyo bacitile, nefyo bafundile." 
Mark6:31 Elyo Yesu abeba ati, “Twendeni ukutalele ukwakuti tube fweka, mutushe panono.” Pantu kwali abantu abengi abaleisa na balefumako, icakuti abasole tabakwete nangu ni nshita yakulya." 
Mark6:32 Elyo baya mu bwato ku matololo ukwakuti bali beka. 
Mark6:33 Ilyo baleya, abengi babamona babeshiba no kubeshiba. Elyo abantu bafuma mu misumba yonse, bapita ulubilo ku mulundu, ukuya kulya kwine baleya, babatangilila bena bafika bwangu." 
Mark6:34 Yesu cilya afuma mu bwato, amona ibumba lya bantu ilikalamba, epakubalangulukilako pantu bali nge mpaanga ishabula kacema. Elyo atendeka ukubafunda ifintu ifingi." 
Mark6:35 Cilya akasuba kaba kukuwa, abasambi bakwe baisa uko ali. Balamweba abati, “Kuno tuli ni ku matololo, kabili na kasuba kawa." 
Mark6:36 Kanshi eba abantu baye mu mitanda na mu mishi ya mumbali, baye ishitila ifyakulya.”" 
Mark6:37 Yesu abasuka ati, “Nimwe bapeeleni icakulya.” Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Bushe tuye posa indalama imyanda ibili pa mikate iyakuti tubapeele balye?”" 
Mark6:38 Elyo abepusha ati, “Bushe mukwetepo inga? Kamoneni.” Ilyo bashininkisha, bamweba abati, “Kuli imikate isano ne sabi libili.”" 
Mark6:39 Elyo abeba ati, “Lekeni abantu bekale mu mpuka mu mpuka pa mulemfwe.”" 
Mark6:40 Nabo baikala mu mpuka sha bantu umwanda umo ne sha bantu amakumi yasano. 
Mark6:41 Elyo Yesu abuula imikate isano ne sabi libili, alosha amenso ku mulu, atasha Lesa. Elyo amokaula imikate, apeela abasambi bakwe ukuti baakanye abantu. Ayakanya ne sabi libili kuli bonse." 
Mark6:42 Awe bonse balya no kwikuta baikuta. 
Mark6:43 Elyo balonganya ifipandwa fyasheleko ku mikate ne sabi, fyaisula imiseke ikumi limo na ibili." 
Mark6:44 Impendwa ya baume abalileko imikate yali amakana yasano. 
Mark6:45 Apopene Yesu alacincisha abasambi bakwe ukuti bengile mu bwato, batangile babukile kwishilya, ku Betisaida. Elyo umwine ena ashala alesalanganya ibumba." 
Mark6:46 Ilyo abafishapo, anina ulupili aya kukupepa." 
Mark6:47 Cilya caba icungulo, ubwato buli pakati ka bemba, ninshi Yesu ena ashele eka ku mulundu." 
Mark6:48 Awe amona ukuti balecula pakoba, ico bapindilwe no mwela. Kanshi ku macaca Yesu aya uko bali aleenda pali bemba, aba nga uulepitilila." 
Mark6:49 Nomba ilyo abasambi bamona aleenda pali bemba, balakuuta, ico baletontonkanya ukuti, cipuku." 
Mark6:50 Awe bonse batiina nganshi ilyo bamumona. Lelo Yesu apopene abeba ati, “Tekeni imitima! Ala nine! Mwitiina.”" 
Mark6:51 Elyo aingila mu bwato umo bali, no mwela waleka. Awe bonse cabapesha amano balapapa nganshi." 
Mark6:52 Pantu tabailwike bwino pa mulandu wa mikate, ku mulandu wakumalala kwa mitima yabo." 
Mark6:53 Yesu na basambi bayabukile bemba, bafika na mu calo ca Genasaleti, bakaka no bwato." 
Mark6:54 Bashifumafye mu bwato, apopene abantu baishiba Yesu." 
Mark6:55 Elyo balapitana muli ici calo conse, balesenda abalwele pa misengele, balebatwala na konse uko bomfwile ukuti eko ali." 
Mark6:56 Konse uko aleya, mu mishi, mu misumba na mu mitanda, baleteka abalwele pa mansa sha fisankano. Balemupapata ukuti aleke balemukumyafye nangu ku nsenkebele sha nsalu shakwe. Elyo na bonse abalemukumyako, balepola." 
Mark7:1 Abafalise na bakafundisha bamafunde bamo bafumine ku Yerusalemu, baisa longana ukwali Yesu." 
Mark7:2 Elyo bamona ukuti abasambi bakwe bamo balelya ne minwe iyakowela, emukuti iyabula ukusamba." 
Mark7:3 Pantu Abafalise pamo pene na Bayuda banabo bonse tabalya nga tabasambile iminwe ukufika na munkonkoni, ekusunga ifishilano fya fikolwe fyabo." 
Mark7:4 Kabili nga bafuma ku cisankano, tabalya kano batala basamba. Kuliko na fimbi ifishilano ifingi ifyo bakonka, ifili nge misambile ya nkombo ne nongo ne fipe fya mukuba." 
Mark7:5 Kanshi Abafalise na bakafundisha bamafunde balamwipusha abati, “Cinshi ico abasambi bobe bashikonkela ifishilano fya fikolwe fyesu, bena balelya icakulya ne minwe iyakowela?”" 
Mark7:6 Nao abasuka ati, “Cine cine Esaya alilungike ilyo aseseme pali imwe mwe mfundabuteshi ngomo calembelwa ukuti, “‘Aba bantu bancindikafye pa kanwa, lelo imitima yabo yalitaluka nganshi kuli ine." 
Mark7:7 Baicushafye pakumpepa, na mafunde bafunda, mafunde ya bantufye!’" 
Mark7:8 “Imwe mwalisuula amafunde yakwa Lesa, mwalemenenafye ku fishilano fya bantu.”" 
Mark7:9 Elyo abeba ati, “Mwaba ne nshila yabucenjeshi iyakusuulilamo amafunde yakwa Lesa, pakuti mulesunga ifishilano fyenu." 
Mark7:10 Pantu Mose atile, ‘Ulecindika wiso na noko,’ kabili atile nokuti, ‘Uwalapisha wishi nangu nyina, alingilefye ukumwipaya.’" 
Mark7:11 Nomba imwe mutila, umuntu nga aeba wishi nangu nyina ati, ‘Fintu mfwile namupeela pakumwafwako ni kolobani’, ekutila calituulwa kuli Lesa." 
Mark7:12 Awe lyena tamusuminisha uyu muntu ukuti acite nelyo cimo icakwafwako wishi nelyo nyina. 
Mark7:13 Mukucita ifi, monaula icebo cakwa Lesa pa mulandu wa fishilano fyenu mushilana. Kabili kuli ifintu ifingi ifyo mucita ifyapalana neci.”" 
Mark7:14 Nakabili Yesu aita ibumba, alalyeba ati, “Kutikeni kuli ine imwe bonse, mumfwikishe." 
Mark7:15 Takwaba cintu nangu cimo icifuma kunse, icingengila mu nda ya muntu no kumukowesha. Kano ififuma mu mutima wa muntu efikowesha umuntu.”" 
Mark7:16  
Mark7:17 Ilyo afuma pebumba aya ingila mu ŋanda, abasambi bakwe balamwipusha umulolele ipinda." 
Mark7:18 Nao abeba ati, “Bushe kanshi na imwe bene tamulailuka? Bushe tekuti mumone ukuti conse icifuma kunse no kwingila mu nda ya muntu tekuti cimukoweshe nakalya." 
Mark7:19 Pantu taciya mukwingila mu mutima wakwe, lelo ciya mu cifu, elyo panuma cafumina kunse.” Mukulanda ifi, Yesu asuminishe ukuti ifyakulya fyonse tafikowesha." 
Mark7:20 Elyo akonkanyapo ati, “Ala icikowesha umuntu cintu cifuma mu muntu." 
Mark7:21 Pantu mukati ka mitima ya bantu, emufuma amatontonkanyo yabipa, ubulalelale, ubupupu, imisoka, ulubembu," 
Mark7:22 ulunkumbwa lwa fyuma, ubunkalwe, ubucenjeshi, bucilende, umufimbila, umusaalula, icilumba no buwelewele." 
Mark7:23 Ifibi fyonse ifi efifuma mu muntu, kabili efikowesha umuntu.”" 
Mark7:24 Awe afumine ku ncende ilya, aima aya na ku calo umwali umusumba wa Turi. Aya ingila mu ŋanda imo, talefwaya nelyo umo ukuti eshibe uko afikilile, nomba cakaana, afilwa ukufisama." 
Mark7:25 Awe umwanakashi uwali na kamwane akakashana akali no mupashi wakowela, ashumfwafye ukuti Yesu naisa, apopene aisa, amufukamina." 
Mark7:26 Uyu mwanakashi ali Mwinafyalo, umwina Sirofonisia. Elyo alapapata Yesu ukuti atamfye umupashi wakowela ufume mu mwana wakwe." 
Mark7:27 Nao amweba ati, “Pakubala kuleka abana balya baikuta, tacilingile ukubuula icakulya ca bana no kuposela imbwa.”" 
Mark7:28 Nao umwanakashi amwasuka ati, “Kwena nifyo fine mukwai, lelo ne mbwa nasho shilalyako utubufungau twa bana, tulya tuleponena mwisamba lye tebulo.”" 
Mark7:29 Elyo Yesu amweba ati, “Apo wayasuka umusango uyu, kabiye kumobe, umupashi wakowela naufuma mu mwana obe.”" 
Mark7:30 Awe abwelelamo kumwakwe, asanga umwana nalala pa busanshi no mupashi wakowela naufumamo." 
Mark7:31 Elyo afumine mu calo umwali umusumba wa Turi, apita mu Sidoni, na mu calo ca Dekapoli, asuka afika na kuli bemba wa Galile." 
Mark7:32 Awe abantu bamo bamuletela nkomamatwi, uwali cibulu. Elyo balamupapata pakuti amutambalikilepo amaboko." 
Mark7:33 Awe amufumya pebumba, baya ukwakuti bali beka. Elyo aingisha iminwe yakwe mu matwi ya uyu muntu. Elyo afwisa amate amukumya nayo pa lulimi." 
Mark7:34 Kabili alosha amenso ku mulu, aisha no mweo, ati, “Efata,” emukuti, “Komoka.”" 
Mark7:35 Awe apopene amatwi yakwe yakomoka, na kalimba akakakile ululimi lwakwe kaputuka, atampa no kulalandafye bwino." 
Mark7:36 Elyo Yesu abakonkomesha ati, “Tecakwesha ukwebako umuntu nelyo umo.” Nomba atila ntinti ukubalesha, awe abantu nabo bashimikafye." 
Mark7:37 Kabili balepapisha nganshi abati, “Alecita fyonse bwino bwino! Alelenga bankomamatwi ukulaumfwa na bacibulu ukulalanda.”" 
Mark8:1 Muli shilya shine nshiku, nakabili kwaishile longana ibumba ilikalamba. Nomba tabakwete cakulya. Yesu epakwita abasambi bakwe alabeba ati," 
Mark8:2 “Nalangulukila aba bantu, pantu twaikala nabo nomba inshiku shaba shitatu, elyo ne cakulya tabakwete." 
Mark8:3 Nga nati mbaleke babwelelemo kumwabo ne nsala, balefwa ulushile mu nshila, pantu bamo bafumine ukutali.”" 
Mark8:4 Abasambi bakwe bamwasuka abati, “Bushe ni kwi muno matololo umuntu engafumya imikate iyakulisha aba bantu?”" 
Mark8:5 Nao abepusha ati, “Bushe mukwetepo imikate inga?” Nabo abati, “Cine lubali.”" 
Mark8:6 Elyo aeba ibumba ukwikala panshi. Abuula imikate cine lubali, atasha Lesa, elyo amokaula, apeela na basambi bakwe ukuti baakanye ibumba. Awe nabo efyo bacita." 
Mark8:7 Kabili bakwetepo no tusabi tumo utunono, nato ilyo atashishapo Lesa, aeba abasambi bakwe ukuti nato batwakanye ku bantu." 
Mark8:8 Awe balya no kwikuta baikuta. Elyo balonganya ifipandwa ifyasheleko, baisusha imiseke cine lubali." 
Mark8:9 Kanshi abalileko bali nalimo amakana yane. Elyo Yesu asalanganya abantu. 
Mark8:10 Awe apopene aingila na basambi bakwe mu bwato, baya na ku calo ca Dalamanuta." 
Mark8:11 Kabili Abafalise balishile, batampa ukubikana ifikansa na Yesu kukumwesha. Balamweba ukuti acitepo icipeshamano cimo icakulanga kuti aba na Lesa." 
Mark8:12 Awe aisha no mweo nganshi mu mutima wakwe, ati, “Cinshi ico abantu ba ino nkulo balefwaila icishibilo cacipeshamano? Ndemweba icine cine abantu ba ino nkulo tabakamone cishibilo nakalya.”" 
Mark8:13 Awe abasha, aingila na mu bwato, bayabukila na kwishilya." 
Mark8:14 Abasambi balilabile ukusenda imikate, balifye no mukate umo mu bwato epela." 
Mark8:15 Elyo Yesu alabasoka ati, “Mulecenjela, muleisopa ku ntutumushi ya Bafalise na ku yakwa Herodi.”" 
Mark8:16 Nabo epakulalanshanya abati, “Ico alandila ifyo nico tushikwete mukate.”" 
Mark8:17 Yesu nao aishiba ifyo balelanda, elyo abepusha ati, “Cinshi ico mulelandila amuti, tatukwete mukate? Bushe kanshi na nomba tamulatesha no kwiluka tamulailuka? Bushe kanshi imitima yenu icilifye iyaumalala?" 
Mark8:18 Bushe kanshi mwaba na menso ayashimona na matwi ayashumfwa? Bushe kanshi tamwibukisha? 
Mark8:19 Ilyo namokawilile abantu amakana yasano imikate isano, bushe ifipandwa fyasheleko mwaiswishe imiseke inga?” Nabo bayasuka abati, “Ikumi limo na ibili.”" 
Mark8:20 Kabili Yesu ati, “Nga ilyo namokawilile abantu amakana yane imikate cine lubali, bushe ifipandwa fyasheleko mwaiswishe imiseke inga?” Nabo bayasuka abati, “Cine lubali.”" 
Mark8:21 Elyo abeba ati, “Bushe cine na nomba tamulailuka?”" 
Mark8:22 Ilyo bafikile ku Betisaida, abantu bamo baletele impofu kuli Yesu. Balamupapata ukuti aikumye." 
Mark8:23 Yesu aikata impofu pa kuboko, aifumisha kunse ya mushi. Elyo aipaala amate pa menso, aitambalikilapo na maboko aipusha ati, “Bushe wamonapo cimo?”" 
Mark8:24 Umuntu ainuna amenso ati, “Namona abantu, nomba bali nge miti iyileendauka.”" 
Mark8:25 Elyo nakabili amufimba pa menso ne cisansa cakwe. Elyo amenso yakwe yaisuka, atampa no kumona, alamona ifintu fyonse bwino bwino." 
Mark8:26 Yesu epakumweba ati, “Nomba iwe lungamafye kumobe, wibwelela muli uyu mushi.”" 
Mark8:27 Yesu na basambi bakwe baimine baile ku mishi ya ku Kesalia Filipi. Mu nshila Yesu alaipusha abasambi bakwe ati, “Bushe abantu batila nine ani?”" 
Mark8:28 Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Bamo batila ni Yoani Kabatisha, bambi nabo batila ni Eliya, bambi nabo bena batila ulifye umo pali bakasesema.”" 
Mark8:29 Elyo abepusha ati, “Nga imwe mutila nine ani?” Petelo amwasuka ati, “Niwe Kristu.”" 
Mark8:30 Elyo abakonkomesha ati, “Tecakwesha ukwebako umuntu nelyo umo ukuti nine Kristu.”" 
Mark8:31 Kabili Yesu atendeka ukulabafunda ati, “Umwana wa muntu ali nokuculisha nganshi. Abakalamba na bashimapepo bacindami na bakafundisha bamafunde bakamusuula no kumwipaya. Lelo mu bushiku bwalenga shitatu akabuuka.”" 
Mark8:32 Abalondolwela fyonse ifi bwino ukwabula ukufisa nangu kamo. Elyo Petelo amufumyapo, alamukalipila." 
Mark8:33 Nomba Yesu ena apilibuka, alolesha na pa basambi bakwe, alakalipila Petelo ati, “Kabiye uko we Satana we! Pantu imitontonkanishishe yobe teyakwa Lesa, yabuntunsefye!”" 
Mark8:34 Elyo Yesu aita ibumba lya bantu pamo na basambi bakwe, alabeba ati, “Umuntu nga alefwaya ukulankonka, aleikaanya umwine, alesenda umusalaba wakwe, elyo alenkonka." 
Mark8:35 Pantu uyo onse uufwaya ukupususha umweo wakwe, akaulofya. Lelo uyo onse uulofya umweo wakwe pa mulandu wa ine na pa mulandu wa Mbila Nsuma, ena akaupususha." 
Mark8:36 Bushe umuntu kuti amwenamo nshi, nga cakuti anonka ifyuma fyonse ifya pano calo elyo alufishapo umweo wakwe?" 
Mark8:37 Nga cintu nshi umuntu engapeela icingalinga ukukabusha no mweo wakwe? 
Mark8:38 Pantu onse uwakwatila ine nsoni na mashiwi yandi, muli ino nkulo ibi kabili iyatalama, Umwana wa muntu nao akamukwatila insoni ilyo akesa no bucindami bwakwa Wishi pamo na bamalaika bamushilo.”" 
Mark9:1 Elyo nakabili alabeba ati, “Ndemweba icine cine, bamo pali imwe, mwe beminine pano tabakafwe, mpaka bakasuke bakamone Ubufumu bwakwa Lesa uko buleisa na maka.”" 
Mark9:2 Ilyo papitile inshiku mutanda, Yesu asendele Petelo na Yakobo na Yoani, baya nina ulupili ulutali ukwakuti babefye beka. Elyo ayaluka pa menso yabo." 
Mark9:3 Ifyakufwala fyakwe fyabuuta tuutu, fyalabengeshimafye, fyabuutisha ukucila na pafyo umuntu pano calo engafibuutisha." 
Mark9:4 Elyo bamona Eliya na Mose balelanda na Yesu. 
Mark9:5 Elyo Petelo aeba Yesu ati, “Kafundisha, kuti cawama twaikala pano pene. Lekafye tupangepo insakwe shitatu, imo yobe, imbi yakwa Mose, elyo na imbi iyakwa Eliya.”" 
Mark9:6 Taishibe ifyo alesosa, pantu baliketwe no mwenso ukalamba." 
Mark9:7 Elyo paisa ikumbi lyabakupa na mu cinshingwa, na mwikumbi mwafuma ishiwi aliti, “Uyu e Mwana wandi, uo natemwa, mulemumfwa.”" 
Mark9:8 Awe apopene bati bacebacebe, tabamwene nelyo umo, kanofye Yesu eka eo bashele nankwe." 
Mark9:9 Ilyo balatentemuka ulupili, Yesu alabakonkomesha ati, “Tecakwesha ukwebako umuntu nelyo umo pafyo mwacimona, kanofye ilyo Umwana wa muntu akabuuka ku bafwa.”" 
Mark9:10 Abasambi balisungile bwino uyu mulandu, lelo uko bali beka baleipushanya umulolele amashiwi ya “kubuuka ku bafwa.”" 
Mark9:11 Elyo baipusha Yesu abati, “Ngeco bakafundisha bamafunde basosela abati, ‘Eliya euli nokubalilapo ukwisa’ cinshi?”" 
Mark9:12 Nao abasuka ati, “Kwena nifyo fine, Eliya ali nokubalilapo ukwisa nokwisa mona ukuti fyonse fili umo fifwile ukubeela. Nga nomba calembelwa nshi ukuti, Umwana wa muntu ali nokuculisha nganshi, kabili no kusuulwa?" 
Mark9:13 Lelo ndemweba nati, Eliya alisa kale, na bantu bamucitile ngomo balefwaila, nga filya fine calembwa pa mulandu wakwe.”" 
Mark9:14 Ilyo babwelela ku basambi bambi abashele, bamona ibumba ilikalamba nalibashinguluka, na bakafundisha bamafunde bamo balebikana nabo ifikansa." 
Mark9:15 Cilya abantu bamona Yesu, bonse basunguka nganshi, elyo babutuka ulubilo kukuya muposha." 
Mark9:16 Elyo aipusha abasambi bakwe ati, “Finshi ifyo mulebikaninapo nabo ifikansa?”" 
Mark9:17 Elyo umuntu umo mwibumba ayasuka ati, “Kafundisha, ndetele kuli iwe umwana wandi umwaume, uwaba no mupashi wakowela uwamupoka no kulanda." 
Mark9:18 Kabili lyonse ilyo umwikata, ulamupama panshi ne fulo lyalafuma ku kanwa, alasenganya na meno, elyo no kumina aumina. Nacilomba abasambi bobe ukuti baufumyemo, nomba nabafilwa.”" 
Mark9:19 Elyo Yesu nao ayasuka ati, “Mwe nkulo yabula icisumino mwe! Bushe tukaba na imwe mpaka lilali? Bushe ndi nokuba na imwe mpaka lilali? Leteni akalumendo kuno.”" 
Mark9:20 Awe bakaleta kuli Yesu. Nomba umupashi wakowela ushimonafye Yesu, apopene walafulumfunsha akalumendo, wakaposa na panshi, kalafulukuta, ne fulo lyalafuma ku kanwa." 
Mark9:21 Elyo Yesu aipusha wishi ati, “Bushe apo camutampila, papita inshita shani?” Nao ayasuka ati, “Ukufumafye ku bwaice." 
Mark9:22 Kanshi ilingifye ulamuposa mu mulilo na mu menshi pakuti umwipaye. Lelo nga kuti wacitapo cimo, tulangulukileko, utwafweko!”" 
Mark9:23 Elyo Yesu amwankula ati, “Auti, ‘nga kuti wacita?’ Ala umuntu wa cisumino kuti acita fyonse.”" 
Mark9:24 Apopene wishi wa kalumendo apunda ati, “Nalisumina, shingafwakofye nkwatishe icisumino.”" 
Mark9:25 Yesu cilya amona ibumba lyalabutukilako, akalipila umupashi wakowela ati, “We mupashi wakowela we, cinkomamatwi, cicibulu, nakweba fuma muli uyu muntu, wikatala aumwingilamo nakabili.”" 
Mark9:26 Elyo umupashi wakowela walakafulumfunsha na maka, ulekuuta, epakufumamo. Akalumendo kashala nakalala kwati nakafwa, na bengi balasosa abati, “Afwa!”" 
Mark9:27 Yesu wena akekata mu minwe, akemya, awe nako kaiminina." 
Mark9:28 Cilya Yesu aingila mu ŋanda, abasambi bakwe balamwipusha kumbali abati, “Bushe ifwe cinshi twacifililwa ukuutamfya?”" 
Mark9:29 Nao abasuka ati, “Umupashi wa musango uyu teti muutamfyemo kanofye ku mapepo [no kufunga ukulya].”" 
Mark9:30 Ilyo bafumine muli ilya ncende baya pita mu calo ca Galile. Yesu talefwaya ukuti abantu beshibe uko bali," 
Mark9:31 pantu alefunda abasambi bakwe. Alebeba ati, “Umwana wa muntu akaposwa mu minwe ya bantu, nabo bakamwipaya. Lelo panuma ya nshiku shitatu akabuuka ku bafwa.”" 
Mark9:32 Nomba tabaumfwile umwalolele aya mashiwi. Kabili baletiina no kumwipusha. 
Mark9:33 Awe bafikile ku Kapenamu. Ilyo bali mu ŋanda, Yesu abepusha ati, “Bushe cinshi mwacilabikaninapo ifikansa mu nshila?”" 
Mark9:34 Awe bena baikalafye tondolo, pantu mu nshila balebikana ifikansa abati, “Umukalamba pali ifwe bonse nani?”" 
Mark9:35 Elyo Yesu aikala, aita na basambi ikumi limo na babili, alabeba ati, “Onse uulefwaya ukuba uwantanshi, afwile aicita uwakulekelesha kabili uwakutumika bonse.”" 
Mark9:36 Elyo abuula akaice akeminika pa lwalala," 
Mark9:37 akafukatila, alabeba ati, “Umuntu onse uwasekelela akaice akali nga aka pa mulandu wa ine, ninshi nine asekelela. Kabili onse uwansekelela, tene asekelela, lelo asekelela uwantuma.”" 
Mark9:38 Yoani aeba Yesu ati, “Kafundisha, twamwene umuntu umo alebomfya ishina lyobe pakutamfya imipashi yakowela, lelo ifwe twalimulesha, pantu tatwaba nankwe pamo.”" 
Mark9:39 Lelo Yesu abeba ati, “Mwilamulesha, pantu takwaba nangu umo uucita icipeshamano mukubomfya ishina lyandi, kabili ese mukulalanda ifibi pali ine." 
Mark9:40 Pantu uyo onse uushitulwisha, ninshi munensu." 
Mark9:41 Uyo onse uwamupeela ulukombo lwa menshi, ico muli bena Kristu, ndemweba icine cine takabulwe icilambu cakwe." 
Mark9:42 “Nomba uwalenga ukuti kamo pali utu twaice utwansumina ukubifya, kuti camuwaminapo ukumukakila mu mukoshi icilibwe icafina icakupelelako, no kumuposa muli bemba." 
Mark9:43 Kabili icisansa cobe nga cakulengesha ukubifya, ciputuleko. Cawamishapo ukwingila mu mweo na makunkutu, ukucila ukuya ne fisansa fibili mu mulilo wape." 
Mark9:44  
Mark9:45 Kabili ulukasa lobe nga lwakulengesha ukubifya, uluputuleko. Cawamishapo ukwingila mu mweo icilema, ukucila ukuya na makasa yabili ku mulilo wape." 
Mark9:46 Kabili ilinso lyobe nga lyakulengesha ukubifya, litonkole. Cawamishapo ukwingila mu Bufumu bwakwa Lesa ne linso limo, ukucila ukuposwa na menso yabili mu mulilo wape," 
Mark9:47 umo ‘imititi yabo ishifwa, no mulilo ushishima.’" 
Mark9:48 Nga filya balunga umucele mu fyakulya, efyo onse akalungwamo umulilo wa macushi." 
Mark9:49 Umucele waliwama, nomba nga wafumuka, bushe kuti waloweshiwa nanshi? Na mu bumi bwenu bwine mulebamo umucele, kabili muleikala na banenu umutende.”" 
Mark10:1 Elyo Yesu afumine kuli ilya ncende, aile mu calo ca Yudeya na kwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani. Kabili amabumba yalongana uko ali, elyo nao alabafunda nge fintu alecita lyonse." 
Mark10:2 Abafalise bamo baisa uko ali balamwesha abati, “Bushe calisuminishiwa umwaume ukuleka umukashi wakwe?”" 
Mark10:3 Nao abasuka ati, “Lifunde nshi Mose amwebele?”" 
Mark10:4 Nabo abati, “Mose alisuminishe umwaume ukulemba kalata wakumulekelapo, epakumutamfya.”" 
Mark10:5 Elyo Yesu abasuka ati, “Ico Mose amulembele ili ifunde, mulandu wakumalala kwa mitima yenu." 
Mark10:6 Lelo pa citendekelo ilyo Lesa abumbile fyonse, abumbile umwaume no mwanakashi." 
Mark10:7 ‘Kanshi eco umwaume ashiila wishi na nyina no kuminkana no mukashi wakwe," 
Mark10:8 elyo aba babili baba umubili umo.’ Kanshi nomba tabali babili, balifye umubili umo." 
Mark10:9 Ico Lesa alundinkanya, umuntu ecilekanya.”" 
Mark10:10 Nomba ilyo bali mu ŋanda, abasambi bamwipusha nakabili pali uyu mulandu." 
Mark10:11 Nao abasuka ati, “Umwaume uwaleka umukashi wakwe, aya upa na umbi, ninshi abembukila umukashi wakwe." 
Mark10:12 No mwanakashi nao nga afuma ku mulume wakwe, aya upwa ku mwaume umbi, ninshi nao lubembu acita.”" 
Mark10:13 Abantu baleta utwaice pakuti atukumye, lelo abasambi balabakalipila." 
Mark10:14 Ilyo Yesu amona ifi, afulwa, abeba ati, “Lekeni utwaice twise uko ndi, mwitulesha iyoo. Pantu ababa ngotu twaice, e bene ba Bufumu bwakwa Lesa." 
Mark10:15 Ndemweba icine cine, umuntu onse uushipokelela Bufumu bwakwa Lesa nga kaice, takengilemo nakalya.”" 
Mark10:16 Elyo Yesu afukatila utwaice, atutambalikilapo amaboko, atupaala." 
Mark10:17 Kabili Yesu aimine ubulendo, elyo umuntu aisa ulubilo amufukamina, amwipusha ati, “Kafundisha musuma, bushe ni finshi ndi nokucita pakumona umweo wape?”" 
Mark10:18 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Cinshi ico wanjebela ukuti ndi musuma? Takwaba musuma nelyo umo, kanofye Lesa eka." 
Mark10:19 Walishiba amafunde ayatila, ‘Wilaipaya, wilabembuka, wilaiba, wilabepesha babiyo, wilafinsha, ulecindika wiso na noko.’ ”" 
Mark10:20 Nao amwasuka ati, “Kafundisha, ala ifi fyonse ndafikonka ukufumafye ku bwaice bwandi.”" 
Mark10:21 Yesu amulolekesha, amutemwa. Amweba ati, “Wabulishapo cimo. Kabiye, kashitishe fyonse ifyo wakwata, upeele ne ndalama ku balanda, lyena ninshi ukakwata icuma mu mulu. Elyo wise unkonke.”" 
Mark10:22 Ilyo aumfwa ifi, wena aikatwa no bulanda. Afuma aya alelanguluka, pantu ali ne fyuma ifingi." 
Mark10:23 Elyo Yesu alatandanya amenso, aeba na basambi bakwe ati, “Yangu ifyo cayafya ku bakwata ifyuma ukwingila mu Bufumu bwakwa Lesa!”" 
Mark10:24 Awe abasambi bakwe basunguka nganshi pa mashiwi yakwe. Yesu ena abwekeshapo ukubeba ati, “Mwe bana, yangu ifyo cayafya ukwingila mu Bufumu bwakwa Lesa!" 
Mark10:25 Ala cayangukapo ingamila ukupula mu linso lya nshindano, ukucila uwafyuma ukwingila mu Bufumu bwakwa Lesa.”" 
Mark10:26 Awe abasambi basunguka nganshi balaipushanya abati, “Nga kanshi nani engapusuka?”" 
Mark10:27 Yesu abalolesha, abeba ati, “Abantu bena kuti bafilililwafye, lelo Lesa wena iyoo, pantu Lesa tafilwa kantu.”" 
Mark10:28 Petelo epakumweba ati, “Mona ifwe twalisha fyonse twalikukonka!”" 
Mark10:29 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Icine cine ndemweba, takuli nangu umo uwasha iŋanda, nangu bamunyina, nangu inkashi, nangu nyina, nangu wishi, nangu abana, nangu amabala pa mulandu wa ine no wa Mbila Nsuma," 
Mark10:30 uushakapokelepo mu nshita ya nomba imiku umwanda umo, amayanda na bamunyina, inkashi, abana, na mabala. Lelo kwena na macushipo. Elyo mu nshita ikesa akamona umweo wape." 
Mark10:31 Lelo abengi abantanshi bakaba abakulekelesha, na bakulekelesha bakaba e bantanshi.”" 
Mark10:32 Kabili ilyo bali pa bulendo baleninika ukuya ku Yerusalemu, Yesu ewali pantanshi. Awe abasambi cabapesha amano, na balekonka panuma nabo umwenso wabekata. Nakabili Yesu abuula abasambi ikumi limo na babili atendeka no kubashimikila ifili nokumuponena." 
Mark10:33 Abeba ati, “Moneni, twalaya ku Yerusalemu, elyo Umwana wa muntu alaya poswa kuli bashimapepo bacindami na bakafundisha bamafunde. Balaya mupingwila ukufwa no kumuposa mu minwe ya Benafyalo." 
Mark10:34 Bakamuseka, bakamusaka amate, bakamuma ifikoti no kumwipaya. Lelo panuma ya nshiku shitatu akabuuka ku bafwa.”" 
Mark10:35 Elyo Yakobo na Yoani bamwana Sebede baisa, bapalamina kuli Yesu. Bamweba abati, “Kafundisha, tulefwaya utucitile ico twalalomba.”" 
Mark10:36 Nao abepusha ati, “Cinshi ico mulefwaya ukuti mucitile?”" 
Mark10:37 Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Utusuminishe ukuti umo akaleikala ku kulyo kobe, umbi ku kuso kobe mu Bufumu bobe.”" 
Mark10:38 Yesu abeba ati, “Tamwishibe ico mulelomba. Bushe kuti mwanwena mu lukombo lwa macushi ndi nokunwenamo, nangu bushe kuti mwabatishiwa ulubatisho lwa macushi ndi nokubatishiwako?”" 
Mark10:39 Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Ee kuti twacita.” Yesu abeba ati, “Ulukombo ndi nokunwenamo, na imwe elo mukanwenamo, no lubatisho ndi nokubatishiwako, na imwe elo mukabatishiwako." 
Mark10:40 Nomba ukwikala ku kulyo kwandi nangu ku kuso kwandi, teine mpeela, fya yabo Lesa afipekanishisha.”" 
Mark10:41 Ilyo abasambi bambi ikumi limo baumfwa ifi, bafulilwa Yakobo na Yoani." 
Mark10:42 Yesu abeta bonse, alabeba ati, “Mwalishiba ukuti mu Benafyalo abo batila e bashamfumu, balomya ubufumu bwabo, na bakalamba babo nabo babateeka no mucusha." 
Mark10:43 Imwe tacili nakuba ifi iyoo. Lelo pali imwe, onse uulefwaya ukuba umukalamba, abe ewakumutumika." 
Mark10:44 Kabili onse uulefwaya ukuba uwantanshi, abe umusha wa bonse." 
Mark10:45 Pantu no Mwana wa muntu wine taisa pakuti bamutumike, lelo ni kukutumika no kuleka umweo wakwe pakupususha abengi.”" 
Mark10:46 Awe bafikile ku Yeriko. Ilyo Yesu alafuma mu Yeriko pamo na basambi bakwe ne bumba ilikalamba, impofu Batimeo, emukuti mwana Timeo, ali mumbali ya nshila naikala alelomba." 
Mark10:47 Cilya aumfwa ukuti ni Yesu wa ku Nasaleti, atendeka ukupunda ati, “Yesu Mwana Davidi, shi winganangulukilako!”" 
Mark10:48 Nomba abengi balaikalipila pakuti italale. Lelo yena elyo yacila ukupunda aiti, “We Mwana Davidi shi winganangulukilako!”" 
Mark10:49 Awe Yesu aiminina abeba ati, “Mwiteni ese kuno.” Elyo nabo baita impofu, balayeba abati, “Teka umutima, ima, alekwita.”" 
Mark10:50 Awe yaposa icakufimbana caiko, yatoloka ibaka, yaya na kuli Yesu." 
Mark10:51 Yesu aipusha impofu ati, “Cinshi ico ulefwaya ukuti nkucitile?” Impofu yamweba aiti, “Kafundisha, ndefwaya ukulalolesha.”" 
Mark10:52 Elyo Yesu ayeba ati, “Kabiye icisumino cobe ecakuposha.” Awe apopene atendeka ukulolesha, alakonka na Yesu uko aleya." 
Mark11:1 Cilya Yesu na basambi bakwe baya balepalama ku Yerusalemu, bafika na pa Betifage na Betani mupepi no lupili lwa Miolifa. Yesu atuma abasambi bakwe babili, abeba ati," 
Mark11:2 “Kabiyeni pa mushi ulya pantanshi. Kabili pakwingilafye pene muleya sanga umwana wa punda nakulikwa, uo umuntu ashatala aninapo. Mumukakule, mumulete kuno." 
Mark11:3 Umo nga amwipusha ati, ‘Cinshi mwalakakwila umwana wa punda?’ Musose amuti, ‘Ni Mfumu eilemufwaya, kabili yalamubwesha nombalinefye.’ ”" 
Mark11:4 Awe baima, baya sanga no mwana wa punda nabamukulikila pa mwinshi wa ŋanda panse mumbali ya musebo. Nomba cilya balakakula umwana wa punda," 
Mark11:5 abantu bamo abaimininepo balabepusha abati, “Cinshi ico mulecita, mulekakula umwana wa punda?”" 
Mark11:6 Nabo bayasukafye ngomo Yesu acibebela, na bantu babaleka, balaya." 
Mark11:7 Awe baleta umwana wa punda kuli Yesu. Bayanshikapo ne nsalu shabo epo Yesu aikala. 
Mark11:8 Abantu abengi balayanshika insalu shabo mu nshila, elyo bambi nabo balayansa imisambo ya miti balekontola mu mpanga." 
Mark11:9 Abatangile na balekonka panuma balepunda abati, “Hosana, nakalebalika! Lesa apaale uyu waisa uo Imfumu yatuma!" 
Mark11:10 Nabupaalwe ubufumu buleisa ubwakwa shifwe Davidi! Lumbanyeni Lesa Mukulu!” 
Mark11:11 Awe Yesu afika mu Yerusalemu aingila na mwi Tempele. Alolesha fyonse ifyalimo, nomba ico akasuba kalasumbila kukuwa, afumamo, aya ku Betani na basambi ikumi limo na babili." 
Mark11:12 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, ilyo balebwela ukufuma ku Betani, Yesu insala yamwikata." 
Mark11:13 Cilya amona umukunyu akatalamukila uli na mabula ayalelema, eko aya kukumona nga walitwala. Nomba cilya afikako, asangakofye amabula yeka yeka, pantu tayali nshita amakunyu yatwalilapo." 
Mark11:14 Elyo aeba umukunyu ati, “Kwikaba nelyo umo uwakulyako nakabili icitwalo kuli iwe.” Na basambi bakwe baleumfwa uko alesosa ifi." 
Mark11:15 Awe bafika mu Yerusalemu. Yesu aingila mwi Tempele, atendeka no kutamfisha panse abaleshitishamo na baleshita ifintu. Kabili alapenaula amatebulo ya balekabushanya indalama, ne fipuna fya baleshitisha inkunda." 
Mark11:16 Elyo alesha na bonse abalesenda ifipe ukupita mwi Tempele. 
Mark11:17 Kabili alabafunda, alabeba ati, “Bushe tacalembwa ukuti, ‘Iŋanda yandi ikalaitwa ukuti ni ŋanda iyakupepelamo abantu aba mishobo yonse?’ Nomba imwe mwaisangula icifulo ca bapupu!”" 
Mark11:18 Kanshi bashimapepo bacindami na bakafundisha bamafunde ilyo batesha ifi, balafwailisha inshila iyakuti bengamwipailamo. Pantu balemutiina ico abantu bonse balepapa imifundile yakwe." 
Mark11:19 Ilyo kwaba icungulo, awe afuma mu musumba." 
Mark11:20 Nomba ilyo balepitapo ulucelo, bamona ukuti umukunyu nauma onse ukufikafye na ku mishila." 
Mark11:21 Elyo Petelo aibukisha. Aeba na Yesu ati, “Kafundisha, shimona ulya mukunyu walapishe nauma!”" 
Mark11:22 Yesu abasuka ati, “Mube ne cisumino muli Lesa." 
Mark11:23 Ndemweba icine cine, umuntu nga aeba ulupili ulu ati, fuma apa uipose muli bemba, elyo no kutwishika taletwishika mu mutima wakwe, lelo nasumina ukuti ico alanda calacitika, ninshi cili nokucitika." 
Mark11:24 Eico kanshi ndemweba nati, fyonse ifyo mwingalomba mu mapepo, mwasumina nokuti namupeelwa, ninshi mukapeelwa." 
Mark11:25 Kabili lyonse ilyo mulepepa, nga palipo ico bamulufyanya ku muntu umo, mubeleleni uluse. Ninshi na Shinwe wa mu mulu akamubelela uluse ku fintu mubifya.”" 
Mark11:26  
Mark11:27 Kabili babwelelamo ku Yerusalemu. Nomba ilyo Yesu aleendauka mwi Tempele, bashimapepo bacindami na bakafundisha bamafunde na bakalamba baisa uko ali, balamwipusha abati," 
Mark11:28 “Bushe ni ku maka nshi ucitilako ifi fintu? Nangu nani wakupeela amaka yakucita ifi fintu?” 
Mark11:29 Yesu abasuka ati, “Na ine nalamwipushapo icipusho cimo. Nga mwanjasuka, elyo na ine nalamweba ukufuma amaka ncitilako ifi fintu." 
Mark11:30 Bushe ulubatisho lwakwa Yoani lwafumine ku mulu nangu ni ku bantu? Njasukeni.” 
Mark11:31 Awe balapingushanya abati, “Nga twatila lwafumine ku mulu, ninshi aletweba ati, ngeco mushamusuminine cinshi?" 
Mark11:32 Conse nga twati ni ku bantu, awe abantu tabatupanye, pantu bonse balishininkisha ukuti Yoani ali kasesema icine cine.”" 
Mark11:33 Kanshi epakwasuka Yesu abati, “Awe tatwishibe.” Yesu nao abeba ati, “Kanshi na ine nshamwebe ukufuma amaka ncitilako ifi fintu.”" 
Mark12:1 Kabili Yesu atampa ukubomina imilumbe ati, “Umuntu umo alilimine ibala lya myangashi, apindako ne linga, aimbamo ne cakukaminamo umwangashi, akuulamo no lupungu. Elyo aseekesha ibala lya myangashi ku balimi, ena aima aya pa bulendo." 
Mark12:2 Cilya ulwakulobolola ifisabo lwafika, umwine ibala atuma umusha wakwe ku balimi, pakuti ese amupokeleko ifisabo fimo pa fya mwibala lyakwe ilya myangashi." 
Mark12:3 Nomba bena bamwikata, bamupumaula, bamutamfya, aya iminwe nkutwa." 
Mark12:4 Kabili umwine ibala atumako umusha na umbi, lelo nao bamumaula ku mutwe no kumusebanya icabipisha nganshi." 
Mark12:5 Kabili atumako na umbi, wena bamwipaya. Kabili atuminekofye abengi, bamo babapumaula, bambi bena babepaya." 
Mark12:6 Asuka ashalafye no muntu umo umwana wakwe umwaume uo atemenwe nganshi. Pakulekelesha eo atumako ati, ‘Wena balaya mucindika.’" 
Mark12:7 Lelo abalimi balaebana abati, ‘Ala impyani iyi. Aleni iseni tuipaye, ne bala likaba lyesu!’" 
Mark12:8 Awe bamwikata, bamwipaya, bamuposa na kunse ye bala lya myangashi.”" 
Mark12:9 Elyo Yesu aipusha ati, “Nga kanshi umwine ibala akacita shani? Akalofya abo balimi, akaseekesha ne bala lya myangashi kuli bambi." 
Mark12:10 Bushe tamwabelenga mu Malembo Yamushilo apo calembwa ukuti, “‘Ilibwe ilyo bakakuula basuulile, elyaisa ba ilyakwikasha petungi." 
Mark12:11 Ifi efyo Imfumu yacita, kabili cakupapa kuli fwe baleimwena!’ ”" 
Mark12:12 Elyo balafwaya ukwikata Yesu, ico bailuka ukuti muli uyu mulumbe ebo alelandapo. Lelo batiina amabumba ya bantu, kanshi epakumusha, baya." 
Mark12:13 Kabili batumine Abafalise bamo na bena Herodi bamo kuli Yesu, abakuti bamone umwakumwikatila mu milandile yakwe." 
Mark12:14 Awe baisa uko ali, balamweba abati, “Kafundisha, twalishiba ukuti uli mufumacumi. Kabili tautiina muntu nelyo umo, pantu tawaba na kapatulula, lelo ufunda fyonse ifyo Lesa afwaya mu cishinka. Bushe calilinga ukulasonka umusonko kuli Kesalo nangu iyoo?" 
Mark12:15 Bushe tulesonka nangu twilasonka?” Nomba Yesu ico eshibe ubucenjeshi bwabo, abeba ati, “Cinshi ico mulenjesesha? Leteni indalama monepo.”" 
Mark12:16 Awe nabo bamuletela imo. Elyo abepusha ati, “Ngoyu balengelepo nefi ifyalembwapo fyakwani?” Bamwasuka abati, “Fyakwa Kesalo.”" 
Mark12:17 Elyo Yesu abeba ati, “Kanshi akupeeleni Kesalo ifyakwa Kesalo, elyo akupeeleni Lesa ifyakwa Lesa.” Awe bapapa nganshi pafyo ayasuka." 
Mark12:18 Elyo Abasaduki bamo baisa kuli Yesu. Abasaduki bena batila, “Takwaba kushukuka kwa bafwa.”" 
Mark12:19 Balaipusha Yesu abati, “Kafundisha, ifwe Mose atulembele aya mashiwi ati, ‘Umuntu nga afwilwa munyina, uwasha umukashi nomba tafyelemo bana, ninshi uyu muntu ali nokuupa mukamfwilwa pakuti afyalileko munyina abana.’" 
Mark12:20 Nomba kwaliko bamunyina abaume beka beka cine lubali. Umukalamba wabo ewabalilepo ukuupa umwanakashi, nomba afwafye ukwabula ukufyalamo umwana." 
Mark12:21 Uwacibili amupyana, lelo nao afwa ukwabula ukufyalamo umwana, no walenga batatu nao nifyo fine." 
Mark12:22 Basuka bonse cine lubali bapwa ukufwa, ukwabula ukufyalamo abana. Pakulekelesha umwanakashi nao wine asuka afwa." 
Mark12:23 Nomba pakushukuka kwa bafwa, bushe akaba umukashi wakwani apo aupilwe kuli bonse cine lubali?”" 
Mark12:24 Yesu abasuka ati, “Bushe teko ekuluba kwenu uko, pantu tamwaishiba Malembo Yamushilo, nangu amaka yakwe?" 
Mark12:25 Pantu ilyo abantu bakabuuka ku bafwa, tabakaleupa nangu ukulaupwa, lelo bakaba nga bamalaika ba mu mulu." 
Mark12:26 Nomba pa mulandu wakubuuka ku bafwa, bushe tamwabelenga mu citabo cakwa Mose, pa mulandu wa cimpusa calebilima, ifyo Lesa aebele Mose ati, ‘Nine Lesa wakwa Abrahamu, Lesa wakwa Isaki, Lesa wakwa Yakobo?’" 
Mark12:27 Kanshi ni Lesa wa bomi, te Lesa wa bafwa iyoo. Mwalilubafye apakalamba nganshi.”" 
Mark12:28 Kafundisha wamafunde umo alyumfwileko uko balebikana ifikansa. Ilyo amona ukuti Yesu ayasuka bwino bwino, nao amwipusha ati, “Bushe ifunde ilyacila pa mafunde yonse lifunde nshi?”" 
Mark12:29 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Ifunde ilyacilapo pali yonse nili ilyakutila, ‘Umfwa we Israeli, Imfumu Lesa wesu e Mfumu fye imo mpo epela." 
Mark12:30 Na iwe uletemwa Imfumu Lesa obe no mutima obe onse, no mweo obe onse, na mano yobe yonse, na maka yobe yonse.’" 
Mark12:31 Ifunde ilyakonkapo nili, ‘Uletemwa umubiyo ngefyo waitemwa we mwine.’ Takwaba ifunde limbi ilyacila pali aya.”" 
Mark12:32 Elyo kafundisha wamafunde amweba ati, “Kafundisha, wayasukafye bwino. Walungika mukusosa ukuti Lesa abafye umo, takwaba na umbi." 
Mark12:33 Kabili ukumutemwa no mutima obe onse, na mano yobe yonse, na maka yobe yonse, elyo no kutemwa umubiyo ngefyo waitemwa we mwine, ifi fintu fyalicila amalambo yonse ayo balekela Lesa no kumocela.”" 
Mark12:34 Cilya Yesu amona ukuti ayasukafye ifyamano, amweba ati, “Iwe uli mupepi no Bufumu bwakwa Lesa.” Awe nomba tapali nakabili uwakupama ukwipusha Yesu na fimbi." 
Mark12:35 Ilyo Yesu alefunda mwi Tempele, aipusha abantu ati, “Bushe cinshi ico bakafundisha bamafunde basosela abati, ‘Kristu ni Mwana Davidi?’" 
Mark12:36 Ngefyo Davidi umwine ilyo asanikilwe na Mupashi Wamushilo asosele ati, “‘Imfumu yaeba Imfumu yandi aiti, Ikala ku kulyo kwandi, mpaka abalwani bobe nkabacita apakunyanta amakasa yobe.’" 
Mark12:37 Nga kanshi apo Davidi umwine aita Kristu ati, ni Mfumu, bushe kanshi Kristu kuti aba shani mwane?” Na bantu ibumba ilikalamba basansamuka pakumfwa Yesu." 
Mark12:38 Elyo alabafunda ati, “Cenjeleni kuli bakafundisha bamafunde, abatemwa ukwendauka nabafwala imingila iyitali, nokuti abantu balebaposha mu mansa sha fisankano." 
Mark12:39 Kabili basala ifipuna ificindamishepo mu sinagoga, elyo ne fipuna ifyamucinshi pa malila." 
Mark12:40 Aba ebalila bamukamfwilwa ifyuma fyabo, kabili batemwa ukuilanga mukupepa amapepo ayatali. Ala aba bantu ebo Lesa akakandisha ukucila!”" 
Mark12:41 Elyo Yesu aikala apalungatene ne cipao mwi Tempele. Alelolesha ifyo ibumba lya bantu lileposa indalama mu cipao. Abafyuma abengi baleposamo indalama ishingi. 
Mark12:42 Elyo paisa mukamfwilwa umo umupina, ena aposamo utundalama tubili." 
Mark12:43 Yesu aita abasambi bakwe, abeba ati, “Ndemweba icine cine uyu mukamfwilwa umupina, aposamo ukucila bonse abaposelemo indalama mu cipao." 
Mark12:44 Pantu bonse abaposelemo indalama, bafumishe pa fingi, lelo uyu mukamfwilwa umupina wena aposamo tonse uto akwete utwakulilamo.”" 
Mark13:1 Nomba cilya Yesu alefuma mwi Tempele, umusambi wakwe umo amwebele ati, “Kafundisha, shimona ifimabwe ubukulu! We fikuulwa ubusuma!”" 
Mark13:2 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Bushe nifi fikuulwa fikalamba ulemona? Ala tapakashale libwe nangu limo pa mulu wa libiye, yakabongololwafye yonse.”" 
Mark13:3 Kabili cilya Yesu ekele pa lupili lwa Miolifa apalungatana ne Tempele, elyo Petelo, Yakobo, Yoani na Andele balamwipusha ilyo bali beka abati," 
Mark13:4 “Twebeko, bushe ifi fintu fikabako lilali? Elyo kabili cishibilo nshi tukeshibilako ukuti ifi fintu fyalafikila?”" 
Mark13:5 Elyo Yesu atendeka ukubeba ati, “Mulecenjela pakuti umuntu nangu umo ekamubepaika." 
Mark13:6 Pantu abengi bakesa balesosa abati, ‘Nine Kristu,’ kabili bakabepa abengi." 
Mark13:7 Elyo mukomfwa inkondo ne ntulubundi sha nkondo, mwikasakamikwa. Ifi fintu fili nokucitika, lelo ukupwa kwa calo ninshi takulati." 
Mark13:8 Pantu umushobo umo ukemina umushobo ubiye, elyo ne mfumu imo ikemina imfumu ibiye. Kukaba ne finkukuma mu ncende ishalekana lekana, kabili kukaba ne fipowe. Ifi fyonse fikabafye icitendekelo ca macushi." 
Mark13:9 “Eico imwe mube abailukila. Pantu bakamutwala mu filye, kabili bakamuma ifikoti mu masinagoga. Bakamulubulwisha ku balashi na bashamfumu pa mulandu wa ine, pakuti mukabe bakambone bandi." 
Mark13:10 Lelo ilyo ukupwa kwa calo takulafika, Imbila Nsuma ili nokubala yashimikilwa ku mishobo yonse." 
Mark13:11 Kabili ilyo bakalamwikata no kumusenda kukumulubulwisha, mwikalasakamana umwakuya landila. Mukalelandafye ifyo mwalangililwa pa nshita ine iyo, pantu temwe mukalalanda, lelo ni Mupashi Wamushilo eukalalanda." 
Mark13:12 Munyina akepaisha munyina, wishi nao mwane. Abana bakemina abafyashi babo no kubepaisha." 
Mark13:13 Abantu bonse bakamupata pa mulandu wa ine. Lelo uukashipikisha mpaka na ku mpela, eukapusuka." 
Mark13:14 “Ilyo mukamona umupamba wabonaushi, uli mu ncende ushili nakubamo, (uulebelenga naeluke) elyo abakaba mu Yudeya bakafulumukile ku mpili." 
Mark13:15 Uukaba pa mutenge wa ŋanda yakwe, ekeka ukuti aye buula ifintu fyakwe mu ŋanda." 
Mark13:16 Uukaba mwibala, ekabwela kukubuula insalu shakwe." 
Mark13:17 We shamo we ku banakashi abakaba pabukulu na bakalaonsha abana muli shilya nshiku! 
Mark13:18 Mulelomba Lesa ukuti ifi fintu fiikacitika mu nshita yampepo. 
Mark13:19 Pantu ukufumafye apo Lesa abumbile icalo ukufika na pali nomba, tapatala apaba, kabili takwakatale akuba ubucushi ubwabipisha ngobo." 
Mark13:20 Kabili Imfumu aikaanacefyako isho nshiku, nga tekuti kube muntu nangu umo uwingapusuka. Lelo pa mulandu wa basalwa abo yaisalila iyine, yalicefyako isho nshiku." 
Mark13:21 “Elyo kabili umo nga amweba ati, ‘Moneni, Kristu uyu ali kuno, nangu moneni ulya ali kulya!’ mwikasumina." 
Mark13:22 Pantu kukamoneka bakristu babufi na bakasesema babufi. Bakalacita ifishibilo ne finjelengwe ifyakubepaikilako na basalwa nga cingacitika. 
Mark13:23 Kanshi imwe mube abailukila, namusokako libela." 
Mark13:24 “Nomba muli isho nshiku, ilyo ubo bucushi bukapita, elyo akasuba kakafiita, umweshi nao ukaleka ukubalika," 
Mark13:25 intanda nasho shikapona ku mulu, na maka ya mu mulu yakatenkana." 
Mark13:26 Elyo bakamona Umwana wa muntu uko aleisa mu makumbi na maka nganshi no bucindami. 
Mark13:27 Elyo akatuma bamalaika kukulonganika abasalwa bakwe, ukufuma ku tupinda tonse tune utwa pano isonde, ukutula ukwatendekela isonde ukufika noko wapelela umulu." 
Mark13:28 “Kanshi ku mukunyu eko musambilile. Imisambo yauko itila nga yapuka ululembelya, ninshi mwaishiba ukuti amainsa yali mupepi." 
Mark13:29 Eifyo fine na imwe, nga mwamona ifi fintu fyalacitika, ninshi mukeshibe ukuti Kristu ali mupepi, alifye pa mwinshi." 
Mark13:30 Ndemwebe cine cine ukuti, ino nkulo tayakapite, ninshi ifi fintu fyonse fyalicitika." 
Mark13:31 Umulu ne calo fikonaika, lelo amashiwi yandi yena tayakonaike iyoo." 
Mark13:32 “Lelo tapaba uwaishiba ilyo ubo bushiku bukafika, nangu ni nshita ine. Bamalaika ba mu mulu tabaishiba, nangufye Umwana taishiba, kanofye Tata eka ewaishiba." 
Mark13:33 Mulecenjela mwikale abaiteyanya, pantu tamwishibe ilyo nshita ikafikila." 
Mark13:34 Caba ngo muntu uuleya pa bulendo, ilyo alasha iŋanda, apeela imilimo ku basha bakwe iyo bakulabomba cila muntu. Elyo akonkomesha malonda ukulalonda lyonse." 
Mark13:35 Kanshi mulelola, pantu tamwishibe ilyo umwine wa ŋanda akabwela. Nalimo ni ku cungulo, nangu pakati ka bushiku, nakalimo pali mukolwe wantanshi, nangu pa macaca." 
Mark13:36 Mulelola, epali amupumikisha, asanga muli mu tulo." 
Mark13:37 Ifyo ndemweba, ndeebafye bonse nati, mulelola!”" 
Mark14:1 Awe kwashelefye inshiku shibili kukusefya inshikunkulu ye Pasaka iya Cakucilila, ne nshikunkulu ya Mikate Ishatutumuka. Bashimapepo bacindami na bakafundisha bamafunde balefwailisha ifyakwikata Yesu mu bucenjeshi, no kumwipaya." 
Mark14:2 Balasosa abati, “Awe mu nshikunkulu mwena temo, epali kwaisa buuka icimfulunganya mu bantu.”" 
Mark14:3 Yesu ali mu Betani mu ŋanda yakwa Simoni Wafibashi. Ilyo ali pakulya, mwaisa umwanakashi nasenda ibotolo umwali amafuta aya cena cisuma ayaleitwa nardi, aya mutengo ukalamba nganshi. Amokolapo inciliko pebotolo, akonkomwena na mafuta pa mutwe wakwa Yesu." 
Mark14:4 Lelo bamo abalimo bafulwa, balaebana abati, “Cinshi balaonawila ifi amafuta?" 
Mark14:5 Aya mafuta nga kuti bayashitisha pa ndalama ukucila imyanda itatu, elyo bashipeela na ku balanda.” Awe bailishanya nganshi pali uyu mwanakashi." 
Mark14:6 Yesu wena asosa ati, “Mulekeni! Cinshi ico mwalamusakamikila? Ala namombela umulimo usuma nganshi." 
Mark14:7 Abalanda bena mwakulaba nabo lyonse, kabili lyonse ilyo mulefwaya, kuti mwabafwilisha. Lelo ine tatwakabe na imwe lyonse." 
Mark14:8 Uyu mwanakashi nabomba ukulingana nefyo engabomba. Nasuba umubili wandi libela pakuupekanya kukushiikwa. 
Mark14:9 Ndemweba icine cine, konse uko bakalashimika Imbila Nsuma pano isonde ponse, bakalashimika ne fyacita uyu mwanakashi, pakumwibukisha.”" 
Mark14:10 Elyo Yuda wa ku Kelyoti, umo pa basole ikumi limo na babili, aile kuli bashimapepo bacindami, pakuti omfwane nabo ifyakuposa Yesu kuli bena." 
Mark14:11 Awe nabo basansamuka pakumfwa ifyo. Bamulaya no kumulipila indalama. Yuda wena alafwailishafye inshita ingalinga ukumuposelapo. 
Mark14:12 Ubushiku bwakubalilapo ubwakulyamo Imikate Ishatutumuka, ubo baleipayamo umwana wa mpaanga ukuba ilambo lye Pasaka, inshikunkulu ya Cakucilila, abasambi baipwishe Yesu abati, “Bushe ni kwi ulefwaya tuye tukupekanishishe ukwakulila Ipasaka?”" 
Mark14:13 Elyo atumapo abasambi bakwe babili, abeba ati, “Kabiyeni mu musumba, muleya kumana no mwaume nasenda umutondo wa menshi. Muye mukonka na mu ŋanda aleya ingila." 
Mark14:14 Elyo muye eba umwine ŋanda amuti, ‘Kafundisha atila ati, bushe umuputule wandi uli kwi umwakuti njise ndile Ipasaka na basambi bandi?’" 
Mark14:15 Nao alaya mulanga umuputule wa pamulu, uukulu, nabawansa, nauteyanishiwa. Umo mwine emo mutupekanishishe.”" 
Mark14:16 Awe abasambi baima, baya mu musumba, baya sanga ne fintu fyonse ngomo Yesu abebele. Nabo epakupekanya ne Pasaka." 
Mark14:17 Cilya kwaba icungulo, Yesu na basambi ikumi limo na babili baya kulya kwine." 
Mark14:18 Ilyo bandeme pakulya, Yesu asosa ati, “Ndemweba icine cine, umo pali imwe uo tulelya nankwe alamposa ku balwani.”" 
Mark14:19 Nabo baikatwa no bulanda, balamwipusha umo umo abati, “Bushe nine?”" 
Mark14:20 Nao abasuka ati, “Ni umo pali imwe ikumi limo na babili, uo nalatumpika nankwe pamo mu mbale." 
Mark14:21 Ukuba kwena Umwana wa muntu alaya kukufwa nga mulya mwine calembelwa. Lelo umuntu walaposa Umwana wa muntu, ena alishama! Uyu muntu akaanafyalwa nga kuti camuwamina!”" 
Mark14:22 Ilyo bali pakulya, Yesu abuulile umukate, atasha Lesa, aumokaula, apeela na basambi bakwe ati, “Buuleni, uyu mubili wandi.”" 
Mark14:23 Elyo abuula ulukombo, atasha Lesa, kabili abapeela bonse banwamo." 
Mark14:24 Abeba ati, “Uyu mulopa wandi uwa cipangano, uulesuuma pa mulandu wa bengi." 
Mark14:25 Namweba icine cine, nshakanwe nakabili ifya ku fisabo fya myangashi, mpaka no bushiku bulya ilyo nkanwa umwangashi upya mu Bufumu bwakwa Lesa.”" 
Mark14:26 Kabili cilya bapwa ukwimba ulwimbo, bafumamo, baya na ku lupili lwa Miolifa." 
Mark14:27 Elyo Yesu abeba ati, “Imwe bonse mulembutuka. Pantu calilembwa ukuti, ‘Nkakoma kacema, ne mpaanga shikapashika!’" 
Mark14:28 Nomba ilyo nkabuuka ku bafwa nkamutangilila ku Galile.” 
Mark14:29 Petelo epakumwankula ati, “Nelyo bonse balekubutuka, awe ine, iyoo!”" 
Mark14:30 Elyo Yesu amweba ati, “Ndekweba icine cine, lelo line, buno bwine bushiku, mukolwe talati alile imiku ibili, ninshi iwe naunkaana imiku itatu.”" 
Mark14:31 Lelo Petelo abwekeshapo, alandikisha ati, “Ine, nshakukaane nakalya nga kufwa tulefwa nobe!” Awe na bambi bonse balandafye cimo cine." 
Mark14:32 Elyo Yesu na basambi bakwe baya ku ncende iyo beta Getisemani. Yesu abeba ati, “Ikaleni pano pa nshita ndepepa.”" 
Mark14:33 Asendapo Petelo, Yakobo na Yoani, aya nabo. Elyo atampa ukulanguluka nganshi, no bulanda bwamwikata." 
Mark14:34 Kabili aeba abasambi bakwe ati, “Ine umutima wandi waikatwa no bulanda ni cikangafye mfwe. Shaleni pano, mulelola.”" 
Mark14:35 Awe ati endeleleko cinono akatalamukila, awa panshi, alapepa ukuti iyi inshita ingapitila ukutali nga cingalinga." 
Mark14:36 Asosa ati, “Abba, Tata, Tata ee, iwe ifintu fyonse kuti wacita, mpokololako kuli ubu bucushi. Lelo ifyo ine ndefwaya tefyo, kanofye ifyo iwe ulefwaya.”" 
Mark14:37 Kabinge abwelela ku basambi bakwe, asanga bali mu tulo. Elyo aeba Petelo ati, “Simoni bushe naulala mwa? Bushe wafilwa ukulola pa nsa imofye?" 
Mark14:38 Mulelola no kupepa mulepepa, epakukanawila mu ntunko. Umutima wena ulefwaya, lelo umubili wena naunakuka.”" 
Mark14:39 Nakabili Yesu aya mukupepa, alasosafye amashiwi yamo yene." 
Mark14:40 Nakabili abwelela ku basambi, asanga bali mu tulo, pantu amenso yabo nayekatwa ku tulo, baluba ne cakumwasuka." 
Mark14:41 Kabili abwela umuku wabutatu, alabeba ati, “Bushe kanshi na nomba mucili mu tulo, muletuusha? Capwa! Inshita yafika! Moneni, Umwana wa muntu alaposwa mu minwe ya bantu babi." 
Mark14:42 Imeni, natuleya uwakumposa alafika!”" 
Mark14:43 Ilyo line ninshi Yesu acili alelanda, Yuda, umo uwa pa basole ikumi limo na babili afika. Aisa ne bumba lya bantu, nabaipangasha ne mpanga ne nkonto, bafuma kuli bashimapepo bacindami, bakafundisha bamafunde na bakalamba." 
Mark14:44 Uwakuposa Yesu wena ninshi nabapeela icishibilo ati, “Uo nalaya posha pa kumutomona euyo wine. Mumwikate no kumusopa bwino pakumusenda.”" 
Mark14:45 Apopene cilya Yuda afika, alungama kuli Yesu, asosa ati, “Mwapoleni Kafundisha!” Elyo amutomona." 
Mark14:46 Awe bafukukila pali Yesu, bamwikata." 
Mark14:47 Elyo umo pa beminine mupepi asomona ulupanga, akoma umusha wakwa Shimapepo mukalamba amusempako ukutwi." 
Mark14:48 Elyo Yesu abepusha ati, “Bushe ine ndi cipondo pakuti mwise ne mpanga ne nkonto kukunjikata?" 
Mark14:49 Inshiku shonse twaleba na imwe ndefunda mwi Tempele, nokuti munjikate iyoo. Nomba cisuma, epakuti ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo fifikilishiwe.”" 
Mark14:50 Awe abasambi bakwe bonse bamusha eka bafulumuka. 
Mark14:51 Elyo pali umulumendo umo uwalekonka Yesu, afwelefye insalu yeka yeka. Wena ilyo bamwikata," 
Mark14:52 abapusumuka, asha insalu afulumuka ubwamba." 
Mark14:53 Awe basendele Yesu bamutwala kuli Shimapepo mukalamba. Elyo bashimapepo bacindami, abakalamba na bakafundisha bamafunde balongana bonse." 
Mark14:54 Petelo wena alekonka Yesu lutonuma, asuka aingila na mu lubansa lwe sano lyakwa Shimapepo mukalamba. Awe aikala na pekele ifita fya mwi Tempele, alaonta no mulilo." 
Mark14:55 Bashimapepo bacindami bonse na bashicilye bene bonse balafwailisha imilandu Yesu acita, pakuti bamupingwilepo ukufwa, lelo bafilililwafye." 
Mark14:56 Kwena pali bakambone babufi abengi abalandile ifingi ifyakubepesha Yesu. Lelo ifyo balelanda fyalepusana. 
Mark14:57 Kabili bambi nabo baiminina, balabepesha Yesu abati," 
Mark14:58 “Ifwe twalyumfwile uko alesosa ati, nkabongolole Tempele ilyakuulwa na bantu, elyo pa nshiku shitatu nkakuulapo limbi ilishakakuulwe na bantu.”" 
Mark14:59 Lelo na pali uyu wine mulandu ifyo balesosa fyalipusene. 
Mark14:60 Elyo Shimapepo mukalamba aiminina mu lwalala aipusha Yesu ati, “Tauleyasuka nelyo cimo? Ngeyi milandu yonse aba bantu balekwebelela?”" 
Mark14:61 Nomba Yesu wena aikalafye, no kwasukapo nakalya. Shimapepo mukalamba nakabili amwipusha ati, “Bushe niwe Kristu Umwana wakwa Lesa Umwinakulumbwa?”" 
Mark14:62 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Ee nine wine. Kabili mukamona Umwana wa muntu naikala lwa ku kulyo kwa Mwine wa maka yonse, noko aleisa pa makumbi ya mu mulu.”" 
Mark14:63 Elyo Shimapepo mukalamba alepula insalu shakwe, ati nokuti, “Bushe cinshi tulefwaila bakambone na bambi?" 
Mark14:64 Mwayumfwila mwe bene ifyo asaalula Lesa! Nga imwe muletipo shani?” Awe bonse bapingula ukuti alingilefye ukufwa. 
Mark14:65 Elyo bamo batendeka ukumusaka amate, bamukaka insalu pa menso, balamututaulamo ififunshi baleti, “Sesema tumfwe, nani wakuma!” Ifita fya mwi Tempele nafyo fyamubula fyamuma nganshi." 
Mark14:66 Kanshi Petelo ali pa lubansa mwisamba. Elyo kwaisa umukashana umubomfi wakwa Shimapepo mukalamba. 
Mark14:67 Amona Petelo aleonta umulilo, amulolekesha, amweba ati, “Na iwe waciba pamo na Yesu umwina Nasaleti!”" 
Mark14:68 Lelo wena akaana ati, “Ine nshishibe nangu ukumfwa ico ulelanda umo cilolele.” Petelo aya mu lukungu. Awe na mukolwe alila." 
Mark14:69 Ulya mukashana umubomfi, amumona nakabili atendeka ukulaeba abemininepo ati, “Uyu nao munabo.”" 
Mark14:70 Awe nakabili Petelo akaana. Kabili cilya papita akashita, abemininepo balaeba Petelo abati, “Cine cine uli munabo, pantu uli mwina Galile.”" 
Mark14:71 Lelo ena atampa ukulaitipwila no kulapa ati, “Ine uyo muntu mulelandapo nshimwishibe iyoo!”" 
Mark14:72 Awe apopene mukolwe alila umuku walenga ibili. Elyo Petelo aibukisha ifyo Yesu acimweba ati, “Ilyo mukolwe talalila umuku wabubili ninshi iwe naunkaana imiku itatu.” Awe atimuka na mu filamba, alalila no kulila." 
Mark15:1 Cilya bwaca ulucelo, bashimapepo bacindami, pamo na bakalamba, bakafundisha bamafunde na bashicilye bonse, balongene balepandana ifyakucita. Awe bakaka Yesu, bamusenda, bamutwala na kuli Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Elyo Pilato amwipusha ati, “Bushe iwe niwe mfumu ya Bayuda?” Yesu amwasuka ati, “Nausosa.”" 
Mark15:3 Bashimapepo bacindami bena balamwebelela imilandu iyingi. 
Mark15:4 Pilato nakabili aipusha Yesu ati, “Bushe tawayasukepo nelyo cimo? Mona imilandu ubwingi balekwebelela iwe!”" 
Mark15:5 Lelo Yesu tewakwasukapo nelyo cimo. Awe Pilato camupesha amano. 
Mark15:6 Nomba cila nshikunkulu ye Pasaka iya Cakucilila, Pilato alebakakwilapo lyonse umufungwa umo uo abantu balefwaya." 
Mark15:7 Kanshi kwaliko umuntu umo uo baleita Balaba, uo baposele mu cifungo pamo na babiye ico baipeye abantu ilyo balelwisha ubuteko." 
Mark15:8 Elyo ibumba lyaisa kuli Pilato, lyalamulomba ukuti acite ifyo abacitila lyonse." 
Mark15:9 Pilato nao abepusha ati, “Bushe mulefwaya ukuti mukakwile imfumu ya Bayuda?”" 
Mark15:10 Pilato alishibe ukuti ni ku mufimbilafye bashimapepo bacindami bamuletele Yesu. 
Mark15:11 Nomba bashimapepo bacindami balasokawila ibumba ukuti lilombe Pilato abakakwile Balaba. 
Mark15:12 Pilato kabili abepusha ati, “Nga kanshi nalacita shani noyu mutila ni mfumu ya Bayuda?”" 
Mark15:13 Nabo balapundafye abati, “Mutanikenifye!”" 
Mark15:14 Pilato abepusha ati, “Nga kanshi cinshi ico abifya?” Nabo elyo bacishamo ukupunda abati, “Mutanikenifye!”" 
Mark15:15 Kanshi Pilato ico alefwaya ukusansamusha ibumba, abakakwila Balaba. Abeba no kuma Yesu ifikoti, elyo abalubwila ukuti baye mutanika." 
Mark15:16 Elyo ifita fyatwala Yesu mukati ka lubansa lwa mwisano, fyalonganya ne mpuka yonse iya fita." 
Mark15:17 Fyamufwika umwingila wakashika, fyalema iŋana ya myunga, fyamufwika na ku mutwe." 
Mark15:18 Elyo fyatendeka ukulamuposha fileti, “Tupole Mulopwe, we mfumu ya Bayuda!”" 
Mark15:19 Fyalamufupaula ne tete ku mutwe, fyalamusaka amate. Kabili fyalamufukamina pakumutotela." 
Mark15:20 Ilyo fyaleka ukumupumya, fyamufuula umwingila wakashika, fyamufwika ne nsalu shakwe. Elyo fyamutwala kunse kukumutanika." 
Mark15:21 Mu nshila bakumanya umuntu alepita ukufuma mu mpanga, Simoni umwina Kurene, wishi wakwa Alekisanda na Rufusi, eo bapatikisha ukumusendelako umusalaba." 
Mark15:22 Elyo batwala Yesu ku ncende iyo beta Gologota, emukutila, “Pa cipanga.”" 
Mark15:23 Elyo bamupeela no mwangashi uo basakenyemo umuti muri, nomba akaana ukunwa." 
Mark15:24 Awe elyo bamutanika. Nomba pakwakana ifyakufwala fyakwe pena, balapendula pakumona ico cila muntu alebuulapo." 
Mark15:25 Bamutanike cilya akasuba kasansama pa nshita ya 09:00. 
Mark15:26 Umulandu walembelwepo uo bamwipailepo wakuti, “Ni Mfumu ya Bayuda.”" 
Mark15:27 Kabinge batanike pamo nankwe ifipondo fibili, cimo ku kulyo cimbi naco ku kuso." 
Mark15:28 Epakufikilisha ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo ayakuti, “Apendelwe pamo ne fipondo.”" 
Mark15:29 Kanshi abantu abalepitapo balemutuka balekunta ne mitwe balati, “Eya! Tewe waleti, ‘nkabongolole Tempele, elyo nkalikuula mu nshiku shitatu?’" 
Mark15:30 Kanshi ipusushe we mwine, ika na pa musalaba!”" 
Mark15:31 Mu musango umo wine bashimapepo bacindami na bakafundisha bamafunde balalanshanya balemuseka abati, “Alepususha bambi, nomba afilwa ukuipususha umwine!" 
Mark15:32 Lekeni Kristu Imfumu ya bena Israeli ike pa musalaba uleke tumone, tusumine!” Kabili nabo bene batanikwe nankwe, nabo balamusaalula." 
Mark15:33 Cilya akasuba kafikile pakati ka mutwe pa nshita ya 12:00, imfifi yakupile icalo conse, ukufikafye na lilya kasendeme pa nshita ya 15:00." 
Mark15:34 Elyo cilya akasuba kasendama pa nshita ya 15:00, Yesu apunda ne shiwi ilikalamba ati, “Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakatani?” Ekutila, “Lesa wandi, Lesa wandi, cinshi wandekelesesha?”" 
Mark15:35 Elyo abantu bamo abaiminine mupepi ilyo baumfwa, balasosa abati, “Umfweni, aleita Eliya!”" 
Mark15:36 Elyo umo abutuka, aya tumpika umwepu mu mwangashi uwakantuka, autunga na kwitete, amutambika ukuti anwe. Asosa nokuti, “Pembeleni, lekeni tumone Eliya nga alaisa mwishapo!”" 
Mark15:37 Elyo Yesu apunda ishiwi ilikalamba aleka no mweo. 
Mark15:38 Awe icisalu balecinga mwi Tempele calepuka pakati, ukufuma pamulu ukufika na panshi." 
Mark15:39 Elyo umukalamba wa fita umwanda umo uwaiminine apalungatene na Yesu, pakumona umusango afwilamo, asosa ati, “Cine cine uyu muntu ni Mwana Lesa.”" 
Mark15:40 Kwali na banakashi bamo abaiminine akatalamukila baletamba. Pali aba, palipo Maria Mandalena, bambi ni Maria nyina wakwa Yakobo mwaice na Yose, elyo na Salome." 
Mark15:41 Aba banakashi ebalekonka Yesu no kumutangata ilyo ali mu Galile. Elyo kwalifye abanakashi abengi abaishile nankwe ku Yerusalemu. 
Mark15:42 Nomba bwali bushiku bwakupekanya, emukutila pa bushiku bwaletangilile Sabata." 
Mark15:43 Mu nshita ya cungulo kwaishile Yosefu wa ku Alimateya, shicilye umo uwacindikwe nganshi. Nao wine alelolela ukwisa kwa Bufumu bwakwa Lesa. Aya napama kuli Pilato, aya lomba icitumbi cakwa Yesu." 
Mark15:44 Awe Pilato asunguka pakumfwa ukuti Yesu nafwa kale. Elyo aita umukalamba wa fita umwanda umo, alamwipusha nga cacine Yesu nafwa kale." 
Mark15:45 Ilyo aumfwa ku mukalamba wa fita umwanda umo ukuti nifyo fine, Pilato asuminisha ukupeela Yosefu icitumbi cakwa Yesu." 
Mark15:46 Yosefu nao ashita insalu iyabuuta. Asamuna icitumbi cakwa Yesu, acipomba mu nsalu, acibika mu nindi iyo bafukwile mu cilibwe. Elyo akunkulushishapo ilibwe pa mwinshi wa nindi." 
Mark15:47 Maria Mandalena na Maria nyina wakwa Yose balemonako umo balemubika. 
Mark16:1 Ilyo ubushiku bwe Sabata bwapitile, Maria Mandalena, Maria nyina wakwa Yakobo, na Salome bashitile amafuta ya cena icisuma pakuti baye basube icitumbi cakwa Yesu." 
Mark16:2 Kanshi lucelocelofye ubushiku bwakutampa umulungu baya ku nindi ninshi elyofye akasuba katula. 
Mark16:3 Balaipushanya abati, “Bushe nani aleya tukunkulushishako icilibwe ukufumya pa mwinshi wa nindi?”" 
Mark16:4 Nomba bati baloleshe, bamona ukuti icilibwe icali icikalamba nganshi nabacikunkulushapo." 
Mark16:5 Cilya baingila mu nindi, bamona umulumendo ekele lubali lwa ku kulyo, afwele no mwingila uwabuuta. Awe batiina nganshi." 
Mark16:6 Nao abeba ati, “Mwitiina, mulefwaya Yesu umwina Nasaleti, uo batanike. Ala nabuuka, talimo muno. Moneni apo, epo bamulalike." 
Mark16:7 Nomba kabiyeni muye eba abasambi bakwe na Petelo ukuti, namutangilila ku Galile. Eko mukaya mumona nga filya fine amwebele.”" 
Mark16:8 Awe abanakashi bafuma mu nindi, bafulumuka ulubilo, baletutumafye, nacibapesha amano. Kabili tabaebeleko muntu nelyo umo, ico bali no mwenso." 
Mark16:9 [Lucelocelo ubushiku bwakutampa umulungu ilyo Yesu abuukile ku bafwa, uo abalilepo ukumonekela ni Maria Mandalena, uo atamfishemo imipashi yakowela cine lubali." 
Mark16:10 Nao epakuya shimikilako abo Yesu aleenda nabo abaleloosha no kulila. 
Mark16:11 Nomba bena nangu baumfwile kuli Maria Mandalena ukuti Yesu nakabili ali umumi elyo no kumumona namumona, nalyo line tabasumine." 
Mark16:12 Kabili panuma Yesu aisa monekela mu musango umbi ku basambi babili abaleya mu mpanga. 
Mark16:13 Awe nabo babwelelamo ku banabo no kuya bashimikilako, lelo nabo bene tababasumine nakalya." 
Mark16:14 Elyo pakulekelesha aisa monekela ku basole ikumi limo na umo, cilya bali pakulya. Alabebaula pa mulandu wakubulwa icisumino no kumalala kwa mitima yabo, pantu bakeene ukusumina abo abamumwene ilyo abuukile ku bafwa." 
Mark16:15 Elyo abeba ati, “Kabiyeni mu fyalo fyonse, mulebila Imbila Nsuma ku bantu bonse." 
Mark16:16 Uwasumina no kubatishiwa abatishiwa, akapusuka. Lelo uwakaana ukusumina wena akaba no mulandu." 
Mark16:17 Elyo ne fishibilo fyacipeshamano ifyo abansumina bakalacita nifi, bakalatamfya imipashi yakowela pakubomfya ishina lyandi, bakalalanda na mu ndimi ishipya." 
Mark16:18 Kabili bakalaikata insoka, elyo nga banwa icakwipaya umuntu tacakalebacita nangu cimo. Bakalatambalikila na maboko yabo pa balwele, nabo bakalapola.”" 
Mark16:19 Nomba ilyo Imfumu Yesu yapwa ukulanda nabo, yasendwa ku mulu eko yaya ikala lubali ku kulyo kwakwa Lesa." 
Mark16:20 Elyo abasambi bena basalangana baya balebila mpanga yonse. Imfumu nayo yalebomba nabo, yalekosha na mashiwi yabo ku fishibilo fyacipeshamano balecita.]" 
Luke1:1 Mukwai, ba Teofili! Abantu abengi balyesha ukulemba pakuti balondolole ifintu ifyacitika pakati kesu." 
Luke1:2 Abantu batushimikila, bantu abaliko pakutampafye pene, abaimwenene na menso yabo, kabili abaipeele na kukufunda ishiwi lya Mfumu." 
Luke1:3 Kanshi apo na ine nalipitulukamo muli fyonse bwino bwino pa nshita iyitali, eico we Teofili we mucindami wine wine, na ine nimona ukuti ndi nokumulembela fyonse umo fyakonkanina." 
Luke1:4 Epakuti mushininkishe ukuti fyonse ifyo mwafundwa fyacishinka. 
Luke1:5 Ilyo Herodi ali pa bufumu mu Yudeya, kwaliko shimapepo umo, ishina lyakwe ni Sakaria, uwa mu mukowa wakwa shimapepo Abiya. Umukashi wakwe Elisabeti nao ali wa mu mukowa wakwa shimapepo Aroni." 
Luke1:6 Bonse babili bali abololoke pa cinso cakwa Lesa. Balekonka ifyebo na mafunde yonse aya Mfumu ukwabula icilubo. 
Luke1:7 Nomba tabakwete mwana ico Elisabeti ali ni ŋumba. Kabili bonse babili bali abakote. 
Luke1:8 Nomba ilyo cafikile impuka yakwa Sakaria ukubomba umulimo wa bushimapepo, Sakaria ewalebombela Lesa." 
Luke1:9 Bashimapepo bali no lutambi lwakupendula pakusala imilimo cila umo ali nokubomba. Kanshi ubo bushiku cawilile Sakaria ukuti eo aye futumwina Lesa ububani mwi Tempele. 
Luke1:10 Ilyo Sakaria ali mukati alefutumwina Lesa ububani, ninshi abantu bali kunse balepepa." 
Luke1:11 Elyo malaika wa Mfumu amumonekela, aisa iminina lubali lwa ku kulyo kwa bulambo bwakufutumwinapo ububani." 
Luke1:12 Sakaria ati amone malaika, umutima wafuma, no mwenso wamwikata." 
Luke1:13 Elyo malaika amweba ati, “Sakaria witiina, ala Lesa alyumfwa ipepo lyobe. Elisabeti umukashi obe akakufyalila umwana umwaume, ukamwinika ne shina lya Yoani." 
Luke1:14 Kabili ukasansamuka no kwanga, na bantu abengi nabo bakasansamuka pa kufyalwa kwakwe." 
Luke1:15 Pantu akaba umucindami pa menso yakwa Lesa. Takalenwa mwangashi nangufye ubwalwa bumbi bonse. Kabili akesulamo na Mupashi Wamushilo ninshi acili mwifumo lyakwa nyina. 
Luke1:16 Kabinge, akabwesesha abena Israeli abengi ku Mfumu Lesa wabo." 
Luke1:17 Akakwata amano na maka nga kasesema Eliya. Akatangilila Imfumu kukupekanya abantu bakuibombela. Akawikishanya abafyashi na bana. Akalula bacintomfwa ukukwata amano yene yene aya bantu abololoke.” 
Luke1:18 Sakaria epakwipusha malaika ati, “Nga kuti naishiba shani ifyo wasosa? Ine ndi mukote, elyo umukashi wandi nao nomba nakula.”" 
Luke1:19 Malaika amweba ati, “Nine Gabriele. Njiminina lyonse pa cinso cakwa Lesa. Ine bantumine kukulanda nobe, no kukushimikila ili lyashi lisuma." 
Luke1:20 Mona walaba cibulu, tawakulalanda. Ukesa landafye ilyo ifi fintu fikafikila. Pantu tausumine amashiwi yandi, ayali nokufikilishiwa pa nshita iyalinga.”" 
Luke1:21 Abantu bena ninshi balelolelafye Sakaria. Nomba cabapesha amano ico akokola mwi Tempele. 
Luke1:22 Ilyo aisa fumamo, awe Sakaria afilwa ukulanda na bantu. Elyo abantu baishiba ukuti Sakaria namonekelwa ne cimonwa mwi Tempele. Awe nomba alabacebulafye, ico ali cibulu." 
Luke1:23 Ilyo inshiku shapwa ishakutumika Lesa mwi Tempele, awe abwelelamo kumwakwe." 
Luke1:24 Pati papite inshita, umukashi wakwe Elisabeti aimita. Aleka no kumonekela ku bantu pa myeshi isano." 
Luke1:25 Alasosa ati, “Imfumu nainangulukilako na ine. Nainsebulula insoni ku bantu.”" 
Luke1:26 Mu mweshi walenga mutanda ukufuma apo Elisabeti aimitile, Lesa atumine malaika Gabriele ku musumba umo uwa mu Galile, ishina lyauko ni Nasaleti." 
Luke1:27 Amutuma ku mukashana umo ushakuma ku mwaume, uwakobekelwe kuli Yosefu, uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Davidi. Ishina lya mukashana ni Maria." 
Luke1:28 Malaika aingila umwali Maria, amweba ati, “Mwapoleni we wasenaminwa apakalamba nganshi! Imfumu yaba na iwe!”" 
Luke1:29 Pakumfwa aya mashiwi, Maria camusakamika nganshi, alatontonkanya nokuti, “Nga uku kuposha kwalola mwi?”" 
Luke1:30 Malaika amweba ati, “Witiina Maria, Lesa alikusenamina." 
Luke1:31 Ala walaimita, ukafyala no mwana umwaume, ukamwinika ne shina lya Yesu." 
Luke1:32 Akaba uwacindama, kabili akalaitwa Mwana Lesa Mukulu. Imfumu Lesa ikamupeela ubufumu bwa cikolwe cakwe Davidi." 
Luke1:33 Akaba imfumu iyakuteeka lyonse aba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo, no bufumu bwakwe tabwakapwe!”" 
Luke1:34 Maria elyo aipusha malaika ati, “Nomba ifi, bushe kuti fyacitika shani, apo ine nshaishiba mwaume?”" 
Luke1:35 Malaika amwasuka ati, “Mupashi Wamushilo alaisa pali iwe, na Lesa Mukulu akakukubanya na maka yakwe. Eico umwana ukafyala akaba uwamushilo. Akalaitwa Mwana Lesa." 
Luke1:36 Ngefyo na Elisabeti lupwa lobe, uo abantu baleti ni ŋumba, nao ali pabukulu mu bukote bwakwe, na uno mweshi ewalenga mutanda." 
Luke1:37 Pantu takwaba nelyo cimo ico Lesa engafilwa.” 
Luke1:38 Maria epakusosa ati, “Cisuma, ine ndi musha wa Mfumu. Lesa engacitila ngomo mwine walandila.” Elyo malaika amusha, aya." 
Luke1:39 Mu nshiku shine isho, Maria aimine, aile bwangu bwangu ku musumba umo uwa mu mpili isha mu calo ca Yudeya." 
Luke1:40 Aingila mu ŋanda mwa Sakaria, aposha na Elisabeti." 
Luke1:41 Elisabeti ati ashumfwafye uko Maria alemuposha, umwana alayanga mwifumo lyakwe. Elisabeti epakwisulamo na Mupashi Wamushilo." 
Luke1:42 Elyo aikatisha ishiwi asosa ati, “Maria, walisenaminwa pa banakashi bonse, no mwana ali mwifumo lyobe alisenaminwa!" 
Luke1:43 Nga nashuka shani icakuti nyina wa Mfumu yandi ese kuli ine? 
Luke1:44 Pantufye ilyo naumfwa ukuposha kobe, umwana mwifumo lyandi alayanga ne nsansa." 
Luke1:45 Ee, cine cine walishuka we wasumine ifyo Imfumu yakwebele ukuti fili nokucitika!”" 
Luke1:46 Maria epakutila ati, “Umutima wandi ulelumbanya Imfumu." 
Luke1:47 No mweo wandi uleyanga muli Lesa Umupusushi wandi. 
Luke1:48 Pantu alinjibukisha ne musha wakwe, ne wafye! Ala ukufuma nomba, inkulo shonse shakulatila ndi we shuko." 
Luke1:49 Pantu uwamaka yonse ancitila ifyakupapa. Ishina lyakwe lyamushilo. 
Luke1:50 Kabili umukonkanina inkulo alanga uluse ku bamutiina. 
Luke1:51 Alicita ifyamaka no kuboko kwakwe. Alisalanganya abacilumba mu mitima yabo. 
Luke1:52 Alisamununa bashamfumu pa fipuna fyabo. Alisansabalika na bafye. 
Luke1:53 Abansala alibekusha ifisuma, abakankala bena abatamfya iminwe nkutwa." 
Luke1:54 Alitulanya Israeli umubomfi wakwe, mukwibukisha uluse lwakwe ulwape." 
Luke1:55 Ulo alaile ifikolwe fyesu Abrahamu na ba lupwa lwakwe.” 
Luke1:56 Maria aikele na Elisabeti cikanga imyeshi itatu, elyo abwelelamo kumwakwe." 
Luke1:57 Awe inshiku shakupaapa shasuka shakumana, Elisabeti epakupaapa umwana umwaume." 
Luke1:58 Ilyo abena mupalamano na ba lupwa lwakwe baumfwa ukuti Imfumu naimulangulukilako apakalamba, baisa kukusansamuka pamo nankwe." 
Luke1:59 Elyo pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse, baya kukusembulula umwana. Balafwaya ukuti bamwinike ishina lyakwa wishi Sakaria." 
Luke1:60 Lelo nyina asosa ati, “Awe iyoo, alainikwa ishina lya Yoani.”" 
Luke1:61 Elyo baeba nyina abati, “Tapaba nelyo umo pali ba lupwa lwenu uwainikwa ili shina!”" 
Luke1:62 Kanshi balalembula wishi pakumwipusha ishina ilyo alefwaya ukwinika mwane. 
Luke1:63 Sakaria nao alomba icakulembapo, alembapo ati, “Ishina lyakwe ni Yoani.” Awe bonse balapapafye." 
Luke1:64 Awe apopene akanwa kakwe no lulimi lwakwe fyakakuka, alalanda, alalumbanya na Lesa." 
Luke1:65 Awe abena mupalamano bonse baikatwa no mwenso. Kabili ifi fintu nomba fyabafye e lyashi abantu ba mu calo ca mpili ca mu Yudeya balalandapo. 
Luke1:66 Na bantu bonse abaleumfwako balatontonkanya mu mitima yabo abati, “Nampo ngoyu mwana akaba shani? Pantu Lesa kwena ali noyu mwana!”" 
Luke1:67 Elyo Sakaria wishi wakwa Yoani aisulamo na Mupashi Wamushilo, alasesema ati," 
Luke1:68 “Napaalwe na matotelo Imfumu, Lesa wa bena Israeli! Pantu napempula no kulubula abantu bakwe." 
Luke1:69 Natuletela Umupusushi wamaka, uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Davidi umubomfi wakwe." 
Luke1:70 Umo mwine alengele kale bakasesema bakwe bamushilo batwebe ukuti," 
Luke1:71 ‘Nkamupususha ku balwani benu bonse na kuli bonse abamupata. 
Luke1:72 Efyo nkalanga uluse nalaile ifikolwe fyenu, no kwibukisha icipangano cakwe icamushilo.’" 
Luke1:73 Icilayo alaile no mulapopo kuli Abrahamu icikolwe cesu," 
Luke1:74 ukuti akatupokololako ku balwani besu, epakulenga ukuti tulemubombela ukwabula umwenso." 
Luke1:75 Tulemutumika lyonse pa cinso cakwe, abamushilo kabili abakaele." 
Luke1:76 Elyo na iwe we mwana wandi, ukalaitwa kasesema wakwa Lesa Mukulu. Pantu uli nokutangilila Imfumu pakuipekanishisha inshila." 
Luke1:77 Uli nokwishibisha abantu ukuti ukupusuka kwabo kwaba mukubelelwa uluse ku fyabubifi fyabo. 
Luke1:78 Pantu Lesa wesu waluse ne cikuuku, alatupempula nga kasuba akatula mu mulu." 
Luke1:79 Alasanikila abantu abekala mu mfifi, mu cinshingwa ca mfwa. Alatutungulula mu nshila yamutende.”" 
Luke1:80 Umwana wena alekulilako mu cimo na mu mano. Ukwikala kwena, aleikala mu matololo mpaka no bushiku aishile isokolola ku bena Israeli." 
Luke2:1 Mu nshiku shine isho, Kesalo Angusito aumine imbila ukuti abantu bonse aba mu calo conse ica bena Roma bali nokulembwa no kupendwa." 
Luke2:2 Uku kupenda abantu, ekwali ukwakubalilapo ilyo Kwilino ali umulashi mu Siria." 
Luke2:3 Na bonse baleya kukulembwa cila muntu ku musumba wa fikolwe fyakwe. 
Luke2:4 Kanshi Yosefu nao afuma ku Nasaleti mu calo ca Galile, aya ku calo ca Yudeya ku musumba wakwa Davidi, uwitwa Betelemu, pantu wa mu lupwa kabili wa mu mukowa wakwa Davidi." 
Luke2:5 Yosefu aya kukulembwa na Maria uo akobekele, uwali pabukulu." 
Luke2:6 Ilyo bacili ku Betelemu, awe ne nshita yakupaapa umwana yafikila." 
Luke2:7 Maria abeleka umwana umwaume. Amupomba mu nsalu, amulalika na mu mulimba, pantu tabasangilemo incende mu ŋanda ya beni." 
Luke2:8 Mu ncende ine ilya, mwali bakacema mu mpanga balelinda ifitekwa fyabo ubushiku." 
Luke2:9 Awe malaika wa Mfumu abamonekela, no bucindami bwa Mfumu bwalabengeshima apo bali. Bakacema epakwikatwa no mwenso." 
Luke2:10 Malaika elyo abeba ati, “Ala iyoo, mwitiina. Naisa kukumushimikila ilyashi ilisuma, ilyakusansamushafye bonse." 
Luke2:11 Ala lelo mu musumba wakwa Davidi, Umupusushi wenu nafyalwa, ni Kristu Imfumu!" 
Luke2:12 Icakumwishibilako nici. Muleya sanga akamwana nabakapomba mu nsalu, nabakalalika mu mulimba.”" 
Luke2:13 Elyo apopene kwamoneka ibumba ilikalamba ilya fita fya mu mulu pamo na malaika, balalumbanya Lesa abati," 
Luke2:14 “Natulumbe Lesa mu mulu! Pano calo, umutende ku bantu abo atemwa!”" 
Luke2:15 Bamalaika cilya babasha babwelelamo ku mulu, bakacema balaebana abati, “Aleni natuleya ku Betelemu, tuye mona icicitikeko, ico Imfumu yaisa twishibishako.”" 
Luke2:16 Awe bwangu bwangu eko baya. Baya sanga Maria na Yosefu, na kamwana nakalala mu mulimba." 
Luke2:17 Cilya bamona akamwana, awe nabo balashimika ifyo malaika abebele pali aka kamwana." 
Luke2:18 Na bonse abaleumfwako, balapapa pafyo bakacema balebashimikila." 
Luke2:19 Maria ena alasunga aya mashiwi yonse mu mutima wakwe no kulayatontonkanyapo. 
Luke2:20 Bakacema pakubwelelamo, balalumbanya no kutasha Lesa pa fintu fyonse ifyo bomfwile nefyo bamwene. Fyonse filifye ngomo malaika acibebela." 
Luke2:21 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse apo afyalilwe, e bushiku bali nokumusembulwilapo. Elyo bamwinika ne shina lya Yesu, ishina malaika amwinike ninshi talati emitwe." 
Luke2:22 Kabinge cilya ubushiku bwakusangululwa bwafika, ukukonka Amafunde yakwa Mose, Yosefu na Maria epakutwala Yesu ku Yerusalemu kukumutuula kuli Lesa." 
Luke2:23 Pantu calembwa mu mafunde yakwa Lesa ukuti, “Umwana umwaume onse ibeli, ali nokulubwilwa ku Mfumu.”" 
Luke2:24 Kabili Yosefu na Maria baya leka ilambo pakukonka ifyalembwa mu mafunde ya Mfumu ukuti, “Bakalaleta utubondo twa nkunda tubili, nangu utwana twa fipele tubili.”" 
Luke2:25 Kanshi mu Yerusalemu mwalimo umuntu umo, ishina lyakwe ni Simeoni. Uyu muntu ali umololoke kabili uwapetamina Lesa. Alelolela inshita Lesa akalubula abena Israeli. Elyo na Mupashi Wamushilo ali nankwe." 
Luke2:26 Mupashi Wamushilo alimusokolwelele ukuti, takafwe kano akatale akamone Kristu." 
Luke2:27 Kanshi Mupashi Wamushilo amweba ukuti aye mwi Tempele. Awe ilyo line abafyashi nabo baletamo Yesu akanya, pakuti bamubombele fyonse ukulingana na Mafunde yakwa Mose." 
Luke2:28 Elyo Simeoni abuula Yesu amupakatila, alatasha na Lesa ati," 
Luke2:29 “Nomba we Mfumu, shi wingaleka umubomfi obe aye mu umutende, ngomo walaile." 
Luke2:30 Pantu amenso yandi yamona uwakutupususha," 
Luke2:31 uo wapekanya pakuti imishobo yonse imumone. 
Luke2:32 Abe ulubuuto lwakusanikila Abenafyalo, kabili ewakucindamika abena Israeli umutundu obe.”" 
Luke2:33 Awe wishi na nyina bena balapapafye pafyo Simeoni alanda pali uyu mwana. 
Luke2:34 Elyo Simeoni abapaala, alaeba na Maria nyina kwa mwana ati, “Ulemona uyu mwana, ala akalenga ukuti abengi bakalobe, elyo na bengi bakapusuke mu bena Israeli. Ala, akaba icishibilo cakwa Lesa ico abantu abengi bakapusaninapo." 
Luke2:35 Lyena elyo fikasokoloka ifyo abengi batontonkanya mu mitima yabo. Elyo na iwe, ubucushi ubukalamba bukapulinkanya umutima obe ngo lupanga.”" 
Luke2:36 Elyo kwaliko na kasesema umo umwanakashi, ishina lyakwe ni Ana, mwana Fanueli, uwa mu luko lwakwa Asheri. Ali umukote nganshi. Batile bashibofya ninshi acili umukashana, aikelefye no mulume wakwe imyaka cine lubali." 
Luke2:37 Ilyo umulume afwa, ashala aleikala umushimbe mpaka afika ne myaka amakumi cine konse konse na ine. Talefuma mwi Tempele, lelo aikalilefye ukubombela Lesa akasuba no bushiku, mukufunga ukulya na mukupepa." 
Luke2:38 Kanshi Ana nao aisamo pa nshita imo ine, alalumba na Lesa. Alalanda na pa mwana, alaebako bonse abalelolela ukuti Yerusalemu akalubulwe." 
Luke2:39 Yosefu na Maria ilyo bapwile ukucita fyonse ukulingana na mafunde ya Mfumu, elyo babwelelemo ku Galile, kumwabo, ku musumba wa Nasaleti."
