Luke15:13 Pati papitepo inshiku shinono, uwamwaice alonganya fyonse ifyo akwete. Elyo aima aya na ku calo ukutali, eko aya posaika ifyuma fyakwe mu mikalile yabuwelewele." 
Luke15:14 Cilya aposaika ifyuma fyakwe fyonse, muli cilya calo mwapona icipowe icabipisha. Elyo atampa ukucula ico ashikwete nelyo kamo." 
Luke15:15 Epakuya ingila incito ku muntu umo uwa muli cilya calo. Nao amutuma kwibala lyakwe kukulacema inkumba. 
Luke15:16 Uwamwaice alekumbwa ukulyako ifikapa ifyo inkumba shalelya. Nomba takwali nangu umo uwakumupako. 
Luke15:17 Yasuka amano yabwela. Elyo atila ati, ‘Mumone abancito ubwingi tata akwata, lelo balalya baikuta fyashalanapo. Nomba ine kuno ndefwa ku nsala." 
Luke15:18 Awe ine ndeima ndebwelelamo kuli tata. Ndeya mweba nati: Tata nalibifya kuli Lesa na kuli imwe bene. 
Luke15:19 Nomba nshilingile ukuti mulenjita umwana wenu iyoo. Muncitefye ngo mubomfi wancito.’ 
Luke15:20 Awe aima alaya na kuli wishi. “Nomba cilya aleya acili apatali, wishi amumona, aumfwa uluse. Abutukila kuli mwane. Amukumbatila, amutomona pakumuposha." 
Luke15:21 Elyo mwane asosa ati, ‘Tata, nalibifya kuli Lesa na kuli imwe bene. Awe nomba nshilingile ukuti mulenjita umwana wenu.’" 
Luke15:22 Lelo wishi wena aeba abasha bakwe ati, ‘Endesheni, leteni umwingila uwawamisha mumufwike. Mumufwike ne mbalaminwe ku minwe ne ndyato ku makasa." 
Luke15:23 Mulete ne ciponti ca ŋombe icaina, mucipaye, uleke tulye tusansamuke." 
Luke15:24 Pantu uyu mwana wandi alifwile, nomba nabuuka, alilubile nomba nalondoka.’ Awe batampa na malila." 
Luke15:25 “Umwana mukalamba wena ninshi ali kwibala. Nomba cilya alapalama ku ŋanda aumfwa inyimbo noko balecinda. 
Luke15:26 Elyo aitapo umusha umo alamwipusha ne ciliko. 
Luke15:27 Umusha nao amwasuka ati, ‘Munonko nabwela. Elyo bawiso nabepaya ne ciponti ca ŋombe icaina, pantu abwela umutuntulu kabili uwamutende.’" 
Luke15:28 Awe uwamukalamba afulwa, akaana no kwingilamo. Elyo wishi afuma alamupapata." 
Luke15:29 Nomba uwamukalamba ayasuka wishi ati, ‘Moneni imyaka ubwingi iyo namubombela ngo musha, kabili nshatala mpula mu mafunde yenu. Nomba imwe tamwatala amumpeela nangu akana ka mbushi, pakuti na ine nacita imitebeto twasansamuka na bacibusa bandi!" 
Luke15:30 Lelo ilyo umwana wenu uyu abwela, panuma yakonaula ifyuma fyenu kuli bacilende, wena mwamwipaila iciponti ca ŋombe icaina.’" 
Luke15:31 Wishi amweba ati, ‘Mwana wandi, iwe lyonse twaba nobe, ne fintu fyandi fyonse fintu fyobe." 
Luke15:32 Nomba kwena nacilinga ukuti tusansamuke, twangalile pamo, pantu munonko alifwile, kabili nabuuka. Alilubile, nomba nalondoka.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 Kabili Yesu aumine abasambi bakwe umulumbe na umbi ati, “Kwaliko umuntu umukankala uwakwete mushika. Nomba abantu baebele umukankala abati, ‘Mushika obe alekonawila ifyuma.’" 
Luke16:2 Nao epakwita mushika wakwe amweba ati, ‘Finshi ifi ndeumfwa pali iwe? Londolola pafyo usunga ifyuma fyandi, pantu tauli nakuba mushika wakulansungila ifyuma fyandi nakabili.’" 
Luke16:3 Elyo mushika alatontonkanya mu mutima wakwe ati, ‘Ndecita shani apo shikulu alampoka bumushika? Amaka yakulima nshakwata, elyo ukupula nako insoni shikanjikata." 
Luke16:4 Naishiba ifyo ndi nokucita pakuti nga bantamfya pa ncito, abantu bakansekelele mumwabo.’" 
Luke16:5 Awe alaita umo umo abali ne nkongole kuli shikulu wakwe. Aipusha uwakubalilapo ati, ‘Finshi wakongola kuli shikulu?’" 
Luke16:6 Nao amwasuka ati, ‘Nakongola amatepe ya mafuta umwanda umo.’ Mushika amweba ati, ‘Buula kalata obe, ikala, lembapo bwangu bwangu amatepe amakumi yasano.’" 
Luke16:7 Elyo mushika aipusha na umbi ati, ‘Nga iwe wakongola shani?’ Nao ayasuka ati, ‘Imifuko ya ŋanu umwanda umo.’ Mushika amweba ati, ‘Ale buula kalata obe, lembapo amakumi cine konse konse.’" 
Luke16:8 Shikulu wakwe atasha mushika wakwe incenjeshi, ico abomfeshe amano yabucenjeshi pakuisunga. Pantu abantu ba cino calo balicenjelapo mukwishiba ifyakwikala na banabo ukucila abana ba lubuuto.”" 
Luke16:9 Kabili Yesu alabeba ati, “Muleikwatila ifibusa ku fyuma ifya pano calo, pakuti ilyo fikapwa bakamusekelele mu cifulo cape." 
Luke16:10 Umuntu uwakuti bamucetekela pa fintu ifinono, kuti bamucetekela na mu fifulileko. Umuntu uo bashingacetekela mu finono, teti bamucetekele na pa fingi pene." 
Luke16:11 Kanshi nga tabalemucetekela mu fyuma fya pano calo nga nani engamucetekela pa fyuma fyacine cine? 
Luke16:12 Nga tabalemucetekela pa fyuma fya bene, nga nani akamupeela ifyuma ifyakuti fikabe fyenu?" 
Luke16:13 Umubomfi umo tekuti abe umusha wa bashikulu wakwe babili. Pantu kuti apatapo umo, umbi amutemwa. Nangu auminina kuli umo, umbi amusuula. Na imwe kuti mwafilwa ukuba abasha bakwa Lesa, elyo kabili abasha ba ndalama.”" 
Luke16:14 Abafalise, ico batemenwe indalama, ilyo baumfwa ifi, balaseka Yesu." 
Luke16:15 Nao Yesu alabeba ati, “Imwe mulaiwaminisha pa menso ya bantu, nomba Lesa alishiba imitima yenu. Pantu ico abantu bamona ukuti ecacindama, Lesa ena acimona ukuti cafyefye." 
Luke16:16 “Ukufika pali Yoani Kabatisha, balefunda Amafunde yakwa Mose nefyo bakasesema balembele. Lelo ukufuma pali Yoani, ni Mbila Nsuma ya Bufumu bwakwa Lesa eibilwa. Elyo na bonse abaleingilamo, balelwishafye." 
Luke16:17 Ala cayangukapo umulu ne calo ukonaika, ukucila ukuti akalitoni kamo aka mu Mafunde yakwa Mose kaonaika." 
Luke16:18 “Uyo onse uwaleka umukashi wakwe aupa na umbi, ninshi lubembu acita. Elyo noyo uwaupa umwanakashi uo umulume aleka, nao lubembu acita." 
Luke16:19 “Kwaliko umuntu umukankala, lyonse alefwala insalu ishakashikila ne shabuuta ishamutengo nganshi. Kabili alelyafye ifyakuipakisha cila bushiku." 
Luke16:20 Elyo pa mpongolo iya uyu mukankala, palelala umuntu umo umulanda, uwali ne filonda umubili onse, ishina lyakwe ni Lasalo." 
Luke16:21 Alekabila ukulyako ifyo umukankala alefilwa panuma yakulya. Imbwa shena shaleisa shilemumyangila ifilonda. 
Luke16:22 Awe umulanda afwa. Bamalaika baisa musenda, baya mubika mu ceni cakwa Abrahamu. Awe umukankala nao afwa, no kushiika bamushiika." 
Luke16:23 Mu cifulo ca bafwa, umo umukankala alecula nganshi, ati enune amenso, amona Abrahamu ukutalifye ali na Lasalo mu ceni cakwe." 
Luke16:24 Elyo alabilikisha ati, ‘Tata Abrahamu, shi winganangulukilako! Tuma Lasalo atumpike impela ya munwe wakwe mu menshi, ese antalalikeko ululimi. Ala ndeculisha nganshi muli uno mulilo.’" 
Luke16:25 Abrahamu amwasuka ati, ‘We mwana, ibukisha ilyo wali umumi, ifyo walepokelela ifintu ifisuma, lelo Lasalo wena fibi fyeka fyeka. Kanshi nomba alesansamuka, na iwe nomba ulecula." 
Luke16:26 Kabili teici ceka iyoo, pakati ka ifwe na imwe, paliba umuyenge ukalamba, pakuti abali kuno abalefwaya ukwisa uko muli teti bapite. Elyo abali uko muli, nabo teti bese kuno.’" 
Luke16:27 Nao umukankala asosa ati, ‘Kanshi tata nakupapata, tuma Lasalo kuli ba lupwa lwandi." 
Luke16:28 Pantu nalikwata bamunyinane abaume basano, uleke aye abasoke, pakuti bekesa kuli ino ncende yabucushi.’" 
Luke16:29 Abrahamu ayasuka ati, ‘Balikwata ifyo Mose na bakasesema balemba, kanshi efyo baleumfwikisha.’" 
Luke16:30 Nao umukankala ayasuka ati, ‘Iyoo, tata Abrahamu, ala nga cakuti umo pa bafwa aya uko bali, kuti balapila no kupilibuka.’" 
Luke16:31 Abrahamu amweba ati, ‘Nga cakuti tabomfwile Mose na bakasesema, nangu uwafwa engabuuka nalyo line teti abanashe nakalya.’ ”" 
Luke17:1 Kabili Yesu aebele abasambi bakwe ati, “Kwena ifyakulenga abantu ukubifya fyena fyaba nokubako. Lelo uyo uwalenga umunankwe ukubifya, wena akacimona." 
Luke17:2 Nomba uwalenga ukuti kamo pali utu twaice ukubifya, kuti camuwamina ukumukulikila mu mukoshi icilibwe icafina icakupelelako no kumuposa muli bemba." 
Luke17:3 Kanshi cenjeleni! “Munonko nga akulufyanya, mukalipile, lelo nga alapila no kupilibuka, mubeleleko uluse." 
Luke17:4 Nga cakuti akulufyanya imiku cine lubali mu bushiku bumo, elyo kabili abwela imiku cine lubali aleti, ‘Nalapila no kupilibuka,’ ninshi uli nokumubelelako uluse.”" 
Luke17:5 Abasole baeba Imfumu abati, “Tulundileniko icisumino!”" 
Luke17:6 Imfumu yayasuka aiti, “Amuba ne cisumino icili nga kalubuto ka lubanga, kuti mwaeba uyu muti amuti, ‘Ale inukule uye ilimba muli bemba.’ Na cine kuti wamubeela." 
Luke17:7 “Umo pali imwe nga alikwata umusha uulima mwibala nangu uucema impaanga, ilyo uyu muntu abwela ku mabala, bushe kuti amweba ati, ‘Isa bwangu, ikala, akulya?’" 
Luke17:8 Bushe tekuti amwebe ati, ‘Mpekanishisha icakulya ca mulalilo? Samwina ifyakufwala undetele ifyakulya, elyo upembele mpaka mpwe ukulya no kunwa. Elyo na iwe walalya no kunwa.’" 
Luke17:9 Bushe uyu muntu ali nokutasha umusha pantu acita ifyo amwebele? 
Luke17:10 Kanshi na imwe nifyo fine. Ilyo mwacita ifyo bamwebele ukucita, mulesosafye amuti, ‘Tuli bashafye, tucitilefye ifyo twaba nokucita.’ ”" 
Luke17:11 Pa bulendo bwakuya ku Yerusalemu, Yesu alekonka umupaka wa calo ca Samaria neca Galile." 
Luke17:12 Ilyo alaingila mu mushi umo, awe abafibashi ikumi limo baisa kukumukumanya. Baiminina akatalamukila." 
Luke17:13 Elyo balabilikisha abati, “Yesu, Shikulu shi wingatulangulukilako!”" 
Luke17:14 Yesu cilya abamona, abeba ati, “Kabiyeni, muye ilanga kuli bashimapepo.” Awe cilya baleya, bapola." 
Luke17:15 Umo pali aba ikumi, ilyo amona ukuti apola, abweluluka, alepunda ne shiwi likalamba, alelumbanya Lesa." 
Luke17:16 Aisa fukama apali Yesu, alamutasha. Kanshi uyu muntu ali umwina Samaria." 
Luke17:17 Elyo Yesu asosa ati, “Bushe tabapolele bonse ikumi? Nga bambi pabula bali kwi?" 
Luke17:18 Bushe tapali nangu umo uwakusakamana no kwisa tasha Lesa kanofye uyu Mwinafyalo?” 
Luke17:19 Elyo Yesu amweba ati, “Ima, kabiye, icisumino cobe ecakuposha.”" 
Luke17:20 Abafalise bamo baipwishe Yesu abati, “Bushe Ubufumu bwakwa Lesa bukesa lilali?” Nao abasuka ati, “Ukwisa kwa Bufumu bwakwa Lesa te cintu ico wingamona na menso." 
Luke17:21 Kabili takwakabe nelyo umo uwakutila ati, ‘Ala ubu buli kuno!’ Nangu, ‘Ala bulya kulya!’ Ubufumu bwakwa Lesa muli nabo pakati kenu.”" 
Luke17:22 Yesu alaeba abasambi ati, “Inshita ikesa ilyo mukalafwaya ukumonapo ubushiku bumo pa nshiku sha Mwana wa muntu. Lelo tamwakabumone nakalya." 
Luke17:23 Abantu bakalamweba abati, ‘Ala uyu kuno!’ nangu, ‘Ala ulya kulya!’ Mwikema no kulayako." 
Luke17:24 Pantu Umwana wa muntu pa bushiku bwakwe, akaba kwati mwele wa nkuba uutila nga wabyata, wasanikilafye umulu onse." 
Luke17:25 Lelo pakubala Umwana wa muntu ali nokucula nganshi, elyo nokusuulwa na bantu ba ino nkulo." 
Luke17:26 Nga filya cali mu nshiku shakwa Noa, efyo cikaba na mu nshiku sha Mwana wa muntu." 
Luke17:27 Abantu balelya, no kunwa balenwa, baleupa no kuupwa, mpaka no kufikafye ku bushiku Noa aingile mu cibwato. Elyo ilyeshi lyaisa, lyabalofya bonse." 
Luke17:28 Epamo nga filya cali mu nshiku shakwa Loti. Abantu balelya no kunwa, baleshita no kushitisha, balelima no kukuula." 
Luke17:29 Lelo ubushiku Loti afumine mu Sodoma, mwashele mwaloka amabwe ya mulilo, yabalofyafye bonse." 
Luke17:30 Ifi fine efyo cikaba pa bushiku Umwana wa muntu akasokoloka. 
Luke17:31 “Pali ubo bushiku, uukaba pa mutenge wa ŋanda, ekeka kukuya buula ifintu fyakwe mu ŋanda. Eifyo fine na ku ukaba mu mabala, ekabwela kufyo ashile." 
Luke17:32 Ibukisheni muka Loti! 
Luke17:33 Uyo onse uufwaya ukusunga umweo wakwe, akaulofya. Lelo uulofya umweo wakwe, eukausunga." 
Luke17:34 Ndemweba nati, abaume babili bakaba mu tulo pa musengele, umo akasendwapo, umbi akashala." 
Luke17:35 Abanakashi babili bakalapela bonse pamo, umo akasendwapo, umbi akashala.”" 
Luke17:36 [Abaume babili bakaba mwibala, umo akasendwapo, umbi akashala.]" 
Luke17:37 Elyo abasambi bamwipusha abati, “Ni kwi, we Mfumu?” Yesu abasuka ati, “Uko konse ukuba icitumbi, eko na makubi yalongana.”" 
Luke18:1 Kabili Yesu aumine abantu umulumbe, uwakubalanga ukuti bali nokulapepa lyonse ukwabula ukunenuka." 
Luke18:2 Alabeba ati, “Kwaliko kapingula wamilandu mu musumba umo, uushaletiina Lesa nangu ukusakamana umuntu." 
Luke18:3 Kabili muli uyo wine musumba mwalimo mukamfwilwa umo. Aleisa libili libili kuli kapingula wamilandu alemweba ati, ‘Ungafweko ukuti umulandu ku mulwani wandi ungwamine.’" 
Luke18:4 Kwena palipitile inshita kapingula wamilandu akaanafye. Lelo pakulekelesha asuka alatontonkanya mu mutima wakwe ati, ‘Kwena nshitiina Lesa kabili nshasakamana muntu." 
Luke18:5 Lelo uyu mukamfwilwa umupampamina wacilamo. Ndi nokuputwila umulandu ngomo alefwaila, epakuti aleke ukwisa mukunkalifya umutwe.’ ”" 
Luke18:6 Elyo Imfumu yasosa aiti, “Mwaumfwa ifyo uyu kapingula walufyengo asosa?" 
Luke18:7 Nga Lesa wena kuti akaana shani ukutulanya abantu bakwe, abamulilila ubwaca no bwaila? Bushe kuti alashingashinga pakubafwilisha?" 
Luke18:8 Awe, ndemweba ukuti, akabatulanyafye bwangu bwangu mu bupingushi bwakwe. Nomba ilyo Umwana wa muntu akabwela, bushe akesa sanga abantu abacisumino pano calo?”" 
Luke18:9 Kabili Yesu aumine umulumbe ku bantu bamo abaleitunga ukuba abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa, balesuula na bambi bonse, ati," 
Luke18:10 “Abantu babili baninike ukuya mwi Tempele kukupepa, umo Mufalise, umbi ni kasonkesha wamusonko." 
Luke18:11 Umufalise aiminina alapepa mu mutima wakwe ati, ‘We Lesa nakutasha pantu nshaba nga abantu bambi, abapupu, abalufyengo, abacende, nangu ifi fyaba uyu kasonkesha wamusonko." 
Luke18:12 Ndafunga ukulya imiku ibili cila mulungu. Elyo ndatuula cimo pekumi lyonse pafyo nonka.’ 
Luke18:13 Kasonkesha wena aiminina akatalamukila. Afilwa no kwinwina amenso ku mulu, alayumafye pa cifuba ati, ‘We Lesa, mbelelako uluse ne mubifi.’" 
Luke18:14 Ndemweba ukuti uyu muntu kasonkesha abwelele kumwakwe nalengwa ukuba uwakaele, umunankwe wena iyoo. Pantu uyo onse uuikusha, bakamucefya, no uicefya bakamusansabalika.”" 
Luke18:15 Awe abantu baletele utwaice kuli Yesu pakuti atukumye. Nomba cilya abasambi bamona, balabakalipila." 
Luke18:16 Yesu ati, “Lekeni utwaice twise uko ndi, mwitulesha iyoo. Pantu ababa ngotu twaice e bene ba Bufumu bwakwa Lesa." 
Luke18:17 Ndemweba icine cine, umuntu onse uushipokelela Bufumu bwakwa Lesa nga kaice, takengilemo nakalya.”" 
Luke18:18 Umuntu umo umucindami aipwishe Yesu ati, “Kafundisha musuma, bushe ni finshi ndi nokucita pakumona umweo wape?”" 
Luke18:19 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Cinshi ico wanjebela ukuti ndi musuma? Takwaba musuma nelyo umo, kanofye Lesa eka." 
Luke18:20 Walishiba amafunde ayatila, ‘Wilabembuka, wilaipaya, wilaiba, wilabepesha, ulecindika wiso na noko.’ ”" 
Luke18:21 Nao asosa ati, “Ifi fyonse ndafikonka ukufumafye ku bwaice bwandi.”" 
Luke18:22 Yesu cilya aumfwa ifi, amweba ati, “Wabulishapofye icintu cimo. Kashitishe fyonse ifyo wakwata. Upeele ne ndalama ku balanda. Lyena ninshi ukakwata icuma mu mulu, elyo wise unkonke.”" 
Luke18:23 Awe wena pakumfwa ifi aikatwa no bulanda, pantu ali uwacuma nganshi." 
Luke18:24 Yesu amulolesha, asosa ati, “Yangu ifyo cayafya ku bafyuma ukwingila mu Bufumu bwakwa Lesa!" 
Luke18:25 Ala cayangukapo ingamila ukupula mu linso lya nshindano, ukucila uwafyuma ukwingila mu Bufumu bwakwa Lesa.”" 
Luke18:26 Abaleumfwako balasosa abati, “Nga kanshi nani engapusuka?”" 
Luke18:27 Yesu ayasuka ati, “Ico abantu bafilililwafye ukucita, Lesa ena kuti acicita.”" 
Luke18:28 Petelo aeba Yesu ati, “Mona, ifwe twalisha ifyuma fyesu fyonse, twalikukonka.”" 
Luke18:29 Yesu abeba ati, “Ndemweba icine cine takwaba umuntu nelyo umo uwasha iŋanda, nangu umukashi, nangu bamunyina, nangu abafyashi, nangu abana pa mulandu wa Bufumu bwakwa Lesa," 
Luke18:30 uushakapokelepo imikufye iyingi ukucilapo pali fyonse akwata pa nshita ya nomba. Elyo mu nshita ikesa akamona umweo wape.” 
Luke18:31 Elyo Yesu asendele abasole ikumi limo na babili beka. Alabeba ati, “Moneni, twalaya ku Yerusalemu. Elyo fyonse ifyo bakasesema balemba pa Mwana wa muntu fili nokufikilishiwa." 
Luke18:32 Pantu akaposwa mu minwe ya Benafyalo. Bakamuseka, bakamucusha no kulamusaka amate." 
Luke18:33 Kabili bakamuma ifikoti no kumwipaya. Elyo ubushiku bwalenga shitatu, akabuuka ku bafwa.”" 
Luke18:34 Nomba abasole tabateseshe amashiwi Yesu alandile umo yalolele. Calyanshishe ukuyomfwa. Tabailwike nelyo panono pafyo alandile. 
Luke18:35 Yesu ilyo apaleme ku Yeriko, kwali impofu imo iyaikele mumbali ya nshila, yalelomba." 
Luke18:36 Cilya yaumfwa uko ibumba lilepita, yaipusha iciliko." 
Luke18:37 Abantu bayeba abati, “Ni Yesu wa ku Nasaleti eulepita.”" 
Luke18:38 Elyo impofu yabilikisha aiti, “Yesu mwana Davidi, shi winganangulukilako!”" 
Luke18:39 Abali pantanshi balaikalipila, balayeba ukuti italale. Lelo yena elyo yacila ukupunda aiti, “Mwana Davidi, shi winganangulukilako.”" 
Luke18:40 Awe Yesu aiminina, aeba na bantu ukuti balete impofu uko ali. Cilya impofu yapalama, Yesu aipusha ati," 
Luke18:41 “Cinshi ulefwaya ukuti nkucitile?” Nayo aiti, “We Mfumu, ndefwaya ukulalolesha.”" 
Luke18:42 Yesu nao ayeba ati, “Kanshi akulolesha. Icisumino cobe ecakuposha.”" 
Luke18:43 Awe apopene alalolesha alakonka na Yesu, alelumbanya Lesa. Abantu bonse nabo cilya bamona icacitika, balalumbanya Lesa." 
Luke19:1 Ilyo Yesu aingile mu Yeriko, alecilinganya no musumba," 
Luke19:2 awe paisa no muntu umo ishina lyakwe ni Sakeyo. Ali umukankala, kabili ewali umukalamba wa bakasonkesha bamusonko." 
Luke19:3 Alafwaya ukumona Yesu ifyo aba. Nomba afilwa, ku mulandu we bumba, elyo no mulandu wa ciimo pantu ali umwipi." 
Luke19:4 Kanshi epakubutukila kuntanshi mu nshila Yesu ali nokupita. Anina umukunyu pakuti amone Yesu. 
Luke19:5 Cilya Yesu afika pali iyo ncende, apunamina ku muti, amweba ati, “Sakeyo, ika bwangu! Pantu lelo ni kumobe eko ndefikila.”" 
Luke19:6 Awe Sakeyo aikafye bwangu bwangu amupokelela ne nsansa. 
Luke19:7 Abantu bonse bati bamone ifi, balaisosha abati, “Alaya fikila ku mubifi.”" 
Luke19:8 Nomba Sakeyo wena aiminina, aeba Imfumu ati, “We Mfumu nalapeela ku balanda ifyuma fyandi pakati. Kabili nga nalifyengeleshapo umuntu pa cintu cimo, ndemufutilapo imiku ine pali ico cintu.”" 
Luke19:9 Elyo Yesu amweba ati, “Ilelo line ipusukilo lyaisa muli ino iŋanda, pantu uyu muntu nao wine mwana wakwa Abrahamu." 
Luke19:10 Ala Umwana wa muntu aisa kukulondola no kupususha abaluba.” 
Luke19:11 Ilyo abantu balekutika kufyo Yesu alelanda, ninshi alapalama ku Yerusalemu. Abantu bena balatontonkanya ukuti Ubufumu bwakwa Lesa bwalaisa apopene." 
Luke19:12 Yesu epakubomina umulumbe uyu ati, “Umuntu umo uwa ku bufumu, aile ku calo cimo ukutali, pakuti baye mupeela ubufumu elyo panuma akabwele." 
Luke19:13 Talati eme, aita abasha bakwe ikumi limo. Abapeela cila umo indalama ikumi limo. Abeba ati, ‘Muleshibomfya mukucita amakwebo, mpaka nkabwele.’" 
Luke19:14 Nomba abekashi ba mu calo cakwe balimupatile. Bamutumina ne nkombe uko aile abati, ‘Tatulefwaya uyo muntu ukuba imfumu yesu.’" 
Luke19:15 “Ilyo uyu muntu bamupeela ubufumu, abweluluka. Aisa ita abasha bakwe abo apeele indalama, pakuti amone ifyo bamwenenepo mu makwebo yabo." 
Luke19:16 Uwakubalilapo aisa asosa ati, ‘Kanabesa, indalama shenu nalimwenapo indalama na shimbi ikumi limo.’" 
Luke19:17 Imfumu yamweba aiti, ‘Mwabombeni! We musha musuma! Apo walanga ukuti uli wacishinka na mu tunono, na ine ndekulashika, uleteeka imisumba ikumi.’" 
Luke19:18 Uwabubili aisa, nao asosa ati, ‘Kanabesa, indalama shenu nalimwenapo indalama shisano.’" 
Luke19:19 Nao Imfumu yamweba aiti, ‘Nakulashika pa misumba isano.’" 
Luke19:20 Elyo umbi umusha aisa, asosa ati, ‘Kanabesa, indalama shobe ishi. Nalisunga, nafisa mu citambala." 
Luke19:21 Nalekutiina, pantu uli muntu wayafya. Ubuula ne cintu icishili cobe, useepa nefyo ushatanda.’" 
Luke19:22 Imfumu yamweba aiti, ‘We musha mubi we! Ku mashiwi walanda yene, eko nalakupeelela umulandu. Bushe iwe walishiba ukuti ndi muntu uwayafya, mbuula ne cintu icishili candi, nseepa nefyo nshatanda?" 
Luke19:23 Nga kanshi cinshi ushabikile indalama kulya babikisha indalama, pakuti ilyo nabwela naisa fumyako na kambikilapo.’" 
Luke19:24 Elyo imfumu yaeba abemininepo aiti, ‘Mupokeni indalama, mupeele noyo ukwete indalama ikumi limo.’" 
Luke19:25 Abantu baeba imfumu abati, ‘Ala nakwata indalama ikumi!’" 
Luke19:26 Imfumu yabeba aiti, ‘Onse uwakwata akapeelelwapo na fimbi, lelo uushakwata bakamupoka noto akwata." 
Luke19:27 Nomba abalwani bandi bena, abo bashalefwaya ukuti mbe imfumu yabo, baleteni pano, mubepaile pa cinso candi.’ ”" 
Luke19:28 Yesu cilya apwa ukulanda ifi, awe atangila balaninika ukulola ku Yerusalemu." 
Luke19:29 Cilya apaleme ku Betani na Betifage, mupepi no lupili lwa Miolifa, Yesu atuminepo abasambi babili." 
Luke19:30 Abeba ati, “Kabiyeni pa mushi ulya pantanshi. Pakwingilafye pene muleya sanga umwana wa punda nakulikwa, uo umuntu ashatala aninapo. Mumukakule, mumulete kuno." 
Luke19:31 Umo nga amwipusha ati, ‘Cinshi ico mwalakakwila umwana wa punda?’ Muye sosa amuti, ‘Ni Mfumu eilemufwaya.’ ”" 
Luke19:32 Awe abatuminwe baima, baya sanga fyonse umo Yesu abebele." 
Luke19:33 Cilya balakakula umwana wa punda, abene babepusha abati, “Cinshi ico mwalakakwila umwana wa punda?”" 
Luke19:34 Nabo bayasuka abati, “Ni Mfumu eilemufwaya.”" 
Luke19:35 Awe baleta umwana wa punda kuli Yesu. Bayanshikapo ne nsalu shabo, elyo baninikapo Yesu." 
Luke19:36 Ilyo aleya, abantu bena balayansa insalu shabo mu nshila." 
Luke19:37 Nomba cilya aya alapalama ku mutentemuko wa lupili lwa Miolifa, elyo ibumba ilikalamba ilya basambi lyatampa ukulapunda, lilelumbanya Lesa ne nsansa pa fipeshamano fyonse lyamwene." 
Luke19:38 Lyalati, “Naipaalwe Imfumu iyi yaisa iyo Lesa atuma! Icibote mu mulu, na malumbo kuli Lesa Mukulu!”" 
Luke19:39 Abafalise bamo abali mwibumba, balaeba Yesu abati, “Kafundisha, lesha abasambi bobe!”" 
Luke19:40 Yesu abasuka ati, “Ndemweba nga baleka, ninshi amabwe eyakulapunda.”" 
Luke19:41 Ilyo Yesu apaleme ku musumba, ati aumone, alaulilila ifilamba." 
Luke19:42 Alasosa ati, “Iwe Yerusalemu, mbafye mu kalelo awiluka pa fingakuletela icibote, nomba fyalifisama ku menso yobe!" 
Luke19:43 Ala inshiku shikakufikila ilyo abalwani bobe bakakushingulusha impembwe. Bakakushinguluka no kukucilikila monse monse. 
Luke19:44 Bakakuwisha panshi, no kwipaya abantu bobe bonse. Mu fikuulwa fyobe tapakabe ilibwe ilyakushala pa mulu wa libiye. Ne cikalenga nico wakeene ukwishiba inshita Lesa alekupempula.”" 
Luke19:45 Kabili Yesu aingile mwi Tempele. Elyo atampile ukulatamfisha panse abaleshitishamo. 
Luke19:46 Alabeba ati, “Calilembwa ukuti, ‘Iŋanda yandi ikaba ni ŋanda ya mapepo,’ lelo imwe mwaisangula icifulo ca bapupu.”" 
Luke19:47 Awe Yesu ena alafundafye cila bushiku mwi Tempele. Bashimapepo bacindami na bakafundisha bamafunde ne ntungulushi sha bantu bena balafwaya ukumwipaya. 
Luke19:48 Nomba bafilwa ifyakucita, pantu abantu bonse balemumfwa nabolika na matwi." 
Luke20:1 Ubushiku bumo, cilya Yesu alefunda abantu no kubila Imbila Nsuma mwi Tempele, bashimapepo bacindami na bakafundisha bamafunde na bakalamba, baishile kuli Yesu." 
Luke20:2 Balamwipusha abati, “Twebeko, bushe ni ku maka nshi ucitilako ifi fintu? Nangu bushe uwakupeela aya amaka nani?”" 
Luke20:3 Yesu abasuka ati, “Na ine nalamwipushapo icipusho cimo, munjebeko." 
Luke20:4 Bushe ulubatisho lwakwa Yoani, lwafumine ku mulu nangu ni ku bantu?”" 
Luke20:5 Awe balapingushanya abati, “Nga twatila lwafumine ku mulu, ninshi aletweba ati, ‘Ngeco mushasuminine cinshi?’" 
Luke20:6 Conse nga twatila, ‘Ni ku bantu,’ ninshi abantu baletwipaya ku mabwe, pantu balishininkisha ukuti Yoani ali ni kasesema.”" 
Luke20:7 Kanshi epakwasuka Yesu abati, “Tatwishibe uko lwafumine.”" 
Luke20:8 Yesu nao abasuka ati, “Kanshi na ine nshamwebe ukufuma amaka ncitilako ifi fintu.”" 
Luke20:9 Elyo Yesu abomina umulumbe uyu ati, “Umuntu umo alilimine ibala lya myangashi, aliseekesha na ku balimi. Elyo aya mu fyalo pa nshitafye ikalamba." 
Luke20:10 Cilya ulwakulobolola ifisabo lwafika, atuma umusha ku balimi pakuti ese bamupeeleko ifisabo fimo ifya mwibala lyakwe ilya myangashi. Nomba abalimi bena bamupumaula, bamutamfya aya iminwe nkutwa." 
Luke20:11 Kabili umwine ibala atumako umusha na umbi. Abalimi nabo bamupumaula no kumusebanya icabipisha nganshi. Elyo bamuleka, abwelelamo iminwe nkutwa." 
Luke20:12 Kabili atumako uwabutatu. Uyu wena bamucenaula, bamuposa na kunse ye bala." 
Luke20:13 Umwine we bala epakutila ati, ‘Ndecita shani? Nalatumakofye umwana wandi uo natemwa, nalimo wena baleya mucindika.’" 
Luke20:14 Lelo abalimi bati bamumone, balaebana abati, ‘Ala impyani iyi. Aleni iseni tuipaye, ne bala likaba lyesu.’" 
Luke20:15 Awe bamuposa na kunse ye bala lya myangashi bamwipaya.” Elyo Yesu aipusha ati, “Nga kanshi umwine ibala akabacita shani?" 
Luke20:16 Akalofya abo balimi, akaseekesha ne bala lya myangashi kuli bambi.” Ilyo baumfwa ifi, balasosa abati, “Awe ico cena teco!”" 
Luke20:17 Yesu abalolekesha elyo asosa ati, “Nga kanshi calola kwi ici calembwa icakuti, “‘Ilibwe ilyo bakakuula basuulile, elyaisa ba ilyakwikasha petungi.’" 
Luke20:18 Umuntu onse uukaponena pali ili libwe, akafunaika, elyo na onse uo lyaponena likamushonaula.”" 
Luke20:19 Bashimapepo bacindami na bakafundisha bamafunde balafwaya ukwikata Yesu apopenefye, ico bailuka ukuti muli uyu mulumbe, ebo Yesu alelandapo. Nomba batiina abantu." 
Luke20:20 Kanshi balalindila inshita iyilingile. Elyo batuma abantu kuli Yesu abakuilanga ukuba abacishinka. Lelo bali nokulengula amashiwi Yesu alesosa, pakuti bamwikatilepo no kumuposa mu minwe ya buteko bwa mulashi." 
Luke20:21 Kanshi balaipusha Yesu abati, “Kafundisha, natwishiba ukuti ulanda no kufunda ifyalungama. Kabili tawaba na kapatulula, lelo ufunda fyonse ifyo Lesa afwaya mu cishinka." 
Luke20:22 Bushe calilinga ukuti tulesonka umusonko kuli Kesalo nangu iyoo?” 
Luke20:23 Nomba Yesu ico eshibe ubucenjeshi bwabo, abeba ati," 
Luke20:24 “Nangeniko indalama imo. Bushe uyu balengapo nefi fyalembwapo fyakwani?” 
Luke20:25 Nabo bayasuka abati, “Fyakwa Kesalo.” Yesu abeba ati, “Kanshi akupeeleni Kesalo ifyakwa Kesalo. Elyo akupeeleni Lesa ifyakwa Lesa.”" 
Luke20:26 Awe bafilwa ukusanga icakumwikatilapo pafyo alandile pa bantu. Lelo balapapafye imyasukile yakwe, baikalafye tondolo." 
Luke20:27 Abasaduki bamo baisa kuli Yesu. Abasaduki bena batila, takwaba kushukuka kwa bafwa. Balaipusha Yesu abati," 
Luke20:28 “Kafundisha, Mose atulembele amafunde ati, ‘Umuntu nga afwilwa munyina uwasha umukashi nomba tafyelemo abana, ninshi uyu muntu ali nokuupa mukamfwilwa pakuti afyalileko munyina abana.’" 
Luke20:29 Nomba kwaliko bamunyina cine lubali, abaume beka beka. Umukalamba wabo ewabalilepo ukuupa umwanakashi, lelo afwa ukwabula ukufyala abana." 
Luke20:30 Uwabubili 
Luke20:31 no wabutatu bamupyana. Nomba nabo lumo lwine, mpakafye bonse cine lubali bafwa, ukwabula ukufyalamo abana." 
Luke20:32 Elyo pakulekelesha nao umwanakashi asuka afwa. 
Luke20:33 Nomba pakushukuka kwa bafwa, bushe kanshi umwanakashi akaba mukashi wakwani, apo aupilwe kuli bonse cine lubali?”" 
Luke20:34 Yesu abasuka ati, “Abantu ba ino nshita, balopa no kuupwa." 
Luke20:35 Lelo abo balingile ukubako muli ilya nshita ikesa no kushukuka ku bafwa, bena tabakaleupa nelyo ukulaupwa." 
Luke20:36 Bena tabakalefwa. Pantu bakabafye nga bamalaika. Kabili bena bakwa Lesa, ico balishukuka ku bafwa." 
Luke20:37 Nomba pa mulandu wakubuuka ku bafwa, na Mose alitulanga mufyo alemba pa cimpusa calebilima, umo aita Imfumu ati, ‘Ni Lesa wakwa Abrahamu, Lesa wakwa Isaki, Lesa wakwa Yakobo!’" 
Luke20:38 Kanshi ni Lesa wa bomi, te Lesa wa bafwa iyoo. Pantu kuli Lesa kwena bonse bomi.”" 
Luke20:39 Bakafundisha bamafunde bamo balasosa abati, “Kafundisha, ee, kwena wayasuka bwino!”" 
Luke20:40 Kanshi nomba tapali no wakupama ukwipusha Yesu na fimbi. 
Luke20:41 Elyo Yesu abepwishe ati, “Bushe cinshi ico abantu basosela ukuti, Kristu ni mwana Davidi?" 
Luke20:42 Nomba Davidi umwine mu citabo ca Malumbo atila ati, “‘Imfumu yaeba Imfumu yandi aiti, ikala ku kulyo kwandi," 
Luke20:43 mpaka abalwani bobe nkabacite apakunyanta amakasa yobe.’ 
Luke20:44 “Nga kanshi apo Davidi aita Kristu ati ni ‘Mfumu,’ bushe kanshi Kristu kuti aba shani mwane?”" 
Luke20:45 Elyo Yesu aeba abasambi bakwe, ninshi abantu bonse balekutika, ati," 
Luke20:46 “Cenjeleni kuli bakafundisha bamafunde, abatemwa ukwendauka nabafwala imingila iyitali. Kabili batemwa nokuti abantu balebaposha mu mansa sha fisankano. Mu masinagoga, batemwa ukusala ifipuna ificindamishe. Elyo no kuli amalila nako basala ifipuna fyamucinshi." 
Luke20:47 Aba ebalila bamukamfwilwa ifyuma fyabo. Kabili batemwa ukuilanga mukupepa amapepo ayatali. Ala aba bantu ebo Lesa akakandisha ukucila.” 
Luke21:1 Elyo Yesu ainuna amenso, amona abakankala uko baleposa ubupe bwabo mu cipao ce Tempele." 
Luke21:2 Elyo amona mukamfwilwa umo aposamo utundalama tubili. 
Luke21:3 Yesu asosa ati, “Ndemweba icine cine, uyu mukamfwilwa umupina, aposamo ukucila bonse." 
Luke21:4 Pantu bonse abaposelemo, bafumishe pa fingi. Lelo uyu mukamfwilwa umupina, wena aposamo tonse uto akwete utwakulilamo.”" 
Luke21:5 Elyo abantu bamo balelanda pe Tempele, abati, “Ifyo lyakuulwa na mabwe ayasuma! Ifyo lilesamikwa ku fyabupe fya bantu!” Yesu ena ati," 
Luke21:6 “Ifi fintu ifyo mulemona, ala inshiku shikesa, ilyo tapakashale libwe pa mulu wa libwe libiye, yakabongololwafye yonse.”" 
Luke21:7 Elyo baipusha Yesu abati, “Kafundisha, bushe ifi fintu fikabako lilali? Nge cishibilo cakwishibilako ukuti ifi fintu fyalatampa cishibilo nshi?”" 
Luke21:8 Yesu abeba ati, “Cenjeleni mwikabepwa! Pantu abengi bakesa balesosa abati, ‘Nine Kristu,’ no kutila, ‘Inshita naipalama.’ Ala mwikabakonka!" 
Luke21:9 Kabili ilyo mukalaumfwa inkondo ne fimfulunganya mwikalatunsha mitima. Pantu ifi fintu fili nokubalilapo ukucitika, lelo icalo cena tacakapwe apopene.”" 
Luke21:10 Kabili Yesu alabeba ati, “Umushobo umo ukemina umushobo ubiye, elyo ne mfumu imo ikemina imfumu ibiye." 
Luke21:11 Elyo kukaba ifikuko, ifipowe, ne finkukuma ifikalamba mu ncende ishalekana lekana. Kabili kukabako ifyakutiinya abantu ne finjelengwe mu mulu." 
Luke21:12 “Ilyo ifi fyonse fishilacitika, bakalamwikata no kulamucusha. Bakalamutwala ku masinagoga kukumulubulwisha no kumuposa mu fifungo. Bakalamutwala kuli bashamfumu na ku balashi pa mulandu wa ine." 
Luke21:13 Iyi eikaba e nshita iyakulanga ukuti muli bakambone bandi. 
Luke21:14 Mushininkishe mu mitima yenu ukuti, tamuli nakusakamana ifyakulanda pakuipokololako." 
Luke21:15 Pantu nine ne mwine nkalamupeela amashiwi aya mano ayakuti abalwani benu bakafilwa ukwasukapo nangu ukuyansha. 
Luke21:16 Elyo na bafyashi benu bene, na bamunyinenwe, na bantu benu, na bacibusa benu bakalamutwala ku cilye camilandu. Elyo bamo pali imwe bakabepaya." 
Luke21:17 Abantu bonse bakamupata pa mulandu wa ine. 
Luke21:18 Lelo tapakalobe nelyofye mushishi umo uwa ku mitwe yenu. 
Luke21:19 Mukushipikisha kwenu emo mukamwena umweo wacine cine. 
Luke21:20 “Kanshi ilyo mukamona ifita fyashinguluka Yerusalemu, ninshi mukeshibe ukuti ukonaulwa kwa musumba kwapalama." 
Luke21:21 Elyo abakaba mu Yudeya bakafulumukile ku mpili. Elyo abakaba mukati ka musumba bakafumemo. Na bakaba mu mabala, bekabwelela mu musumba." 
Luke21:22 Pantu ishi nshiku shikaba ni nshiku shakukanda, ishakufikilisha fyonse ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo." 
Luke21:23 We shamo we ku banakashi abakaba pabukulu na bakalaonsha abana muli shilya nshiku! Pantu ubucushi ubukalamba bukesa pa calo na bantu bakakandwa nganshi. 
Luke21:24 Bamo bakabepaya ku lupanga, elyo bambi bakabasenda bunkole mu fyalo. Abenafyalo bakonaula Yerusalemu nakalya nakalya, mpaka inshita ya Benafyalo ikapite." 
Luke21:25 “Pa kasuba na pa mweshi na pa ntanda pakamoneka ifinjelengwe. Elyo imishobo ya pano calo nayo ikekatwa no mwenso ku mulandu wa kululuma kwa bemba no kusunkana kwa matamba. 
Luke21:26 Abantu bakafwa umutombo ku mwenso pakumona ifyalacitika pano calo. Pantu amaka ya ku mulu yakatenkana. 
Luke21:27 Elyo bakamona Umwana wa muntu aleisa mwikumbi na maka no bucindami nganshi. 
Luke21:28 Kanshi ilyo ifi fintu fikatampa ukulacitika, mukeminine, mukenune imitwe yenu, pantu ukulubuka kwenu ninshi kwapalama.”" 
Luke21:29 Kabili Yesu abomina ipinda ati, “Ku mukunyu na ku mitifye yonse imbi eko mulemwena." 
Luke21:30 Itila nga yapuka ululembelya, ninshi mwaishiba ukuti amainsa yali mupepi." 
Luke21:31 Eifyo fine na imwe, nga mwamona ifi fintu fyalacitika, ninshi mukeshibe ukuti Ubufumu bwakwa Lesa buli mupepi." 
Luke21:32 “Ndemweba icine cine ukuti, ino nkulo tayakapite, ninshi fyonse fyalicitika." 
Luke21:33 Umulu ne calo fikonaika, lelo amashiwi yandi yena tayakonaike iyoo." 
Luke21:34 “Muleikala abaibukila, epali imitima yenu yalemenena ku mikalile yabuwelewele, na kuli bucakolwa, na ku masakamiko ya bumi buno. Elyo ubo bushiku bwamupumikisha, mwaikatwa nga ku citeyo." 
Luke21:35 Pantu abantu bonse abaikala pano calo bakaponenwa nobo bushiku. 
Luke21:36 Kanshi mulelola, mulepepa lyonse, epakuti mukamone amaka yakupusuka kuli ifi fyonse ifili nokwisa. Elyo mukamone na maka yakwiminina pa cinso ca Mwana wa muntu.”" 
Luke21:37 Cila bushiku Yesu alefunda mwi Tempele. Lelo cilya bwaila, alefumamo, aleya mukulala pa lupili ulo batila, ulwa Miolifa." 
Luke21:38 Elyo lucelocelo abantu bonse baleisa kukumumfwa mwi Tempele. 
Luke22:1 Inshikunkulu iyakulyamo Imikate Ishatutumuka, iyo baleti Ipasaka nangu inshikunkulu ya Cakucilila, yali mupepi." 
Luke22:2 Bashimapepo bacindami na bakafundisha bamafunde ico baletiina abantu, balafwailisha inshila bengepailamo Yesu." 
Luke22:3 Elyo Satana aingile muli Yuda uo batila wa ku Kelyoti, umo pa basole ikumi limo na babili." 
Luke22:4 Yuda aima aya kuli bashimapepo bacindami na ku bakalamba ba bakalinda we Tempele, pakuti omfwane nabo ifyo engabalubwila Yesu." 
Luke22:5 Awe nabo basansamuka, basuminishanya ukumupeela indalama." 
Luke22:6 Yuda nao asumina. Nomba alafwailishafye inshita ingalinga ukumuposelapo, ilyo kushili bantu." 
Luke22:7 Elyo ubushiku bwakulyamo Imikate Ishatutumuka bwafikile, e bushiku baleipayamo ilambo lye Pasaka." 
Luke22:8 Yesu elyo atuma Petelo na Yoani ati, “Kabiyeni muye tupekanishisha ukwakuti tulile Ipasaka.”" 
Luke22:9 Nabo bamwipusha abati, “Bushe ni kwi ulefwaya ukuti tuye kupekanishisha Ipasaka?”" 
Luke22:10 Yesu abeba ati, “Pakwingilafye mu musumba pene, muleya kumana no mwaume nasenda umutondo wa menshi. Muye mukonka mu ŋanda aleya ingila." 
Luke22:11 Muye eba umwine wa ŋanda amuti, ‘Kafundisha aleipusha ati, bushe umuputule uli kwi umwakuti njise ndile Ipasaka na basambi bandi?’" 
Luke22:12 Nao alaya mulanga umuputule wa pamulu, uukulu, uwateyanishiwa. Umo mwine emo mupekanishishe.”" 
Luke22:13 Awe baima baya sanga ne fintu fyonse ngomo Yesu abebele. Nabo epakupekanya ne Pasaka. 
Luke22:14 Ilyo inshita yafikile, elyo Yesu ayandeme na basole bakwe kukulya." 
Luke22:15 Elyo alabeba ati, “Ndefwaisha nganshi ukulya na imwe Ipasaka lino ilyo nshilati ncule." 
Luke22:16 Pantu ndemweba, nshakalyeko Ipasaka nakabili mpaka Ipasaka line line likafikilishiwe mu Bufumu bwakwa Lesa.”" 
Luke22:17 Elyo Yesu abuula ulukombo, atasha Lesa, asosa ati, “Buuleni ici, nweniko bonse." 
Luke22:18 Pantu ndemweba ukuti ukufuma nomba nshakanwe nakabili ifya ku fisabo fya myangashi, mpaka Ubufumu bwakwa Lesa bukese.”" 
Luke22:19 Kabili Yesu abuula umukate, atasha Lesa, aumokaula, apeela na basambi bakwe ati, “Uyu mubili wandi, uo nalapeela pa mulandu wa imwe. Mukalecita ifi pakunjibukisha.”" 
Luke22:20 Mu musango umo wine ilyo bapwa ukulya umulalilo, Yesu abuula ulukombo, asosa ati, “Ulu lukombo e cipangano cipya ica mulopa wandi uulesuuma pa mulandu wa imwe." 
Luke22:21 Elyo kabili uulemposa wine tuli nao pano pakulya. 
Luke22:22 Ukuba kwena Umwana wa muntu alaya kukufwa umo mwine Lesa apekanishisha. Lelo umuntu uwalaposa Umwana wa muntu ena alishama!” 
Luke22:23 Abasole epakutampa ukulaipushanya abati, “Bushe nani pali ifwe uwingafwaya ukucita ifyo?”" 
Luke22:24 Elyo abasole balabikana ifikansa abati, “Umukalamba pali ifwe nani?”" 
Luke22:25 Yesu alabeba ati, “Mu Benafyalo mwena imfumu shilomya ubufumu bwabo. Elyo na bakateeka bafwaya ukulaitwa bakafwa ba bantu." 
Luke22:26 Imwe tacili nakuba ifi iyoo. Umukalamba apo muli, abe kwati e mwaice. Elyo intungulushi nayo ibe kwati ewakutumika." 
Luke22:27 Nakabushe, nga nani wacindamapo? Bushe muntu uo baletumika ilyo ali pakulya, nangu muntu uulemutumika? Bushe teuyo baletumika ilyo ali pakulya? Nomba ine ndi pakati kenu nga uwakumutumika." 
Luke22:28 “Imwe nimwe tucululuka na imwe mu macushi yandi. 
Luke22:29 Nga filya Tata ampeela ubufumu, efyo na ine namupeela ubufumu." 
Luke22:30 Kanshi mwakulaandama na ine pakulya na pakunwa mu Bufumu bwandi. Kabili mwakulaikala pa fipuna fyabufumu, muleputula imilandu ya nko ikumi limo na shibili isha bena Israeli." 
Luke22:31 “Simoni, Simoni ee! Ala Satana alefwaya ukumululusha nga filya bolulusha iŋanu." 
Luke22:32 Nomba iwe Simoni ine ninkupepelako pakuti icisumino cobe cinenuka. Epakuti ilyo ukabwelela kuli ine, na iwe ukalekoselesha bamunonko.”" 
Luke22:33 Petelo aeba Yesu ati, “We Mfumu, ala ine na ku cifungo kwine kuti twayafye nobe, na kukufwafye kwine.”" 
Luke22:34 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Petelo, ine ndekweba, lelo line mukolwe talalila, ninshi iwe naunkaana imiku itatu ukuti walinjishiba.”" 
Luke22:35 Kabili Yesu abepusha ati, “Lilya namutumine ukwabula ukusenda icikwama, nangu icola, nangu indyato, bushe mwalibulilwepo icintu cimo?” Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Awe iyoo.”" 
Luke22:36 Yesu abeba ati, “Nomba lino lyena, uwakwata icikwama acisende pamo ne cola. Uushakwata lupanga, ashitishe insalu shakwe, ashitemo ulupanga." 
Luke22:37 Pantu icalembwa pali ine cili nokufikila ukuti, ‘Apendelwe pa bampulamafunde.’ Ifyalembwa pali ine fyalafikilishiwa.”" 
Luke22:38 Abasole epakweba Yesu abati, “We Mfumu, impanga ishi shibili.” Yesu abasuka ati, “Cisuma.”" 
Luke22:39 Elyo Yesu afuminemo, aile na ku lupili lwa Miolifa, ngefyo alecita lyonse. Abasambi nabo bakonka." 
Luke22:40 Cilya bafikako, Yesu alabeba ati, “Akupepeni, epakukanawila mu ntunko.”" 
Luke22:41 Elyo Yesu atalukako ku basambi, aya akatalamukila, afukama, alapepa ati," 
Luke22:42 “Tata, nga ulefwaya mpokololako kuli ubu bucushi. Lelo ifyo ine ndefwaya tefyo, kano ifyo iwe ulefwaya.”" 
Luke22:43 [Elyo malaika afuma ku mulu amumonekela, alamukoselesha." 
Luke22:44 Ilyo ubucushi bwamutitikisha nganshi, Yesu elyo aikatisha ukupepa. Amabe yakwe ayali nga mamata ya mulopa, yalatonena panshi.]." 
Luke22:45 Elyo Yesu aima apo alepepa, abwelela ku basambi. Asanga bali mu tulo ku mulandu wa bulanda." 
Luke22:46 Elyo abeba ati, “Bushe muli mu tulo? Buukeni, mulepepa, epakukanawila mu ntunko.”" 
Luke22:47 Ilyo Yesu acili alelanda, kwaishile ibumba lya bantu. Yuda umo pa basole ikumi limo na babili, ninshi alebatungulula. Afika apali Yesu, amutomona pakumuposha." 
Luke22:48 Yesu amweba ati, “Yuda, kanshi ni mukutomona emo waposela Umwana wa muntu?”" 
Luke22:49 Ilyo abasambi bakwa Yesu bamona icalacitika, bamwipusha abati, “We Mfumu, bushe tubakome ku mpanga shesu?”" 
Luke22:50 Elyo umo akoma umusha wakwa Shimapepo mukalamba, amusempako ukutwi kwa ku kulyo." 
Luke22:51 Yesu wena asosa ati, “Lekeni ifyo!” Elyo aikata ukutwi kwa muntu, amuposha." 
Luke22:52 Elyo Yesu alaeba bashimapepo bacindami na bakalamba ba bakalinda we Tempele, na bakalamba abaishile kukumwikata ati, “Bushe ine ndi cipondo pakuti mwise ne mpanga ne nkonto?" 
Luke22:53 Inshiku shonse naleba na imwe mwi Tempele tamwanjikete nakalya. Nomba iyi ni nshita yenu, iya maka ya mfifi.”" 
Luke22:54 Ilyo baikata Yesu, bamusenda, bamuleta mu ŋanda mwa Shimapepo mukalamba. Petelo wena alekonka lutonuma." 
Luke22:55 Elyo bakosha umulilo pakati ka lubansa, epo baikala bonse balaonta. Petelo nao epo aisa ikala." 
Luke22:56 Ico Petelo ekele mu cengelo ca mulilo, umukashana umo umubomfi amumona, amulolekesha ati, “Uyu muntu nao baciba na Yesu.”" 
Luke22:57 Petelo ena akaana ati, “We mayo we, ine uyo muntu nshimwishibe!”" 
Luke22:58 Cilya papita akashita, umbi nao amumona, alamweba ati, “Na iwe uli munabo.” Petelo ena akaana ati, “We muntu we, ine teine.”" 
Luke22:59 Elyo papita cikanga insa imo, umbi nao alamwebekesha ati, “Cine cine uyu muntu nao baciba na Yesu, pantu mwina Galile.”" 
Luke22:60 Petelo amwasuka ati, “We muntu we, ine nshishibe ifyo ulelanda!” Awe pa nshita ine iyo Petelo alelanda, na mukolwe alila no kulila." 
Luke22:61 Awe Mfumu ilyo yapilibuka, yalolekesha na Petelo. Petelo elyo aibukisha ifyo Imfumu yacimweba aiti, “Lelo line ilyo mukolwe talalila, ninshi iwe naunkaana imiku itatu.”" 
Luke22:62 Elyo afumina panse alila nganshi. 
Luke22:63 Elyo abantu abalelinda Yesu, batampile ukulamuseka no kulamuma." 
Luke22:64 Elyo bamufimba pa menso, balamwipusha abati, “Sesema, nani akuma?”" 
Luke22:65 Elyo balalanda na fimbi ifyakumusaalula. 
Luke22:66 Ilyo bwacele, abakalamba ba bantu na bashimapepo bacindami na bakafundisha bamafunde batekele icilye cabo, baletelemo na Yesu." 
Luke22:67 Elyo balamweba abati, “Twebe, nga niwe Kristu!” Yesu nao abasuka ati, “Nga namweba, tamwasumine." 
Luke22:68 Elyo nga namwipusha, tamwanjasuke." 
Luke22:69 Lelo ukufuma pali nomba Umwana wa muntu akulaikala lwa ku kulyo kwakwa Lesa Umwine wa maka yonse.” 
Luke22:70 Elyo bashicilye bonse baipusha abati, “Bushe kanshi iwe, niwe Mwana wakwa Lesa?” Yesu abasuka ati, “Ee, nifyo fine mwasosa.”" 
Luke22:71 Elyo balasosa abati, “Bushe ico tulefwaila na bakambone na bambi cinshi? Twayumfwila fwe bene ifyo alanda!”" 
Luke23:1 Elyo bashicilye bonse baimine, batwele Yesu kuli Pilato." 
Luke23:2 Elyo batampa ukulanda ifintu ifyakumupeelelapo umulandu abati, “Twasangile uyu muntu aletunka abantu ba mushobo wesu ukuti bemine ubuteko. Alalesha abantu ukusonka umusonko kuli Kesalo. Kabili alaita no kuita ati, ‘Nine Kristu Imfumu.’ ”" 
Luke23:3 Pilato aipusha Yesu ati, “Bushe iwe niwe Mfumu ya Bayuda?” Yesu amwasuka ati, “Nausosa.”" 
Luke23:4 Pilato elyo alaeba bashimapepo bacindami ne bumba lya bantu ati, “Ine nshisangile umulandu uyu muntu akwete.”" 
Luke23:5 Nomba bena babikapofye ukusosa abati, “Uyu muntu aleleta icimfulunganya mu bantu mu Yudeya monse ku mifundile yakwe. Atampila ku Galile, nomba nasuka nafika na kuno.”" 
Luke23:6 Ilyo Pilato aumfwa ifi, aipusha ati, “Bushe uyu muntu mwina Galile?”" 
Luke23:7 Pilato cilya aumfwa ukuti Yesu wa mu calo cakwa Herodi, amutuma kuli Herodi. Pantu Herodi pa nshita iyo, nao ali mu Yerusalemu." 
Luke23:8 Ilyo Herodi amona Yesu asansamuka nganshi. Ico ni kale atampile ukufwaya ukumona Yesu. Pantu alyumfwile ifintu ifingi pali Yesu. Kanshi alesubila ukumona uko Yesu alecita icishibilo cacipeshamano. 
Luke23:9 Awe alaipusha Yesu ifingi, lelo Yesu tewakwasukapo nelyo cimo." 
Luke23:10 Bashimapepo bacindami na bakafundisha bamafunde bena bemininefye pakumwebelela ifyakumupeelelapo umulandu. 
Luke23:11 Elyo Herodi pamo ne fita fyakwe balaseka Yesu no kumucitila ifyamusaalula. Elyo bamufwika umwingila uwayemba nganshi, bamubweseshamo na kuli Pilato." 
Luke23:12 Awe ubu bwine bushiku Pilato na Herodi bayaluka baba ifibusa. Pantu kale tabaleumfwana, balipatene." 
Luke23:13 Pilato epakulonganya bashimapepo bacindami ne ntungulushi pamo na bantu bene. 
Luke23:14 Elyo alabeba ati, “Mundetele uyu muntu amuti, aletunka abantu ukuti bemine ubuteko. Ine nimulubulwisha pa menso yenu, nshisangile ukuti alicitapo umulandu pali iyo milandu mulemwebelela." 
Luke23:15 Elyo na Herodi wine tamusangile na mulandu ngefyo amubwesesha kuli ifwe. Kanshi uyu muntu tacita mulandu nelyo umo uwakumwipailapo. 
Luke23:16 Kanshi nalamumafye ifikoti, elyo no kumuleka aleya.”" 
Luke23:17 [Pa nshikunkulu ye Pasaka, Pilato alebakakwilapo umufungwa umo.]" 
Luke23:18 Awe bonse bapundila capamo abati, “Ipaya uyu muntu! Tukakwile Balaba!”" 
Luke23:19 Uyu Balaba bamuposele mu cifungo pa mulandu wakusangwa mu fimfulunganya fyakulwisha ubuteko mu musumba na palwa kwipaya umuntu. 
Luke23:20 Pilato ico alefwaya ukukakula Yesu, alanda kwibumba nakabili." 
Luke23:21 Nomba bena balapundafye abati, “Mutanikeni! Mutanikenifye!”" 
Luke23:22 Pilato abepusha umuku wabutatu ati, “Nga kanshi cinshi ico abifya? Ine nshisangile mulandu acita uwakumwipailapo. Kanshi nalamumafye ifikoti muleke aleya.”" 
Luke23:23 Lelo bena babikapofye ukulapundisha abati, “Tulefwayafye Yesu atanikwe!” Awe no kupunda kwabo kwasuka kwanasha Pilato." 
Luke23:24 Pilato epakupingula ati, ico balefwaya nacicitike." 
Luke23:25 Awe abakakwila umuntu balefwaya, uo baposele mu cifungo pa mulandu wa cimfulunganya cakulwisha ubuteko na pakwipaya umuntu. Yesu ena Pilato abalubwila ukuti bamucite ifyo balefwaya." 
Luke23:26 Ilyo balesenda Yesu, baikete umuntu umo uwalefuma mu mpanga, ishina lyakwe ni Simoni umwina Kurene. Bamutwika umusalaba, pakuti asendele lwa kunuma yakwa Yesu." 
Luke23:27 Ibumba ilikalamba ninshi lilemukonka, na banakashi bamo balemulilila, baleloosha." 
Luke23:28 Lelo Yesu ena abapilibukila alabeba ati, “Imwe mwe banakashi ba mu Yerusalemu mwilandilila, lelo muleililila mwe bene, mulelilila na bana benu." 
Luke23:29 Pantu kukesa inshiku ilyo bakalasosa abati, ‘Shalishuka iŋumba, yalishuka amafumo ayashatala ayapaapa mwana, na mabele ayashatala ayonsha!’" 
Luke23:30 Elyo bakalaeba impili abati, ‘Twilikisheni!’ no tupili bakalatulilila abati, ‘Tufiseniko!’" 
Luke23:31 Nga kanshi apo bacita ifi ku muti uubishi nga ku wauma kwena cikaba shani?” 
Luke23:32 Ilyo baleya, basenda ne fipondo fibili ifyakuya ipaya pamo na Yesu." 
Luke23:33 Bati bafike pa ncende iyo beta, “Pa cipanga,” awe epo batanikila Yesu ne fipondo, cimo ku kulyo, cimbi naco ku kuso." 
Luke23:34 Elyo Yesu asosa ati, “Tata babeleleko uluse, pantu tabeshibe ifyo balecita.” Pakwakana ifyakufwala fyakwe, pena balapendula." 
Luke23:35 Abantu bena ninshi nabeminina baletamba. Lelo intungulushi shena shalamuseka, shalasosa ashiti, “Alepususha bambi. Kanshi naipusushe umwine, nga ni Kristu wakwa Lesa, Umusalwa wakwe!”" 
Luke23:36 Abashilika nabo bene balamuseka. Elyo bapalama, bamupeela umwangashi uwakantuka." 
Luke23:37 Balasosa abati, “Nga uli mfumu ya Bayuda ipusushe we mwine.”" 
Luke23:38 Pa mulu wa musalaba wakwe palembelwe ukuti, “Uyu e Mfumu ya Bayuda.”" 
Luke23:39 Elyo icipondo cimo pa fyatanikwe calamusaalula aciti, “Bushe iwe tewe Kristu? Kanshi ipusushe, na ifwe bene utupusushe!”" 
Luke23:40 Nomba icipondo cibiye camukalipila. Calamweba aciti, “Bushe iwe tautiina Lesa, mona batupingwilile ukukandwa umusango umo wine." 
Luke23:41 Nomba ifwe nacilinga ukukandwa. Pantu ifwe tulekandilwa pa fintu twacita. Nomba uyu muntu talufyanyapo icibi nelyo cimo.” 
Luke23:42 Elyo aeba Yesu ati, “Ukanjibukishe ilyo ukalateeka mu bufumu bobe!”" 
Luke23:43 Yesu aeba icipondo ati, “Ndekweba mu cine cine, lelo line tuleba nobe mu Cifulo Cansansa.”" 
Luke23:44 Cilya akasuba kaile kalefika pakati ka mutwe pa nshita ya 12:00, akasuba kalishimine! Imfifi yakupile icalo conse, ukufikafye na lilya kasendama pa nshita ya 15:00." 
Luke23:45 Awe icisalu balecinga mwi Tempele calepuka pakati. 
Luke23:46 Elyo Yesu apunda ne shiwi ilikalamba ati, “Tata, nalubwila umweo wandi mu minwe yobe!” Ati asose ifi, awe aleka no mweo." 
Luke23:47 Umukalamba wa fita umwanda umo, cilya amona icacitika, alalumba Lesa, asosa nokuti, “Cine cine uyu muntu wakaele.”" 
Luke23:48 Awe na mabumba ya bantu ayalongene kukutamba, ilyo yamona icacitika, yalabwelelamo kumwabo no bulanda, yaleyuma pa fifuba." 
Luke23:49 Lelo bacibusa bakwe bonse, na banakashi abalemukonka ukufuma ku Galile, bena ninshi beminine akatalamukila, balemonako ifi fyonse." 
Luke23:50 Elyo paishile umuntu umo umwina Alimateya, umusumba wa mu Yudeya, ne shina lyakwe ni Yosefu." 
Luke23:51 Ali shicilye, umuntu umusuma kabili umololoke, nao alelolela Ubufumu bwakwa Lesa. Wena tasuminishe ku mapange na kufyo abanankwe bacitile." 
Luke23:52 Kanshi Yosefu epakuya kuli Pilato, aya lomba icitumbi cakwa Yesu." 
Luke23:53 Ati asamune icitumbi, acipomba mu nsalu. Elyo abika icitumbi cakwa Yesu mu nindi iyo afukwile mu cilibwe, umo bashatalile ababika muntu." 
Luke23:54 Cali bushiku bwakupekanya, ninshi ubushiku bwe Sabata bulifye mukutendeka." 
Luke23:55 Abanakashi nabo abaishile na Yesu ukufuma ku Galile, bakonka Yosefu. Bamona inindi nefyo Yosefu alalika icitumbi cakwa Yesu." 
Luke23:56 Awe babwelulukako, balapekanya amafuta ya cena cisuma. Pakukonka Amafunde yakwa Mose, nabo pa bushiku bwe Sabata balatuusha." 
Luke24:1 Pa bushiku bwakutampa umulungu, ku macacafye, abanakashi babuulile amafuta ya cena cisuma bapekenye, baya na ku nindi." 
Luke24:2 Basanga nabakunkulushapo icilibwe ukufuma pa nindi. 
Luke24:3 Ilyo baingilamo, basanga icitumbi ca Mfumu Yesu tamuli." 
Luke24:4 Awe cabapesha amano. Elyo apopene kwamoneka abaume babili bafwele insalu ishabengeshima, baiminina apo bali." 
Luke24:5 Awe abanakashi umwenso wabekata, bainamina panshi. Elyo abaume babeba abati, “Cinshi mulefwaila umumi mu bafwa?" 
Luke24:6 Yesu muno talimo, nabuuka. Mwibukishe ifyo amwebele ilyo ali na imwe ku Galile." 
Luke24:7 Amwebele ati, ‘Umwana wa muntu ali nokuposwa mu minwe ya bantu ababi, bakamutanika, elyo mu bushiku bwalenga shitatu, akabuuka.’ ”" 
Luke24:8 Awe abanakashi epakwibukisha amashiwi Yesu abebele. 
Luke24:9 Cilya babweluluka ku nindi, awe baisa shimika ifi fyonse ku basole ikumi limo na umo, elyo na kuli bambi bonse." 
Luke24:10 Na banakashi abashimike ifi ku basole, ni Maria Mandalena, Yoana, Maria nyina kwa Yakobo, elyo na banakashi bambi." 
Luke24:11 Nomba abasole ilyo baumfwile ifi, bena baleti fyakusabailafye. Bakaana no kusumina ifyo abanakashi babebele." 
Luke24:12 Petelo wena aima abutukila na ku nindi. Ainamina mu nindi alolesha, awe amonafye insalu bapombelemo icitumbi. Awe abwelelamo ku mushi, camupesha amano pa ficitike." 
Luke24:13 Pali ubu bwine bushiku, abasambi babili abakwa Yesu bali mukuya ku mushi umo, uo baleti Emausi. Paba cikanga imilundu cine lubali ukufuma ku Yerusalemu." 
Luke24:14 Mu nshila balelanda pali fyonse ifyacitike. 
Luke24:15 Kanshi ilyo balelanshanya, no kwipushanya pali ifi fyonse, Yesu umwine nao abapalama, balaya nankwe." 
Luke24:16 Nomba amano yabo yalikupilwe, tabamwishibe nakalya." 
Luke24:17 Yesu abepusha ati, “Bushe lyashi nshi mulelandapo ili muleenda?” Awe baiminina, na pa menso yabo palifye bulanda bulanda." 
Luke24:18 Elyo umo ishina lyakwe ni Kilopasi amwasuka ati, “Ukuba niwe mwenifye weka mu Yerusalemu uushishibe ifintu ifyacitika muli ishi nshiku?”" 
Luke24:19 Yesu aipusha ati, “Nga fintu nshi?” Bamwasuka abati, “Ni pali Yesu umwina Nasaleti. Ku fintu alelanda nefyo alecita, alilanga pali Lesa na ku bantu bonse ukuti ni Kasesema uwamaka." 
Luke24:20 Lelo bashimapepo bacindami, ne ntungulushi shesu, balimuposa kuli Pilato pakuti amupingwile ukufwa, asuka amutanika." 
Luke24:21 Ifwe twaletetekela ukuti ewali nokulubula Israeli! Nomba teico ceka, lelo e bushiku bwalenga shitatu apo ifi fintu fyacitikila." 
Luke24:22 Kwena abanakashi bamo aba mwibumba lyesu bacisa tucilimusha, ilyo bacicelela ku nindi." 
Luke24:23 Nomba tabacisanga citumbi cakwe. Elyo babwela baisa tweba abati, bamalaika nababamonekela nababeba ukuti Yesu ali umumi." 
Luke24:24 Elyo abanensu bamo nabo baciya ku nindi. Bayasanga fyonse ngomo abanakashi bacisosela! Nomba Yesu umwine wena tabacimumona.” 
Luke24:25 Elyo Yesu abeba ati, “Mwe mpelwamano mwe, mwafina imitima pakusumina fyonse ifyo bakasesema basosa!" 
Luke24:26 Bushe teifyo fine cali nokuba, ukuti Kristu ali nokucula, epakuti amone ukwingila mu bucindami bwakwe?”" 
Luke24:27 Elyo Yesu alabalondolwela fyonse ifyalembwa pali ena mu Malembo Yamushilo. Atampila kufyo Mose alemba, apituluka na muli bakasesema bonse." 
Luke24:28 Cilya bafika mupepi na ku mushi balungeme, Yesu ena aba nga uwalapitilila." 
Luke24:29 Elyo balamupapata abati, “Awe ikalafye kuno na ifwe, pantu bwalaila, na kasuba kaba kukuwa.” Awe Yesu aingila, aikala nabo." 
Luke24:30 Cilya bali pakulya, Yesu abuula umukate, aupaala, aumokaula, elyo abapeela." 
Luke24:31 Awe amano yabo yakupuluka, baishiba Yesu. Lelo Yesu ena aongoloka, bafilwa no kumumona." 
Luke24:32 Elyo balaebana abati, “Bushe imitima yesu tayacilacilimukila mu nda shesu, ilyo acilatulansha mu nshila, aletulondolwela na Malembo Yamushilo?”" 
Luke24:33 Awe apopene baima babwelelamo ku Yerusalemu. Basanga abasole ikumi limo na umo na basambi bambi nabalongana pamo. 
Luke24:34 Abalongene balabeba abati, “Cine cine, Imfumu naishukuka ku bafwa, naimonekela na kuli Simoni!”" 
Luke24:35 Nabo abafumine ku Emausi balabashimikila ifyacimoneka mu nshila, nefyo bacishiba Yesu ilyo amokaula umukate." 
Luke24:36 Ilyo bacili balelanda ifi, Yesu umwine aishile iminina apo bali. Abebele ati, “Umutende ube na imwe!”" 
Luke24:37 Abasambi umwenso wabekata, batiina nganshi. Bena balatontonkanya ukuti, “Cipuku tulemona.”" 
Luke24:38 Yesu abeba ati, “Ni shani imitima yafuma, mwalatwishika no kutwishika?" 
Luke24:39 Moneni ndupi na makasa yandi, ala nine wine. Njikatenimo, ndolesheni, ala icipuku tacakwata minofu na mafupa ngefi mulemona ine nkwete.”" 
Luke24:40 Cilya alanda ifi, elyo alabalanga indupi shakwe na makasa yakwe." 
Luke24:41 Abasambi ku mulandu wakusansamukisha, cabansha ukusumina, balasungukafye. Elyo Yesu abepusha ati, “Bushe namukwatapo icakulya?”" 
Luke24:42 Elyo bamupeela icipimfya ce sabi ilyaocewa. 
Luke24:43 Yesu abuula, alalya, ninshi nabo balemonako." 
Luke24:44 Yesu elyo alabeba ati, “Ilyo nali na imwe, nalimwebele ukuti, fyonse ifyalembwa pali ine mu Mafunde yakwa Mose, muli bakasesema na mu malumbo, fili nokufikilishiwa.”" 
Luke24:45 Elyo alenga ukuti beluke mu mano yabo bomfwe ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo. 
Luke24:46 Alabeba ati, “Kanshi efyo calembwa ukuti, Kristu ali nokucula, elyo mu bushiku bwalenga shitatu, akabuuka ku bafwa." 
Luke24:47 Kabili ukuti bali nokutampila mu Yerusalemu, ukuya balebila ku bantu ba mishobo yonse ifyo Kristu alefunda ukuti, bali nokulapila no kupilibuka pakubelelwa uluse ku fyabubifi fyabo." 
Luke24:48 Imwe muli bakambone pali ifi fintu fyonse. 
Luke24:49 Kabili nkamutumina neco Tata alaya. Kanshi imwe mushale mu musumba, mpaka ilyo mukapoka amaka ukufuma ku mulu.”" 
Luke24:50 Kabili Yesu abafumishe mu musumba abasendele ku Betani. Elyo aimishe amaboko abapaala. 
Luke24:51 Ilyo line alebapaala, awe abasha, asendwa na ku mulu." 
Luke24:52 Awe nabo bamupakata. Elyo baima babwelela ku Yerusalemu ne nsansa ishingi. 
Luke24:53 Inshiku shonse baleikala mwi Tempele, balelumbanya Lesa." 
John1:1 Ukufumafye ku citendekelo, Lishiwi eko ali. Lishiwi ali pamo na Lesa. Kabili Lishiwi ali ni Lesa." 
John1:2 Lishiwi ali pamo na Lesa ukufumafye ku citendekelo. 
John1:3 Ni kuli Lishiwi Lesa abumbile ifintu fyonse. Tapaba nelyo cimo ico Lesa abumba ukwabula Lishiwi. 
John1:4 Muli Lishiwi mwaba umweo, noyu mweo waba ulubuuto ku bantu." 
John1:5 Ulubuuto lusanika mu mfifi, pantu imfifi yalifilwa ukulushimya." 
John1:6 Lesa atumine umuntu, ishina lyakwe ni Yoani." 
John1:7 Yoani epakwisa nga kambone, pakuti apeele bukambone pa lubuuto. Epakuti bonse abalemumfwa basumine." 
John1:8 Yoani wena tali lubuuto. Lelo aishile pakupeela bukambone ku lubuuto. 
John1:9 Lishiwi ewali e lubuuto lwacine cine. Ewaisa pano isonde kukusanikila umuntu onse. 
John1:10 Lishiwi ali pano isonde. Ni muli Lishiwi Lesa abumbile isonde. Nomba abantu ba pano sonde tabamwishibe. 
John1:11 Lishiwi aishile mu calo cakwe, nomba abantu bakwe tabamupokelele." 
John1:12 Lelo bonse abamupokelela, bamusumina no kumusumina, ena abapeela amaka yakuba abana bakwa Lesa." 
John1:13 Baba abana bakwa Lesa te mu musango wabumuntu, nangu ukufwaya kwa bantu, nangu ukufwaya kwa mwaume, awe iyoo, ni Lesa fye umwine ku maka yakwe." 
John1:14 Awe Lishiwi aishile aluka umuntu. Aisa ikala na ifwe. Twalimona ubucindami bwakwe. Ubucindami bwa Mwana uwabafye umo mpo, ubo apoka ukufuma kuli Wishi. Alikwatisha icikuuku ne cishinka." 
John1:15 Yoani alimwiminine bukambone ilyo alebila ati, “Euyu naleeba nati, uukankonka panuma, alicila ine. Pantu ine nshilabako ninshi wena eko aba!”" 
John1:16 Nico wacikuuku nganshi eco na ifwe bonse tushukilako amapaalo na mapaalo. 
John1:17 Mose ewaletele amafunde, lelo icikuuku ne cishinka fyena ni Yesu Kristu ewaleta." 
John1:18 Takwaba nangu umo uwatala amona Lesa, kanofye Mwane umo mpo, Lesa wine uwikala mu ceni cakwa Wishi, ewaisa musokolola." 
John1:19 Ubu e bukambone bwakwa Yoani. Abayuda ba mu Yerusalemu batile ilyo batuma bashimapepo na bena Levi kuli Yoani, baisa kukumwipusha abati, “Bushe niwe ani?”" 
John1:20 Yoani tafishile, ayasukafye apabuuta tuutu ati, “Ine nshili Kristu.”" 
John1:21 Elyo bamwipusha abati, “Kanshi niwe ani? Bushe niwe Eliya?” Yoani ati, “Awe ine tene.” “Bushe niwe ulya kasesema?” Yoani abasuka ati, “Awe iyoo.”" 
John1:22 Kabili bamwipusha abati, “Kanshi niwe ani? Tuli nokuya eba abatutumine ifyo uleyasuka. Nga kanshi we mwine uletila niwe ani?”" 
John1:23 Yoani ayasuka ati, “Ngomo kasesema Esaya alandile, “‘Nine shiwi lya ulebilikisha mu matololo lileti, lungamikeni inshila umwakupita Imfumu.’”" 
John1:24 Nomba Abafalise nabo batumako inkombe. 
John1:25 Inkombe shaipusha Yoani ashiti, “Nga kanshi cinshi ico ubatishisha nga tauli Kristu nangu Eliya nangu ulya kasesema?”" 
John1:26 Yoani abasuka ati, “Ine mbatisha ku menshi. Nomba apo muli palipo umo uo mushishibe." 
John1:27 Akesa panuma yandi. Elyo ine nshilingile no kukakula inshinga sha ndyato shakwe.” 
John1:28 Ifi fyonse fyacitike mu Betani uko Yoani alebatisha, lubali lwa kwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani." 
John1:29 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, Yoani amwene Yesu aleisa uko ali, asosa ati, “Ala uyu, e Mwana wa mpaanga wakwa Lesa, uufumya ububifi bwa ba pano isonde." 
John1:30 Kanshi uyu eo nalelandapo, ilyo naleti, ‘Umuntu alaisa panuma yandi. Alicindama ukuncila. Pantu ine nshilati mbeko ninshi wena eko aba.’" 
John1:31 Na ine wine nshamwishibe. Lelo umulandu naishile kukubatisha na menshi, ni pakuti asokoloke ku bena Israeli.”" 
John1:32 Kabili Yoani alanda muli bukambone bwakwe ati, “Namwene Mupashi aleika ukufuma ku mulu kwati ni nkunda, aisa ikalilila pali Yesu." 
John1:33 Na ine nshamwishibe nakalya. Lelo uwantumine kukubatisha ku menshi, anjebele ati, ‘Uo ukamona Mupashi amwikila, aisa ikalilila pali ena, uyo eukalabatisha kuli Mupashi.’" 
John1:34 Ee, naliimwena no kushininkisha ukuti, uyu e Mwana wakwa Lesa.”" 
John1:35 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, Yoani kabili ali palya pene na basambi bakwe babili." 
John1:36 Cilya Yesu alepita, Yoani amumona, alasosa ati, “Moneni, Umwana wa mpaanga wakwa Lesa!”" 
John1:37 Abasambi aba babili bati bomfwe ifyo Yoani alanda, baya kuli Yesu balamukonka." 
John1:38 Yesu acebukila kunuma, amona balemukonka. Abepusha ati, “Cinshi mulefwaya?” Bamwasuka abati, “Rabi, (emukutila ‘Kafundisha,’) bushe ni kwi wikala?”" 
John1:39 Nao Yesu abasuka ati, “Iseni, mumone!” Awe nabo baya mona uko aleikala. Baikala nankwe ubo bushiku, cali mupepi na lilya akasuba kalasumbila kukuwa pa nshita ya 16:00:" 
John1:40 Pali aba babili abaumfwile ifyo Yoani alelanda, bakonka na Yesu, umo ni Andele munyina kwa Simoni Petelo." 
John1:41 Icakubalilapofye Andele acitile, kuya alefwaya Simoni munyina. Amweba ati, “Natusanga Mesia,” emukutila Kristu." 
John1:42 Elyo aleta Simoni kuli Yesu. Yesu amulolesha, asosa ati, “Niwe Simoni mwana Yoani. Nomba wakulaitwa Kefa, ekutila ‘Petelo.’ ”" 
John1:43 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, Yesu apangile ukuya ku Galile. Awe cilya asanga Filipo, amweba ati, “Nkonka.”" 
John1:44 Filipo ali umwina Betisaida umusumba umwaleikala Andele na Petelo. 
John1:45 Elyo Filipo aya sanga Natanaeli. Alamweba ati, “Natusanga uo Mose alembapo mu mafunde kabili eo na bakasesema balembapo. Ala ni Yesu wa ku Nasaleti, mwana Yosefu.”" 
John1:46 Natanaeli amweba ati, “Bushe ku Nasaleti nako kuti kwafuma icintu icisuma?” Filipo amwasuka ati, “Isa, so imwene.”" 
John1:47 Yesu cilya amona Natanaeli uko aleisa, alamulandapo ati, “Ala uyu e mwina Israeli wine wine uushaba na bufi.”" 
John1:48 Natanaeli epakwipusha Yesu ati, “Nga mwanjishiba shani?” Yesu amwasuka ati, “Nacikumona lilya wali wikele mwisamba lya mukunyu ninshi Filipo talati akwite.”" 
John1:49 Natanaeli amwasuka ati, “Kafundisha, uli Mwana wakwa Lesa, uli Mfumu ya bena Israeli!”" 
John1:50 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Bushe wasumina icofye nakweba ati, ‘Nacikumona mwisamba lya mukunyu?’ Ala ukamona ifintu ifyacila pali ici.”" 
John1:51 Elyo alundapo ati, “Ndemweba icine cine, mukamona umulu wacenama, na bamalaika bakwa Lesa balenina no kwika apali Umwana wa muntu!”" 
John2:1 Awe ilyo papitile inshiku shibili, mu bwashitatu kwali ubwinga mu Kana mu calo ca Galile. Nyina kwa Yesu nao eko ali." 
John2:2 Yesu na basambi bakwe nabo balibalalike ku bwinga. 
John2:3 Kanshi ilyo umwangashi wapwa, nyina kwa Yesu aisa mweba ati, “Wapwa umwangashi onse.”" 
John2:4 Nomba Yesu ayasuka ati, “Mayo, nga mulenjipushisha nshi? Inshita yandi tailafikila.”" 
John2:5 Nyina kwa Yesu ena aeba ababomfi ati, “Mucite fyonse ifyo alemweba.”" 
John2:6 Palipo imitondo ya mabwe mutanda iya menshi pakukonka ulutambi lwa Bayuda ulwakusamba pakuisangulula. Cila mutondo kuti mwaingila amatepe ya menshi yane nangu yasano. 
John2:7 Elyo Yesu aeba ababomfi ati, “Isusheni amenshi muli iyi mitondo.” Awe baisusha amenshi mu mitondo ukufikafye na pamulu." 
John2:8 Yesu abeba ati, “Tapulenimo, twalileni umukalamba wa bwinga.” Awe efyo bacita." 
John2:9 Awe umukalamba wa bwinga atapulamo amenshi ayalwike umwangashi. Wena ninshi teshibe uko umwangashi wafuma, lelo ababomfi abatapile amenshi bena ninshi nabeshiba. Kanshi epakwita shibwinga alamweba ati," 
John2:10 “Umuntu onse abalilapo ukupeela umwangashi uuwamishepo. Ilyo abantu betilwe banwa nganshi, elyo aleta umwangashi uushiwamishe. Nomba iwe nausunga umwangashi uuwamishe ukufika na nomba!”" 
John2:11 Ici e cishibilo Yesu abalilepo ukucita. Acicitile mu Kana umushi wa mu Galile. Awe asokolola ubucindami bwakwe, na basambi bakwe epakumusumina." 
John2:12 Panuma ya ifi, Yesu na nyina na bamunyina na basambi bakwe batentemukila ku Kapenamu. Nomba baya ikalako inshikufye shinono." 
John2:13 Cilya Ipasaka inshikunkulu ya Bayuda iya Cakucilila yapalama, Yesu aninika ukuya ku Yerusalemu." 
John2:14 Mwi Tempele, asangamo abantu abaleshitisha iŋombe, impaanga ne nkunda, na bambi nabekala balekabushanya indalama." 
John2:15 Awe abuula imyando apangako icikoti. Elyo alatamfisha bonse panse ye Tempele, impaanga ne ŋombe shine. Alapenaula amatebulo ya balekabushanya indalama, ne ndalama shapasangana." 
John2:16 Abaleshitisha inkunda bena abeba ati, “Fifumyeni muno! Tamuli nakusangula iŋanda yakwa Tata icisankano!”" 
John2:17 Elyo abasambi baibukisha ifyalembwa ifyakuti, “Icitemwiko cakutemwisha isano lyobe, we Lesa cikanjipaya.”" 
John2:18 Abayuda bena bamwipusha abati, “Bushe cishibilo nshi wingacita icingatulanga ukuti, walikwata amaka yakucita ifi wacita?”" 
John2:19 Yesu abasuka ati, “Bongololeni ili Tempele, na ine nkalikuula mu nshiku shitatu.”" 
John2:20 Abayuda bamwasuka abati, “Bapwile imyaka amakumi yane na mutanda pakukuula ili Tempele. Elyo iwe niwe wingalikuula mu nshikufye shitatu?”" 
John2:21 Lelo Tempele Yesu alelandapo, mubili wakwe." 
John2:22 Kanshi ilyo aisa shukuka ku bafwa, abasambi bakwe epakwibukisha ifyo abashimikileko pali uyu mulandu. Awe basumina ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo, na mashiwi Yesu abebele." 
John2:23 Nomba mu nshikunkulu ye Pasaka, ilyo Yesu ali mu Yerusalemu, awe abantu abengi bamusumina, ico bamona ifishibilo alecita." 
John2:24 Nomba Yesu umwine tabacetekele iyoo, pantu alibeshibe bonse." 
John2:25 Kabili talekabila ukuti kube uwakumweba ifyo abantu baba, pantu umwine wine alishiba ifyaba mu mitima ya bantu." 
John3:1 Kwali umuntu umo Umufalise, kabili intungulushi mu Bayuda, ishina lyakwe ni Nikodemo." 
John3:2 Uyu muntu aisa ubushiku kuli Yesu, alamweba ati, “Kafundisha, ifwe twalishiba ukuti ni Lesa ewakutuma kukwisa tufunda. Pantu tapaba nangu umo uwingacita ifishibilo ifyo ulecita, kano Lesa ali nankwe.”" 
John3:3 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Ndekweba icine cine umuntu teti engile mu Bufumu bwakwa Lesa, kano afyalwa nakabili.”" 
John3:4 Nikodemo amwipusha ati, “Nga kanshi umuntu umukalamba kuti afyalwa shani nakabili? Bushe kuti aingila mwifumo lyakwa nyina, pakuti afyalwe nakabili?”" 
John3:5 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Ndekweba icine cine, tapaba nangu umo uwingengila mu Bufumu bwakwa Lesa kano afyalwa ku menshi na kuli Mupashi." 
John3:6 Icifyalwa ku mubili, mubili, ne cifyalwa kuli Mupashi, mupashi." 
John3:7 Kanshi wisunguka ico nakweba nati, bonse muli nokufyalwa nakabili." 
John3:8 Umwela upuupila uko utemenwe. Iwe ulomfwa uko umwela ulepuupa, lelo tawishiba uko ulefuma noko uleya. Ifi efyo ciba pakuti umuntu afyalwe nakabili kuli Mupashi.”" 
John3:9 Nikodemo epakwipusha ati, “Nge ca musango uyu kuti cacitika shani?”" 
John3:10 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Iwe uli kafundisha mu Israeli, bushe niwe ushingeshiba ifi fintu?" 
John3:11 Ndekweba mu cine cine, ifwe tulanda ifyo twaishiba, kabili tupeela bukambone pafyo twamona. Nomba imwe tamusumina bukambone bwesu." 
John3:12 Tamusumina ilyo ndemweba ifya pano calo, palibufi kuti mwasumina shani ilyo namweba pa fya ku mulu?" 
John3:13 Tapaba uwaya ku mulu, kanofye Umwana wa muntu uwaika ukufuma ku mulu." 
John3:14 “Kanshi nga filya Mose aimike insoka mu matololo, efyo no Mwana wa muntu ali nao nokwimikwa pa musalaba." 
John3:15 Pakuti onse uwamusumina akwate umweo wape. 
John3:16 Pantu Lesa alitemwisha aba pano isonde. Abapeela na Mwane uwabafye umo mpo. Pakuti onse uwamusumina, ekaloba, lelo akwate umweo wape." 
John3:17 Pantu Lesa tatuma Mwane pano isonde kukupeela aba pano isonde umulandu, lelo ni pakuti abapusushe bonse." 
John3:18 “Uusumina Mwane takapeelwe mulandu. Lelo uwakaana ukumusumina wena alipeelwa umulandu libela, pantu akaana ukusumina muli Mwana Lesa uwabafye umo mpo." 
John3:19 Kanshi ubupingushi bwaba nifi, ulubuuto nalwisa pano isonde, nomba abantu batemwapo imfifi ukucila ulubuuto, pantu ifintu bacita fyalibipa." 
John3:20 Onse uubifya alapata ulubuuto, tekuti ese ku lubuuto, pantu tafwaya ukuti ifintu acita ifyabipa fimoneke." 
John3:21 Lelo umuntu uutungululwa ne fyacishinka mu bumi bwakwe, wena alesa ku lubuuto, epakuti cimoneke kuli bonse ukuti imicitile yakwe ya bwina Lesa.”" 
John3:22 Kabili Yesu na basambi bakwe baile mu calo ca Yudeya. Baikalamo akashita kanono, balebatisha." 
John3:23 Yoani nao alebatisha ku Enoni mupepi na ku Salimu, ico ekwali amenshi ayengi. Abantu nabo eko balaisa kukubatishiwa." 
John3:24 Pali iyi inshita ninshi Yoani talati aposwe mu cifungo. 
John3:25 Abasambi bakwa Yoani bamo balabikana ifikansa no Muyuda umo palwa kusangululwa. 
John3:26 Elyo baya kuli Yoani balamweba abati, “Kafundisha, ulya muntu mwali nao kwishilya lya Yordani, uo wapeelelepo bukambone, nomba nao alebatisha. Elyo na bantu bonse eko baleya.”" 
John3:27 Yoani abasuka ati, “Umuntu teti akwate nelyo cimo kano Lesa amupeela." 
John3:28 Imwe bene nimwe bakambone bandi. Nasosele nati, ‘Ine nshili Kristu iyoo. Ine Lesa antumafye kukumusobela.’" 
John3:29 Umwine wakwa nabwinga ni shibwinga. Cibusa wakwa shibwinga, uwiminina alekutika, ena asansamukafye pakumfwa ishiwi lyakwa shibwinga. Kanshi ishi e nsansa shandi, kabili nomba nashipwililika." 
John3:30 Kanshi Kristu ali nokulalumbukilako elyo ine ndi nokulacepelako.” 
John3:31 Uyu uwafuma ku mulu, alicila pali bonse. Elyo onse uwa pano calo, mwina calo, kabili alandafye ifyacalo. Lelo uwafuma ku mulu alicila bonse." 
John3:32 Wena ni kambone pa fintu amona no kumfwa, nomba tapaba uusekelela bukambone bwakwe." 
John3:33 Umuntu onse uusekelela bukambone bwakwe, alashininkisha ukuti Lesa mufumacumi." 
John3:34 Uo Lesa atuma alanda amashiwi yakwa Lesa, pantu Lesa alimupeelesha nganshi Mupashi wakwe." 
John3:35 Wishi alitemwa Mwane, kabili alimupeela amaka pali fyonse." 
John3:36 Onse uwasumina Mwana Lesa alakwata umweo wape. Lelo onse uushasumina Mwana Lesa takamone umweo, pantu icipyu cakwa Lesa caba pali wena." 
John4:1 Abafalise baumfwile ukuti Yesu nacila Yoani ukukwata abasambi no kubatisha abengi. 
John4:2 Kwena Yesu umwine talebatisha, lelo basambi bakwe ebalebatisha." 
John4:3 Kanshi Yesu ati omfwe ifi, afuma mu Yudeya abwelela nakabili mu Galile." 
John4:4 Pakubwelelamo, ali nokupita mu Samaria." 
John4:5 Kanshi ilyo aleya, afika ku musumba umo uwa mu Samaria uwitwa Sika. Uyu musumba waba mupepi ne mpanga iyo Yakobo apeele mwane Yosefu." 
John4:6 Emwaba ne cishima cakwa Yakobo. Yesu, ico anaka ku lwendo, aikala mupepi ne cishima. Akasuba ninshi kalafika pakati ka mutwe, pa nshita ya 12:00." 
John4:7 Elyo umwanakashi umo umwina Samaria aisa kukutapa amenshi. Yesu amweba ati, “Mpeelako amenshi nwe.”" 
John4:8 Abasambi bakwe bena ninshi nabaya ku musumba kukushita ifyakulya. 
John4:9 Umwanakashi umwina Samaria amwasuka ati, “Iwe uli Muyuda na ine ndi mwina Samaria. Nga kanshi kuti wanomba shani amenshi yakunwa?” Pantu Abayuda tabasankana na bena Samaria." 
John4:10 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Ala awishiba ubupe bwakwa Lesa, no ulekulomba amenshi yakunwa, nga niwe umulombele, nao nga kuti akupeela amenshi yakupeela umweo.”" 
John4:11 Umwanakashi amwasuka ati, “Mukwai, tamukwete ne cakutapilako amenshi, elyo ne cishima naco cintu cashika. Nga kanshi mulefumya kwi amenshi yakupeela umweo?" 
John4:12 Icikolwe cesu Yakobo ewatupeela ici cishima. Umwine wine pamo na bamwane ne fitekwa fyakwe balenwa muli ici cishima. Bushe imwe muleti namucila pali Yakobo?” 
John4:13 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Uyo onse uunwa aya menshi akomfwa icilaka nakabili." 
John4:14 Lelo uyo onse uukanwa amenshi nkapeela, takomfwe cilaka nakabili. Pantu amenshi nkamupeela yakaluka mu nda yakwe akamfukumfuku ka menshi yakupeela umweo, yakamupeela no mweo wape.”" 
John4:15 Umwanakashi ati, “Mukwai, mpeeleniko ayo menshi! Epakuti nilaumfwa icilaka nakabili, nilaisa lyonse kukutapa amenshi.”" 
John4:16 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Kabiye kete umulume obe, wise nankwe kuno.”" 
John4:17 Umwanakashi amwasuka ati, “Nshakwata mulume.” Yesu aeba umwanakashi ati, “Ee, walungika pakusosa auti, ‘Nshakwata mulume.’" 
John4:18 Pantu waupwa ku baume basano, elyo noyu wine uli nao, tali mulume obe. Ico walanda cacishinka.”" 
John4:19 Umwanakashi ati, “Mukwai, namona ukuti muli kasesema." 
John4:20 Ifikolwe fyesu fyalepepa Lesa pali ulu lupili. Nomba imwe mwe Bayuda mutila, incende umo abantu bali nokupepela Lesa ni mu Yerusalemu.”" 
John4:21 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Mayo, ala nsumina, inshita ikesa ilyo mushakalepepela Tata pali ulu lupili nangu mu Yerusalemu." 
John4:22 Imwe mwe bena Samaria tamwaishiba ico mupepa. Nomba ifwe fwe Bayuda twalishiba uo tupepa, pantu ukupusuka kuli nokufuma ku Bayuda." 
John4:23 Kwena inshita ikesa, no kufika naifika, ilyo bakapepa bene bene bakalapepa Tata mu mupashi na mu cishinka. Aba e bakapepa Tata afwaya." 
John4:24 Lesa mupashi, na bamupepa bali nokumupepela mu mupashi na mu cishinka.”" 
John4:25 Umwanakashi aeba Yesu ati, “Nalishiba ukuti Mesia, uo batila Kristu ali nokwisa. Ilyo akesa, akesa tweba fyonse.”" 
John4:26 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Nine wine, uo mulelanda nankwe.”" 
John4:27 Awe apopene abasambi bakwa Yesu bafika. Bapapa pakumona ukuti Yesu alelanda no mwanakashi. Lelo tapali nangu umo uwamwipwishe ati, “Finshi ulefwaya?” nangu “Finshi ulelandila no mwanakashi?”" 
John4:28 Awe umwanakashi asha umutondo wakwe, abwelelamo ku musumba. Elyo alaeba abantu ati," 
John4:29 “Iseni mumone umuntu uwanjeba fyonse ifyo nacita. Bushe ninshi teo e Kristu?” 
John4:30 Awe abantu bonse bafuma mu musumba, balaya ukwali Yesu." 
John4:31 Ilyo ninshi abasambi bena babikilepofye ukweba Yesu abati, “Kafundisha, ala lyenipo icakulya!”" 
John4:32 Yesu abasuka ati, “Ala ine ndi ne cakulya ico imwe mushishibe.”" 
John4:33 Elyo abasambi balaipushanya abati, “Bushe nalimo kuliko umo uumuletele icakulya?”" 
John4:34 Yesu abeba ati, “Icakulya candi kucita ifyo uwantuma afwaya, no kupwishishisha umulimo wakwe." 
John4:35 “Bushe tamutila amuti, ‘Kwashala imyeshi ine, ninshi ulwakulobolola lwafika?’ Lelo ine namweba, lolesheni mumone mu mabala, ifisabo nafipya ifyakulobolola!" 
John4:36 No wakulobolola alepoka amalipilo yakwe, alelonganya ifisabo ifyakuleta mu mweo wape. Epakuti uubyala no ulobolola basansamukile pamo." 
John4:37 Kanshi insoselo yakuti, ‘Uubyala ni umbi, no ulobolola nao ni umbi’, yalolamo." 
John4:38 Pantu imwe namutuma kukulobolola mu mabala ayo imwe mushalimine. Bambi ebalimine, elyo imwe mulelobolola ifisabo fya milimo yabo.”" 
John4:39 Abena Samaria abengi aba muli uyu musumba basumina Yesu, ico uyu mwanakashi abebele ati, “Anjebele fyonse ifyo nacita.”" 
John4:40 Elyo abena Samaria baisa kuli Yesu balamupapata ukuti ekale nabo. Awe Yesu epakwikala nabo inshiku shibili. 
John4:41 Awe na bambi abengi basumina pa mulandu wa mashiwi Yesu alebalandila. 
John4:42 Balaeba no mwanakashi abati, “Nomba natusumina, te mulandu wa pali ifyo watwebele, awe natuyumfwila fwe bene. Kabili natushininkisha ukuti uyu e Mupusushi wa ba pano isonde.”" 
John4:43 Cilya papitile inshiku shibili, elyo Yesu afumineko aya ku Galile." 
John4:44 Yesu umwine asosele ati, “Kasesema tacindikwa ku ba mu calo cakwe.”" 
John4:45 Ilyo afika mu Galile, abena Galile bamupokelela bwino bwino. Pantu nabo baliile ku nshikunkulu ye Pasaka, Icakucilila, ku Yerusalemu. Kabili baliimwenene nefyo acitile ku nshikunkulu." 
John4:46 Kabili Yesu abwelela ku Kana wa mu Galile, uko asangwile amenshi umwangashi. Kwaliko na mushika wa mfumu, uwali no mwana umwaume umulwele ku Kapenamu." 
John4:47 Cilya aumfwa ukuti Yesu nafuma ku Yudeya naisa ku Galile, awe aya uko ali. Alamupapata ukuti aye posha mwane uwali mupepi ne mfwa." 
John4:48 Yesu amweba ati, “Kanshi nga tamumwene ifishibilo ne finjelengwe, ninshi teti musumine.”" 
John4:49 Mushika wa mfumu amweba ati, “Mukwai shi iseni, lintu umwana wandi talafwa.”" 
John4:50 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Kabiye, mwano tafwe.” Awe mushika asumina amashiwi yakwa Yesu, aya no kuya." 
John4:51 Kanshi ilyo aleya kumwakwe, abasha bakwe bamukonkela, balamweba abati, “Mwano napola.”" 
John4:52 Elyo abepusha inshita mwane atampile ukuba bwino. Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Impepo yamulekele mailo cilya akasuba kapilibuka pa nshita ya 13:00.”" 
John4:53 Elyo wishi ashininkisha ukuti ni pa nshita ine ilya Yesu amwebelepo ukuti, “Mwano tafwe.” Awe umwine wine asumina pamo na bonse aba mu ŋanda mumwakwe." 
John4:54 Ici e cishibilo icabubili ico Yesu acitile ilyo nakabili abwelele ku Galile ukufuma ku Yudeya. 
John5:1 Patile ilyo papita inshita, Yesu aninika ukuya ku Yerusalemu, ico kwali inshikunkulu ya Bayuda." 
John5:2 Mu Yerusalemu mupepi na ku Mpongolo ya Mpanga, kwali icishiba, mu Cihibulu citwa Betisata, icakwete inkungu shisano." 
John5:3 Muli ishi nkungu mwalelala abalwele abengi, impofu, ifilema ne fite. [3b Balelolela ukufundaulwa kwa menshi." 
John5:4 Pantu mu nshita mu nshita malaika wa Mfumu aleikila mu cishiba kukufundaula amenshi. Elyo na onse uwabalilapo ukwingila mu cishiba, alepola ku bulwelefye buli bonse.]" 
John5:5 Ku cishiba kwali umuntu uwalwele pa myaka amakumi yatatu na cine konse konse (38). 
John5:6 Cilya Yesu amona uyu muntu walwele, aishiba ukuti ni kale alwala, Yesu epakumwipusha ati, “Bushe ulefwaya ukupola?”" 
John5:7 Umulwele amwasuka ati, “Mukwai ine nshakwata wakungafwako ukwingila mu cishiba ilyo malaika afundaula amenshi. Ntila lyonse ilyo ndefwaya ukwingilamo, umbi ninshi naingilamo kale.”" 
John5:8 Yesu amweba ati, “Ima, buula umusengele obe, akuya.”" 
John5:9 Apopene no muntu apola, abuula umusengele wakwe alaya. Kanshi uyu muntu aposhiwe pa bushiku bwe Sabata." 
John5:10 Abayuda balaeba umuntu uwapolele abati, “Lelo bushiku bwe Sabata, calileshiwa ukusenda umusengele obe.”" 
John5:11 Nao abasuka ati, “Umuntu uumposeshe eunjebele ati, ‘Buula umusengele obe akuya.’ ”" 
John5:12 Bamwipusha abati, “Nga ni nani uyo muntu, ukwebele ati, ‘Buula umusengele obe akuya?’ ”" 
John5:13 Lelo umuntu uupolele teshibe uumuposeshe, pantu Yesu ninshi nafumapo alubile mwibumba ilyalipo." 
John5:14 Kabili panuma Yesu amusanga mwi Tempele. Alamweba ati, “Mona, nomba naupola kanshi uleke ukubifya, pantu limbi icabipishapo cikakuponena.”" 
John5:15 Umuntu epakufumapo, aya eba na Bayuda ati, “Ala ni Yesu eumposeshe.”" 
John5:16 Nico Yesu alecita ifintu fya musango uyo pa bushiku bwe Sabata, eco Abayuda batampile ukulamucusha." 
John5:17 Yesu abasuka ati, “Tata abombafye lyonse, kanshi na ine ndi nokulabomba.”" 
John5:18 Abayuda epakulafwaisha nganshi ukumwipaya, pali ico asosele ifi. Kanshi teicofye talesakamana ukusunga ubushiku bwe Sabata, lelo alelanda nokuti, “Lesa ni Tata.” Ici calelanga ukuti, aleilinganya na Lesa." 
John5:19 Yesu epakubasuka ati, “Ndemweba icine cine, Umwana kuti afilwa ukucita akantu, lelo acitafye ico amona Wishi alecita. Ico Wishi acita, eco na Mwane nao acitako." 
John5:20 Pantu Wishi alitemwa Mwane, alanga na Mwane ifyo acita. Kabili imwe mukalasunguka, akalanga na Mwane ukucita ificilile na pali ifi." 
John5:21 Pantu nga filya Wishi abusha abafwa no kubapeela umweo, efyo na Mwane apeela umweo kuli abo atemenwe." 
John5:22 Kabili Wishi tapingula muntu nelyo umo, lelo apeela Mwane amaka yonse ayakupingula." 
John5:23 Epakuti filya fine bacindika Wishi, efyo bonse balecindika Mwane. Kanshi onse uwakaana ukucindika Mwane ninshi akaana no kucindika Wishi uwamutuma." 
John5:24 “Ndemweba icine cine, onse uumfwa amashiwi yandi, asumina na mu wantuma, eukwata umweo wape. Uyu ena tapingulwa, pantu alifuma ku mfwa, alisa ku mweo." 
John5:25 Ndemweba icine cine, inshita ikesa, ala no kwisa naisa, ilyo abafwa bakomfwa ishiwi lya Mwana wakwa Lesa. Elyo na bakalyumfwa bakaba no mweo." 
John5:26 Kanshi nga filya fine Wishi aba e ntulo ya mweo, efyo alenga na Mwane ukuba intulo ya mweo." 
John5:27 Kabili alipeela na Mwane amaka yakupingula, pantu e Mwana wa muntu." 
John5:28 Kanshi imwe mwisunguka pali ifi. Ala inshita ikesa ilyo abafwa bakafuma mu nindi shabo pakumfwa ishiwi lyakwe. 
John5:29 Elyo abo abalecita ifisuma, bakashukuka no kuba abomi. Abalecita ifibi bena, bakashukuka nokukandwa." 
John5:30 “Ine ne mwine teti ncite kantu pa mutwe wandifye. Ine mpingwilafye umo naumfwila. Elyo ifyo mpingula fintu fyalungama. Pantu ine nshifwaya kucitafye ifyo ndefwaya, lelo kano ififwaya uwantuma." 
John5:31 Ine nga nalapeela bukambone pali ine ne mwine, ninshi bukambone bwandi bwafyefye." 
John5:32 Nomba eko ali umbi uwakupeela bukambone pali ine. Kabili nalishiba ukuti bukambone bwakwe pali ine bwacishinka. 
John5:33 Mwatumine inkombe kuli Yoani, nao amwebele ifyacishinka pali ine." 
John5:34 Kwena ine nshikabila bukambone bwa muntu, lelo nalanda ifi ni pakuti mukamone ukupusuka." 
John5:35 Yoani ali nge cisaniko icileyaka, icabeka, na imwe pali ako kashita mwalesekela mufyo alemweba." 
John5:36 Nomba bukambone bwandi bwena, bwacila apakalamba bukambone bwakwa Yoani. Pantu umulimo wine Tata ampeela ukubomba, uo ndebomba, eumpeela bukambone ukuti ni Tata ewantuma." 
John5:37 Elyo na Tata wine uwantuma, nao ni kambone wandi. Tamwatala amumfwa ishiwi lyakwe, kabili tamwatala amumona icinso cakwe." 
John5:38 Kanshi na mashiwi yakwe tayekala mu mitima yenu, pantu tamwasumina uo atuma." 
John5:39 Mubelenga nganshi ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo, pantu imwe mutontonkanya ukuti emwaba umweo wape. Nomba aya yene Malembo Yamushilo yalandafye pali ine." 
John5:40 Lelo imwe tamufwaya ukwisa kuli ine pakuti mukwate umweo. 
John5:41 “Ine nshifwaya ukuti abantu balenumbanya. 
John5:42 Lelo ine nalimwishiba. Tamwatemwa Lesa nakalya. 
John5:43 Ico naishila, nico Tata ewantuma, nomba imwe tamwampokelela. Nomba umbi nga aishilafye umwine ku maka yakwe, wena kuti mwamupokelela." 
John5:44 Nga kanshi kuti mwansumina shani? Imwe bonse mufwayafye ukuti abanenu balemulumbanya. Tamusakamana kuti Lesa uwabafye umo mpo eo alemulumbanya. 
John5:45 Kanshi mwilatontonkanya ukuti nine nkamwebelela kuli Tata. Awe, ni Mose uyu wine mwatetekelamo, eukamwebelela." 
John5:46 Mu cine amusumina Mose, na ine wine nga mwalinsumina. Pantu ni pali ine wine epo alemba." 
John5:47 Nomba apo mushasumina ifyo alemba, nga kuti mwasumina shani ifyo ndemweba?”" 
John6:1 Ilyo ifi fyapita, elyo Yesu ayabukile kwishilya lya bemba wa Galile, uo beta nokuti bemba wa Tibelia." 
John6:2 Ibumba lya bantu ilikalamba lyamukonka, ico lyalemona ifishibilo alecita pakuposha abalwele." 
John6:3 Yesu anina ulupili, epo aikala na basambi bakwe." 
John6:4 Kanshi califye mupepi ne Pasaka inshikunkulu ya Bayuda iya Cakucilila. 
John6:5 Cilya ibumba lya bantu lileisa uko ali, elyo aipusha Filipo ati, “Bushe ni kwi twingashita imikate iyakuti abantu balye?”" 
John6:6 Asosele ifi kukumweshafye, lelo umwine alishibe ifyo ali nokucita."
