John6:7 Filipo amwasuka ati, “Pakutifye cila umo akwateko akapandwa, kano ninshi mwashita imikate ya pa ndalama imyanda ibili.”" 
John6:8 Umusambi wakwe umo, Andele, munyina kwa Simoni Petelo, aeba Yesu ati," 
John6:9 “Kuno kuliko akalumendo kakwete imikate isano ne sabi libili. Nomba kuti fyabomba nshi ku bantu bafula ifi?” 
John6:10 Yesu abeba ati, “Ebeni abantu bekale panshi.” Pali iyi ncende pali icani icingi. Awe abantu epo baikala. Abaume bali cikanga amakana yasano." 
John6:11 Elyo Yesu abuula imikate atasha Lesa. Elyo balayakanya abantu abekele, balabapeela ukulingana napo balefwaila. Isabi nalyo bacita ifyo fine." 
John6:12 Awe bonse balya baikuta. Elyo Yesu aeba abasambi bakwe ati, “Longanyeni ifipandwa fyashalako, mwileka fyonaike.”" 
John6:13 Awe balonganya ifipandwa fyasheleko ku mikate isano iyo abantu balile, baisusha imiseke ikumi limo na ibili." 
John6:14 Abantu cilya bamona ici cishibilo Yesu acita, balasosa abati, “Ala cine cine uyu e kasesema ali nokwisa pano isonde!”" 
John6:15 Yesu ati amone ukuti balafwaya ukwisa musenda no kumupatikisha pakuti abe imfumu, afumako, aya eka ku lupili." 
John6:16 Cilya caba icungulo, abasambi bakwe batentemukile kuli bemba." 
John6:17 Baingila mu bwato, balaya na kwishilya ku Kapenamu. Bwasuka bwaila, ninshi Yesu talati ese uko bali." 
John6:18 Kanshi kwali icimwela ca maka cilepuupa, caimya na matamba ayakalamba." 
John6:19 Ilyo abasambi baoba ubwato intamfu ingalingana ne milundu isano nangu mutanda, elyo bamona Yesu aleenda pa menshi, aleisa ku bwato. Awe batiina nganshi." 
John6:20 Yesu abeba ati, “Ala nine, mwitiina!”" 
John6:21 Lyena abasambi balafwaya ukumuninika mu bwato, lelo apopene ubwato bwafika ku mulundu pa ncende balungeme." 
John6:22 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo ibumba lya bantu balya abashele kulya kwine lyashininkishe ukuti kwalifye ubwato bumo epela. Kabili Yesu taingile mu bwato pamo na basambi bakwe, lelo bailefye beka." 
John6:23 Amato yamo yafumine ku Tibelia, yaisa shika mupepi napo Imfumu yatashishe Lesa pa mikate na bantu balyako." 
John6:24 Ilyo abantu bamona ukuti Yesu talimo, nangu abasambi bakwe bene, awe baingila muli aya mato, baya balemufwaya ku Kapenamu." 
John6:25 Cilya bamusanga kwishilya lya bemba, balamwipusha abati, “Kafundisha nga waishile kuno lilali?”" 
John6:26 Yesu abasuka ati, “Ndemweba icine cine, ico mulemfwaila teico mwamwene ifishibilo iyoo, lelo nico mwalile imikate, mwaikuta." 
John6:27 Mwilabombela icakulya icishili cakubelelela. Ala akubombeleni icakulya icakupeela umweo wape, ico Umwana wa muntu akamupeela. Pantu Lesa Wishi umwine eo asuminisha.”" 
John6:28 Elyo abantu bamwipusha abati, “Nga kanshi tuli nokucita finshi pakubomba imilimo Lesa afwaya?”" 
John6:29 Yesu abasuka ati, “Imilimo Lesa afwaya ukuti mucite, kusumina muli uyo atuma.”" 
John6:30 Nabo bamwipusha abati, “Bushe cishibilo nshi wingacita tucimone na ifwe tukusumine? Finshi wingacita?" 
John6:31 Ifikolwe fyesu fyalile mana mu matololo. Efyo calembwa ukuti ‘Abapeele umukate wakulya ukufuma ku mulu.’ ” 
John6:32 Yesu abasuka ati, “Ndemweba icine cine, Mose tewamupeele umukate ukufuma ku mulu, lelo ni Tata eumupeela umukate wacine cine uwafuma ku mulu." 
John6:33 Pantu umukate wakwa Lesa ni uyu uwaika ukufuma ku mulu, no kwisa peela aba pano isonde umweo.”" 
John6:34 Abantu bamweba abati, “Mukwai, kanshi muletupeela uyo mukate lyonsefye.”" 
John6:35 Yesu abasuka ati, “Nine mukate wamweo. Uyo uwaisa kuli ine takatale omfwa insala nakalya. Uyo uwasumina muli ine takatale omfwa icilaka nakalya." 
John6:36 “Lelo ngefyo namweba, imwe ine mwalimona, nomba tamusumina." 
John6:37 Abo bonse abo Tata ampeela bakulaisa kuli ine. Elyo ine nshakatale ntamfya onse uwaisa kuli ine. 
John6:38 Pantu ico naishila ukufuma ku mulu tekukucita ifyo ndefwaya ne mwine, awe iyoo, kucita ififwaya uwantuma." 
John6:39 Ne fifwaya uwantuma nifi, ukuti nikalufyapo nelyo umo pabo ampeela. Lelo nkababushe bonse pa bushiku bwakupelekeshako." 
John6:40 Pantu ico Tata afwaya nici icakuti, onse uwamona Mwane no kumusumina, akwate umweo wape. Eo na ine nkabusha pa bushiku bwakupelekeshako.”" 
John6:41 Abayuda epakulailishanya pali ico asosa ati, “Ine nine mukate uwaika ukufuma ku mulu.”" 
John6:42 Balasosa abati, “Bushe uyu te Yesu, mwana Yosefu? Twalishiba wishi na nyina. Nga kanshi nomba alasosa shani ati naika ukufuma ku mulu?”" 
John6:43 Yesu abasuka ati, “Lekenifye ukulailishanya." 
John6:44 Ala tapaba nangu umo uwingesa kuli ine, kano Tata uwantuma ewamuleta. Elyo na ine nkamubusha pa bushiku bwakupelekeshako." 
John6:45 Umo pali bakasesema alemba ati, ‘Lesa eukalafunda bonse.’ Na uyo onse uumfwa no kufundwa kuli Tata, esa kuli ine." 
John6:46 Nshiletila kwaliba uwamona Tata. Awe uwamona Tata, ni uyofye eka uwafuma kuli Lesa." 
John6:47 “Ndemweba icine cine, onse uwasumina, eukwata umweo wape." 
John6:48 Ine nine mukate wamweo. 
John6:49 Ifikolwe fyenu fyalile mana mu matololo, nomba fyalifwa." 
John6:50 Lelo uyu e mukate uwaika ku mulu, uwakuti umuntu nga aulya ninshi tewakufwa nakalya." 
John6:51 Nine mukate wamweo uwaika ku mulu. Elyo onse uulya uyu mukate, akabelelela uwamweo pe. Umukate nkamupeela, mubili wandi uwakupeela aba pano isonde umweo.”" 
John6:52 Abayuda elyo batampa ukubikana ifikansa abati, “Nga uyu muntu kuti atupeela shani umubili wakwe eo tulelya?”" 
John6:53 Yesu abeba ati, “Ndemweba icine cine ukuti, nga tamulelya umubili wa Mwana wa muntu no kunwa umulopa wakwe, ninshi imwe tamwakakwate mweo." 
John6:54 Uyo onse uulya umubili wandi no kunwa umulopa wandi, akwata umweo wape. Kabili eo nkabusha pa bushiku bwakupelekeshako." 
John6:55 Pantu umubili wandi cakulya cacine cine, elyo no mulopa wandi e cakunwa cacine cine." 
John6:56 Uyo onse uulya umubili wandi no kunwa umulopa wandi aikala na ine, na ine naikala nankwe." 
John6:57 Kanshi nga filya Tata wamweo uwantuma, anenga ukuba uwamweo, efyo na uyo uundya nkamulenga ukuba uwamweo." 
John6:58 Kanshi uyu e mukate uwaika ku mulu. Te cimo na ulya mukate ifikolwe fyenu fyalile, kabili fyalifwa. Uulya uyu mukate, akenda uwamweo pe.”" 
John6:59 Yesu asosele ifi ilyo alefunda mu sinagoga mu Kapenamu. 
John6:60 Abasambi bakwa Yesu abengi ilyo baumfwa ifyo Yesu alanda, balasosa abati, “Awe ukufunda uku kwakosa nganshi. Nga nani engasumina?”" 
John6:61 Yesu aishiba ukuti abasambi bakwe balailishanya pali ifyo alanda. Alabeba ati, “Bushe ifyo nalanda efyanenuna icisumino cenu?" 
John6:62 Nga cikaba shani nga mwamona Umwana wa muntu alenina alebwelela uko aikele kale? 
John6:63 Ni Mupashi eupeela umweo, umuntu wena tabomba kantu. Amashiwi ayo namweba, ala mupashi kabili mweo." 
John6:64 Nomba pali imwe bamo tabasumina.” Pantu ukufumafye ilyo atampile ukufunda, Yesu alishibe abashakasumine no wali nokumuposa ku balwani." 
John6:65 Elyo akonkanyapo nokuti, “E mulandu wine mwebele nati, teti pabe nangu umo uwingesa kuli ine kano Tata ewamutungulula.”" 
John6:66 Pakumfwa ifi abasambi bakwa Yesu abengi bamusangukila, baleka ukulaenda nankwe." 
John6:67 Elyo Yesu aipusha abasole bakwe ikumi limo na babili ati, “Nga imwe, bushe na imwe mulefwaya ukuya?”" 
John6:68 Simoni Petelo amwasuka ati, “We Mfumu ni kuli ani twingaya? Ala niwe wakwata amashiwi yapeela umweo wape." 
John6:69 Kabili nomba twalisumina no kwishiba ukuti uli Wamushilo uwafuma kuli Lesa.” 
John6:70 Yesu ayasuka ati, “Bushe tene namusalile imwe bonse ikumi limo na babili? Nomba pali imwe umo ni Ciwa!”" 
John6:71 Kanshi aloseshe kuli Yuda mwana Simoni uwa ku Kelyoti. Pantu nangu ali umo pa basole ikumi limo na babili, lelo ewali nokumuposa ku balwani." 
John7:1 Panuma ya ifi, Yesu ashala alepitana mu Galile. Talefwaya ukupita mu Yudeya, pantu Abayuda balefwaya ukumwipaya." 
John7:2 Inshikunkulu ya Bayuda iya Nsakwe yali mupepi. 
John7:3 Elyo bamunyina bakwa Yesu balamweba abati, “Ala fuma kuno, kabiye ku Yudeya, pakuti abasambi bobe balemona ifintu fyonse ifi ulecita." 
John7:4 Tapaba nangu umo uulefwaya ukulumbuka ku bantu kabili alacita ifintu mu bumfisolo. Apo ulecita ifi fintu, leka kanshi abantu bonse bakwishibe!”" 
John7:5 Pantu mu cacine, na bamunyina bene tabamusumine nakalya." 
John7:6 Yesu abasuka ati, “Inshita yakuyako iyilingile kuli ine tailafika. Kuli imwe inshita yonse yalilinga." 
John7:7 Imwe abantu ba pano calo tekuti bamupate, lelo ine balimpata. Pantu nabikapofye ukubashinina ukuti ifyo bacita fyalibipa." 
John7:8 Imwe kabiyeni ku nshikunkulu. Ine nshileyako kuli iyi nshikunkulu, pantu inshita yakuyako iyilingile kuli ine tailafika.”" 
John7:9 Ati abebe ifi, awe wena ashala mu Galile." 
John7:10 Ilyo bamunyina kwa Yesu baya ku nshikunkulu, Yesu panuma ashala aima aya nao ku nshikunkulu. Lelo kwena te pa lwalala, ailekofye mu bumfisolo." 
John7:11 Pa nshikunkulu Abayuda balamufwaya. Balaipusha abati, “Bushe ulya muntu ali kwi?”" 
John7:12 Nomba abantu mwibumba bena baikalilafye ukulatotoshanya pali Yesu. Bamo balasosa abati, “Kwena muntu musuma.” Bambi bena balati, “Awe, abepaikafye abantu.”" 
John7:13 Lelo kwena tapali walelanda pali Yesu pa lwalala, pantu baletiina Abayuda." 
John7:14 Cilya cafika pakati kakusefya inshikunkulu ya Nsakwe, Yesu aya mwi Tempele atampa no kulafunda." 
John7:15 Abayuda bapapa nganshi. Balasosa abati, “Nga uyu muntu aishiba shani ifi fyonse uushatala asambilila?”" 
John7:16 Yesu abasuka ati, “Ine ifyo mfunda te fya pa mutwe wandi iyoo, fifuma ku wantuma." 
John7:17 Onse uufwaya ukucita ifyo Lesa afwaya, eukeshiba ifyo mfunda ukuti fifuma kuli Lesa, nangu nga fya pa mutwe wandi." 
John7:18 Umuntu onse uulandafye ifya pa mutwe wakwe, ninshi aifwailafye umucinshi umwine. Lelo uufwaya umucinshi wa wamutuma, wena wacishinka, taba na bufi mu mutima wakwe." 
John7:19 Bushe Amafunde yakwa Mose, te Mose ewamupeele? Nomba pali imwe tapaba nelyo umo uuyakonka. Nga cinshi ico mulefwaila ukunjipaila?”" 
John7:20 Ibumba lyamwasuka aliti, “Iwe waba no mupashi uwakowela! Nga nani uulefwaya ukukwipaya?”" 
John7:21 Yesu abasuka ati, “Nacitilepo icipeshamano cimo, elyo imwe bonse no kupapa mwalipapile." 
John7:22 Mose amupeele ifunde lyakusembululwa. Lelo ukusembululwa kwena te Mose watampile, fikolwe fyenu. Kanshi nomba musembulula umuntu na pa bushiku bwe Sabata." 
John7:23 Nomba ilyo basembulula umuntu pa bushiku bwe Sabata pakukonka Amafunde yakwa Mose tabonaula bushiku bwe Sabata. Nga kanshi cinshi mwamfulilwa ico naposha umuntu pa bushiku bwe Sabata? 
John7:24 Kanshi mwilapingwilafye ukukonka imimonekele ya cintu iyoo, mulepingwila mu cishinka.”" 
John7:25 Abantu bamo aba mu Yerusalemu balesosa abati, “Bushe uyu muntu teo balefwaya ukwipaya?" 
John7:26 Nomba uyu aleilandilafye pa lwalala, tapali no wakumulesha. Bushe emukuti ne ntungulushi shine nasho nashishiba nomba ukuti uyu wine e Kristu?" 
John7:27 Lelo ifwe uyu twalishiba uko afuma, Kristu wena ilyo akesa tapakabe wakwishiba uko afuma.”" 
John7:28 Ilyo Yesu acili alefunda mwi Tempele, aikatishe ishiwi ati, “Bushe cine cine mwalinjishiba, mwalishiba noko nafuma? Nomba ine nshaishilafye pa mutwe wandi. Uwantuma wena wacishinka. Imwe tamwamwishiba." 
John7:29 Lelo ine nalimwishiba, pantu eko nafuma, kabili ewantuma.”" 
John7:30 Awe balafwaya ukumwikata. Nomba tapali wamwiketemo, ico inshita yakumwikatilapo yali tailafikila." 
John7:31 Abantu abengi mwibumba bena bamusumina. Balasosa nokuti, “Bushe Kristu wena ilyo akesa, bushe akesa cita ifishibilo ifingi ukucila ifyo uyu muntu alecita?”" 
John7:32 Abafalise cilya baumfwa uko abantu mwibumba baletotoshanya ifi pali Yesu, bena pamo na bashimapepo bacindami batuma ifita ifyalelinda Itempele kukumwikata." 
John7:33 Yesu asosa ati, “Nkekala na imwe akashita kanono, elyo panuma nkabwelelamo ku wantuma." 
John7:34 Mukalamfwaya, nomba tamwakansange. Pantu uko naba, imwe tekuti mwiseko.”" 
John7:35 Abayuda balalanshanya abati, “Ni kwi uko kwine aleya, ukwakuti ifwe tukafilwe ukumusanga? Bushe ninshi akaya ku Bagiriki, uko abanensu basalanganina no kuya kukufunda Abagiriki?" 
John7:36 Nga kanshi alosha mwi pakusosa ati, ‘Mukalamfwaya nomba tamwakansange.’ Kabili ati, ‘Uko naba, imwe tekuti mwiseko?’ ”" 
John7:37 Ubushiku bwakulekelesha ubwa nshikunkulu ya Nsakwe, ebwali ubwacindamisha nganshi. Awe Yesu aiminina aikatisha ishiwi alasosa ati, “Onse uuli ne cilaka ese kuli ine, anwe." 
John7:38 Mu Malembo Yamushilo calembwa ukuti, ‘Onse uwansumina, mu nda yakwe mukalatuntumuka imilonga ya menshi yakupeela umweo.’ ”" 
John7:39 Yesu pakulanda ifi, aloseshe kuli Mupashi uo abakamusumina bali nokupoka. Pali iyo nshita ninshi Mupashi ali talapeelwa, pantu Yesu ali talacindamikwa." 
John7:40 Ilyo abantu baumfwa ifyo Yesu asosa, bamo balalanda abati, “Cine cine uyu muntu e kasesema wine!”" 
John7:41 Bambi nabo balati, “Ala uyu e Kristu wine!” Bambi nabo balasosa abati, “Iyoo, bushe Kristu kuti afuma ku Galile?" 
John7:42 Bushe Amalembo Yamushilo tayatila ayati, Kristu ali nokuba uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Davidi, kabili akafyalilwa ku Betelemu, umusumba umwafumine Davidi.”" 
John7:43 Kanshi abantu epakupusana pa mulandu wakwa Yesu. 
John7:44 Bamo balafwaya ukumwikata lelo tapali wamwiketemo. 
John7:45 Awe ifita fya kwi Tempele fyabwelelamo kuli bashimapepo bacindami na Bafalise. Nabo baipusha ifita abati, “Cinshi mushimwikatile no kumuleta kuno?”" 
John7:46 Ifita fyabasuka afiti, “Takwatala akuba uulanda ngoyu muntu.”" 
John7:47 Abafalise balabeba abati, “Bushe na imwe kanshi mwaya bepwa?" 
John7:48 Bushe mwalyumfwako ukuti umo pa ntungulushi nangu umo pa Bafalise alimusumina? 
John7:49 Nomba ili bumba talyaishiba na Mafunde yakwa Mose, ala lyalilapishiwa!”" 
John7:50 Nomba umunabo umo Nikodemo, ulya waishile kale kuli Yesu, alabeba ati," 
John7:51 “Bushe amafunde yesu yalisuminisha ukupeela umulandu ku muntu uo mushilaumfwa mulandu wakwe no kwishiba ifyo alecita?” 
John7:52 Bamwasuka abati, “Bushe na iwe uli mwina Galile? Belenga bwino Amalembo Yamushilo, ulesanga ukuti ku Galile takufuma kasesema.” [" 
John7:53 Awe cila muntu aima aya kumwakwe. 
John8:1 Yesu ena afuminepo aya ku lupili lwa Miolifa. 
John8:2 Kabili lucelocelo abwelela kwi Tempele. Awe abantu balalongana umo ali. Elyo aikala atampa no kulabafunda. 
John8:3 Bakafundisha bamafunde na Bafalise elyo baleta umwanakashi umo uo basangilishe mu lubembu. Bamwiminika na mu lwalala. 
John8:4 Baeba Yesu abati, “Kafundisha, uyu mwanakashi nabamusangilisha alecita ulubembu." 
John8:5 Mu Mafunde, Mose atukonkomesha ukwipaya abanakashi ba uyu musango ku mabwe. Nga iwe, uletipo shani?”" 
John8:6 Basosele ifi pakuti bakwate umwakumwikatila, eico balefwailisha imilandu. Lelo Yesu ainama atampa no kulemba panshi ku munwe." 
John8:7 Cilya babikapofye ukumwipusha, Yesu ainuka, abeba ati, “Pali imwe bonse uushatala abifya, nabalilepo ukumulasa ilibwe.”" 
John8:8 Awe kabili ainama, alalemba panshi." 
John8:9 Bati bomfwe ifyo, balafumapo umo umo, abakalamba ebabalilepo. Yesu asuka ashalafye eka no mwanakashi, ninshi umwanakashi ashele eminine palya pene." 
John8:10 Elyo Yesu ainuka, alaipusha umwanakashi ati, “Mayo bushe bali kwi? Bushe kanshi tapali uwakukupeela umulandu?”" 
John8:11 Nao ayasuka ati, “Tapali nangu umo mukwai.” Yesu amweba ati, “Kanshi na ine nshilekupeela umulandu. Kabiye wikabwekeshapo ukubifya nakabili.”]" 
John8:12 Yesu aebele abantu nakabili ati, “Nine lubuuto lwa ba pano isonde. Uyo onse uunkonka takatale enda mu mfifi, lelo akakwata ulubuuto ulupeela umweo.”" 
John8:13 Abafalise epakumweba abati, “Iwe ulepeela bukambone pali iwe we mwine, bukambone bobe ninshi bwafyefye.”" 
John8:14 Yesu abasuka ati, “Nangu ningapeela bukambone pali ine ne mwine, bukambone bwandi bwacishinka, pantu nalishiba uko nafuma noko ndeya. Imwe tamwaishiba uko nafuma, nangu uko ndeya." 
John8:15 Imwe mupingulafye no bupingushi bwabuntunse. Ine nshipingula nelyo umo. 
John8:16 Lelo nga cakuti ningapingula, ubupingushi bwandi kuti bwaba bwacishinka, pantu nshiba neka iyoo. Tuba lyonse na Tata uwantuma." 
John8:17 Mu Mafunde yakwa Mose calembwa ukuti bukambone bwacishinka kano abantu babili basuminishanya. 
John8:18 Ine ndepeela bukambone pali ine ne mwine, elyo Tata uwantuma nao e kambone wandi.”" 
John8:19 Elyo bamwipusha abati, “Nga wiso ali kwi?” Yesu abasuka ati, “Ine tamwanjishiba, nelyo ni Tata wine nao tamwamwishiba. Ine amunjishiba na Tata wine nao nga mwalimwishiba.”" 
John8:20 Yesu asosele ifi fyonse ilyo alefunda mwi Tempele, mu muputule wa cipao. Tapali wamwikete ico inshita yakumwikatilapo yali tailafikila." 
John8:21 Kabili Yesu abebele ati, “Ine ndi nokuya. Elyo mukalamfwaya, nomba mukafwila mu fyabubifi fyenu. Uko ndi nokuya imwe teti mwiseko.”" 
John8:22 Abayuda balalanshanya abati, “Atila ati, ‘Uko ndi nokuya teti mwiseko.’ Bushe calola mukutila akaipaya umwine?”" 
John8:23 Yesu abasuka ati, “Imwe muli ba muli cino calo, ine nafuma ku mulu. Imwe muli ba pano calo, ine nshili wa pano calo." 
John8:24 Eico mwebele nati, ‘Mukafwila mu fyabubifi fyenu.’ Kwena nga tamusumine ukuti, e ine wine, ninshi mukafwila mu fyabubifi fyenu.”" 
John8:25 Elyo bamwipusha abati, “Nga niwe ani?” Yesu abasuka ati, “Nimweba kale ifyo naba." 
John8:26 Kwena pali imwe ninkwatafye ifingi ifyakulandapo no kumupeelelapo umulandu. Kabili uwantuma, wacishinka, nefyo naumfwa kuli ena efyo ndeeba abantu ba pano calo.”" 
John8:27 Awe tabailwike nakalya ukuti alebeba pali Wishi. 
John8:28 Kanshi Yesu abeba ati, “Ilyo mukemika Umwana wa muntu pa musalaba, elyo mukeshiba ukuti e ine wine. Mukeshiba nokuti nshicita nelyo cimo pa mutwe wandifye, lelo ifyo nsosa, fintu Tata amfunda." 
John8:29 Kabili lyonse tuba no wantuma, tansha neka iyoo, pantu lyonse ncita ifimusansamusha.”" 
John8:30 Abantu abengi pakumfwa ifyo Yesu alesosa, bamusumina." 
John8:31 Elyo Yesu alaeba Abayuda abamusumine ati, “Ukumfwa nga mwalabeela amashiwi yandi, lyena ninshi icine cine muli basambi bandi." 
John8:32 Mukeshiba icishinka, elyo ne cishinka cikamulenga ukuba abantungwa.”" 
John8:33 Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Ifwe tuli ba mu lupwa lwakwa Abrahamu. Kabili tatwatala atuba abasha ba muntu nelyo umo. Nga kanshi walosha mwi, ico watila auti, ‘Mukaba abantungwa?’ ”" 
John8:34 Yesu abasuka ati, “Ndemweba icine cine, umuntu onse uubifya, ninshi musha wa bubifi." 
John8:35 Ubwikashi bwa musha mu lupwa tebwape, uwikalilila mu lupwa pe, mwana." 
John8:36 Kanshi Umwana nga ewamulubula, ninshi mukaba icine cine abantungwa." 
John8:37 Ninjishiba ukuti muli ba mu lupwa lwakwa Abrahamu. Nomba kabili mulefwaya ukunjipaya, pantu tamwasumina mashiwi yandi." 
John8:38 Ine mweba ifyo namona kuli Tata, nomba na imwe mucita ifyo mwaumfwa kuli shinwe.”" 
John8:39 Bamwasuka abati, “Ifwe shifwe ni Abrahamu.” Yesu abeba ati, “Amuba bana bakwa Abrahamu, nga mucita ifyo Abrahamu alecita." 
John8:40 Lelo kwena mulefwaya ukunjipaya, icofye ndemweba ifyacishinka ifyo naumfwa kuli Lesa. Ifyo tefyo Abrahamu alecita." 
John8:41 Imwe mulecita ifyo shinwe acita.” Bamwasuka abati, “Ifwe tatuli bana ba mu bucende. Ifwe twakwata shifwe umofye ni Lesa.”" 
John8:42 Yesu abeba ati, “Lesa cine aba e Shinwe, nga mwalintemwa. Pantu nafuma kuli Lesa, nomba tuli na imwe. Ine nshaishila pa mutwe wandi iyoo, ni Lesa ewantuma." 
John8:43 Cinshi ico mushumfwila ifyo nsosa? Ala nico mushifwaya kutesha mashiwi yandi. 
John8:44 Imwe shinwe ni Ciwa. Kabili mufwayafye ukucita ifyo shinwe afwaya. Ukufumafye na ku kale aba cipondo. Kabili tatala akonka ifyacishinka, pantu taba na cishinka. Wena nga alebepa, ninshi alelandafye ifyo afwile ukulanda. Pantu wabufi, kabili e cibinda wa bufi bonse." 
John8:45 Nomba ine nanda icishinka, kanshi eco imwe mushinsuminina." 
John8:46 Bushe nani pali imwe enganshinina ukuti nalitala ncitapo ububifi? Nomba ifyo mweba nga fyacishinka, cinshi kanshi mushinsuminina?" 
John8:47 Umuntu wakwa Lesa alomfwa amashiwi yakwa Lesa. Umulandu mushumfwila nico mushili bantu bakwa Lesa.” 
John8:48 Abayuda epakwasuka Yesu abati, “Bushe cine cine tatulungika mukutila, uli mwina Samaria, kabili waliba no mupashi wakowela?”" 
John8:49 Yesu abasuka ati, “Awe nshaba na mupashi wakowela iyoo. Ine ndacindika Tata, lelo imwe tamuncindika." 
John8:50 Ine nshiifwailafye ne mwine umucinshi. Lelo eko ali umo uumfwaila umucinshi, kabili uyu eupingula." 
John8:51 Ndemweba icine cine, uyo onse uusunga amashiwi yandi takafwe nakalya.”" 
John8:52 Abayuda bamwasuka abati, “Nomba elyo twashininkisha ukuti waba no mupashi wakowela. Abrahamu alifwa, bakasesema nabo balifwa. Elyo iwe auti, ‘Uusunga amashiwi yandi takafwe nakalya.’" 
John8:53 Icikolwe cesu Abrahamu alifwa. Bushe iwe naucila Abrahamu? Elyo bakasesema nabo balifwa. Bushe uleitunga nshi iwe?” 
John8:54 Yesu abasuka ati, “Ine nga ndaicindika ne mwine, umucinshi wandi nga wafyefye. Ine uuncindika ni Tata, uo imwe mutila, e Lesa wenu." 
John8:55 Nomba imwe tamwamwishiba, ine nalimwishiba. Ine nga cakuti natila nshamwishiba, ninshi na ine kuti naba uwabufi nga imwe. Nomba nalimwishiba nsunga na mashiwi yakwe." 
John8:56 Shinwe Abrahamu alyangile ico ali nokumona ubushiku bwa kwisa kwandi. Alibumwene, asansamuka no kusansamuka.”" 
John8:57 Abayuda bamwasuka abati, “Taulafika ne myaka amakumi yasano, bushe niwe wingamona Abrahamu?”" 
John8:58 Yesu abasuka ati, “Ndemweba icine cine Abrahamu talati abeko, ninshi ine eko naba.”" 
John8:59 Abayuda epakulatola amabwe pakuti bamulase. Yesu ena afyefyetuka afuma na mu lubansa lwe Tempele. 
John9:1 Awe ilyo Yesu alepita, amwene umuntu uwafyelwe impofu." 
John9:2 Abasambi bakwe balamwipusha abati, “Kafundisha, bushe nani wabifishe pakuti afyalwe impofu? Bushe mwine wine, nalimo bafyashi bakwe?”" 
John9:3 Yesu ayasuka ati, “Uyu muntu tabifishe, na bafyashi bakwe bene tababifishe iyoo. Lelo afyelwe impofu pakuti ukubomba kwa maka yakwa Lesa kumonekele muli uyu muntu." 
John9:4 Ilyo kucili akasuba tuli nokubomba imilimo ya wantuma. Ubushiku bwalaisa ilyo umuntu ashingabomba nelyo cimo. 
John9:5 Ilyo ncili pano isonde, nine lubuuto lwa ba pano isonde.”" 
John9:6 Cilya Yesu asosa ifi, afwisa amate panshi. Akasawila iloba na mate. Elyo ashinga iloba pa menso ya mpofu." 
John9:7 Ayeba ati, “Kabiye, kasambe mu cishiba ca Siloamu.” Ili shiwi lyalola mukutila “Uwatumwa.” Awe aya asamba na pa menso, abwela alelolesha." 
John9:8 Elyo abena mupalamano na balemumona uko alelomba, balasosa abati, “Bushe uyu muntu teuyu aleikala alelomba?”" 
John9:9 Bamo balasosa abati, “Ee, ni uyu wine.” Bambi bena abati, “Awe iyoo, bapalanafye.” Elyo umwine ati, “Ala nine wine.”" 
John9:10 Elyo bamwipusha abati, “Nga kanshi caba shani ukuti nomba ulelolesha?”" 
John9:11 Nao abasuka ati, “Umuntu umo, ishina lyakwe baleti ni Yesu, acikasawila iloba. Anshinga pa menso. Elyo anjeba ati, ‘Kabiye, uye samba mu cishiba ca Siloamu.’ Kanshi na ine eko naciya, naya samba. Awe natampa no kulalolesha.”" 
John9:12 Abantu bamwipusha abati, “Ali kwi?” Nao abasuka ati, “Nshishibe.”" 
John9:13 Elyo abantu basenda umuntu wali mpofu bamutwala ku Bafalise. 
John9:14 Kanshi cali ni pa bushiku bwe Sabata ilyo Yesu akasawile iloba, aposha ne mpofu amenso." 
John9:15 Elyo Abafalise bamwipusha ifyo apolele ku bupofu. Nao abeba ati, “Acinshinga iloba pa menso, elyo naya samba, epakulalolesha.”" 
John9:16 Abafalise bamo balasosa abati, “Uyu muntu tafuma kuli Lesa, pantu tasunga bushiku bwe Sabata.” Bambi bena nabo balati, “Bushe umubifi, kuti acita ifishibilo ifya musango uyu?” Awe paba nokupusana pakati kabo." 
John9:17 Abafalise baipusha nakabili umuntu wapolele abati, “Nga iwe uletipo shani pali uyu muntu akuposeshe?” Nao abasuka ati, “Ni kasesema.”" 
John9:18 Lelo Abayuda bakaanininafye ukusumina ukuti uyu muntu ali mpofu, nomba napola alelolesha. Basuka baita abafyashi ba uyu muntu." 
John9:19 Babepusha abati, “Bushe uyu mwana wenu? Bushe euyu muleti afyelwe impofu? Nga kanshi ni shani alelolesha nomba?”" 
John9:20 Abafyashi bakwe bayasuka abati, “Natwishiba ukuti mwana wesu. Kabili natwishiba nokuti afyelwe impofu." 
John9:21 Lelo tatwishibe ifyo cali pakuti alelolesha, nangu uumuposeshe ubupofu. Mwipusheni, mukalamba, alaisosela umwine.”" 
John9:22 Abafyashi bakwe ico balandile ifyo, nico baletiina Abayuda. Abayuda balyumfwanene ukuti nga twaumfwa umo alesosa ukuti Yesu e Kristu, ninshi tuli nokumutamfya tali nakulaisa mu sinagoga." 
John9:23 Kanshi eico abafyashi bakwe basosele abati, “Mwipusheni, mukalamba.”" 
John9:24 Abafalise nakabili baita umuntu wapolele ubupofu. Bamweba abati, “Lapa Lesa, ulande icishinka! Ifwe natwishiba ukuti uyu muntu mubifi.”" 
John9:25 Wena ayasuka ati, “Nga mubifi nangu iyoo, ico nshishibe. Ine ico njishibe cakuti nali mpofu nomba ndelolesha.”" 
John9:26 Bamwipusha abati, “Bushe acicita shani? Bushe akuposeshe shani ubupofu?”" 
John9:27 Abasuka ati, “Nimweba kale, nomba tamulefwaya kumfwa. Cinshi mulefwaila ukuti mbwekeshepo mumfwe nakabili? Bushe na imwe mulefwaya ukuba abasambi bakwe?”" 
John9:28 Awe Abafalise balamutukaula, balamweba abati, “Iwe uli musambi wa uyo muntu. Ifwe tuli basambi bakwa Mose." 
John9:29 Ifwe twaishiba ukuti Lesa alilandile kuli Mose. Lelo uyu muntu wena tatwaishiba noko afuma!” 
John9:30 Umuntu waposhiwe ayasuka ati, “Ici cena cakupapa! Tamwishibe uko afuma? Kabili namposha no bupofu bwandi!" 
John9:31 Twalishiba ukuti Lesa tomfwa ababifi. Omfwa abantu abamucindika, abacita ifyo afwaya." 
John9:32 Ukufumafye apo Lesa abumbile isonde, tacatala acumfwika ukuti umuntu aposha amenso ya muntu uwafyalwa impofu." 
John9:33 Ngoyu muntu tafuma kuli Lesa, tekuti acite nelyo cimo.”" 
John9:34 Abafalise bamwasuka abati, “Iwe wafyalilwe mu bubifi, no kukula emo wakulila. Bushe niwe ulefwaya ukulatufunda?” Awe bamutamfya, tali nakulaisa mu sinagoga." 
John9:35 Ilyo Yesu aumfwa ukuti nabamutamfya, awe aya uko ali, amusanga. Amwipusha ati, “Bushe wasumina Umwana wa muntu?”" 
John9:36 Umuntu nao amwasuka ati, “Bushe nani uyo wine mukwai? Nabanjebe pakuti musumine.”" 
John9:37 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Naumumona, ni uyu wine ulelanda nankwe.”" 
John9:38 Elyo umuntu asosa ati, “We Mfumu, nasumina.” Awe amufukamina, amupakata." 
John9:39 Elyo Yesu asosa ati, “Ico naishila pano isonde kupingula, ukuti impofu shilelolesha, elyo abalolesha nabo bapofule.”" 
John9:40 Abafalise bamo abali nankwe ilyo baumfwa ifi bamwipusha abati, “Kwena ifwe tatuli mpofu!”" 
John9:41 Yesu abeba ati, “Amuba impofu nga tamwakwata mulandu. Nomba apo mutila amuti, ‘Tulalolesha,’ kanshi mwaliba no mulandu.”" 
John10:1 “Ndemweba icine cine, umuntu uushingilila mwicinka lya mpaanga pa mwinshi, lelo aninina pa mbilibili, ninshi mupupu, kabili cipondo." 
John10:2 Uwingilila pa mwinshi e kacema wa mpaanga. 
John10:3 Kalinda alamwiswila iciibi ca pecinka, aingila. Impaanga shilomfwa ishiwi lyakwe ilyo aleita impaanga shakwe mu mashina. Elyo ashifumisha panse." 
John10:4 Ilyo ashifumisha shonse panse, ashitangilila. Elyo impaanga nasho shalamukonka, pantu shalishiba ishiwi lyakwe." 
John10:5 Tashikonka muntu umbi nakalya. Umuntu umbi shilamubutuka, pantu tashishibe ishiwi lyakwe.”" 
John10:6 Ni Yesu wabomine uyu mulumbe. Lelo tabaumfwile umo walolele. 
John10:7 Yesu alabeba nakabili ati, “Ndemweba icine cine, nine mwinshi we cinka lya mpaanga." 
John10:8 Bonse ababalilepo ukwisa bena bapupu kabili fipondo, lelo impaanga tashabomfwile." 
John10:9 Nine mwinshi. Onse uwingilila pali ine akapusuka. Akalaingila no kufuma apo atemenwe, kabili akulasanga icakulya." 
John10:10 Umupupu teshila cimbi kanofye ukwiba, ukwipaya no konaula. Ine ico naishila ni kukupeela umweo nokuti bakwatishe umweo." 
John10:11 “Ine ndi kacema musuma. Kacema musuma ni uyo uuleka umweo wakwe pa mpaanga shakwe. 
John10:12 Uwancito, ico tali kacema, kabili te mwine wa mpaanga, ilyo amona umumbulu uleisa, abutuka, asha impaanga sheka. Elyo umumbulu wafukukila impaanga, washisalanganya." 
John10:13 Uwancito abutuka ico wancitofye, tasakamene impaanga." 
John10:14 Ine ndi kacema musuma. Nalishiba impaanga shandi ne mpaanga shandi nasho shalinjishiba. 
John10:15 Kanshi nga filya fine Tata anjishiba na ine nalishiba Tata. Eco na ine ndekela umweo wandi pa mpaanga shandi. 
John10:16 Nalikwata impaanga na shimbi, ishishilati shibe muli lino icinka. Nasho shine ndi nokushiletamo, shili nokumfwa ishiwi lyandi. Epakuti kukabefye umukuni umo na kacema nao umo." 
John10:17 Tata alintemwa, pantu ndeleka umweo wandi, elyo nakabili nkaubuule." 
John10:18 Tapali nelyo umo uulempoka umweo wandi. Awe iyoo, ni ku kutemwafye kwandi ndeleka umweo wandi. Nalikwata amaka yakuulekamo. Nalikwata na maka yakuubuula nakabili. Ici e cebo Tata ampeele.”" 
John10:19 Awe Abayuda nakabili bapusana pa mulandu wa aya mashiwi. 
John10:20 Abengi balasosa abati, “Aliba no mupashi wakowela! Alipena! Bushe ewakumfwako?”" 
John10:21 Bambi bena balati, “Awe ifi tefilanda umuntu uwaba no mupashi wakowela! Bushe mupashi wakowela kuti waposha ubupofu?”" 
John10:22 Cali mu nshita yamibundo. Ku Yerusalemu kwali Inshikunkulu yakwibukisha Ukusangululwa kwe Tempele. 
John10:23 Yesu aletandala mu ncende ye Tempele, iyo baleti, “Lukungu lwakwa Solomoni.”" 
John10:24 Abayuda baisa mushinguluka balamweba abati, “Bushe ukaleka lilali ukutumika imitima? Nga niwe Kristu, twebe, twishibe!”" 
John10:25 Yesu abasuka ati, “Nalimweba, nomba tamusumina. Imilimo momba ku maka yakwa Tata einjebela." 
John10:26 Nomba imwe tamusumina, ico mushili mpaanga shandi." 
John10:27 Impaanga shandi shilomfwa ishiwi lyandi. Nalishishiba, nasho shilankonka." 
John10:28 Ine ndashipeela umweo wape, kabili tashakalobe nakalya. Takwakabe nelyo umo uwakushifyombotola mu minwe yandi." 
John10:29 Tata uwashimpeela, wa maka ukucila bonse. Teti pabe nelyo umo uwakushifyombotola mu minwe yakwa Tata." 
John10:30 Tata na ine twabafye umo.” 
John10:31 Elyo Abayuda batola amabwe balafwaya ukumulasa. 
John10:32 Yesu epakubeba ati, “Mwalimona imilimo ikankala iyingi iyo Tata ampeela ukubomba. Bushe mulimo nshi pali iyi uo mulefwailapo ukundasa amabwe?”" 
John10:33 Abayuda bamwasuka abati, “Tatulefwaya kukulasa amabwe pa milimo isuma ubomba, lelo ni pa musaalula obe kuli Lesa. Pantu iwe we muntufye niwe uleitunga ukuba Lesa.”" 
John10:34 Yesu abasuka ati, “Bushe tacalembwa mu Mafunde yakwa Mose ukuti, ‘Lesa atila, muli milungu?’" 
John10:35 Nga kanshi apo Lesa aeba aba bantu abo ishiwi lyakwe lyafikileko ukuti muli milungu, elyo Amalembo Yamushilo tayali yakutwishika." 
John10:36 Nga ine neo Tata aisalila umwine, antuma na pano isonde, bushe nine mwingatila amuti, asaalula Lesa, ico nasosa ukuti, ‘Ndi Mwana Lesa?’" 
John10:37 Mwilansumina kumfwa nga nshilebomba milimo yakwa Tata. 
John10:38 Lelo nga ndabomba imilimo yakwa Tata, ninshi nangu mushinsumine, sumineni kanshi mu milimo momba. Mushininkishe nokuti Tata aba muli ine na ine naba muli Tata.”" 
John10:39 Nakabili balafwaya ukumwikata, nomba abapusumuka." 
John10:40 Elyo Yesu ayabukila kwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani, kulya kwine Yoani atampile ukulabatisha eko aya ikala." 
John10:41 Abantu abengi balaisa uko ali. Balasosa abati, “Yoani kwena tabalile acita icishibilo, lelo fyonse ifyo asosele pali uyu muntu fyacishinka.”" 
John10:42 Awe na bengi bamusumina. 
John11:1 Kwaliko umuntu umo umulwele ishina lyakwe ni Lasalo. Aleikala mu Betani, umushi umo Maria na nkashimbiye Malita baleikala." 
John11:2 Uyu Maria eulya wakonkomwenene amafuta ya cena cisuma pa makasa ya Mfumu, kabili alayafuuta na ku mishishi yakwe. Kanshi ni ndume yakwe Lasalo ewalwele." 
John11:3 Bankashi bakwa Lasalo ebatumine amashiwi kuli Yesu abati, “We Mfumu umutemwikwa obe mulwele.”" 
John11:4 Ilyo Yesu aumfwa ifi, asosa ati, “Ubu bulwele tabwapelele pa mfwa. Lelo bwakuletela Lesa ubucindami, elyo no Mwana wakwa Lesa nao acindamikilweko.”" 
John11:5 Yesu alitemenwe Malita na nkashimbiye na Lasalo. 
John11:6 Lelo ilyo aumfwa ukuti Lasalo mulwele, ashala mu ncende ilya ine na shimbi inshiku shibili." 
John11:7 Elyo aeba abasambi bakwe ati, “Natubwelele ku Yudeya.”" 
John11:8 Abasambi bakwe bamweba abati, “Kafundisha, tapalati papite na nshita apo Abayuda balefwaya ukukulasa amabwe. Bushe nakabili eko ulebwelela?”" 
John11:9 Yesu ayasuka ati, “Bushe mu kasuba kamo tamwaba insa ikumi limo na shibili? Umuntu uuleenda akasuba taipununa, pantu alamona ulubuuto lwa ba pano isonde." 
John11:10 Lelo nga alaenda ubushiku, ninshi kuti aipununa, pantu tali na lubuuto.”" 
John11:11 Yesu ati asose ifi elyo aeba abasambi bakwe ati, “Lasalo cibusa wesu nalala utulo, lelo nalaya mubusha.”" 
John11:12 Abasambi bamwasuka abati, “We Mfumu nga alifye mu tulo, ninshi alaba bwino.”" 
John11:13 Yesu aloseshe mukutila, Lasalo nafwa. Nomba abasambi bena baletontonkanya ukuti, alelanda pakulala utulo twafye." 
John11:14 Elyo Yesu alandafye apabuuta tuutu ati, “Lasalo nafwa." 
John11:15 Lelo ine ico nshaliko ninsansamuka pa mulandu wenu. Pantu lyena mukasumina. Nomba natuleyako.” 
John11:16 Toma uo baleita Mpundu, alaeba abasambi banankwe ati, “Natuleya nankwe na ifwe bene, tuye fwa nankwe!”" 
John11:17 Cilya Yesu afika ku Betani, asanga ukuti Lasalo balimushika papita ne nshiku shine." 
John11:18 Ukufuma ku Betani ukufika ku Yerusalemu pabafye imilundu itatu. 
John11:19 Kanshi na ba mu Yudeya abengi balishile kuli Malita na Maria kukubatalalikako imitima pa mulandu wa mfwa yakwa ndume yabo. 
John11:20 Ilyo Malita aumfwa ukuti Yesu aleisa, afuma aya kukumukumanya. Maria ena ashala naikala mu ŋanda." 
John11:21 Malita alaeba Yesu ati, “We Mfumu aubapo, ndume yandi nga tafwile!" 
John11:22 Lelo ninjishiba ukuti na nombaline Lesa kuti akupeela conse ico wingamulomba.” 
John11:23 Yesu amweba ati, “Ndume yobe alabuuka nakabili.”" 
John11:24 Malita amwasuka ati, “Ninjishiba akabuuka pa bushiku bwakupelekeshako.”" 
John11:25 Yesu amweba ati, “Nine cishukuko kabili nine mweo. Uwasumina ine nangu engafwa, akaba uwamweo." 
John11:26 Elyo na onse umumi uwansumina, takafwe nakalya. Bushe wasumina ici?”" 
John11:27 Malita amwasuka ati, “Ee, we Mfumu, nasumina ukuti niwe Kristu, Umwana wakwa Lesa, uo Lesa atuma ukwisa pano isonde.”" 
John11:28 Cilya asosa ifi, Malita abwelelamo aya ita nkashimbiye Maria. Amutotosha ati, “Kafundisha ali kuno alekwita.”" 
John11:29 Maria cilya aumfwa ifi, aima bwangu bwangu, alaya noko ali." 
John11:30 Yesu ninshi talati afike mu mushi, acilifye pa ncende ine apo Malita amukumanishishe." 
John11:31 Awe Abayuda abali na Maria mu ŋanda balemutalalika umutima, cilya bamona uko aima bwangu bwangu afuma, bamukonka. Bena balatontonkanya ukuti alaya ku nindi kukuloosha." 
John11:32 Maria afika apali Yesu, cilya amona Yesu amufukamina. Alamweba ati, “We Mfumu aubapo, ndume yandi nga tafwile!”" 
John11:33 Ilyo Yesu amona uko alelila, na Bayuda bamukonkele nabo balelila, Yesu aumfwa ubulanda, no luse lwamwikata." 
John11:34 Elyo aipusha ati, “Bushe ni kwi uko mwamushika?” Bamwasuka abati, “We Mfumu, isa somone.”" 
John11:35 Awe Yesu alalila. 
John11:36 Abayuda balasosa abati, “Moneni ifyo amutemenwe!”" 
John11:37 Nomba bamo balasosa abati, “Uyu muntu aposeshe impofu, nga kanshi cinshi ashaleseshe ukuti Lasalo efwa?”" 
John11:38 Elyo Yesu nakabili aumfwa ubulanda nganshi, alaya na ku nindi. Inindi yena yali ni ninga ne cilibwe nabacilika pa mwinshi." 
John11:39 Yesu abeba ati, “Fumyenipo icilibwe!” Malita nkashi ya wafwile amweba ati, “We Mfumu, alenunka, pantu papita inshiku shine apo afwila.”" 
John11:40 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Bushe nshikwebele nati, ‘Nga wasumina ulemona ubucindami bwakwa Lesa?’ ”" 
John11:41 Awe bafumyapo icilibwe. Elyo Yesu apunamina mu mulu asosa ati, “Tata nakutasha pantu waŋumfwa." 
John11:42 Kwena ine nalishiba ukuti lyonsefye ulaŋumfwa. Lelo nalanda ifyo pa mulandu we bumba ili linshingulwike, pakuti lisumine ukuti niwe wantuma.”" 
John11:43 Ati asose ifi, elyo Yesu amwita aikatisha ishiwi ati, “Lasalo fumina panonse.”" 
John11:44 Awe uwafwile afuma. Ifisansa na makasa nafipombwa no tusalu. Pa menso pena pakakilwe icitambala. Yesu abeba ati, “Mukakuleni muleke aleya.”" 
John11:45 Aba mu Yudeya abengi abaishile kukuloosha kuli Maria, ilyo bamona ifyo Yesu acita, bamusumina." 
John11:46 Lelo bamo bena baya ku Bafalise, baya bashimikilako ifyo Yesu acitile." 
John11:47 Kanshi bashimapepo bacindami na Bafalise epakuteka icilye. Balasosa ati, “Tulecita shani? Uyu muntu alecita ifishibilo ifingi!" 
John11:48 Nga twaleka ukuti akonkanyepofye ifi fine, ninshi bonsefye bakamusumina. Elyo Abena Roma bakesa, bakonaula Itempele no mushobo wesu!”" 
John11:49 Umunabo umo, Kaifa, uwali Shimapepo mukalamba muli uyo mwaka, abeba ati, “Imwe tamwishibe nelyo cimo!" 
John11:50 Bushe tamwishibe ukuti cawamapo umuntu umo afwila abantu ukucila ukuti umushobo onse waonaika?” 
John11:51 Te pa mutwefye wakwe asosele aya mashiwi. Lelo ico ali Shimapepo mukalamba wa muli uyo mwaka, asesemefye ukuti Yesu ali nokufwila umushobo wa Bayuda." 
John11:52 Kabili te mushobo wa Bayuda beka. Lelo nokuti akalonganike abantu bakwa Lesa monse umo basalanganina, ukuti babefye ulupwa lumo." 
John11:53 Ukufuma ubo bushiku Abayuda balapangana ifyakwipaya Yesu. 
John11:54 Kanshi Yesu nao nomba taleenda pa lwalala mu Bayuda. Lelo afumako aya ku musumba baleti Efulaimu ku calo ca mupepi na matololo, eko aya ikala na basambi bakwe." 
John11:55 Kanshi Ipasaka inshikunkulu ya Bayuda iya Cakucilila yali mupepi. Abantu abengi epakulafuma mu mishi baleya ku Yerusalemu pakuti baye sangululwa ilyo Ipasaka talilafika. 
John11:56 Awe balafwaya Yesu. Balaipushanya ninshi nabalongana mwi Tempele ati, “Bushe muleti shani? Bushe ninshi takese ku nshikunkulu?”" 
John11:57 Nomba bashimapepo bacindami na Bafalise bakonkomeshe abantu ukuti, nga kwaba uwaishiba uko Yesu ali, ali nokubeshibisha pakuti baye mwikata." 
John12:1 Ilyo kwashelefye inshiku mutanda kwi Pasaka inshikunkulu iya Cakucilila, Yesu aile ku Betani ukwaleikala Lasalo, uo abushishe ku bafwa." 
John12:2 Awe bamutebeta icakulya. Malita ewaleyafwilisha mukupeela icakulya. Lasalo ena ninshi ali pa balelya na Yesu. 
John12:3 Elyo Maria aisamo nasenda ibotolo umwali amafuta aya mutengo ukalamba nganshi, kabili aya cena cisuma ayaleitwa nardi. Ayakonkomwena pa makasa yakwa Yesu. Elyo alafuta amakasa ku mishishi yakwe. Awe iŋanda yonse yaisulafye icena cisuma ica mafuta." 
John12:4 Umusambi wakwa Yesu umo, Yuda wa ku Kelyoti, uwali nokumuposa ku balwani, asosa ati," 
John12:5 “Cinshi ico aya mafuta bashishitishe pa ndalama imyanda itatu, elyo bashipeela na ku balanda?”" 
John12:6 Ico alandile ifi, teico asakamene abalanda, lelo nico ali ni mpupu. Ewali kasunga wa cikwama ca ndalama, kabili aleibapo isho balebikamo." 
John12:7 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Muleke umwine. Ala nabomba, epakupekanya ubushiku bwakushiikwa kwandi." 
John12:8 Abalanda mwakulaba nabo lyonse, lelo tatwakabe na imwe lyonse.”" 
John12:9 Abayuda abengi ilyo baumfwa ukuti Yesu ali ku Betani, eko baya. Ico bailile, tekumonafye Yesu, lelo nokuti bamone Lasalo uo Yesu abushishe ku bafwa." 
John12:10 Bashimapepo bacindami epakupanga ukwipaya na Lasalo wine. 
John12:11 Pantu Abayuda abengi balebasangukila, balesumina na Yesu pa mulandu wakwa Lasalo." 
John12:12 Ubushiku bwakonkapo ibumba ilikalamba ilya bantu baishile ku nshikunkulu, lyaumfwa ukuti Yesu ali mu nshila aleisa ku Yerusalemu." 
John12:13 Balakontola imisambo ya tuncindu, bamukonkela balepunda abati, “Hosana, nakalebalika! Lesa apaale uyu waisa uo Imfumu yatuma! Lesa apaale Imfumu ya bena Israeli!”" 
John12:14 Yesu asanga umwana wa punda, epo aikala. Ngefyo calembwa ukuti," 
John12:15 “Witiina iwe we mwana mwanakashi Sioni, ala mona Imfumu yobe iyi yafika, naikala na pa mwana wa punda.”" 
John12:16 Pa nshita iyi abasambi tabaishibe umo calolele. Lelo ilyo Yesu aishile shukuka ku bafwa, elyo abasambi baibukishe ukuti, ifi fyonse bamucitile fintu fyalembelwe pali ena." 
John12:17 Kanshi abantu basangilweko ilyo Yesu aitile Lasalo ukufuma mu nindi, amubusha na kubafwa, bena babikilepofye ukulashimika ili lyashi." 
John12:18 Ecalengele nokuti abantu abengi bese kukumusengela, ico baumfwile ici cishibilo Yesu acitile." 
John12:19 Elyo Abafalise balalanshanya abati, “Tamumwene, tapali neco tulecita! Abantu bonse nomba eo balekonka!”" 
John12:20 Abagiriki bamo baninike ukuya pali abo baile kukupepa ku nshikunkulu. 
John12:21 Awe baisa ukwali Filipo umwina Betisaida umusumba mu calo ca Galile. Bamwipusha abati, “Mukwai ala tulefwaya ukumona Yesu.”" 
John12:22 Filipo aya eba Andele, elyo bonse babili baya kuli Yesu baya mweba." 
John12:23 Yesu abasuka ati, “Nomba inshita yafika iyakusokolola ubucindami bwa Mwana wa muntu." 
John12:24 Ndemweba icine cine ukuti uluseke lwa ŋanu lushalafye lumo mpo, kanofye nga lwaponena mu mushili no kufwa lwafwa. Lyena nga lwafwa, elyo lutwala ifisabo ifingi." 
John12:25 Uyo uwatemwa umweo wakwe akaulofya. Na uyo uwapata umweo wakwe pano calo, eukausunga, akaba no mweo wape." 
John12:26 Uulefwaya ukuba umubomfi wandi, ali nokulankonka. Epakuti uko ndi, no mubomfi wandi nao eko akabe. Kabili Tata akacindamika onse umubomfi wandi." 
John12:27 “Umutima wandi waikatwa ubulanda, nampo nga ntile shani? Bushe ntile, ‘Tata shi wingampususha kuli aya macushi?’ Nomba ni pa mulandu wa macushi yene aya eco naishila." 
John12:28 Tata, cindika ishina lyobe!” Elyo ishiwi lyaumfwika ukufuma ku mulu aliti, “Nalilicindika, elyo nakabili nkalalicindika.”" 
John12:29 Ibumba ilyalipo cilya lyaumfwa ifi, lyasosa aliti, “Cabulukuta!” Bambi bena balasosa abati, “Ni malaika ewalanda nankwe!”" 
John12:30 Yesu abeba ati, “Te pa mulandu wandi mwaumfwila ishiwi, ni pa mulandu wenu." 
John12:31 Nomba ino e nshita abantu ba pano calo bali nokupingulwa. Ino kanshi e nshita kateeka wa ba pano calo ali nokuposwa kunse. 
John12:32 Nomba ine ilyo nkemikwa pa musalaba ninshi nkatintila abantu bonse bakese kuli ine.” 
John12:33 Ico alandile ifi, ni pakulanga umusango wa mfwa iyo ali nokufwa." 
John12:34 Ibumba lyamwasuka aliti, “Amafunde yakwa Mose yatweba ukuti Kristu ali nokubelelela pe. Nga kanshi iwe watila shani ukuti bakemika Umwana wa muntu pa musalaba? Ngoyo Umwana wa muntu nani?”" 
John12:35 Yesu abasuka ati, “Mucili no lubuuto pa nshitafye inono. Kanshi akwendeni ilyo mucili no lubuuto, epali mwakupwa ne mfifi. Umuntu uuleenda mu mfifi teshiba uko aleya." 
John12:36 Ilyo mucili no lubuuto, sumineni mu lubuuto, lyena mukaba abana ba lubuuto.” Cilya Yesu apwa ukusosa ifi, afumapo aya belama." 
John12:37 Abayuda bena nangu baleimwena ifishibilo ifingi Yesu alecita, awe nalyo line tabamusumine nakalya." 
John12:38 Kanshi epakufikilisha ifyasosa kasesema Esaya ati, “We Mfumu, ngo wingasumina ifi fintu tuleshimika, nani? Nga ni kuli ani uo Imfumu yasokolwela amaka yaiko?”" 
John12:39 Na cine tekuti basumine, pantu kasesema Esaya atila nokuti," 
John12:40 “Lesa alibapofwisha amenso yabo, alenga ne mitima yabo ukumalala. Epali baimwena na menso yabo, no kwiluka na mu mitima yabo. Epali bayalukila kuli ine, na ine nabondapa.”" 
John12:41 Esaya alanda ifi pali Yesu, ico amwene ubucindami bwakwa Yesu, eco asoselepo." 
John12:42 Lelo kwena na pa ntungulushi sha Bayuda pene palifye abengi abasumine Yesu. Lelo umulandu wakutiina Abafalise, balefilwa ukuisokolola. Pantu baletiina ukuti bakabatamfya, tabakaleisa mu sinagoga." 
John12:43 Kanshi basakamene ukucindikwa na bantu ukucila ukucindikwa na Lesa. 
John12:44 Yesu elyo aikatisha ishiwi asosa ati, “Uwasumina muli ine, teine neka asumina, lelo asumina na mu wantuma." 
John12:45 Elyo uwamona ine, ninshi amona no wantuma." 
John12:46 Ine naisa pano isonde ukuba ulubuuto ku bantu. Kanshi onse uwasumina tekala mu mfifi. 
John12:47 Onse uwaumfwa amashiwi yandi lelo akaana ukulayasunga, teine nkamupeela umulandu. Ine nshaisa pano isonde kukupeela aba pano isonde umulandu, awe naisa kukubapususha." 
John12:48 Onse uwansuula, akaana no kupokelela amashiwi yandi, eko ali uwakumupeela umulandu. Amashiwi yene mweba, eyakamupeela umulandu pa bushiku bwakupelekeshako!" 
John12:49 Pantu ifyo mweba te fya pa mutwe wandi iyoo. Tata uwantuma, ewankonkomesha ifyakulanda ne nshila yakulandilamo." 
John12:50 Kabili nalishiba ukuti ifyebo fyakwe fipeela umweo wape. Kanshi ifyo nanda, fintu Tata anjeba ukusosa.”" 
John13:1 Pa bushiku bwakulalila Ipasaka, inshikunkulu ya Cakucilila, Yesu aishibe ukuti inshita yakwe naifika iyakufuma pano isonde no kubwelelamo kuli Wishi. Lyonse alitemenwe abantu aba pano isonde, nomba alefwaya ukubalanga icitemwiko cakwe conse ukufikapo." 
John13:2 Ilyo bali pakulya umulalilo, ninshi Ciwa natunka Yuda wa ku Kelyoti mwana Simoni ukuti apose Yesu ku balwani." 
John13:3 Yesu ena ninshi naishiba ukuti Wishi alimupeela amaka pa fintu fyonse, nokuti afuma kuli Lesa kabili ni kuli Lesa alebwelela." 
John13:4 Elyo Yesu aima pakulya. Afumyako icakufimbana. Abuula insalu yakukumwinako amenshi akaka mu musana. 
John13:5 Elyo aitila amenshi mu musambilo, atampa no kulasamba amakasa ya basambi bakwe. Elyo alayakumuna na ku nsalu akakile mu musana." 
John13:6 Aisa kuli Simoni Petelo. Petelo amweba ati, “We Mfumu, bushe niwe unsambe amakasa?”" 
John13:7 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Pa nshita ino tawishibe ico ndecita, ukeshiba limbi.”" 
John13:8 Petelo ayasuka ati, “Awe tawakatale aunsamba amakasa nakalya!” Yesu amwasuka ati, “Kumfwa nga nshikusambile amakasa ninshi tawakatale auba na ine.”" 
John13:9 Simoni Petelo amwasuka ati, “Kanshi we Mfumu winsambafye amakasa, unsambe iminwe no mutwe wine!”" 
John13:10 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Umuntu uowele ninshi nasamba umubili onse, takabila kusamba, kanofye ninshi amakasa. Mulifye bwino tamuli na fiko, nomba te bonse.”" 
John13:11 Pantu Yesu alishibe uwali nokumuposa ku balwani. Eico alandile ati, “Nomba te bonse bashili na fiko.”" 
John13:12 Cilya Yesu apwa ukusamba amakasa ya basambi, abuula icakufimbana afwala, abwelela na pa ncende acikala. Alaipusha abasambi bakwe ati, “Bushe namutesha ico nacita umo cilolele?" 
John13:13 Munjita amuti, ‘Kafundisha’ kabili na ‘We Mfumu.’ Ee, cine cine mulalungika, pantu e fintu naba." 
John13:14 Nomba apo ine ne Mfumu kabili Kafundisha namusamba amakasa, na imwe mulesambana amakasa." 
John13:15 Namupeela icilangililo, pakuti na imwe mulecita ifyo namucitila." 
John13:16 Ndemweba icine cine, umusha tacindama ukucila shikulu wakwe. Elyo inkombe taicindama ukucila uuitumine." 
John13:17 Nomba apo mwaishiba ifi, ala mukalasansamuka, kumfwa nga mwalaficita." 
John13:18 “Teimwe bonse ndeeba iyoo, ne mwine nalishiba abo naisalila. Lelo Amalembo Yamushilo yali nokufikilishiwa ayatila, ‘Umuntu uo tulyafye nankwe icipe cimo ewansangukila.’" 
John13:19 Kanshi nomba namweba libela ilyo tacilafikila, pakuti ilyo cikafikila, mukasumine ukuti cine cine nine wine." 
John13:20 Ndemweba icine cine, uwasekelela uo natuma, ninshi nine asekelela. Elyo nao uwansekelela, ninshi asekelela uwantuma.”" 
John13:21 Ilyo Yesu apwa ukulanda ifi, awe umutima wakwe waikatwa ubulanda. Elyo asosa pa bwelu ati, “Ndemweba icine cine, umo pali imwe alamposa ku balwani.”" 
John13:22 Abasambi balaloleshanya, ico bashishibe uo aleeba." 
John13:23 Umusambi wakwe umo uo Yesu atemenwe, aikele mupepi na Yesu." 
John13:24 Simoni Petelo amucebula, amweba ati, “Ipusha Imfumu, uo aleeba.”" 
John13:25 Kanshi nao ashintilila pa cifuba cakwa Yesu. Amwipusha ati, “We Mfumu, bushe nani?”" 
John13:26 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Uo nalapeela akapandwa ka mukate aka nalatumpa mu lunweno, euyo wine.” Awe Yesu abuula na kapandwa ka mukate atumpika mu lunweno, apeela Yuda wa ku Kelyoti, mwana Simoni." 
John13:27 Apopenefye cilya Yuda apoka akamukate, na Satana aingila mu mutima wakwe. Elyo Yesu amweba ati, “Ale, ico ulefwaya ukucita, cita bwangu.”" 
John13:28 Nomba abali na Yesu pakulya, bena tabaishibe ico asosele ifi." 
John13:29 Bamo bena balatontonkanya abati, apo Yuda eusunga icikwama ca ndalama, Yesu amweba ukuti aye shita ifilefwaikwa ku nshikunkulu, nangu ukuti aye kukupeelako abalanda ifintu fimo." 
John13:30 Awe Yuda apoka akamukate, apopene afumina na panse. Elyo ninshi nabwila nokwila." 
John13:31 Cilyafye Yuda afumamo, Yesu alasosa ati, “Nomba Umwana wa muntu alacindamikwa. Kabili ni muli ena Lesa nao alacindamikilwa." 
John13:32 Apo kanshi Lesa alacindamikilwa muli Mwane, ninshi Lesa nao akacindamika Mwane no bucindami aikwatila umwine. Kabili alamucindamikafye nombaline." 
John13:33 Mwe bana bandi, nalaikalafye na imwe akashita akanono. Mukalamfwaya lelo ngefyo naebele Abayuda, na imwe efyo nalamweba, ‘Uko ndeya imwe teti mwiseko.’" 
John13:34 Namupeela icebo cipya, nati, ‘Muletemwana.’ Muli nokulatemwana nga filya ine namutemwa." 
John13:35 Nga mwalatemwana, elyo bonse bakamwishiba ukuti muli basambi bandi.”" 
John13:36 Simoni Petelo amwipusha ati, “We Mfumu ni kwi uleya?” Yesu amwasuka ati, “Uko ndeya, iwe tekuti ukonke pali nomba, ukakonka limbi.”" 
John13:37 Petelo amwipusha ati, “Ngeco tekuti nkukonkele pali nomba cinshi? Ine kuti naleka umweo wandi pali iwe!”" 
John13:38 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Bushe cine cine kuti waleka umweo obe pali ine? Ndekweba icine cine, ilyo mukolwe talalila, ninshi iwe naunkaana imiku itatu." 
John14:1 “Mwilaenda ne mitima iyasakamana. Muletetekela muli Lesa, elyo muletetekela na muli ine." 
John14:2 Mu ŋanda mwa Tata mwaba ififulo fyakwikalamo ifingi. Amukaanaba, nga nalimweba. Kanshi ndeya kukumupekanishisha icifulo." 
John14:3 Kanshi nga naya mupekanishisha incende, nkabwela nkese musenda. Epakuti uko ndi, eko na imwe bene mukabe." 
John14:4 Uko ndeya, inshila mwaliishiba.”" 
John14:5 Toma amwasuka ati, “We Mfumu, tatwishibe uko uleya. Nga kanshi kuti twaishiba shani inshila ya uko uleya?”" 
John14:6 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Nine nshila, nine cishinka, nine mweo. Teti kube nangu umo uwingesa kuli Tata, kano apita kuli ine." 
John14:7 Amunjishiba, nga kuti mwaishiba na Tata. Ukufuma pali nomba namumwishiba no kumumona namumumona.”" 
John14:8 Filipo amweba ati, “We Mfumu, tulangefye Wiso, nga tupeme.”" 
John14:9 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Inshita ubutali twaba na imwe Filipo, kanshi tawanjishiba nakalya? Ala onse uwamona ine, ninshi namona na Tata. Nga kanshi wasosa shani auti, ‘Tulange Wiso?’" 
John14:10 Bushe kanshi tawasumina ukuti ine naba muli Tata, elyo na Tata nao aba muli ine? Amashiwi mweba, ala te ya pa mutwe wandifye iyoo. Ni Tata uwaba muli ine, eubomba imilimo yakwe." 
John14:11 Suminenifye ifyo ndemweba nati, ‘Tata aba muli ine, na ine naba muli Tata.’ Nga teifyo, ninshi sumineni pa mulandu wa milimo ndebomba." 
John14:12 Ndemweba icine cine, uwasumina ine akalacita ifyo ndecita. Akalacita ne fintu ificililepo, pantu ndeya kuli Tata." 
John14:13 Kabili conse ico mwalomba ico muli basambi bandi, akalamupeela, epakuti ubucindami bwakwa Tata bumonekele muli Mwane." 
John14:14 Kanshi conse ico mwingalomba ico muli basambi bandi, nkalamupeela." 
John14:15 “Nga mwalintemwa, mulesunga amafunde yandi." 
John14:16 Ine nkalomba Tata, nao akamupeele kafwa umbi, uo mukalaba nankwe lyonse pe." 
John14:17 Ni Mupashi wacishinka. Abantu ba pano calo balifilwa ukumupokelela, pantu tabamumona nelyo ukumwishiba. Nomba imwe mwalimwishiba, ico mwaba nankwe kabili akaba muli imwe." 
John14:18 “Nshakamushe nga bakashiwa nakalya, nkabwela kuli imwe." 
John14:19 Kwashala akashita akanono, abantu ba pano calo tabakalemona, lelo imwe mukalamona. Pantu ndi mumi, na imwe mukaba abomi." 
John14:20 Muli ubo bushiku lyena mukeshiba ukuti naba muli Tata, na imwe mwaba muli ine, na ine naba muli imwe." 
John14:21 “Uyo onse uupokelela amafunde yandi no kulayasunga, uyo ewantemwa. Uyo uwantemwa, Tata nao akamutemwa. Na ine nkamutemwa, kabili eo nkaisokololako.”" 
John14:22 Elyo Yuda, nomba teulya uwa ku Kelyoti, amwipusha ati, “We Mfumu, nga caba shani icakuti ukaisokolole kuli ifwe, nomba ku bantu ba pano calo bena nakalya?”" 
John14:23 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Umuntu onse uwantemwa, alasunga amashiwi yandi. Tata akamutemwa. Elyo Tata na ine tukesa kuli wena, no kwikala muli ena." 
John14:24 Uyo onse uushantemwa, tasunga mashiwi yandi. Amashiwi ayo mwaumfwa, te ya pa mutwe wandi. Lelo mashiwi yakwa Tata uwantuma." 
John14:25 Namweba ifi fintu ilyo tucili na imwe. 
John14:26 Nomba Kafwa, Mupashi Wamushilo, uo Tata akamutumina ico muli basambi bandi, akesa mufunda fyonse. Kabili akamwafwa na mukwibukisha fyonse ifyo namweba." 
John14:27 “Umutende namushila, mutende wa mu mutima wandi eo namupeela. Nshilemupeela mutende uo abantu ba pano calo bapeela. Mwilaenda abasakamana kabili mwilaba na mwenso." 
John14:28 Namumfwa ifyo mwebele nati, ‘Ndeya, lelo kabili nkabwela kuli imwe.’ Amuntemwa nga namusansamuka ico ndeya kuli Tata, pantu Tata alicindama ukucila pali ine." 
John14:29 Kanshi nomba namwebelapo libela ilyo cishilafikila, pakuti ilyo cikafikila, mukasumine." 
John14:30 Awe nshatantalishe kulanda na imwe, pantu kateeka wa ba pano calo alaisa. Pali ine takwatapo maka nakalya." 
John14:31 Nomba abantu ba pano calo bali nokwishiba ukuti nalitemwa Tata, kabili ncitafye fyonse ifyo Tata ankonkomesha. “Aleni, imeni, natuleya." 
John15:1 “Ine nine mwangashi wine wine, elyo Tata wena e mulimi." 
John15:2 Alaputulako imisambo yonse iyishitwala fitwalo. Elyo umusambo onse uuletwala ifitwalo, alautungwila bwino bwino pakuti uletwalisha." 
John15:3 Imwe namuwamishiwa pa mashiwi aya namweba. 
John15:4 Mwikalilile muli ine, na ine nakulaikalilila muli imwe. Umusambo uwine weka tekuti utwale ifitwalo kano uli ku mwangashi. E cimo cine na imwe, nga tamwikalilile muli ine, ninshi teti mutwale ifitwalo." 
John15:5 “Ine nine mwangashi, imwe muli misambo. Uwaikalilila muli ine, na ine muli ena, uyu eutwala ifitwalo ifingi. Pantu ukwabula ine, imwe teti mucite nelyo cimo." 
John15:6 Uyo onse uwafilwa ukwikalilila muli ine, aba nge misambo iyo baposa no kuma yauma. Iyo misambo balailonganya baiposa na mu mulilo, emo yalapya." 
John15:7 Nga mwaikalilila muli ine na mashiwi yandi yaikalilila muli imwe, lyena kuti mwalomba conse ico mulefwaya, no kupeelwa mukapeelwa." 
John15:8 Ni mukutwala ifitwalo ifingi, emo Tata acindikilwa, pantu na imwe mwaba abasambi bandi." 
John15:9 Nalimutemwa nga filya fine Tata antemwa. Kanshi mwikalilile mu citemwiko candi. 
John15:10 Nga mwalasunga amafunde yandi, ninshi mwakulaikala mu citemwiko candi, nga ifi ine njikalilila mu citemwiko cakwa Tata ico nsunga amafunde yakwe." 
John15:11 “Kanshi namweba ifi pakuti na imwe mube ne nsansa shandi. Elyo ne nsansa shenu shibe ishapwililika. 
John15:12 Ifunde lyandi nili, muletemwana ngefi ine namutemwa." 
John15:13 Tapaba umuntu uwatemwa umunankwe ukucila pali uyo waleka umweo wakwe pali bacibusa bakwe. 
John15:14 Kanshi imwe muli bacibusa bandi, kumfwa nga mulekonka ifyo namukonkomesha." 
John15:15 Nomba nshakulamwita ababomfi bandi, pantu umubomfi teshiba ifilecita shikulu wakwe. Lelo nakulamwita bacibusa, pantu nalimwishibisha fyonse ifyo Tata anjeba." 
John15:16 Teimwe mwansala iyoo, nine namusala. Kabili namutuma nokuti muye muletwala ifitwalo, nefi fitwalo fyakubelelela. Lyena Tata akalamupeela conse ico mwamulomba ico muli basambi bandi." 
John15:17 Ico ndemukonkomesha cakuti, ‘Muletemwana.’" 
John15:18 “Nga bantu ba pano calo bamupata, mukaleibukisha ukuti nine babalilepo ukupata." 
John15:19 Amuba nga bantu ba pano calo, lyena nga bantu ba pano calo kuti bamutemwa, pantu muli ifyo baba. Lelo nalimusala ukufuma mu bantu ba pano calo, kanshi eco abantu ba pano calo bamupatila, pantu nomba tamuli ngefyo baba." 
John15:20 Ibukisheni ifyo namwebele, ‘Umubomfi tacindama ukucila shikulu wakwe.’ Apo ine balancusha, na imwe bene bakalamucusha. Abalasunga ifyo ndemufunda, nga kuti basunga nefyo mukalabafunda." 
John15:21 Ico bakalamucitila ifyo, nico muli basambi bandi. Pantu tabaishiba no wantuma." 
John15:22 Nkanaisa no kubeba, nga tekuti batile tatwakwata umulandu wa bubifi. Awe nomba tapaba kabepesho kakutila tababa na bubifi." 
John15:23 Uwapata ine, ninshi apata na Tata wine." 
John15:24 Nkanabomba imilimo pakati kabo iyo muntu ashatala abomba, lyena nga teti bakwate ububifi. Lelo baliimona, nomba kabili baletupata, ine wine na Tata." 
John15:25 Lelo ici cena kufikilishafye icalembwa mu Mafunde yakwa Mose, ‘Bampatafye apabula umulandu.’" 
John15:26 “Kafwa akesa, Mupashi wacishinka, akafuma kuli Tata. Nine wine nkamutuma ukufuma kuli Tata, eukesa ba kambone wandi." 
John15:27 Na imwe bene muli nokuba bakambone bandi, pantu twaba na imwe ukufumafye apo natampile." 
John16:1 “Ico namwebela ifi, ni pakuti mwikalufya cisumino cenu." 
John16:2 Bakamutamfya, tamwakaleingila mu masinagoga. Kabili inshita ikesa ilyo onse uukamwipaya akalatontonkanya ukuti, alebombela Lesa." 
John16:3 Ico bakalacitila ifyo, nico bashaishiba Tata nangu ine wine." 
John16:4 Lelo namweba ifi fintu, pakuti inshita yafiko nga yafika, mukebukishe ukuti alitwebele. Nshamwebele ifi pakutampafye pene, pantu twali tucili na imwe." 
John16:5 “Nomba nalaya ku wantumine. Lelo tapali nelyo umo uulenjipusha ati, ‘Bushe uleya kwi?’" 
John16:6 Nomba ico namweba ifi, mu mitima yenu mwaisula ubulanda." 
John16:7 Kanshi ndemweba icine cine ukuti cikamuwamina nga naya. Pantu nga nshile, ninshi Kafwa takese kuli imwe. Lelo nga naya, ninshi nkaya mutuma kuli imwe." 
John16:8 Nomba ilyo akesa, akesa shinina abantu ba pano calo ifyo baluba pa mulandu wa bubifi, na pa mulandu wakucita ifyo Lesa afwaya, na pa mulandu wa bupingushi." 
John16:9 Pa mulandu wa bubifi, pantu balikaana ukunsumina." 
John16:10 Akabashinina pa mulandu wakucita ifyo Lesa afwaya, pantu ndeya kuli Tata elyo tamwakamone nakabili." 
John16:11 Pa mulandu wa bupingushi, pantu kateeka wa ba pano calo alipeelwa umulandu kale." 
John16:12 “Nali ne fyakumwebafye ifingi, lelo pali nomba teti mufiteshe." 
John16:13 Nomba ilyo Mupashi wacishinka akesa, akamutungulula mu fyacishinka fyonse. Pantu ifyo akalalanda te fya pa mutwe wakwe, lelo akalalandafye ifyo aumfwa. Kabili akamushimikila ne fintu ifili nokwisa." 
John16:14 Akalancindika, pantu fyonse ifyo akalamweba, fikalafuma kuli ine." 
John16:15 Fyonse ifyo Tata akwata, fyandi. Kanshi eico namwebela nati, fyonse ifyo Mupashi akalamweba, fikalafuma kuli ine." 
John16:16 “Pa kashita akanono tamwalemona, kabili pa kashita akanono elyo mukalamona.”" 
John16:17 Abasambi bakwe bamo balaipushanya abati, “Nga ici naco calola mwi? Atila ati, ‘Pa kashita akanono tamwalemona, elyo kabili pa kashita akanono mukamona.’ Kabili ati nokuti, ‘Pantu ndeya kuli Tata?’ ”" 
John16:18 Balaipushanya abati, “Nga aka ‘kashita akanono’ calola mwi? Tatwishibe umo alosha?”" 
John16:19 Yesu aishiba ukuti balefwaya ukumwipusha. Abeba ati, “Muleipushanya ici natila, ‘Pa kashita akanono tamwalemona’, kabili ‘pa kashita akanono mukamona?’" 
John16:20 Ndemweba icine cine, mukalalila no kulaloosha, lelo abantu ba pano calo bena bakalasansamuka. Imwe mukaba no bulanda, lelo ubulanda bukaluka insansa." 
John16:21 Umwanakashi uuli pakupapa alacuula, pantu inshita ya bucushi yafika. Nomba ilyo apapa umwana, alaba na ku bucushi. Alasansamukafye ico umuntu afyalwa pano calo." 
John16:22 Kanshi na imwe pali nomba muli no bulanda. Lelo nkesa mumona nakabili, lyena imitima yenu ikesulafye insansa. Elyo isho nsansa, tapakabe nelyo umo uwakumupokolola." 
John16:23 “Ilyo ubo bushiku bukafika, tamwakalenjipusha pa cintu nelyo cimo. Ndemweba icine cine, Tata akamupeela conse ico mwamulomba ico muli basambi bandi." 
John16:24 Ukufika pali nomba, tamulomba Tata icintu nelyo cimo ico muli basambi bandi. Akulombeni, mwakulapeelwa, elyo mukaba ne nsansa ishapwililika." 
John16:25 “Kanshi nalemweba ifi fintu mu mapinda. Lelo inshita ikafika ilyo nshakalebomfya mapinda pakumulandila. Lelo nkalamulandila pali Tata ukwabula ukushoka. 
John16:26 Ilyo ubo bushiku bukafika, lyena mukalalomba Tata ico muli basambi bandi. Nshilemweba ukuti nkalamulombela kuli Tata," 
John16:27 awe iyoo, pantu Tata umwine nao alimutemwa. Alimutemwa, ico na imwe mwalintemwa. Kabili mwalisumina nokuti ni kuli Lesa eko nafuma." 
John16:28 Nafuma kuli Tata, naisa na pano isonde. Nomba ndefuma pano isonde, ndebwelelamo kuli Tata.”" 
John16:29 Elyo abasambi bakwe bamweba abati, “Eya, nomba walalandafye bwino ukwabula ukushoka, taulelandila mu mapinda." 
John16:30 Nomba twaishiba ukuti walishiba fyonse. Kabili ici calenga nokuti tusumine ukuti wafuma kuli Lesa.” 
John16:31 Yesu abasuka ati, “Nomba mwasumina mwa?" 
John16:32 Ala inshita yalaisa, no kwisa naisa, ilyo bonse mulepashika, mulensha. Cila umo alabutukila kumwakwe. Lelo nshiba neka, pantu tuba na Tata." 
John16:33 Kanshi namweba ifi, epakuti mukuba na ine mukwate insansa. Pano calo mukalacula, lelo muleshipa, nalicimfya ifya calo.”" 
John17:1 Cilya Yesu apwa ukusosa ifi, apunamina mu mulu, alasosa ati, “Tata, inshita yafika. Cindika Mwano, pakuti Mwano nao akucindike." 
John17:2 Pantu walimupeela amaka yakuteeka abantu bonse. Epakuti nao apeele umweo wa pe kuli abo bonse abo wamupeela. 
John17:3 Nomba umweo wa pe waba mukukwishiba iwe wine, Lesa wine wine uwaba eka, no kwishiba Yesu Kristu uo watuma." 
John17:4 Ine nalikucindika pano isonde pantu nimpwisha umulimo wampeela ukubomba. 
John17:5 Kanshi nomba Tata, ncindamika pa cinso cobe, nga filya fine nacindeme ninshi ne calo tacilabako." 
John17:6 “Nalikusokolola ku bantu abo wampeela ukufuma mu ba pano calo. Bena bantu bobe, nomba walibampeela. Elyo balisunga na mashiwi yobe." 
John17:7 Nomba balishiba ukuti fyonse ifyo wampeela fyafuma kuli iwe. 
John17:8 Pantu nalibashimikila amashiwi wanjeba, elyo nabo baliyapokelela. Balishininkisha nokuti ni kuli iwe nafuma. Elyo balisumina nokuti niwe wantuma." 
John17:9 “Kanshi ebo ndepepelako. Nshilepepelako abantu aba pano calo iyoo. Kanofye aba bene wampeela, pantu bantu bobe." 
John17:10 Elyo fyonse ifyo nakwata, fyobe. Kabili fyonse ifyo wakwata, fyandi. Elyo kabili ni muli aba bantu emo wasokolwela ubucindami bwandi." 
John17:11 Ine nomba nalaisa kuli iwe. Nalafuma pano isonde. Nomba aba bena bacili pano isonde. We Tata Wamushilo ubasunge na maka yobe ayo wampeela. Epakuti ifi twaba umo, nabo babefye umo." 
John17:12 Ilyo tucili nabo pano calo, ndabacingilila no kubasunga na maka yobe ayo wampeela. Ndabacingilila, tapaloba nelyo umo, kanofye umwina kuloba. Epakufikilisha ifyalembwa mu Mashiwi yobe." 
John17:13 Nomba nalaisa kuli iwe. Nasosa ifi fintu ilyo ncili pano isonde, epakuti nabo bakwate insansa shandi ishapwililika." 
John17:14 Nalibashimikila amashiwi yobe. Nomba abantu ba pano calo balibapata. Pantu tabali ba pano calo, nga ifi ine nshaba wa pano calo." 
John17:15 Nshilelomba ukuti ubafumye pano isonde iyoo. Lelo ndelombafye ukuti ulebacingililako ku mubi. 
John17:16 Ngefi ine nshaba wa pano calo, kanshi nabo tabali ba pano calo." 
John17:17 Ishiwi lyobe e cishinka cine. Kanshi balule ku cishinka cobe pakuti baituule onse kuli iwe babe bobe. 
John17:18 Filya wantuma pano calo, efyo na ine nabatuma mu calo." 
John17:19 Ni pa mulandu wa aba bene eco naituulila onse kuli iwe, epakuti nabo bene baituule onse mu cishinka kuli iwe." 
John17:20 “Teaba bene beka ebo ndepepelako, lelo ndepepelako na bonse abo abakasumina muli ine pakumfwa amashiwi yabo." 
John17:21 Tata, cawama bonse babafye umo. Filya waba muli ine, na ine naba muli iwe, efyo nabo babe muli ifwe. Epakuti na bantu ba pano calo bakasumine ukuti niwe wantuma." 
John17:22 Nalibapeelako ubucindami ubo wampeele, pakuti nabo babe umo ngefi twaba umo." 
John17:23 Ine mbe muli bena, elyo na iwe muli ine. Lyena bakabafye umutima umo umupwilapo. Epakuti na bantu ba pano calo bakeshibe ukuti niwe wantuma. Kabili bakeshibe nokuti walibatemwa nga filya fine wantemwa." 
John17:24 “Tata, ndefwaya ukuti abo wampeela bakabe na ine uko naba. Epakuti bakamone ubucindami bwandi, ubo wampeele. Pantu iwe walintemenwe, ninshi ne calo tacilabako." 
John17:25 Tata, we mololoke wine wine, abantu ba pano calo tabakwishiba, lelo ine nalikwishiba. Elyo aba nabo balishiba ukuti niwe wantuma." 
John17:26 Nalikusokolola kuli aba bantu, kabili ndekonkanyapofye ukulakusokolola. Epakuti nabo baleba ne citemwiko ico wankwatila, elyo na ine ndeikala muli bena.”" 
John18:1 Ilyo Yesu apwile ukupepa, aima na basambi bakwe, bayabuka no mukonko wa Kidironi. Aingila mwibala lyali kulya kwine, pamo na basambi bakwe." 
John18:2 Yuda uwali nokumuposa ku balwani, nao alishibeko, pantu ilingi line Yesu na basambi bakwe eko baleya mukukumanina." 
John18:3 Kanshi Yuda nao aisa kwibala. Aisa ne mpuka ya fita fya bena Roma pamo ne fita fyalelinda Itempele ifyo bashimapepo bacindami na Bafalise batumine. Ifita fyena fyaisa nafisenda ifyanso ne fisaniko ne myenge. 
John18:4 Yesu ena ninshi naishiba fyonse ifili nokumuponena. Kanshi aisa kukubakumanya. Abepusha ati, “Nani mulefwaya?”" 
John18:5 Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Ni Yesu umwina Nasaleti.” Yesu abeba ati, “Nine wine.” Yuda uwaposele Yesu ku balwani, ninshi naiminina pamo ne fita." 
John18:6 Cilya Yesu abeba ati, “Nine wine,” ifita fyabwelela cimfutyanuma, fyawa panshi." 
John18:7 Yesu nakabili abepusha ati, “Bushe nani mulefwaya?” Nabo abati, “Ni Yesu umwina Nasaleti.”" 
John18:8 Yesu abasuka ati, “Nimweba nati, ala ‘Nine.’ Nga nine mulefwaya, lekeni abasambi bandi baleya.”" 
John18:9 Aya mashiwi yali yakufikilishafye ifyo asosele ati, “Tata pa bantu wampeela, nshalufyapo nelyo umo.”" 
John18:10 Elyo Simoni Petelo, uwali no lupanga, alusomona, akoma umusha wakwa Shimapepo mukalamba. Amusempako ukutwi kwa ku kulyo. Uyu musha ishina lyakwe ni Maliki." 
John18:11 Yesu epakweba Petelo ati, “Bwesesha ulupanga lobe mu citubo. Bushe kuti nakaana shani ubucushi ubo Tata ampeela?”" 
John18:12 Elyo impuka ya fita fya bena Roma pamo no mukalamba wabo ne fita fyakulinda Itempele fyaikata Yesu, fyamukaka." 
John18:13 Babalilapo ukumutwala kuli Anasi. Uyu Anasi ali shifyala kwa Kayafa. Elyo Kayafa nao ewali Shimapepo mukalamba muli uyo mwaka. 
John18:14 Ni uyu wine Kayafa ewapandile Abayuda amano ati, “Cawama umuntu umo ewafwila abantu.”" 
John18:15 Simoni Petelo elyo no musambi umbi bena bakonkele Yesu. Uyu musambi umbi wena alishibikwe kuli Shimapepo mukalamba. Kanshi ena aingila pamo na Yesu mu lubansa lwe sano lyakwa Shimapepo mukalamba. 
John18:16 Petelo ena ashala naiminina panse lwa pa mwinshi. Umusambi umbi ulya uwaishibikwe kuli Shimapepo mukalamba, afumina panse. Alanda no mukashana uwalelinda impongolo. Aingisha na Petelo mukati." 
John18:17 Umukashana uwalelinda impongolo aeba Petelo ati, “Bushe iwe tauli umo pa basambi ba ulya muntu?” Petelo ayasuka ati, “Awe, iyoo!”" 
John18:18 Ico kwali impepo, abasha ne fita fyakulinda Itempele bakosha umulilo wa malasha, balaonta. Kanshi Petelo nao aya iminina apo bali, alaontako." 
John18:19 Shimapepo mukalamba elyo aipusha Yesu palwa basambi bakwe na pa mifundile yakwe. 
John18:20 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Ine nalelanda ku bantu pa lwalala. Lyonse nalefunda mu masinagoga na mwi Tempele umo Abayuda bonse balongana. Nshalandapo nangu cimo mu bumfisolo." 
John18:21 Kanshi cinshi ico ulenjipushisha? Ipusha abo baleumfwa ifyo nalelanda. Nabeshiba ifyo nalesosa.” 
John18:22 Yesu cilya alanda ifi, icita cimo pa fita fyakulinda Itempele, icali mupepi, catoba Yesu ulupi pa menso, casosa aciti, “Bushe iwe, ifyo efyakwasuka Shimapepo mukalamba?”" 
John18:23 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Nga nalandapo cimo icibipile, njeba kanshi ico nabifya. Lelo nga nandile icishinka, cinshi ico wangumina?”" 
John18:24 Elyo Anasi atuma Yesu, umo mwine akakilwe, kuli Kayafa, Shimapepo mukalamba." 
John18:25 Petelo ninshi wena eminine palya pene aleonta umulilo. Elyo bamo balamwipusha abati, “Bushe iwe, na iwe tauli umo pa basambi bakwe?” Petelo akaana ati, “Ine teine.”" 
John18:26 Umusha umo uwakwa Shimapepo mukalamba, lupwa lwa muntu ulya Petelo acisempako ukutwi, alamwipusha ati, “Bushe iwe nshacikumona muli na Yesu mwibala?”" 
John18:27 Awe nakabili Petelo akaana. Elyo apopene na mukolwe alila nokulila. 
John18:28 Lucelocelofye bafumishe Yesu kwa Kayafa, bamutwala na kwisano lya mulashi Pilato. Abayuda bena bakaana ukwingila mwisano lya mulashi, ico baletiina ukukowela, pantu ninshi teti balyeko Ipasaka, inshikunkulu ya Cakucilila." 
John18:29 Pilato epakufumina panse apo bali. Alabepusha ati, “Bushe milandu nshi akwete iyo mwamuletela kuno?”" 
John18:30 Bamwasuka abati, “Akaanakwata mulandu, nga tekuti tumulete kuli iwe.”" 
John18:31 Pilato epakubeba ati, “Kanshi musendeni mwe bene, muye mupingula ukulingana na mafunde yenu.” Abayuda bamwasuka abati, “Ifwe tatwasuminishiwa ukwipaya umuntu.”" 
John18:32 Ici cali cakufikilisha amashiwi Yesu asosele, pakulanga umusango wa mfwa ali nokufwa." 
John18:33 Pilato epakubwelela mwisano. Elyo aita Yesu alamwipusha ati, “Bushe iwe niwe Mfumu ya Bayuda?”" 
John18:34 Yesu ayasuka ati, “Bushe ifi uleipushishafye we mwine, nangu kuliko bambi abakushimikile pali ine?”" 
John18:35 Pilato ayasuka ati, “Bushe ine ndi Muyuda? Bantu bobe na bashimapepo bacindami ebakuletele kuli ine. Finshi wacita?”" 
John18:36 Yesu ayasuka ati, “Ubufumu bwandi tabuli bwa pano calo. Ubufumu bwandi abuba bwa pano calo, abantu bandi nga kuti bandwilako pakuti niposwa ku Bayuda. Nomba Ubufumu bwandi tabuli bwa pano calo iyoo.”" 
John18:37 Pilato elyo asosa ati, “Bushe kanshi uli mfumu?” Yesu ayasuka ati, “Niwe wasosa ukuti ndi mfumu. Umulandu nafyalilwa no kwisa pano isonde, ni pakuti mbe kambone ku fyacishinka. Onse uwaba ne cishinka alakutika kwishiwi lyandi.”" 
John18:38 Elyo Pilato aipusha ati, “Nga icishinka cinshi?” Pilato cilya asosa ifi, afumina panse apali Abayuda. Alabeba ati, “Ine uyu muntu nshimusangile na mulandu nelyo umo." 
John18:39 Lelo ukulingana no lutambi lwenu naba nokumukakwilapo umufungwa umo ku nshikunkulu ye Pasaka. Bushe mulefwaya ukuti mukakwile imfumu ya Bayuda?” 
John18:40 Awe balapunda abati, “Uyu ena teo! Tulefwaya Balaba!” Uyu Balaba ali cipondo." 
John19:1 Pilato elyo abuulile Yesu, aebele ne fita fyakwe ukumuma ifikoti." 
John19:2 Awe ifita fyalema iŋana ya myunga, fyamufwika ku mutwe. Fyamufwika no mwingila uwakashika." 
John19:3 Elyo ifita fyalaisa uko ali. Filesosa afiti, “Tupole mulopwe, we mfumu ya Bayuda!” Elyo filemuma ne ndupi pa menso." 
John19:4 Pilato afumina panse nakabili. Alaeba Abayuda ati, “Moneni, nalafumisha Yesu pano panse, pakuti mwishibe ukuti ine nshimusangile na mulandu nelyo umo.”" 
John19:5 Elyo Yesu afumina panse, ali ne ŋana ya myunga ku mutwe, nafwala no mwingila uwakashika. Pilato abeba ati, “Moneni! Umuntu uyu!”" 
John19:6 Cilya bashimapepo bacindami ne fita fyakulinda Itempele bamumona balapunda abati, “Mutanikeni, mutanikenifye!” Pilato abeba ati, “Kanshi musendeni mwe bene muye mutanika. Ine nshimusangile na mulandu nelyo umo.”" 
John19:7 Abayuda bamwasuka abati, “Ifwe twalikwata ifunde, elyo no kukonka ili funde ali nokufwa, pantu aletila, ‘Nine Mwana Lesa!’ ”" 
John19:8 Pilato ati omfwe aya mashiwi, umwenso wamwikata nganshi." 
John19:9 Elyo abwelela mwisano, alaipusha Yesu ati, “Bushe ni kwi wafuma?” Lelo Yesu wena no kumwasuka nakalya." 
John19:10 Pilato amweba ati, “Bushe wakaana ukunjasuka mwa? Tawishibe ukuti ine ninkwata amaka yakukulekamo nangu ayakukutanika?”" 
John19:11 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Ukwabula ukuti Lesa akupeele ayo maka, nga tekuti ukwate amaka pali ine nakalya. Eico kanshi umuntu uwamposa kuli iwe, wena nabifya ukucilapo.”" 
John19:12 Ilyo Pilato aumfwa ifi, alafwaya nokuti amulekemo. Lelo Abayuda balapunda abati, “Nga wamulekamo, ninshi tauli cibusa wakwa Kesalo! Onse uwatila ati, ‘Ndi mfumu,’ ninshi mulwani wakwa Kesalo.”" 
John19:13 Pilato ati omfwe aya mashiwi, afumisha Yesu panse. Aikala na pa cipuna cakupingwilapo icali mu ncende iyo batila, “Umo bakubatila amabwe panshi.” Mu Cihibulu baita, “Gabata.”" 
John19:14 Cali pa bushiku bwakupekanya Ipasaka, inshikunkulu ya Cakucilila, ninshi akasuba kafika pakati ka mutwe, pa nshita ya 12:00. Pilato aeba Abayuda ati, “Moneni imfumu yenu iyi!”" 
John19:15 Nabo balapundafye abati, “Mwipayeni, mwipayeni mumutanike.” Pilato abeba ati, “Bushe ntanike imfumu yenu?” Bashimapepo bacindami bamwasuka abati, “Ifwe tatwakwata mfumu imbi kanofye Kesalo!”" 
John19:16 Elyo Pilato abalubwila Yesu ukuti baye mutanika. Awe babuulile Yesu, bamusenda." 
John19:17 Yesu umwine aya nasenda umusalaba. Bafika na pa ncende batila, “Pa cipanga.” Mu Cihibulu batila, “Gologota.”" 
John19:18 Pa ncende ine iyi, epo bamutanikila. Batanikilapo na bambi babili, umo ku kulyo, umbi ku kuso, elyo Yesu ena pakati." 
John19:19 Pilato alemba icishibilo. Acipampamina na pa mulu wa musalaba. Alembelepo ati, “Yesu umwina Nasaleti, Imfumu ya Bayuda.”" 
John19:20 Ico pa ncende batanikilepo Yesu pali mupepi no musumba, Abayuda abengi balibelengelepo. Icishibilo cena calembelwe mu Cihibulu, mu Cilatini na mu Cigiriki." 
John19:21 Bashimapepo bacindami ba Bayuda epakweba Pilato abati, “Wilembapo ukuti Imfumu ya Bayuda. Lelo utile, ‘Uyu muntu aleti, Ndi mfumu ya Bayuda.’ ”" 
John19:22 Pilato abasuka ati, “Ico nalemba, ninshi nindala ninemba.”" 
John19:23 Cilya ifita fyatanika Yesu, elyo fyabuula ifyakufwala fyakwe. Fyayakanya pane. Cila cita cabuulapo icipande cimo. Elyo ifita fyabuula no mwingila. Uyu mwingila wena wa munkulinkuli, uwapikulwa ukwabula no mulundo." 
John19:24 Ifita fyalalanshanya afiti, “Awe umwingila wena twilepula. Natupendulefye, tumone uo cilewila, ninshi eulebuula.” Ifi fyacitike pakufikilisha ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo ayakuti, “Bayakene insalu shandi, pa mwingila wandi pena bapendwilepofye.” Kanshi efyo ne fita fyacitile." 
John19:25 Mupepi no musalaba wakwa Yesu, paiminine nyina na nkashimbiye, Maria muka Kolopa, elyo na Maria Mandalena." 
John19:26 Yesu elyo amona nyina no musambi atemenwe nabeminina. Aeba nyina ati, “Mayo, uyu mwana wenu.”" 
John19:27 Elyo aeba umusambi wakwe ati, “Aba e banoko.” Ukufuma palya pene umusambi asenda Maria alaikala kumwakwe." 
John19:28 Yesu ico aishiba ukuti nomba fyonse fyapwililika, kanshi pakufikilisha ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo, asosa ati, “Nafwa icilaka!”" 
John19:29 Palipo no lunweno ulwaisulamo umwangashi uwakantuka. Elyo babuula umwepu bautumpika na mu mwangashi uwakantuka. Batunga umwepu kwitete. Elyo bamutambika ku kanwa. 
John19:30 Cilya Yesu anwako umwangashi wakantuka, asosa ati, “Nomba capwa.” Awe akobola no mukoshi, aleka no mweo." 
John19:31 Kanshi cali ni pa bushiku bwakupekanya Ipasaka, inshikunkulu ya Cakucilila. Abayuda tabalefwaya ukuti ifitumbi fishale pa misalaba. Pantu ubu bushiku bwe Sabata bwali ni nshikunkulu ikalamba. Kanshi Abayuda epakulomba Pilato ukuti bafunaule amolu ya batanikwe, bafumyepo ne fitumbi pa misalaba." 
John19:32 Ifita fyaisa, fyafunaula pakubala amolu ya fipondo fibili ifyatanikwe pamo na Yesu." 
John19:33 Cilya baisa kuli Yesu, basanga ena nafwa kale. Kanshi wena tabamufunawile amolu." 
John19:34 Lelo icita cimo, camulasa ifumo mu lubafu. Awe apopene mu lubafu mwasuuma umulopa na menshi." 
John19:35 Uwapeela bukambone pali ici, untu walemonako, eico na bukambone bwakwe bwacishinka. Naishiba ukuti ifyo ashimika fyacishinka, epakuti na imwe musumine." 
John19:36 Ifi fintu fyacitike pakufikilisha ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo ukuti, “Tabakamufune ifupa nelyo limo.”" 
John19:37 Kabili kuli na fimbi ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo ukuti, “Bakatamba uo balasamo.”" 
John19:38 Ilyo ifi fyapita, Yosefu umwina Alimateya, aile lomba Pilato ukuti amusuminishe ukufumyapo icitumbi cakwa Yesu. Yosefu ali umusambi wakwa Yesu, lelo ni mu bumfisolo ico aletiina Abayuda. Pilato amusuminisha. Kanshi epakwisa buula icitumbi cakwa Yesu." 
John19:39 Nikodemo nao aisako aleta imiti iyanunka ubusaka, muri na matembusha, iyakusuba icitumbi. Iyi miti yafinine amakilo amakumi yane na yasano (45Kg). Nikodemo eulya waishile ubushiku umuku wakubalilapo ukwisa kuli Yesu." 
John19:40 Elyo aba bantu babili babuula icitumbi cakwa Yesu, bacisuba na mafuta ya cena cisuma. Elyo bacipomba mu nsalu, ukulingana no lutambi lwa mishikile ya Bayuda." 
John19:41 Ku ncende batanikile Yesu kwali ibala mupepi. Elyo mwibala line ili mwalimo inindi ipya umo bashatalile abashikamo umuntu. 
John19:42 Kanshi emo babika icitumbi cakwa Yesu, pantu cali pa bushiku bwa Bayuda ubwakupekanya ubushiku bwe Sabata, elyo nakabili neco inindi yali mupepi." 
John20:1 Lucelocelo pa bushiku bwakutampa umulungu ninshi kuciliko akafifi, Maria Mandalena aile ku nindi. Amona nokuti icilibwe nabacifumyapo pa mwinshi wa nindi." 
John20:2 Awe abwelelamo ulubilo kuli Simoni Petelo na ku musambi umbi ulya Yesu atemenwe. Abeba ati, “Nabafumya Imfumu mu nindi, tatwishibe noko baibikile!”" 
John20:3 Kanshi Petelo no musambi umbi ulya baima, balaya ku nindi." 
John20:4 Balabutukilafye capamo. Lelo umusambi umbi ulya, acisha Petelo ulubilo abalilapo no kufika ku nindi." 
John20:5 Ati enaminemo, amona insalu shili panshi. Nomba taingilemo iyoo." 
John20:6 Simoni Petelo uwalemukonka lutonuma, nao afika. Wena apopene aingila mu nindi. Amona ne nsalu shili panshi." 
John20:7 Amona ne nsalu intu bapombele Yesu ku mutwe. Yena yali iyapetwa, tayali pamo ne nsalu shimbi." 
John20:8 Elyo umusambi umbi ulya abalilepo ukufika ku nindi, nao aingilamo. Ati amone ifi, asumina." 
John20:9 Pantu pali iyi nshita, ninshi tabalaumfwa umwalola ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo ukuti, “Kristu ali nokushukuka ku bafwa.”" 
John20:10 Elyo aba basambi babwelelamo ku musumba. 
John20:11 Maria wena ninshi eminine kunse ya nindi, alelila. Ilyo acili alelila, ainama pakuti aloleshe mu nindi." 
John20:12 Awe amonamo bamalaika babili bafwele insalu ishabuuta, bekele apo balalike icitumbi cakwa Yesu. Umo ku mitwe elyo umbi ku ntambalilo." 
John20:13 Bamalaika bamwipusha abati, “We mayo, cinshi ulelilila?” Nao abasuka ati, “Nabasenda Imfumu yandi, nshishibe noko baibikile!”" 
John20:14 Ilyo Maria asosa ifi, apilibuka amona na Yesu naiminina. Nomba taishibe ukuti ni Yesu." 
John20:15 Yesu amwipusha ati, “Mayo cinshi ulelilila? Bushe nani ulefwaya?” Maria ena ico aletontonkanya ati mulimi wa mwibala, amweba ati, “Mukwai nga nimwe mumusendele, njebeni uko mumubikile, na ine nalaya mubuula.”" 
John20:16 Yesu elyo amwita ati, “Maria!” Maria nao apilibuka, amwasukila mu Cihibulu ati, “Raboni!” Ici calola mukuti, “Kafundisha.”" 
John20:17 Yesu amweba ati, “Leka ukunjikata, pantu nshilabwelelamo kuli Tata. Nomba kabiye kuli bamunyinane ubebe auti, Yesu aleti, ‘Nalabwelelamo kuli Tata, na imwe ni Shinwe, ni Lesa wandi, na imwe ni Lesa wenu.’ ”" 
John20:18 Maria Mandalena epakuya ku basambi. Alabeba ati, “Nimona Imfumu.” Elyo alabashimikila na fyonse ifyo Yesu amwebele." 
John20:19 Pa nshiku ya Mulungu ine iyo, icungulo bushiku, ku mulandu wakutiina Abayuda, abasambi balongene mu ŋanda nabesalako ne fiibi. Elyo Yesu aisa iminina apo bali, abeba ati, “Umutende ube na imwe!”" 
John20:20 Ati asose ifi, elyo abalanga indupi shakwe na mu lubafu lwakwe. Awe abasambi basansamuka nganshi pakumona Imfumu." 
John20:21 Yesu abwekeshapo nakabili ukubeba ati, “Umutende ube na imwe! Filya Tata antuma, efyo na ine namutuma.”" 
John20:22 Ati asose ifi, abaputilisha umupu, abeba ati, “Pokeni Mupashi Wamushilo." 
John20:23 Nga mwabelela umuntu uluse ku fyabubifi fyakwe, ninshi nabelelwa uluse. Nga mwakaana ukubelela umuntu uluse ku fyabubifi fyakwe, ninshi tabelelwe luse.”" 
John20:24 Toma umo pa basole ikumi na babili, uo baleti, Mpundu, wena talipo ilyo Yesu aishile." 
John20:25 Elyo abasambi bambi balamushimikila abati, “Ifwe natumona Imfumu.” Lelo Toma abasuka ati, “Ine pakusumina kanofye namona ifibala fya nsunga mu ndupi shakwe, nashimpa no munwe wandi pa fibala, nabika ne minwe yandi mu lubafu lwakwe, nga teifyo ninshi nshasumine.”" 
John20:26 Pati papite umulungu umo, abasambi nakabili bali mu ŋanda, Toma nao lyena ali nabo pamo. Yesu aisamo ninshi ifiibi nafisalwa. Aiminina napo bali, asosa ati, “Umutende ube na imwe!”" 
John20:27 Elyo aeba Toma ati, “Shimpa umunwe obe apa, lolesha na mu ndupi shandi. Buula iminwe yobe wikate na mu lubafu lwandi. Nomba leka ukutwishika, suminafye!”" 
John20:28 Toma epakwasuka ati, “We Mfumu yandi, we Lesa wandi!”" 
John20:29 Yesu amweba ati, “Wasumina ico wamona. Ala abashuka ni abo bantu abasumina nelyo bashimwene.”" 
John20:30 Yesu acitilefye ifishibilo ifingi pa cinso ca basambi bakwe ifishalembwa muli ici citabo. 
John20:31 Ifi fyena fyalilembwa pakuti musumine ukuti Yesu e Kristu, Mwana Lesa. Elyo na imwe nga mwamusumina, mumone ukukwata umweo." 
John21:1 Ilyo ifi fyapita, Yesu nakabili amonekele ku basambi bakwe kuli bemba wa Tibelia. Kanshi cali nifi." 
John21:2 Simoni Petelo, Toma uo baleti, Mpundu, Natanaeli umwina Kana mu calo ca Galile, bamwana Sebede, elyo na basambi bakwa Yesu bambi babili balongene pamo."
