John21:3 Simoni Petelo abeba ati, “Ine nalaya kukwipaya isabi.” Nabo bamweba abati, “Twalayafye bonse.” Awe baya, baingila na mu bwato. Nomba ubo bushiku tabaipeye nangu kamo." 
John21:4 Cilya bwaca lucelocelofye, Yesu aisa iminina pa lulamba lwa bemba. Nomba abasambi tabaishibe nakalya ukuti ni Yesu." 
John21:5 Yesu abepusha ati, “Mwe bana, bushe tamwipeye isabi nangu limo?” Nabo bayasuka abati, “Awe iyoo.”" 
John21:6 Elyo Yesu abeba ati, “Teyeni isumbu lyenu lubali lwa ku kulyo kwa bwato, lyena mwalaipaya.” Awe bateya ne sumbu. Ifimasabi ifingi nganshi fyaikatwa, icakuti bafilwa no kutintila isumbu ku bwato." 
John21:7 Elyo umusambi umbi ulya Yesu atemenwe, aeba Petelo ati, “Ala ni Mfumu!” Simoni Petelo cilya aumfwa ukuti ni Mfumu, abuula icakufimbana akaka mu musana, pantu alisamwinine. Awe aiposa na pali bemba." 
John21:8 Abasambi bambi bena baisa mu bwato, baletinta isumbu ilyaisulamo ifimasabi. Tabali patali ukufuma ku mulundu, palifye cikanga intampulo umwanda umo." 
John21:9 Ilyo bafika ku mulundu, bamona isabi lilepya pa mulilo wa malasha, elyo no mukate." 
John21:10 Elyo Yesu abeba ati, “Letenipo isabi limo pali ilyo isabi mwaipaya nombaline.”" 
John21:11 Simoni Petelo epakuya mu bwato. Alakulila isumbu ku mulundu, umwiswile ifimasabi ifikulu fyeka fyeka, umwanda umo na makumi yasano na fitatu (153). Nangu ifimasabi fyafulile ifi, isumbu lyena talyalepwike." 
John21:12 Yesu abeba ati, “Iseni mwikule.” Pa basambi tapali nangu umo uwapamine ukumwipusha ati, “Bushe niwani?” Balishibe ukuti ni Mfumu." 
John21:13 Elyo Yesu aya buula umukate abapeela, ne sabi nalyo abapeela." 
John21:14 Uyu e muku wabutatu Yesu amonekele ku basambi bakwe, panuma yakushukuka ku bafwa." 
John21:15 Cilya bapwa ukulya, Yesu aipusha Simoni Petelo ati, “Simoni mwana Yoani, bushe walintemwa ukucila aba?” Petelo amwasuka ati, “Ee we Mfumu, walishiba ukuti nalikutemwa.” Yesu amweba ati, “Ulecema abana ba mpaanga shandi.”" 
John21:16 Yesu amwipusha umuku wabubili ati, “Simoni mwana Yoani, bushe walintemwa?” Nao amwasuka ati, “Ee we Mfumu, walishiba ukuti nalikutemwa.” Yesu amweba ati, “Ulecema impaanga shandi.”" 
John21:17 Yesu amwipusha umuku wabutatu ati, “Simoni mwana Yoani, bushe walintemwa?” Awe Petelo camusakamika ico Yesu amwipusha umuku wabutatu ati, “Bushe walintemwa?” Kanshi amweba ati, “We Mfumu, iwe walishiba ifintu fyonse. Walishiba ukuti nalikutemwa!” Yesu amweba ati, “Ulecema impaanga shandi." 
John21:18 Ndekweba icine cine, ilyo wali umulumendo walesamwina ifyakufwala no kuya konse uko ulefwaya. Lelo ilyo ukakota, lyena ukatambalika amaboko. Elyo umbi eukakufwika no kukutwala uko ushilefwaya.”" 
John21:19 Mukulanda ifi, Yesu alelanga umusango wa mfwa untu Petelo ali nokufwa no kucindikilako Lesa. Cilya apwa ukulanda ifi, elyo aeba Petelo ati, “Nkonka.”" 
John21:20 Petelo elyo apilibukila kunuma, amona no musambi umbi ulya Yesu atemenwe alekonka. Uyu musambi eulya wine washintilile pa cifuba cakwa Yesu ilyo balelya umulalilo, uwaipwishe Yesu ati, “We Mfumu, nga nani alekuposa ku balwani?”" 
John21:21 Ilyo Petelo amumona aipusha Yesu ati, “Nga uyo wena ni shani?”" 
John21:22 Yesu amwasuka ati, “Nga ndefwaya ukuti abe umumi mpaka nkabwele, bushe uyo mulandu obe? Ala iwe nkonkafye!”" 
John21:23 Kanshi ecalengele nokuti ilyashi lisalangane mu basambi bakwa Yesu ukuti uyu musambi wena takafwe. Lelo Yesu talandile ukuti ulya musambi takafwe. Awe atile, “Nga ndefwaya ukuti abe umumi mpaka nkabwele, bushe uyo mulandu obe?”" 
John21:24 Uyu musambi e kambone pali ifi fintu fyonse. Kabili no kulemba ewafilemba. Twalishiba nokuti bukambone bwakwe bwacishinka. 
John21:25 Kwaliba na fimbi ifintu ifingi ifyo Yesu acitile. Ine ndemona ukuti, fyonse ifyo Yesu acitile afilembwa nga tekuti pabe incende pano isonde apakubika ifitabo fingalembwa." 
Acts1:1 Mukwai ba Teofili, mu citabo candi icakubalilapo nalilembamo fyonse ifyo Yesu acitile nefyo alefunda," 
Acts1:2 ukufumafye apo atampile ukufikafye nelyo asendelwe ku mulu. Ilyo talati asendwe ku mulu, Yesu ku maka yakwa Mupashi Wamushilo akonkomeshe abasole bakwe abo aisalile umwine." 
Acts1:3 Panuma ya macushi yakwe, Yesu aleilanga ku basole imikufye iyingi pa nshiku amakumi yane, pakuti bashininkishe ukuti ali umumi. Alebafunda pa mulandu wa Bufumu bwakwa Lesa." 
Acts1:4 Kanshi bushiku bumo ilyo Yesu ali nabo pamo, abakonkomeshe ati, “Tamuli nakufuma mu Yerusalemu, lelo mupembele ico Tata alaya. Eco namwebelapo nati," 
Acts1:5 Yoani alebatisha ku menshi, lelo imwe mu nshikufye isha mpendwa mukabatishiwa kuli Mupashi Wamushilo.”" 
Acts1:6 Ilyo abasole balongene pamo, elyo baipwishe Yesu abati, “We Mfumu, bushe ni pali ino ine nshita elyo walabwesesha ubufumu ku bena Israeli?”" 
Acts1:7 Yesu abaswike ati, “Uyo te mulimo wenu ukwishiba inshiku ne nshita, Tata umwine apima ku maka yakwe." 
Acts1:8 Lelo ilyo mukapoka amaka yakwa Mupashi Wamushilo, lyena mukaba bakambone bandi mu Yerusalemu, mu Yudeya monse, na mu Samaria, mpakafye no kwapelela icalo.”" 
Acts1:9 Cilyafye alanda ifi, awe bamona uko alesendwa ku mulu, paisa ne kumbi baleka no kumumona." 
Acts1:10 Kanshi ilyo bacili balelolekesha ku mulu, awe apopene bamona abantu babili, bafwele insalu ishabuuta. Baisa iminina na apo bali." 
Acts1:11 Balabeba abati, “Mwe bena Galile, cinshi mwimininine apo mulelolesha na ku mulu? Uyu Yesu mwamona asendwa ku mulu ukufuma apo muli, efyo akabwela ngefi fine mwacimona aleya ku mulu.”" 
Acts1:12 Elyo abasole babwelelemo ku Yerusalemu ukufuma ku lupili ulo batila, Ulupili lwa Miolifa. Ulu lupili lwaba mupepi no musumba, teti cifike na ku mulundu umo." 
Acts1:13 Cilya baingila mu musumba wa Yerusalemu, baya mu ŋanda mu muputule wa pamulu umo baleikala. Abalimo ni Petelo, Yoani, Yakobo na Andele, Filipo na Toma, Batolomeo na Mateo, Yakobo mwana Alufeyo, Simoni uo baleti “Umuselote,” elyo na Yuda mwana Yakobo." 
Acts1:14 Aba bonse balelonganafye ilingi aba mutima umo, kukupepa pamo na banakashi, na Maria nyina wakwa Yesu na bamunyina bakwa Yesu." 
Acts1:15 Mu nshiku shine isho abasambi baisa longana ku cilye. Ni cikanga bali bonse pamo umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120). Elyo Petelo aiminina alabeba ati," 
Acts1:16 “Mwe bamunyinane, ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo, ifyo Mupashi Wamushilo alengele kale ukulanda Davidi pa mulandu wakwa Yuda, fyali nokufikilishiwa. Yuda ewatungulwile abakwikata Yesu." 
Acts1:17 Yuda ali wa mwibumba lyesu, kabili twalebombafye nankwe uyu wine mulimo.”" 
Acts1:18 (Yuda, mu ndalama shamisoka apokele, ashitilemo ibala. Muli ili line ibala emo aponene kamfulimukonko, elyo alepuka, na mala yakwe yonse yapongoloka." 
Acts1:19 Abantu bonse abekala mu Yerusalemu balyumfwileko ici cintu. Eico ili bala mu lulimi lwabo batila, Akeldama, calola mukutila, “Ibala lyamisoka.”)" 
Acts1:20 “Pantu calembwa mu citabo ca Malumbo ukuti, “‘Lekeni iŋanda yakwe ishale icipompa, pekaba nelyo umo uwakwikalamo.’ Elyo nakabili calembwa ukuti, ‘Lekeni papyane umbi pa mulimo wakwe.’" 
Acts1:21 “Kanshi tuli nokusala umuntu umo pali aba bantu abali na ifwe inshita yonse, ilyo twaleendauka ne Mfumu Yesu." 
Acts1:22 Uwali na ifwe ukufumafye ilyo Yoani atampile ukubatisha, ukufikafye nelyo Yesu asendelwe ku mulu. Uyu muntu afwile ukuba kambone pamo na ifwe palwa kushukuka kwakwa Yesu.”" 
Acts1:23 Awe babuulapo abantu babili, Yosefu uo baleita Basaba, ishina lyakwe limbi ni Yusito, elyo na Matia." 
Acts1:24 Elyo balapepa abati, “We Mfumu iwe walishiba imitima ya bantu bonse. Kanshi tulange uo wasalapo pali aba babili." 
Acts1:25 Uwakuti abuule imilimo ya basole, iyo Yuda asha pakuya ku cifulo ico aifwaile umwine.”" 
Acts1:26 Elyo balapendula. Awe cawila Matia. Kanshi Matia epakumubika pa basole ikumi limo na umo. 
Acts2:1 Cilya ubushiku bwa Pentekoste bwafika, abasambi ninshi balongene mu muputule mu ŋanda imo ine." 
Acts2:2 Awe apopene icilulumo cafuma ku mulu, caisa nge cikuuku ca mwela icamaka. Caisula iŋanda yonse umo bekele." 
Acts2:3 Elyo bamona ifyapala imingu sha mulilo, shalekana, shaisa ikala pali cila muntu." 
Acts2:4 Elyo bonse baisulamo na Mupashi Wamushilo. Batampa nokulalanda mu ndimi shimbi umo Mupashi abapeelele ukulanda. 
Acts2:5 Kanshi mu Yerusalemu mwalimo Abayuda abapetamina Lesa, ukufumafye ku mishobo yonse iya pano isonde." 
Acts2:6 Ilyo baumfwa ici cilulumo abantu balongana ibumba ilikalamba. Bonse cabapelenganya ico cila muntu alaumfwa uko abasambi balelandila mu lulimi lwakwe. 
Acts2:7 Balapapa, cabapesha na mano. Balaipushanya abati, “Bushe aba bonse balelanda, te bena Galile?" 
Acts2:8 Nga kanshi caba shani icakuti bonse umo umo tuleumfwa ifyo balelanda mu lulimi twafyalilwamo? 
Acts2:9 Ifwe fwe bena Pati, fwe bena Media, na fwe bena Elamu, fwe bena Mesopotamia, fwe bena Yudeya, fwe bena Kapadokia, fwe bena Ponti, fwe bena Asia," 
Acts2:10 fwe bena Fulugia, fwe bena Pamfulia, fwe bena Egupto, fwe bena Libya lubali lwa ku Kurene, na ifwe fwe bena Roma fwe baisa tuletandala." 
Acts2:11 Fwe Bayuda, na ifwe fwe bayaluka Abayuda, fwe bena Kiliti, na fwe bena Arabia, bonse tuleumfwila uko baletushimikila mu ndimi shesu ifintu fikankala ifyo Lesa acita!”" 
Acts2:12 Awe bonse balapapa na mano yabapela. Elyo balaipusha abati, “Nomba ici cintu calola mwi?”" 
Acts2:13 Bamo bena balaseka abasambi abati, “Aba bantu bakolelwefye umwangashi!”" 
Acts2:14 Elyo Petelo aiminine pamo na basole ikumi limo na umo. Asansula ishiwi alaeba abantu ati, “Imwe mwe Bayuda banandi, na imwe bonse mwe baikala mu Yerusalemu, ishibeni ifyo nalalondolola!" 
Acts2:15 Aba bantu tabakolelwe iyoo, ngefyo imwe muletunganya. Kabili cicilifye ulucelo, pa nshita ya 09:00." 
Acts2:16 Ala ici ecilya kasesema Yoeli alandapo ati," 
Acts2:17 “‘Lesa asosa ati, mu nshiku shakupelekeshako, nkapongolwela Mupashi wandi pa bantu bonse. Abana benu abaume na banakashi bakalasesema amashiwi yandi. Abana benu abalumendo bakalamona ifimonwa. Abakote benu nabo bakalalota ifiloto." 
Acts2:18 Mu nshiku shilya, cinefye nkapongolwela Mupashi wandi na pa babomfi bandi abaume na banakashi. Nabo bakalasesema no kusesema." 
Acts2:19 Nkalanga ifinjelengwe mulya mu mulu ne fipeshamano pano isonde. Kukaba umulopa no mulilo ne ntumba ya cushi. 
Acts2:20 Akasuba kakafiita fititi no mweshi nao ukakashika ngo mulopa, ilyo ninshi tabulafika ubushiku bukalamba ubwacindama ubwa Mfumu." 
Acts2:21 Elyo abantu bonse abakalilila peshina lyakwa Yawe ebakapusuka.’ 
Acts2:22 “Mwe bena Israeli, umfweni ifyo nalamweba, Lesa alimulanga apabuuta tuutu ku fipeshamano, ku finjelengwe ne fishibilo ifyo Yesu alecita, ukuti Yesu wa ku Nasaleti e muntu uo Lesa amutumine. Neci cintu mwalishiba." 
Acts2:23 Lesa umwine alishibe no kufwaya efyo alefwaya ukuti uyu Yesu aposwe mu minwe yenu. Nimwe bene mwamwipeye pakulenga Abenafyalo bamutanike pa musalaba. 
Acts2:24 Lelo Lesa alimubusha ku bafwa, alimupususha na ku bukali bwa mfwa. Pantu no kukaana cakaana ukuti imfwa imwikatilile." 
Acts2:25 Eo Davidi alandapo ati, “‘Ndamona Imfumu pa cinso candi pe, pantu lyonse yaba mu pepi no kuboko kwandi ukwa ku kulyo, takuli icingantelentensha." 
Acts2:26 Eico umutima wandi uli ne nsansa no lulimi luleyanga, no mubili wandi wikele mu mutelelwe." 
Acts2:27 Pantu we Mfumu tawakaleke umweo wandi ukushala mu calo ca bafwa. Tawakaleke nokuti Uwamushilo obe akabole. 
Acts2:28 Walinangilila inshila ishitwala ku mweo, no kuba ne nsansa ishishaifulila pa cinso cobe.’" 
Acts2:29 “Mwe bamunyinane, lekeni mwebe bwino bwino pa cikolwe cesu Davidi. Davidi alifwa no kumushiika balimushiika, ne nindi yakwe tucili nayo kuno ukufika na lelo." 
Acts2:30 Nomba Davidi ali ni kasesema. Alishibe ukuti Lesa alimulaile no kulapa alapa ati, ‘Umo pali ba lupwa lwakwe eukesa ikala pa cipuna cakwe icabufumu.’" 
Acts2:31 Davidi nga kasesema amwene ifyali nokwisa citika. Eico ni pa kushukuka kwakwa Kristu alandile ilyo atile ati, ‘Imfumu tamulekele ashale mu calo ca bafwa. Nangu ukuleka ukuti umubili wakwe ubole.’" 
Acts2:32 “Lesa alibusha Yesu ku bafwa. Kabili bonse tuli bakambone pali ici cintu. 
Acts2:33 Lesa alimusansabalika, amuteka na ku kulyo kwakwe. Alipokelela kuli Wishi Mupashi Wamushilo uo Wishi amulaile. Na ifwe Yesu natupeela Mupashi Wamushilo. Kanshi eifi muleimwena no kuyumfwila." 
Acts2:34 Davidi umwine wine asosa ati, “‘Imfumu yaeba Imfumu yandi aiti, Ikala ku kulyo kwandi," 
Acts2:35 mpaka abalwani bobe nkabacite apakunyanta amakasa yobe.’ 
Acts2:36 “Kanshi abena Israeli bonse bashininkishe ukuti uyu Yesu, uo mwatanike, eo Lesa acita Imfumu kabili Kristu!”" 
Acts2:37 Cilya abantu baumfwa ifyo Petelo alanda, imitima yabo yabilimuka. Balaipusha Petelo na basole bambi abati, “Bamunyinefwe, bushe tuli nokucita shani?”" 
Acts2:38 Petelo abasuka ati, “Cila muntu ali nokulapila no kupilibuka, no kubatishiwa mwishina lyakwa Yesu Kristu, epakuti mubelelwe uluse ku fyabubifi fyenu. Elyo mwalapokelela Mupashi Wamushilo, ubupe bwakwa Lesa." 
Acts2:39 Pantu nimwe bene na bana benu Lesa alaya ubu bupe. Alaya na kuli bonse abali ukutali na bonsefye abo Imfumu Lesa wesu akuuta ukuti bese uko ali.” 
Acts2:40 Kabili Petelo abebafye ifingi na fimbi ifyakubasoka. Alabakonkomesha ati, “Ipususheni kuli iyi nkulo ibi.”" 
Acts2:41 Awe abantu abengi basekelela ifyo abeba, no kubatishiwa babatishiwa. Ubo bwine bushiku, abalundilweko ku basambi bakwa Yesu bali cikanga amakana yatatu (3,000)." 
Acts2:42 Abantu balebika imitima yabo kufyo abasole balebafunda, no kulaikala pamo nga babwananyina, no kulalila pamo Umulalilo wa Mfumu, no kupepa." 
Acts2:43 Abasole balecita ifinjelengwe ne fishibilo ifingi. Kanshi abantu bonse bali na katiina. 
Acts2:44 Lelo abasumina bonse baleikala pamo. Ifintu cila muntu akwete fyali fya bonse. 
Acts2:45 Baleshitisha ifyuma fyabo na fyonse ifyo bakwete. Elyo indalama balemonamo, baleshakanya kuli bonse ukulingana nefyo cila muntu alekabila." 
Acts2:46 Cila bushiku baleya kukulongana pamo kwi Tempele. Mu mayanda yabo mwena balekumana kukulya icakulya. Balelya ne nsansa, kabili aba mutima umo." 
Acts2:47 Balelumbanya Lesa, na bantu bonse balebatemwa. Cila bushiku Imfumu yalebalundilako kwibumba lyabo bonse abo yalepususha." 
Acts3:1 Ubushiku bumo Petelo na Yoani baya kwi Tempele, pa nshita ya mapepo, cilya akasuba kasendama pa nshita ya 15:00." 
Acts3:2 Pa mpongolo ye Tempele iyo baleti, “Impongolo Yayemba” basangapo umuntu uwafyelwe icite. Cila bushiku balemuleta pali iyi mpongolo pakuti alelomba ku bantu abaleingila mwi Tempele." 
Acts3:3 Icite cilya camona ukuti Petelo na Yoani balaingila mwi Tempele, cabalomba ubupe." 
Acts3:4 Elyo bonse Petelo na Yoani bamulolesha. Petelo wena amweba ati, “Tuloleshe!”" 
Acts3:5 Awe abalolesha, alesubila ukuti balamupeelako fimo." 
Acts3:6 Petelo epakumweba ati, “Ine ndalama nshikwete. Nalakupafye ico nkwete. Ku maka yakwa Yesu Kristu wa ku Nasaleti, akwenda.”" 
Acts3:7 Elyo Petelo amwikata ku kuboko kwa ku kulyo, amwimya. Awe apopene amaka yaisa mu makasa na mu nkolokoso." 
Acts3:8 Afwampuka napo ekele, aiminina, atampa no kulaenda. Elyo aya nabo mwi Tempele, aleenda, aleyangafye, alelumbanya Lesa." 
Acts3:9 Abantu bonse bamumona uko aleenda, alelumbanya na Lesa." 
Acts3:10 Bamwishiba ukuti euyu wine uwaleikala pa mpongolo yayemba iye Tempele alelomba. Awe bonse cabapesha amano, balapapafye pa cicitike ku cite." 
Acts3:11 Ilyo bamona uwali cite ekatilile kuli Petelo na Yoani, abantu bonse cabapesha amano, epakwisa ulubilo ku ncende iyo beta “Ulukungu lwakwa Solomoni.”" 
Acts3:12 Cilya Petelo amona abantu, alabeba ati, “Mwe bena Israeli, cinshi ico mulesungukila pali ici cintu? Cinshi ico muletulolekesha ifi? Bushe imwe muleti ni ku maka yesu nangu nico tuli bena Lesa eco twalengela uyu muntu aleenda?" 
Acts3:13 Lesa wakwa Abrahamu, Lesa wakwa Isaki, Lesa wakwa Yakobo, Lesa wa fikolwe fyesu, ewacindamika umubomfi wakwe Yesu. Imwe nimwe mwamuposele ku balwani, mwamukaana na pa cinso cakwe Pilato, nangu Pilato wena alefwaya ukuti amulekemo." 
Acts3:14 Imwe mwakeene Yesu umuntu Wamushilo, kabili Uwakaele. Mwaipusha Pilato ukuti amulubwile icipondo." 
Acts3:15 Umwine wa mweo wena mwamwipaya. Nomba Lesa alimubusha ku bafwa. Na ifwe nifwe bakambone pali ici cintu. 
Acts3:16 Uyu muntu mulemona uo mwaishiba no kwishiba, icalenga ukulaenda maka yakwa Yesu. Cisumino muli Yesu ecilengele ukuti uyu muntu apolelefye ngefyo bonse mulemona." 
Acts3:17 “Nomba bamunyinane, ninjishiba ukuti fyonse ifyo mwacitile kuli Yesu, imwe bene ne ntungulushi shenu, mwacitile mukukanaishiba." 
Acts3:18 Lelo e nshila Lesa apekenye pakufikilisha ifyo asosele kuli bakasesema bonse ukuti, Kristu wakwe ali nokucula." 
Acts3:19 Kanshi nomba lapileni, mwalukile na kuli Lesa, pakuti Lesa afuute ifyabubifi fyenu." 
Acts3:20 Epakuti Imfumu imupeele inshita yakumutalalika imitima. Imutumine Yesu uo yamupekanisha, emukutila Kristu." 
Acts3:21 Uyu wine Yesu ali nokuba mu mulu mpaka no kufika ku nshita iyo Lesa akapanga fyonse cipya cipya, nga mulya alandile kale kuli bakasesema bakwe abamushilo." 
Acts3:22 Pantu Mose nao asosele ati, ‘Imfumu Lesa wenu akasala umo mu mushobo wenu ukuba kasesema, ngefi fine yansala. Muli nokulabeela fyonse ifyo amweba." 
Acts3:23 Uyo onse uwakaana ukubeela ifyo uyo kasesema abeba, bali nokumufumya mu bantu bandi.’" 
Acts3:24 Bakasesema bonse, Samwele wine na bakasesema abamukonkelepo bonse balisobela ifilecitika muli shino nshiku." 
Acts3:25 Nimwe mpyani sha filayo bakasesema balelandapo. Kabili nimwe mpyani sha cipangano Lesa aebele Abrahamu ati, ‘Ni ku bufyashi bobe eko abantu bonse aba pano isonde bakapaalilwa.’" 
Acts3:26 Kanshi Lesa asalile Umubomfi wakwe no kumutuma kuli imwe pakubala, epakuti kwipaalo lyakwe, bonse mumone ukufuma ku misango yenu ibi.”" 
Acts4:1 Bashimapepo no mukalamba wa fita fyakulinda Itempele, na Basaduki baishile kuli Petelo na Yoani ilyo balelanda ku bantu." 
Acts4:2 Baisa nabafulwa, ico aba basole balefunda ukuti Yesu alishukuka ku bafwa. Ukufunda ifi, ekufundafye nokuti abafwa bakashukuka." 
Acts4:3 Awe babekata, nomba ico bwalaila babaposa mu cifungo mpaka bwaca." 
Acts4:4 Lelo abengi abaumfwileko ifyo balefunda, basumina. Awe ne mpendwa ya baume abasumine yaba ni cikanga amakana yasano (5,000)." 
Acts4:5 Cilya bwaca, intungulushi sha Bayuda, abakalamba na bakafundisha bamafunde balongana mu Yerusalemu." 
Acts4:6 Bateka icilye pamo na Anosi Shimapepo mukalamba, na Kayafa na Yoani na Alekisandilia na bonsefye aba mu lupwa lwa bashimapepo bakalamba." 
Acts4:7 Baiminika Petelo na Yoani mu lwalala, elyo balabepusha abati, “Bushe maka nshi mucitileko ici cintu? Nangu bushe maka yakwani mwabomfeshe?”" 
Acts4:8 Elyo Petelo aisulamo na Mupashi Wamushilo, alabeba ati, “Imwe mwe ntungulushi na bakalamba ba bantu!" 
Acts4:9 Ifwe ilelo nga muletulubulwisha, ni pa mulimo usuma tubombele uwakuposha umuntu uwali icite." 
Acts4:10 Kanshi imwe bonse, mwishibe ukuti uyu muntu uwiminine pano napolafye bwino, apolele ku maka yakwa Yesu Kristu umwina Nasaleti, uo mwatanike. Nomba Lesa alimubusha ku bafwa." 
Acts4:11 Uyu Yesu eo calembwapo ukuti, “‘Ilibwe ilyo imwe bakakuula mwasuulile, elyaisa ba ilyakwikasha petungi.’" 
Acts4:12 “Ni kuli Yesu fye eka eko twingamona ukupusuka. Pantu tapaba na umbi pano isonde, uo Lesa apeela ku bantu uwaba na amaka yakuti tumone ukupusukilamo.”" 
Acts4:13 Cilya bashicilye bamona ifyo Petelo na Yoani bapamine pakulanda, abantu bafyefye abashasambilila, awe cabapesha amano. Elyo bailuka ukuti aba bantu baleenda na Yesu." 
Acts4:14 Awe bafilwa ne fyakusosapo, nga neco bamona no muntu wapolele ali pamo na Petelo na Yoani." 
Acts4:15 Kanshi epakweba abasole ukufumina panse. Bashicilye bena bashala balelanshanya. 
Acts4:16 Balaipushanya abati, “Tulecita shani aba bantu? Abantu bonse mu Yerusalemu nabeshiba ukuti aba bantu nabacita icishibilo icacipeshamano. Na ifwe bene tekuti tukaane." 
Acts4:17 Nomba pakulesha ici cintu ukusalanganina ku bantu natubebekeshe ukuti tabali nakulanda ku muntu nelyo umo pali Yesu.” 
Acts4:18 Kabili babeta mu cilye. Balabakonkomesha abati, “Tecakwesha nelyo panono ukulalanda, nangu ukulafunda pali Yesu.”" 
Acts4:19 Nomba Petelo na Yoani bayasuka bashicilye abati, “Pinguleni mwe bene, icalungama cinshi? Bushe kubeela imwe, nangu kubeela Lesa?" 
Acts4:20 Awe ifwe tekuti tuleke ukulanda pa fintu ifyo ifwe fwe bene twaimwena no kuyumfwila.” 
Acts4:21 Bashicilye, pakubalesha babebekesha pa maka nganshi, elyo babaleka balaya. Tabamwene umulandu wakubakandilapo, pantu abantu bonse balelumbanyafye Lesa pa cipeshamano bacitile." 
Acts4:22 Elyo no muntu wine baposeshe muli ici cishibilo, alicilile ne myaka amakumi yane iyakufyalwa." 
Acts4:23 Apopenefye ilyo icilye cabalekelemo, Petelo na Yoani babwelelemo ku banabo. Baya bashimikilako na fyonse ifyo bashimapepo bacindami na bakalamba babebele." 
Acts4:24 Ilyo baumfwa umulandu, awe bonse capamo balapepa Lesa, abati, “Kabumba, we mwine wa mulu ne calo na bemba na fyonse ifyabamo." 
Acts4:25 Niwe ku maka yakwa Mupashi Wamushilo walengele icikolwe cesu Davidi umubomfi obe atile ati, “‘Cinshi ico Abenafyalo balalulunkanina, ne mishobo ileicushafye mu mapange yaiko?" 
Acts4:26 Ishamfumu sha pano isonde shileipekanya ku bulwi, na bakateeka nabo nabalongana pamo, balepangila Imfumu no Musubwa wakwe.’" 
Acts4:27 “Pantu Herodi na Pontio Pilato balongene pamo na Benafyalo na bena Israeli muno Yerusalemu. Balapangila na Yesu umubomfi obe uwamushilo, umusubwa obe." 
Acts4:28 Kwena bena balongenefye kukufikilisha ifyo iwe we Lesa ku maka yobe na ku mano yobe ifyo wapangile ukuti fili nokucitika. 
Acts4:29 Kanshi nomba we Mfumu, lolesha pa mapange yabo. Afwako abasha bobe, uleke balefunda amashiwi yobe ukwabula umwenso." 
Acts4:30 Tambalika ukuboko kobe kukundapa. Cita ifinjelengwe ne fishibilo ku maka yakwa Yesu, umubomfi obe uwamushilo.”" 
Acts4:31 Cilya bapwafye ukupepa, iŋanda balongenemo yalatenta. Elyo bonse baisulamo na Mupashi Wamushilo. Batampa no kulafunda amashiwi yakwa Lesa ukwabula umwenso." 
Acts4:32 Ibumba ilya basumina lyalifye ilya mutima umo na mano yamo yene. Tapali no wakulatila, “Ifyuma nakwata fyandifye neka.” Nomba fyonse ifyo cila muntu akwete, fyali fya bonse." 
Acts4:33 Abasole bena balebikapofye ukwiminina na maka pali bukambone bwa kushukuka kwa Mfumu Yesu. Ne cikuuku cakwa Lesa cali pali bonse bene nganshi. 
Acts4:34 Takwali uwakukabila akantu mwibumba lyabo. Bonse abakwete amabala nangu amayanda balefishitisha. Elyo indalama balemonamo," 
Acts4:35 baleleta ku basole. Elyo bashakanya kuli bonse ukulingana nefyo cila muntu alekabila. 
Acts4:36 Kanshi kwali umuntu umo uwa mu luko lwa bena Levi, ishina lyakwe ni Yosefu. Afyalilwe mu cishi ca Saiprasi. Abasole bena balemwita Banaba emukutila, “Umuntu wacikoseleshi.”" 
Acts4:37 Uyu muntu alikwete ibala, elyo ashitisha. Indalama amwenemo, ashileta ku basole." 
Acts5:1 Kwaliko umuntu umo ishina lyakwe ni Anania, umukashi wakwe ni Safira. Awe bashitisha ibala lyabo." 
Acts5:2 Nomba Anania afisapo indalama shimo, ninshi umukashi naishiba. Ishashelepo, aleta ku basole." 
Acts5:3 Petelo amweba ati, “Anania, cinshi ulekele Satana engile mu mutima obe? Wabepa na Mupashi Wamushilo, wafisapo shimo pasho wapokele pakushitisha ibala!" 
Acts5:4 Ilyo taulashitisha ibala, lyali lyobe. Elyo panuma yakushitisha, indalama nasho shine shali shobe, kuti washibomfya umo ulefwaila. Nga kanshi cinshi cilengele ukuti ucite ifi? Ala te bantu ubepele, ubepelefye Lesa.”" 
Acts5:5 Anania ati omfwe aya mashiwi awa panshi afwa no kufwa. Elyo bonse abaumfwileko baikatwa no mwenso. 
Acts5:6 Elyo abalumendo baisa, bamupomba mu nsalu, bamusenda, baya mushiika." 
Acts5:7 Cilya papita kwati insa shitatu, umukashi wakwe Safira nao aisamo. Teshibe ne cicitike." 
Acts5:8 Petelo amwipusha ati, “Njebako, bushe ishi shine e ndalama iwe na Anania mushitishemo ibala?” Nao ayasuka ati, “Ee nisho shine.”" 
Acts5:9 Elyo Petelo amweba ati, “Nga cinshi ico iwe no mulume obe mumfwanine ukwesha Mupashi wa Mfumu? Abantu bafuma mukushiika umulume obe, balya bali pa mwinshi. Na iwe wine balaisa kusenda.”" 
Acts5:10 Apopene Safira awa panshi apali Petelo, afwa no kufwa. Awe na balumendo cilya baingilamo basanga Safira nafwa. Nao bamusenda, baya mushiika mupepi na wiba." 
Acts5:11 Awe ulukuta lonse, na bonse abaleumfwako baikatwa no mwenso ukalamba." 
Acts5:12 Elyo abasole balacita ifishibilo ne finjelengwe ifingi ku bantu. Abasumina bonse balelongana pamo aba mutima umo mu lukungu baleti, “Lwakwa Solomoni.”" 
Acts5:13 Abantu nangu balelumbanya abasumina, awe tapali nangu umo uwapamine ukuikumika kwibumba lyabo." 
Acts5:14 Awe ibumba lya baume na banakashi abalesumina mu Mfumu lyaya lilelundulukilakofye. 
Acts5:15 Pakumona ifipeshamano ifyo abasole balecita, abantu epakulaleta abalwele pa misengele na pa matanda mu misebo. Epakuti Petelo nga alapita kusuka icinshingwa cakwe cakupa pali bamo." 
Acts5:16 Kanshi abantu abengi ukufuma mu misumba iyashinguluka Yerusalemu nabo balaisako. Baleleta abalwele babo na balecushiwa ku mipashi yakowela, awe bonsefye balepola." 
Acts5:17 Elyo Shimapepo mukalamba pamo na banankwe aba mwibumba lya Basaduki umufimbila wabekete, baimina abasole." 
Acts5:18 Awe babekata, babaposa umo balebika aba mu cifungo bonse." 
Acts5:19 Lelo ubushiku malaika wa Mfumu aisa isula impongolo sha cifungo. Afumisha na basole panse. 
Acts5:20 Abeba ati, “Kabiyeni muye iminina mwi Tempele. Muleshimikila abantu pali uyu mweo upya." 
Acts5:21 Awe nabo bakonka ifyo malaika abeba. Lucelocelo, baya mwi Tempele, batendeka no kulafunda abantu.” Ilyo Shimapepo mukalamba na banankwe bafika balonganika abakalamba bonse aba bena Israeli, bateka ne cilye cikalamba ca Bayuda. Elyo batuma abakuya buula abasole ku cifungo." 
Acts5:22 Ilyo abo batumine bafika mu cifungo, basanga abasole tabalimo, baya shimika umulandu ku cilye." 
Acts5:23 Abati, “Ilyo twacifika tusangile impongolo sha cifungo shonse ishaisalwafye bwino bwino na bakalinda nabeminina pa mpongolo. Nomba ilyo twaisula impongolo twasanga mukati tamuli muntu.”" 
Acts5:24 Ilyo umukalamba wa fita fya bakalinda we Tempele na bashimapepo bacindami baumfwa ifi, cabapesha amano. Bafilwa ukumfwa ifyo cicitike." 
Acts5:25 Elyo paisa umuntu, alabeba ati, “Umfweni, balya bantu mwaposele mu cifungo, bali mwi Tempele, balefunda abantu!”" 
Acts5:26 Elyo umukalamba wa fita fya bakalinda we Tempele ayako ne fita fyakwe, aya leta na basole. Lelo tababomfeshe maka, pantu baletiina abantu abati, “Epali batulasa amabwe.”" 
Acts5:27 Awe baleta abasole, babatwala na mu cilye cikalamba ca Bayuda. Elyo Shimapepo mukalamba alabepusha." 
Acts5:28 Abeba ati, “Twalimukonkomesha ukuleka ukufunda pali uyu muntu. Nomba namusalanganya amafunde yenu mu Yerusalemu monse. Kabili mubikilepofye ukutupeela umulandu wa mfwa yakwe.”" 
Acts5:29 Petelo na basole bambi bayasuka abati, “Ifwe tuli nokubeela Lesa, te bantu iyoo." 
Acts5:30 Lesa wa fikolwe fyesu, alibusha Yesu ku bafwa uo imwe mwaipeye pakumutanika pa musalaba." 
Acts5:31 Lesa alimucindamika, amuteka na ku kulyo kwakwe ukuba Intungulushi kabili Umupusushi. Epakuti apeele abena Israeli ukulapila no kupilibuka, no kubelelwa uluse ku fyabubifi fyabo." 
Acts5:32 Ifwe tuli bakambone pali iyi milandu, pamo pene na Mupashi Wamushilo uo Lesa apeela ku bantu abamunakila.”" 
Acts5:33 Cilya bashicilye baumfwa ifi, bafulwa nganshi, balafwaya nokuti bepaye abasole." 
Acts5:34 Lelo shicilye umo, uwa mwibumba lya Bafalise, kabili kafundisha wamafunde, ishina lyakwe Gamalieli, uo abantu bonse bacindike, awe aiminina mu cilye. Aeba bashicilye ati, “Fumisheni aba bantu panse pa nshita inono.”" 
Acts5:35 Elyo alaeba bashicilye ati, “Mwe bena Israeli, cenjeleni pafyo mulefwaya ukucita aba bantu." 
Acts5:36 Tapalati papite inshita iyitali apo twamwene Teuda uwaleitunga ukuti te muntu wafyefye. Awe na bantu cikanga imyanda ine balamukonka. Lelo bamwipaya, na bonse abalemukonka basalangana. Awe ne cilonganino cakwe caonaika." 
Acts5:37 Panuma yakwa Teuda, lilya kwali ukupenda abantu, kwaishile Yuda umwina Galile. Aongola ibumba lya bantu. Nomba cilya bamwipaya, abantu bonse abalemukonka basalangana." 
Acts5:38 Kanshi pali uyu mulandu ndemweba nati, lekeni aba bantu baleya. Pantu amapange yabo nefyo balecita nga fyabuntunsefye ninshi fikonaika." 
Acts5:39 Lelo nga fyafuma kuli Lesa ninshi mukafilwa ukufyonaula. Mukasangafye ukuti mulelwisha Lesa wine!” 
Acts5:40 Awe bamusuminisha. Elyo baeba abasole ukwingila mu cilye. Baeba ne fita ukuboma ifikoti. Babalesha no kufunda pali Yesu, elyo babalekamo." 
Acts5:41 Abasole bafuma mu cilye nabasansamuka, pakusanga ukuti Lesa abacindika ico basebana mukuculila Yesu." 
Acts5:42 Cila bushiku babikilepofye ukulafunda no kubila Imbila Nsuma iyakutila Yesu e Kristu, mwi Tempele na mu mayanda ya bantu." 
Acts6:1 Kanshi pa nshita iyi, abasambi baya balefulilako. Abasambi Abayuda abalelanda Icigiriki balailishanya pa basambi Abahibulu. Balasosa abati, “Ifwe bamukamfwilwa wesu cila bushiku tabalebapako ifintu baleyakanya.”" 
Acts6:2 Kanshi abasole ikumi limo na babili epakulonganya ibumba lyonse ilya basambi. Balabeba abati, “Tacilungeme ukuti tuleyakanya ifyakulya, elyo twalekelesha ukufunda amashiwi yakwa Lesa." 
Acts6:3 Kanshi bamunyinefwe, saleni mwe bene pali imwe, abaume cine lubali, abacetekelwa, abaisulamo na Mupashi Wamushilo, kabili abamano. Abo ebo twalapeela uyu mulimo." 
Acts6:4 Elyo ifwe twakulaibikafye pakupepa no kufunda amashiwi yakwa Lesa.” 
Acts6:5 Awe ibumba lyonse lyasekela aya amashiwi. Lyasala Stefano, umuntu uwacisumino nganshi, kabili uwaisula na Mupashi Wamushilo. Lyasala na Filipo na Prokoro, na Nikano, na Timoni, na Pamena, na Nikola Umwinafyalo, uwa ku Antioki, uwayalukile kwipepo lya Bayuda." 
Acts6:6 Ibumba lya basambi lyabaleta ku basole. Nabo abasole babapepelela, babatambalikila na maboko." 
Acts6:7 Awe ne shiwi lyakwa Lesa lyaya lilelunduluka. Abasambi mu Yerusalemu nabo baya balefulilakofye. Elyo ne bumba ilikalamba ilya bashimapepo lyanakila icisumino. 
Acts6:8 Stefano ali uwamaka kabili uwakwatisha icikuuku cakwa Lesa. Alecita ifishibilo ifyakupapa ne finjelengwe pakati ka bantu. 
Acts6:9 Nomba abantu bamo batampa ukubikana ifikansa na Stefano. Bamo bena Kurene na bena Alekisandilia abafumine ku sinagoga baleti, “Sinagoga ya Bantu balubulwa.” Elyo bambi bena Kilikia na bena Asia." 
Acts6:10 Nomba bafilwa ukumwansha mufyo alesosa ku mulandu wa mano yakwe, ico Mupashi alemwafwa mufyo alesosa." 
Acts6:11 Elyo basembeleka abantu mu bumfisolo ukuti basose abati, “Ifwe twaumfwile uko Stefano alelanda amashiwi yamusaalula kuli Mose na kuli Lesa.”" 
Acts6:12 Kanshi abantu, na bakalamba na bakafundisha bamafunde epakwimina Stefano. Bamwikata, bamusenda, bamutwala na ku cilye cikalamba ca Bayuda." 
Acts6:13 Elyo baletamo na bakambone babufi. Balasosa abati, “Uyu muntu lyonse alandafye amashiwi ayakususha Itempele na Mafunde yakwa Mose." 
Acts6:14 Twalyumfwile uko alesosa ati, ‘Yesu wa ku Nasaleti akonaula Itempele. Elyo akalula ne ntambi batushila kuli Mose.’ ”" 
Acts6:15 Bashicilye bonse elyo batontomesha amenso pali Stefano. Bamona nokuti impumi yakwe yalamoneka kwati ni mpumi yakwa malaika. 
Acts7:1 Shimapepo mukalamba elyo aipusha Stefano ati, “Bushe cine cine ifyo fine efyo usosa?”" 
Acts7:2 Stefano ayasuka ati, “Bamunyinane na imwe bashifwe, umfweni! Lesa uwacindamisha amonekele ku cikolwe cesu Abrahamu mu Mesopotamia ninshi talati ese kukwikala mu Harani." 
Acts7:3 Aebele Abrahamu ati, ‘Fuma mu calo cobe, ushe no lupwa lobe uye na ku calo nkakulanga.’" 
Acts7:4 Awe afuma mu calo ca Kaludea aya na kukwikala mu Harani. Panuma ya mfwa yakwa wishi, Lesa afumya Abrahamu mu Harani, amuleta na muli cino calo muleikalamo." 
Acts7:5 Muli cino calo mwena Lesa tapeelamo Abrahamu nangu akapanga akakuti atile, ni mpanga yandi. Lelo nangu Abrahamu ali talakwata mwana, Lesa alimulaile ukumupeela pamo na bana bakwe abali nokumukonkapo ukuti cino calo cali nokuba cakwe." 
Acts7:6 Kabili Lesa amwebele nokuti, ‘Abana bobe bakekala mu bweni mu calo ca bene. Muli ico calo bakabateka ubusha nokulabacusha pa myaka imyanda ine.’" 
Acts7:7 Lesa atile nokuti, ‘Nomba nkakanda uyo mushobo uukabateeka ubusha. Elyo panuma bakafuma muli ico calo, bakalempepa na muno muli ino ncende.’" 
Acts7:8 Elyo Lesa apeela Abrahamu ulutambi lwakusembulula abana abaume ukuba icishibilo ca cipangano. Kanshi ilyo Isaki afyelwe, Abrahamu amusembulula pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse. Isaki nao aisa sembulula bamwane ikumi limo na babili, ifikolwe ifyalumbuka." 
Acts7:9 “Nomba ifi ifikolwe ifyalumbuka fyafimbila Yosefu. Fyamushitisha, bamusenda mu busha ku Egupto. Lelo Lesa tamulekeleshe." 
Acts7:10 Alamwafwilisha mu macushi yakwe yonse. Amupeela amano ayalengele nokuti Falao imfumu ya mu Egupto imuposeko amano. Kabili Falao acita Yosefu umulashi mu Egupto. Amucita na kangalila wa fyuma fya kwisano. 
Acts7:11 Elyo kwaisa pona icipowe mu calo conse ca Egupto na mu Kenani, mwaba nokucula nganshi. Ifikolwe fyesu tafyakwete cakulya." 
Acts7:12 Ilyo Yakobo aumfwa ukuti mu Egupto mwena muli ifyakulya, atumako bamwane ifikolwe fyesu pa lwendo lwakubalilapo." 
Acts7:13 Pa lwendo lwabubili, Yosefu aisokolola kuli bamunyina, na Falao nao aishiba ulupwa lwakwa Yosefu." 
Acts7:14 Elyo Yosefu alaisha amashiwi kuli wishi Yakobo, ukuti ese ku Egupto pamo pene na ba lupwa lwakwe bonse. Bonse pamo bali amakumi cine lubali na basano." 
Acts7:15 Awe Yakobo aya ku Egupto. Mu Egupto mwine emo afwila. Emwafwila ne fikolwe fyesu. 
Acts7:16 Ifitumbi fyabo balefibwesesha ku Shekemu. Balefishiika mu nindi Abrahamu ashitile ne ndalama kuli bamwana Hamori. 
Acts7:17 “Awe inshita yasuka yapalama iyakufikilisha icilayo Lesa alaile Abrahamu. Abantu besu basanda, bafula nganshi mu Egupto." 
Acts7:18 Elyo paisa imfumu imbi iyishaishibe Yosefu, eyalateeka mu Egupto." 
Acts7:19 Iyi mfumu yacenjelela abantu besu, yalacusha ne fikolwe fyesu. Yalabapatikisha ukuposa utwana twabo utunya panse, pakuti tulefwa." 
Acts7:20 Ni mu nshita ine iyo elyo Mose afyelwe. Ali umwana uwayemba nganshi. Abafyashi bakwe bamulela kumwabo pa myeshi itatu. 
Acts7:21 Nomba ilyo baya musha kunse, mwana Farao umukashana amubuula alamulela kwati mwana wakwe." 
Acts7:22 Mose bamusambilisha acenjela nganshi mu masambililo yonse aya bena Egupto. Awe alumbuka nganshi mufyo alelanda na mufyo alecita. 
Acts7:23 “Mose cilya afika imyaka amakumi yane iyakufyalwa, alafwaya ukupempula bamunyina, abena Israeli." 
Acts7:24 Amonako uko umwina Egupto alecusha umwina Israeli umo. Awe apokololako umwina Israeli, aipaya umwina Egupto." 
Acts7:25 Mose alatontonkanya ukuti abena Israeli kuti bailuka, baishiba nokuti ni Lesa eumutumine pakuti abalubule. Nomba tabailwike na kalya." 
Acts7:26 Ubushiku bwakonkapo Mose asanga abena Israeli babili balelwa. Aesha ukubalamununa. Alabeba ati, ‘Mwe bantu mwe, ala muli bamunyina, cinshi mulelwila?’" 
Acts7:27 Nomba uwaleuma umunankwe atamfula Mose. Amweba ati, ‘Bushe nani akucitile imfumu na kaputula wa milandu yesu?" 
Acts7:28 Bushe ulefwaya ukunjipaya nga filya mailo waipeye umwina Egupto?’ 
Acts7:29 Cilya Mose aumfwa ifi, afulumuka mu Egupto, aya ikala mu calo ca Midiani. Ilyo ali muli ici calo afyala na bana babili abaume." 
Acts7:30 “Patile cilya papita imyaka amakumi yane, malaika amonekela Mose mu matololo mupepi no lupili lwa Sinai. Amumonekela mu cimpusa cilebilima no lubingu lwa mulilo." 
Acts7:31 Pakumona ifi Mose camupesha amano. Awe ayako alefwaya ukumwensekesha. Lelo aumfwa ishiwi lya Mfumu aliti," 
Acts7:32 ‘Nine Lesa wa fikolwe fyobe. Nine Lesa wakwa Abrahamu, Isaki na Yakobo.’ Awe Mose alatutumafye ku mwenso, atiina no kuloleshako." 
Acts7:33 Elyo Imfumu yamweba aiti, ‘Fuula insapato shobe. Pantu incende wimininepo ni ncende yamushilo." 
Acts7:34 Ninjimwena ne mwine ifyo abantu bandi balecula nganshi mu Egupto. Niŋumfwa nefyo balelilishika. Eico ninjika kukubalubula. Kanshi isa nkutume ku Egupto.’ 
Acts7:35 “Ni Mose umo wine uo abena Israeli bakeene, ilyo basosele abati, ‘Bushe nani akucitile imfumu na kaputula wa milandu yesu?’ Eo Lesa atumine kukubateeka no kubalubula. Malaika uwamumonekele mu cimpusa icalebilima ewalemwafwako." 
Acts7:36 Mose asuka abafumya mu Egupto. Acitile ifinjelengwe ne fishibilo ifingi mu Egupto, pali Bemba Wakashika, elyo na mu matololo pa myaka amakumi yane." 
Acts7:37 Ni uyu wine Mose ewaebele abena Israeli ati, ‘Lesa akamwimisha umo mu mushobo wenu uukaba kasesema nga ine.’" 
Acts7:38 Ali pamo ne cilonganino ca bena Israeli mu matololo. Ni Mose eo malaika alandile nankwe pa lupili lwa Sinai, ninshi ali pamo ne fikolwe fyesu. Elyo apokelele na mashiwi yamweo ayo ali nokutweba." 
Acts7:39 “Lelo ifikolwe fyesu tafyalefwaya ukumumfwila. Fyamusangukila, na mu mitima yafiko fyalafwaya ukubwelelamo ku Egupto." 
Acts7:40 Kanshi epakweba Aroni afiti, ‘Tupangile imilungu yakuti iletutangilila, pantu tatwishibe icaponena ulya Mose uwatutungulula ukufuma mu Egupto.’" 
Acts7:41 Awe kanshi epakupanga icilubi icapala iciponti ca ŋombe. Balacituula na malambo. Basefya ne nsansa icintufye ico abene bapangile ne minwe yabo. 
Acts7:42 Lesa nao abalukila, abasuulako. Abaleka nokuti balepepa ifita fya mu mulu nga mulya calembelwa mu citabo ca bakasesema ukuti, “‘Imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, ilyo mwali mu matololo pa myaka amakumi yane (40), imwe tamwalentuula amalambo ne mituulo iyoo." 
Acts7:43 Nimwe mwalesenda itenti lya mulungu Moleki, elyo ne cilubi ca lutanda lwa mulungu Refani. Ifilubi mwapangile pakuti mulefipepa. Kanshi na ine nkamutamfisha ukutali, ukucila na Babiloni.’" 
Acts7:44 “Ilyo bali mu matololo ifikolwe fyesu fyali ne Tenti lyakwa Lesa ilyakulanga ukuti Lesa ali pakati kabo. Lyapangilwe mu musango Lesa alangilemo Mose ukulipanga, kabili ukulinganafye nefyo Lesa amulangile." 
Acts7:45 Ifikolwe fyesu fyaleshilana Itenti lyakwa Lesa umukonkanina inkulo. Fyalelisenda no kulingisha mu calo bapokolwele ku mishobo imbi, ninshi fili na Yoshua. Ni Lesa ewalefulumuna iyi mishobo ilyo ifikolwe fyesu fyaleisa. Itenti lyakwa Lesa epakwikala muli cilya calo mpaka na ku nshita yakwa Davidi." 
Acts7:46 Lesa alitemenwe Davidi. Davidi epakulomba Lesa ukuti akuulile Lesa wakwa Yakobo umwakwikala. 
Acts7:47 Lelo ni Solomoni ewakuulile Lesa iŋanda. 
Acts7:48 “Lelo Lesa Mukulu tekala mu mayanda yakuulwa na bantu. Efyo na kasesema alanda ati," 
Acts7:49 “‘Lesa atila ati, Umulu e cipuna candi icabufumu, icalo naco epo ine nanyanta amakasa yandi. Nga ni ŋanda nshi mwingankuulila? Nangu ni pa ncende nshi ningatuushisha?" 
Acts7:50 Bushe teine ne mwine napanga ifi fyonse?’ 
Acts7:51 “Mwe bantu bakosa imitwe mwe! Mwaumalala imitima no kukanaumfwa nga Benafyalo. Mwabafye nge fikolwe fyenu. Imwe lyonse mukaana ukumfwila Mupashi Wamushilo! 
Acts7:52 Bushe palibapo kasesema uo ifikolwe fyenu fishacushishe? Ifikolwe fyenu fyaleipaya inkombe shakwa Lesa ishalesobela ukwisa kwa Mubomfi uwapetamina Lesa. Nomba imwe mwamuposa ku balwani, mwamwipaya." 
Acts7:53 Nimwe mwapokelele Amafunde yakwa Mose, ayo bamalaika bamuletele. Nomba kabili mwakaana no kulayakonka!”" 
Acts7:54 Ilyo bashicilye baumfwa ifyo Stefano alanda, bafulwa icibi, balasenganya na meno." 
Acts7:55 Nomba Stefano aisulamo na Mupashi Wamushilo. Elyo apunamina ku mulu, amona ubucindami bwakwa Lesa na Yesu eminine ku kulyo kwakwa Lesa." 
Acts7:56 Stefano elyo asosa ati; “Namona umulu naucenama, elyo no Mwana wa muntu eminine lubali lwa ku kulyo kwakwa Lesa!”" 
Acts7:57 Awe bashicilye balasowesha, bacilika na matwi. Elyo bonse capamo bamufukukila." 
Acts7:58 Balamutintanya, bamufumisha na kunse ya musumba. Elyo balamulasa na mabwe. Abasangilwepo babuula insalu shabo basha pa mulumendo, ishina lyakwe Saulo." 
Acts7:59 Ilyo balemulasa amabwe, Stefano aikalilefye ukulomba Lesa aleti, “We Mfumu Yesu, pokelela umweo wandi!”" 
Acts7:60 Elyo afukama panshi apunda ati, “We Mfumu wingababelela uluse pali ubu bubi bacita!” Ati asose ifi, awa afwa no kufwa." 
Acts8:1 Saulo wena amwene ukuti balungika pakwipaya Stefano. Pali ubo bwine bushiku Abayuda batampileko ukulacusha ulukuta mu Yerusalemu. Abalukuta bonse epakusalanganina mu calo ca Yudeya na mu ca Samaria. Abashelefye mu musumba basolefye beka. 
Acts8:2 Awe abantu bamo abapetamina Lesa baya shiika Stefano, kabili bamuloosha nganshi." 
Acts8:3 Lelo Saulo wena aswangana nganshi mukulofya ulukuta lonse. Alaingila muli cila ŋanda alekulululamo abasumina abaume na banakashi, alebaposa na mu cifungo." 
Acts8:4 Abasumina abasalangene, balebila Imbila Nsuma konse uko balepita." 
Acts8:5 Filipo ayile ku musumba umo uwa mu Samaria. Alabila Kristu ku bantu. 
Acts8:6 Amabumba yalakutikisha pakumfwa bwino ifyo Filipo alefunda, elyo no kumona ifishibilo ifyakupapa alecita." 
Acts8:7 Pantu imipashi yakowela yalefuma mu bantu abengi ilepunda. Elyo ifite ne filema ifingi nafyo fyalepola. 
Acts8:8 Awe na mu musumba mwabafye insansa sheka sheka. 
Acts8:9 Mu musumba uyo uwa mu Samaria mwalimo umuntu umo ishina lyakwe ni Simoni. Pa nshita imo alecita ifyamalele mu musumba, alepelenganya na bena Samaria amano. Aleitunga ukuti te muntu wafyefye." 
Acts8:10 Abantu bonse abakalamba na baice balekutikisha nganshi kufyo alesosa. Baleti, “Uyu muntu e maka yakwa Lesa ayo beta Amaka Yakalamba!”" 
Acts8:11 Balemukutikisha nganshi, pantu pa nshitafye itali Simoni alebapelenganya amano ku malele yakwe." 
Acts8:12 Nomba ilyo basumina ifyo Filipo alebila Mbila Nsuma ya Bufumu bwakwa Lesa ne yakwa Yesu Kristu, awe abaume na banakashi bonse babatishiwa." 
Acts8:13 Na Simone nao wine asuka asumina. Ilyo abatishiwa, lyonse aleenda na Filipo. Alesunguka nganshi pakumona ifishibilo ifyakupapa ne finjelengwe fyalecitika." 
Acts8:14 Ilyo abasole mu Yerusalemu baumfwa ukuti abena Samaria nabasekelela amashiwi yakwa Lesa, batumako Petelo na Yoani." 
Acts8:15 Cilya bafikako, Petelo na Yoani epakupepelela abasumina pakuti bapoke Mupashi Wamushilo." 
Acts8:16 Pantu Mupashi Wamushilo tali talaisa pali bene. Babatishiwefye mwishina lya Mfumu Yesu. 
Acts8:17 Elyo Petelo na Yoani babatambalikilapo amaboko, bapokelela na Mupashi Wamushilo." 
Acts8:18 Simoni cilya amona ukuti bapoka Mupashi Wamushilo ico abasole babatambalikilapo amaboko, atwalako indalama kuli Petelo na Yoani." 
Acts8:19 Abeba ati, “Mpeeleniko na ine aya maka. Pakuti na ine onse uo natambalikilapo amaboko alepoka Mupashi Wamushilo.”" 
Acts8:20 Lelo Petelo amwasuka ati, “Kabiye uko ukafwa ne ndalama shobe! Iwe uletontonkanya ukuti, kuti washita ubupe bwakwa Lesa ne ndalama!" 
Acts8:21 Taulingile nelyo panono ukulabomba na ifwe. Pantu uli no mutima uwafulungana pa cinso cakwa Lesa. 
Acts8:22 Kanshi lapila pali iyi mitontonkanishishe yobe ibi. Upapate ku Mfumu. Uleke ikubeleleko uluse pakukwata imitontonkanishishe ya uyu musango mu mutima obe. 
Acts8:23 Pantu namona ukuti umutima obe waisulamo ubukali, kanshi uli musha wabubifi!”" 
Acts8:24 Simoni epakwasuka ati, “Nimwe mpapatileniko ku Mfumu. Pakuti pali ifyo mwasosa pekancitikila nelyo cimo.”" 
Acts8:25 Petelo na Yoani balafunda amashiwi yakwa Lesa baleshimika nokuti bena ni bakambone. Elyo babwelelamo ku Yerusalemu. Ilyo baleya, baya balebila Imbila Nsuma mu mishi iyingi iya bena Samaria." 
Acts8:26 Malaika wa Mfumu aebele Filipo ati, “Ima, kabiye ku kapinda ka ku kulyo no musebo wa matololo, uwafuma ku Yerusalemu waya ku Gasa.”" 
Acts8:27 Awe aima alaya. Kanshi umwina Etiopia mutungwi nao alebwelelamo kumwabo. Uyu muntu ali cilolo uwacindama, uwaleyangalila ifyuma fyonse ifyakwa namfumu, Kandake wa bena Etiopia. Aishile ku Yerusalemu kukupepa." 
Acts8:28 Nomba alebwelamo kumwabo, naikala mwiceleta lyakwe. Alebelenga ne fyalemba kasesema Esaya." 
Acts8:29 Mupashi aeba Filipo ati, “Kabiye mupepi ne celeta lilya.”" 
Acts8:30 Awe Filipo abutukilako. Aumfwa nokuti alebelenga ifyalemba kasesema Esaya. Elyo Filipo amwipusha ati, “Bushe uletesha ifyo ulebelenga?”" 
Acts8:31 Nao ayasuka ati, “Nga kuti natesha shani? Kano pali uwakunondolwelako.” Elyo aeba Filipo ukuti anine, bekale nankwe mwiceleta." 
Acts8:32 Kanshi Amalembo Yamushilo ayo alebelenga ni aya, “Aba nge mpaanga iyo baletwala kukwipaya. Aba nge mpaanga iyikala tondolo ilyo baleibeya amasako. Nao tewakulanda nelyo cimo." 
Acts8:33 Balemusaalula, lelo tapali na wakumwebelako. Nga nani engalanda pa bana bakwe? Pantu abantu bamulofya ukufuma mu calo ca bamweo.”" 
Acts8:34 Elyo mutungwi aeba Filipo ati, “Njebako, bushe nani uo kasesema alelandapo? Bushe mwine wine nangu ni umbi alelandapo?”" 
Acts8:35 Elyo Filipo atampa ukulanda. Atampilafye ku Malembo Yamushilo yene acilabelenga. Elyo amulondolwelako na pa Mbila Nsuma yakwa Yesu. 
Acts8:36 Nomba ilyo baleya mu musebo, basuka bafika na pali amenshi. Cilolo ati, “Amenshi aya, cinshi cingandesha ukubatishiwa?”" 
Acts8:37 [Filipo amweba ati, “Kuti nakubatisha, kumfwa nga wasumina no mutima obe onse.” Cilolo ayasuka ati, “Ninsumina ukuti Yesu Kristu ni Mwana Lesa.”]" 
Acts8:38 Elyo mutungwi aeba ukuti iceleta liminine. Awe bonse babili, Filipo na mutungwi wine baya mu menshi. Elyo Filipo amubatisha." 
Acts8:39 Cilya bafuma mu menshi na Mupashi wa Mfumu asenda Filipo. Cilolo tatalile amumona nakabili. Awe akonkanyapo ulwendo lwakwe nasansamuka nganshi. 
Acts8:40 Filipo wena aisangafye ali mu Asoti. Elyo aya alepitana mu mishi alebila Imbila Nsuma, asuka afika na ku Kesalia." 
Acts9:1 Saulo akonkenyepofye ukululunkana nganshi mukufwaya ukwipaya abasambi. Awe aya kuli Shimapepo mukalamba. 
Acts9:2 Aya lomba amakalata yakutwala ku masinagoga mu Damasiko. Pakuti nga asangako abaume nangu abanakashi abakonka inshila Yesu alanga, akabekate no kubaleta ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts9:3 Kanshi ilyo aleya ku Damasiko, cilyafye apalama ku musumba, awe apopene ulubuuto ukufuma ku mulu lwasanika ukushinguluka apo ali." 
Acts9:4 Awe Saulo awa panshi. Aumfwa ne shiwi lilemweba aliti, “Saulo, Saulo ee, cinshi ico ulencushisha?”" 
Acts9:5 Saulo aipusha ati, “Niwe ani we Mfumu?” Ishiwi nalyo lyayasuka aliti, “Nine Yesu, nine ulecusha." 
Acts9:6 Nomba ima, kabiye mu musumba. Baleya kweba ifyo uli nokucita.”" 
Acts9:7 Abantu bali na Saulo pa lwendo, bena baimininafye tondolo. Ishiwi lyena balyumfwa, lelo tabamwene muntu nelyo umo." 
Acts9:8 Saulo aima panshi. Ati ashibatule amenso, afilwa ukumona nelyo cimo. Awe bamutungululafye mu Damasiko nabamwikata ku minwe." 
Acts9:9 Pa nshiku shitatu tewakulolesha nakalya. Kabili talelya nangu ukunwa kantu. 
Acts9:10 Mu Damasiko mwaleikala umusambi umo, ishina lyakwe ni Anania. Imfumu yamweba mu cimonwa aiti, “Anania!” Nao ayasuka ati, “Epo ndi we Mfumu.”" 
Acts9:11 Imfumu yamweba aiti, “Ima, uye no musebo batila Uwaololoka. Uye ku ŋanda yakwa Yuda. Uye fwayamo umuntu umo umwina Taso, ishina lyakwe ni Saulo. Nomba alepepa." 
Acts9:12 Mu cimonwa, wena namona umuntu ishina lyakwe ni Anania, aisa nomo ali. Amutambalikilapo amaboko pakuti alelolesha nakabili.”" 
Acts9:13 Anania ayasuka ati, “We Mfumu, abantu abengi balinshimikilako pali uyu muntu. Balinshimikilako ne fintu ifingi ifibi nganshi uyu muntu acita ku bamushilo bobe mu Yerusalemu." 
Acts9:14 Kanshi na kuno kwine eshile ku maka ya bashimapepo bacindami, kukwikata bonse ababomfya ishina lyobe mukupepa.”" 
Acts9:15 Imfumu yamweba aiti, “Ala akuyafye, pantu ine uyu muntu nimusala ukuba umubomfi wandi. Akalenga Abenafyalo ne mfumu sha Benafyalo, na bantu ba mu Israeli bene ukuti banjishibe." 
Acts9:16 Kabili nine wine ne mwine nkamulanga ifyo ali nokucula pa mulandu wa ine.” 
Acts9:17 Anania epakwima, aya ingila na mu ŋanda. Atambalikila amaboko pali Saulo. Asosa ati, “Munyinane Saulo, Imfumu Yesu iyakumonekele mu nshila ilyo waleisa kuno, naintuma kuli iwe pakuti ulelolesha nakabili, elyo wisulemo na Mupashi Wamushilo.”" 
Acts9:18 Apopene mu menso yakwa Saulo mwalukuta ifintu ifyaba nga mamba. Awe atampa no kulalolesha nakabili. Elyo aima, no kubatishiwa abatishiwa." 
Acts9:19 Ati alye icakulya, awe na maka yabwela. Elyo Saulo aikele inshiku shimo shimo na basambi mu Damasiko." 
Acts9:20 Apopene atampa no kulashimikila mu masinagoga ukuti Yesu ni Mwana Lesa. 
Acts9:21 Awe bonse abaleteshako balapapa. Balaipushanya abati, “Bushe uyu muntu tewalecusha nganshi abantu basumina muli Yesu mu Yerusalemu? Na kuno kwine aisa, bushe tekukwikata aba bantu no kubatwala kuli bashimapepo bacindami?”" 
Acts9:22 Lelo Saulo akalabana nganshi mukufunda. Alapelenganya Abayuda ba mu Damasiko amano, ico alabashinina ukuti Yesu e Kristu wine." 
Acts9:23 Cilya papita inshiku ishingi, Abayuda balapanga ukwipaya Saulo." 
Acts9:24 Lelo Saulo aumfwako ifyo balemupangila. Akasuba no bushiku balalonda impongolo sha musumba pakuti bamwipaye. 
Acts9:25 Nomba abasambi bakwa Saulo ubushiku bamubuula, bamubika mu museke. Elyo bamupisha mu cipunda ce linga lya musumba. Bamwishisha panshi." 
Acts9:26 Saulo afikile ku Yerusalemu elyo alefwaya ukuti aleikumika ku basambi. Lelo balamutiina bonse, pantu baletwishika nga cine cine musambi." 
Acts9:27 Elyo Banaba amusenda, amutwala na ku basole. Alabashimikilako nefyo Saulo ilyo ali pa lwendo, amwene Imfumu, nefyo Imfumu yalandile nankwe. Abashimikilako nefyo Saulo alefunda mu Damasiko pali Yesu ukwabula umwenso." 
Acts9:28 Elyo Saulo alaendauka nabo, alepitana mu Yerusalemu monse, alefunda na pa Mfumu Yesu ukwabula umwenso." 
Acts9:29 Kabili alalanda na Bayuda abalanda Icigiriki no kupaashanya nabo. Lelo bena balafwaya ukumwipaya. 
Acts9:30 Cilya ababwananyina baishiba ifi, bamusenda, bamutwala ku Kesalia. Elyo ukufuma kulya bamutuma ku Taso." 
Acts9:31 Kanshi ulukuta lonse mu Yudeya, mu Galile, na mu Samaria, elyo lwaikala ku matwi tondolo. Elyo ku bwafwilisho bwakwa Mupashi Wamushilo, ulukuta lwakulilako, kabili lwakosa na mukupetamina Imfumu." 
Acts9:32 Petelo elyo alepitanafye mpanga yonse ku basumina. Asuka pa nshita imo aya pempula na bamushilo abaleikala mu Luda. 
Acts9:33 Mu Luda emo asanga umuntu umo, icite, ishina lyakwe ni Enea. Uyu muntu pa myaka cine konse konse tatalile afuma pa musengele." 
Acts9:34 Petelo amweba ati, “Enea, Yesu Kristu akundapa. Ima wansule umusengele obe.” Awe apopene Enea aima no kwima." 
Acts9:35 Abantu bonse abaleikala mu Luda na mu Sharoni cilya bamumona, basumina mu Mfumu." 
Acts9:36 Mu Yopa mwali umusambi umo umwanakashi, ishina lyakwe ni Tabita mu Cigiriki ni Doka. Lyonse alecita ifisuma, alekumbusuka na balanda." 
Acts9:37 Mu nshiku shine isho, alwala no kufwa afwa. Elyo basamba icitumbi cakwe, bacibika na mu muputule umo uwa pamulu." 
Acts9:38 Luda ni mupepi na Yopa. Kanshi abasambi baumfwa ukuti Petelo ali mu Luda. Batumako abantu babili abakumweba ukuti, “Wendeshe, wise kuno mwesu.”" 
Acts9:39 Petelo aima aya nabo. Cilya afika, bamusenda, bamutwala na ku muputule wa pamulu. Bamukamfwilwa bonse bamushinguluka balelila. Balamulanga imingila ne nsalu Doka alebila ilyo acili umumi." 
Acts9:40 Elyo Petelo abafumya mu muputule. Afukama, alapepa. Elyo apilibukila ku citumbi, asosa ati, “Tabita buuka!” Nao ashibatula amenso. Ilyo amona Petelo, aikala nokwikala." 
Acts9:41 Petelo amwikata pa kuboko, amwafwako aiminina. Elyo aita abamushilo na bamukamfwilwa abalanga na Tabita umumi." 
Acts9:42 Awe ici cintu caishibikwafye mu Yopa monse, na bantu abengi epakusumina mu Mfumu." 
Acts9:43 Petelo aikala mu Yopa inshikufye ishingi. Alaikala na kanuka wampapa umo, ishina lyakwe Simoni." 
Acts10:1 Mu musumba wa Kesalia mwalimo umuntu umo ishina lyakwe ni Konelio. Ali umukalamba wa fita umwanda umo. Iyi mpuka ya fita, baleita ukuti impuka ya bena Itali." 
Acts10:2 Ali umuntu uwapetamina Lesa. Kabili umwine wine no lupwa lwakwe lonse balikwatile Lesa akatiina. Aleyafwilisha nganshi Abayuda abalanda. Kabili lyonse alebikapofye ukupepa Lesa. 
Acts10:3 Ubushiku bumo cilya akasuba kasendama lwa pa nshita ya 15:00, amona icimonwa. Muli ici cimonwa amonafye bwino bwino uko malaika wakwa Lesa aingila umo ali. Malaika amweba ati, “Konelio!”" 
Acts10:4 Konelio aikatwa no mwenso, amulolekesha, amwipusha ati, “Ni shani we Mfumu?” Malaika amwasuka ati, “Amapepo yobe nefyo ukumbusuka abalanda filasekesha Lesa. Eico nao alefwaya ukukwasuka." 
Acts10:5 Kanshi nomba tuma abantu bamo ku Yopa, baye ita umuntu umo ishina lyakwe ni Simoni, kabili bamwita nokuti Petelo!" 
Acts10:6 Aleikala kwa Simoni kanuka wampapa. Iŋanda yakwe yaba mupepi na bemba.” 
Acts10:7 Cilya malaika apwa ukulanda nankwe, afumapo aya. Konelio elyo aitapo ababomfi bakwe babili ne cita cimo icapetamina Lesa, icali pa fita ifyalemulinda." 
Acts10:8 Abashimikilako fyonse ifimoneke, elyo abatuma ku Yopa." 
Acts10:9 Ubushiku ubwakonkelepo cilyafye akasuba kalafika pakati ka mutwe pa nshita ya 12:00, abantu Konelio atumine, nabo bafika mupepi na Yopa. Petelo nao anina pa mulu wa ŋanda kukupepa." 
Acts10:10 Awe insala yamwikata, alafwaya icakulya. Ilyo balepekanya icakulya, Petelo aisanga mu cimonwa." 
Acts10:11 Amona umulu waisuka. Amona ne cintu cimo icapala icisalu icikalamba, balecishisha panshi ku fisempe fine." 
Acts10:12 Mukati muli inama sha misango ne misango, ne fikulaika ne fyuni." 
Acts10:13 Elyo ishiwi lyamweba aliti, “Petelo, ima, ipaya, ulye!”" 
Acts10:14 Lelo Petelo ayasuka ati, “Cakaana we Mfumu! Ine nshatala ndya icishasangululwa nangu icakowela.”" 
Acts10:15 Ishiwi lyabwekeshapo umuku wabubili aliti, “Ifyo Lesa asangulula, iwe wilafita auti fyakowela.”" 
Acts10:16 Awe ici cintu cabwekeshapo imiku itatu. Elyo apopene icisalu bacisenda mu mulu nakabili. 
Acts10:17 Petelo elyo alatontonkanya umulolele icimonwa amona. Mu nshita ine iyo, abantu Konelio atumine ninshi nabasanga ukwabelele iŋanda yakwa Simoni. Awe baiminina pa mwinshi." 
Acts10:18 Balaipusha abati, “Bushe muli iyi ŋanda, emwikala Simoni uo batila Petelo?”" 
Acts10:19 Ilyo Petelo acili aletontonkanya pa cimonwa, Mupashi amweba ati, “Ala abantu batatu balekufwaya." 
Acts10:20 Ale ika, muye nabo wishingashinga, pantu nine mbatumine.”" 
Acts10:21 Awe Petelo aika. Elyo abeba ati, “Ala nine wine uo mulefwaya. Cinshi mwaishila?”" 
Acts10:22 Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Ni Konelio umukalamba wa fita umwanda umo eututumine. Muntu umusuma kabili uwapetamina Lesa, kabili no mushobo onse uwa Bayuda walimucindika nganshi. Ni malaika wamushilo umo ewamwebele ukuti akwite wise kumwakwe, pakuti omfwe ifyo uli nokumweba.”" 
Acts10:23 Awe Petelo aingisha aba bantu mu ŋanda, abalanga no kwakusendama. Bwaisaca aima, aya nabo. Ababwananyina bamo aba mu Yopa nabo bakonka." 
Acts10:24 Ubushiku bwakonkapo elyo bafika mu Kesalia. Konelio wena ninshi alemulolela, naitako ba lupwa lwakwe na batemwikwa bakwe." 
Acts10:25 Kanshi cilya Petelo afika kwa Konelio, Konelio aisa fuma kukumusengela. Amufukamina amuposha." 
Acts10:26 Lelo Petelo, amwimya. Amweba ati, “Iminina, ala na ine ndi muntufye.”" 
Acts10:27 Petelo aingila mu ŋanda ninshi balelanda na Konelio. Asangamo na bantu abengi nabalongana. 
Acts10:28 Alabeba ati, “Imwe mwalishibafye bwino ukuti amafunde ya Bayuda yalilesha Umuyuda ukupempula nangu ukwikala pamo na Benafyalo. Lelo Lesa alinanga ukuti nshili nakweba nelyo umo ukuti uyu muntu untu ashasangululwa nangu wakowela." 
Acts10:29 Eico ilyo unjitile, njishilefye ukwabula ukukaana. Lelo ndefwayafye ukwishiba ico unjitile.”" 
Acts10:30 Konelio ayasuka ati, “Papita inshiku shitatu, ilyo nalepepa nga pa nshita ino ine mu ŋanda mumwandi cilya akasuba kasendama pa nshita ya 15:00. Awe apopene umuntu uwafwele insalu ishabuuta aisa iminina pa ntanshi yandi." 
Acts10:31 Asosa ati, ‘Konelio, Lesa naumfwa amapepo yobe, kabili namona nefyo ukumbusuka abalanda." 
Acts10:32 Kanshi tuma ku Yopa abakuyaita Simoni uo batila Petelo. Ekala kwa Simoni kanuka wampapa. Iŋanda yakwe yaba mupepi na bemba.’ 
Acts10:33 Kanshi na ine apopene epakutuma abakukwita, elyo na iwe wacitafye bwino, waisa. Bonse tuli muno pa cinso cakwa Lesa, tulepembelafye ukumfwa ifyo Imfumu ikwebele ukutweba.”" 
Acts10:34 Elyo Petelo alabeba ati, “Nomba nashininkisha ukuti, cine cine Lesa taba na kapatulula." 
Acts10:35 Lelo asekelafye umuntu onse uwa mu mushobo onse kumfwa nga akwatila Lesa akatiina kabili alecita nefyo afwaya. 
Acts10:36 Imwe mwalishiba amashiwi Lesa atumine abena Israeli. Aya mashiwi yakutila, kuti mwaba no mutende ku maka yakwa Yesu Kristu, Imfumu ya bantu bonse." 
Acts10:37 Imwe namwishiba ifyacitika mu Yudeya monse, ukutampafye mu Galile, ukufumafye lilya Yoani alebila palwa kubatishiwa." 
Acts10:38 Mwalishiba nefyo Lesa afumfumwine Mupashi Wamushilo na maka yakwe pali Yesu wa ku Nasaleti. Elyo nao alapitana konse alecita ifintu ifisuma, aleundapa na bonse abalecushiwa kuli Ciwa, pantu Lesa ali nankwe." 
Acts10:39 Ifwe tuli bakambone muli fyonse ifyo Yesu acitile mu Yerusalemu na mu calofye conse ica Bayuda. Basukile bamwipaya mukumutanika pa musalaba. 
Acts10:40 Lelo pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu, Lesa amubusha ku bafwa, alenga nokuti abantu bamumone." 
Acts10:41 Kwena te ku bantu bonse iyoo, lelo ni kuli ifwe fwebo Lesa asala ukuba bakambone. Ifwe twalilya no kunwa nankwe panuma yakubuuka ku bafwa." 
Acts10:42 Atukonkomeshe no kulashimikila abantu, elyo no kulabeba ukuti icine cine Yesu eo Lesa asonta ukuba kapingula wa milandu ya bomi na bafwa." 
Acts10:43 Kanshi eo bakasesema bonse bapeelapo bukambone abati, ‘Bonse abamusumina, Lesa akababelela uluse ku fyabubifi fyabo ku maka yakwa Yesu.’ ”" 
Acts10:44 Ilyo Petelo acili alesosa aya mashiwi, awe na Mupashi Wamushilo aisa pali bonse abaleumfwako." 
Acts10:45 Abayuda abasumina abaishile na Petelo ukufuma ku Yopa, balapapafye pali ico Lesa apeela Abenafyalo ubupe bwakwa Mupashi Wamushilo." 
Acts10:46 Baumfwa noko balelanda indimi ishalekana lekana, balelumbanya na Lesa. Elyo Petelo asosa ati," 
Acts10:47 “Nga nani engakaanya aba bantu ukubatishiwa ku menshi. Bapokelela Mupashi Wamushilo nga filya fine na ifwe twapokelele.” 
Acts10:48 Petelo epakubeba ukuti babatishiwe mwishina lyakwa Yesu Kristu. Elyo bamulomba ukuti ekale nabo inshiku shimo shimo. 
Acts11:1 Abasole na babwananyina bonse mu Yudeya baumfwile ukuti Abenafyalo nabo nabapokelela ishiwi lyakwa Lesa. 
Acts11:2 Kanshi ilyo Petelo abwelela ku Yerusalemu, abasumina Abayuda balamumanya." 
Acts11:3 Balamweba ati, “Waile fikilila ku bantu abashasembululwa, kabili no kulya walalya nabo!”" 
Acts11:4 Kanshi Petelo epakutampa, alabalondolwela bwino bwino fyonse ifyo cali." 
Acts11:5 Ati, “Ine nali mu musumba wa Yopa, ndepepa, awe naisanga mu cimonwa. Elyo namona icintu cimo icapala icisalu icikalamba, balecishisha panshi ukufuma mu mulu ku fisempe fine. Awe cafika mupepi napo ndi." 
Acts11:6 Awe nati ndolekeshe mukati, namonamo inama sha misango ne misango, ne fikulaika ne fyuni." 
Acts11:7 Elyo natesha ishiwi lyanjeba aliti, ‘Petelo, ima, ipaya, ulye.’" 
Acts11:8 Lelo ine nayasuka nati ‘Awe, cakaana we Mfumu. Ine nshatala ndya icishasangululwa nangu icakowela.’" 
Acts11:9 Nakabili ishiwi lyabwekeshepo ukufuma mu mulu aliti, ‘Ifyo Lesa asangulula, iwe wilafita auti fyakowela.’" 
Acts11:10 Ici cintu cabwekeshepo imiku itatu. Elyo icisalu casendwa mu mulu. 
Acts11:11 Pa nshita ine iyo, abantu batatu abo batumine ukufuma ku Kesalia ukwisa kuli ine, bafika. Baiminina na pa mwinshi wa ŋanda naleikalamo." 
Acts11:12 Elyo Mupashi anjeba ukuya nabo ukwabula ukushingashinga. Aba bamunyinefwe mutanda twaile nabo ku Kesalia. Awe twaya ingila na mu ŋanda mwa Konelio. 
Acts11:13 Elyo Konelio alatushimikila ifyo amwene malaika naiminina mu ŋanda mumwakwe. Uyu malaika amweba ati, ‘Tuma umuntu ku Yopa uwakuti aye ita Simoni uo batila Petelo." 
Acts11:14 Uyu muntu eukesa kweba amashiwi yakuti iwe no lupwa lobe mukamone ukupusuka.’ 
Acts11:15 Kutifye cilya natampa ukulanda, awe Mupashi Wamushilo aisa pali bena nga filya fine cali kuli ifwe pakutampa." 
Acts11:16 Elyo naibukisha nefyo Imfumu yasosele aiti, ‘Yoani alebatisha ku menshi, lelo imwe mukalabatishiwa kuli Mupashi Wamushilo.’" 
Acts11:17 Kanshi apopene Lesa apeela Abenafyalo ubupe bumo bwine ubo atupeele ilyo twasumine mu Mfumu Yesu Kristu, bushe ine nine ningalesha Lesa?”" 
Acts11:18 Ilyo baumfwa ifi, awe ne mitima yaikala. Balalumbanya na Lesa abati, “Kanshi Lesa naleka na Benafyalo nabo bamone ukulapila no kupilibuka, pakuti bakwate umweo!”" 
Acts11:19 Panuma yakwipaya Stefano, abasumina epakusalangana, ico Abayuda balebacusha nganshi. Basuka bamo bafika na mu calo ca Fonisia na ku cishi ca Saiprasi na ku musumba wa Antioki. Kwena baleshimikilakofye Abayuda beka amashiwi yakwa Yesu." 
Acts11:20 Lelo bamo pa basumina, abafumine ku Saiprasi na ku Kurene, baile ku Antioki balabila Imbila Nsuma ya Mfumu Yesu ku Benafyalo." 
Acts11:21 Imfumu nayo yalabafwako. Awe na bantu abengi basumina, banakila Imfumu." 
Acts11:22 Ili lyashi lyasuka lyaumfwika kwibumba lya ku lukuta lwa ku Yerusalemu. Elyo nabo batumineko Banaba ku Antioki. 
Acts11:23 Ilyo afikileko, cilya amwene ifilangililo fya cikuuku cakwa Lesa, awe alisansamwike. Abakonkomeshe ukwikatilila ku Mfumu mu cisumino ne mitima yabo yonse." 
Acts11:24 Banaba ali umuntu umusuma, uwacisumino kabili uwaisulamo na Mupashi Wamushilo. Awe na bantu abengifye epakunakila Imfumu." 
Acts11:25 Elyo Banaba aya ku Taso kukufwaya Saulo 
Acts11:26 Cilya amusanga, amuleta ku Antioki. Kanshi pa mwaka utuntulu Banaba na Saulo baikele mu lukuta, balefunda na bantu abengi. Kabili ni mu Antioki emo batampile ukulaita abasambi ukuti “Bena Kristu.”" 
Acts11:27 Mu nshita ine iyi ilyo Banaba na Saulo bali mu Antioki elyo bakasesema bamo baishile ku Antioki ukufuma ku Yerusalemu. 
Acts11:28 Elyo umo pali aba bakasesema, ishina lyakwe ni Agabu, aiminina. Elyo ku maka yakwa Mupashi Wamushilo asobela nokuti, “Mu calo conse ca bena Roma mukapona icipowe icabipisha.” Na cine kwaishile pona icipowe ilyo Kilaudio ali kateeka mukalamba mu buteko bwa bena Roma." 
Acts11:29 Elyo abasambi baumfwana ukuti bali nokutuma ifyakwafwako ababwananyina banabo aba mu Yudeya. Abati “Cila muntu ali nokupeela apo akwatile.” 
Acts11:30 Kanshi efintu bacitile. Bapeela Banaba na Saulo indalama ishakutwala ku bakalamba mu Yerusalemu. 
Acts12:1 Muli iyo ine nshita, imfumu Herodi epakutampa ukulacusha bamo aba mu lukuta." 
Acts12:2 Yaipaya Yakobo munyina kwa Yoani, yamuputulako umutwe ku lupanga." 
Acts12:3 Ilyo yamona ukuti ici casansamusha Abayuda, yabikapo no kwikata Petelo. Ici cacitike mu nshikunkulu yakulyamo Imikate Ishatutumuka." 
Acts12:4 Cilya yaikata Petelo yamuposa mu cifungo. Yaeba ne mpuka shine isha fita fine ukulakomboshanya pakumulinda. Herodi alefwaya ukumulubulwisha pa lwalala panuma ye Pasaka, inshikunkulu ya Cakucilila." 
Acts12:5 Ilyo Petelo ali mu cifungo, ulukuta lwena lwabikapofye ukulamupepelako kuli Lesa." 
Acts12:6 Ubushiku bwakutila mailo nga bwaca Herodi ali nokulubulwisha Petelo, ena Petelo alele pakati ka fita fibili, ninshi nabamukaka ne minyololo ibili. Kabili pa mpongolo ya cifungo pali fita fyalelonda." 
Acts12:7 Awe apopene malaika wa Mfumu aisa aiminina apo ali, na mu kamuputule mwabuuta tuutu ku cengelo. Elyo malaika asunka Petelo mu lubafu, amushibusha. Asosa ati, “Ima bwangu!” Awe ne minyololo yali ku maboko yakwe yapona." 
Acts12:8 Elyo malaika amweba ati, “Ale kaka umushipi obe, fwala ne ndyato shobe.” Awe efyo Petelo acita. Kabili malaika amweba ati, “Buula ne cakufimbana cobe, unkonke.”" 
Acts12:9 Petelo amukonka, afuma na mu cifungo. Lelo Petelo taishibe ukuti ifilecita malaika fyacine cine. Wena aletontonkanya ukuti alemona icimonwa." 
Acts12:10 Bapita pa mpuka yapakubala iya fita fyalelonda, bapita na pa yabubili, basuka bafika na pa mpongolo ya cela iyakwingililamo mu musumba. Awe iciibi ca mpongolo caisukila icine ceka, bafuma. Awe bati bendeko ukukonka umusebo umo, apopene malaika aya, asha Petelo." 
Acts12:11 Elyo Petelo ashininkisha icicitike. Asosa ati, “Nomba nashininkisha cine cine. Ni Mfumu eintumine malaika waiko pakuti impusushe ukufuma mu minwe yakwa Herodi na kuli fyonse ifyo umushobo wa Bayuda walesubila ukucita.”" 
Acts12:12 Cilya Petelo ashininkisha ifyo cili, alungama ku ŋanda yakwa Maria, nyina kwa Yoani Mako. Ekwalongene abantu abengi, balepepa." 
Acts12:13 Elyo Petelo akonkonsha ku ciibi. Awe umukashana umo umubomfi ishina lyakwe ni Roda, aisa kukumfwa uulekonkonsha." 
Acts12:14 Cilya aishiba ishiwi lyakwa Petelo, asansamuka nganshi. Abwelelamo ulubilo, ukwabula ukuti esuleko iciibi. Aya eba abantu ati, “Petelo ali panse pa mwinshi.”" 
Acts12:15 Bonse bamwasuka abati, “Ale akusabaila!” Elyo nao abikapofye ati, “Ala, cine cinefye!” Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Kanshi ninshi ni malaika wakwe.”" 
Acts12:16 Petelo wena ninshi abikilepofye ukukonkonsha. Elyo baisulako iciibi. Awe bamumona, cabapesha na mano." 
Acts12:17 Petelo aimya ukuboko pakuti batalale. Elyo alabashimikilako ifyo Imfumu imufumishe mu cifungo. Abeba nokuti, “Bashimikileko Yakobo na babwananyina bonse.” Elyo afumako aya na kumbi." 
Acts12:18 Cilya bwaca, ifita ifyalelinda Petelo fyasakamikwa nganshi. Fyalati, “Nga cinshi cicitike kuli Petelo?”" 
Acts12:19 Herodi wena akonkomesha ukuti bali nokumufwaya. Lelo bafilililwafye ukumusanga. Kanshi epakulubulwisha ifita fyalemulinda, elyo apingula nokuti bafipaye. Kabili Herodi afuma mu Yudeya, aya ikala pa nshita inono mu Kesalia." 
Acts12:20 Herodi tabaleumfwana na bantu ba mu Turi na ba mu Sidoni. Kanshi nabo epakuyako ibumba kukumonana na Herodi. Babalilapo ukusembeleka Blasto no kwikatana nankwe, pantu ewali kangalila wa kwisano. Elyo baya kuli Herodi pakuti bomfwane nao palwa kwikala mu cibote. Pantu icalo cabo calefumya ifyakulya mu calo ca Mfumu Herodi." 
Acts12:21 Pa bushiku bwasontelwe, Herodi afwala insalu shakwe ishabufumu. Aikala na pa cipuna cakwe icabufumu. Elyo alalanda ku bantu." 
Acts12:22 Abantu balasowesha abati, “Walandafye kwati mulungu, taulelanda nga muntunse!”" 
Acts12:23 Apopene malaika wa Mfumu aponesha Herodi ubulwele ico ashali na mucinshi kuli Lesa. Awe imititi yalamulya, asuka afwa." 
Acts12:24 Nomba ishiwi lyakwa Lesa lyene lyaya lilelundulukilakofye. 
Acts12:25 Cilya Banaba na Saulo bapwile umulimo wabo, awe babwelelamo ku Yerusalemu, basenda na Yoani Mako." 
Acts13:1 Bakasesema na bakafundisha abali mu lukuta lwa ku Antioki ni Banaba, na Simeoni uo baleti Cifita, na Lukio wa ku Kurene, na Manaeni cibusa wine wine wa mfumu Herodi, elyo na Saulo." 
Acts13:2 Ubushiku bumo ilyo bali mukupepa Imfumu, balefunga ukulya, Mupashi Wamushilo abeba ati, “Mfumishenipo Banaba na Saulo pakuti balebomba umulimo nabasalila.”" 
Acts13:3 Panuma yakuleka ukufunga ukulya no kupepa, epakubatambalikilapo amaboko, elyo babatuma." 
Acts13:4 Atile cilya Mupashi Wamushilo atuma Banaba na Saulo ku mulimo wabo, awe nabo baima baya na ku Selukia. Ukufuma ku Selukia baya no bwato ku cishi ca Saiprasi." 
Acts13:5 Bafika na mu musumba wa Salami. Elyo balashimika amashiwi yakwa Lesa mu masinagoga ya Bayuda. Bali na Yoani Mako uwalebafwako. 
Acts13:6 Elyo Banaba na Saulo bapita ne nshila ya ku mulundu baya fika na ku Pafosi. Ku Pafosi eko basanga Umuyuda umo ishina lyakwe ni Bar-Yesu. Uyu muntu alecita amalele, kabili ali kasesema wabufi." 
Acts13:7 Kabili ali cibusa wakwa Segio Paulo umulashi wa mu Saiprasi. Uyu Segio Paulo ali umuntu uwamano nganshi. Umulashi Segio Paulo aita Banaba na Saulo pakuti omfweko amashiwi yakwa Lesa. 
Acts13:8 Lelo Elima, ekutila, “Uwamalele,” abalesha. Talefwaya ukuti umulashi asumine muli Yesu." 
Acts13:9 Nomba Saulo, ishina lyakwe limbi ni Paulo, aisulamo na mu Mupashi Wamushilo. Alolekesha na pali Elima." 
Acts13:10 Elyo amweba ati, “We mwana wakwa Ciwa we! Waisula ubufi no bucenjeshi! Niwe mulwani wa fintu fyonse ifyacine cine! Bushe ukaleka lilali ukufulunganya ififwaya Lesa?" 
Acts13:11 Nomba Imfumu yalakukanda. Walapofula, na muli iyi nshita tawakulamona kasuba.” Awe apopene pa menso yakwe paisa icaba nga fubefube, pafiita na fititi. Alapulumpuntafye, alafwaya no wakuti amwikate ku minwe amutungululeko." 
Acts13:12 Umulashi cilya amona ifyacitika, asumina. Asunguka na pa mashiwi ya Mfumu balemufunda." 
Acts13:13 Paulo na banankwe elyo bafumine no bwato ku Pafosi baya na ku Pelima mu calo ca Pamfulia. Yoani Mako wena eko abasha, abwelelamo ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts13:14 Abanankwe bena bafuma ku Pega, baya na ku Antioki mu calo ca Pisidia. Pa bushiku bwe Sabata, baya mu sinagoga, baikala no kwikala." 
Acts13:15 Cilya bapwa ukubelenga Amafunde yakwa Mose ne fyalemba bakasesema, abakalamba ba sinagoga babatumina inkombe. Babeba abati, “Bamunyinefwe, nga mulipo na mashiwi yakucincisha abantu, kuti mwabeba.”" 
Acts13:16 Paulo epakwiminina aimya ukuboko pakuti bekale tondolo. Elyo alasosa ati, “Umfweni kuno! Mwe bena Israeli na imwe mwe Benafyalo mwe bapepa Lesa." 
Acts13:17 Lesa wa bena Israeli, asalile ifikolwe fyesu. Ilyo bali abeni mu calo ca Egupto, ewalebafwilisha pakuti babe umutundu uwakosa. Ni Lesa umwine ku maka yakwe ewabafumishe mu Egupto." 
Acts13:18 Ilyo bali mu matololo pa myaka amakumi yane, Lesa wena abikilepofye ukubasakamana." 
Acts13:19 Kabili ilyo Lesa alofeshe imishobo cine lubali iya mu calo ca Kenani, apeele icalo ca iyo mishobo ku fikolwe fyesu." 
Acts13:20 Fyonse ifi fyacitike pa myaka cikanga imyanda ine, na makumi yasano (450). “Elyo abapeele Abapingushi ukufika na kuli kasesema Samwele." 
Acts13:21 Kabili balomba Lesa ukubapeela imfumu. Lesa epakubapeela Saulo mwana Kishi, uwa mu luko lwakwa Benjamini. Saulo aikele pa bufumu imyaka amakumi yane." 
Acts13:22 Elyo Lesa afumya Saulo pa bufumu, abikapo na Davidi ukuba imfumu. Eo Lesa asosapo ati, ‘Ninsanga Davidi mwana Yese, umuntu uwa mibeele iyisansamusha umutima wandi. Wena akulacita fyonse ifyo mfwaya.’" 
Acts13:23 Lesa alaile ukuti, umo muli ba lupwa lwakwa Davidi, eukapususha abena Israeli. Noyu ni Yesu." 
Acts13:24 Lelo ilyo Yesu talati ese, ninshi Yoani wena alebila ku bena Israeli bonse ukuti babatishiwe no lubatisho lwakulanga ukulapila no kupilibuka." 
Acts13:25 Ilyo Yoani ali mupepi nokupwisha umulimo wakwe, alasosa ati, ‘Nga imwe muleti nine ani? Bushe imwe muleti nalimo ni ulya ali nokwisa? Awe iyoo! Uuli nokwisa akankonka panuma. Kabili ine nshilingile na kukakula indyato shakwe.’" 
Acts13:26 “Bamunyinane, bamwana Abrahamu, na imwe bonse mwe Benafyalo mwe bapepa Lesa! Nifwe Lesa atumina aya amashiwi yakutupususha." 
Acts13:27 Abantu ba mu Yerusalemu ne ntungulushi shabo tabaishibe bwino pali Yesu. Tabaumfwile no mwalola amashiwi ya bakasesema ayo babelenga lyonse pa bushiku bwe Sabata. Lelo pakupeela Yesu umulandu bafikilishefye ifyo bakasesema balemba. 
Acts13:28 Nelyo bashamwene mulandu wakumwipailapo, balombele Pilato ukuti amwipaye." 
Acts13:29 Ilyo bafikilisha mukucita fyonse ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo pa mulandu wakwe, bamufumya pa musalaba, bamushiika mu nindi." 
Acts13:30 Lelo Lesa amubusha ku bafwa. 
Acts13:31 Kabili abo afumine nabo ku Galile no kwisa ku Yerusalemu, bena balemumona inshikufye ishingi. Kanshi aba e bakambone bakwe ku bantu ba mu Israeli." 
Acts13:32 Ifwe twishile kuno kukumushimikilako Imbila Nsuma iyo Lesa alaile ifikolwe fyesu. 
Acts13:33 Elyo nafikilisha neci cilayo kuli ifwe fwe bana babo pakubusha Yesu ku bafwa. Efyo calembwa mu Malumbo, mwilumbo lyabubili ukuti, “‘Niwe mwana wandi, ilelo naba wiso.’" 
Acts13:34 Kabili ifyo Lesa asosa pakubusha Yesu ku bafwa, nokuti takatale aleka akabole, nifi, ‘Nkakupaala icine cine ne paalo lyamushilo ilyo nalaile Davidi.’" 
Acts13:35 Elyo pambi napo atila, ‘Tawakaleke Uwamushilo obe akabole.’" 
Acts13:36 Kanshi Davidi mu nshita yakwe abombele imilimo Lesa amupeele, nokufwa afwa. Elyo bamushiika pamo ne fikolwe fyesu no mubili wakwe walibola." 
Acts13:37 Lelo uo Lesa abusha ku bafwa, ena tabola." 
Acts13:38 Kanshi bamunyinane bonse mushininkishe ukuti ku mulandu wa Mbila yakwa Yesu iyi tulebila kuli imwe, Lesa akamubelela uluse ku fyabubifi fyenu." 
Acts13:39 Mushininkishe nokuti onse uwasumina Yesu, Lesa amulenga ukuba uwakaele ku fintu fyonse ifyo Amafunde yakwa Mose yalefilwa ukumulenga ukuba uwakaele." 
Acts13:40 Cenjeleni kanshi, pakuti ifyo bakasesema basobele fikamufikila ifyakuti," 
Acts13:41 ‘Cenjeleni mwe bamisuula! Sungukeni, mufwe! Pantu ifintu ndecita mu nshiku shenu shine shino, tamwakatale amusumina nelyo umuntu engamulondolwela!’ ”" 
Acts13:42 Cilya Paulo na Banaba balafuma mu sinagoga, abantu babalomba ukuti na pa bushiku bwe Sabata bukakonkapo, nalyo bakese bashimikilako pa mashiwi yamo yene." 
Acts13:43 Cilya bapwisha ukulongana kwa sinagoga, Abayuda abengi na bayaluka Abayuda abengi abapetamina Lesa balakonka Paulo na Banaba. Elyo Paulo na Banaba nabo balabakonkomesha ukulashangila mu cikuuku Lesa abakwatila." 
Acts13:44 Kanshi pa bushiku bwe Sabata ubwakonkelepo, abantu ni cikangafye umusumba onse balongana kukumfwa amashiwi ya Mfumu." 
Acts13:45 Nomba Abayuda cilya bamona cinkupiti wa bantu, ubufuba bwabekata. Balabomfya amashiwi yamusaalula, balakaanya na fyonse ifyo Paulo alesosa." 
Acts13:46 Elyo Paulo na Banaba balabebekesha abati, “Nimwe twali nokubalilapo ukushimikila amashiwi yakwa Lesa. Kanshi apo mwakaana, mwamona nokuti tamulingile mweo wape, cisuma twalamusha, tuye ku Benafyalo." 
Acts13:47 Pantu ne Mfumu efyo yatukonkomesha aiti, “‘Nalikusala ukuba ulubuuto lwa Benafyalo, pakuti, ukupitila muli iwe, abantu ukufika na ku mpela ya pano isonde kuti bamona ipusukilo.’ ”" 
Acts13:48 Cilya Abenafyalo baumfwa ifi, basansamuka nganshi. Balalumbanya ne shiwi lya Mfumu. Na bonse abo Imfumu yasala kukumona umweo wape, basumina." 
Acts13:49 Ishiwi lya Mfumu lyalasalanganafye mpanga yonse muli cilya calo. 
Acts13:50 Lelo Abayuda bena balasokawila abanakashi bakankala abapetamina Lesa na bacilolo ba mu musumba ukuti bemine Paulo na Banaba. Batampa nokulacusha Paulo na Banaba. Babatamfya ukufuma na mu calo cabo. 
Acts13:51 Nabo abasole babakuntila ulukungu lwa ku makasa yabo, baya na ku Ikoniamu." 
Acts13:52 Abasambi ba mu Antioki bena basansamuka nganshi, baisulamo na Mupashi Wamushilo." 
Acts14:1 Mu Ikoniamu namo, pamo nga mu Antioki, Paulo na Banaba balaya ku sinagoga ya Bayuda. Balafunda abantu icakuti Abayuda abengi na Bagiriki abengi basumina mu Mfumu." 
Acts14:2 Lelo Abayuda abashasumine mu Mfumu balasokawila Abenafyalo, baimina ababwananyina balabacusha." 
Acts14:3 Paulo na Banaba baikalako inshita ikalamba. Balefunda pa Mfumu ukwabula umwenso. Imfumu nayo yabapeela amaka yakucita ifishibilo ne finjelengwe, pakuti abantu bashininkishe ukuti ifyo balesosa pa cikuuku caiko fyacine cine." 
Acts14:4 Abantu mu musumba basuka bapatukana. Bamo bawila ku Bayuda, bambi bena ku basole." 
Acts14:5 Basuka Abenafyalo na Bayuda pamo pene ne ntungulushi shabo, bapanga ukulacusha Paulo na Banaba no kubatobaula amabwe." 
Acts14:6 Ilyo Paulo na Banaba baumfwa ifi, bafulumukila ku Lusitila na ku Debe, imisumba ya mu calo ca Lukaonia, elyo na mu calo ca mumbali." 
Acts14:7 Nako kwine balebila Imbila Nsuma. 
Acts14:8 Mu Lusitila mwali umuntu uwalemana amakasa. Afyelwe icilema, kabili tatalile endapo." 
Acts14:9 Uyu muntu alekutika kufyo Paulo alelanda. Paulo amulolekesha, elyo amumona ukuti nakwata icisumino cakuti apola." 
Acts14:10 Aikatisha ishiwi ati, “Iminina, ololoka!” Awe umuntu afwampuka napo ekele, atampa no kulaenda." 
Acts14:11 Cilya abantu bamona icacita Paulo, balasowesha mu cina Lukaonia abati, “Ala imilungu naisanguka abantu, nayikila uko tuli!”" 
Acts14:12 Banaba balamwita Seo. Elyo Paulo wena ico ewalelandisha balamwita Elemesi. 
Acts14:13 Itempele lya mulungu Seo lyali kunse ya musumba. Shimapepo wakwa Seo na bantu ba mu musumba baleta iŋombe ishilume ishasamikwa na maluba ku mpongolo ya musumba pakuti balekele Paulo na Banaba ilambo. 
Acts14:14 Ilyo abasole Paulo na Banaba baumfwa ifyo balefwaya ukucita, balepaula insalu shabo. Baiposa na mwibumba." 
Acts14:15 Balapunda abati, “Mwe bantu mwe, cinshi mwalacitila ifi? Ala na ifwe tulifye bantu nga imwe bene! Ifwe twaisa kuno kukubila Imbila Nsuma kuli imwe pakuti tumufumye kuli ifi fintu fyafye. Elyo nokuti mwalukile kuli Lesa wamweo, uwabumba umulu ne calo na bemba na fyonse ifyabamo." 
Acts14:16 Mu myaka yakale Lesa alekele imishobo yonse ukulacita ifyo ilefwaya. 
Acts14:17 Lelo Lesa lyonse alailanga ukuti eko aba ku fisuma fyonse acita. Alamupeela imfula ukufuma ku mulu, elyo ne fisabo pa nshita yafiko. Alamupeela ifyakulya, nokulenga imitima yenu isansamuke nganshi.”" 
Acts14:18 Nangu abasole basosele aya mashiwi, awe nalyo line cabafishe nganshi pakulesha abantu ukuti bebalekela ilambo." 
Acts14:19 Elyo Abayuda bamo abafumine ku Antioko na ku Ikonia baisa ongola amabumba ya bantu. Balasaula Paulo amabwe. Bamukulila na kunse ya musumba pantu baletontonkanya ukuti nafwa. 
Acts14:20 Lelo ilyo abasambi baisa longana apo ali, Paulo aima abwelelamo nabo mu musumba. Bwaisaca, Paulo na Banaba baya ku Debe." 
Acts14:21 Mu Debe, Paulo na Banaba balabila Imbila Nsuma. Awe balenga na bengi ukuba basambi ba Mfumu. Elyo babwelela ku Lusitila na ku Ikonia na ku Antioki wa mu calo ca Pisidia." 
Acts14:22 Awe balakoseleshako abasambi, balabakonkomesha no kushipa mu cisumino. Balabeba abati, “Pakwingila mu Bufumu bwakwa Lesa, tuli nokupita mu macushi ayengi.”" 
Acts14:23 Paulo na Banaba epakusonta abakalamba cila lukuta. Elyo balapepa no kufunga icakulya epakubalubwila mu maboko ya Mfumu iyo basuminemo. 
Acts14:24 Kabili cilya bapita mu calo ca Pisidia, epakufika mu calo ca Pamfulia." 
Acts14:25 Mu Pega namo bafundamo amashiwi ya Mfumu, elyo baya ku Atalia." 
Acts14:26 Kabili bafuma ku Atalia, babwelelamo no bwato ku Antioki, uko babalubwilile ku cikuuku cakwa Lesa pakuti babombe umulimo uo nomba bapwisha." 
Acts14:27 Ilyo bafika ku Antioki, awe balonganya ulukuta. Elyo balabashimikilako fyonse ifyo Lesa abafwileko ukubomba. Balabashimikilako nefyo Lesa atungulwile Abenafyalo ku cisumino." 
Acts14:28 Awe uku kwena baikalakofye inshita ikalamba na basambi. 
Acts15:1 Elyo abantu bamo, abafumine ku Yudeya baishile ku Antioki. Balafunda ababwananyina ukuti, “Imwe nga tamulesembululwa, ukulingana no lutambi Mose atufunda, ninshi tekuti mupusuke.”" 
Acts15:2 Awe Paulo na Banaba balaumana nabo no kubikana nabo ifikansa nganshi pali uyu mulandu. Kanshi elyo bapingula ukuti Paulo na Banaba na bambi bamo, baye ku Yerusalemu kukuya monana na basole na bakalamba pali uyu mulandu." 
Acts15:3 Awe ulukuta lonse lwabafishapo. Elyo bena bapita mu calo ca Fonisia ne ca Samaria, baleshimikila nefyo Abenafyalo nabo banakile Lesa. Ababwananyina bonse pakumfwa ifyo, basansamuka nganshi." 
Acts15:4 Cilya bafika mu Yerusalemu, ulukuta na basole na bakalamba bonse babasekelelafye bwino. Elyo nabo balabashimikila fyonse ifyo Lesa abafwilishe ukubomba." 
Acts15:5 Nomba abasumina bamo, abali mwibumba lya Bafalise baiminina balasosa abati, “Abena Kristu Abenafyalo bali nokusembululwa. Kabili tuli nokubeba ukulakonka Amafunde yakwa Mose.”" 
Acts15:6 Elyo abasole na bakalamba balongana pakuti bomfwane pali uyu mulandu. 
Acts15:7 Awe balandaukapo nganshi pa nshita iyitali. Elyo Petelo aiminina alabeba ati, “Mwe bamunyinane, mwalishibafye bwino ukuti, ni kalefye Lesa ansalile mwibumba lyenu ukuti ndebila amashiwi ya Mbila Nsuma ku Benafyalo, pakuti nabo bayumfwe, basumine." 
Acts15:8 Kabili Lesa uwaishiba imitima ya bantu, alilanga ukuti alibapokelela pakubapeela Mupashi Wamushilo, nga filya fine na ifwe atucitile." 
Acts15:9 Lesa taba na kapatulula pali ifwe fwe Bayuda na Benafyalo. Pantu nabo alibabelela uluse pali ico bamusumina. 
Acts15:10 Nga kanshi cinshi ico muleesesha Lesa pakutwika Abenafyalo icipe icafina, ico ifwe bene ne fikolwe fyesu twafilwa ukusenda?" 
Acts15:11 Awe iyoo! Na ifwe bene pamo nga basambi, cikuuku ca Mfumu Yesu ecitupususha ilyo twamusumina.”" 
Acts15:12 Awe ibumba lyonse lyaikalafye tondolo. Lyalakutika kufyo Banaba na Paulo baleshimika ifishibilo ne finjelengwe Lesa abapeele ukucita mu Benafyalo. 
Acts15:13 Cilya bapwa ukulanda, Yakobo nao ati, “Bamunyinane, kutikeni kuno!" 
Acts15:14 Simoni natushimikila ukuti ni Lesa ewabalilepo ukulanga ifyo asakamana Abenafyalo, ilyo abuulilepo bamo ukuba abantu bakwe." 
Acts15:15 Ifi fyayanafye bwino na mashiwi ya bakasesema. Pantu calembwa ukuti," 
Acts15:16 ‘Panuma ya ifi elyo nkabwela, nkesa kuula nakabili iŋanda yakwa Davidi iyabongololoka. Nkesa wamya icitantala caiko, no kuikuulapo nakabili." 
Acts15:17 Epakuti impuka ya bantu abakashala bakalefwaya Imfumu, Abenafyalo bonse abo naisalila ukuba abantu bandi." 
Acts15:18 Efyasosa Imfumu, iyalenga ukuti ifi fintu fishibikwe ukufumafye ku kale.’ ”" 
Acts15:19 Elyo Yakobo alundapo nokuti, “Ine ndepingula ukuti, tatufwile kufushanya ifyakwafya Abenafyalo abaleyalukila kuli Lesa."
