Acts15:20 Tufwile twabalembela kalata. Twabebamo ukuti, tabali nakulyako inama isho batuulile ku tulubi, bali nokutaluka ku bulalelale, tabali nakulyako inama isho baipaya ukwabula ukuteeta pa mukoshi nangu ukulyako umulopa." 
Acts15:21 “Pantu ukufuma na kale Amafunde yakwa Mose balayafunda mu misumba yonse, elyo na pa bushiku bwe Sabata lyonse balayabelenga mu masinagoga.”" 
Acts15:22 Elyo abasole na bakalamba no lukuta lonse lwine bonse bapingushanya ukuti batume ku Antioki abantu bamo aba mwibumba lyabo, baye pamo na Paulo na Banaba. Awe basala Yuda, uo baleti Basaba, na Sailasi. Aba bantu babili bali intungulushi ishalumbuka pakati ka babwananyina." 
Acts15:23 Babapeela na kalata wakusenda apalembelwe ifi, “Ifwe, fwe bamunyinenwe, abasole na bakalamba ba lukuta, kuli bamunyinefwe Abenafyalo mu Antioki, mu Siria na mu Kilikia. Twamuposha bonse." 
Acts15:24 Twalyumfwa ukuti abanensu bamo aba mwibumba lyesu, balisa musakamika no kumumika imitima kufyo balandile. Aba bantu baitendekefye abene, tefwe twabebele iyoo." 
Acts15:25 Kanshi ifwe twalilongana, twalisuminishanya nokuti tusale bamo, tubatume uko muli. Bakesa na babile besu Banaba na Paulo." 
Acts15:26 Aba bantu baipeela onse kukubombela Imfumu yesu Yesu Kristu. 
Acts15:27 Eico kanshi twatuma Yuda na Sailasi pakuti nabo bakamushimikileko ifintu twalemba muli kalata. 
Acts15:28 Mupashi Wamushilo pamo na ifwe bene tulemwebafye ukuti tatulefwaya ukufushanya amafunde yakumusakamika, lelo muli nokulakonkafye aya mafunde twalalemba." 
Acts15:29 Tamuli nakulyako ifyakulya fyonse batuula ku tulubi. Tamuli nakulyako umulopa. Tamuli nakulyako inama iyo baipaya ukwabula ukuteeta pa mukoshi. Muletaluka na ku bulalelale. Ifi fintu nga mwalafikonka, ninshi mulewamya. Shalenipo umutende.”" 
Acts15:30 Awe inkombe shaima shaya na ku Antioki. Mu Antioki inkombe shalonganya ulukuta lonse shabapeela na kalata. 
Acts15:31 Cilya babelenga amashiwi yacikoseleshi ayalimo, awe basansamuka nganshi." 
Acts15:32 Yuda na Sailasi, ico bena ni bakasesema, nabo balanda nabo pa nshitafye ikalamba ifyakukoselesha no kucincisha ababwananyina." 
Acts15:33 Kabili cilya baikalako inshita iyilingile, ababwananyina babalekamo pakuti babwelelemo ku babatumine, abati, “Kafikenipo umutende.”" 
Acts15:34 Lelo Paulo na Banaba bena bashala mu Antioki. Bali pamo na bambi abengi, balefunda nokubila Imbila Nsuma ya Mfumu." 
Acts15:35 Pati papite inshita, Paulo aebele Banaba ati, “Natubwelelemo, tupempule ababwananyina bonse mu misumba yonse umo twashimikile amashiwi ya Mfumu. Tumone nefyo bali mu cisumino cabo.”" 
Acts15:36 Banaba wena alafwaya ukusenda Yoani Mako. 
Acts15:37 Lelo Paulo akaana ati, “Awe tacilolelemo, pantu alitushile ilyo twali mu Pamfulia, aleka no kulabomba na ifwe.”" 
Acts15:38 Awe paba nokuumana nganshi, elyo balekana. Banaba asenda Mako baya no bwato ku Saiprasi." 
Acts15:39 Paulo ena asala Sailasi. Elyo ababwananyina babalubwila ku cikuuku cakwa Lesa, awe baima baya." 
Acts15:40 Bapita mu Siria na mu Kilikia, balecincisha inkuta." 
Acts16:1 Paulo elyo aile ku Debe na ku Lusitila. Kuli uyu musumba ekwaleikala umusambi umo ishina lyakwe ni Timote. Nyina kwa Timote ali Muyuda, kabili uwasumina muli Kristu, lelo wishi ena ali Mugiriki." 
Acts16:2 Ababwananyina bonse aba mu Lusitila na ku Ikoniamu balesosa abati, “Timote muntu umusuma.”" 
Acts16:3 Paulo alafwaya ukuti baye nankwe pa bulendo. Kanshi epakumusembulula. Acitile ifi ku mulandu wa Bayuda bali muli cilya calo. Pantu bonse balishibe ukuti wishi Mugiriki. 
Acts16:4 Ilyo balepitana mu misumba, baleshimikilako abena Kristu amafunde ayo abasole na bakalamba bapingwile mu Yerusalemu. Balebakonkomesha ukulasunga ayo mafunde." 
Acts16:5 Awe cisumino ca nkuta calakoselakofye, kabili inshiku shonse inkuta shalafulilakofye ku bwingi." 
Acts16:6 Paulo na banankwe bapitile mu calo ca Fulugia na mu ca Galatia. Pantu Mupashi Wamushilo talefwaya ukuti babile Imbila Nsuma mu calo ca Asia. 
Acts16:7 Cilya bafika ku mupaka wa Musia, balafwaya ukuti baye mu calo ca Bitunia. Lelo Mupashi wakwa Yesu abalesha." 
Acts16:8 Kanshi epakulaya, balalanya icalo ca Musia, baya na ku musumba wa Troa." 
Acts16:9 Mu nshita ya bushiku, Paulo amona icimonwa. Mu cimonwa amona umwina Makedonia naiminina alemupapata aleti, “Mwabukile kuno calo ca Makedonia, mwise mutwafwe.”" 
Acts16:10 Atile cilya Paulo amona ici cimonwa, awe apopene twalaipekanya ukuya ku Makedonia. Pantu twalishininkishe ukuti Lesa natwita ukuya bila Imbila Nsuma kuli aba bantu." 
Acts16:11 Elyo twafuma no bwato ku Troa, twalungamafye ku Samotulake. Bwaisaca epakuya ku Neapoli." 
Acts16:12 Elyo twafumako twaya ku Filipi, umusumba walumbwike mu citungu ici ca Makedonia. Abena Roma ebaleikalamo. Awe na ifwe twaikalamo inshiku shimo shimo." 
Acts16:13 Pa bushiku bwe Sabata, twafumina kunse ya musumba, twaya ku lulamba lwa mumana, ku ncende uko twalesubila ukuti eko Abayuda balongana kukupepa. Twaikala twalalanda na banakashi abalongeneko." 
Acts16:14 Kanshi umwanakashi umo pali abo baleumfwako, ni Ludia, umwina Tiatila, kashitisha wa nsalu ishakashikila. Uyu mwanakashi alepepa Lesa. Imfumu yamunasha umutima, pakuti apokelele amashiwi Paulo alesosa." 
Acts16:15 Awe umwine wine na bonse abo aleikala nabo pa ŋanda babatishiwa. Elyo atwita kumwakwe ati, “Nga cine muletontonkanya ukuti na ine ndi wasumina icine cine mu Mfumu, iseni kumwandi eko muleikala.” Awe na ifwe epakuya kumwakwe." 
Acts16:16 Ubushiku bumo twaleya ku ncende uko bapepela. Elyo twakumanya umukashana umo, umusha, uwawililwe no mupashi uwakowela. Uyu mupashi walengele nokuti alesesema ifili nokucitika kuntanshi. Mukweba abantu ifili nokubacitikila kuntanshi, uyu mukashana alengele bashikulu wakwe ukulamwenamo indalama ishingi." 
Acts16:17 Uyu mukashana alakonka Paulo na ifwe bene alepunda ati, “Aba bantu e basha bakwa Lesa Mukulu! Ebalemweba amashiwi yakumulanga ifyo muli nokupusuka!”" 
Acts16:18 Efyo akonkanyapo ukucita inshiku ishingi. Asuka Paulo afulwa, apilibuka aeba no mupashi uwakowela ati, “Ku maka yakwa Yesu Kristu, ndekweba fuma muli uyu mukashana!” Awe apopene umupashi uwakowela wamufumamo." 
Acts16:19 Nomba bashikulu wa mukashana cilya bamona ukuti nomba nacipwa takuli kwakumwena indalama, baikata Paulo na Sailasi. Babatantanya, babatwala ku cilye mu lubansa lwa cisankano." 
Acts16:20 Babaleta na kuli bakaputula wamilandu. Balabeba abati, “Aba bantu Bayuda, nomba baleleta icimfulunganya mu musumba wesu." 
Acts16:21 Elyo balefunda ne misango iyapusana na mafunde yesu, iyo ifwe fwe bena Roma tushingasumina nangu ukukonka.”" 
Acts16:22 Elyo ibumba lyawilamo mukupuma Paulo na Sailasi. Bakaputula wamilandu balepaula ifyakufwala fyakwa Paulo na Sailasi, babeba nokuti babome ifikoti." 
Acts16:23 Awe cilya bapwa ukubalopaula, babaposa na mu cifungo. Elyo bakonkomesha kalinda wa cifungo ukubalinda bwino." 
Acts16:24 Kalinda nao pakumfwa ifyo bamukonkomesha, abaposa mu kamuputule ka mukati na nkati. Elyo akakila amolu yabo mu makoli." 
Acts16:25 Cilya calafika pakati ka bushiku Paulo na Sailasi balapepa, balaimba ne nyimbo shakulumbanya Lesa. Abafungwa bambi bena balekutikakofye." 
Acts16:26 Apopene icinkukuma icikalamba capita, ne ŋanda ya cifungo yonse yalatenta. Elyo kabili apopene ifiibi fyonse fyaisuka, ne minyololo ku bafungwa bonse yaiponenafye iyine." 
Acts16:27 Kalinda wa cifungo ashibuka. Amona nokuti ifiibi fya cifungo fyonse nafisuka. Wena alatontonkanya ukuti abafungwa bonse nabafyuka. Kanshi asomona ulupanga alafwaya ukuipaya. 
Acts16:28 Lelo Paulo apunda ne shiwi likalamba ati, “Leka, wiipaya, bonse emo tuli!”" 
Acts16:29 Kalinda wa cifungo epakwita abakuleta ifisaniko. Elyo ayamo ulubilo afukamina Paulo na Sailasi, aletutumafye ku mwenso." 
Acts16:30 Elyo abafumisha panse, alabepusha ati, “Mukwai, ndi nokucita shani pakuti mpusuke?”" 
Acts16:31 Nabo bamweba abati, “Sumina Imfumu Yesu, elyo iwe na ba mu ŋanda yobe mulepusuka.”" 
Acts16:32 Elyo balamufunda na ba mu ŋanda yakwe bonse amashiwi ya Mfumu. 
Acts16:33 Mu nshita ine iyo iya bushiku kalinda wa cifungo abasenda, alabasambila ne filonda fyabo. Awe apopene bamubatisha pamo na ba mu ŋanda yakwe bonse." 
Acts16:34 Elyo aleta Paulo na Sailasi mumwakwe, abapeela ne cakulya balalya. Awe kalinda wa cifungo pamo na ba mu ŋanda yakwe bonse basansamuka nganshi ico basumina muli Lesa." 
Acts16:35 Cilya bwaca ulucelo, bakaputula wamilandu batuma inkombe kuli kalinda bakonkomesha abati, “Kakula abo bantu, uleke baleya.”" 
Acts16:36 Awe kalinda afisha aya mashiwi kuli Paulo. Amweba ati, “Bakaputula wamilandu bakonkomesha ukuti mukakule muleya. Kanshi nomba fumeni, mufikepo umutende.”" 
Acts16:37 Paulo aeba inkombe ati, “Ifwe tuli bena Roma. Batuumine pa lwalala, ukwabula ukutulubulwisha, batuposa na mu cifungo. Elyo nomba balefwaya ukutufumya mu bumfisolo? Awe cakaana! Mubebe bakaputula wamilandu abene bese, ebo bese batufumye.”" 
Acts16:38 Awe inkombe batumine shaya fisha aya mashiwi kuli bakaputula wamilandu. Cilya baumfwa ukuti Paulo na Sailasi bena Roma, awe umwenso wabekata." 
Acts16:39 Bakaputula wamilandu epakwisa balabapapata. Elyo babafumya mu cifungo. Babalomba nokuti bafume mu musumba. 
Acts16:40 Ilyo Paulo na Sailasi bafuma mu cifungo, baya ku ŋanda kwa Ludia. Mwa Ludia emo bamonanina na babwananyina. Cilya bapwa ukubeba amashiwi yacikoseleshi, bafuma baya." 
Acts17:1 Elyo Paulo na Sailasi bapitile mu mishi ya Amfipoli na Apolonia. Bafika na ku musumba wa Tesalonika umwali sinagoga iya Bayuda. 
Acts17:2 Paulo aya ku sinagoga, ico efyo abelele ukucita. Elyo pa nshiku she Sabata shitatu, alelanshanya na bantu pa milandu yalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo." 
Acts17:3 Alabalondolwela no kubalanga ukuti Kristu ali nokucula no kushukuka ku bafwa. Paulo alasosa nokuti, “Uyu Yesu ndemushimikilapo, ala e Kristu wine.”" 
Acts17:4 Awe bamo basumina, balakonka Paulo na Sailasi. Ibumbafye ilikalamba ilya Bagiriki abapetamina Lesa, na banakashi bakankala abengi nabo basumina." 
Acts17:5 Kanshi Abayuda baikatwa no bufuba. Balonganya ifiwelewele fya bantu ukufuma ku cisankano. Bapanga ibumba, lyaimya ne cimfulunganya mu musumba. Kabili baya sansa iŋanda yakwa Yasoni, ico balefwaya Paulo na Sailasi pakuti babalete kwibumba." 
Acts17:6 Lelo ico bashibasangileko, batantanya Yasoni na babwananyina bamo babatwala na kuli bakaputula wamilandu, balepunda abati, “Aba bantu ebaleta icimfulunganya konsefye! Nomba nabesa na muno musumba wesu." 
Acts17:7 Bafikila kwa Yasoni. Elyo tabalekonka amafunde yakwa kateeka mukalamba Kesalo. Balesosa nokuti kuli imfumu imbi, ishina lyaiko ni Yesu.”" 
Acts17:8 Pakumfwa ifi abantu bonse na bakaputula wamilandu basakamana nganshi. 
Acts17:9 Elyo bakaputula wamilandu baeba Yasoni na banankwe ukulipila indalama sha cikatila mulandu. Elyo babalekamo. 
Acts17:10 Cilyafye bwaila ababwananyina batuma Paulo na Sailasi ku Belea. Elyo cilya bafikako baya ku sinagoga iya Bayuda. 
Acts17:11 Mu Belea mwena Abayuda bali ne cumfwila ukucila aba ku Tesalonika. Awe bena basampuka nganshi mukupokelela amashiwi yakwa Lesa. Cila bushiku balapituluka mu Malembo Yamushilo, pakumona ngefyo Paulo alelanda fyacishinka." 
Acts17:12 Awe Abayuda abengi basumina. Abanakashi bakankala abengi Abagiriki na baume Abagiriki abengi nabo basumina. 
Acts17:13 Nomba Abayuda mu Tesalonika baumfwako ukuti Paulo aleshimikila ishiwi lyakwa Lesa na ku Belea. Awe nabo baisako, batampa no kusokawila abantu, mwaba ne cimfulunganya." 
Acts17:14 Ababwananyina nabo bwangu bwangu batuma Paulo ku calo ca ku lulamba lwa bemba. Lelo Sailasi na Timote bena bashala mu Belea. 
Acts17:15 Abantu abaleshindika Paulo, bamushindika ukufika na ku musumba wa Atensi. Elyo babwelelamo ku Belea. Paulo abakonkomesha nokuti bebe Sailasi na Timote ukuti bendeshe ukuya kuntu ali." 
Acts17:16 Elyo Paulo alalolela Sailasi na Timote mu Atensi. Ilyo ali mu Atensi, amwene ukuti umusumba waisulamofye utulubi, awe camusakamika nganshi." 
Acts17:17 Mu sinagoga alalanshanya na Bayuda na Benafyalo abapetamina Lesa. Lelo mu mansa sha pa cisankano alelanshanyafye cila bushiku no muntu onse uo akumanya. 
Acts17:18 Elyo ibumba lya bantu bamo abalekonkelela amano yakwa Epikulo na Sitoiki balabikana ifikansa. Bamo balasosa abati, “Ngoyu muntu cilandelande finshi alefwaya ukusosa?” Bambi balasosa abati, “Ali kwati alelanda pa milungu imbi imbifye.” Ico balelandila ifyo nico Paulo aleshimikila pali Yesu na pa kushukuka kwa bafwa." 
Acts17:19 Elyo bamusenda bamutwala na ku cilye baleteka pa lupili lwa Aleopago Balamweba abati, “Tulefwaya ukwishiba ifi fintu fipya ulefunda." 
Acts17:20 Pantu ifintu fimo ifyo ulelandapo fyeni kuli ifwe. Kanshi kuti twatemwa ukwishiba umo filolele.” 
Acts17:21 Abena Atensi bonse na beni bene abaleikalamo batemwikwa icintu cimo, ukulanshanya no kumfwa ifintu ifipya." 
Acts17:22 Elyo Paulo aiminina mu cilye ca pa lupili lwa Aleopago. Alasosa ati, “Mwe bena Atensi! Ine nimona ukuti mulapepa nganshi." 
Acts17:23 Pantu ilyo naletandala mu musumba wenu, nimona incende isho mupepalapo. Mwenepo no bulambo bumo apo calembwa ukuti, ‘Kuli Lesa Ushaishibikwa.’ Kanshi ico cine mupepa, ico mushaishiba, eco ine nalamulondolwela." 
Acts17:24 Lesa uwabumba icalo na fyonse ifyabamo, e Mfumu ya mulu ne calo. Tekala mu matempele ayakuulwa na bantu," 
Acts17:25 Lesa takabila nelyo cimo, kanshi takabila nelyo cimo ico abantu bengamubombela. Pantu ni Lesa eupeela abantu ubumi nokuti balepema, eubapeela na fyonsefye." 
Acts17:26 Ukufuma ku muntu umofye Lesa apanga imishobo yonse iya bantu, ababika ne mpanga yonse pano isonde lyonse. Umwine wine ewabapimina inshita ne mipaka ya fyalo fyabo." 
Acts17:27 Ico Lesa acitila ifi, ni pakuti abantu balemufwaya. Kusuka umo balemufwaya, basuka bamusanga. Kwena kuli cila umo pali ifwe, Lesa taba kutali iyoo." 
Acts17:28 Pantu ngefyo umo asosa ati, “‘Ni muli Lesa twakwatila umweo, emo twendela, kabili eco twabelapo.’ Kabili bushe tefyo na bakashika wa mishikakulo yenu balanda abati, ‘Na ifwe bene tuli bana bakwe’." 
Acts17:29 Kanshi apo ‘tuli bana bakwa Lesa,’ tatufwile kulatontonkanya ukuti Lesa aba nge cilubi bafundi bapanga mu fyakubasabasa ifya cela ca golide nangu icela ca silifa, nangu ilibwe." 
Acts17:30 Kwena Lesa alisuulako kuli ifyo fintu balecita pantu pa nshita iyo tabamwishibe. Lelo ndakai alekonkomesha abantu bonse mpanga yonse ukuti balapile no kupilibuka. 
Acts17:31 Pantu Lesa alisala kale ubushiku bwakupingwilamo aba pano isonde bonse no mulinganya. Lesa alisonta no muntu wakuba kaputula wamilandu. Lesa alilanga apabuuta tuutu uyu muntu ku bantu bonse pakumubusha ku bafwa.” 
Acts17:32 Cilya baumfwa Paulo alanda palwa kubuuka ku bafwa, bamo balamuseka. Bambi balasosa abati, “Pali ici cena tukesa umfwako limbi.”" 
Acts17:33 Kanshi Paulo epakufuma pa cilye. 
Acts17:34 Lelo bamo bena balakonka Paulo, basumina na mu Mfumu. Pali abo, umo ni Dionisi shicilye wa cilye ca pa lupili, Aleopago, no mwanakashi umo ishina lyakwe ni Damali, elyo na bambipo." 
Acts18:1 Elyo Paulo afumine ku Atensi aile ku Kolinti. 
Acts18:2 Mu Kolinti asangamo Umuyuda umo ishina lyakwe ni Akwila, uwafyalilwe ku Ponti. Nao kanshi elyo afuminefye ku Itali no mukashi wakwe Prisila. Pantu kateeka mukalamba wa bena Roma, Kilaudio akonkomeshe ukuti, Abayuda bonse bali nokufuma mu Roma. Paulo epakuyako kukubapempula." 
Acts18:3 Paulo ico asanga ukuti balebomba umulimo umo wine nao alebomba, uwakupikula amatenti yakwikalamo, awe aikala nabo. Alabomba nabo." 
Acts18:4 Elyo cila bushiku bwe Sabata, aleya ku sinagoga alelanshanya na Bayuda na Bagiriki. Alefwaya ukuti basumine ifyo alebeba." 
Acts18:5 Cilya Sailasi na Timote bafika ukufuma ku Makedonia, Paulo lyena inshita yonse alaikalilafye ukufunda Abayuda no kupeela bukambone ukuti Yesu e Kristu wine." 
Acts18:6 Ilyo balamukaanya, balalanda ne fyamusaalula, Paulo abuula insalu shakwe alabakuntila ulukungu. Alabeba ati, “Mwailofyafye mwe bene, ine nshikwete mulandu! Ukufuma nomba ine nakulayafye ku Benafyalo.”" 
Acts18:7 Elyo Paulo afuma mu sinagoga, aya na kukwikala no muntu umo uupepa Lesa, ishina lyakwe ni Titio Yusito. Iŋanda yakwe yalifye mupepi na sinagoga." 
Acts18:8 Kilisipo umukalamba wa sinagoga, nao asumina mu Mfumu pamo pene na ba mu ŋanda yakwe bonse. Awe na bena Kolinti abengi ilyo baumfwa ifyo Paulo alefunda, basumina no kubatishiwa babatishiwa." 
Acts18:9 Ubushiku bumo mu nshita ya bushiku, Imfumu yamonekela Paulo, yalamweba aiti, “Wilatiina, konkanyapofye ukufunda, tauli nakuleka iyoo." 
Acts18:10 Ine tuli nobe. Tapali nangu umo uwakukucusha, pantu abantu abengi aba muli uyu musumba bantu bandi.”" 
Acts18:11 Kanshi Paulo epakwikala mu musumba umwaka umo ne myeshi mutanda, alefunda abantu amashiwi yakwa Lesa." 
Acts18:12 Ilyo Galio ali umulashi wa calo ca Akaia, Abayuda balongana baumfwana, baikata Paulo. Bamutwala na ku cilye." 
Acts18:13 Balamwebelela abati, “Uyu muntu alesembeleka abantu ukulapepa Lesa mu musango uwapusana na mafunde yesu.”" 
Acts18:14 Paulo talati atampe no kulanda, Galio asosa ati, “Umfweni mwe Bayuda, nga cakuti apaba ukonaula amafunde nangu ukulufyanya fimo nga kuti nasakamana ukumfwa umulandu wenu." 
Acts18:15 Lelo nga kubikanafye ifikansa pa mashiwi na pa mashina, nangu pa mafunde yenu, fyena ifyo kuti mwaumfwana mwe bene. Ine nshifwaya ukuba kaputula wamilandu ya uyo musango.”" 
Acts18:16 Awe abatamfisha na kunse ya cilye. 
Acts18:17 Awe elyo bonse bafukukila Sositeni, umukalamba wa sinagoga, balamupuminafye pa menso ya bashicilye. Galio wena tewakuposako mano nakalya." 
Acts18:18 Mu Kolinti Paulo aikelemo inshiku ishingi pamo na babwananyina. Elyo abashalikapo, aima aya no bwato ku Siria, ninshi bali na Prisila na Akwila. Mu Kenkrea, ilyo bashilati bafumemo, Paulo abeya ulukuso, pa mulandu wa cilayo alaile kuli Lesa." 
Acts18:19 Ilyo bafika mu musumba wa Efeso, Paulo eko asha Prisila na Akwila. Umwine wena aya ku sinagoga alalanshanya na Bayuda." 
Acts18:20 Balamulomba ukuti ekale nabo inshiku shimo shimo, lelo akaana." 
Acts18:21 Pakuya alabashalikapo ati, “Nkabwela nakabili nga Lesa alefwaya.” Elyo afuma ku Efeso, aya no bwato." 
Acts18:22 Ilyo afika ku Kesalia, aya kukuposha ulukuta, elyo aya ku Antioki." 
Acts18:23 Mu Antioki aikalamofye inshita inono, elyo afumamo, aya alakoselesha abasambi bonse mu calo ca Galatia na Fulugia." 
Acts18:24 Umuyuda umo umwina Alekisandilia, ishina lyakwe ni Apolo aishile ku Efeso. Ali uwacenjela nganshi mukulanda. Kabili uwaishibisha nganshi Amalembo Yamushilo." 
Acts18:25 Alifundilwe bwino pa mafunde ya Mfumu. Ali uwakalabana nganshi mukulanda na mukufunda fyonse bwino pali Yesu. Lelo kwena aishibefye ulubatisho lwakwa Yoani. 
Acts18:26 Elyo atampa ukulalanda ukwabula umwenso mu sinagoga. Cilya Prisila na Akwila baumfwa ifyo alelanda, bamusenda kumwabo. Balamulondolwela bwino inshila Lesa afwaya ukuti abantu balekonka." 
Acts18:27 Elyo Apolo alafwaya ukuya ku calo ca Akaia. Ababwananyina ba mu Efeso balamukoselesha, balemba na kalata ku basambi ba mu Kolinti ukuti bamupokelele bwino. Cilya afikako, alayafwilishako abantu abo Lesa mu cikuuku cakwe alengele ukuti basumine muli Yesu." 
Acts18:28 Pa mulandu wa kukalabana kwakwe, acimfya Abayuda ilyo balepaashanya pa lwalala. Alebomfya ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo pakubashinina ukuti, Yesu e Kristu wine." 
Acts19:1 Ilyo Apolo acili mu Kolinti, Paulo apitile ne nshila ya ku mulundu afika na ku Efeso. Asangako abasambi bamo." 
Acts19:2 Alabepusha ati, “Bushe ilyo mwasumine muli Yesu, mwalipokelele Mupashi Wamushilo?” Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Awe ifwe tatwatala atumfwa ukuti kwaliba Mupashi Wamushilo.”" 
Acts19:3 Elyo Paulo abepusha ati, “Nga kanshi lubatisho nshi mwabatishiwe?” Nabo bayasuka abati, “Lubatisho lwakwa Yoani.”" 
Acts19:4 Paulo abeba ati, “Ulubatisho lwakwa Yoani, lubatisho lwakulanga ukulapila no kupilibuka. Yoani aleeba abantu ukuti bali nokusumina uwali nokumukonka panuma, emukutila ni Yesu.”" 
Acts19:5 Bati bomfwe ifi, epakubatishiwa ulubatisho lwa Mfumu Yesu." 
Acts19:6 Elyo Paulo abatambalikilapo amaboko, awe Mupashi Wamushilo aisa pali bena. Balanda indimi ishalekana lekana, balasesema na mashiwi yakwa Lesa." 
Acts19:7 Aba bantu bali bonse pamo ni cikanga ikumi limo na babili. 
Acts19:8 Pa myeshi itatu Paulo aleya ku sinagoga, alelanshanya na bantu ukwabula umwenso. Alefwaya ukuti banakile Ubufumu bwakwa Lesa." 
Acts19:9 Lelo bamo bali abakosa imitima, bakaana no kusumina. Balalanda ne fyamusaalula pa cinso ca bantu pa Nshila Yesu alanga. Kanshi Paulo afumapo asenda na basambi. Cila bushiku alalanshanya nabo mu ŋanda yakusambililamo iyakwa Turano." 
Acts19:10 Alecita ifi ifine pa myaka ibili. Kanshi ici calengele ukuti Abayuda na Bagiriki abaleikala mu calo ca Asia bomfwe amashiwi ya Mfumu. 
Acts19:11 Lesa alecita ifipeshamano ifyakupapa ku maka apeele Paulo. 
Acts19:12 Kanshi abantu balasenda ifitambala ne nsalu balemukumya nafyo, bafitwala ku balwele. Abalwele balapola na bali ne mipashi yakowela yalabafumamo." 
Acts19:13 Elyo Abayuda bamo abaleendauka mukufumya imipashi yakowela, nabo baleesha ukulumbula ishina lya Mfumu Yesu, pakuti bafumye imipashi yakowela. Balasosa abati, “Ndekukonkomesha mwishina lya Mfumu Yesu, uo Paulo ashimikila, fumamo.”" 
Acts19:14 Bamwana Skefa abaume cine lubali e bamo pali abo balecita ifi. Sikefa ali shimapepo mucindami wa Bayuda. 
Acts19:15 Lelo umupashi uwakowela wabeba auti, “Yesu nalimwishiba, elyo na Paulo wine nao nalimwishiba. Nga imwe, nimwe bani?”" 
Acts19:16 Awe umuntu uwawililwe no mupashi uwakowela abafukukila na maka nganshi abacimfya. Abapamaula, abacenaula, babutuka ulubilo ubwamba ukufuma mu ŋanda." 
Acts19:17 Cilya Abayuda na Bagiriki abaleikala mu Efeso baumfwa ificitike, awe baikatwa no mwenso. Balalumbanya ne shina lya Mfumu Yesu." 
Acts19:18 Abengi pali abo basumine muli Yesu, balailetafye abene, baleyebelela pa lwalala ifintu ifibi bacitile." 
Acts19:19 Abengi pali abo abalecita ifyamalele, baleta ifitabo fyabo pamo, elyo bafyocela pa cinso ca bantu bonse. Cilya balonganya pamo imitengo ya fitabo fyonse, cafika ku ndalama sha silifa amakana amakumi yasano (50,000)." 
Acts19:20 Pa mulandu wa ifi ficitwa fya maka, ishiwi lya Mfumu lyalasalanganinakofye no kubomba na maka." 
Acts19:21 Ilyo ifi fyati fipite, Paulo apanga ukuya ku Yerusalemu ukupita mu calo ca Makedonia na mu Akaia. Alati, “Nga nafuma ku Yerusalemu, lyena elyo nkaya tandala na ku Roma.”" 
Acts19:22 Kanshi epakutangisha ku Makedonia abakumwafwako babili, Timote na Elasto. Paulo wena ashala mu calo ca Asia inshiku shinono." 
Acts19:23 Ni mu nshita ine iyo elyo kwaimine icimfulunganya icikalamba pa mulandu wakukonka Inshila Yesu alanga. 
Acts19:24 Kafula wa fyela fya silifa, ishina lyakwe ni Demetrio, alefula ifintu ifya cela ca silifa ifyakupashanya kwitempele lya mulungu uwanakashi Atemi. Muli uyu mulungu, ababomfi balemwenano nganshi." 
Acts19:25 Kanshi uyu muntu alonganya ababomfi bakwe, na bambi bonse abakwete imilimo yabo iyapalana no mulimo wakwe. Alabeba ati, “Mwe bantu mwe, namwishiba ukuti ni muli uyu mulimo emo tumwena icuma." 
Acts19:26 Nomba mulemona no kuyumfwila ifyo uyu Paulo alecita. Alesosa ukuti, imilungu iyipangwa na bantu, taili imilungu ine ine iyoo. Kabili abantu ba muno Efeso, elyo ni cikangafye na bonse aba mu calo ca Asia, Paulo nabongola, balemumfwila." 
Acts19:27 Nomba iciletiinya nici cakuti, umulimo wesu abantu bakausuula. Lelo teici ceka, ne tempele lya mulungu uwanakashi Atemi mukulu nalyo abantu bakalisuula. Elyo no mucinshi bapeela uyu mulungu, uo bapepa mu Asia monse na mwisonde lyonse, ukapwa.”" 
Acts19:28 Abantu cilya baumfwa aya mashiwi bafulwa nganshi. Balapunda abati, “Atemi mukulu wa bena Efeso!”" 
Acts19:29 Awe icongo ca bantu balepunda cakumana umusumba onse. Awe ibumba lya balepunda lyaikata abantu babili abena Makedonia, Gayo na Alisitako, abaleenda na Paulo. Baya balebatantanya ku cibansa ca fyangalo." 
Acts19:30 Paulo alafwaya ukuya kwibumba, lelo abasambi bamulesha." 
Acts19:31 Bacilolo bamo aba mu calo ca Asia, nabo batuma inkombe ishakumweba ukuti eya ku cibansa ca fyangalo." 
Acts19:32 Kanshi ukulongana kwabo kwalifye ukwa fyongo fyeka fyeka. Abantu bamo balepunda ifi, elyo bambi nabo balesowesha fimbi. Abengi bena tabaishibe neco balonganine." 
Acts19:33 Kabinge bamo ico bamona Abayuda balesunkila Alekisanda kuntanshi, bena balatontonkanya ukuti alipo ne fyakulanda. Elyo Alekisanda aimya ukuboko pakuti batalale. Alefwaya ukuti abalondolwele bwino bwino ifyo cili." 
Acts19:34 Nomba cilya baishiba ukuti Muyuda, bonse balapunda pa nsa shibili cimo cine baleti, “Atemi mukulu wa bena Efeso!”" 
Acts19:35 Kalemba mukalamba wa musumba asuka atalalika ibumba. Alasosa ati, “Mwe bena Efeso, nga muntu nshi ushaishiba ukuti, umusumba wa Efeso e kalinda we tempele lyakupepelamo Atemi Mukulu? Kabili e kalinda wa cilubi cakwe cilya caponene ukufuma ku mulu?" 
Acts19:36 Tapali nangu umo uwingakaana ifi fintu. Kanshi imwe tekenifye imitima, mwipupumina mukucita nelyo cimo." 
Acts19:37 Aba bantu muletele kuno, tabaibapo nelyo cimo mu matempele. Elyo kabili tabalandapo nangu cimo icamusaalula pali lesa wesu." 
Acts19:38 Kanshi Demetrio na babomfi bakwe nga palipo ico umuntu abalufyanya, eko fili ifilye, na balashi eko bali. Kanshi ni ku cilye eko bengatwala umulandu." 
Acts19:39 Kumfwa nga palipo fimbi ificilile pali ifyo, ninshi muli nokutwala ku cilye ca bena musumba." 
Acts19:40 Pantu pali ifi fyacitika lelo, kuti batupeela umulandu wakucita icimfulunganya. Tapali mulandu wakupangila ici congo conse. Tekuti pabe na cakusosa mukuipokololako.”" 
Acts19:41 Cilya apwa ukusosa ifi, asalanganya abantu abalongene." 
Acts20:1 Ilyo ifimfulunganya fyapita, Paulo alonganya abasambi bonse pamo. Alabeba amashiwi yacikoseleshi, elyo abashalikapo, aya na ku calo ca Makedonia." 
Acts20:2 Apita mu fifulo ifingi ifya muli cilya calo, alekoselesha abasumina mu mashiwi ayengi. Elyo aya ku Akaia." 
Acts20:3 Ku Akaia aikalako imyeshi itatu. Elyo Paulo alafwaya ukuya no bwato ku Siria. Cilya aumfwa ku bantu ukuti Abayuda balemupangila, kanshi epakutila, “Ndi nokubwelelamofye ne nshila yakupita mu Makedonia.”" 
Acts20:4 Abaile na Paulo ni Sopata mwana Pailusi umwina Belea, na Alisitako na Sekundo abena Tesalonika, na Gayo umwina Debe, na Timote, na Tukiko na Trofimo bena bafumine ku calo ca Asia." 
Acts20:5 Aba bena batangilako, balatulolela ku Troa." 
Acts20:6 Cilya Inshikunkulu Yakulyamo Imikate Ishatutumuka yapita, na ifwe twafuma ku Filipi no bwato. Panuma ya nshiku shisano, twafika ku Troa, eko twabasanga. Mu Troa, twaikalamo umulungu umo." 
Acts20:7 Pa bushiku bwakutampa umulungu awe twalongene kukulya Umulalilo wa Mfumu. Elyo Paulo alafunda abantu. Ico ali nokuya ulucelo, awe akonkanyapo ukufunda mpaka cafika pakati ka bushiku." 
Acts20:8 Kabili mu muputule wa pamulu umo twalongene mwali ifisaniko ifingi. 
Acts20:9 Umulumendo umo ishina lyakwe Yutiko aikele pa windo. Ilyo Paulo acili alelanda, Yutiko alashipula, asuka alala. Cilya alalisha utulo, elyo aponena panshi ukufuma pa muputule wa lupungu lwabutatu. Ilyo bamutola, basanga nafwa." 
Acts20:10 Elyo Paulo aikila panshi, afukama apali umulumendo, amufukatila. Alaeba abantu ati, “Mwisakamana iyoo, acili umumi!”" 
Acts20:11 Elyo Paulo abwelela ku muputule wa pamulu, amokaula umukate, twalalya nokulya. Kabili Paulo akonkanyapo ukulanda inshita ikalamba, bwasuka bwaca. Elyo abasha aya." 
Acts20:12 Elyo babuula umulumendo bamutwala kumwabo, abansansa nganshi." 
Acts20:13 Nomba ifwe twatangila twaya no bwato ku Aso. Pantu Paulo apingwile ati eko mukesa mbuula, ico wena alefwaya ukuyako na makasa." 
Acts20:14 Cilya atusanga ku Aso, elyo twamusenda no bwato twaya na ku Mitulene." 
Acts20:15 Bwaisaca, kabili twaima no bwato twaya fika na mupepi ne cishi ca Kiosi. Elyo ubushiku bwakonkapo twafika na ku cishi ca Samosi. Kabili mu bwakonkelepo twafika na ku Mileto." 
Acts20:16 Paulo elyo apingula ukukanapita ku Efeso, pakukanapwa inshita mu calo ca Asia. Alefwaya ukufika bwangu mu Yerusalemu, ilyo ubushiku bwa Pentekoste tabulafika." 
Acts20:17 Ilyo Paulo ali mu Mileto elyo atumine amashiwi ku bakalamba ba lukuta mu Efeso ukuti bese bakumane nankwe mu Mileto. 
Acts20:18 Ilyo bafika, alabeba ati, “Imwe mwalishiba ifyo naleikala inshita yonse twali na imwe, ukufuma pa bushiku bwakubalilapo ilyo nafikile mu calo ca Asia." 
Acts20:19 Nangu Abayuda bancushishe nganshi kufyo balepangila, lelo nalebomba ngo mubomfi wa Mfumu, uwaicefya ne filambapo." 
Acts20:20 Mwalishiba nokuti nshatalile nshingashinga nelyo panono ukubila fyonse fyakumwafwilisha. Lelo nalemufunda pa lwalala na mu mayanda yenu. 
Acts20:21 Abayuda na Bagiriki bena, bonse nalebakonkomesha ukuti balapile, balukile na kuli Lesa, basumine na muli Yesu, Imfumu yesu." 
Acts20:22 Nomba mukukonka ifyo Mupashi alefwaya, ndeya ku Yerusalemu. Nshishibe ne fikaya ncitikilako." 
Acts20:23 Ico njishibe cakuti Mupashi Wamushilo alensokako ukuti, icifungo na macushi filendolela." 
Acts20:24 Lelo ine ukwenda umumi tacinsakamika iyoo. Icinsakamikafye kupwishishisha ukubomba umulimo Imfumu Yesu yampeela. Umulimo wakuba kambone wa Mbila Nsuma ya cikuuku cakwa Lesa. 
Acts20:25 “Nomba ninjishiba ukuti, imwe bonse mwebo naleshimikila ifya Bufumu ilyo nalepitana uko muli, tamwakamone nakabili." 
Acts20:26 Kanshi mu bushiku bwa lelo ndemweba ukuti umo nga alufya umweo wakwe, ine uyo te mulandu wandi." 
Acts20:27 Pantu nalimwebafye bwino bwino fyonse ifyo Lesa afwaya. 
Acts20:28 Kanshi muleisunga bwino, mulesunga no mukuni onse Mupashi Wamushilo amupeela ukwangalila. Mube bakacema ba lukuta lwakwa Lesa, ulo umwine ainonkela ku mfwa yakwe." 
Acts20:29 Ninjishiba ukuti nga naya, imimbulu iyikali ikamwingilila, elyo tayakapanye mukuni wakwa Kristu." 
Acts20:30 Na pali imwe bene pakema bamo, bakalalanda ifyabufi pakuti bongole abasambi, balebakonka." 
Acts20:31 Kanshi muleenda abaibukila! Muleibukisha ifyo akasuba no bushiku pa myaka itatu, nalemusokako umo umo ndelila ne filamba." 
Acts20:32 “Nomba namulubwila mu minwe yakwa Lesa na kwishiwi lyakwe ilyacikuuku. Ili shiwi lyakumwafwilisha no kumupeela ifyabupyani ifyo Lesa apekanishisha abantu abo aisangulwila. 
Acts20:33 Ine nshatala nkwatapo ulunkumbwa lwa fyuma nangu indalama sha muntu iyoo. 
Acts20:34 Na imwe mwe bene mwalishiba ukuti fyonse ifyo nalekabila pamo pene nabo twaba nabo, nalefibombelafye ne mwine." 
Acts20:35 Nalimulanga ukuti tuli nokwafwa imbulwamaka mukubombesha. Tuli nokwibukisha amashiwi ya Mfumu Yesu ayo iyine yasosa aiti, ‘Insansa shaba mukupeela ukucila mukupokelela.’ ”" 
Acts20:36 Cilya Paulo apwa ukulanda, elyo afukama alapepa pamo nabo." 
Acts20:37 Awe bonse balalila, balamukumbatila no kumutomona pakumufishapo." 
Acts20:38 Nomba icabapeele ubulanda nganshi nico alandile ati, “Tamwakamone nakabili.” Awe baima balamushindika na ku bwato." 
Acts21:1 Awe twashalikapo abakalamba ba mu Efeso. Elyo twaima no bwato twalungamafye ukucilinganya bemba, twafika na ku cishi ca Kosi. Ubushiku ubwakonkapo twafika na ku cishi ca Rode. Elyo ukufuma ku Rode epakuya ku Patala." 
Acts21:2 Ku Patala eko twasangile ubwato bwaleya ku Fonisia. Kanshi ebo twaya nabo. 
Acts21:3 Twapita mupepi icakuti twalamona ne cishi ca Saiprasi. Elyo twapitila lubali lwa ku kapinda ka kulyo ka ici cishi, twaya na ku Siria. Ubwato bwesu bwaya shiika mu musumba wa Turi, pantu mu bwato mwali ifipe ifyakupatulamo." 
Acts21:4 Mu Turi twasangilemo abasambi. Twaikala nabo umulungu umo. Ico Mupashi abasokolwela, bena balesha Paulo ukuti eya ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts21:5 Nomba ilyo inshita yakufumako yafika, twaima twalaya. Awe bonse pamo na bakashi babo na bana batushindika ukufika na kunse ya musumba. Elyo twafukama pa lulamba lwa bemba twalapepa." 
Acts21:6 Elyo twashalikanapo, ifwe twaingila mu bwato, bena babwelelamo kumwabo." 
Acts21:7 Ukufuma ku Turi, twakonkenyepo ubulendo bwesu no bwato, twaya shiika ku Tolemai. Twaposhanya na bamunyinefwe, twaikala nabo ubushiku bumo." 
Acts21:8 Bwaisaca twaima, twaya fika na ku Kesalia. Mu Kesalia twafikilila kwa Filipo kabila wa Mbila Nsuma, eko twaikala nankwe. Uyu Filipo, e umo pali balya baume cine lubali abasalilwe mu Yerusalemu." 
Acts21:9 Filipo ali na bana abanakashi bane, abashaupwa, bakasesema." 
Acts21:10 Cilya twaikalako inshiku shimo shimo, kwaisa kasesema umo ukufuma ku Yudeya, ishina lyakwe ni Agabu." 
Acts21:11 Cilya aisa uko tuli, abuula umushipi wakwa Paulo. Aikaka umwine amakasa ne fisansa. Elyo asosa ati, “Mupashi Wamushilo atila ati, ‘Umwine wa uyu mushipi efyo bakamukaka ku Bayuda mu Yerusalemu. Kabili bakamuposa na mu minwe ya Benafyalo.’ ”" 
Acts21:12 Ilyo twaumfwa ifi, ifwe na bakaya twalapapata Paulo ukuti eya ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts21:13 Lelo Paulo wena atwasuka ati, “Bushe cinshi mwalalilishikila no kuntompola umutima? Ala ine ndifye uwaiteyanya tekukukakwafye mu Yerusalemu, lelo no kufwila pa mulandu wa Mfumu Yesu.”" 
Acts21:14 Awe twafilwa ukumunasha. Twaikalafye tondolo twati, “Ifyo Imfumu ilefwaya naficitike.”" 
Acts21:15 Ilyo papita inshiku shimo shimo, elyo twalonga ifipe fyesu, twaya na ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts21:16 Pakuya, twaya na basambi bamo abena Kesalia. Batutwala ku ŋanda kwa Nasoni, uko twali nokulaikala. Uyu ali umwina Saiprasi kabili umusambi wakale na kale." 
Acts21:17 Ilyo twafikile mu Yerusalemu, ababwananyina batusekelela ne nsansa nganshi." 
Acts21:18 Bwaisaca twaya pamo na Paulo kukupempula Yakobo. Eko twasanga na bakalamba bonse. 
Acts21:19 Awe Paulo alabaposhapo bonse. Elyo alabalondolwela fyonse ifyo Lesa acitile ku Benafyalo pa mulandu wa kubomba kwakwe. 
Acts21:20 Nabo cilya baumfwa ifi, balalumbanya Lesa. Elyo balaeba Paulo abati, “Kanshi wamona we munyinefwe, Abayuda amakana na makana nabasumina mu Mfumu Yesu. Kabili bantu abaikatisha Amafunde yakwa Mose." 
Acts21:21 Nomba bonse balyumfwa ukuti iwe ulafunda Abayuda bonse abaikala mu Benafyalo ukukanakonka Amafunde yakwa Mose. Ulabalesha ukusembulula abana babo. Ulabalesha no kukonka intambi sha Ciyuda. 
Acts21:22 Kanshi tulecita shani? Pantu ukumfwa kwena baleumfwa ukuti nawisa. 
Acts21:23 Kanshi ucite ifyo twalakweba. Tulipo na bantu abaume bane abalaya icilayo kuli Lesa. 
Acts21:24 Kanshi kabiye nabo muye sangululwa nabo pamo. Ulipile ne ndalama shakubabeyela imishishi ku mitwe. Lyena bonse baleishiba ukuti ifyo bomfwa pali iwe fyabufi, kabili ulakonka na Mafunde yakwa Mose." 
Acts21:25 Lelo abasumina Abenafyalo bena twalibalembela kalata pafyo twapingwile ukuti, tabali nakulyako inama batuula ku tulubi ne nama bashateeta pa mukoshi, nangu ukulyako umulopa, no kutaluka ku bulalelale.”" 
Acts21:26 Kanshi ubushiku ubwakonkapo Paulo epakubuula aba bantu, aisangulula pamo nabo. Elyo aingila mwi Tempele. Alaishibisha abantu ilyo inshita yakusangululwa ikapwa, nelyo cila umo umo ali nokutuula umutuulo." 
Acts21:27 Ilyo inshiku cine lubali shaya kukupwa, Abayuda bamo aba ku calo ca Asia bamona Paulo mwi Tempele. Aba bantu basokawila ibumba lya bantu, baikata Paulo." 
Acts21:28 Balapunda abati, “Mwe bena Israeli, twafweniko! Ala uyu e muntu apitana mpanga yonse, alefunda abantu bonse ukusuula umushobo wesu, Amafunde yakwa Mose ne Tempele. Nomba nakowesha ne Ncende Yamushilo, naingisha Abenafyalo mwi Tempele.”" 
Acts21:29 Balesosa ifi, ico bamwene Tulofimo umwina Efeso bali na Paulo mu musumba, kanshi balatontonkanya ukuti namuleta na mwi Tempele." 
Acts21:30 Awe mu musumba mwabafye icimfulunganya ceka ceka. Abantu balongana baikata Paulo. Balamutintanya, bamufumisha kunse ye Tempele. Elyo apopene baisalako ne fiibi fye Tempele." 
Acts21:31 Aba bantu balafwaya ukwipaya Paulo. Elyo amashiwi yafika ku mukalamba wa fita fya bena Roma. Bamweba abati, “Mu Yerusalemu mwabafye icimfulunganya ceka ceka.”" 
Acts21:32 Nao apopene abuula abakalamba ba fita umwanda umo ne fita, eko babutukila. Cilya abantu bamona umukalamba wa fita ne fita fyakwe, awe baleka ukuma Paulo." 
Acts21:33 Elyo umukalamba wa fita aya kuli Paulo amwikata aeba nokuti bamukake iminyololo ibili. Umukalamba wa fita aipusha ati, “Ngoyu muntu nani? Finshi acita?”" 
Acts21:34 Nomba abantu mwibumba balapundafye, bamo basosa ifi, bambi basosa fimbi. Kanshi ku mulandu wa congo, umukalamba wa fita afilwa ukwishiba icilengele icimfulunganya. Kanshi umukalamba wa fita akonkomesha ifita ukumusenda mu ncende umwikala ifita." 
Acts21:35 Cilya bafika pa matabo, ibumba lyacilamo ku bukali, icakuti ifita fyasumbulafye Paulo pakumusenda." 
Acts21:36 Bonse abalekonka panuma balepunda ati, “Mwipayeni!”" 
Acts21:37 Kanshi ilyo baleingisha Paulo mu ncende umwikala ifita, Paulo aipusha umukalamba wa fita ati, “Bushe tekuti nandepo cimo na imwe?” Umukalamba wa fita amwasuka ati, “Bushe walishiba ukulanda Icigiriki?" 
Acts21:38 Bushe iwe tauli ulya mwina Egupto, tapalati papite inshiku ishingi apo waimishe icimfulunganya, waya ne fipondo amakana yane mu matololo?”" 
Acts21:39 Paulo amwasuka ati, “Ine ndi Muyuda, umwina Taso, umusumba uwalumbuka nganshi mu calo ca Kilikia. Napapata leka nande kuli aba bantu.”" 
Acts21:40 Awe umukalamba wa fita amusuminisha. Paulo aiminina pa matabo. Aimya no kuboko pakuti abantu baleke icongo. Ilyo baleka icongo, Paulo alabeba mu Cihibulu ati," 
Acts22:1 “Bamunyinane, na imwe bashifwe, kutikeni kufyo nalamweba ukuti ine nshili na mulandu.”" 
Acts22:2 Nomba cilya baumfwa uko Paulo alebalandila mu Cihibulu, awe lyena patalalafye tondolo." 
Acts22:3 Elyo Paulo nao alabeba ati, “Ine ndi Muyuda. Nafyalilwe mu Taso mu calo ca Kilikia. Ukukula kwena nakulile muli uno wine musumba wa Yerusalemu. Kafundisha uwansambilisha ni Gamalieli. Alinsambilisha bwino bwino ukulakonka Amafunde ayo Mose apeele ifikolwe fyesu. Nali uwakalabana nganshi mukubombela Lesa ngefi fine na imwe bonse muli lelo." 
Acts22:4 Naleesha no kwipaya abantu abakonka Inshila Yesu alanga. Nalekaka abaume na banakashi no kubaposa mu cifungo. 
Acts22:5 Shimapepo mukalamba na bashicilye bonse e bakambone bandi. Kabili aba bene ebampeele amakalata yakutwala kuli bamunyinabo intungulushi sha Bayuda mu Damasiko. Kanshi na ine epakuyako kukuya ikata abena Kristu no kubaleta ku Yerusalemu kukwisa bakanda.” 
Acts22:6 “Kanshi natile ilyo ndeya napalama ku Damasiko, ninshi ilyo akasuba kafika pakati ka mutwe pa nshita ya 12:00. Awe apopene ulubuuto lwafuma mu mulu, lwasanika ukushinguluka apo ndi." 
Acts22:7 Awe nawa panshi. Elyo naumfwa ishiwi lilenjeba aliti, ‘Saulo, Saulo ee, cinshi ico ulencushisha?’" 
Acts22:8 Na ine naipusha nati, ‘Niwani we Mfumu?’ Nao anjasuka ati, ‘Nine Yesu uwa ku Nasaleti, neo iwe ulecusha.’" 
Acts22:9 Abantu abo twali nabo, ulubuuto lwena balilumwene, lelo ishiwi lya walensosha, lyena tabalyumfwile." 
Acts22:10 Na ine naipusha nati, ‘Nga ndecita shani we Mfumu?’ Imfumu epakunjeba ati, ‘Ima akuya mu Damasiko. Emo balaya kweba fyonse ifyo Lesa apekanya ukuti efyo uli nokucita.’" 
Acts22:11 Ku mulandu wa kubekesha kwa lulya lubuuto, nasangwike impofu. Abo twali nabo epakunjikata ku minwe bantwala na mu Damasiko." 
Acts22:12 “Mu Damasiko mwali umuntu umo, ishina lyakwe ni Anania. Ali umuntu uwapetamina Lesa, alenakila na Mafunde yakwa Mose. Kabili na Bayuda bonse mu Damasiko bamucindike nganshi." 
Acts22:13 Kanshi Anania epakwisa kuli ine. Aisa iminina apo ndi. Anjeba ati, ‘Saulo, we munyinane akulolesha nakabili!’ Awe pa nshita ine iyo nalalolesha, namumona no kumumona." 
Acts22:14 Elyo asosa ati, ‘Lesa wa fikolwe fyesu alikusala pakuti wishibe ifyo alefwaya ukucita. Alikusala nokuti umone Uwakaele, no kumfwa ishiwi lyakwe ilyo alelanda." 
Acts22:15 Pantu niwe uli nokuba kambone wakwe ku bantu bonse. Uli nokubeba ifyo umfwile nefyo umwene. 
Acts22:16 Nga kanshi finshi ifyo ulepembela? Ale ima, ubatishiwe, ne fyabubifi fyobe fisambike ilyo ulekuuta Imfumu.’" 
Acts22:17 “Elyo nabwelulukila ku Yerusalemu. Ilyo ndi pakupepa mwi Tempele, namona icimonwa." 
Acts22:18 Namona Imfumu, ilenjeba aiti, ‘Endesha, fuma bwangu mu Yerusalemu. Pantu abantu muno tabakasumine bukambone bobe pali ine.’" 
Acts22:19 Na ine nayasuka nati, ‘We Mfumu, aba bantu balishiba ukuti nine naleya ku masinagoga no kuma abasumina muli iwe no kubaposa mu cifungo." 
Acts22:20 Na lilya baleipaya Stefano kambone obe, na ine wine epo nali. Kabili nasuminishe nokuti bamwipaye, nasunga ne nsalu sha balemwipaya.’" 
Acts22:21 Lelo Imfumu yanjebele aiti, ‘Kabiyefye, pantu ndekutuma ukutali ku Benafyalo.’ ”" 
Acts22:22 Abantu bonse balekutikafye mpaka ilyo Paulo asosele aya mashiwi ayakuya ku benafyalo. Elyo batampa ukulapundisha nganshi abati, “Mwipayeni! Uyu muntu alingilefye ukufwa!”" 
Acts22:23 Balapanga icongo nganshi, balepukanya insalu shabo mu mulu, baleulwila no lukungu mu mulu." 
Acts22:24 Umukalamba wa fita akonkomesha ifita fyakwe ukwingisha Paulo mu ncende umwikala ifita. Aeba ifita ukuma Paulo ifikoti pakuti alondolole icilengele ukuti abantu balepanga icongo umusango uyu. 
Acts22:25 Cilya bamukaka pakuti bamume ifikoti, Paulo aipusha umukalamba wa fita umwanda umo uwaiminine mupepi ati, “Bushe amafunde yalisuminisha ukuma umwina Roma ifikoti ukwabula ukuti bamulubulwishe?”" 
Acts22:26 Cilya umukalamba wa fita umwanda umo aumfwa ifi, aya ku mukalamba wabo. Amweba ati, “Bushe nawishiba ico ulecita? Uyu muntu, mwina Roma!”" 
Acts22:27 Kanshi umukalamba wa fita epakuya kuli Paulo amwipusha ati, “Unjebe, bushe uli mwina Roma?” Paulo nao amwasuka ati, “Ee.”" 
Acts22:28 Umukalamba wa fita ati, “Ine naposele indalama ishingi pakuba umwina Roma.” Paulo amwasuka ati, “Ine nafyalwafye umwina Roma.”" 
Acts22:29 Awe apopene abantu abali nokumulubulwisha bamutalukako. No mukalamba wa fita nao aikatwa no mwenso, ico aishiba ukuti Paulo mwina Roma, kabili namukaka na mu minyololo." 
Acts22:30 Kabili ubushiku ubwakonkelepo umukalamba wa fita, ico alefwaya ukwishiba bwino umulandu Abayuda balefwaila ukwipaya Paulo, alimukakwile. Elyo aeba bashimapepo bacindami na bashicilye bonse aba cilye cikalamba ica Bayuda ukulongana. Elyo aleta Paulo amwiminika na mu lwalala." 
Acts23:1 Paulo alolekesha bashicilye, elyo asosa ati, “Mwe bamunyinane, ukufikafye na lelo ine umutima wandi tausakamikwa pa cintu nelyo cimo pa cinso cakwa Lesa.”" 
Acts23:2 Elyo Shimapepo mukalamba, Anania aeba abali mupepi na Paulo ukumuma pa kanwa." 
Acts23:3 Paulo amweba ati, “Lesa na iwe akakuma, we cibumba cashingulwa ne mpemba we! Wikele kuno kukupingula umulandu wandi ukulingana na Mafunde yakwa Mose kabili wapula mu Mafunde yakwa Mose pakweba ukuti bangume!”" 
Acts23:4 Elyo abeminine mupepi na Paulo bamweba abati, “Ala, uyu uletuka ni Shimapepo mukalamba wakwa Lesa!”" 
Acts23:5 Paulo epakwasuka ati, “Mwe bamunyinane, ala nshishibe ukuti ni Shimapepo mukalamba. Pantu calilembwa ukuti, ‘Wilasaalula kateeka wa mushobo obe.’ ”" 
Acts23:6 Paulo elyo amona ukuti mwibumba bamo Basaduki, bambi nabo Bafalise. Aikatisha ishiwi alaeba icilye ati, “Bamunyinane! Ine ndi Mufalise, na bafyashi bandi Bafalise. Ico bandetele kukulubulula, nico ine nsubila ukuti abafwa bakashukuka!”" 
Acts23:7 Cilyafye Paulo asosa ifi, apopene Abafalise na Basaduki batampa ukubikana ifikansa. Awe bashicilye bayakanikana pabili." 
Acts23:8 Pantu Abasaduki bena batila, “Takwaba kushukuka kwa bafwa, takwaba bamalaika, takwaba na mipashi.” Lelo Abafalise bena balisumina ukuti fyonse fitatu eko fyaba." 
Acts23:9 Awe pabuka ne congo icikalamba. Bakafundisha bamafunde bamo aba mu mpuka ya Bafalise nabo baiminamo. Balasosekesha nganshi abati, “Ifwe tatumwene cibi nelyo cimo ico uyu muntu acita. Epali umupashi nangu malaika eumwebele.”" 
Acts23:10 Ifikansa fyasuka fyabipisha icakuti umukalamba wa fita umwenso wamwikata ati, “Balaipaya Paulo.” Kanshi epakutumako ifita ifyakuya fumyako Paulo ku maka, no kumutwala mu ncende umwikala ifita." 
Acts23:11 Cilya bwaila, Imfumu yaisa iminina apali Paulo, yamweba aiti, “Ushipefye! Ifi fine walanga mu Yerusalemu ukuti uli kambone wandi, efyo uli nokuba kambone wandi na mu Roma mwine.”" 
Acts23:12 Cilya bwaca Abayuda bamo balilongene mu bumfisolo, balapangana. Balapa no mulapo abati, “Ifwe tatuli nakulya nangu ukunwa nelyo cimo kanofye twatala twaipaya Paulo.”" 
Acts23:13 Abantu balapile uyu mulapo balicilile amakumi yane. 
Acts23:14 Elyo baya kuli bashimapepo bacindami na ku bakalamba. Balabeba abati, “Ifwe natulapa umulapo ukuti tatuli nakulya nelyo cimo kanofye twatala twaipaya Paulo." 
Acts23:15 Nomba imwe na bashicilye, mwebe umukalamba wa fita ukuti amuletele Paulo. Mucite kwati mulefwaya ukushininkisha umulandu wakwa Paulo bwino bwino. Ifwe natuiteyanya ukumwipaya ilyo talati afike kuli imwe.”" 
Acts23:16 Lelo umwipwa wakwa Paulo umwaume aumfwako uko balemupangila. Kanshi aya ingila mu ncende yaleikalamo ifita. Ayashimikilako na Paulo ifyo balemupangila! 
Acts23:17 Paulo epakwita umo umukalamba wa fita umwanda umo. Amweba ati, “Twala uyu mulumendo ku mukalamba wa fita, alipo na fimo ifyakumweba.”" 
Acts23:18 Umukalamba wa fita umwanda umo, nao asenda umulumendo amutwala ku mukalamba wa fita. Amweba ati, “Umufungwa Paulo acinjita, elyo anjeba nokuti, ‘Twala uyu mulumendo ku mukalamba wa fita, alipo na fimo ifyakumweba.’ ”" 
Acts23:19 Umukalamba wa fita aikata umulumendo ku minwe amusenda ukwakuti baba beka. Elyo amwipusha ati, “Finshi ifyo uli nokunjeba?”" 
Acts23:20 Umulumendo amweba ati, “Abayuda nabomfwana ukuti mailo bakamulomba ukubaletela Paulo ku cilye. Bakacita kwati balefwaya ukushininkisha umulandu wakwa Paulo bwino bwino." 
Acts23:21 Mwikabasuminisha, pantu kuli abantu ukucila amakumi yane abakamubelamina. Nabalapa no mulapo abati, ‘Ifwe tatuli nakulya nangu ukunwa nelyo cimo, kanofye twatala twaipaya Paulo.’ Kanshi nabaiteyanya, balelolelafye ukuti ukasuminishe.”" 
Acts23:22 Umukalamba wa fita aeba umulumendo ati, “Kabiye, nomba tecakwesha ukwebako umuntu ukuti naunshimikilako ifi fintu.”" 
Acts23:23 Elyo umukalamba wa fita aita abakalamba ba fita umwanda umo babili. Alabeba ati, “Pekanyeni ifita imyanda ibili abakuya ku Kesalia. Mupekanishishepo ne fita fya pali bakabalwe amakumi cine lubali, elyo ne fita fisenda amafumo imyanda ibili. Bali nokwima lelo ubushiku pa nshita ya 21:00." 
Acts23:24 Bapekanishishe Paulo bakabalwe bamo abakwendelapo. Mukaye mufisha umutende ku mulashi Felikisi.” 
Acts23:25 Elyo umukalamba wa fita alemba kalata ati," 
Acts23:26 “Ine ne Kilaudio Lusia, natuma kalata kuli imwe kanabesa, mwe balashi ba Felikisi. Mwapoleni mukwai." 
Acts23:27 Uyu muntu, Abayuda balimwikata, bapene no kumwipaya. Ico naumfwile ukuti mwina Roma, kanshi naileko ne fita fyandi epakuya mupokololako." 
Acts23:28 Nalefwaya ukwishiba umulandu ababifishe. Eico namutwalile na ku cilye cabo. 
Acts23:29 Naile sanga ukuti uyu muntu takwete mulandu wakuti bamwipailapo nangu ukumuposa mu cifungo. Umulandu walipofye kupusana pa mafunde yabo abene. 
Acts23:30 Nomba ico naumfwile ukuti Abayuda balemupangila balefwaya ukumwipaya, eco namutumina kuli imwe. Elyo abo bapeela Paulo umulandu, bena nimbeba ukuleta umulandu kuli imwe.”" 
Acts23:31 Awe ifita fyacita fyonse ngomo mwine bafyebele. Fyasenda Paulo ubushiku, fyaya mufisha ku Antipatili." 
Acts23:32 Cilya bwaca, ifita fya pa makasa fyena fyabwelelamo ku cifulo fyafumine. Ifita fya pali bakabalwe fyena fyakonkanyapo ukuya nankwe." 
Acts23:33 Cilya fyafika ku Kesalia, ifita fyapeela kalata ku mulashi, fyamutwalila na Paulo." 
Acts23:34 Cilya umulashi apwa ukubelenga kalata, aipusha Paulo ati, “Ni ku calo nshi wafuma?” Elyo aumfwa ukuti ni ku Kilikia." 
Acts23:35 Aeba Paulo ati, “Abakupeela umulandu nga baisa elyo nkesa umfwa umulandu obe.” Elyo akonkomesha ukuti basunge Paulo mwisano ilyali kale ilyakwa Herodi. Babikeko na bakumulonda." 
Acts24:1 Cilya papita inshiku shisano, Shimapepo mukalamba Anania aile ku Kesalia na bakalamba, pamo na fundi wa mafunde, ishina lyakwe ni Tetulo. Batwala no mulandu wakwa Paulo ku mulashi Felikisi." 
Acts24:2 Elyo baita Paulo. Tetulo atampa no kulondolola umulandu wakwa Paulo ati, “We kanabesa Felikisi, ifwe twaikala mu cibote pa nshita iyikalamba ico muli ntungulushi yamano. Kabili namuletamo ifintu ifingi ifya buyantanshi mu calo cesu." 
Acts24:3 Kabili inshita yonsefye mpanga yonse ifi ifintu filatusansamusha. Kanshi tulemutotela nganshi. 
Acts24:4 Nshilefwaya ukumuposela inshita, lelo nabakutike cinono kufyo twalalanda." 
Acts24:5 Ifwe natusanga ukuti uyu muntu lisakamika lya muntu. Aleta icimfulunganya konse pano isonde ukuli Abayuda. Kabili e ntungulushi ya mpuka ya bena Nasaleti. 
Acts24:6 Kabili alefwaya no kukoweshe Tempele, elyo na ifwe twamwikata. [Twalefwaya ukumupingula ukulinga na mafunde yesu." 
Acts24:7 Lelo umukalamba wa fita Lusia aisa mufumyapo ku makafye. 
Acts24:8 Elyo Lusia aeba bonse abapeele Paulo umulandu ukuti bakese kuli imwe.] Mumwipushe mwe bene, mulesanga ukuti muli cishinka muli fyonse tulelanda pali uyu muntu.”" 
Acts24:9 Abayuda nabo basuminisha abati, “Cine cine nifyo fine.”" 
Acts24:10 Elyo umulashi aimya ukuboko alembula Paulo pakuti nao alande. Paulo nao elyo alasosa ati, “Ninjishiba ukuti nomba imyaka naifula apo mwabela kaputula wamilandu muli uno mushobo. Eico ndi ne nsansa pakuipokololako pa cinso cenu." 
Acts24:11 Na mwe bene kuti mwaishiba, tekuti cicile pa nshiku ikumi limo na shibili apo nailile kukupepa ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts24:12 Abayuda tabansangile ndebikana ifikansa no muntu nelyo umo mwi Tempele, nangu ukusokawila abantu mu masinagoga, nangufye ni mu musumba mwine." 
Acts24:13 Elyo tapalifye nangu umo uwingalanda ifyacishinka ifyakuti fyanshinina pali iyo milandu balenjebelela. 
Acts24:14 Kwena nasumina ukuti mpepa Lesa wa fikolwe fyesu ukukonka Inshila Yesu alanga, iyo bena baleti, ni mpuka ishili yacine. Lelo ine nalisumina mu Mafunde yakwa Mose na muli fyonse ifyalembwa na bakasesema." 
Acts24:15 Pamo pene nga bena, na ine ndetetekela ukuti Lesa akabusha abantu abololoke na babifi ku bafwa." 
Acts24:16 Eico kanshi ine lyonse mfwaya ukwenda no mutima uwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa na bantu. 
Acts24:17 “Kwena pa myaka imo imo nalifumine mu Yerusalemu. Nabwelelefye kukuleta ifyabupe ku mushobo wandi ifyakwafwako abalanda, elyo no kulekela Lesa ilambo." 
Acts24:18 Ilyo ncili ndecita ifi elyo bansanga mwi Tempele, ninshi elyo napwafye amapepo yakuisangulula. Tamwali ibumba lya bantu, kabili takwali na cimfulunganya." 
Acts24:19 Lelo mwali Abayuda bamo ukufuma ku calo ca Asia. Aba ebafwile ukuleta umulandu wandi kuli imwe, kumfwa nga nabakwata umulandu na ine." 
Acts24:20 Nangu aba bene bali pano, nabasose umulandu basangile nabifya ilyo naiminine mu cilye cabo." 
Acts24:21 Shikanofye ninshi ilyo baiminine pakati kabo naikatishe ishiwi nasosa nati, ‘Ni pa mulandu wa kushukuka kwa bafwa eco ndelubulwila pali imwe lelo.’ ”" 
Acts24:22 Kanshi eico Felikisi uwaishibe bwino ifya pa Nshila Yesu alanga, aisala icilye. Abeba ati, “Umukalamba wa fita Lusia nga aisa, elyo nkesa putula umulandu wenu.”" 
Acts24:23 Elyo aeba umukalamba wa fita umwanda umo ukuti bali nokulasopa Paulo. Bali nokumona ukuti aleyendela icilingile, elyo na bantu bakwe balemucitila ifyo alekabila." 
Acts24:24 Cilya papita inshiku shimo shimo, Felikisi aishile no mukashi wakwe Dusila, Umuyuda. Epakweba ukuti bamuletele Paulo. Elyo Felikisi alakutika kufyo Paulo alelanda palwa cisumino muli Kristu Yesu." 
Acts24:25 Nomba ilyo Paulo atampa ukulanda palwa kucita ifyo Lesa afwaya, ukuisunga, na pa bushiku bwabupingushi ubuli nokwisa, awe Felikisi umwenso wamwikata. Aeba Paulo ati, “Pa nshita ino bala kabiye, nkakwita nakabili ilyo nkakwata inshita.”" 
Acts24:26 Kwena pa nshita imo ine Felikisi alesubila ukuti Paulo alamupeelako indalama. Kanshi eico ilingi alemwita no kulalanda nankwe. 
Acts24:27 Cilya papita imyaka ibili, Pokio Fesito aishile buula amalo ya mulashi Felikisi. Ico Felikisi alefwaya ukuti Abayuda bamutemwe, epakusha Paulo mu cifungo." 
Acts25:1 Cilyafye papita inshiku shitatu apo afikile mu calo, Fesito aima ku Kesalia, aya na ku Yerusalemu." 
Acts25:2 Mu Yerusalemu, bashimapepo bacindami ne ntungulushi sha Bayuda baleta imilandu iyo Paulo abalufyanya." 
Acts25:3 Balapapata Fesito ukuti abafweko, abaletele Paulo ku Yerusalemu. Pantu balepekanya ukumubelamina no kumwipaya ilyo alepita mu nshila." 
Acts25:4 Fesito abasuka ati, “Paulo asungwa mu cifungo ku Kesalia. Elyo na ine nalaswa mbwelelemo ku Kesalia." 
Acts25:5 Kanshi muleke tuye ne ntungulushi shenu shimo ku Kesalia. Elyo kuti baya mupeela umulandu, nga pali ifyo alufyanya.”" 
Acts25:6 Fesito aikelekofye inshiku cine konse konse nangu ikumi limo, elyo aya ku Kesalia. Bwaisaca, aikala na pa cipuna cakuputwilapo imilandu, aeba nokuti balete Paulo." 
Acts25:7 Cilya Paulo afika, Abayuda abafumine ku Yerusalemu bamushinguluka. Elyo batampa ukulamubepesha imilandu iyingi, kabili iyikulu, nomba iyabula ukushininkisha." 
Acts25:8 Lelo Paulo alaipokololako ati, “Ine nshacitapo nelyo cimo icakonaula amafunde ya Bayuda, nangu umusaalula kwi Tempele, nangu umusaalula kuli kateeka mukalamba Kesalo.”" 
Acts25:9 Fesito ico alefwaya ukuti Abayuda bamutemwe, aeba Paulo ati, “Bushe ulefwaya ukuya ku Yerusalemu, eko nkaye kulubulwisha pali iyi milandu?”" 
Acts25:10 Paulo ayasuka ati, “Ine umulandu wandi uli mu cilye cakwa Kesalo, emo bali nokundubulwisha. Nshalufyanya ku Bayuda nelyo cimo, na imwe ico cena namwishibafye bwino." 
Acts25:11 Lelo nga nalibifyapo cimo icifwile ukuti banjipailapo, ine nshilekaana kufwa. Lelo imilandu balelanda pali ine nga yabufi, ninshi tapali nangu umo uwingamposa mu minwe yabo. Umulandu wandi uli nokuyafye kuli Kesalo.”" 
Acts25:12 Fesito epakulanshanya na bashicilye bakwe, elyo aeba Paulo ati, “Ulefwaya ukutwala umulandu obe kuli Kesalo, kanshi uli nokuya kuli Kesalo.”" 
Acts25:13 Pati papite inshiku shimo shimo, imfumu Agilipa na Benike baisa ku Kesalia kukuposha Fesito." 
Acts25:14 Cilya baikalako inshiku shimo shimo, Fesito ashimikilako imfumu Agilipa umulandu wakwa Paulo. Amweba ati, “Felikisi asha umuntu umo mu cifungo." 
Acts25:15 Ilyo naile ku Yerusalemu, bashimapepo bacindami na bakalamba ba Bayuda baletele imilandu iyingi pali uyu muntu. Balefwaya ukuti mupeele umulandu." 
Acts25:16 Lelo ine nabebele nati, ‘Abena Roma tabakwata lutambi lwakulubwila umuntu ku muntu nelyo umo ilyo abalemupeela umulandu tabalamushinina. Elyo uo balepeela umulandu nao ali nokuipokololako mukulandila pa mulandu wakwe.’" 
Acts25:17 Kanshi ilyo twaishile nabo kuno, nshapwile ne nshita. Bwaisaca naikala na pa cipuna cakuputwilapo imilandu, naeba nokuti balete Paulo." 
Acts25:18 Elyo abamupeele umulandu baiminina, nomba bafilwa ukuleta umulandu nelyo umo uwakuti bamushininapo ngefyo nalesubila." 
Acts25:19 Bakwetefye fimo ifyo balebikanapo ifikansa ifya pa mapepo yabo. Elyo na pa muntu umo uwafwile, ishina lyakwe ni Yesu, ico Paulo atila mumi." 
Acts25:20 Kanshi nalifililwe ukwishiba icishinka pali uyu mulandu. Eico naipwishe Paulo nga kuti afwaya ukuya ku Yerusalemu pakuti eko bakaye mulubulwisha pali uyu mulandu. 
Acts25:21 Lelo Paulo atile, ‘Ine umulandu wandi uli nokuyafye kuli kateeka mukalamba Kesalo, eukandubulwisha.’ Kanshi epakumusunga, nakonkomesha ne fita ifyakumusopa ukufika nelyo nkamutuma kuli Kesalo.”" 
Acts25:22 Agilipa elyo aeba Fesito ati, “Na ine kuti natemwa ukumumfwa uyu muntu.” Fesito nao ayasuka ati, “Ukamumfwa mailo.”" 
Acts25:23 Bwaisaca Agilipa na Benike baisa nabafwala ifyabufumu na bantu balebawila. Baingila na mu ŋanda yamilandu ninshi bali na bakalamba ba fita na bacindami ba mu musumba. Elyo Fesito aeba ukuti balete Paulo. 
Acts25:24 Kabili Fesito alasosa ati, “We mfumu Agilipa na imwe bonse mwe bali muno na ifwe, mwamumona uyu muntu! Abayuda bonse, aba kuno Kesalia na ba ku Yerusalemu baisa kuli ine, balepunda abati, ‘Alingilefye ukufwa!’" 
Acts25:25 Lelo ine nshasanga ukuti alicitapo icakuti bamwipailapo. Nomba umwine alanda ukuti umulandu wakwe uli nokuyafye kuli kateeka mukalamba Kesalo. Kanshi na ine eko ndi nokumutuma. 
Acts25:26 Lelo ine nshikwetepo cishinka icakuti ningalembela kuli Kesalo pali uyu muntu. Eico namuletela kuli imwe, makamaka kuli imwe mwe mfumu Agilipa. Pakuti na imwe nga mwapituluka bwino bwino mu mulandu wakwe, elyo na ine mone ifyakulemba." 
Acts25:27 Pantu ine nimona ukuti tacilungeme ukutuma umuntu wa milandu ukwabula ukulondolola umulandu acita.” 
Acts26:1 Agilipa elyo aeba Paulo ati, “Kanshi nomba ilandile we mwine.” Paulo elyo aimya ukuboko alalubulula ati," 
Acts26:2 “Kanabesa Agilipa! Awe lelo nashuka nganshi pakuti njilandile pa cinso cenu imilandu yonse iyo Abayuda bambepesha. 
Acts26:3 Pantu imwe mwalishibafye bwino intambi shonse isha Bayuda ne fikansa babikana. Eico nalomba ukuti muntekele umutima pakumfwa ifyo nalalanda. 
Acts26:4 “Abayuda bonse balishiba ubumi bwandi ukufuma ku bwaice bwandi. Balishiba na ku kale imyendele yandi mu calo candi na mu Yerusalemu. 
Acts26:5 Balinjishiba ukufuma na ku kale. Kabili nga balefwaya kuti banjiminina na bukambone ukuti nali Umufalise, impuka ya bantu abasakamana nganshi ukubaka amafunde ya mipepele yesu ukucila bonse." 
Acts26:6 Na nomba ndi mukulubulula pali ico nsubila mu cilayo Lesa alaya ifikolwe fyesu. 
Acts26:7 Ni mukutetekela muli ici cilayo ico inko shesu shonse ikumi limo na shibili shipepela Lesa ubwaca no bwaila. Kanshi Kanabesa Mulopwe ni pa cilayo cine ici epo Abayuda bampeelela umulandu. 
Acts26:8 Nga kanshi cinshi ico mushingasuminina ukuti Lesa alabusha abafwa? 
Acts26:9 “Kwena na ine wine kale naletontonkanya ukuti, ndi nokwesha na maka yandi yonse ukulwisha Yesu wa ku Nasaleti." 
Acts26:10 Efyo no kucita nalecita mu Yerusalemu. Bashimapepo bacindami ebampeele aya maka. Naleikata abamushilo nalebaposa na mu cifungo. Nelyo balebapingwila ukufwa, na ine wine nalesuminishako." 
Acts26:11 Imikufye iyingi nalepitana mu masinagoga ndebakanda, ndebapatikisha no kusuula icisumino cabo. Kabili ico nabakwatile icipyu nganshi, naleya na ku misumba ya Benafyalo kukubacusha." 
Acts26:12 “Mulandu wa uyu wine mulimo ewalengele ukuti bashimapepo bacindami bampeele ulusa na maka yakuya ku Damasiko. 
Acts26:13 Kanshi twali mukuya, ninshi akasuba kafika pakati ka mutwe pa nshita ya 12:00. Elyo Kanabesa Mulopwe, namona ulubuuto ulwabekesha ukucila na kasuba lwafuma ku mulu. Lwasanika ukushinguluka apo ndi pamo nabo twali nabo." 
Acts26:14 Bonse twawa panshi. Elyo naumfwa ishiwi lilenjeba mu Cihibulu aliti, ‘Saulo, Saulo cinshi uncushisha? Ala kuti waicena mukupilikita nge ŋombe ili mu minwe yakwa shikulu wakwe.’" 
Acts26:15 Na ine naipusha nati, ‘Nga niwe ani we Mfumu?’ Nayo Imfumu yanjasuka aiti, ‘Nine Yesu, neo ucusha." 
Acts26:16 Nomba ima, iminina. Namonekela kuli iwe ico nkusalile ukuba umubomfi wandi. Uli nokuba kambone pa fintu wamona lelo na pafyo nkakulanga kuntanshi." 
Acts26:17 Nkalakupususha ku bantu ba mushobo obe na ku Benafyalo bene, abo ndekutumako." 
Acts26:18 Uli nokuya bashibatula amenso, kubafumya mu mfifi no kubaleta ku lubuuto. Ukabafumya mu minwe yakwa Satana, nokubaleta kuli Lesa. Pakuti nga basumina muli ine, bakabelelwe uluse ku fyabubifi fyabo. Elyo bakashukile no kwikala pamo nabo Lesa aisangulwila.’" 
Acts26:19 “Kanshi we mfumu Agilipa, nalifililwe ukukanabeela ico namwene ukufuma ku mulu." 
Acts26:20 Nabalilepo mu Damasiko, elyo mu Yerusalemu na ku ba mu calo conse ica Yudeya, na ku Benafyalo nalebila ukuti bali nokulapila ifyabubifi fyabo no kubwelela kuli Lesa. Bali nokulacita ifintu ifyakulanga ukuti nabalapila no kupilibuka." 
Acts26:21 Ni pali uyu mulandu epo Abayuda banjikatile ilyo nali mwi Tempele, bafwaya no kunjipaya." 
Acts26:22 Lelo ku maka yakwa Lesa epo ndi na lelo. Njiminine pano kukupeela bukambone bwandi kuli bonse, ku baice na ku bakalamba. Nsosafye ifintu bakasesema na Mose basosele ukuti fili nokucitika." 
Acts26:23 ‘Nefi fyakutila, Kristu ali nokucula, kabili eukabalilapo ukubuuka ku bafwa, no kuba ulubuuto lwakutungulula Abayuda na Benafyalo.’ ”" 
Acts26:24 Ilyo Paulo acili alelanda aya mashiwi yakuipokololako, Fesito apunda ati, “Paulo, uli shilu! Amasambililo wasambilila yalekupenya!”" 
Acts26:25 Paulo ayasuka ati, “Awe Mulopwe Fesito nshili shilu. Aya mashiwi nalanda yatuntulu, yacishinka." 
Acts26:26 Tekuti ntiine ukulanda ifi fintu ku mfumu Agilipa, pantu yalifishiba. Ninshininkisha ukuti ifi fyonse naifishiba bwino, pantu te mu bumfisolo fyalecitika." 
Acts26:27 We mfumu Agilipa, bushe walisumina mu fyalemba bakasesema? Ninjishiba ukuti walisumina!”" 
Acts26:28 Agilipa aeba Paulo ati, “Bushe ulesubila ukuti mu kashita kacepa ifi, emo winganjalula ukuba umwina Kristu?”" 
Acts26:29 Paulo amwasuka ati, “Inshita nangu icepe nangu ilepe, ine ndepepa kuli Lesa ukuti imwe bene na bonse abali muno abalekutika kufyo ndelanda lelo, bengaba nga fino ndi, ukufumyakofye iyi minyololo.”" 
Acts26:30 Elyo imfumu Agilipa no mulashi Fesito, na Benike na bantu bonse baima." 
Acts26:31 Ilyo bafuma balalanshanya abati, “Uyu muntu tacita mulandu nelyo umo uwakumwipailapo nelyo ukumuposa mu cifungo.”" 
Acts26:32 Elyo Agilipa aeba Fesito ati, “Uyu muntu akaanalanda ukutwala umulandu wakwe kuli kateeka mukalamba Kesalo nga kuti twamulekamofye.”" 
Acts27:1 Awe basuka bapingula ukuti tuli nokuya no bwato ku Itali. Basontele Yulio umukalamba wa fita umwanda umo ukuti eo aleyangalila Paulo na bambi bamo bafungwa. Uyu Yulio ali wa mu mpuka ya fita iyaleitwa iyakwa Angusto. 
Acts27:2 Mu Adilamitimu twaingila mu bwato. Ubu bwato bwali nokushika mu fyabu fya mu misumba ya mu calo ca Asia. Awe twaima twalaya. Twali na Alistako umwina Tesalonika uwa ku calo ca Makedonia. 
Acts27:3 Ubushiku ubwakonkapo twafika na ku musumba wa Sidoni. Yulio ico aleumfwila Paulo uluse, amuleka ukuti aye kuli bacibusa bakwe pakuti bamwafwilisheko kufyo alekabila." 
Acts27:4 Awe twafuma ku Sidoni twalaya. Nomba ico icimwela calafuma uko tuleya, awe twalakonkafye ululamba lwa cishi ca Saiprasi." 
Acts27:5 Elyo twalalanya bemba wabela lubali lwa Kilikia na Pamfulia, twafika na ku cabu ca Mila mu calo ca Likia." 
Acts27:6 Umo mwine mu Mila, emo umukalamba wa fita asanga icibwato icafumine ku Alekisandilia, cileya ku Itali. Kanshi emo atuninika." 
Acts27:7 Pa nshikufye ishingi, twalaya no bwato panono panono. Kabili twayafiwa nganshi mpaka no kufika mupepi ku Nido. Nomba ico umwela wakosa, twafilwa no kulungama intunga twaleyamo, twakonkafye ululamba lwa cishi ca Kiliti uko umwela ushakosele, twapita mupepi na Salumone." 
Acts27:8 Twakonka ululamba, lelo twayafiwa nganshi pakufika ku ncende batila, “Ifyabu Fisuma” mupepi no musumba wa Lasea." 
Acts27:9 Twakokolamo nganshi muli iyi ncende. Ne nshita yakufunga ukulya yapita. Nomba caba cabusanso ukwenda pali bemba. 
Acts27:10 Elyo Paulo alabasoka ati, “Mwe bantu, ine namona ukuti twalaibikafye mu busanso kuli ubu bulendo. Ifipe no bwato fikonaika, elyo na ifwe tukafwilamo.”" 
Acts27:11 Lelo Yulio umukalamba wa fita umwanda umo asuula ku filesosa Paulo, asuminisha amashiwi yakwa kangalila wa bwato na ya mwine wa bwato." 
Acts27:12 Lelo kwena icabu cine ca Fyabu Fisuma tacalingile kwikalamo mu nshita yampepo. Eco abengi balefwaila ukufumako no bwato no kwesha ukufika ku Fenikisi pakuti eko baikala mu nshita yampepo. Fenikisi, cabu ca mu cishi ca Kiliti. Ici cabu casalalila lwa ku masamba, ne myela isano ya ku masamba, limo ifuma lwa ku kulyo, limbi ifuma ku kuso." 
Acts27:13 Awe umwela watampile ukulapuupa panono panono ukufuma ku kapinda ka ku kulyo. Kanshi abantu epakutila natucite ifyo tupekenye ukucita. Awe baimya ne cakulesha ubwato ukulaenda. Elyo twaima twalakonkafye ululamba lwa cishi ca Kiliti. 
Acts27:14 Lelo tapalati papite inshita, ku mulundu kwafuma icikuuku icamaka. Cafuma lwa ku kabanga lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso." 
Acts27:15 Icikuuku caisa puma mu bwato, awe twafilwa no kubupindulwila ku mulundu ukulefuma icikuuku. Kanshi twabulekafye bwaya bulesendwa ne cimwela." 
Acts27:16 Twasuka twapitila lwa ku kapinda ka kulyo ka ku cishi ca Kauda uko umwela ushakosele. Kwena uku nangu cayafishe, twakoselela twasuka twakakila akabwato pa mulu wa bwato bukalamba." 
Acts27:17 Elyo bapisha imyando mwisamba lya bwato no kubukakisha pakuti bwionaika. Nomba, pakulesha ukuti ubwato bwipuma mu filundulundu fya micanga panshi ya menshi, ifyabela lwa ku lulamba lwa calo ca Libia, baisha ifisalu fyakwenseshako ubwato. Baleka ubwato bulesendwafye no mwela." 
Acts27:18 Icikuuku naco cakonkanyapofye, bwasuka ubushiku ubwakonkapo batampa ukulaposa ifipe fimo muli bemba." 
Acts27:19 Pa bwalenga shitatu abene bene batampa ukuposa muli bemba ifibombelo fimo fimo ifya bwato. 
Acts27:20 Pa nshikufye ishingi akasuba ne ntanda te fyakumoneka, lelo icikuuku cena te cakunakako nakalya. Awe ifwe twalufya ne subilo lyonse ilyakupusuka." 
Acts27:21 Papitafye inshiku ishingi ukwabula ukulya. Paulo epakwiminina alaeba abantu ati, “Mwe bantu, amuŋumfwa nga tatwafumine ku Kiliti. Lyena fyonse ifi nga tapali filubile nangu ukonaika." 
Acts27:22 Lelo na nombaline ndemupapata, shipenifye mwinenuka! Pantu tapakafwe nelyo umo, lelo ubwato ebukonaika." 
Acts27:23 Pantu lelo ubushiku malaika wakwa Lesa wandi uo mombela, acimonekela." 
Acts27:24 Elyo alanjeba ati, ‘Paulo, witiina! Pantu uli nokuya lubulula pa cinso cakwa kateeka mukalamba Kesalo. Kabili Lesa ku luse lwakwe, nabika ubumi bwa bonse abo muli nabo mu bwato mu minwe yobe ukuti peloba nelyo umo.’" 
Acts27:25 Kanshi mwe bantu mwe, shipenifye! Pantu ine ninsumina ukuti fyonse fikabafye ngomo malaika anjebele." 
Acts27:26 Lelo kwena icimwela ciletusenda no kuya tuposa pa cishi cimo.” 
Acts27:27 Pa nshiku ikumi limo na shine, icikuuku caletusendafye pali bemba wa Meditelaneani. Elyo ubushiku pakati bacoba wa bwato batampa ukulatontonkanya ukuti capala kwati tuli mupepi na ku mulundu." 
Acts27:28 Elyo baponesha mu menshi umwando uo bakakileko icela icafina. Basanga ukuti pashikile imikono amakumi cine lubali na ibili (72). Elyo cilya baendelelako nakabili bapima basanga imikono amakumi yasano na ine (54). 
Acts27:29 Kanshi epakutiina abati kuti ubwato bwapuma ku mabwe. Elyo baposa muli bemba ifintu fine ifyakulesha ubwato ukulaenda. Balalomba nokuti buce bwangu. 
Acts27:30 Bacoba ba bwato epakwesha ukufyuka mu bwato. Baishisha na kabwato kanono mu menshi. Baba kwati bantu balefwaya ukuya posa pali bemba kuntanshi ya bwato icakulesha ubwato ukulaenda. 
Acts27:31 Elyo Paulo alaeba ifita no mukalamba wa fita umwanda umo Yulio ati, “Nga mwaleka bacoba basha ubwato, ninshi teti mupusuke.”" 
Acts27:32 Kanshi ifita epakuputula imyando na kabwato kaponena mu menshi. 
Acts27:33 Cilya caba ku macaca, Paulo alapapata bonse ukuti balye icakulya. Alabeba ati, “Inshiku nomba shaba ikumi limo na shine mulakalakafye ukwabula ukulya nelyo cimo." 
Acts27:34 Namupapata lyeni icakulya. Muli nokulya nga mukwate umutende. Ala tapakabefye nelyo umo uwakuloba.” 
Acts27:35 Cilya asosa ifi, Paulo abuula umukate, atasha Lesa pa cinso cabo. Elyo aumokaula atampa no kulalya." 
Acts27:36 Awe bonse epakuikoselesha balya ne cakulya. 
Acts27:37 Bonse fwe bali pa bwato, twali imyanda ibili na makumi cine lubali na mutanda (276)." 
Acts27:38 Cilya bonse twalya twaikuta, elyo balaposa iŋanu muli bemba pakuti ubwato bwangukeko." 
Acts27:39 Cilya bwaca, bacoba bamona icalo, lelo bafilwa ukucishiba. Elyo bamona apo bemba aya umusonsongela mu mulundu na pa lulamba pali umucanga. Kanshi epakupingushanya ukuti beshe ukushiika pali iyi ncende." 
Acts27:40 Epakuputula imyando ya fyakulesha ubwato ukulaenda, fyaponena na muli bemba. Kabili bakakulula ne myando ya nkafi. Elyo babika ne cisalu cakwensesha ubwato kuntanshi, pakuti umwela utunkilishe ubwato kuntanshi. Awe balaya balungama ku lulamba." 
Acts27:41 Lelo ubwato bwapuma mu filundulundu fya micanga pesamba lya menshi no bwato bwatika mu micanga. Icipande ca bwato icakuntanshi cafilililwafye ukwenda. Elyo icakunuma naco ku mulandu wa matamba ukupumamo casuka camokaika. 
Acts27:42 Ifita elyo fyaumfwana ukuti fipaye abafungwa bonse, epali baowa bafika ku mulundu, kabili bafyuka." 
Acts27:43 Lelo umukalamba wa fita umwanda umo Yulio, ico alefwaya ukupususha Paulo, abalesha ukucita ifyo. Kabili abeba ati, abo bonse abaishiba ukowa, ebo babalilepo ukuiposa pali bemba, bowe ukuya ku mulundu." 
Acts27:44 Abaleshalapo, bamo babukile pa fipampa, bambi pa fipimfya fya bwato. Kanshi ifi efyo bonse twapuswike, twafika na ku mulundu." 
Acts28:1 Ilyo twapuswike, twafikile ku mulundu, elyo twaishiba ukuti cishi ca Molta." 
Acts28:2 Abantu ba pali ici cishi batupokelelafye bwino bwino. Awe imfula yatampa ukuloka, kwaba ne mpepo. Elyo batukosesha umulilo twalaonta." 
Acts28:3 Elyo Paulo aya kumbilisha inkuni, akaka ne cifinga. Ashibika na pa mulilo. Cilya insoka yabusungu yaumfwa icikabilila yafuma mu nkuni, yasuma na Paulo ku cisansa." 
Acts28:4 Ilyo abantu ba muli ici cishi bamona uko icisoka cilepelela ku cisansa cakwa Paulo, balaebana abati, “Uyu muntu cine cine cipondo. Nangu apusuka ku menshi nomba Lesa talefwaya ukuti ekale umumi.”" 
Acts28:5 Lelo Paulo akuntila icisoka mu mulilo, ukwabula ukumfwa ubukali." 
Acts28:6 Bena balasubila ukuti alafimba nangu ukuti awe panshi afwe no kufwa. Nomba cilya bamona ukuti papita inshita iyikalamba ne cakumucitikila nakalya, lyena bayaluka balatontonkanya no kusosa abati, “Uyu muntu, mulungu!”" 
Acts28:7 Kanshi mupepi napo twali, kwali amabala yakwa Publio, umukalamba uwaleyangalila ici cishi. Awe atupokelelafye bwino. Kabili pa nshiku shitatu atusungafye bwino bwino." 
Acts28:8 Wishi wakwa Publio wena ninshi alelefye, ico alwele impepo no kupolomya umulopa. Elyo Paulo aingilamo kukumupempula. Awe amupepelela, amutambalikapo amaboko, amuposha no kumuposha." 
Acts28:9 Ilyo Paulo aposha uyu muntu, abantu abalwele muli ici cishi balaisa kuli Paulo, nao alabaposha." 
Acts28:10 Abantu nabo batukwatila umucinshi nganshi, nelyo twaleima no bwato, awe batulongelesha fyonse ifyo twalekabila pa bulendo." 
Acts28:11 Panuma yakupwa imyeshi itatu mu Molta, elyo twaima no bwato ubwaikele mu cabu ca Molta mu nshita yampepo. Ubu bwato bwafumine ku Alekisandilia ubo baleti, “Bampundu.”" 
Acts28:12 Cilya twafika ku musumba wa Silakusi, awe twalindako inshiku shitatu." 
Acts28:13 Ukufuma ku Silakusi twaya fika ku Legimu. Ubushiku ubwakonkapo umwela walapuupa ukufuma ku kapinda ka ku kulyo. Awe mu nshiku shibili twafika na ku Puteoli. 
Acts28:14 Mu Puteoli twasangamo ababwananyina, nabo batulomba ukuti twikale nabo umulungu umo. Elyo kabili twaima twaya fika na ku Roma." 
Acts28:15 Ababwananyina ba mu Roma cilya baumfwa ukuti tuli mu nshila tuleisa, batukonkela baisa fika na ku cisankano ca Apiya na pa Mayanda ya Beni Yatatu. Paulo cilya abamona, ici camuletela icikoseleshi, alatasha na Lesa." 
Acts28:16 Ilyo twafikile mu Roma, Paulo bamusuminishe ukuti aleikalila eka umwine, ne cita cimo icakumulonda." 
Acts28:17 Kabili cilya papita inshiku shitatu, Paulo alonganya intungulushi sha Bayuda. Alabeba ati, “Bamunyinane! Ine nshacitapo nelyo cimo icabipa ku mushobo wesu, nangu ukusuula intambi sha fikolwe fyesu. Lelo mu Yerusalemu balinjikete no kumposa mu minwe ya bena Roma." 
Acts28:18 Nabo batile ilyo bandubulwisha, basanga ukuti nshikwete mulandu uwakunjipailapo. Balafwaya no kundekamo." 
Acts28:19 Lelo ico Abayuda bakosapo pa mulandu wandi, awe na ine epakutila, kanshi umulandu wandi uli nokuyafye kuli kateeka mukalamba Kesalo. Lelo ine nshakwete mulandu na bantu ba mushobo wandi." 
Acts28:20 Eico kanshi nombele ukumonana na imwe no kulanda na imwe. Pantu ndi mu minyololo pa mulandu wa cilayo Lesa alaya abena Israeli.” 
Acts28:21 Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Ifwe tatwapokapo kalata ukufuma ku Yudeya pa mulandu obe. Elyo tapaba nelyo umo pali bamunyinefwe uwafuma ku Yudeya no kwisa tushimikila nangu ukulanda icibi nelyo cimo pali iwe." 
Acts28:22 Lelo kwena tulefwaya ukumfwa ifyo iwe uletontonkanyapo. Ifwe twalishiba ukuti mpangafye yonse abantu baletila iyi mpuka wabamo tayaba bwino.” 
Acts28:23 Elyo baumfwana na Paulo ubushiku bwakulongana. Pali ubu bushiku, lyena baisa longana umwaleikala Paulo, bafulilako nganshi. Alabalondolwela pa mulandu wa Bufumu bwakwa Lesa ukufumafye ulucelo mpaka na ku cungulo. Aesha nganshi ukuti beshibe bwino Yesu mu Mafunde yakwa Mose na mu fyalemba bakasesema." 
Acts28:24 Bamo bena basuminisha ifyo Paulo alesosa, lelo bambi bena tabasumine iyoo." 
Acts28:25 Awe basalangana ukwabula ukusuminishanya, elyo Paulo asosa aya mashiwi ayakutila, “Cine cine Mupashi Wamushilo alilungike ilyo alandile kuli kasesema Esaya ukweba ifikolwe fyesu ati," 
Acts28:26 ‘Kabiye kuli aba bantu ubebe auti, Ukumfwa mwakulaumfwa, lelo tamwaleiluka. Ukulolesha mwakulalolesha, lelo tamwalemona." 
Acts28:27 Pantu imitima ya aba bantu yalikutwa, na matwi yabo tayomfwa bwino, balishibatika na menso yabo. Epali baimwena na menso yabo, bayumfwila na matwi yabo, bailuka na mu mitima yabo, kabili bapilibukila kuli ine, na ine nabondapa.’ ”" 
Acts28:28 Paulo alundapo ati, “Kanshi mwishibe nokuti Lesa atumiine Abenafyalo amashiwi yakubapususha. Bena bakayomfwa!”" 
Acts28:29 Pa myaka ibili ituntulu Paulo aleikala mu ŋanda alesonkela. Alesekelelafye bonse abaleisa kukumupempula. 
Acts28:30 Alebila pa Bufumu bwakwa Lesa no kufunda pa Mfumu Yesu Kristu ku muntu onse ukwabula umwenso, kabili takwali no wakumulesha." 
Romans1:1 Ine Paulo umusha wakwa Kristu Yesu namulembela uyu kalata. Ni Lesa ewanjita ukuba umusole. Ewansala pakuti ndebila Imbila Nsuma. 
Romans1:2 Lesa kale na kale alaile Imbila Nsuma mukutuma bakasesema bakwe, ngomo calembelwa mu Malembo Yamushilo." 
Romans1:3 Imbila Nsuma itweba pali Mwane Yesu Kristu Imfumu yesu. Palwa bumuntu bwakwe, Yesu afyelwe mu lupwa lwakwa Davidi." 
Romans1:4 Lelo ku Mupashi uwamushilo, Yesu alilangwa na makafye ukuti ni Mwana Lesa pakubuuka ku bafwa." 
Romans1:5 Lesa ku cikuuku atukwatila muli Kristu, atulenga ukuba abasole, pakuti Kristu acindikwe. Epakuti, ntungulule imishobo yonse iya Benafyalo kukumusumina no kumunakila." 
Romans1:6 Kanshi na imwe bene, Lesa alimwita ukuti mube abantu bakwa Yesu Kristu." 
Romans1:7 Kanshi namulembela imwe bonse mu Roma, mwe babile bakwa Lesa, mwebo aita ukuba abamushilo. Icikuuku no mutende wakwa Lesa Shifwe ne Mfumu Yesu Kristu fileba na imwe." 
Romans1:8 Icapakubala, ndatasha Lesa wandi pali Yesu Kristu, pa mulandu wa imwe bonse. Ala pantu abantu isonde lyonse balelanda palwa cisumino cenu." 
Romans1:9 Lesa wine uo mombela no mutima wandi onse mukubila Imbila Nsuma yakwa Mwane, e kambone wandi. Ala lyonsefye nshimulaba mu mapepo yandi." 
Romans1:10 Lyonse ilyo mpepa, ndalomba Lesa ukuti nga alefwaya kuti aleka nomba naisa mupempula." 
Romans1:11 Pantu ndefwaisha nganshi ukumumona, kusuka mwamona kuli ine ukulakoselela ku cafwilisho ca bupe bwakwa Mupashi." 
Romans1:12 Kanshi nalosha mukutila, tukalekoseleshanya bonse ku cisumino cesu twakwata umo umo." 
Romans1:13 Bamunyinane, ndefwaya mwishibe ukuti, ala imikufye iyingi napanga ukwisa mupempula, lelo ukufika na ndakai kulaba fimo ifyakundesha. Ndefwaya na kuli imwe mwe bena Roma nkamwenepo na bambi abakunakila Kristu, nga filya nacita ku Benafyalo bambi." 
Romans1:14 Pantu ine ndi nokubombela abantu bonse, umuntungwa no ushili muntungwa, uwasambilila no ushasambilila." 
Romans1:15 Kanshi ndefwaisha nganshi ukwisa bila Imbila Nsuma na kuli imwe, mwe bena Roma." 
Romans1:16 Ine nshumfwa nsoni pa Mbila Nsuma! Imbila Nsuma e maka yakwa Lesa ayapususha bonse abasumina, pakubala Abayuda, elyo na Benafyalo bene." 
Romans1:17 Pantu Imbila Nsuma isokolola ifyo Lesa atucita ukuba abakaele pa cinso cakwe, elyo neci caba mukuba ne cisumino epela. Efyo calembwa ukuti, “Umololoke ena akulaba umumi pa mulandu wa citetekelo.”" 
Romans1:18 Ubukali bwakwa Lesa nabusokoloka ukufuma ku mulu. Bwishile pa bantu bonse abashicita ifyo Lesa afwaya na pa fibi fyonse ifyo abantu bacita. Pantu ni ku misango yabo ibi, balesha icishinka ukwishibikwa." 
Romans1:19 Kabili ifintu abantu bengeshiba pali Lesa, balifishibafye bwino. Lesa umwine ifi fintu alibeshibisha." 
Romans1:20 Pantu ukufumafye apo Lesa abumbile isonde, amaka yakwe aya pe na pe na Bulesa bwakwe, nangu fyonse fishimoneka, lelo balifishibafye bwino bwino. Abantu balafimona mu fintu Lesa acita. Kanshi eico aba bantu tabakwata na kabepesho nakalya!" 
Romans1:21 Pantu nangu baishiba Lesa, nomba tabamucindika nga Lesa, nangu ukumutasha. Batontonkanyafye ifyaciwelewele na mano yabo yalikutwa." 
Romans1:22 Baitunga ukuba abamano, kanshi fiwelewele." 
Romans1:23 Bafuma na kukupepa Lesa umucindami uushifwa, balapepa utulubi utwapala umuntu uufwa, nangu utwapala ifyuni, nangu inama nangu ifikulaika panshi." 
Romans1:24 Kanshi eico Lesa alibaleka bakonkelele ulunkumbwa lubi lwa mitima yabo. Bacita ifyabupulumushi ifyamusebanya nganshi. 
Romans1:25 Balisuula icishinka cakwa Lesa, basalapo ubufi. Bapepa no kubombela ifibumbwa fyakwa Lesa, elyo basuula Kabumba wine wafiko, uo abantu bafwile ukulalumbanya lyonse! Ameni." 
Romans1:26 Mulandu wakucita ifi fintu eco Lesa abalekela balekonkelela ulunkumbwa lubi ulwamusebanya. Abanakashi balecita ubupulumushi na banakashi banabo, ici tefyo cifwile ukuba." 
Romans1:27 Abaume nabo balileka ukulala na banakashi, nomba baikatwa no lunkumbwa lubi ulwa baume banabo. Kanshi abaume balecita ubupulumushi na baume banabo. Ici cintu camusebanya nganshi. Kanshi abene ebailetelela ukukandwa pa kulungana kwabo." 
Romans1:28 Apo aba bantu bakaana ukusakamana ifyacishinka pali Lesa, Lesa nao aleka amano yabo yawile ku fyabuwelewele. Nomba bacita ifintu bashifwile kucita." 
Romans1:29 Balyobelelwa no bubi bwa misango yonse, ulunkumbwa lwafyuma, no lunkumbwa lwabupulumushi. Balyobelelwa ku mufimbila, kukwipayana, kukuumana, kukufinshanya, ku mufulo na ku lwambo." 
Romans1:30 Balabepeshanya, bapata Lesa, bacipongwe, bacilumba, kabili bamataki. Ni ncenjeshi mukubifya, elyo tabomfwila bafyashi babo." 
Romans1:31 Ni mpelwamano, tabasunga ifyo basosa, kabili tabakwata luse ne cikuuku ku banabo." 
Romans1:32 Balishiba ukuti Lesa alipingula ukuti abacita ifi, balingilefye ukufwa. Nomba bena babikapofye ukulaficita. Kabili balakoselesha na bambi abaficita." 
Romans2:1 We muntu we upingula umunobe, tekuti umone akabepesho nangu wingaba shani. Pantu ilyo ulepingula bambi, elyo kabili na iwe we kapingula ulecita fimo fine, ninshi uleipingulafye we mwine." 
Romans2:2 Twalishiba ukuti Lesa alalungika ilyo apingula abantu abacita ifya uyo musango. 
Romans2:3 Nga kanshi we muntu we upingula bambi, elyo ulecita ifyo bacita, bushe kuti watila ukapusuka ku bupingushi bwakwa Lesa?" 
Romans2:4 Bushe ninshi kukanasakamanafye ubukankala bwa cilela cakwa Lesa, umutekatima no kushipikisha kwakwe? Bushe ninshi kukanaishibafye ukuti Lesa alikukwatila icilela ico afwaya ukuti ulapile no kupilibuka?" 
Romans2:5 Nomba iwe walyumalala umutima, ukaana no kulapila. Eico ulelenga ubukali bwakwa Lesa bukacilileko pali bulya Bushiku ilyo ubukali bwakwe no bupingushi bwakwe ubwamulinganya bukasokoloka." 
Romans2:6 Elyo Lesa “akapingula cila muntu ukulingana ne micitile yakwe.” 
Romans2:7 Abantu ababa no mute wakuwamya, abafwaya ukuti Lesa abalumbanye, abapeele no mucinshi, no mweo uushili wakonaika, ebo Lesa akapeela umweo wape." 
Romans2:8 Lelo bonse bakaitemwe, abakaana ukunakila icishinka, abakonkelela ukucita ifyabipa, ebo Lesa akakanda icibi no bukali bwakwe." 
Romans2:9 Amacushi no bulanda fikafikila abantu abacita ifibi. Pakubalilapo ku Bayuda, elyo na ku Benafyalo bene." 
Romans2:10 Lelo abantu bonse abawamya, bena Lesa akabalumbanya, akabacindamika, akabapeela no mutende. Pakubala ku Bayuda, elyo na ku Benafyalo bene." 
Romans2:11 Pantu Lesa taba na mucishacinani. 
Romans2:12 Abenafyalo tabakwata Amafunde yakwa Mose. Lelo nga babifya, bakaloba, nomba teico bashikonka Amafunde yakwa Mose. Abayuda bena balikwata Amafunde yakwa Mose. Nga babifya, bena, Lesa akabapingula ukukonka na Mafunde yakwa Mose." 
Romans2:13 Pantu temukumfwafye Amafunde yakwa Mose, emo abantu babela abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa, lelo ni mukukonka ifyo Amafunde yakwa Mose yalanda." 
Romans2:14 Abenafyalo tabakwata Mafunde yakwa Mose. Nomba nga ku mano yabuntunse bacita ififwaya Amafunde yakwa Mose, ninshi lyena baba na mafunde, nangu bashakwata Mafunde yakwa Mose." 
Romans2:15 Imisango yabo ilangafye ukuti Amafunde yakwa Mose yalilembwa mu mitima yabo. Kampingu wa mu mitima yabo nao ni kambone, pantu limo alasuminisha imitontonkanishishe yabo limbi akaana ati tacilolelemo." 
Romans2:16 Kanshi ngefyo Imbila Nsuma mfunda yalanda, Lesa pa bushiku bwabupingushi, asonta Yesu Kristu ukupingula abantu pa milandu yafisama mu mitima yabo."
