2Corinthians11:22 Bushe Bahibulu? Na ine wine. Bushe bena Israeli? Na ine wine. Bushe ba mu lupwa lwakwa Abrahamu? Na ine wine. 
2Corinthians11:23 Bushe babomfi bakwa Kristu? Lyena nalalanda nga uwapena, ine nalibacila ukubombela Kristu! Ine nalibomba ukubacila. Nalibacila ne miku bamposa mu cifungo. Nalibacila imiku iyingi iyo bangumine ifikoti. Elyo imikufye iyingi naleba mupepi no kufwa." 
2Corinthians11:24 Pa miku isano Abayuda bangumine ifikoti amakumi yatatu na pabula. 
2Corinthians11:25 Abena Roma nabo bangumine ne nkonto pa miku itatu. Elyo umuku umo bandashile amabwe. Pa miku itatu napuswike kukubunda na mato pali bemba. Umuku umo nali mu menshi pali bemba akasuba no bushiku. 
2Corinthians11:26 Mu nyendo shandi ishingi naleisanga mu masanso pakwabuka imimana, mu masanso ku bapupu, mu masanso ku Bayuda banandi na ku Benafyalo. Nalesanga amasanso mu misumba, amasanso mu matololo, amasanso pali fibemba, elyo amasanso na kuli bamunyinefwe ababufi." 
2Corinthians11:27 Kwali ukubomba imilimo iyakosa nganshi. Ilingi bwalecafye ukwabula ukusendama. Kabili ilingi line naleendafye ne nsala ne cilaka, elyo no kututuma ku mpepo, kabili ukwabula ukukwata ifyakufwala ifilingile." 
2Corinthians11:28 Kulifye na fimbi ifingi ifyo nshilumbwile, lelo kabili cila bushiku nyendafye uwasakamana nganshi pa mulandu wa nkuta shonse." 
2Corinthians11:29 Umwina Kristu umo nga aleumfwa ukunakuka, na ine ninshi ndomfwa ukunakuka. Umwina Kristu umo nga awila mukubifya, ine ndomfwa ubulanda nganshi." 
2Corinthians11:30 Nga ndi nokuitakisha, ninshi ndi nokuitakishafye pa fintu ifilanga ubunasha bwandi." 
2Corinthians11:31 Lesa Wishi wa Mfumu Yesu, uufwile alelumbwa lyonse pe, naishiba ukuti nshilebepa iyoo." 
2Corinthians11:32 Ilyo nali mu Damasiko, umulashi wa mfumu Aleta abikile abantu bakulinda impongolo sha musumba pakuti banjikate." 
2Corinthians11:33 Lelo nalifyukile, banjishishe mu museke, bampisha mu cipunda ce linga." 
2Corinthians12:1 Ndeitakisha nangu mushaba kantu mukuitakisha. Nomba nalalanda pa fintu ifyo Imfumu yalengele mone nefyo yansokolwelele. 
2Corinthians12:2 Nalishiba umwina Kristu umo uwasendelwe ku mulu ukutali nganshi, nomba papita imyaka ikumi limo na ine. Kwena nshishibe nga asendelwe umutuntulu no mubili, nangu nalimo califye mu cimonwa, ico cena ni Lesa ewishibe." 
2Corinthians12:3 Nalishibe ukuti uyu muntu asendelwe ku Cifulo Cansansa. Nga asendelwe umutuntulu no mubili nalimo califye mu cimonwa, nshishibe, ni Lesa ewishibe." 
2Corinthians12:4 Muli iyo ncende aumfwile ifintu umuntu ashingalondolola, kabili teti asuminishiwe ukufilandapo." 
2Corinthians12:5 Pali uyu muntu pena epo ningaitakishishapo. Nomba pali ine ne mwine tekuti njitakishe, shikano ninshi pa fintu filanga ubunasha bwandi." 
2Corinthians12:6 Kwena nangu ningaitakisha tekuti mbe iciwelewele, pantu ifyo ningalanda fyacishinka. Lelo nshaitakishe, pantu nshilefwaya ukuti umuntu nelyo umo aletontonkanya pali ine ukucila pafyo amona ncita na pafyo aumfwa nsosa." 
2Corinthians12:7 Nomba pakutalusha kukuba ne cilumba pa mulandu wa fintu ifyakupapa nganshi ifyo namwene, Lesa alimpeela icintu icilasa mu mubili kwati munga. Ici cintu caba kwati ni nkombe yakwa Satana, icakuncusha pakuti mone ukutaluka kukuba ne cilumba." 
2Corinthians12:8 Napapete Imfumu pa miku itatu pakuti imfumyemo ici cintu. 
2Corinthians12:9 Lelo Imfumu yanjaswike aiti, “Ala icikuuku nakukwatila eco ulekabila, pantu amaka yandi yamonekesha bwino ilyo uli mu bunasha.” Kanshi nakulasansamuka nganshi no kuitakisha mu bunasha bwandi, epakuti amaka yakwa Kristu yekalilile muli ine." 
2Corinthians12:10 Pa mulandu wakwa Kristu ndasekela mu bunasha, mukutukwa insele, mu mafya, mukucushiwa, na mu masanso. Pantu ni mu bunasha bwandi, emo mba na maka." 
2Corinthians12:11 Nalanda kwati ndi ciwelewele, lelo nimwe mwalenga ukuti nande ifyo. Pantu nimwe mwali nokulantasha. Pantu nangu ningaba icinangwa, abo basole benu mulumbilisha tabancilile nakalya." 
2Corinthians12:12 Ifishibilo ifilanga ukuba umusole wine wine, ifinjelengwe ne fipeshamano, fyonse nalifibomba no mutekatima pakati kenu." 
2Corinthians12:13 Ngefyo nshabomba kuli imwe ifyo nabomba ku nkuta shimbi finshi? Shikanofye ninshi nico nshamusakamike kukungafwa? Kanshi mbeleleniko uluse pali ici cilubo! 
2Corinthians12:14 Nomba uyu muku ewalenga butatu uwakwisa mupempula. Kabili nshakamusakamike ku cintu nelyo cimo. Ico ine mfwaya nimwe, te fyuma iyoo. Kabili kwena abana tabapekanya icuma cakusungilamo abafyashi, lelo abafyashi ebapekanya icuma cakusungilamo abana." 
2Corinthians12:15 Ine kuti nasansamuka nganshi ukubomfya fyonse ifyo nakwata no kuleka umweo wandi pakumwafwako. Bushe nico namutemwisha ifyo, eco imwe mwingantemenwa panono?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Kanshi ninshi na imwe mulesumina ukuti nshalemusakamika nelyo panono. Nomba umo kuti ati ala nico wabucenjeshi, eco amongwelele ku bucenjeshi bwakwe." 
2Corinthians12:17 Bushe ninshi namucenjelele muli abo bantu naletuma ukwisa kuli imwe? 
2Corinthians12:18 Nalombele Tito ukwisa uko, elyo natumine na munyinefwe umwina Kristu ukwisa nankwe. Bushe kuti mwatila Tito aishile mucenjelela? Bushe Tito na ine tatwabombelefye no mutima umo ne myendele yesu nayo imo ine?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Nalimo imwe mutontonkanya ukuti fyonse ifyo tumweba fyakuiwaminishafye? Awe iyoo! Tulandafye ngefyo Kristu engafwaya tulande pa cinso cakwa Lesa. Ala fyonse ifyo tucita mwe batemwikwa besu fyakumwafwakofye. 
2Corinthians12:20 Ine ndetiina ukuti ilyo nkesa uko, nkesa musanga ifyo nshingatemwa ukuti mube. Elyo na imwe mukansange ifyo mushingatemwa ukuti mbe. Kabili ndetiina ukuti nkesa sanga ukuumana, umufimbila, icipyu, bukaitemwe, ukubepeshanya, ulwambo, imiya elyo ne cimfulunganya." 
2Corinthians12:21 Ndetiina ukuti limbi ilyo nkesa, Lesa wandi akaleka nkekatwe ne nsoni pa cinso cenu. Kabili nkesa lila ne filamba pali abo bantu abengi abakaana ukulapila no kupilibuka pa fyabupulumushi bacita kale, pa lunkumbwa lubi lwabo na pali bucilende bwabo." 
2Corinthians13:1 Uyu e muku walalenga butatu ukwisa mupempula. “Pa kupeela umuntu umulandu kano pali bakambone babili nangu batatu.” 
2Corinthians13:2 Naishile musokako lilya naishile mupempula pa lwendo lwacibili. Nomba nalabwekeshapo nakabili ilyo ncili ukutali. Ndemweba ukuti ilyo nkesa nakabili, nkakanda bonse abo ababifishe kale na bambi bene bonse." 
2Corinthians13:3 Lyena elyo mukashininkisha ukuti ni Kristu eulandila muli ine. Pantu ilyo Kristu abomba muli imwe, alanga amaka yakwe, talanga ukuti taba na maka." 
2Corinthians13:4 Pantu nangu imfwa ya pa musalaba ilanga ukuti taba na maka, lelo ni ku maka yakwa Lesa eko abela umumi. Kanshi na ifwe nelyo twaampana na Kristu, tatwakwata maka. Lelo ilyo tumubombela, tulakwatako amaka yakwa Lesa ayo na Kristu akwatako." 
2Corinthians13:5 Muipime mwe bene, muyeshe mumone nga cine cine mwaliba ne cisumino. Bushe tamwashininkisha ukuti Kristu Yesu aba muli imwe? Nga teifyo ninshi mwalifilililwafye." 
2Corinthians13:6 Lelo ndesubila ukuti mukeshiba ukuti awe ifwe tatwafilwa iyoo. 
2Corinthians13:7 Ifwe tulamupepelako kuli Lesa ukuti mwilawila mu filubo. Te mulandu wakufwaya ukulanga abantu ukuti ifwe tatwafilwa iyoo, lelo ni pakuti imwe mulecita ifilungeme, nangu nalimo ifwe tulemoneka kwati twalifilwa." 
2Corinthians13:8 Pantu ifwe teti tucite nelyo cimo icakukaanya icishinka, kanofye icakwafwilisha icishinka." 
2Corinthians13:9 Ifwe tulasansamuka ukuba mu bunasha, kumfwa imwe muli abakosa. Kanshi ifwe tulamupepelako pakuti mwaluke mube abapwililika." 
2Corinthians13:10 Eico nalembela kalata uyu ilyo ncili ukutali noko muli. Epakuti ilyo nkesa uko, nikesa bomfya ubukali, mukubomfya amaka Imfumu yampeela. Aya maka teyakumonaula iyoo, lelo yakumwafwako pakuti muwamineko." 
2Corinthians13:11 Bamunyinane, pakulekelesha ndeti shalenipo! Muleesha ukuba abapwililika. Mulekonka ifyo mwebele. Mube aba mutima umo, muleikala mu mutende na banenu. Kabili Lesa uwacitemwiko, kabili uwamutende, engalaba na imwe." 
2Corinthians13:12 Muleposhanya mukutomona kwamushilo. 
2Corinthians13:13 Abamushilo bonse balemuposha. 
2Corinthians13:14 Icikuuku ca Mfumu Yesu Kristu ne citemwiko cakwa Lesa no kwampana Mupashi Wamushilo apeela, fileba na imwe bonse." 
Galatians1:1 Ine Paulo umusole. Nshaitwa nangu ukutumwa no muntu. Lelo ni Yesu Kristu na Lesa Wishi uwamubushishe ku bafwa ebanjita. 
Galatians1:2 Ababwananyina bonse abo tuli nabo, pamo na ine wine twamulembela mwe nkuta sha mu Galatia." 
Galatians1:3 Icikuuku no mutende wakwa Lesa Shifwe ne Mfumu Yesu Kristu fileba na imwe. 
Galatians1:4 Kristu aliituula ilambo pa mulandu wa fyabubifi fyesu, epakuti atulubule ku bubi bwa muli cino calo. Acita ifyo pantu efyo Lesa Shifwe alefwaya." 
Galatians1:5 Lesa nalelumbwa pe na pe! Ameni. 
Galatians1:6 Kwena namunsungusha! Pa nshitafye inono namusangukila Lesa uwamwitile pa mulandu wa cikuuku cakwa Kristu, mwapokelela ne mbila imbi." 
Galatians1:7 Awe kwena, takwaba Mbila Nsuma na imbi. Nicofye kuli abantu bamo abalemufulunganya, balefwaya no kwalula Imbila Nsuma yakwa Kristu no kuilosha mumbi." 
Galatians1:8 Lelo cibe nifwe nangu ni malaika ukufuma ku mulu nga aisa bila imbila imbi iyapusana ne Mbila Nsuma twabilile kuli imwe, ena uyo alapishiwe!" 
Galatians1:9 Twalimwebele kale, nomba nakabili nabwekeshapo, nga cakuti kwaba umuntu uwalabila imbila iyapusana neyo mwasuminamo, ena uyo alapishiwe!" 
Galatians1:10 Bushe pakulanda ifi, ndefwaya ukuti abantu bansuminishe? Awe iyoo! Ndefwaya ukuti Lesa eo ansuminishe. Bushe ndefwayafye ukutemwikwa ku bantu? Ndafwayafye ukutemwikwa ku bantu, nga nshili musha wakwa Kristu!" 
Galatians1:11 Mwe bamunyinane, ico ine ndefwaya ukuti mwishibe nici icakuti, Imbila Nsuma mbila, tayafuma ku bantu." 
Galatians1:12 Nshaipokelela ukufuma ku muntu nelyo umo, nangu ukufundwa ku muntu nelyo umo. Ni Yesu Kristu umwine ewaisokolwele kuli ine." 
Galatians1:13 Mwalyumfwa ifya pa bumi bwandi ilyo nalekonka imipepele ya Ciyuda. Nacushishe nganshi ulukuta lwakwa Lesa. Nalefwayafye no kululofya. 
Galatians1:14 Nalicincile ukucila Abayuda banandi abengi aba nkulo yandi mukukonka imipepele ya Ciyuda. Kabili nalibacilile bonse ukukonka ifishilano fya fikolwe fyesu. 
Galatians1:15 Lelo Lesa ku cikuuku cakwe ansalile ninshi nshilafyalwa, anjitile no kuba umubomfi wakwe." 
Galatians1:16 Umwine wine ewatemenwe no kunsokolwela Mwane, epakuti mone no kubila Imbila Nsuma yakwe ku Benafyalo. Pa nshita ilya, nshaile nangu ku muntu nelyo umo pakuti ampandeko amano." 
Galatians1:17 Kabili nshaile nangu ni ku Yerusalemu kwine kukumona abantangilile ukuba abasole, lelo naile ku calo ca Arabia. Ilyo nafumineko, nabwelele ku Damasiko." 
Galatians1:18 Panuma ya myaka itatu elyo naile ku Yerusalemu kukumonana na Kefa. Naikele nankwe inshiku ikumi limo na shisano. 
Galatians1:19 Nshamonene na musole umbi, kanofye Yakobo munyina wa Mfumu." 
Galatians1:20 Ndemweba pa menso yakwa Lesa, ifi ndemulembela fyacishinka, te fyabufi iyoo!" 
Galatians1:21 Elyo kabili naile ku calo ca Siria na Kilikia. 
Galatians1:22 Inkuta sha mu Yudeya ishaba muli Kristu shena tashanjishibe no kumonana tatwamonanapo nasho. 
Galatians1:23 Shaleumfwafye ifyo baleshishimikila abati, “Umuntu ulya uwaletucusha, nomba eulebila imbila ya cisumino iyo kale alefwaya ukulofya!”" 
Galatians1:24 Nabo epakulalumbanya Lesa pa mulandu wa ine. 
Galatians2:1 Papitile imyaka ikumi limo na ine, elyo nabwelelemo ku Yerusalemu, lyena twali na Banaba. Kabili nalisendele na Tito." 
Galatians2:2 Ico nailileko, nico efyo Lesa ansokolwelele ukuti ndi nokuyako. Twalongene ne ntungulushi sha bena Kristu mu bumfisolo, umo nashilondolwelele amashiwi ya Mbila Nsuma mbila ku Benafyalo. Nshalefwaya ukuti imilimo ndebomba elyo neyo nabomba kale ikabe iyakuicushafye." 
Galatians2:3 Tito uo nali nao nangu ena ali Mugiriki, tashamupatikishe ukuti asembululwe." 
Galatians2:4 Lelo abantu bamo abaleilanga ukuba kwati bena Kristu banensu balafwaya ukuti asembululwe. Aba bantu baishile sokelela mwibumba lyesu nge nengu pakuti bafwailishe pa buntungwa twashukila pali ico twaba muli Kristu. Bena balefwaya ukututeeka mu busha. 
Galatians2:5 Awe na ifwe twakaanininafye ukubanakila, pantu twalefwayafye ukuti tumusungile Imbila Nsuma yacine cine." 
Galatians2:6 Lelo abo abalemoneka ukuba intungulushi, (nomba kwena ine nshabasakamene nakalya, pantu Lesa taba na mucishacinani) abo abamoneka ukuba intungulushi tabamwene neco balundilepo pafyo mfunda." 
Galatians2:7 Lelo bamwenefye bwino ukuti Lesa alimpeela umulimo wakubila Imbila Nsuma ku Benafyalo, nga filya fine apeela Petelo umulimo wakubila Imbila Nsuma ku Bayuda." 
Galatians2:8 Pantu ni Lesa umwine ku maka yakwe ewalenga ukuti mbe umusole ku Benafyalo, nga filya fine alengele Kefa ukuba umusole ku Bayuda." 
Galatians2:9 Ishi ntungulushi Yakobo, Kefa na Yoani balishininkishe ukuti ni Lesa ku cikuuku cakwe ewampeela uyu mulimo. Awe ine na Banaba twalafunkana nabo mu minwe pakulanga ukuti bonse tulebombafye umulimo umo wine. Twaumfwana nokuti Banaba na ine twakulabomba pakati ka Benafyalo, elyo bena pakati ka Bayuda." 
Galatians2:10 Icintu cimo ico batulombele, cakuti tuleibukisha ukwafwa abalanda. Elyo ici cintu cena eco nasakamana nganshi ukubomba." 
Galatians2:11 Ilyo Kefa aishile ku Antioki nalimukalipile pa bantu, pantu ali no mulandu." 
Galatians2:12 Pantu ilyo abantu bafumine kuli Yakobo bali tabalati bese, Kefa aleliila pamo na bena Kristu Abenafyalo. Lelo ilyo aba bantu baishile, Kefa aleka ukulaliila pamo na Benafyalo, aipatulako. Pantu aletiina aba bantu ico bena balefwaya ukuti abena Kristu Abenafyalo nabo balesembululwa." 
Galatians2:13 Abena Kristu Abayuda bambi nabo ku mulandu wa mwenso balakonkelela ubucenjeshi bwakwa Kefa. Banaba nao wine ku mulandu wa mwenso alacita ubucenjeshi bumo bwine. 
Galatians2:14 Kanshi ilyo namona ukuti aba bantu tabali pa cishinka mukukonka mashiwi ya Mbila Nsuma, elyo naebele Kefa ninshi bonse epo bali nati, “Iwe uli Muyuda, nomba walekonka imikalile ya Benafyalo, tawalekonka iya Bayuda. Nga kanshi kuti walapatikisha shani Abenafyalo ukulaikala nga Bayuda?”" 
Galatians2:15 Ifwe twafyalwa Abayuda, tatuli Benafyalo ababifi." 
Galatians2:16 Ifwe twalishiba ukuti umuntu taba uwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa pa mulandu wakusunga Amafunde yakwa Mose, lelo ni mukuba ne cisumino muli Kristu Yesu. Kanshi na ifwe bene twasumine Kristu Yesu pakuti, mukuba ne cisumino muli Kristu, tumone ukuba abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa, temukusunga Amafunde yakwa Mose. Pantu takwaba nangu umo uwingaba uwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa, ico akonka Amafunde yakwa Mose." 
Galatians2:17 Nomba ifwe nga tufwaya ukuba abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa mukusumina muli Kristu, kabili na ifwe batusanga ukuti tuli babifi, bushe ninshi calola mukuti ni Kristu eulelenga ukuti tube ababifi? Awe cakaana!" 
Galatians2:18 Nga cakuti nabwelela kukukuula ico naonawile, ninshi kuti calangafye ukuti ndi mpulamafunde." 
Galatians2:19 Ukulingana no mwalola Amafunde yakwa Mose ine nalifwa, kanshi nshateekwa kabili naya mafunde. Eico naba nomba uwamweo pakuti ndebombela Lesa." 
Galatians2:20 Nalitanikwa pamo na Kristu pa musalaba. Kanshi nomba teine nyenda umumi, ni Kristu ewikala umumi muli ine. Ubumi bwandi nomba, kwenda ne cisumino mu Mwana wakwa Lesa, uwantemenwe, kabili uwaleka no mweo wakwe pa mulandu wa ine." 
Galatians2:21 Nshilesuula cikuuku cakwa Lesa. Lelo nga cakuti umuntu kuti amona ukuba uwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa mukusunga Amafunde yakwa Mose, ninshi imfwa yakwa Kristu tayabomba nelyo cimo." 
Galatians3:1 Mwe bena Galatia muli mpelwamano! Nani uwamufulungenye? Nalimulondolwela bwino no kumulangafye bwino ifyo Kristu atanikwe pa musalaba. 
Galatians3:2 Nalamwipushafye icintu cimo, bushe mwapokele Mupashi Wamushilo ico mwalesunga Amafunde yakwa Mose, nangu nico mwaumfwile no kusumina Imbila Nsuma?" 
Galatians3:3 Bushe cine kupelwamano konse uko! Mwatampile na Mupashi wakwa Lesa, nomba mulefwaya ukupwishishisha na maka yenu ayabuntunse?" 
Galatians3:4 Bushe ninshi fyonse ifyo mwaculileko fyali fyafye? Nshilesubila ukuti fyali fyafye! 
Galatians3:5 Ico Lesa amupeelela Mupashi no kulacita ifipeshamano uko muli, bushe nico musunga Amafunde yakwa Mose nangu nico mumfwa Imbila Nsuma elyo no kusumina mwasumina?" 
Galatians3:6 Umfweni ifyo Abrahamu acitile, “Abrahamu asumine Lesa, na pa mulandu wa cisumino cakwe, Lesa amumwene ukuti mololoke pa cinso cakwe.”" 
Galatians3:7 Kanshi mufwile ukwishiba ukuti abantu bacisumino e bana bene bene abakwa Abrahamu. 
Galatians3:8 Amalembo Yamushilo yalisobele ukuti, Lesa akalenga Abenafyalo nabo ukuba abakaele pa mulandu wakusumina. Eico Lesa aebele Abrahamu mu Mbila Nsuma iyakuti, “Ni muli iwe emo imishobo yonse ikapaalilwa.”" 
Galatians3:9 Kanshi bonse abasumina balapaalwa nga filya Abrahamu apaalilwe ico asumine. 
Galatians3:10 Abo bonse abashintilila pafyo babomba mukusunga Amafunde yakwa Mose balishama. Pantu calembwa ukuti, “Abe uwalapishiwa umuntu uushisunga ifyalembwa fyonse mu citabo ca Mafunde yakwa Mose.”" 
Galatians3:11 Lelo calishibikwafye bwino ukuti Amafunde yakwa Mose tayalenga muntu nelyo umo ukuti abe uwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa. Pantu calembwa ukuti, “Umololoke ena akulaba umumi pa mulandu wa citetekelo.”" 
Galatians3:12 Nomba Amafunde yakwa Mose tayashintilila pa citetekelo. Pantu calembwa ukuti, “Umuntu uukonka aya mafunde, ni ku mafunde akekalila umumi.”" 
Galatians3:13 Lelo Kristu alitulubula ukufuma ku citipu icaletele Amafunde yakwa Mose, ico Kristu umwine abuulile icitipu cesu abika pa mubili wakwe. Pantu calembwa ukuti, “Alitipwa umuntu uwakulikwa pa cimuti.”" 
Galatians3:14 Kristu Yesu acita ifi, pakuti Abenafyalo nabo bashukileko ipaalo Lesa alaile Abrahamu pa mulandu wakwa Kristu. Elyo lyena na ifwe fwe balesumina tulepokelela Mupashi Lesa alaya." 
Galatians3:15 Bamunyinane, nalamupeela icilangililo ica mu bumi bwesu ubwa cila bushiku. Abantu babili nga basuminishanya, elyo no kupangana bapangana pa cintu cimo, tapali nangu umo wingonaula ico cipangano nangu ukulundapo icintu cimbi." 
Galatians3:16 Nomba Lesa alaile ifilayo kuli Abrahamu na kuli umo pali ba lupwa lwakwe. Ifyalembwa tafitila, “Na kuli ba lupwa lobe,” kwati bantu abengi, lelo calembwa ukuti, “Na ku bufyashi bobe,” pakulanga ukuti muntu umofye, noyo muntu ni Kristu." 
Galatians3:17 Kanshi umo nalosha ni umu, Lesa acitile icipangano na Abrahamu, alaya no kulacisunga. Kanshi emukuti Amafunde yakwa Mose ayo yaishile peelwa ilyo ninshi palipita imyaka imyanda amakumi yane na makumi yatatu (430), tekuti yafumyepo no konaula ico Lesa alaile." 
Galatians3:18 Pantu ubupe ubo Lesa alaya ukupeela, nga apeelela pa mulandu wa Mafunde yakwa Mose, kanshi ninshi tapeela pa mulandu wa cilayo. Lelo nico Lesa amulaile, eco apeelele Abrahamu ubo bupe." 
Galatians3:19 Nga kanshi Amafunde yakwa Mose ya mulimo nshi? Lesa apeele aya mafunde pakulanga ifyo umuntu abifya. Kabili yali nokubakofye mpaka uwa mu bufyashi bwakwa Abrahamu, uo Lesa alaile, akese. Lesa aebele bamalaika ukupeela amafunde yakwe ku muntu umo, ndubulwila, uwali pakati kakwa Lesa na bantu." 
Galatians3:20 Ndubulwila tafwaikwa ukumfwa nga palifye umuntu umo, lelo Lesa abafye umo." 
Galatians3:21 Bushe calola mukuti Amafunde yakwa Mose yalipusana nefyo Lesa alaya? Awe, nakalya. Pantu Amafunde yakwa Mose nga kuti yaletela abantu umweo, ninshi lyena ukukonka aya mafunde kuti kwalenga umuntu ukuba uwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa." 
Galatians3:22 Lelo calembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo ukuti, abantu bonse aba pano isonde benakubifya. Epakuti abalesumina, balepoka ubupe ubo Lesa alaya, pali ico bali ne cisumino muli Yesu Kristu." 
Galatians3:23 Ilyo inshita ya cisumino yali tailaisa, Amafunde yakwa Mose yatuteekele nga bafungwa, mpaka no kufika ilyo icisumino casokolokelepo." 
Galatians3:24 Kanshi Amafunde yakwa Mose yali e kasunga wesu, mpaka no kwisa kwakwa Kristu. Lyena epakuti mukuba ne cisumino, tumoneke ukuba abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa." 
Galatians3:25 Nomba apo inshita ya cisumino yalisa, awe Amafunde yakwa Mose tekuti yabe kasunga wesu nakalya." 
Galatians3:26 Apo mwalisumina, nomba bonse muli bana bakwa Lesa ico mwaba muli Kristu Yesu." 
Galatians3:27 Apo mwabatishiwa ukuti mube muli Kristu, kanshi nomba mwafwala Kristu umwine wine." 
Galatians3:28 Kanshi nomba takwaba kapatulula kakuti uyu Muyuda noyu Mwinafyalo, uyu muntungwa noyu musha, uyu mwaume noyu mwanakashi. Awe apo bonse mwaliba muli Kristu, kanshi nomba mwabafye umo." 
Galatians3:29 Nga mwaba abantu bakwa Kristu, ninshi lyena muli ba mu bufyashi bwakwa Abrahamu, kabili mukapoka nefyo Lesa alaya." 
Galatians4:1 Ico ndesosa nici icakuti, umwana wakupyana wishi ilyo acili umwaice, nangu kwena e mwine wa fyuma fyonse, abafye ngo musha." 
Galatians4:2 Ali nokumfwila abalemusunga na baleyangalila ifyuma fyakwe mpaka inshita wishi apima ikafike. 
Galatians4:3 E cimo cine na ifwe. Ilyo twali nga baice mukwishiba Lesa, na ifwe twateekelwe ubusha ne mipashi ya pano isonde." 
Galatians4:4 Ilyo inshita Lesa apimine yafikile, elyo atumine Mwane. Aishile fyalwa ku mwanakashi, nao alekonka na Mafunde yakwa Mose." 
Galatians4:5 Aishile kukulubula abo abateekelwe na Mafunde yakwa Mose, pakuti na ifwe tumone ukuba abana bakwa Lesa." 
Galatians4:6 Pakulanga ukuti muli bana bakwe, Lesa alitutumina mu mitima yesu Mupashi wakwa Mwane. Uyu Mupashi eubilikisha ati, “Abba, Tata, Tata ee!”" 
Galatians4:7 Kanshi nomba tauli musha, uli mwana. Apo nomba uli mwana, kanshi akakupeela fyonse ifyo ateyanishisha bamwane." 
Galatians4:8 Kale ilyo mushaishibe Lesa, mwalifye abasha ba fintu ifishili imilungu." 
Galatians4:9 Nomba mwalishiba Lesa, nangu kantile Lesa wine nomba alimwishiba. Nga kanshi kuti mwabwelulukila shani ku fintufye ifinangwa ifishakwata maka? Bushe nakabili mulefwaya fimuteeke ubusha?" 
Galatians4:10 Mulacindikapo inshiku shimo, imyeshi imo, inshita shimo isha myaka, elyo ne myaka imo." 
Galatians4:11 Awe ndi uwasakamana pali imwe ukuti nalimo naicushishefye pakumubombela! 
Galatians4:12 Mwe bamunyinane, ndemupapata mube ngefyo ine naba, pantu ine nalyalwike naba ngefyo imwe mwaba. Imwe tamwandufyenye nelyo cimo." 
Galatians4:13 Muleibukisha icalengele umuku wapakubala ukuti njise kukubila Imbila Nsuma kuli imwe, nico nalwele." 
Galatians4:14 Nangu cali icamukosela ku mulandu wa bulwele bwandi awe tamwansuulile nangu ukuntalukako. Lelo kabili mwampokelelefye ngefyo mwingapokelela malaika wakwa Lesa. Mwampokelelefye kwati ni Kristu Yesu wine. 
Galatians4:15 Mwasansamwike nganshi. Nga nomba insansa shenu shili kwi? Ine ndesosa nga kambone wenu ukuti, acilacitika, pa nshita ilya nga mwalilobwelemo amenso yenu mwe bene, amumpeela." 
Galatians4:16 Bushe pakumweba icishinka, epo ningabela umulwani wenu?" 
Galatians4:17 Abo bantu balelanga ukumusakamana nganshi, lelo ifyo balefwaya ukucita fibi. Ico balefwaya kumupatula kuli ine, pakuti ebo muposeko amano, mulebakonka." 
Galatians4:18 Cintu icisuma ukulanga ukusakamana abantu, kumfwa nga ni pa cintu icisuma. Ici cena cacishinka lyonsefye, temukuti kanofye ilyo ndi na imwe." 
Galatians4:19 Mwe bana bandi! Nakabili nimwe ndeculila ngo mwanakashi uukomenwe ne fumo. Ndecula pakuti mwaluke mukule mu mibeele yakwa Kristu. 
Galatians4:20 Ala kuti natemwa ukuba na imwe pali ino nshita. Lyena kuti naishiba ifyakumweba, pantu ine namumpesha amano!" 
Galatians4:21 Kanjipushe abo pali imwe abafwaya ukuteekwa na Mafunde yakwa Mose. Bushe tamwaumfwa ifyo aya mafunde yasosa? 
Galatians4:22 Aya mafunde yatila, Abrahamu ali na bana abaume babili. Umo nyina ali umusha, elyo umbi nyina ali umuntungwa." 
Galatians4:23 Umwana Abrahamu afyele ku mwanakashi umusha, afyelwe nga ififyalwa abantu bonse, lelo umwana Abrahamu afyele ku mwanakashi umuntungwa, wena afyelwe ukulingana nefyo Lesa alaile." 
Galatians4:24 Ifi fintu fyonse fili nomo filolele. Haga banakashi babili balelanga ifipangano fibili. Haga alanga icipangano ca pa lupili lwa Sinai, elyo na bana baciko abasha." 
Galatians4:25 Haga aba kwati lupili lwa Sinai mu calo ca Arabia, kabili apala ku musumba wine uyu uulipo uwa Yerusalemu, pantu musha pamo pene na bamwane." 
Galatians4:26 Lelo Yerusalemu wa mu mulu wena muntungwa, kabili e nyinefwe." 
Galatians4:27 Pantu calembwa ukuti, “Sansamuka we ŋumba, iwe we ushafyalapo bana! Punda, kabili akwanga ne nsansa, iwe we ushatala aukomwa ne fumo. Pantu umwanakashi uwalekeleshiwa akwata abana abengi ukucila umwanakashi uwaba no mulume lyonse.”" 
Galatians4:28 Nomba imwe bamunyinane, pamo nga Isaki imwe muli bana ba cilayo cakwa Lesa." 
Galatians4:29 Pa nshita ilya, umwana ulya wafyelwe nga filya fifyalwa abantu bonse, alecusha umwana uwafyelwe ku maka yakwa Mupashi wakwa Lesa. Kanshi ifyo fine efilecitika na nomba." 
Galatians4:30 Bushe Amalembo Yamushilo yatila shani? “Tamfya umwanakashi umusha pamo no mwana wakwe. Pantu ifyuma wishi akasha nga afwa, umwana wa musha tekuti nao apokeko pamo no mwana wa mwanakashi umuntungwa.”" 
Galatians4:31 Kanshi mwe bamunyinane, ifwe tuli bana ba mwanakashi umuntungwa, tatuli bana ba mwanakashi umusha iyoo." 
Galatians5:1 Ifwe tuli bantungwa bene bene, eco Kristu atulubwila. Kanshi kosenipofye, mwileka umuntu nangu umo amupose mwikoli lya busha nakabili." 
Galatians5:2 Umfweni! Ine ne Paulo ndemweba ukuti, nga mwasumina ukusembululwa, ninshi tamwamwenamo nelyo cimo mukusumina Kristu." 
Galatians5:3 Nakabili nabwekeshapo ukuti, uyo onse uwasumina ukusembululwa, ninshi ali nokusunga Amafunde yonse ayakwa Mose." 
Galatians5:4 Imwe bonse mwe balefwaya ukuba abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa pa mulandu wakusunga Amafunde yakwa Mose, mwalifuma kuli Kristu. Kabili mwaliitalusha na ku cikuuku cakwa Lesa." 
Galatians5:5 Nomba ifwe ku maka yakwa Mupashi tulelolela no kusubila ukuba abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa, pali ico twasumina." 
Galatians5:6 Pantu kuli ifwe fwe baba muli Kristu, ukusembululwa takubomba nelyo cimo, elyo no kukanasembululwa nako kwine takubomba nelyo cimo. Icikalamba cisumino icibomba imilimo ya citemwiko." 
Galatians5:7 Mwaleendafye bwino bwino. Nga nani uumucilingenye, amulesha ukulanakila icishinka?" 
Galatians5:8 Ico cena te Lesa uwamwita ewacita ico. 
Galatians5:9 Intutumushi inono ilatutumuna umufuba onse. 
Galatians5:10 Ine ndatetekela mu Mfumu ukuti tamwakabuule amafunde yambi, kanofye ayo namufunda, lelo uyo muntu uulemufulunganya, nangu engaba shani, Lesa akamukanda." 
Galatians5:11 Nomba bamunyinane, nga na nomba ncili ndebila ukuti bonse bali nokusembululwa, nga cinshi bengalabikapofye ukulancusha? Ala aciba ifyo, ukubila pa macushi yakwa Kristu pa musalaba nga teti kulete impasase." 
Galatians5:12 Kanshi abo bantu balemufulunganya, kuti cawama nokuti mukuisembulula bapitilisha baitungwilamo!" 
Galatians5:13 Lelo imwe bamunyinane, Lesa alimwita ukuba abantungwa. Nomba mwileka ubu buntungwa bumutwale kukukonkelela ulunkumbwa lubi. Lelo mwishibe ukulanga icitemwiko, cila umo mukubombela umunankwe." 
Galatians5:14 Pantu Amafunde yonse ayakwa Mose yashinta muli ili funde ilyakuti, “Uletemwa umubiyo ngefyo waitemwa we mwine.”" 
Galatians5:15 Lelo nga mwalasumana elyo no kucenana, cenjeleni, limbi mukayonaula bonse." 
Galatians5:16 Ifyo ndemweba nifi, muleenda abatungululwa na Mupashi, lyena tamwakulakonkelela ifyo ubuntunse bwenu bufwaya." 
Galatians5:17 Pantu ififwaya ubuntunse bwesu fyalipusana nefyo Mupashi afwaya. Elyo ifyo Mupashi afwaya, nafyo fyalipusana ne fifwaya ubuntunse bwesu. Mupashi no buntunse filalwishanya. Kanshi eco mufililwa ukucita ifyo mulefwaya ukucita." 
Galatians5:18 Lelo nga Mupashi eumutungulula, kanshi ninshi tamwateekwa na Mafunde yakwa Mose." 
Galatians5:19 Nomba imicitile ibi iyabuntunse yalishibikwafye bwino. Niyi, bucilende, ubupulumushi, ubucende," 
Galatians5:20 ukupepa utulubi, ubuloshi, ukupatana no kulaumana, ubufuba, icipyu, bukaitemwe, akapatulula no kukanaumfwana," 
Galatians5:21 umufimbila, bucakolwa, ubulili, elyo na fimbi ifya uyu musango. Ndemusokako nakabili ngefyo namusokele kale ukuti abantu abacita ifi fintu tabakapyane Bufumu bwakwa Lesa." 
Galatians5:22 Lelo Mupashi wena alenga icitemwiko, insansa, umutende, umutekatima, icilela, ukuwamya, ubufumacumi," 
Galatians5:23 umutembo no kushipikisha. Takwaba ifunde nangu limo ililesha ifya musango uyu. 
Galatians5:24 Abantu bakwa Kristu Yesu, bena balipaya ipamfya lyabuntunse no lunkumbwa lubi." 
Galatians5:25 Apo Mupashi ewatupeela umweo, kanshi natuleenda na Mupashi." 
Galatians5:26 Natuleke ukuitutumuna, nangu ukusonsombana, nangu umo ukulafimbila umunankwe." 
Galatians6:1 Mwe bamunyinane, umo nga asangwa mu bubifi, mwe batungululwa na Mupashi mumwalulule afume mu bubifi. Lelo mube abamutembo mukumwalulula. Elyo na imwe bene muleisunga bwino, epali na imwe mwawila mu ntunko." 
Galatians6:2 Mulesendeshanya ifipe ifyafina, epakuti mulefikilisha amafunde yakwa Kristu." 
Galatians6:3 Umo nga alaitunga ukuba cimo, mu nshita tali nelyo cimo, ninshi aleibepafye." 
Galatians6:4 Cila muntu aleipingula pafyo alecita. Nga fisuma, lyena kuti aumfwa icilumba pafyo umwine acita, nomba tekulalinga ku milimo umunobe umbi alecita." 
Galatians6:5 Pantu cila muntu ali nokuibombela imilimo yakwe umwine. 
Galatians6:6 Umuntu uulefundwa amashiwi yakwa Kristu, ali nokupeelako uulemufunda ifintu ifisuma pali fyonse ifyo akwata." 
Galatians6:7 Mwilaibepa, Lesa tatumpikwa. Ico umuntu abyala, eco akalobolola." 
Galatians6:8 Uubyala mufyo ubuntunse bwakwe bufwaya, ninshi akalobolola imfwa. Nomba nga abyala ifyo Mupashi afwaya, ninshi wena akalobolola umweo wape." 
Galatians6:9 Kanshi twilatendwa ukucita ifisuma. Pantu kumfwa nga tatulenenuka, ninshi tukalobolola ifisabo pa nshita yafiko." 
Galatians6:10 Kanshi ilyo tucili ne nshita, natulecita ifisuma ku bantu bonse, ukucilapo kuli bamunyinefwe mu cisumino." 
Galatians6:11 Moneni ifilembo ubukulu ifyo nalalemba. Nine wine ndemulembela no kuboko kwandi! 
Galatians6:12 Abo bantu abalemupatikisha ukusembululwa, balefwayafye ukutashiwa ku bantu. Ico balecitila ifyo, nico tabalefwaya kucushiwa pa mulandu wa musalaba wakwa Kristu." 
Galatians6:13 Elyo na basembululwa bene tabasunga Mafunde yakwa Mose. Balefwaya ukuti imwe musembululwe pakuti baleitakishisha pali ico mwanakila ulutambi lwakusembululwa. 
Galatians6:14 Kwena ine nshamona cakuitakishishapo kanofye umusalaba wa Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu. Pa mulandu wa musalaba wakwa Kristu, kuli ine ifyacalo fyaba kwati tafyabapo fyalifwa, elyo na ine nalifwa ku fyacalo." 
Galatians6:15 Ukusembululwa kwafyefye, elyo no kukanasembululwa nako kwine kwafyefye, icikalamba kuba umuntu mupya." 
Galatians6:16 Umutende no luse lwakwa Lesa fibe kuli bonse abakonka ici cebo, pamo pene na bena Israeli bakwa Lesa bonse!" 
Galatians6:17 Ukufuma pali nomba nshilefwaya umuntu ukulancusha. Pantu naliba ne mikofu pa mubili wandi iyilanga ukuti ndi muntu wakwa Yesu. 
Galatians6:18 Bamunyinane, icikuuku ca Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu cileba na imwe bonse. Ameni." 
Ephesians1:1 Ine Paulo, Lesa kukufwaya kwakwefye anjita ukuba umusole wakwa Kristu Yesu. Namulembela imwe mwe bamushilo, mwe bapetamina Kristu Yesu, mwe bekala mu musumba wa Efeso." 
Ephesians1:2 Icikuuku no mutende fyakwa Lesa Shifwe ne Mfumu Yesu Kristu fileba na imwe. 
Ephesians1:3 Natuletasha Lesa kabili Wishi wa Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu! Pantu, ico tuli muli Kristu, Lesa alitupaala ne paalo lyonse ukufuma ku mulu." 
Ephesians1:4 Ilyo Lesa talati abumbe icalo, ninshi alitusala ukuba abamushilo kabili abakaele pa cinso cakwe pa mulandu wakwa Kristu." 
Ephesians1:5 Lesa ku kutemwa kwakwe atusobwela libela ukuba abana bakwe pa mulandu wakwa Yesu Kristu. Ni ku kutemwafye umwine Lesa afwaile ifi. 
Ephesians1:6 Kanshi natulelumbanya Lesa pa cikuuku cakwe icikalamba, ico umwine ku kufwayafye kwakwe atukwatila pa mulandu wakwa Mwane uo atemwisha." 
Ephesians1:7 Kristu alitulubula ku mulandu wa mfwa yakwe. Umulopa wakwe walenga nokuti tubelelwe uluse ku fyabubifi fyesu. We cikuuku cakwa Lesa nobe ulakula," 
Ephesians1:8 ico mu mano yakwe yonse na mu kwiluka kwakwe konse alenga ukuti tushukile. 
Ephesians1:9 Lesa alenga twishibe inkaama apangile umwine ukulingana no kutemwa kwakwe, iyo Kristu ali nokufikilisha." 
Ephesians1:10 Ilyo inshita yalinga ikafika, elyo Lesa akafikilisha amapange yakwe. Akalonganya ifintu fyonse pamo, ifya mu mulu ne fya pano isonde ukuti Kristu eo alefiteeka fyonse." 
Ephesians1:11 Nico tuli muli Kristu ecalengele ukuti Lesa atusale tube abantu bakwe. Pantu Lesa atusobwela libela ukufumafye ku citendekelo, ukulingana na mapange yakwe. Lesa wena, mu fintu fyonse abomba umo alefwaila." 
Ephesians1:12 Kanshi ifwe fwe babalilapo ukutetekela muli Kristu, tulenge ukulumbanya ubucindami bwakwa Lesa." 
Ephesians1:13 Kabili muli Kristu, na imwe ilyo mwaumfwile amashiwi yacishinka, Imbila Nsuma iyakumupususha, no kusumina mwasumine muli Kristu, Lesa amupeele Mupashi Wamushilo uo alaile, icishibilo cakulanga ukuti muli bantu bakwa Lesa." 
Ephesians1:14 Mupashi Wamushilo e cikatilo uulenga tushininkishe ukuti Lesa akatupeela ico alaya abantu bakwe, mpaka Lesa akapwishe umulimo wakubalubula. Neci cikalenga ukulalumbanya ubucindami bwakwa Lesa." 
Ephesians1:15 Kanshi ecalenga ukuti, apo naumfwila palwa cisumino cenu mu Mfumu Yesu nefyo mwatemwa abamushilo bonse," 
Ephesians1:16 nshatala ndeka ukutasha Lesa pa mulandu wa imwe. Ndamwibukishako mu mapepo yandi. 
Ephesians1:17 Ndalomba na Lesa wa Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu, Shifwe mucindami, ukuti amupeele Mupashi uwakumupanda amano no kumusokolwela Lesa, pakuti mumwishibe." 
Ephesians1:18 Kabili ndalomba nokuti Mupashi amusanikile amano yenu, pakuti mwishibe isubilo Lesa amwitako. Ndalomba nokuti mwishibe ubucindami bwa mapaalo Lesa alaya abantu bakwe abamushilo." 
Ephesians1:19 Elyo ndalomba nokuti mwishibe nefyo amaka yakula ayabomba muli ifwe fwe basumina. Amaka ayabomba muli ifwe, maka yamo yene ayakalamba nganshi," 
Ephesians1:20 ayo abomfeshe pakubusha Kristu ku bafwa no kumuteka lubali lwa ku kulyo kwakwe mu mulu. 
Ephesians1:21 Nomba alimucindamika, amupeela ubufumu ukucila pali bakateeka ba mu mulu bonse, ubuteko bonse, abamaka bonse ne shamfumu shonse. Alikwata ishina ilyalumbuka ukucila amashina yambi yonse ayalumbuka pali ino nshita ne nshita ikesa kuntanshi." 
Ephesians1:22 Lesa alenga Kristu ukuti acimfye fyonse. Lesa amupeela na ku lukuta ukuti abe e mutwe wa fintu fyonse. 
Ephesians1:23 Pantu ulukuta e mubili wakwa Kristu, umo aba uwapwililika. Kabili ni Kristu wine eulenga na fyonse fipwililike." 
Ephesians2:1 Imwe kale mwalifwile pa mulandu wa bumpulamafunde no bubifi bwenu. 
Ephesians2:2 Pantu mu bumi bwenu mwalekonkelela imisango iyabipa iya pano calo. Mwalenakila na kateeka wa bufumu bwa mu lwelele, Ciwa uo na nombaline acili alebomba mu bantu abashipetamina Lesa." 
Ephesians2:3 Kwena bonse pa nshita imo na ifwe efyo twali. Twaikele mukukonkelela ulunkumbwa lubi, twalecitafye ifilefwaya imibili yesu na mano yesu. Kanshi mu buntunse bwesu pamo nga bantu bambi bonse, Lesa ali nokutukanda." 
Ephesians2:4 Lelo Lesa alikwatisha uluse, kabili alitutemwisha nganshi." 
Ephesians2:5 Eico ilyo twali abafwa ku mulandu wa kubifya kwesu, Lesa alengele tube abamweo pamo na Kristu. Ni ku cikuuku cakwa Lesa eko mwapusukila." 
Ephesians2:6 Kanshi pa mulandu wakwa Kristu, Lesa alitubusha pamo nankwe, pakuti twikale pamo na Kristu Yesu mu mulu." 
Ephesians2:7 Ico Lesa acitila ifyo, ni pakulanga ku myaka yonse iya kuntanshi ifyo icikuuku atukwatila cacilamo ku bukulu ico atutemwa pa mulandu wakwa Kristu Yesu." 
Ephesians2:8 Pantu ni ku cikuuku cakwa Lesa, ico mwasumina, eko mwapusukila. Ici cena bupefye bwakwa Lesa," 
Ephesians2:9 te ku maka yenu iyoo. Kanshi tapali nangu umo uwakuitakisha pali ici. 
Ephesians2:10 Ifwe tulifye fibumbwa fyakwa Lesa. Lesa alitubumba, fwe bali muli Kristu Yesu, pakuti tulebomba imilimo isuma iyo Lesa umwine atuteyanishishe kale ukuti tuli nokuibomba." 
Ephesians2:11 Imwe mwe Benafyalo muleibukisha ifyo mwali kale. Abayuda bamwita, “Abashasembululwa.” Abene bena baita ukuti tuli basembululwa ukulingana nefyo abaume bacita ku mibili yabo." 
Ephesians2:12 Mwibukishe ukuti pa nshita ilya tamwaishibe Kristu, mwali ukutali. Mwali abeni abashali ba mu mushobo wa bena Israeli. Imwe tamwakumine na ku fipangano umo Lesa alaile ifintu ali nokupeela abantu bakwe. Mwaleikala pano calo ukwabula isubilo kabili ukwabula Lesa." 
Ephesians2:13 Lelo nomba muli Kristu Yesu, imwe mwe bali ukutali, umulopa wakwa Kristu walimupalamika." 
Ephesians2:14 Pantu Kristu umwine atucita umushobo umo. Aleta icibote pakati ka Bayuda na Benafyalo. Ku mubili wakwe eko abongolwela icibumba icalebalekanya no kubapatanya. 
Ephesians2:15 Alilesha Amafunde yakwa Mose ne ntambi na fyonse ifyo yalekonkomesha. Acita ifi pakuti awikishanye iyi mishobo, elyo umwine kuli iyi mishobo ibili apangeko umushobo umo uupya uwacibote." 
Ephesians2:16 Kristu ku mfwa yakwe iya pa musalaba alyonaula ulupato ulwali pakati ka iyi mishobo. Kabili ku mfwa yakwe auminkanya imishobo iyi ibili ukuba umubili umo, aubwesesha na kuli Lesa." 
Ephesians2:17 Kristu aishile bila Imbila Nsuma yacibote ku bantu bonse, kuli imwe mwe Benafyalo mwe bali ukutali na Lesa, elyo na ku Bayuda bene abali mupepi na Lesa." 
Ephesians2:18 Ni pa mulandu wakwa Kristu eco ifwe bonse Abayuda na Benafyalo twishila pa cinso cakwa Wishi ku bwafwilisho bwakwa Mupashi. 
Ephesians2:19 Kanshi eico nomba na imwe mwe Benafyalo tamuli beni nangu imitulatulafye iyoo. Na imwe nomba muli bakaya pamo na bamushilo, mulifye bantu ba mu lupwa lwakwa Lesa." 
Ephesians2:20 Imwe nomba mulifye nge cikuulwa ico bakuula pa mufula uwaimbwa na basole na bakasesema, elyo Kristu Yesu umwine e libwe lyakwikasha petungi." 
Ephesians2:21 Ni Kristu umwine uo twaampana nankwe ewikasha icikuulwa conse no kuleka ukuti cikule, caluke itempele lyamushilo ilya Mfumu." 
Ephesians2:22 Na imwe bene mwe Benafyalo, Kristu uo mwaampana nankwe alamukuula pakuti mube iŋanda Lesa ekalamo ku maka yakwa Mupashi wakwe." 
Ephesians3:1 Ni pa mulandu uyu, ine ne Paulo ndi mu cifungo ico mombela Kristu Yesu pa mulandu wenu mwe Benafyalo." 
Ephesians3:2 Kwena mwalyumfwa ifyo Lesa ku cikuuku cakwe ampeela uyu mulimo uwakumubombela. 
Ephesians3:3 Ngefyo nembelepo kale panono, Lesa alinsokolwela pakuti njishibe inkaama ya mapange yakwe." 
Ephesians3:4 Nga mwabelenga ifyo nembelepo, kuti mwailuka pafyo naishiba pa nkaama yakwa Kristu." 
Ephesians3:5 Mu nkulo ishapita, abantu tabaishibe iyi nkaama. Lelo nomba Lesa alisokolola iyi nkaama ku maka yakwa Mupashi ku basole bakwe abamushilo na bakasesema." 
Ephesians3:6 Ne nkaama niyi iyakuti, pa mulandu wa Mbila Nsuma, Abenafyalo nabo balishukilako amapaalo yakwa Lesa pamo na Bayuda. Bonse pamo baba umubili umo, kabili mukuba muli Kristu Yesu balashukila ifyo Lesa alaya." 
Ephesians3:7 Lesa ku cikuuku cakwe alenga ukuti mbe umubomfi wa Mbila Nsuma, elyo ampeelako na maka yakwe ayabomba muli ine." 
Ephesians3:8 Abamushilo bonse balincila ukucindama. Nomba nine Lesa apeela icikuuku cakubila ku Benafyalo ifintu ifikankala ifyacipeshamano ifyaba mu Mbila Nsuma yakwa Kristu. 
Ephesians3:9 Ampeela no kulenga ukuti abantu beshibe ifyo ifya mu nkaama yakwe fili nokufikilishiwa. Lesa kabumba wa fintu fyonse alifishile ifyaba mu nkaama yakwe imyaka yonse iyi yapita. 
Ephesians3:10 Epakuti nomba mukubomfya ulukuta lwakwe, bakateeka na bamaka bonse aba mu mulu beshibe amano yakwa Lesa aya misango ne misango." 
Ephesians3:11 Lesa abomfya Kristu Yesu Imfumu yesu pakufikilisha aya mapange akwete ukufumafye na ku kale. 
Ephesians3:12 Nico tuli muli Kristu neco twamusumina, ecilenga ukuti tuye pa cinso cakwa Lesa natupama, kabili ukwabula ukutwishika." 
Ephesians3:13 Kanshi namupapata mwinenuka pali ico ndemuculila, ala fyonse ifi fyakumuletela ubucindami." 
Ephesians3:14 Kanshi eico mfukamina Shifwe," 
Ephesians3:15 uwinika ishina ulupwa lonse ulwa mu mulu na pano calo. 
Ephesians3:16 Ndelomba Lesa ukuti ku maka yakwa Mupashi wakwe na ku bukankala bwa bucindami bwakwe mube abakosa mu mitima yenu. 
Ephesians3:17 Ndelomba nokuti ku cisumino mwakwata, Kristu aleikala mu mitima yenu nokuti emo icitemwiko cishimpwe cibe icakosa nganshi." 
Ephesians3:18 Epakuti imwe pamo na bamushilo bonse mumone ukuba na maka yakumfwikisha ubukulu, ubutali, ukusumbuka no kushika kwa citemwiko cakwa Kristu." 
Ephesians3:19 Ee, muli nokwishiba icitemwiko cakwa Kristu nangu amano yonse teti yomfwe apo capela. Lyena elyo mukesushiwamo ne mibeele yakwa Lesa yonse." 
Ephesians3:20 Natulelumba Lesa uo amaka yakwe yabomba muli ifwe, kabili kuti abomba ne ficilile pafyo twingalomba nangu pafyo twingatontonkanya." 
Ephesians3:21 Kanshi inshita yonse mu lukuta na mukuba muli Kristu Yesu, Lesa nalelumbwa pe na pe! Ameni." 
Ephesians4:1 Ine neo baposa mu cifungo pa mulandu wakubombela Imfumu, ndemupapata ukuti muleenda ne myendele iyalinga no bwite Lesa amwitako." 
Ephesians4:2 Muleicefya lyonse, mube abamutembo, muletekelana imitima. Muletemwana mukushipikishanya." 
Ephesians4:3 Mulesakamana ukusunga icumfwano Mupashi amupeela mukwikala na banenu pamo mu mutende. 
Ephesians4:4 Kwabafye umubili umo na Mupashi umo, nga filya fine kwabafye icakusubila cimo ico Lesa amwitako." 
Ephesians4:5 Kwabafye Imfumu imo, icisumino cimo no lubatisho lumo." 
Ephesians4:6 Kwabafye Lesa umo, kabili e Wishi wa bantu bonse. Wena alicila pali bonse, abomba muli bonse, aba na muli bonse." 
Ephesians4:7 Ifwe bonse umo umo, ukulingana nomo Kristu alefwaila ukupeela, twalipokelelako icikuuku cakwe." 
Ephesians4:8 Efyo casoswa mu Malembo Yamushilo ukuti, “Ilyo aninine mu mulu, asendele bankole abengi, apeele na bantu ifyabupe.”" 
Ephesians4:9 Ngeci cakuti, “Alininine,” calola mwi? Calola mukuti, pakubala atalile aikila pesamba lya calo." 
Ephesians4:10 Lelo uyu waikile, euyu wine uwaninine apula acila ne myulu yonse pakuti akumanefye mu fintu fyonse." 
Ephesians4:11 Euyu wine apeela ubupe, bamo ukuba abasole, bambi ukuba bakasesema, bambi ukulabila Imbila Nsuma, bambi ukuba bakacema na bakafundisha." 
Ephesians4:12 Acita ifi, pakupekanya abamushilo ku mulimo wabutumishi, epakuti bamone ukukosha umubili wakwa Kristu." 
Ephesians4:13 Pakuti bonse pamo tukakwate icisumino cimo cine na mano yamo yene ayakwishiba Mwana Lesa. Lyena elyo tukakula, tukafike na ku ciimo cakwa Kristu." 
Ephesians4:14 Lyena ninshi twaleka ukuba abaice abasendwa na matamba uku noku, abasendwa no mwela konse uko wapuupila, emukutila abasendwa na mafunde ya ncenjeshi sha bantu. Aba ebongola abantu no kubatwala mu cilubo ku mano yabo ayabucenjeshi." 
Ephesians4:15 Lelo nga twalalanda ifyacishinka no mutima wakutemwana, lyena ninshi tukakula mu nshila shonse tukapalane na Kristu, umutwe wesu." 
Ephesians4:16 Ni muli uyu wine Kristu emo ifilundwa fyonse ifya mubili fyasuntinkana no kulundinkanina pamo. Elyo cila cilundwa naco cilabomba umulimo waciko pakuti umubili wikatane. Kabili lyena umubili onse ulakulilako no kukoselako mukutemwana. 
Ephesians4:17 Kanshi ndemweba no kumukonkomesha pa cinso ca Mfumu ukuti, mwilaenda ne myendele yabuwelewele nga bantu abashaishiba Lesa." 
Ephesians4:18 Amano yabo yalikutwa. Balitaluka na ku mweo Lesa apeela. Pantu tabaishiba nelyo cimo, kabili bantu baumalala imitima." 
Ephesians4:19 Tabomfwa nsoni nakalya. Baiposa abene kuli bucilende, kabili babikapofye no kulacita ifibi ifya misango yonse." 
Ephesians4:20 Nomba imwe tefyo mwasambilile pali Kristu iyoo. 
Ephesians4:21 Nga cacine cine mwalyumfwa pali Kristu, elyo kabili mwalifundwa ne fyacishinka pali Kristu!" 
Ephesians4:22 Kanshi fuuleni imisango yenu iyakale. Muleke imikalile ya bumuntu bwenu ubwakale ubwa lunkumbwa ululebonaula. 
Ephesians4:23 Imitima yenu na mano yenu fisanguke ifipya. 
Ephesians4:24 Muli nokufwala bumuntu bupya, ubwabumbwa mu cata cakwa Lesa, pakuti ubumi bwenu bulemoneka icine cine ubwamushilo kabinge ubwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa." 
Ephesians4:25 Kanshi, lekeni ubufi! Cila umo alelanda ifyacishinka ku munankwe, pantu ifwe bonse tuli filundwa fya mubili umo." 
Ephesians4:26 Nga cakuti mwafulwa, mwilaleka ukufulwa kwenu kumutwale kukubifya. Mwileka akasuba kawe mwikelefye mukufulwa." 
Ephesians4:27 Mwilaleka Ciwa ashukile akashita kakumutwala mu ntunko. 
Ephesians4:28 Uwaleiba aleke ukulaiba. Atampe nomba ukubomba, pakuti aleisunga mukuibombela umwine, akwate ne fyakukumbusukako abalanda." 
Ephesians4:29 Mwilabomfya mashiwi yabi, lelo mulebomfyafye amashiwi yakubafwa, ayakubakosha, ayalingile pali iyo nshita, epakuti yaletele ipaalo ku baleumfwako." 
Ephesians4:30 Mwilalenga Mupashi Wamushilo wakwa Lesa ukuba no bulanda. Pantu Mupashi uo mwakwata e cishibilo mwashininkishishako ukuti muli bantu bakwa Lesa, abo akalubula pali bulya Bushiku." 
Ephesians4:31 Mwilaba abasashila ku banenu, muleke icipyu no bukali. Mwilaotokela muntu nelyo umo nangu ukumubepesha. Mwilapata muntu nelyo umo." 
Ephesians4:32 Lelo muleba ne cilela, kabili abamutembo ku banenu. Mulebelela abanenu uluse, nga filya Lesa amubelela uluse pa mulandu wakwa Kristu." 
Ephesians5:1 Kanshi apo muli bana bakwa Lesa abo atemwa, mulemupashanya." 
Ephesians5:2 Kabili muleenda abatemwana, nga filya Kristu atutemenwe, asukile aileka ilambo pa mulandu wesu, umutuulo uwa cena cisuma kuli Lesa." 
Ephesians5:3 Apo imwe muli bamushilo bakwa Lesa, kuli imwe takuli nakumfwika ifyabulalelale nangu bucilende nangu ulunkumbwa lwa fyuma." 
Ephesians5:4 Imwe tamuli nakubomfya amashiwi yabi, amashiwi yabupuba, nangu ayabula umucinshi. Lelo imwe cilingilefye ukulatasha." 
Ephesians5:5 Kanshi mushininkishe ukuti umuntu cilalelale, impulumushi, no wa lunkumbwa lwa fyuma, pantu ici cena cimo no kupepa utulubi, takapyane Bufumu bwakwa Kristu na Lesa." 
Ephesians5:6 Mwilaleka muntu nelyo umo amubepaike ku mashiwi yaciwelewele, pantu ni pa mulandu wa ifi fintu eco ubukali bwakwa Lesa bwishila abantu abashimupetamina." 
Ephesians5:7 Kanshi aba bantu te bakwampana nabo. 
Ephesians5:8 Pantu kale mwali mu mfifi, lelo ico nomba muli bantu ba Mfumu, mwaba mu lubuuto. Kanshi nomba muleenda nga bantu abekala mu lubuuto." 
Ephesians5:9 Pantu ulubuuto lwena luletafye ifisuma fyeka fyeka, ubololoke ne cishinka." 
Ephesians5:10 Kanshi muleesha ukwishiba ifintu ifisansamusha Imfumu. 
Ephesians5:11 Muletaluka ku fintu fyaciwelewele ifyo bantu bacita mu mfifi. Imwe mulefileta pa lwalala. 
Ephesians5:12 Pantu ifyo bacita mu bumfisolo, fintu abantu bakwatilapo insoni nelyo ukufilandapo." 
Ephesians5:13 Pantu ifintu ifyo baleta ku lubuuto, fileshibikwa icine cine ifyo fyaba." 
Ephesians5:14 Icintu conse icasokolokela pa lwalala, caluka ulubuuto. Eco casoselwa ukuti, “Shibuka we uli mu tulo, buuka ku bafwa. Elyo Kristu alekusanikila.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Kanshi mulemona bwino bwino imyendele yenu mu bumi bwenu. Mwilaenda kwati ni mpelwamano, lelo muleenda nga bamano." 
Ephesians5:16 Mulebomfya bwino inshita yonse iyo mwashukila, pantu shino nshiku nashibipa." 
Ephesians5:17 Mwiba kwati fipumbu, muli nokwesha ukwiluka pafyo Imfumu ilefwaya ukuti mulecita." 
Ephesians5:18 Mwiba bacakolwa wa bwalwa, pantu bukamonaulafye. Lekeni Mupashi eo esule mu mitima yenu." 
Ephesians5:19 Ilyo mulelanshanya mulebomfya amashiwi ya mu malumbo, na ya mu nyimbo shakwa Lesa, elyo na ya mu nyimbo shimbi isha bena Lesa. Muleimba inyimbo shakwa Lesa ne sha malumbo pakutasha Lesa ne mitima yenu yonse." 
Ephesians5:20 Lyonse mulebomfya ishina lya Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu pakutasha Lesa Tata pa fintu fyonse atupeela. 
Ephesians5:21 Mulenakilana pa mulandu wakucindika Kristu. 
Ephesians5:22 Mwe bakashi, mulenakila abalume benu nga filya munakila Imfumu." 
Ephesians5:23 Pantu umulume e mutwe wa mukashi wakwe nga filya Kristu aba e mutwe wa lukuta. Elyo Kristu umwine e Mupusushi wa lukuta ulwaba e mubili wakwe. 
Ephesians5:24 Kanshi nga filya ulukuta lunakila Kristu, efyo abakashi nabo bali nokunakila abalume babo muli fyonse." 
Ephesians5:25 Mwe balume, na imwe muletemwa abakashi benu nga filya Kristu atemwa ulukuta, alekelapo no mweo wakwe." 
Ephesians5:26 Acita ifi, pakuti ulukuta lube ulwamushilo, ulwasangululwa mukusambika ku menshi na ku mashiwi yakwe." 
Ephesians5:27 Epakuti aikwatile umwine ulukuta ulwayemba, ulwabula akakumbe nangu imikoni nangu akabi konse, lelo ulwamushilo, ulwabula ubulema." 
Ephesians5:28 Efyo fine abalume bali nokutemwa abakashi babo nga filya fine batemwa imibili yabo. Umwaume uwatemwa umukashi wakwe ninshi aliitemwa umwine. 
Ephesians5:29 Tapatala apaba umuntu uwapata umubili wakwe. Lelo alaulisha no kuusunga bwino, nga filya fine Kristu acita ulukuta." 
Ephesians5:30 Pantu ifwe tuli filundwa fya mubili wakwe. 
Ephesians5:31 Efyo calembwa ukuti, “Kanshi eco umwaume ashiila wishi na nyina no kuminkana no mukashi wakwe, elyo aba babili baba umubili umo.”" 
Ephesians5:32 Aya mashiwi yasokolola amashiwi ya nkaama ikalamba. Ine ŋumfwa ukuti yalola kuli Kristu na ku lukuta. 
Ephesians5:33 Kanshi na imwe bene nifyo fine. Umulume onse ali nokutemwa umukashi wakwe ngefyo aitemwa umwine. Elyo umukashi nao onse ali nokucindika umulume wakwe. 
Ephesians6:1 Mwe bana, mulenakila abafyashi benu. Ifi efyo cilingile mulecita mukunakila Imfumu." 
Ephesians6:2 “Ulecindika wiso na noko.” Ici e cebo cakubalilapo icakwata ne cilayo icitila," 
Ephesians6:3 “Lyena ukashuka kabili ukekala inshiku ishingi pano calo.” 
Ephesians6:4 Mwe bashibo mwilalenga abana benu ukuti balefulwa. Ilyo mulebalela no kubakusha, mulebatungulula bwino no kubafunda ngefyo Imfumu ilefwaya." 
Ephesians6:5 Mwe basha, muleba no mucinshi na katiina ilyo mulenakila bashikulwinwe aba pano calo. Mulecita ifi no mutima wacishinka ngefyo mwinganakila Kristu." 
Ephesians6:6 Mwilacita ifyo ico balemumona, ico mulefwaya ukuti bamutashe, lelo mulebomba ne mitima yenu yonse ico efyo Lesa alefwaya, pantu muli basha bakwa Kristu." 
Ephesians6:7 Nangu bantufye, mulebabombela no mutima wansansa nga fintu mwingabombela Imfumu." 
Ephesians6:8 Mwishibe ukuti umuntu onse, abe umusha nangu umuntungwa, ni Mfumu eikamulambula pa mulimo onse uusuma untu abomba." 
Ephesians6:9 Kanshi na imwe mwe bashikulwibo, efyo mulecita abasha benu. Muleke ukulabatiinya. Mwishibe ukuti imwe bene na basha benu mwakwatafye Shikulwinwe umo wine mu mulu. Wena taba na mucishacinani." 
Ephesians6:10 Pakulekelesha ndeti, mulekoselela mukwampana ne Mfumu na mu maka yaiko ayakalamba nganshi." 
Ephesians6:11 Fwaleni ifyanso fyakwa Lesa fyonse. Lyena elyo mukakosa mukulwisha ubucenjeshi bwabipa ubwakwa Ciwa. 
Ephesians6:12 Pantu ubulwi bwesu tebwakulwisha abantu, lelo bwakulwisha bakateeka, abamaka, bakateeka ba mfifi abe sonde lino, elyo ne mipashi yamaka iyabipa iyaba mu lwelele." 
Ephesians6:13 Kanshi nomba ipangasheni ifyanso fyakwa Lesa, pakuti ilyo ubushiku bubi bukafika, mukamone ukwansha umulwani. Elyo na panuma yakumulwisha, mukashale abakosa." 
Ephesians6:14 Kanshi mube abakosa. Umushipi wakukaka mu musana, cishinka. Icela cakufimba pa cifuba, kuba abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa." 
Ephesians6:15 Indyato shenu, kuba abaiteyanya kukubila Imbila Nsuma iyileta icibote." 
Ephesians6:16 Kabili lyonse muleba ne cisumino, e nkwela yenu iyakushimishako imifwi yamulilo iyo Ciwa afwinta." 
Ephesians6:17 Mulepokelela ukupususha kwakwa Lesa kwati cimpompo cakufwala ku mutwe. Elyo mulepokelela amashiwi yakwa Lesa, e lupanga lwakwa Mupashi." 
Ephesians6:18 Mulepepa lyonsefye. Mulelomba Lesa alemwafwako. Lyonse ilyo mulepepa, muleleka Mupashi alemutungulula. Kanshi eico muli nokuba abaiteyanya, mwilatendwa iyoo, mulepepelako na bamushilo bonse." 
Ephesians6:19 Mulempepelako na ine pakuti Lesa alempeela amashiwi ndi nokulanda. Epakuti ndeba uwapama mukulanda ilyo ndelondolola inkaama ya Mbila Nsuma. 
Ephesians6:20 Kanshi nomba ndi mu cifungo, pa mulandu wakuti ndi nkombe yakwimininako Mbila Nsuma. Kanshi mulempepelako pakuti mbe uwapama mukulanda pa Mbila Nsuma ngefyo mfwile ukulanda." 
Ephesians6:21 Tukiko, munyinefwe uo twatemwisha, kabili umubomfi wine wine wa Mfumu, akesa mushimikila fyonse pali ine, epakuti mukeshibe ifyo ndi nefyo ndecita." 
Ephesians6:22 Umulandu ndemutumina kuli imwe, ni pakuti akese mushimikilako ifyo bonse tuli, elyo kabili akamukoselesheko." 
Ephesians6:23 Lesa Tata ne Mfumu Yesu Kristu bengamupeela imwe bamunyinefwe bonse umutende, icitemwiko ne cisumino." 
Ephesians6:24 Icikuuku cakwa Lesa cibe pali bonse, abatemwa Imfumu yesu Yesu Kristu ne citemwiko icishipwa." 
Philippians1:1 Ine Paulo na Timote, fwe basha bakwa Kristu Yesu, twamulembela imwe mwe bamushilo bonse aba mu Filipi, mwe baba muli Kristu Yesu pamo pene na bakangalila ba lukuta na badikoni." 
Philippians1:2 Icikuuku no mutende wakwa Lesa Shifwe ne Mfumu Yesu Kristu fileba na imwe. 
Philippians1:3 Ine ndatasha Lesa lyonsefye ilyo ntontonkanya pali imwe. 
Philippians1:4 Kabili lyonse ilyo mupepelako imwe bonse, mpepa ne nsansa." 
Philippians1:5 Pantu ukufumafye ubushiku bwakubalilapo ilyo mwaumfwile Imbila Nsuma ukufika na nomba, mwabikapofye ukungafwa mu mulimo wakubila Imbila Nsuma." 
Philippians1:6 Kanshi nalishininkisha ukuti, Lesa uwatendeke uyu mulimo usuma muli imwe, akulakonkanyapofye ukuubomba mpaka no kuupwisha pa Bushiku bwakwa Kristu Yesu." 
Philippians1:7 Kabili lyonse nshimulaba, kanshi nacilinga nokuti ndetontonkanya ifi pali imwe. Pantu imwe bonse mwalikuma ku cikuuku ico Lesa ampeela, nelyo line ndi mu cifungo nangu ndepokololako no kushimpa Imbila Nsuma." 
Philippians1:8 Lesa e kambone wandi. Ala ndamufuluka nganshi bonse, pantu nalimutemwa ne citemwiko Kristu umwine amukwatila." 
Philippians1:9 Ndapepa nokuti icitemwiko cenu cilelundulukilakofye apakalamba mukukula, pamo pene na mu mano elyo na mukwiluka pa fintu." 
Philippians1:10 Lyena mukeshiba bwino ifintu ifiwamishepo. Elyo pa Bushiku bwakwa Kristu mukaba abakaele ababula icilubo. 
Philippians1:11 Mu bumi bwenu mukaba ne mibeele yonse iyo Lesa afwaya, iyo Yesu Kristu akalenga mukwate, pakuti mukalelumbanya no kulatasha Lesa." 
Philippians1:12 Bamunyinane, ndefwaya mwishibe ukuti ifintu ifyamponena nafingafwa icine cine ukulundulula Imbila Nsuma." 
Philippians1:13 Kanshi ifita fyonse ifilonda kuno isano na bantu bambi bonse nabeshiba ukuti ico bamposela mu cifungo nico ndi mubomfi wakwa Kristu. 
Philippians1:14 Kabili ukuposwa kwandi mu cifungo nakulenga bamunyinefwe abengi ukuba abashipa, icakuti bali abapama tabalekwata na mwenso ukufunda amashiwi ya Mfumu." 
Philippians1:15 Bamo kwena babila Kristu ku mulandu wa mufimbila ne fikansa, lelo bambi bena mulandu wakuba abantu abasuma." 
Philippians1:16 Aba bantu basuma bena bacita ifyo ku mulandu wa citemwiko, pantu balishiba ukuti Lesa andeta muno pakuti mombe umulimo wakupokololako Imbila Nsuma." 
Philippians1:17 Lelo balya bambi bena tababa na cishinka mukubila Kristu. Mwabafye umutima wabukaitemwe. Batontonkanyafye pakumfushishako amacushi ilyo ncili mu cifungo. 
Philippians1:18 Ici cena te mulandu! Lelo icintu icikalamba cakuti nangu babombe no mutima usuma nangu ubi, balebila Kristu. Elyo ici cilenga ukuti mbe ne nsansa, kabili icine cine nkalasansamuka." 
Philippians1:19 Pantu ninjishiba ukuti pa mulandu wa ici, elyo no mulandu wa mapepo yenu na ku bwafwilisho ubufuma kuli Mupashi wakwa Yesu Kristu, nkafuma mu cifungo." 
Philippians1:20 Ico mfwaisha no kutetekela cakuti nikatala ŋumfwa insoni pa mulimo wandi. Lelo pa nshita yonse elyo ukucila pali ino ine nshita, nakulaba uwapama nganshi pakuti, ilyo ndi umumi nangu ndi mukufwa, ndeletela Kristu umucinshi mu bumi bwandi bonse." 
Philippians1:21 Pantu kuli ine ubumi ni Kristu. Kabili imfwa yena ikandetela ificililepo. 
Philippians1:22 Nomba nga cakuti ukwikala umumi nga kuti kwalenga nabomba imilimo ikankala, lyena nshishibe icakuti nsalepo." 
Philippians1:23 Ifintu fibili filentinta mu bumi bwandi. Ndefwaisha nganshi ukufuma muli buno bumi no kuya ikala na Kristu. Ici cena cawamapo ukucila. 
Philippians1:24 Lelo pa mulandu wa imwe, cilefwaikwa nganshi ukuti nshale pano calo umumi." 
Philippians1:25 Ici cena ninshininkisha. Ninjishiba ukuti twakulaba nenu. Twakulaba na imwe bonse pakuti mukulileko mu cisumino, cilemuletela ne nsansa." 
Philippians1:26 Epakuti ilyo nkabwelela nakabili kuli imwe, insansa mwakwata pakuba muli Kristu Yesu shikacilileko pa mulandu wa ine." 
Philippians1:27 Kanshi icintu icikalamba mu bumi bwenu, kwikala ngefyo Imbila Nsuma yakwa Kristu ifwaya. Epakuti nangu cakuti naisa mupempula nangu cakuti nshishileko, lelo ndeumfwa ukuti mwaba abakosa nganshi, aba mutima umo. Kabili nokuti bonse pamo mufwayafye icintu cimo, ukulwisha capamo ukuti abantu basumine Imbila Nsuma." 
Philippians1:28 Mwilatiina balwani benu, lelo lyonse muleba abashipa. Ici cikaba icilangililo cacine cine icakuti bena bakalobelela, lelo imwe mukapusuka. Uukacita fyonse ifi ni Lesa." 
Philippians1:29 Pantu imwe mwalipeelwa ishuko pa mulandu wakwa Kristu, te lyakumusuminafye iyoo lelo ne lyakumuculila." 
Philippians1:30 Kanshi na imwe nomba muli na ine mu bulwi. Ni bulya bulwi bumo bwine mwamwene ndelwa na kale, ebo bwine na nomba muleumfwa ncili ndelwa." 
Philippians2:1 Bushe ukuba muli Kristu kulamukosha? Bushe icitemwiko cakwa Kristu cilamukoselesha? Bushe mwalyampana na Mupashi? Bushe mwaliba no luse ne cilela ku banenu? 
Philippians2:2 Kanshi akundeteleni insansa ishine shine mukuba na mano yamo yene, abatemwana, kabili ababombela pamo no mutima umo." 
Philippians2:3 Mwilacita nelyo cimo pa mulandu wakuitemwa nangu ukuitutumuna ku cilumba, lelo muleicefya ku banenu, lyonse mulemona ukuti abanenu nabacilapo pafyo mwaba." 
Philippians2:4 Kabili mulemona ukuti mulecita ifyakuwamina abanenu, te fyakumuwaminafye mwe bene." 
Philippians2:5 Fyonse ifyo mulecita, muleficita no mutima Kristu Yesu akwete!" 
Philippians2:6 Kristu wena nangu aba ni Lesa, lelo tashintilile mukulingana na Lesa." 
Philippians2:7 Lelo aisangwile uwafye, aicitile ifyaba umusha. Ayaluka umuntu no kuba ifyo abantu baba." 
Philippians2:8 Kabili apo ali ngo muntu, aliicefeshe, alebeela mpaka na ku mfwa, nayo imfwa ya pa musalaba." 
Philippians2:9 Eico Lesa alimusansabalike ukucila pali fyonse, amupeele ishina ilyacindama ukucila amashina yonse yambi." 
Philippians2:10 Epakuti peshina lyakwa Yesu, ifibumbwa fyonse mu mulu, pano calo ne fya pesamba lya calo filemufukamina." 
Philippians2:11 Kabili pakulumbanya Lesa Wishi fyonse filelanda pa lwalala afiti, “Yesu Kristu ni Mfumu.”" 
Philippians2:12 Eico bamunyinane filya lyonse mwalenakila ilyo twali na imwe, efyo muli nokulanakila ukucilapo ico nomba nshili na imwe. Kanshi imwe mukonkanyepo ukulabomba umulimo we pusukilo lyenu na katiina no mwensopo." 
Philippians2:13 Pantu ni Lesa lyonse eubomba muli imwe pakuti mulefwaya no kulacita ifyo umwine afwaya. 
Philippians2:14 Mulecita fyonse ukwabula ukuilishanya nangu ifikansa. 
Philippians2:15 Lyena mukaba abana bakwa Lesa abapwililika, ababula icilubo kabili abakaele, nangu mwikala mu nkulo ya bantu ababufi kabili ababi. Imwe muli nokuba ulubuuto pakati kabo, mulesanika kwati ni ntanda mu mulu." 
Philippians2:16 Mulebashimikilako ishiwi ilipeela umweo. Nga efyo mwalacita, lyena nkaba ne cakumfwilapo icilumba pa Bushiku bwakwa Kristu. Pantu cikalanga ukuti mu kubutukisha kwandi no kuipamfya mukubomba, nshaicushishefye iyoo." 
Philippians2:17 Kabili nga cakuti umweo wandi wapeelwa nge cakunwa icaitilwa pelambo ilyaba e mutuulo uo icisumino cenu cilekela Lesa, ala kuti nasansamuka no kwanga na imwe bonse pamo." 
Philippians2:18 Kabili na imwe bene kuti mwasansamuka no kwanga pamo na ine. 
Philippians2:19 Imfumu Yesu nga ilefwaya, nalaswa mutumine Timote bwangu bwangu. Pakuti nga naumfwa ifyo muli, na ine cikankoselesheko." 
Philippians2:20 Kuno nshikweteko umbi uwakwata umutima uwakumusakamana icine cine nga ena. 
Philippians2:21 Pantu cila muntu kuno asakamanafye ifintu fyakwe umwine, te fya pali Kristu Yesu nakalya." 
Philippians2:22 Bonse mwalishiba ukuti Timote abafye bwino. Mwalishiba ifyo ena na ine tubombela pamo pa mulandu wa Mbila Nsuma kwati ni mwane na wishi. 
Philippians2:23 Kanshi ndesubila nkamutuma bwangu kuli imwe, kumfwafye naishiba ifyo ifintu fili nokuba pali ine." 
Philippians2:24 Na ine wine nincetekela mu Mfumu ukuti na ine wine nalaswa njisefye bwangu kuli imwe. 
Philippians2:25 Kabili ntontonkanya ukuti cilefwaikwa natuma munyinane Epafulodito abwelele kuli imwe. Uyu wena mubomfi munandi kabili uulwa ubulwi bwa Mfumu pamo na ine, kabili eo mwatumine mukuleta ifyakungafwilishako." 
Philippians2:26 Alefwaisha nganshi ukumumona bonse. Kabili ali uwasakamana nganshi ico mwaumfwile ukuti alilwele. 
Philippians2:27 Ee, cacine alilwele, kabili alifye mupepi ne mfwa. Lelo Lesa alimulangulukilako, kwena teofye eka, lelo na ine wine, pantu alimpusushako na kuli bumbi ubulanda ubukalamba." 
Philippians2:28 Eico ine napamfiwilwa ukumubwesha kuli imwe, pakuti nga mwamumona mukasansamuke nakabili, na ine lyena ninshi amasakamiko yakacepako." 
Philippians2:29 Mumusekelele ne nsansa nganshi nga munyinenwe mu Mfumu. Mulecindika abantu ba musango ngoyu. 
Philippians2:30 Pantu alifye mupepi ne mfwa pa mulandu wakubombela Kristu. Pakutifye angafwilisheko ne cafwilisho mushampeele ico mushalipo, tatiinine nangu ukulofya umweo wakwe." 
Philippians3:1 Pakulekelesha bamunyinane ndeti, “Mulesansamuka ico mwaampana ne Mfumu.” Ine nshitendwa ukulamulembela pa fintu fimo fine ifyo namulembele kale. Ncita ifi pakumubaka." 
Philippians3:2 Cenjeleni ku bantu bacita ifibi, cenjeleni kuli isho mbwa, cenjeleni kuli abo bantu abatila muli nokusembululwa." 
Philippians3:3 Pantu nifwe twapokelela ukusembululwa kwacine cine, bena iyoo. Pantu ifwe ni Mupashi wakwa Lesa eututungulula mukupepa. Tulaitakisha pa mulandu wakuba na Kristu Yesu, tatucetekela mu ntambi shabuntunse." 
Philippians3:4 Kwena na ine nga kuti nacetekela intambi shabuntunse. Nga kwingaba uwakutontonkanya palwa kucetekela intambi shabuntunse, ninshi nine ningacilapo ukutontonkanya ifyo." 
Philippians3:5 Ine nasembulwilwe ilyo nali ne nshiku cine konse konse ishakufyalwa. Ine ndi wa mu mushobo wa bena Israeli, uluko lwandi lwa bena Benjamini. Ndi Muhibulu wine wine na bafyashi bandi bonse Bahibulu. Elyo nga ni kukukonka Amafunde yakwa Mose, ine ndi Mufalise." 
Philippians3:6 Kabili nali uwacincila nganshi, ecalengele nokuti ndecusha ulukuta. Elyo nga kuba uwakaele ico umuntu alenakila Amafunde yakwa Mose, awe nshalipo na cilubo." 
Philippians3:7 Lelo pa mulandu wakwa Kristu, ifintu ifyo nalemona ukuti fikankala kuli ine, nomba mfimona ukuti fyafyefye." 
Philippians3:8 Teifi fyeka iyoo lelo, mona ifintu fyonse ukuti fyafyefye pa mulandu wa cintu ici icikankala icacilapo, icakwishiba Yesu Kristu Imfumu yandi. Pa mulandu wakwa Kristu nalisuulako kuli fyonse. Ifintu fyonse mfimonafye ifinangwa pakuti nshukile Kristu," 
Philippians3:9 tuleba nankwe pamo. Nomba ine ne mwine nshaba uwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa pa mulandu wakunakila Amafunde yakwa Mose. Lelo nomba naba uwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa pa mulandu wakusumina muli Kristu. Uku kuba uwakaele kwafuma kuli Lesa, kabili kwashintilila pa cisumino." 
Philippians3:10 Ico ndefwaishafye kwishiba Kristu na maka ya kushukuka kwakwe. Ndefwaisha ukwampana nankwe mu macushi aculileko na mu mfwa afwileko. 
Philippians3:11 Pakuti na ine nkabushiwe umumi ukufuma ku bafwa. 
Philippians3:12 Ine nshileitunga ukuti nalifikapo mukuba umusuma nangu ukuba uwapwililika. Lelo mbikapofye ukubutuka pakuti nkapoke icilambu pantu Kristu Yesu alimbuula ukuba umuntu wakwe. 
Philippians3:13 Kwena bamunyinane ine nshiletontonkanya ukuti nalifika kukucipoka. Icintu cimo ico ncita, kulaba ku fyapita elyo ukubombesha na maka ukupoka ifili kuntanshi." 
Philippians3:14 Kanshi ine mbutuka ukulungamafye apo bapima ukupelela pakuti mone ukupoka icilambu. Ici cilambu mweo wa mu mulu uo Lesa atwitako pa mulandu wakwa Kristu Yesu. 
Philippians3:15 Ifwe bonse fwe bakula mu cisumino, iyi e mitontonkanishishe na ifwe tuli nokukwata. Lelo nga cakuti pa fintu fimo bamo pali imwe balatontonkanya ifyapusana nefi, Lesa akalenga ukuti mukafishibe bwino." 
Philippians3:16 Lelo pa nshita ino natukonkanyepofye ukwikala ngomo twaishibila. 
Philippians3:17 Mwe bamunyinane, ala mulempashanya. Mulemona kuli abo bakonka imyendele yesu iyo twamulanga." 
Philippians3:18 Imikufye iyingi nalimwebelepo, na lelo nalabwekeshapo, ndelila ne filamba. Epo bali abengi abo mu bumi bwabo baleikala nga balwani ba musalaba wakwa Kristu." 
Philippians3:19 Uko aba bantu bakapelela ni kukulobelela, pantu amafumo yabo e mulungu wabo. Bena bomfwa icilumba pa fintu bafwile ukumfwilapo insoni, kabili amano yabo yabafye pa fintu fya pano calo." 
Philippians3:20 Ifwe kumwesu ni ku mulu, kabili tulelolela nganshi Umupusushi wesu, Imfumu Yesu Kristu ukufuma ku mulu." 
Philippians3:21 Akesa alula imibili yesu iyanakuka kabili iyinakufwa, akalenge ikapale umubili wakwe uwacindama. Akabomfya amaka ayalenga ukuti alete ifintu fyonse kukulamunakila." 
Philippians4:1 Kanshi bamunyinane, ala nalimutemwa, kabili ndamufuluka nganshi. Ala mulansansamusha, kabili ndomfwa icilumba nganshi pali imwe. Bamunyinane mwe batemwikwa bandi, kanshi ifi efyo muli nokuba abakosa ico mwampana ne Mfumu." 
Philippians4:2 Yuodia na Suntuke ndemupapata ukuti muleumfwana apo bonse mwaampana ne Mfumu. 
Philippians4:3 Na iwe we mubomfi munandi icine cine, ndefwaya ukuti uleyafwilishako aba banamayo. Balibombesha nganshi pamo na ine mukusalanganya Imbila Nsuma, pamo na Kelementi na babomfi banandi bonse, abo amashina yabo yaba mu citabo cakwa Lesa ica bomi." 
Philippians4:4 Lyonsefye mulesansamuka ico mwaampana ne Mfumu. Nabwekeshapo ukulanda nakabili, mulesansamuka!" 
Philippians4:5 Mube abamutembo kuli bonse. Imfumu ili mupepi. 
Philippians4:6 Mwilasakamikwa ne cintu nelyo cimo, lelo mu fintu fyonse mulelomba Lesa mu mapepo no kumutasha pali fyonse ifyo mulekabila." 
Philippians4:7 Elyo no mutende wakwe Lesa, uwacila amano ya bantu, ukasunga bwino bwino imitima yenu na mano yenu ico mwaba muli Kristu Yesu." 
Philippians4:8 Pakulekelesha bamunyinane, mubike imitima yenu yonse pa fintu ifyacishinka ne fyakumutashishapo, ekutila ifyawamisha, ifyacindama, ifilolelemo, ifisuma nganshi, ifyo abantu bengatemwa ne fyakuleta umucinshi." 
Philippians4:9 Mulecita ifintu ifyo mwasambilile kuli ine nefyo namufundile, fyonse ifyo nalelanda nefyo nalecita. Kabili na Lesa wamutende akulaba na imwe." 
Philippians4:10 Imfumu nailenga ukuti nsansamuke nganshi pantu panuma ya nshita iyikalamba, nakabili namukwata ishuko lyakulanga ukuti mwalinsakamana. Nshiletila mwalilekele ukunsakamana, lelo nicofye mushakwete ishuko lyakulanga ifyo." 
Philippians4:11 Nshilelanda ifi ico nshikwete ifyo ndekabila. Ine calishibila ukwikala notu twine nkwete. 
Philippians4:12 Nalishiba ifyo ukukabila kwaba, elyo nalishiba nefyo ukukwata ifingi nako kwaba. Nalisambilila inkaama yakubelesha ifyakwikala mu misango yonse, cibe ni mukukwata ifingi nangu ni mukukwata utunono." 
Philippians4:13 Ine kuti nacita fyonse ku maka Kristu ampeela. 
Philippians4:14 Lelo kwena mwawemye nganshi pakungafwa mu macushi yandi. 
Philippians4:15 Imwe mwe bena Filipi mwalishibafye bwino ukuti ilyo nafumine ku Makedonia mu nshikufye shilya shine ilyo natampile ukubila Imbila Nsuma, tapali lukuta nelyo lumo ulwangafwileko, kanofye imwe nimwe twaampene na imwe mu fyakupeela na mu fyakupokelela." 
Philippians4:16 Ilyo nali mu Tesalonika mwalintumine ifyakungafwako ifyo nalekabila ukucila na pa muku umo. 
Philippians4:17 Kanshi nshilefwayafye ukulapokelela ubupe, lelo kuti nafwaya ukumona ukuti icipao cenu cilundulukilakofye." 
Philippians4:18 Nalipokelela fyonse ifyo mwampeela, nomba naficilapo! Epafulodito alindetela ifya bupe bwenu fyonse, kanshi nomba ninkwata fyonse ifyo nalekabila. Ala ifya bupe bwenu fili kwati mutuulo uwa cena cisuma, kuli Lesa ilambo ilyo apokelela ne nsansa." 
Philippians4:19 Kabili Lesa wandi mu bukankala bwa bucindami bwakwe akulamupeela fyonse ifyo mulekabila pa mulandu wakwa Kristu Yesu. 
Philippians4:20 Lesa wesu kabili Shifwe nalelumbwa pe na pe! Ameni. 
Philippians4:21 Ndeposha abamushilo bonse, ababa muli Kristu Yesu. Bamunyinefwe ndi nabo kuno balemuposha." 
Philippians4:22 Abamushilo bonse tuli nabo kuno balemuposha, elyo nabekala kwisano lyakwa Kesalo nabo bamuposha nganshi." 
Philippians4:23 Icikuuku ca Mfumu Yesu Kristu cileba na imwe bonse. 
Colossians1:1 Ine Paulo, Lesa ku kufwaya kwakwefye anjita ukuba umusole wakwa Kristu Yesu. Ine ndi na Timote munyinefwe." 
Colossians1:2 Twamulembela mwe bamushilo abaikala mu Kolose, mwe bamunyinefwe mwe bali muli Kristu. Icikuuku no mutende wakwa Lesa Shifwe fileba na imwe." 
Colossians1:3 Lyonse ilyo tumupepelako, tulatasha Lesa Wishi wa Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu." 
Colossians1:4 Ala twalyumfwa palwa cisumino cenu muli Kristu Yesu nefyo mwatemwa abamushilo bonse. 
Colossians1:5 Icisumino ne citemwiko cenu fyashinta pafyo musubila ifyo Lesa amusungila bwino mu mulu. Ilyo amshiwi yacishinka aya Mbila Nsuma yabalilepo ukufika kuli imwe, elyo mwaumfwile na pesubilo ili" 
Colossians1:6 ilyaba mu Mbila Nsuma iyilaleta ipaalo, no kulasalanganina isonde lyonse. Efintu yacita muli imwe ukutula pa bushiku buntu mwabalilepo ukumfwa ifya cikuuku cakwa Lesa, no kwishiba bwino ifyo caba." 
Colossians1:7 Ni Epafula ewamufundile pa cikuuku cakwa Lesa, kabili musha munensu uwakwa Kristu uwacishinka uo twatemwa, uutubombelako ico abombela Kristu." 
Colossians1:8 Ewatwebeleko pa citemwiko ico Mupashi amupeela. 
Colossians1:9 Eico pa mulandu wa ifi, lyonsefye tulamupepelako ukutula pa bushiku twaumfwile ifi pali imwe. Tulomba Lesa ukuti amupeelesha amano yonse ayakwishiba fyonse ifyo afwaya. Aya mano no kwiluka, ni Mupashi wakwe eupeela." 
Colossians1:10 Elyo muleikala umo Imfumu ifwaila. Kabili mulecita lyonse ifyakusansamusha Imfumu. Mu milimo yenu mulefuma ifisuma. Lyena elyo mukamona ukwishibilako Lesa. 
Colossians1:11 Tulamulombela kuli Lesa ukuti, ku maka yonse ayafuma ku maka yakwe ayacindama, mube abakosa pakuti mube no mutekatima no kushipikisha muli fyonse." 
Colossians1:12 Kabili muletasha Lesa Tata ne nsansa, ewamulenga ukuba abalinga ukupyana ifyo Lesa abikila abamushilo mu Bufumu bwalubuuto." 
Colossians1:13 Alitupokololako ku maka ya mfifi no kutuleta mu Bufumu bwakwa Mwane uo atemwa. 
Colossians1:14 Uyu ewatulubula, pantu atubelela uluse ku fyabubifi fyesu." 
Colossians1:15 Kristu e cata cakwa Lesa uushimoneka. E beli pa fibumbwa fyonse. 
Colossians1:16 Pantu ni ku maka yakwa Kristu, Lesa abumbila ifintu fyonse ifyaba mu mulu na muno calo, ifimoneka ne fishimoneka, imipashi yamaka, bashamfumu, bakateeka na bamaka bonse. Ni ku maka yakwa Kristu, Lesa abumbila ifintu fyonse, kabili ni Kristu eo ifintu fyonse fili nokubombela." 
Colossians1:17 Ilyo ifintu fyonse fishilabako Kristu eko ali, kabili ewakumbinkanya ifintu fyonse." 
Colossians1:18 E mutwe wa lukuta lonse ulwaba umubili wakwe. E ntulo ya fintu fyonse. E beli mukubuuka ku bafwa. Pakuti ena ekafye abe uwantanshi muli fyonse. 
Colossians1:19 Pantu Lesa umwine apingwile ukuti Mwane abe na Bulesa bonse. 
Colossians1:20 Lesa apingwile nokuti ku maka yakwa Mwane, eko Lesa awikishanye ne fintu fyonse. Lesa alipanga icibote mukuwikishanya ne fintu fyonse ifya pano calo ne fya mu mulu pa mulandu wa mfwa yakwa Mwane iya pa musalaba." 
Colossians1:21 Na imwe bene kale mwali ukutali na Lesa, kabili mwali abalwani bakwe pa mulandu wa fyabipa ifyo mwaletontonkanya no kucita." 
Colossians1:22 Lelo nomba pa mulandu wa mfwa yakwa Mwane, Lesa alimuwikishanya nankwe, pakuti amulete mube abamushilo, abakaele, ababula icilubo pa cinso cakwe." 
Colossians1:23 Mufwile ukutwalilila mu cisumino icakuulwa pa mufula uwakosa. Mwileka nelyo cimo cimusunkanye, cimufumye kuco mwasubilamo ukutula apo mwaumfwilile Imbila Nsuma. Ine, ne Paulo, nine mubomfi wa iyi Imbila Nsuma iyashimikwa ku muntu onse icalo conse." 
Colossians1:24 Nomba ndi uwasansamuka pa mulandu wakuculila pali imwe. Pantu ku macushi ya mubili wandi wine, ndepwishishisha amacushi ayaciliko ku macushi Kristu aculila umubili wakwe, ulukuta lwakwe." 
Colossians1:25 Ine, Lesa alinsonta ukuba umubomfi wa lukuta lwakwe. Lesa ewampeele uyu mulimo wakubila Imbila Nsuma umupwilapo kuli imwe." 
Colossians1:26 Imbila Nsuma e nkaama Lesa afishile mu myaka yapita na mu nkulo shonse, lelo nomba naisokolola ku bamushilo." 
Colossians1:27 Lesa apangile ukwishibisha inkaama yakwe iyacindamisha ku Benafyalo. Inkaama niyi iyakuti Kristu aba muli imwe, eico kanshi mwakulashukilako ubucindami bwakwa Lesa." 
Colossians1:28 Eico kanshi tubila Kristu ku muntu onse. Tusoka no kufunda abantu na mano yonse, pakuti twafwe umuntu onse abe uwapwililika pa cinso cakwa Lesa, ku maka yakwa Kristu." 
Colossians1:29 Pakucita ici ndabombesha nganshi, mombela ku maka Kristu ampeela ayabomba muli ine." 
Colossians2:1 Ndemwishibishako ifyo mombesha nganshi pali imwe na ba mu Laodikea, ukubikapofye na bonse abo abashamonapo." 
Colossians2:2 Ncita ifi pakuti imitima yabo ilesansamuka nokuti bekale abatemwana, abomfwikisha icishinka. Elyo bakeshibe inkaama yakwa Lesa, neyi inkaama ni Kristu wine." 
Colossians2:3 Kristu e cipao umo Lesa afisa ifyuma fya mano yonse no kwishiba konse. 
Colossians2:4 Ndemweba nati, mwileka muntu nelyo umo amubepaike ku mashiwi yabufi." 
Colossians2:5 Eico nelyo nshili na imwe ku mubili, mu mupashi mwena ndi na imwe. Kabili ndi ne nsansa pakumona ifyo mwatekanya nefyo imwe bonse pamo mwaba ne cisumino icakosa muli Kristu." 
Colossians2:6 Apo mwasumina ukuti Kristu Yesu ni Mfumu, muleikala abaampana pamo nankwe." 
Colossians2:7 Mwandemo ne mishila muli Kristu, mushimpwe umo ali. Mube abakosa mu cisumino cenu umo mwine mwafundilwe. Kabili muletasha Lesa lyonsefye." 
Colossians2:8 Moneni mwileka nelyo umo ukuti amuteeke ubusha na mano yabuntunse aya bucenjeshi bwafye, ayafuma kufyo bafunda mu ntambi sha bantu, na ku mano ya pano calo, tekuli Kristu iyoo." 
Colossians2:9 Pantu mu mubili wakwa Kristu emwaisula Bulesa bonse. 
Colossians2:10 Kabili mwalipeelwa umweo uwapwililika pa mulandu wa ico mwaba muli ena. Kristu e mutwe ukucila pali bakateeka na bamakafye bonse. 
Colossians2:11 Kabili mukuba muli ena, mwalisembululwa. Tekusembululwa kwa ku bantu, lelo kwakwa Kristu ukwaba mukufuma kukuteekwa no mubili wabuntunse." 
Colossians2:12 Ilyo mwabatishiwe, mwashiikilwe pamo na Kristu. Kabili mu lubatisho mwabukile pamo na Kristu pa mulandu wa cisumino cenu mu maka yakwa Lesa, uwabushishe Kristu ku bafwa." 
Colossians2:13 Kale mwali abafwa pa mulandu wa fyabubifi fyenu na pa mulandu mwali abashasembululwa ukufuma ku mubili wabuntunse. Lelo nomba Lesa alimulenga ukuba abamweo pamo na Kristu. Lesa alitubelela uluse ku fyabubifi fyesu fyonse. 
Colossians2:14 Lesa alifuuta imisha yesu yonse iya mafunde ayaletupeela umulandu, aliyafumyapo yonse no kuyapampamina pa musalaba." 
Colossians2:15 Pa musalaba epo acimfishe amaka ya bakateeka na bamaka aba mu lwelele, no kubabika pa lwalala ukuti bonse bamone uko alebasenda bunkole." 
Colossians2:16 Eico mwileka umuntu nelyo umo amupingule pafyo mwingalalya nefyo mwingalanwa, nangu pa nshiku shakupepapo, nangu pakusefya umweshi upya, nangu ni Sabata." 
Colossians2:17 Ifi fintu fyali fyakwishibilakofye ifintu ifyali nokwisa. Icintu cacine cine ni Kristu. 
Colossians2:18 Mwileka nelyo umo amusuule ukuti alimucila pa mulandu wa fimonwa, ukuicefya kwabufi no kupepa bamalaika. Uwaba ifi aitutumunafye apabula nelyo cimo, akonkafye amano yabuntunse." 
Colossians2:19 Kabili alileka ukunakila Kristu uwaba e mutwe wa lukuta, umubili wakwe. Kristu eulenga umubili onse ukwate amaka, eulenga nokuti ifilundwa ne mishipa filundane pamo, no kukula emo ukulila ngomo Lesa alefwaila." 
Colossians2:20 Imwe mwalifwa pamo na Kristu, eico nomba imipashi iyiteeka pano calo tayaba na maka pali imwe. Kanshi cinshi ico mwikalila nga bantu ba cino calo? Cinshi ico munakila amafunde yatila," 
Colossians2:21 “Wilaikata kuli ici!” “Wilasonda kuli cilya!” “Wilakumya kuli cimbi ico!”? 
Colossians2:22 Ala aya mafunde ya pa fintu ifyonaika ilyo bafibomfya. Aya mafunde ne mifundile, fyabuntunsefye." 
Colossians2:23 Ee cine cine aya mafunde ayakulaipatikisha ukupepa, ukuicefya bufi bufi no kulacusha umubili buluku buluku, yamoneka ukuba nga yamano, lelo tayaba na maka yakwansha ulunkumbwa lubi lwa mubili." 
Colossians3:1 Imwe mwalibushiwa ku bafwa pamo na Kristu. Eico nomba akufwayeni ifintu ifya mu mulu, umo Kristu aikala pa cipuna cakwe icabufumu, lubali lwa ku kulyo kwakwa Lesa." 
Colossians3:2 Bikeni imitima yenu pa fintu fya mu mulu, te pa fintu fya muno calo." 
Colossians3:3 Pantu mwalifwa, ne myeo yenu yalifisama pamo na Kristu muli Lesa." 
Colossians3:4 Umweo wenu uwacine cine ni Kristu. Ilyo akamoneka, na imwe mukamoneka pamo nankwe mu bucindami bwakwe." 
Colossians3:5 Mufwile ukuleka ifwe imibeele yenu yonse iyabuntunse, iyili ngo bulalelale, ubupulumushi, ulunkumbwa lubi, amano yabi, ulunkumbwa lwa fyuma, pantu ulunkumbwa lwa fyuma e cimo ngo kupepa utulubi." 
Colossians3:6 Ni pa mulandu wa ifi fintu epo ubukali bwakwa Lesa bwishila abantu abashimunakila. 
Colossians3:7 Na imwe bene e mibeele mwaleendelamo kale ilyo mwaleikala muli iyo misango. 
Colossians3:8 Lelo nomba muli nokutaluka kuli fyonse ifili ngefi, ubukali, icipyu no lupato. Imwe tamufwile kutukana insele, nelyo ukulanda ilyashi ilibi." 
Colossians3:9 Mwilabepana, pantu mwalifuma muli bumuntu bwakale na mu mibeele yabuko." 
Colossians3:10 Mwalingila muli bumuntu bupya. Lesa e kabumba wa bumuntu bupya. Amulenga ukuti mulealukilako cipya cipya mu cata cakwe, epakuti amulete kukumwishiba bwino bwino." 
Colossians3:11 Muli bumuntu bupya tamwaba kapatulula kakuti uyu Mwinafyalo noyu Muyuda, uyu alisembululwa noyu tasembululwa, uyu mututu noyu mwina mpanga, uyu musha noyu muntungwa. Lelo kuli ifwe bonse, Kristu ewacindamisha kabili aba muli ifwe bonse." 
Colossians3:12 Imwe muli basalwa bakwa Lesa, abamushilo kabili abo atemwa. Kanshi nomba toleni imisango iyalinga, muleba abaluse, abacikuuku, abafuuka, abamutembo no mutekatima." 
Colossians3:13 Muleshipikishanya no kubeleshanya uluse nga umo ali no mulandu ku munankwe. Mulebeleshanya uluse ngefyo Imfumu yamubelela uluse. 
Colossians3:14 Na pali iyi mibeele, lundenipo icitemwiko, pantu ecikakanya no kukumbinkanya ifintu fyonse pamo umupwilapo." 
Colossians3:15 Umutende untu Kristu apeela, eo ulemutungulula mufyo mulepingula. Ni pali uyu mutende epo Lesa amwitila pakuti mube umubili umo. Kanshi muletasha Lesa." 
Colossians3:16 Lekeni amashiwi yakwa Kristu ayacindamisha yaleikala mu mitima yenu. Mulebomfya nganshi amano mukufundana no kupandana amano, muleimba inyimbo sha malumbo ne shakwa Lesa ne sha bena Lesa. Muleimbila Lesa no kumutasha ne mitima yenu yonse." 
Colossians3:17 Lekeni fyonse ifyo mulecita no kusosa, muleficita pa mulandu wa Mfumu Yesu, kabili eo muletashishako na Lesa Tata." 
Colossians3:18 Mwe bakashi, mulenakila abalume benu ngefyo abanakila Imfumu bafwile ukulacita." 
Colossians3:19 Mwe balume, muletemwa abakashi benu, mwilaba abasashila kuli bena." 
Colossians3:20 Mwe bana, mulenakila abafyashi benu lyonsefye, pantu ici ecisansamusha Imfumu." 
Colossians3:21 Mwe bashibo, mwilakalifya abana benu imitima, epali banenuka." 
Colossians3:22 Mwe basha mulenakila bashikulwinwe ba pano calo muli fyonse. Telyo balipofye iyoo, pakuti bamutashe, lelo nelyo bashilipo. Mulebomba bwino no mutima onse, pa mulandu wakucindika Imfumu." 
Colossians3:23 Fyonse ifyo mulebomba, mulebomba ne mitima yenu yonse, kwati mulebombela Imfumu te bantu iyoo." 
Colossians3:24 Muleibukisha ukuti Imfumu ikamupeela icilambu yalaya abantu baiko. Pantu Kristu e Shikulwinwe wine wine uo mubombela. 
Colossians3:25 Na onse uwalufyanya akakandwa ukulingana no kulufyanya kwakwe, pantu Lesa taba na mucishacinani." 
Colossians4:1 Mwe bashikulwibo, mulesunga abasha benu mu nshila isuma, kabili iyalungama. Muleibukisha ukuti na imwe bene mwalikwata Shikulwinwe mu mulu." 
Colossians4:2 Mwilanenuka mukupepa. Mulebikako amano mukupepa, muletasha na Lesa." 
Colossians4:3 Muletupepelako na ifwe bene, pakuti Lesa atupekanishishe inshila pakubila amashiwi ya nkaama yakwa Kristu. Ni pa mulandu wine uyu epo bamposela mu cifungo." 
Colossians4:4 Eico kanshi mulepepa ukuti ndebila Imbila bwino bwino ngefyo mfwile ukucita. 
Colossians4:5 Mulecenjela kufyo mulecita ku bantu abashasumina. Mulebomfya bwino ne nshita yonse iyo mwashukila. 
Colossians4:6 Imilandile yenu ileba lyonse iyacikuuku ku bantu ne yakubafwilisha. Mwishibe ukwasuka cila muntu bwino bwino.
