Colossians4:7 Munyinefwe uo twatemwa Tukiko, musha uwacetekelwa uubombela Imfumu pamo na ifwe, eukamweba fyonse pali ine." 
Colossians4:8 Namutuma kuli imwe kukwisa musansamushako no kumwebako ifyo bonse tuli. 
Colossians4:9 Akesa na Onesimo, munyinefwe uo twatemwa kabili uwacetekelwa nganshi, kabili wa mwibumba lyenu. Bakesa mwebako fyonse ificitika kuno." 
Colossians4:10 Alisitako, uo tuli nankwe mu cifungo amuposha, pamo na Mako umufyala wakwa Banaba. Eulya namwebele kale ukuti nga aisa uko mukamupokelele." 
Colossians4:11 Yesu, kabili uwitwa Yusito, nao amuposha. Aba benefye batatu e Bayuda abasumina, ababomba na ine umulimo wa Bufumu bwakwa Lesa, kabili ebankoseleshako nganshi." 
Colossians4:12 Epafula, uwaba nao wa mwibumba lyenu kabili umusha wakwa Kristu Yesu, nao amuposha. Lyonsefye alamupepelako pa maka. Alomba Lesa ukuti mube abakosa mu cisumino, abapwililika, abashitwishika mu cisumino, kabili abanakila Lesa muli fyonse." 
Colossians4:13 Ala ine wine ndi kambone pafyo abombesha pali imwe pamo na ba mu Hielapoli na Laodikea. 
Colossians4:14 Luka shiŋanga wesu uo twatemwisha nganshi pamo na Dimasi bamuposha. 
Colossians4:15 Muposhepo bamunyinefwe aba mu Laodikea, na Numfa no lukuta ululongana mu ŋanda mumwakwe." 
Colossians4:16 Nga mwapwisha ukubelenga iyo kalata, mumone ukuti babelengela no lukuta lwa mu Laodikea. Elyo na imwe mukabelenge kalata yandi imbi iyikafuma ku Laodikea." 
Colossians4:17 Kabili mwebe Akipo ukuti, afwile ukubikako amano ukupwisha umulimo untu apeelwe uwakubombela Imfumu." 
Colossians4:18 Ine, ne Paulo, nalemba no kuboko kwandi aya mashiwi yakumuposha. Muleibukisha ukuti naba mu cifungo! Icikuuku cileba na imwe." 
1Thessalonians1:1 Ine Paulo na Sailasi na Timote, twamulembela mwe lukuta lwa mu Tesalonika, mwe baampana na Lesa Tata ne Mfumu Yesu Kristu. Icikuuku no mutende fileba na imwe." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Lyonsefye tulatasha Lesa pa mulandu wa imwe bonse, kabili lyonsefye tulamupepelako mu mapepo yesu." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Lyonse ilyo tupepa Lesa wesu kabili Shifwe, tulebukisha ifyo mubomba pa mulandu wa cisumino cenu. Twibukisha no kubombesha kwenu pa mulandu wa citemwiko cenu. Twibukisha nefyo isubilo lyenu mu Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu lyaba ilyakosa." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Mwe bamunyinefwe, twalishiba ukuti Lesa alimutemwa, kabili alimusala." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Pantu ilyo twamuletele Imbila Nsuma, tatwaishile na mashiwi yekafye iyoo, lelo twaishile na maka na Mupashi Wamushilo nefyo twashininkisha umupwilapo. Mwalishiba ifyo twaleikala ilyo twali na imwe, fyali fyakumwafwilishako." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Mwasukile mwalapashanya ifwe pamo ne Mfumu. Nangu mwaculile nganshi, mwapokelele Imbila Nsuma ne nsansa isho Mupashi Wamushilo apeela." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Eico, imwe mwaba nomba icilangililo kuli bonse abasumina aba mu Makedonia na mu Akaia." 
1Thessalonians1:8 Amashiwi ya Mfumu tayasalanganafye mu Makedonia na mu Akaia ukufuma kuli imwe, lelo ilyashi lya pa cisumino cenu muli Lesa, lyalisalangana mpanga yonse. Awe tapali ico twingalandapo pali ici." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Abantu abene ebalanda pafyo mwatupokelele bwino. Balanda na pafyo mwafuma kukupepa utulubi, mwayalukila kukupepa Lesa, pakuti mulebombela Lesa wine wine kabili uwamweo." 
1Thessalonians1:10 Lyena epakulalolela ukwisa kwa Mwana wakwe Yesu ukufuma ku mulu, uo abushishe ku bafwa, eutupususha ku bukali bwakwa Lesa ubuleisa." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Mwe bamunyinefwe, imwe mwe bene mwalishiba ukuti tatwaicushishefye pakwisa kuli imwe." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Mwalishiba ifyo twaculile no kutukwa mu Filipi ilyo twali tatulaisa kuli imwe ku Tesalonika. Nangu kwali ukupusana na bantu abengi, Lesa wesu alitupeele ukushipa pakumushimikila Imbila Nsuma yakwe." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Ilyo twalemufunda tatwalefwaya ukumutwala mu cilubo nangu ukumutwala kukubifya nangu ukwesha ukubepa umuntu nelyo umo. Imitima yesu yalifye iyatambalala. 
1Thessalonians2:4 Lelo tulanda ifyo Lesa alefwaya ukuti tulande, pantu Lesa alitumona ukuti natulinga, epakutupeela no mulimo wakubila Imbila Nsuma. Eico tatusansamusha bantu iyoo, tusansamusha Lesa uumona ifyaba mu mitima yesu." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Mwalishibafye bwino ukuti tatwaishile kuli imwe na mashiwi ayasuma ayakumubeleleka, nangu ukubomfya amashiwi yakufisa umutima wakufwailisha ifyuma. Ala Lesa e kambone wesu." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Tatwalefwaya kutashiwa ku muntu nangu umo, kuli imwe nangu ku bantu bambi. Lelo nangu twaba abasole bakwa Kristu, tatwafwaile nangu cimo kuli imwe." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Lelo ilyo twali na imwe, twali abamutembo kuli imwe, kwati ni nyina uulesunga bamwane." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Pa mulandu wakumutemwisha, tatwasakamenefye ukumuletela Imbila Nsuma yakwa Lesa, lelo twaipeeleshe nganshi ne mitima yesu ukucita fyonse ifyakumwafwa. Twalimutemenwe nganshi." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Mwe bamunyinefwe, ibukisheni ifyo twalecululuka mukubombesha. Twalebomba ubwaca no bwaila pakuti twimusakamika ku cintu nelyo cimo ilyo twalebila Imbila Nsuma yakwa Lesa kuli imwe." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Imibeele yesu kuli imwe mwe basumina, yali iyakaele, iyamushilo, kabili iyabulamo icilubo. Imwe nimwe bene bakambone besu pamo na Lesa." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Mwalishiba nefyo twalemulela bonse umo umo nga filya shibo alela abana bakwe. 
1Thessalonians2:12 Twalemucincisha no kumukoselesha no kumweba ukuti, muleikala imikalile iyakusansamusha Lesa uwamwita kukumupeela Ubufumu no bucindami bwakwe bwine." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Kuliko no mulandu umbi uo lyonse tutashishapo Lesa. Ilyo twamuletele amashiwi yakwa Lesa, mwayomfwile no kuyapokelela nga mashiwi ayafuma kuli Lesa, te ku bantu iyoo. Kabili cacine eko yafuma. Aya mashiwi eyabomba muli imwe, mwe basumina." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Mwe bamunyinane, ala ifintu ifyamuponena, efyaponena ne nkuta shakwa Lesa isha mu Yudeya. Abantu benu aba mu calo cenu ebamucusha imwe, nga filya Abayuda balecusha abena Yudeya." 
1Thessalonians2:15 Bayuda bene ebaipeye Imfumu Yesu na bakasesema, kabili ebaletutamfya na ifwe. Muli ifi tabasansamusha Lesa iyoo! Balwani ku muntu onse." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Baeseshe no kutukaanya ukushimikila Abenafyalo amashiwi yakubaletela ukupusuka. Mukucita ifi, basuka bapwishishisha ukufikilisha ifyabubifi ifyo lyonse balecita. Eico pakulekelesha ubukali bwakwa Lesa nabwisa pali bena." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Mwe bamunyinefwe, pa kashita kalya ilyo batupatikishe ukumusha, twalekelefye ukumumona mu menso, lelo tatwalekele ukulamwibukisha. Twamufulwike nganshi, elyo twafwaishe nganshi ukumumona nakabili." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Twaeseshe ukwisa mupempula. Imiku iyingi, ine wine Paulo nalefwaya ukwisa mupempula, lelo Satana alefulunganya ukuti twise." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Ala imwe, e imwe benefye isubilo lyesu, insansa shesu ne cakuitakishishapo ukucimfya kwesu, pa cinso cakwa Yesu Imfumu yesu ilyo akabwela." 
1Thessalonians2:20 Cine cinefye tulomfwa icilumba ne nsansa nganshi pali imwe. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Kanshi pa mulandu wakufwaisha nganshi ukumumona, twafililwe ukushipikisha. Elyo twapingushenye ukuti ifwe tushale mu Atensi." 
1Thessalonians3:2 Twatumine Timote munyinefwe umubomfi munensu wakwa Lesa mu mulimo wakubila Imbila Nsuma yakwa Kristu. Twamutumine ukuti ese amukoseleshe no kumucincisha mu cisumino cenu," 
1Thessalonians3:3 epakuti umuntu nelyo umo pali imwe enenuka pa mulandu wa aya macushi. Mwalishiba mwe bene ukuti amacushi aya, yaba nokutwishila." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Ilyo twali na imwe twalimwebele libela ukuti bali nokutucusha. Ngefyo mwaishiba bwino, ifyo fine efyacitika nokucitika." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Kanshi ilyo nafililwe ukushipikisha, nasukile natuma Timote kukwisa mona ifili icisumino cenu. Nalelanguluka lyonse ukuti, limbi Ciwa namutunka ne milimo yesu yonse nayonaika." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Nomba Timote nabwela ukufuma kumwenu. Naisa tushimikilako ilyashi ilisuma ilya pa cisumino cenu ne citemwiko cenu. Atushimikile ukuti lyonse mulomfwa insansa ilyo mutwibukisha, elyo kabili mulatufuluka ngefyo na ifwe tumufuluka." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Eico pa mulandu wenu, mwe bamunyinefwe, icisumino cenu cilatukoselesha mu mafya yesu na mu macushi yonse." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Ala nomba kuti twatemwa no kuba abomi apo mu bumi bwenu muli ne cisumino icakosa mu Mfumu. 
1Thessalonians3:9 Pa mulandu wa imwe tulatasha Lesa wesu. Tulamutasha pa cinso cakwe pa nsansa atupeela. Tulamutasha pa mulandu wa imwe. 
1Thessalonians3:10 Ubwaca no bwaila tupapata Lesa ne mitima yesu yonse ukuti akaleke tukamonane kabili no kumwafwilishako kufyo mulekabila mu cisumino cenu. 
1Thessalonians3:11 Lesa Shifwe umwine na Yesu Imfumu yesu bengatuwamisha inshila tukese kuli imwe. 
1Thessalonians3:12 Imfumu yesu ingamulundilako ukutemwana mwatemwana nefyo mwatemwa abantu bonse. Mube abatemwisha bambi ngefyo ifwe twamutemwa. 
1Thessalonians3:13 Imfumu ingalakosha imitima yenu no kumuwamya pakuti mukabe abapwililika abamushilo pa cinso cakwa Lesa Shifwe, mpaka nelyo Yesu Imfumu yesu ikabwela na bamushilo bonse." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Pakulekelesha mwe bamunyinefwe, ibukisheni ukuti twalimufundile ifyo mufwile ukwikala pakusansamusha Lesa. Kabili ifi fine nakuba efyo mwikala. Ala nomba tulemulomba no kumupapata pa mulandu wa Mfumu Yesu twati, mulecishapo." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Mwalishiba amafunde twamupeele ayafuma ku Mfumu Yesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Lesa alefwaya ukuti mube abamushilo, abataluka na ku fyabulalelale." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Cila muntu pali imwe eshibe ifyakusunga umubili wakwe mu nshila iyamushilo ne yamucinshi. 
1Thessalonians4:5 Mwilakonkelela lunkumbwa lubi kwati bantu abashaishiba Lesa. 
1Thessalonians4:6 Kanshi nelyo umo elafyengelesha munyina pali uyu mulandu. Twalimwebele kale ifi no kumusoka ukuti, Imfumu ikakanda abacita ifi fyonse." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Pantu Lesa tatwita ukuti tuleba bacilende, lelo ukuti tuleba abamushilo." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Eico kanshi uwasuula aya mafunde, ninshi te muntu asuula, lelo ni Lesa uwamupeela Mupashi wakwe Uwamushilo." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Pa mulandu wakutemwa ababwananyina pena tacilefwaikwa ukumulembelapo, pantu Lesa umwine alimufunda ifyo muli nokutemwana na banenu." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Kabili ifi efyo mucitila ababwananyina bonse aba mu calo ca Makedonia. Kanshi mwe bamunyinefwe, tulemupapata ukuti mulecishapo ukucita ifyo fine." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Mulefwaisha ukwikala abataluka ku fyakukansana, mulesakamana ukubomba imilimo yenu, elyo muleibombela mwe bene pakumona ifyakulya ngefyo twamwebele kale." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Nga mulecita ifi, mukalenga balya abashasumina ukumucindika. Elyo kabili mukakwata ifyo mulekabila, tamwakalekabila ukuti abantu bambi bamupeele ifyo mulefwaya." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Mwe bamunyinefwe, tulefwaya ukuti mwishibe bwino pa mulandu wa bafwile nabasumina. Tulefwaya mwishibe ifi, pakuti mwilalilishika nga balya abashakwata isubilo." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Twasumina ukuti Yesu alifwile no kubuuka alibuukile. Kanshi kuti twasumina nokuti Lesa akababwesha abomi pamo na Yesu abo abafwile nabamusumina. 
1Thessalonians4:15 Ifi tulemweba nomba e fintu Imfumu yafunda. Ubushiku Imfumu ikesa, ifwe fwe bali abomi tatwakatangilile abafwile nabasumina iyoo." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Ishiwi ilyamaka likomfwika, malaika mukalamba akalanda, abantu bakomfwa ipenga lyakwa Lesa, elyo Imfumu ikeka ukufuma ku mulu. Elyo abo abafwile nabasumina Kristu, bakabalilapo ukubuuka." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Elyo ifwe fwe bali abomi pa nshita ilya, tukasendelwa pamo nabo mu makumbi kukukumanya Imfumu mu lwelele. Elyo tukalaba ne Mfumu pe na pe." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Kanshi efyo mulekoseleshanya kuli aya mashiwi. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Mwe bamunyinefwe tacilefwaikwa ukumulembela pa nshita no bushiku ilyo ifi fikacitika. 
1Thessalonians5:2 Awe mwalishibafye bwino bwino ukuti Ubushiku bwa Mfumu bukesa nga filya umupupu esa ubushiku. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Ilyo abantu bakalasosa abati, “Muli umutende, takuli cakutiina,” elyo ubonaushi bukesa bapumikisha nga filya ubukali bupumikisha umwanakashi uwakomwa ne fumo. Kabili tapakabe wakupusuka nakalya." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Lelo nomba imwe mwe bamunyinefwe tamwaba mu mfifi, na bulya Bushiku tabwakamupumikishe ngo mupupu." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Imwe bonse muli bana ba lubuuto abenda akasuba. Tatwaba abana ba mfifi abenda ubushiku. 
1Thessalonians5:6 Kanshi tatufwile ukuba nga bantu bambi abalala utulo, lelo tuleba abalola, kabili abatekanya." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Ni nshita ya bushiku abantu balala utulo, kabili bushiku abantu bakolwa." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Lelo ifwe twenda akasuba, kanshi tuleba abatekanya. Icela tuli nokufwala icakufimba icifuba, cisumino ne citemwiko. Isubilo lyakupusuka, e cimpompo cakufwala ku mutwe." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Pantu Lesa tatusalile pakuti twingesa kukukandwa ku bukali bwakwe, lelo ni pakuti ku maka ya Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu tumone ukupusuka." 
1Thessalonians5:10 Atufwilile pakuti ilyo tuli abomi nangu tuli abafwa, tukaleikala nankwe ilyo akabwela." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Eico kanshi mulekoseleshanya no kucincishanya, ngefyo fine mucita." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Mwe bamunyinefwe tulemupapata ukuti mulecindika abo abalebombesha pakati kenu. Abo ebo Imfumu yasonta ukulamutungulula no kulamufunda. 
1Thessalonians5:13 Mulebacindikisha nganshi no kubatemwisha pa mulandu wa milimo babomba. Muleikala mu cibote bwino na banenu. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Mwe bamunyinefwe, tulemucincisha ukuti muleebaula abanaŋani, mulekoselesha abamwenso, muleafwako abanakuka, muletekela abanenu imitima." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Mwilaleka umuntu nelyo umo ukulailandula pa bubi bamucitila, lelo lyonsefye mulefwaisha ukucitila abanenu na bantu bonse ifisuma." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Mulesansamuka pe. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Muleba no mute mukupepa. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Muletasha Lesa muli fyonse. Pantu ifi efyo Lesa afwaya ukuti mulecita apo mwaba muli Kristu Yesu. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Mwilalesha Mupashi Wamushilo ukubomba. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Mwilasuula amashiwi ya bakasesema. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Mulepima ifintu fyonse, mulesungapo ifisuma." 
1Thessalonians5:22 Muletaluka ku misango yonse iyibi. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Lesa wamutende umwine amuwamye umupwilapo mu nshila shonse. Alemusunga ababula icilubo ku mipashi yenu, ku myeo yenu na ku mibili yenu mpaka Imfumu yesu Yesu Kristu ikabwele." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Lesa uwamwita tafutuka, no kucita akacicita." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Muletupepelako na ifwe mwe bamunyinefwe. 
1Thessalonians5:26 Posheni ababwananyina bonse mukutomona kwamushilo. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ndemukonkomesha ukuti mubelengele bamunyinefwe bonse uyu kalata, pantu ici eco Imfumu ilefwaya." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Icikuuku ca Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu cileba na imwe. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Ine Paulo na Sailasi na Timote, twamulembela mwe lukuta lwa mu Tesalonika, mwe baampana na Lesa Shifwe ne Mfumu Yesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Icikuuku no mutende wakwa Lesa Tata ne Mfumu Yesu Kristu fileba na imwe. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Mwe bamunyinefwe, ifwe tuli nokutasha Lesa lyonsefye pa mulandu wa imwe. Ala ici ecilungeme kuli ifwe ukulacita, pantu icisumino cenu cilekulilakofye nganshi no kutemwana kwenu nako kulelundulukilakofye." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Eico ifwe tulatakisha mu kulanda kwesu pali imwe ku nkuta shakwa Lesa. Tutakisha pafyo mwakonkanyapo ukushipikisha no kusumina ilyo bamucusha na mu mafya yene mulimo. 
2Thessalonians1:5 Ala ifi fyonse fishininkisha ukuti Lesa wamulinganya mukupingula. Kabili muli ifi, Lesa alemulenga ukuti mube abalinga Ubufumu bwakwe, ubo muculila." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Lesa wamulinganya, akacusha abo abamucusha." 
2Thessalonians1:7 Akapwisha amacushi yenu pamo na macushi yesu yene. Akacita ici ilyo Imfumu Yesu ikasokoloka ilefuma ku mulu pamo na bamalaika baiko abamaka. 
2Thessalonians1:8 Ikesa mu lubingu lwa mulilo kukukanda abo bonse abashifwaya ukwishiba Lesa na bakaana ukunakila Imbila Nsuma iyakwa Yesu Imfumu yesu. 
2Thessalonians1:9 Lesa akabakanda, bakalobelelafye. Akabafumyapo, tabakamone cinso ca Mfumu na maka ya bucindami bwaiko." 
2Thessalonians1:10 Pa bushiku ubo ilyo akabwela, abamushilo bonse bakamulumbanya, abasumina nabo bakamucindika. Elyo na imwe bene mukaba nabo pantu mwalisumina amashiwi ya bukambone bwesu." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Eico lyonsefye tulamupepelako. Tupapata Lesa wesu ukuti mube ne mibeele iyalinga ubwite amwitako. Ku maka yakwe engafikilisha ifisuma fyonse ifyo mufwaya ukucita no kupwishishisha imilimo yenu yonse iyo mubombela mu cisumino. 
2Thessalonians1:12 Ninshi lyena mwakulacindika Yesu Imfumu yesu, na imwe akulamucindika pa mulandu wa cikuuku Lesa wesu ne Mfumu Yesu Kristu bamukwatila." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Nomba ilyo Imfumu yesu Yesu Kristu ikabwela, tukalongana uko ikaba. Kanshi tulemupapata mwe bamunyinefwe" 
2Thessalonians2:2 ukuti, mwilatunsha mitima nangu ukuba no mwenso bamo nga batila, Ubushiku bwa Mfumu nabufika. Nalimo kuti mwatontonkanya ukuti mupashi ewalanda ifyo nangu nifwe twafunda nangu twalemba ifyo muli kalata, awe iyoo." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Mwileka umuntu nelyo umo alemubepa nangufye panono. Ubushiku bulya tabwakafike mpaka ilyo ukusangukila Lesa ukwa bantu abengi kukacitika, no mubi uwakulobelela akasokoloke." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Akaisansabalika ukucila pali fyonse ifitwa umulungu nangu pali fyonse ifyo abantu bapepa. Akengila mwitempele lyakwa Lesa akatile nokuti nine Lesa. 
2Thessalonians2:5 Bushe tamuleibukisha? Nalimwebele ifi ilyo twali na imwe. 
2Thessalonians2:6 Kabili mwalishiba icilesha umubi ukuti esokoloka pali ino nshita. Lelo pa nshita iyalinga umubi akasokoloka. 
2Thessalonians2:7 Kwena inkaama ya mubi ilabomba na kale. Lelo ifyo nandile ukuti fikacitika, teti ficitike mpaka Lesa akafumyepo uulesha ifi fintu ukucitika." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Lyena umubi elyo akasokoloka. Lelo Imfumu Yesu ikesa, ikamwipailafye ku mupu waiko, no kumoneka kwaiko ukwabucindami kukamonaula." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Umubi ilyo akesa, akakwata amaka yakwa Satana. Akalacita ifishibilo, ifipeshamano ne finjelengwe ifya misango yonse ifyabufi." 
2Thessalonians2:10 Akabomfya imisango iyalekana lekana pakubepaika abakaba nokulobelela. Bakalobelela, pantu bakeene ukupokelela icishinka no kucitemwa pakuti bengapusuka." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Eico Lesa akabatumina amaka yakubafulunganya, ayakubalenga ukusumina ifyabufi." 
2Thessalonians2:12 Kanshi abo bonse bakaba no mulandu, pantu bakaana ukusumina amashiwi yacishinka, batemwa ukucita ifibi." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Lelo ifwe lyonse tulatasha Lesa pali imwe mwe bamunyinefwe, mwebo Imfumu yatemwa. Pantu nimwe Lesa asalilepo ukufuma ku citendekelo pakuti mupusuke. Amuwemye ukuba abantu bamushilo ku maka yakwa Mupashi, na pali ico mwasumina mu cishinka." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Lesa ku Mbila Nsuma twamushimikile, eko amwitile kukupusuka. Amwitile na kukukwatako ubucindami bwa Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Kanshi nomba mwe bamunyinefwe, muleshipa. Muleikatililafye ku fyacishinka ifyo twamufundile nefyo twamulembele muli kalata." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Imfumu yesu Yesu Kristu umwine na Lesa Shifwe uwatutemwa, na ku cikuuku cakwe atupeela icikoseleshi ca pe ne subilo ilyamaka," 
2Thessalonians2:17 engalasansamusha imitima yenu no kulamukosha pakuti mulebomba no kulalanda ifisuma fyonse. 
2Thessalonians3:1 Pakulekelesha, mwe bamunyinefwe muletupepelako ukuti amashiwi ya Mfumu yasalangane bwangu bwangu nokuti yapokelelwe no mucinshi, ngefyo imwe mwayapokelela." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Mulepepa nokuti Lesa aletupokololako ku bantu ababi na bacintomfwa. Pantu te bonse basumina. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Lelo Imfumu yena yacishinka yakulamukosha no kumucingilila ku Mubi. 
2Thessalonians3:4 Imfumu eilenga ukuti tulemucetekela ukuti mulakonka ifyo tumweba, kabili mwakulatwalilila ukukonka ifyo tumweba." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Imfumu ingalamutungulula mukwishibisha ifyo Lesa amutemwa na mukushipikisha nga Kristu. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Mwe bamunyinefwe, tulemukonkomesha ku maka ya Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu ukuti, muletaluka kuli bamunyinefwe bonse abanaŋani, abakaana ukukonka amafunde twamufundile." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Imwe mwe bene mwalishibafye bwino ukuti mufwile ukulatupashanya. Ifwe tatwali abanaŋani ilyo twali na imwe. 
2Thessalonians3:8 Ifwe tatwalepoka icakulya ku muntu nelyo umo ukwabula ukulipila. Lelo twalebombesha nganshi no kucucutika ubwaca no bwaila pakuti twibika muntu nelyo umo mu bwafya bwakutulisha. 
2Thessalonians3:9 Twalebombesha, temukutila nico tushakwata insambu shakusungwa, lelo twalecita ifyo pakuti tube icilangililo kuli imwe ico muli nokukonka." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Kabili ilyo twali na imwe twamupeele ifunde ilyakuti, “Uwakaana ukubomba, mwilamupa fyakulya.”" 
2Thessalonians3:11 Tulesosa ifi, pantu twalyumfwa ukuti bamo pali imwe banaŋani. Tababomba milimo, baikalilafye umulomo." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Ku maka ya Mfumu Yesu Kristu, tulekonkomesha abo bantu no kubeba ukuti, baleikala ifyo bafwile ukwikala, balebomba pakuti baleilisha abene." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Lelo imwe mwe bamunyinefwe, mwilatendwa ukulacita ifisuma." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Nga umo akaana ukubeela aya mashiwi twamulembela muli uyu kalata, mwishibeni bwino uyo. Mutalukeniko uyo muntu pakuti ekatwe insoni." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Nomba mwilamumona kwati mulwani iyoo, lelo mulemusokako pantu ni munyinenwe." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Imfumu iyine yamutende, ingamupeela umutende mu nshita yonse na muli fyonse. Imfumu ileba na imwe bonse." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Ine ne Paulo nalemba no kuboko kwandi aya mashiwi yakumuposha. Pakupwisha ukulemba kalata yonse, ifi efyo nemba ishina lyandi." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Icikuuku ca Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu cileba na imwe bonse. 
1Timothy1:1 Ine ne Paulo ne wasalwa ukuba umusole wakwa Kristu Yesu ku maka yakwa Lesa Umupusushi wesu na Kristu Yesu uwaba e isubilo lyesu. 
1Timothy1:2 Nakulembela Timote, we mwana wandi icine cine mu cisumino. Icikuuku, uluse no mutende wakwa Lesa Tata na Kristu Yesu Imfumu yesu fileba na iwe." 
1Timothy1:3 Ndefwaya ukuti wikale mu Efeso ngefyo nakwebele ilyo naleya ku Makedonia. Abantu bamo uko, balefunda ifyabufi. Kanshi uli nokubakonkomesha baleke ifyo." 
1Timothy1:4 Uli nokubeba baleke ukukonkelela ifya mu milumbe ne fya mashina yabula impela aya fikolwe fyabo. Pantu ifi fintu filetafye ifikansa, tafyafwako mulimo wakwa Lesa iyoo. Pantu ici cena cishibikwafye mukuba ne cisumino." 
1Timothy1:5 Kanshi ico nakupeelela ili funde ni pakuti ube ne citemwiko icifuma ku mutima wakaele, na kuli kampingu musuma wa mutima, elyo na ku cisumino icacishinka." 
1Timothy1:6 Abantu bamo balifuma kuli ifi, bayalukila na ku fyakusabailafye." 
1Timothy1:7 Bafwaya ukuba bakafundisha ba Mafunde yakwa Mose, lelo tabaishiba nefyo bafundapo nangu ifyo balandapo ukwabula no kutwishika." 
1Timothy1:8 Bonse twalishiba ukuti Amafunde yakwa Mose yasuma, cikulu umuntu aleyabomfya ifyo yafwile ukubomba." 
1Timothy1:9 Kabili bonse twalishiba ukuti tabapangila abololoke amafunde. Lelo bapanga amafunde pa mulandu wa bampulamafunde, na bantalamisoka, abantu abashili bena Lesa na babifi, abantu abashipepa nangu ukusakamana ifyakwa Lesa, abantu abepaya bashibo nangu banyinabo, abamisoka," 
1Timothy1:10 bacilende, abacita ubupulumushi na baume banabo, abafyusha abantu, ababufi na balapa ubufi, elyo na bonse abacita ifyapusana ne funde line line." 
1Timothy1:11 Ili ifunde lyaba mu Mbila Nsuma iyalulumbi iyo Lesa umucindami ampeela ukubila. Ili ifunde lyaba mu Mbila Nsuma iyo Lesa mucindami kabili umwinakulumbwa ampeela ukubila. 
1Timothy1:12 Ndetasha Kristu Yesu Imfumu yesu uwampeela amaka yakubomba umulimo wandi. Kabili ndetasha Kristu Yesu pakumona ukuti nininga, ansala nokuti ndemubombela." 
1Timothy1:13 Kwena kale nalelanda ifyamusaalula pali ena, elyo no kumutuka no kumucusha. Lelo Lesa alimbelelako uluse ico nali nshilasumina. Kanshi nshaishibe nefyo nalecita." 
1Timothy1:14 Eico ku cikuuku ico Imfumu yesu yankwatila nganshi, yalimpeela icisumino ne citemwiko ifyaba muli Kristu Yesu." 
1Timothy1:15 Kanshi aya mashiwi yacishinka, ayo umuntu onse afwile ukupokelela no kusumina ayakuti, Kristu Yesu aishile muno calo kukupususha ababifi. Elyo ne wacila bonse ku fyabubifi nganshi nine." 
1Timothy1:16 Lelo Lesa alimbelelako uluse, pakuti alange ukushipikisha ukwapwililika ukwakwa Yesu Kristu pali ine ne wacila bonse ifyabubifi. Lyena epakuti mbe icilangililo ca bonse abakasumina kuntanshi no kupokelela umweo wape." 
1Timothy1:17 Ku Mfumu ya pe na pe iyishifwa, kabili taimoneka, e Lesa fye ekafye, ewakucindika no kulumbanya pe na pe! Ameni." 
1Timothy1:18 Timote, mwana wandi, nakupeela ili funde ilyo na kale bakasesema balandilepo pali iwe. Ulebomfya ayo mashiwi yabe kwati fyanso fyakulwilako ubulwi ubusuma." 
1Timothy1:19 Uleikatilila mu cisumino na kuli kampingu musuma mu mutima. Abantu bamo tabasakamana kukutika kuli kampingu mu mitima yabo, basuka baonawilamo ne cisumino cabo." 
1Timothy1:20 Bamo pali abo ni Imeneo na Alekisanda. Bena aba nalibaposa kuli Satana, pakubafunda ukuti bali nokuleka ukusaalula Lesa." 
1Timothy2:1 Ndemukonkomesha ukuti, icakubalilapo pali fyonse pakupepa Lesa, mulepapatilako no kupepelako no kulombelako no kutashishako abantu bonse." 
1Timothy2:2 Mulepepelako na bashamfumu na bonse bambi aba mu buteko, epakuti tuleikala ku matwi tondolo mu cibote, abapetamina Lesa, kabili aba mibeele isuma." 
1Timothy2:3 Ici cine e cisuma, kabili ecisansamusha Lesa Umupusushi wesu." 
1Timothy2:4 Ena afwaya ukuti abantu bonse bapusuke, beshibe ne cishinka." 
1Timothy2:5 Pantu kwabafye Lesa umo mpo. Kabili kwabafye umo uulenga abantu babe pamo na Lesa, noyu muntu ni Kristu Yesu." 
1Timothy2:6 Uyu Kristu Yesu, ewaipeela umwine kukulubula ubwina bantu bonse. Uko kuipeela kwakwa Kristu Yesu pa nshita iyalingile, e bukambone bwakuti Lesa afwaya ukuti abantu bonse bapusuke." 
1Timothy2:7 Ni pali uyu wine mulandu epo natuminwa ukuba kabila wa Mbila Nsuma, umusole kabili kafundisha wa cisumino ne cishinka ku Benafyalo. Nshilebepa iyoo, ndelandafye icishinka!" 
1Timothy2:8 Lyonse ilyo mwalongana kukupepa, ndefwaya abaume balepepa ninshi nabemya amaboko yamushilo, ababula icipyu nangu ifikansa." 
1Timothy2:9 Kabili ndefwaya abanakashi ifyo fine, nokuti balefwala insalu shaciyembelo, cikulu balefwala bwino kabili ishilingile. Tabali na kuluka imishishi, nangu ukuisamika ubulungu ubwamutengo nangu ukufwala insalu shamutengo." 
1Timothy2:10 Lelo bali nokuisamika ne milimo isuma ngefyo cingalinga abanakashi abatila tulapepa Lesa. 
1Timothy2:11 Abanakashi bali nokusambilila abamutalalila kabili abanakilila. 
1Timothy2:12 Nshilesuminisha umwanakashi ukufunda nangu ukuba na maka yakucila umwaume. Umwanakashi ali nokwikala umutalalila. 
1Timothy2:13 Pantu uwabalilepo ukubumbwa ni Adamu, elyo panuma Efa." 
1Timothy2:14 Elyo kabili te Adamu ewabepelwe, lelo mwanakashi ewabepelwe, apula na mwifunde lyakwa Lesa." 
1Timothy2:15 Lelo umwanakashi akapusuka pa mulandu wakufyala abana, kumfwa nga tabasakamenefye ukuiyemfya, lelo bakoselela mukusumina, mukutemwa na mukuba abakaele." 
1Timothy3:1 Aya mashiwi yacishinka ayakuti umuntu nga alefwaya ukuba kangalila wa lukuta, ninshi alefwaya umulimo uusuma." 
1Timothy3:2 Kangalila wa lukuta afwile ukuba umuntu uwabula umulandu, uwakwata umukashi umofye epela, umuntu uwa misango isuma, uwatekanya, uwaicindika, uwaishiba ukupokelela abeni, kabili uwaishiba no kufunda." 
1Timothy3:3 Tali nakuba cakolwa wa bwalwa nangu ukuba uwalubuli, lelo ali nokuba uwamutembo, kabili uwacibote. Kabili tafwile kuba umuntu uwatemwisha indalama." 
1Timothy3:4 Ali nokuba umuntu uwaishiba ukusunga aba mu ŋanda mumwakwe bwino, kabili ali nokulenga ukuti bamwane balemubeela no kumucindika." 
1Timothy3:5 Pantu umuntu nga taishiba ifyakusunga aba mu ŋanda mumwakwe, nga kuti asunga shani ulukuta lwakwa Lesa?" 
1Timothy3:6 Tali nakuba umuntu umupya mu cisumino, epali atampa ukuitutumuna ku cilumba, kabili apingwilwapo nga filya Ciwa apingwilwe." 
1Timothy3:7 Kabili ali nokuba umuntu uo abantu abashili bena Kristu bacindika epali asebana, kabili aiposa mu citeyo cakwa Ciwa." 
1Timothy3:8 Badikoni nabo bene bali nokuba abaicindika kabili abacishinka. Tabali nakuba bacakolwa wa bwalwa nangu abatemwisha indalama. 
1Timothy3:9 Bali nokwikatisha imilandu ya nkaama ya cisumino, ukwabula ukutwishika mu mitima yabo." 
1Timothy3:10 Pakubala bali nokweshiwa. Elyo nga basanga ukuti tapali cakubalesha, lyena elyo balebomba nga badikoni." 
1Timothy3:11 Abakashi babo nabo bene bali nokuba abaicindika. Tabali nakuba abalwambo, lelo bali nokuba abatekanya kabili abacishinka muli fyonse." 
1Timothy3:12 Badikoni bali nokukwata umukashi umofye. Kabili bali nokuba abantu abaishiba ukusunga bwino abana babo na ba mu ŋanda mumwabo. 
1Timothy3:13 Badikoni ababomba imilimo yabo bwino, bakamona ukuti abantu babacindika. Elyo bakamona nokuti balalanda pa cisumino cabo muli Kristu Yesu ukwabula umwenso." 
1Timothy3:14 Ilyo ndekulembela ifi fintu, ndesubila ukuti nalaswa njisefye bwangu kuli iwe." 
1Timothy3:15 Lelo nga kwaba ifyakunshingilisha, uyu kalata alekwishibisha ifyo imibeele ya ba mu lupwa lwakwa Lesa ili nokuba. Pantu bena e lukuta lwakwa Lesa uwamweo, ebaba ulupami ulwakutungilila icishinka." 
1Timothy3:16 Cinefye, te cakutwishika, inkaama iyaba mwipepo lyesu ikulu nganshi. Wena aishile moneka ngo muntu. Mupashi ashininkishe ukuti alalungika. Bamalaika nabo balimumwene. Abantu bamubilile na ku Benafyalo. Abantu ba pano calo nabo balimusumina. Lesa amusendele ku mulu no mucinshi." 
1Timothy4:1 Mupashi asosafye apabuuta tuutu ati, mu nshiku ishakupelekeshako abantu bamo bakasangukila icisumino. Bakanakila imipashi yakubabepaika, bakalakonka ne fintu imipashi yakowela ilefunda." 
1Timothy4:2 Aya mafunde yafuma ku mfundabuteshi ishabufi. Kampingu wa mitima yashiko alifwa, aba kwati untu baoca ne cela icakaba." 
1Timothy4:3 Aba bantu balesha abantu ukuupa, elyo beba na bantu ukukanalya ifyakulya fimo fimo. Lelo Lesa afibumbile pakuti abantu abasumina, kabili abaishiba ne cishinka, balefipokelela no kutasha baletasha." 
1Timothy4:4 Icintu conse ico Lesa abumba cisuma. Tapaba nelyo cimo icakusuula, lelo tuli nokupokelela conse, kulila twabikapo ukutasha." 
1Timothy4:5 Pantu amashiwi yakwa Lesa ne pepo filenga ukuti fisangululwe. 
1Timothy4:6 Nga walafunda ifi fintu kuli bamunyinefwe, ninshi ukaba umubomfi musuma wakwa Kristu Yesu. Elyo lyena wakulapokelela amaka yakukula ayaba ku mashiwi yacisumino na ku mafunde yacishinka ayo wakonka." 
1Timothy4:7 Lelo iwe uletaluka ku milumbe yafyefye na ku fyakusabaila ifya banamayo abakote. Ulebikafye amano kukusambilila imikalile ya bwina Lesa. 
1Timothy4:8 Kwena cintu cisuma ukucita ifintu ifyakusalapula umubili, lelo icawamishapo ukucila pali fyonse, kucita ifintu ifyakusalapuka mukuba umwina Lesa. Pantu muli ici mwena mwaba isubilo lyakuba abomi pali nomba elyo no kuba abomi kuntanshi." 
1Timothy4:9 Aya mashiwi nasosa, yacishinka, kabili bonse bafwile ukuyasumina no kuyapokelela." 
1Timothy4:10 Kanshi ifwe tulalwisha no kubombesha nganshi, pantu twabika isubilo lyesu muli Lesa uwamweo, Umupusushi wa bantu bonse, palibufi kuli abo abamusumina." 
1Timothy4:11 Kanshi ifi efyo ulebafunda no kubakonkomesha. 
1Timothy4:12 Wileka muntu nelyo umo akusuule ico uli mulumendo. Lelo uleba icilangililo ku basumina mu milandile yobe, mu mibeele yobe, mu citemwiko, mu cisumino na muli bukaele bobe." 
1Timothy4:13 Mpaka nkese, inshita yonse ulebika umutima kukubelengela abantu Amalembo Yamushilo, ulebafunda no kubakoselesha." 
1Timothy4:14 Wilalekelesha ubupe ubo wapeelwe ilyo bakasesema baseseme ne bumba lya bakalamba lyakutambikepo amaboko. 
1Timothy4:15 Ulebomba iyi milimo, ulebikako umutima epakuti bonse balemonamo ubuyantanshi muli fyonse ifyo ulebomba." 
1Timothy4:16 Ulesakamana imibeele yobe, ulesakamana nefyo ulefunda. Ifi, efyo ulecita lyonse. Pantu nga walacita ifyo, lyena ukapusuka we mwine, elyo nabo bene abalekumfwa bakapusuka." 
1Timothy5:1 Wilabomfya bukali pakwalulula umukalamba uwalufyanya, lelo ulemusosha ne shiwi ilisuma kwati ni bawiso. Abalumendo bena ulelanda nabo kwati ni bamunonko." 
1Timothy5:2 Abanakashi abakalamba ulelanda nabo kwati ni banoko. Elyo abanakashi abacikashana nabo ulelanda nabo no mutima uwakaele kwati ulelanda na bankashi yobe. 
1Timothy5:3 Ulesunga no mucinshi bamukamfwilwa ababula abakubasunga. 
1Timothy5:4 Lelo mukamfwilwa nga alikwata abana nangu abeshikulu, basambilile ukuti icakubalilapo kulanga ubwina Lesa bwine bwine pakusakamana no kusunga aba lupwa lwabo. Muli ici emo batashisha abafyashi babo ne fikolwe fyabo, pantu ici ecisekesha Lesa." 
1Timothy5:5 Mukamfwilwa uwakuti alifye eka, takwete nangu umo uwakumusunga, atetekelafye muli Lesa, alapepa Lesa ubwaca no bwaila, alalomba Lesa ukuti alemwafwilishako." 
1Timothy5:6 Lelo mukamfwilwa uwakuti aishibafye ukuisansamusha, wena ninshi afwa kale, nangu acili umumi." 
1Timothy5:7 Kanshi e fintu ulebafunda, epakuti nelyo umo ebasanga ne cilubo." 
1Timothy5:8 Lelo uyo uushisakamana kusunga ba lupwa lwakwe, palibufi aba mu ŋanda mumwakwe, wena ninshi asangukila icisumino, abipapo no kucila uushasumina." 
1Timothy5:9 Pakuti ulembe mukamfwilwa pa mashina ya bamukamfwilwa, kano ninshi nacila pa myaka amakumi mutanda, kabili aupilwefye ku mwaume umo epela." 
1Timothy5:10 Elyo na bantu balamutasha pa milimo isuma. Ali nokuba umwanakashi uwakusha abana bakwe bwino, uwaishiba ukupokelela abeni mumwakwe, umuntu uwaleicefya mukutumika abantu bamushilo, uwaleyafwilisha abantu abali mu bwafya, kabili aliipeeleshe nganshi mukubomba imilimo yonse iyisuma." 
1Timothy5:11 Lelo bamukamfwilwa abakashana bena wilabalemba amashina yabo pa mashina ya bamukamfwilwa. Pantu kuti basangukila Kristu, kumfwa ngo lunkumbwa lwakuupwa nga lwabeshila." 
1Timothy5:12 Elyo kabili basangwa no mulandu wakonaula icilayo balaile kuli Kristu kale. 
1Timothy5:13 Kabili kuti bayaluka abanaŋani, balaseulukafye baleti bafuma muli iyi ŋanda baya muli imbi. Lelo teici ceka, kuti basambilila no kuba abalwambo, balaibika na mu milandu ishili yabo, balalanda na pa fintu bashifwile kulandapo." 
1Timothy5:14 Kanshi kwena ine kuti natemwapo ukuti bamukamfwilwa abakashana bena baleupwa, bakwata abana, kabili balasunga na mayanda yabo, epakuti abalwani besu belakwata apakulandila ifibi pali ifwe." 
1Timothy5:15 Pantu bamukamfwilwa bamo balitusangukila, balekonka Satana." 
1Timothy5:16 Nga cakuti umwanakashi uwasumina muli Kristu nakwata ba lupwa lwakwe bamukamfwilwa, afwile ukulabasunga. Tafwile kulekela ulukuta uyu mulimo wakubasunga. Epakuti ulukuta lulesungafye bamukamfwilwa abashikwete bakubasunga." 
1Timothy5:17 Abakalamba abalebomba bwino umulimo wa butungulushi bena bafwile ukucindikwa nganshi. Palibufi nga balebombesha mu mulimo wakubila Imbila Nsuma no kufunda. 
1Timothy5:18 Pantu Amalembo Yamushilo yatila, “Wilakaka ŋombe ku kanwa ilyo ilenyantaula pa ŋanu pakushisokola.” Kabili yatila nokuti, “Umubomfi ali nokupeelwa amalipilo yakwe.”" 
1Timothy5:19 Wilasumina ukulubulwisha umulandu bapeela umukalamba wa lukuta, kano ninshi bakambone babili nangu ukucilapo ebaleta uyo mulandu." 
1Timothy5:20 Abo abalebikapofye ukubifya, ulebakalipila pa cinso ca bonse, epakuti bambi baletiina." 
1Timothy5:21 Pa menso yakwa Lesa na pa menso yakwa Kristu Yesu na pali bamalaika abasalwa, ndekukonkomesha ulesunga aya mafunde. Wilaba na kapatulula nangu umucishacinani muli conse ico ulecita." 
1Timothy5:22 Uleteka umutima pakutambalikila umuntu amaboko. Kabili uletaluka kukuikumika ku fyabubifi fya bantu bambi. Uleisunga uwakaele. 
1Timothy5:23 Uleke ukulanwafye amenshi yeka yeka, lelo ulenwa no mwangashi panono pantu ulacula mu mala elyo na pa mulandu wa kulwalilila kobe." 
1Timothy5:24 Abantu bamo ifyabubifi fyabo fyabafye pa bwelu, fishibikwa nelyo bashilafika kukupingulwa. Lelo abantu bambi bena ifyabubifi fyabo fyalafisama, fishibikwafye panuma." 
1Timothy5:25 E cimo cine ne fintu ifisuma abantu bacita, nafyo fyabafye pa bwelu, lelo nangu fimo fishingeshibikwa bwino, fikasuka fikeshibikwe." 
1Timothy6:1 Elyo abo abali abasha, bali nokulacindika bashikulwibo mu nshila shonse. Lyena epakuti kwilaba nelyo umo uwakulanda ifyamusaalula pali Lesa na pafyo tufunda." 
1Timothy6:2 Abasha abo bashikulwibo basumina muli Kristu, tabali nakubasuula pantu ni bamunyinabo. Lelo bafwile ukubabombela bwino ukucilapo, pantu abashukila mufyo balebomba, bantu abasumina abo batemwa. Ifi fintu efyo ulefunda no kukomailapo." 
1Timothy6:3 Onse uulelanda amafunde ayaibela, kabili akaana no kunakila amashiwi yacishinka aya Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu na mafundisho ayakulenga ukuba umwina Lesa," 
1Timothy6:4 ninshi aisulamofye icilumba, kabili taishiba nelyo cimo. Aliiminwa kukupaashanya ne fikansa fya pa mashiwi yafyefye. Elyo ici cena cilengafye umufimbila, ukuumana, ukubepeshanya no kutunganya ifyabipa." 
1Timothy6:5 Cilenga na bantu abo amano yabo yashibomba bwino, ne cishinka tabacishiba, ukulaumana lyonse. Bena batontonkanya ukuti ukuba umwina Lesa ni nshila yakunonkelamo ifyuma." 
1Timothy6:6 Kwena ukuba umwina Lesa bunonshi ubukalamba, kumfwa nga alaumfwa ukuti ifyo akwete nafimulinga." 
1Timothy6:7 Pantu ifwe tatwaletele nelyo cimo pano calo, kabili tatwakasendepo nelyo cimo." 
1Timothy6:8 Kanshi ifwe nga natukwata ifyakulya ne fyakufwala, nga icakukabila cimbi cinshi!" 
1Timothy6:9 Lelo abantu abafwaya ukuba abakankala bafyuma, bena bawila mu ntunko no kwikatwa ne fintu ifyabuwelewele ifingi no lunkumbwa lwakubaletelela. Elyo ifi fibaposa mukubonaula no kuloba." 
1Timothy6:10 Pantu ukutemwa indalama e ntulo ya fibi fya misango yonse. Abantu bamo mukufwaisha indalama, basuka basangukila icisumino na mu mitima yabo mwaisula amacushi ayengi." 
1Timothy6:11 Nomba iwe we muntu wakwa Lesa uli nokutaluka kuli ifi fintu fyonse. Ulefwaishafye bukaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa, ukupetamina Lesa, icisumino, icitemwiko, ukushipikisha, no mutembo." 
1Timothy6:12 Ulelwa ubulwi busuma ubwa cisumino, epakushangila mu mweo wape. Ubu bwine ebo Lesa akwitileko lilya pa cinso ca bantu abengi wasosekeshe ifyo wasumina." 
1Timothy6:13 Kanshi pa cinso cakwa Lesa uupeela umweo ku fintu fyonse, na pa cinso cakwa Kristu Yesu uwapeele bukambone pa cishinka ilyo asosekeshe pa cinso cakwa Pontio Pilato," 
1Timothy6:14 ndekukonkomesha ukuti ulesunga aya mafunde ukwabula ukulufyanyapo nelyo cimo, mpaka bulya Bushiku ilyo Imfumu yesu Yesu Kristu ikamonekelapo." 
1Timothy6:15 Pa nshita ikalinga Lesa umucindami, Imfumu ya maka yonse iyabafye yeka mpo, Imfumu ya bashamfumu, Kateeka wa bakateeka, akalenga ukuti Yesu Kristu akese moneka." 
1Timothy6:16 Lesa ekafye ewakubelelela pe, tafwa. Lesa ekafye ewikala mu lubuuto ulo umuntu ashingapalamako. Umuntu nelyo umo tatala amumona kabili tekuti amumone. Uyu eo nalecindikwa, akwate na maka yakubelelela. Ameni." 
1Timothy6:17 Ulekonkomesha abakankala mu fintu fya pano calo ukuti belaba na cilumba. Tabali nakubika isubilo lyabo mu fyuma ifi ifishibelelela. Bali nokusubila muli Lesa uutupeela fyonsefye ifitusansamusha. 
1Timothy6:18 Ulebakonkomesha ukuti bali nokucita ifisuma. Bali nokubomba imilimo iyingi nganshi iyisuma. Bali nokuba no mutima wabukapekape, balepeelako na banabo ifyo bakwete." 
1Timothy6:19 Mukucita ifi, bakatutila ifyuma fyabo abene, ifikaba kwati mufula uwakosa uwakwikasha umweo wabo kuntanshi. Elyo lyena bakashangila mu mweo uwaba umweo wine wine." 
1Timothy6:20 We Timote, ulesunga bwino ico baseekesha kuli iwe. Uletaluka ku mashiwi yacilandelande ayabula ukukuma kuli Lesa, na ku fikansa fyaciwelewele ifyo abantu bamo mukuluba kwabo batila, “E mano.”" 
1Timothy6:21 Bamo basuka balufishamo ne cisumino cabo, ku mulandu wakusumina muli aya mano. Icikuuku cakwa Lesa cileba na imwe bonse." 
2Timothy1:1 Ine Paulo, Lesa kukufwaya kwakwefye anjita ukuba umusole wakwa Kristu Yesu, antuma kukubila pa mweo Lesa atulaya ico twaba muli Kristu Yesu." 
2Timothy1:2 Nakulembela iwe Timote umwana wandi uo natemwa. Icikuuku, uluse no mutende wakwa Lesa Tata na Kristu Yesu Imfumu yesu fileba na iwe." 
2Timothy1:3 Ndatasha Lesa uo mombela no mutima onse uwatambalala ngefyo ifikolwe fyandi fyalecita. Ndamutasha lyonse ilyo nkwibukishako mu mapepo yandi ubwaca no bwaila. 
2Timothy1:4 Nshilaba filamba fyobe. Kabili ndafuluka nganshi ukukumona, pakuti nkasansamuke nganshi." 
2Timothy1:5 Ndebukisha ne cisumino cacishinka wakwata. Ici cine e cisumino nokokulu Loisi na noko Eunike bakwete. Ine ninshininkisha e cisumino na iwe wine ukwete. 
2Timothy1:6 Kanshi e mulandu wine ndekucinkulako ukuti wikatishe ukubomfya icabupe Lesa akupeele mukutambalikilapo amaboko yandi. 
2Timothy1:7 Pantu Mupashi Lesa atupeela tewakulenga ukuti tube no mwenso, lelo ni Mupashi wakutupeela amaka, icitemwiko, no mutekatima." 
2Timothy1:8 Kanshi wilakwata nsoni pakuba kambone wa Mfumu yesu, nangu ukuba ne nsoni pali ine ico bamposa mu cifungo. Lelo ku maka Lesa akupeela, iwe uleibikafye pamo na ine mukucula pa mulandu wa Mbila Nsuma." 
2Timothy1:9 Ni Lesa ewatupususha no kutwita ukuti tube abamushilo, te pa mulandu wa mulimo twacita, lelo ni pa mulandu wa cikuuku cakwe nokuti efyo umwine alefwaya. Kabili ili shuko Lesa atupeele pa mulandu wakuba muli Kristu Yesu ninshi no kutampa kwa nshita takulafika." 
2Timothy1:10 Lelo ukwisa kwa Mupusushi wesu Kristu Yesu, ekwaisa sokolola ici. Aisa onaula imfwa, elyo ku Mbila Nsuma atusokolwela umweo no kukanafwa." 
2Timothy1:11 Ine Lesa alinsala ukuba kabila, umusole na kafundisha wa Mbila Nsuma." 
2Timothy1:12 Kabili ni pali uyu wine mulandu epo ndeculila ifi. Lelo nshanenuka nakalya, pantu nalishiba uo natetekelamo. Nalishininkisha nokuti wena akasunga bwino bwino ifyo aseekesha kuli ine mpaka na pali bulya Bushiku." 
2Timothy1:13 Amashiwi yacishinka ayo nakufunda, uyekatishe, yabe icilangililo uli nokulakonka mukufunda. Uyekatishe ne cisumino ne citemwiko ifyo twakwata ico tuli muli Kristu Yesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Ku maka yakwa Mupashi Wamushilo uwaikala muli ifwe, ulebaka ifishinka ifyo Lesa aseekesha kuli iwe." 
2Timothy1:15 Nawishiba ukuti abantu aba mu calo ca Asia, ukubikapofye na Fugelo na Hermogene bonse balinsangukila." 
2Timothy1:16 Lesa engakwatila aba mu ŋanda yakwa Onesifolo uluse, pantu wena imikufye iyingi alensansamusha. Elyo kabili wena taleumfwa insoni pali ico naba mu cifungo." 
2Timothy1:17 Awe wena atile cilya afikafye mu Roma, atampa no kumfwaya mpaka asuka ansanga." 
2Timothy1:18 Imfumu ikamubelelekofye uluse pali bulya Bushiku! Kabili iwe Timote nawishibafye bwino ifyo angafwilisheko mu Efeso. 
2Timothy2:1 Nomba iwe, we mwana wandi ube uwakosa pa mulandu wa cikuuku ico twashukila ico tuli muli Kristu Yesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Walyumfwa ifyo nalefunda pa menso ya bantu abengi bakambone, efyo na iwe ulefunda ku bantu abacishinka, abakuti nabo bakalefunda abantu bambi ifyo fine." 
2Timothy2:3 Kanshi na iwe uli nokuculako pamo na ifwe nge cita cacine cine icakwa Kristu Yesu. 
2Timothy2:4 Icita icili pakubomba, tacifwile kuiposa mu milimo ya bekalacalo, lelo cifwile ukufwayafye ukusansamusha umukalamba wa fita." 
2Timothy2:5 Elyo umuntu uulebutuka mukucimfyanya mu lubilo, tekuti acimfye no kupoka icilambu kano alekonka amafunde yakucimfyanya." 
2Timothy2:6 Umulimi uwabombeshe eufwile ukubalilapo ukupokako ku fisabo fyalobololwa. 
2Timothy2:7 Utontonkanyepo pali ifyo nasosa, pantu Imfumu ikalenga ukuti wiluke pali ifyo fyonse." 
2Timothy2:8 Uleibukisha Imbila Nsuma tufunda iyitweba ukuti Yesu Kristu alibushiwe ku bafwa, kabili ali wa mu lupwa lwakwa Davidi." 
2Timothy2:9 Ni pa mulandu wa Mbila Nsuma, epo ndeculila no kukakwa mu minyololo kwati cipondo. Lelo amashiwi yakwa Lesa yena tayakakwa mu munyololo." 
2Timothy2:10 Kanshi eico ndashipikisha ukucula muli fyonse pa mulandu wa basalwa bakwa Lesa, epakuti nabo bamone ukushukila ukupusuka ukwaba muli Kristu Yesu, elyo nako kuleta ubucindami bwape." 
2Timothy2:11 Awe iyi nsoselo yacishinka iyakuti. “Nga twafwa pamo nankwe, ninshi no kwikala tukekala pamo nankwe." 
2Timothy2:12 Nga twashipikisha mukucula, ninshi lyena tukalateeka nankwe. Nga twamukaana, ninshi lyena na ifwe akatukaana." 
2Timothy2:13 Nga tatuli na cishinka, wena lyonse wacishinka pantu wena tekuti acite ifishaba mibeele yakwe.”" 
2Timothy2:14 Uleibukisha abantu bobe pali ifi ifintu. Ulebasokako nganshi pa cinso cakwa Lesa ukuti, tabali nakulaumana pa mashiwifye. Tacawama nelyo panono. Kabili conaulafye icisumino ca bantu abaleumfwako." 
2Timothy2:15 Iwe, ulebombeshafye na maka yobe yonse, pakuti Lesa akushininkishe ukuti uli mubomfi uushaba na nsoni pa mulimo wakwe, kabili uufunda amashiwi yakwa Lesa ayacishinka ukwabula ukulufyanya." 
2Timothy2:16 Uletaluka ku mashiwi yacilandelande ayabula ukukuma kuli Lesa na ku mashiwi yaciwelewele, pantu yalengafye ukuti abantu balundepo ukutaluka kuli Lesa." 
2Timothy2:17 Amashiwi ya musango uyu yena yalunduluka kwati cilonda icishipola. Aba bantu babili Imeneo na Fileto ebafunda amashiwi ya musango uyo. 
2Timothy2:18 Aba bantu balifuma ku cishinka. Bena balesosa abati ukushukuka kwa bafwa kwalicitika kale. Kanshi bafulunganya ne cisumino ca bantu bamo abasumina. 
2Timothy2:19 Lelo icakuulwa pa mufula uwakosa uo Lesa aimba te cakuteletenta. Pali ici palembwa ukuti, “Lesa umwine alishiba abantu bakwe,” kabili nokuti, “Uyo onse uwasosa ukuti ndi muntu wakwa Lesa, ali nokutaluka kukubifya.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Mu ŋanda iyacindama tamubafye ifipe ifya golide ne fya silifa, lelo muba ne fipe ifya cimuti ne fye bumba. Pali ifi fipe fimo fyakubomfya ku milimo ikankala, elyo fimbi fyakubomfya lyonse." 
2Timothy2:21 Kanshi umuntu nga aitalusha ku fibi ifyo nandilepo, lyena akaba icipe icakubomfya ku milimo ikankala. Pantu ninshi naituula kuli Lesa, ali nomba icibombelo cakubomfya Imfumu ku milimo yonse isuma iyo ilefwaya ukubomba." 
2Timothy2:22 Uletaluka ku lunkumbwa lubi ulwa mu bulumendo. Kabili pamo na bantu abamitima iyakaele abakuuta Lesa ukuti alebafwilisha, na iwe uli nokufwaisha ukuba uwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa, uwacisumino icitemwiko ne cumfwano." 
2Timothy2:23 Lelo iwe uletaluka ku fikansa fyabupuba no buwelewele. Walishiba ukuti ifi filengafye ukulaumana. 
2Timothy2:24 Umusha wa Mfumu wena tafwile kulaumana na bantu. Afwile ukuba uwamutembo kuli bonse, kafundisha umusuma kabili uwamutekatima." 
2Timothy2:25 Ali nokuba no mutembo mukwalulula abantu abalekanya ifyo alebeba. Pantu limbi kuti Lesa abalenga ukulapila, basuka baishiba icishinka." 
2Timothy2:26 Awe lyena elyo amano yakabwela, bakapusuke na ku citeyo cakwa Ciwa umo abekete no kulakonka ifyo alefwaya." 
2Timothy3:1 Uli nokwishiba ukuti mu nshiku shakupelekeshako mukaba inshita ishabipisha. 
2Timothy3:2 Abantu bakalaisakamanafye abene, bakatemwisha ifyuma, abamataki, kabili abaitutumuna. Bakaba abansele, abashumfwila abafyashi, abashitasha kabili abashili bamushilo." 
2Timothy3:3 Bakaba abantu ababula icitemwiko, ababula uluse, ababepeshanya, abashatekanya, abakali kabili abapata ifisuma." 
2Timothy3:4 Bakaba abantu abashili bakucetekela, abashisakamana nelyo cimo, abaisulamo icilumba, abatemwa ifyakuisansamusha ukucila ukutemwa Lesa." 
2Timothy3:5 Bakalamoneka kwati bantu abapetamina Lesa, lelo mu cacine bakasuula na maka ayaba mukuba umwina Lesa. Uletaluka ku bantu ba musango uyo." 
2Timothy3:6 Bamo pali aba bantu bengila mu mayanda ya bantu no kunasha abanakashi abashashipa. Aba banakashi bantu batitikishiwa no bubi bwa fyabubifi fyabo, kabili bantu basendwa no lunkumbwa ulwa misango yonse." 
2Timothy3:7 Aba banakashi balafwaya ukusambilila lyonse, lelo tabakatale abeshiba icishinka." 
2Timothy3:8 Nga filya Yanesi na Yambulesi bakeenye Mose efyo aba bantu nabo bakaana icishinka. Aba bantu amano yabo tayabomba bwino kabili icisumino cabo cafyefye. 
2Timothy3:9 Lelo tabakaye patali nakalya, pantu umuntu onse akamona ukuti fiwelewele fya bantu. Ifyo fine efyacitike na kuli Yanesi na Yambulesi." 
2Timothy3:10 Nomba iwe Timote walishiba ifyo mfunda, imyendele yandi, nefyo mfwaya mu bumi bwandi. Walishiba icisumino candi, ifyo naba no mutekatima, icitemwiko candi nefyo nshipikisha." 
2Timothy3:11 Walishiba nefyo abantu bancusha na mafya yandi. Iwe walishiba fyonse ifyancitikile, na macushi ayabipisha ayo bancushisheko mu Antioki, Ikonia na mu Lisitila. Lelo Imfumu yalimpokolweleko kuli ifi fyonse." 
2Timothy3:12 Mu cine umuntu onse uwaba muli Kristu Yesu, uufwaya ukwikala ngo muntu wakwa Lesa, abantu bakamucusha." 
2Timothy3:13 Lelo abantu babi na baitunga ukuba ifyo bashaba, bena bakacililakofye ukubipa, balebepaika bambi no kuibepaika abene." 
2Timothy3:14 Lelo iwe ukonkanyepofye ukukonka ifyacishinka wafundwa kabili ifyo washininkisha nganshi. Pantu walishiba na bakafundisha abakufundile. 
2Timothy3:15 Kabili uleibukisha ukuti ukufumafye ku bwaice, walishiba Amalembo Yamushilo, ayafwile ukukupanda amano ayakulenga ukuti ku cisumino wakwata muli Kristu Yesu ukapusuke." 
2Timothy3:16 Amalembo Yamushilo yonse yena mashiwi yakwa Lesa. Kanshi kuti wayabomfya pakufunda pa cishinka, pakwebaula abaluba, pakwaluluka abali mu filubo, na pakufunda ifyo abantu bali nokuba abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa." 
2Timothy3:17 Eico kanshi Amalembo Yamushilo yalafwa umuntu wakwa Lesa ukuti akwate fyonse ifyo alekabila pakuti akwate amaka yakubomba umulimo usuma uwa musango onse. 
2Timothy4:1 Ine ndekukonkomesha pa cinso cakwa Lesa na pa cinso cakwa Kristu Yesu uukabwela kukuputula imilandu ya bomi na bafwa, kabili pantu akesa moneka no kuteeka nge Mfumu." 
2Timothy4:2 Eico ndekukonkomesha nganshi ukuti ulebila amashiwi yakwa Lesa. Ulekomailapo ilyo cilingile nelyo cishilingile line. Ilyo ulefunda, ulebakalipila, uleyalulula abali mu cilubo, kabili ulebakoseleshako, lelo ulecita ifi no mutekatima." 
2Timothy4:3 Ala inshita ikesa ilyo abantu tabakalefwaya ukumfwa amafunde yacine cine. Lelo bakalakonkafye ifyo balefwaya abene. Bakaikolonganikila bakafundisha abengi abakubeba ifyo abene bafwaya ukumfwa. 
2Timothy4:4 Bakaleka ukukutika ku fyacishinka, elyo bakalesakamana ukumfwa ku milumbe." 
2Timothy4:5 Lelo iwe uleba uwatekanya inshita yonse. Wilatiina kucula, ulebombafye umulimo wakubila Imbila Nsuma, kabili ulebomba no mulimo onse ngo mubomfi wa Mfumu." 
2Timothy4:6 Ine nomba ndetuulwa nge cakunwa icaitilwa pelambo. Kabili inshita naifika iyakufuma pano calo. 
2Timothy4:7 Nindwa ubulwi ubusuma, nimbutuka ukufika na ku mpela, kabili nalisunga icisumino." 
2Timothy4:8 Nomba icilambu bapeela abantu abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa cilempembela. Ici cilambu ni Mfumu iyiputula imilandu no mulinganya ikampeela pali bulya bushiku. Elyo kwena tekuli ine neka, lelo na kuli bonse abalolela ukuti ikamoneke." 
2Timothy4:9 Ukeshe na maka yobe yonse ukwisa bwangu kuli ine. 
2Timothy4:10 Pantu Demasi wena alisendwa ne fya calo cino, alinsha, aya na ku Tesalonika. Keleseni aliya ku Galatia, elyo Tito nao ku Dalamatia." 
2Timothy4:11 Ndifye na Luka epela. Ukabuule Mako, ukese nankwe, pantu wena kuti alangafwako mu mulimo wandi." 
2Timothy4:12 Tukiko eo natuma ku Efeso. 
2Timothy4:13 Ilyo ukalaisa, ukandetele ne cakufimbana candi ico nashile mu Troa kuli Kapo. Ukandeteleko ne fitabo, na shilya mpapa ishalembwapo wikasha iyoo." 
2Timothy4:14 Alekisanda, kafula wa fyela ancitile icabipa nganshi. Imfumu eikamukanda pali ifyo acita." 
2Timothy4:15 Uli nokucenjela kuli uyu muntu, pantu wena akoselepofye nganshi pakukaanya amafundisho yesu." 
2Timothy4:16 Umuku wapakubala ilyo nalelubulula, tapali nelyo umo uwakumpokololako, bonse balindekeleshe. Ndelombafye ukuti Lesa ekabapeela mulandu pali ici." 
2Timothy4:17 Lelo Imfumu yali na ine, yampeele na maka pakuti mone ukubila amashiwi yonse aya Mbila Nsuma, pakuti na Benafyalo bonse bayomfwe. Kanshi epakupusuka kukupingwilwa ukufwa." 
2Timothy4:18 Imfumu yakulampokololako ku fibi fyonse bengancitila, kabili eikansenda no kumfisha umutuntulu mu Bufumu bwaiko ubwa mu mulu. Imfumu nailelumbwa pe na pe! Ameni." 
2Timothy4:19 Ndeposhapo Prisila na Akwila na ba mu ŋanda yakwa Onesifolo. 
2Timothy4:20 Elasto ashele mu Kolinti, elyo Tulofimo wena namushile mu Mileto, pantu alilwele." 
2Timothy4:21 Weshe na maka yobe yonse ukwisa ilyo inshita yampepo tailafika. Yubulo, Pudensi, Linusi na Kilaudia pamo pene na bamunyinefwe bonse balemuposha." 
2Timothy4:22 Imfumu ileba na iwe. Icikuuku cakwa Lesa cileba na imwe bonse. 
Titus1:1 Ine ne ulelemba nine Paulo, umusha wakwa Lesa, kabili ndi musole wakwa Yesu Kristu. Ine nalisontwa no kutumwa kukwafwilishako abasalwa bakwa Lesa mu cisumino cabo, elyo no kubatungulula kukwishiba icishinka icaba mu bwina Lesa." 
Titus1:2 Neci cishinka cashintilila pesubilo lyakushukila umweo wape. Ni Lesa uushibepa, ewatulaile uyu mweo kale ilyo ne nshita tailabako." 
Titus1:3 Asokolwele ifi mu mashiwi yakwe pa nshita iyalingile. Lesa Umupusushi wesu ewankonkomeshe no kumpeela uyu mulimo wakubila aya mashiwi. 
Titus1:4 Nakulembela iwe Tito, we mwana wandi icine cine mu cisumino ico iwe na ine twakwata. Icikuuku no mutende wakwa Lesa Tata no Mupusushi Yesu Kristu fileba na iwe." 
Titus1:5 Ico nakushilile mu Kiliti ni pakuti ushale walungika ifintu fyonse ifilefwaikwa ukulungika, elyo no kusonta abakalamba ba nkuta mu misumba yonse. Uleibukisha ifyo nakwebele." 
Titus1:6 Umukalamba afwile ukuba umuntu uwabula umulandu. Afwile akwatefye umukashi umo na bamwane bafwile ukuba abantu abasumina, kabili abashili bampundililwa ku fyabukakashi nangu bucintomfwa." 
Titus1:7 Apo kangalila angalila umulimo wakwa Lesa, tafwile kuba na mulandu. Kabili elaumya maka yakuteeka, nangu ukuba uwacipyu, nangu ukuba cakolwa, nangu uwalubuli, nangu uukonkelela ulunkumbwa lwa ndalama." 
Titus1:8 Ali nokuba umuntu uwaishiba ukupokelela abeni, kabili uwatemwa ukucita ifisuma. Ali nokuba umuntu uwatekanya, uufwaya lyonse ukucita ifyalungama, uwakatiina kuli Lesa, kabili uwa misango isuma." 
Titus1:9 Afwile ukusunga bwino nganshi amashiwi yacishinka ayo afundwa, epakuti alekoseleshako bambi mukubafunda amafunde yacine cine, elyo kabili no kulanga ifyo baluba abo abaleyakaanya." 
Titus1:10 Pantu eko balifye abengi abasangukila Lesa, abalelanda ifyaciwelewele no kubepaika abantu. Abengi pali aba, bena Kristu abafuma ku mipepele ya Bayuda." 
Titus1:11 Aba bantu bena uli nokubalesha, pantu baleonaulafye icisumino mu ndupwa sha bantu mukufunda ifyo bashifwile kufunda. Kabili balecita ifyo ku mulandu wakufwayafye ukunonka indalama." 
Titus1:12 Umwina Kiliti fye umwine, umo pali bakasesema wabo, ewasosele ati, “Abena Kiliti lyonse balandafye ifyabufi, fiswango ifibi, banaŋani, kabili abafunuka.”" 
Titus1:13 Kanshi ifyo alandile fyacishinka. Eico iwe uli nokubakalipila nganshi, pakuti bakwate icisumino cacine cine." 
Titus1:14 Kabili baleke no kulakonkelela ifya mu milumbe ya Bayuda na mafunde ya bantu abasuula icishinka. 
Titus1:15 Ku bantu abakaele takwaba icabakowesha. Lelo ku bantu abaobelwa mukubifya na mukukanasumina, bena fyonse fyakubakowesha, pantu kampingu wa mitima yabo na mano yabo fyalikowela." 
Titus1:16 Bena basosa ukuti balishiba Lesa, lelo ifyo bacita filakaana ici. Bantu abalupato, kabili ni bacintomfwa, tekuti bacite icisuma nelyo cimo." 
Titus2:1 Lelo iwe ulefunda ifyakuti tafipusene na mafunde yacine cine. 
Titus2:2 Ulefunda abaume abakalamba ukuti bali nokuba abantu aba misango isuma, abamano, kabili abatekanya. Tabali nakunenuka mu cisumino, mu citemwiko, na mukushipikisha." 
Titus2:3 Eifyo fine ulefunda abanakashi abakalamba ukuti baleba ne misango nga banakashi abapetamina Lesa. Tabali nakuba ababepeshanya nangu ukuba abasha ba bwalwa. Bali nokulafunda ifintu ifisuma. 
Titus2:4 Epakuti balefunda abanakashi abacikashana ukulatemwa abalume babo na bana babo. 
Titus2:5 Kabili epakuti baleba abatekanya, abakaele, abasunga amayanda yabo bwino, abamutembo, abacumfwila ku balume babo, epakuti pelaba nelyo umo uwakulanda ifibi pa mashiwi yakwa Lesa." 
Titus2:6 Eifyo fine na balumendo nabo, ulebacincisha ukuba abatekanya." 
Titus2:7 Muli fyonse iwe wine uleba icilangililo kufyo ulecita. Ulebikako amano no kufunda ne cishinka. 
Titus2:8 Ulebomfya amashiwi ayasuma ayakuti teti pabe uwakuyasusha. Epakuti abalwani bobe baleikatwa ne nsoni, ico bafilwa ukukwata ifibi ifyakulanda pali ifwe." 
Titus2:9 Abasha balenakila bashikulwibo no kulabasansamusha mu fintu fyonse. Tabali nakulabakaanyapo nelyo cimo ilyo balelanda," 
Titus2:10 nangu ukubebila ifintu. Lelo bafwile ukuilanga ukuti bantu abasuma lyonse, kabili bantu abalingile ukucetekelwa. Epakuti fyonse ifyo balecita fileleta umucinshi ku fifundwa pali Lesa Umupusushi wesu." 
Titus2:11 Pantu Lesa alisokolola ku bantu bonse icikuuku cakwe icakupusukilamo. 
Titus2:12 Ici cikuuku citufunda ukuleka imikalile ishili ya bwina Lesa no lunkumbwa lwa fya pano calo. Citufunda ukwikala pano calo abatekanya, abololoke, kabili abapetamina Lesa," 
Titus2:13 ilyo tulelolela no kusubila ne nsansa ukwisa ukwacindama ukwakwa Lesa Mukulu kabili Umupusushi wesu Kristu Yesu. 
Titus2:14 Kristu Yesu aliileka ilambo umwine pakuti atulubule ku bubi bwesu bonse, tube abakaele. Epakuti tubefye abantu bakwe, abasakamana ukucita ifisuma." 
Titus2:15 Kanshi ifi efyo uli nokufunda. Ulebomfya amaka yobe yonse wapeelwa mukucincisha no kukalipila abalekumfwa. Wilaleka nelyo umo ukuti akusuule. 
Titus3:1 Ulecinkula abena Kristu ukuti bali nokunakila bakateeka na ba mu buteko. Bali nokubabeela, elyo nokuipekanya ukubomba imilimo yonse isuma." 
Titus3:2 Ulebeba tabali nakwamba umuntu nelyo umo nangu ukulaumana, baleba abamutembo elyo kabili abamucinshi ku bantu bonse." 
Titus3:3 Na ifwe pa nshita imo twali ifiwelewele, ficintomfwa kabili abalubantika. Twateekelwe ubusha no lunkumbwa lubi na ku fyakuisansamusha ifya misango misango. Ubumi bwesu bonse bwalifye mukubifya na mu mufimbila, bambi nga batupata na ifwe twalebapata." 
Titus3:4 Lelo ilyo uluse lwakwa Lesa Umupusushi wesu ne citemwiko cakwe ku bantu fyasokolweke," 
Titus3:5 elyo Lesa atupuswishe. Tatupuswishe ico ifwe fwe bene twacitile ifintu fimo ifisuma, lelo ni pa mulandu wa luse lwakwefye. Pantu atupuswishe ilyo Mupashi Wamushilo atusambile pakuti tufyalwe cipya cipya, nokutulenga ukuba no mweo upya." 
Titus3:6 Pantu Lesa alitufumfumwina Mupashi Wamushilo pa mulandu wakwa Yesu Kristu Umupusushi wesu. 
Titus3:7 Acita ifi, pakuti ku cikuuku cakwe tumone ukuba abakaele pa cinso cakwe, elyo no kushukila umweo wa pe uo tusubila." 
Titus3:8 Aya mashiwi yacishinka. Ine ndefwaya ukuti ulekomailapo nganshi pali ifi fintu, epakuti abasumina muli Lesa balesakamana ukulacita imilimo isuma. Ifi fintu, fisuma kabili ifyakwafwa abantu." 
Titus3:9 Lelo iwe uletaluka ku fikansa fyaciwelewele, ifya pa mashina ya fikolwe, kukuumana na kukulwila pa mafunde yakwa Mose. Ifi fintu fyafyefye, tafibomba nelyo cimo." 
Titus3:10 Umuntu uulenga ukupusana, umusokeko pafyo alecita imiku ibili. Elyo lyena umusuulekofye." 
Titus3:11 Nawishiba ukuti umuntu wa musango uyo alifulungana, ne fyabubifi fyakwe filamushinina umwine ukuti alalufyanya." 
Titus3:12 Ilyo nkatuma Atema nangu Tukiko kuli iwe, ukeshe na maka yobe ukwisa ku Nikapoli, pantu eko mpingwile ukwikala mu nshita yampepo." 
Titus3:13 Weshe na maka yobe yonse ukwafwilisha Sena, fundi wa mafunde mu calo, na Apolo pakuti bakatampe ubulendo bwabo. Ukamone ukuti bakwata fyonse ifyo balekabila." 
Titus3:14 Abantu besu bali nokusambilila ukubomfya inshita yabo mukucita imilimo isuma, epakumona ukwafwilishako abalekabila icine cine. Kabili epakumwenamo ifyo balekabila abene." 
Titus3:15 Bonse abo tuli nabo kuno balekuposha. Uposhepo bonse abatutemwa pa mulandu wa cisumino. Icikuuku cakwa Lesa cileba na imwe bonse. 
Philemon1:1 Ine Paulo, ndi mu cifungo pa mulandu wakwa Kristu Yesu. Tuli na munyinefwe Timote. Twakulembela iwe Filemoni, we mutemwikwa wesu kabili umubomfi munensu." 
Philemon1:2 Twalembela uyu kalata na ku lukuta ululongana mumobe, na kuli nkashi yesu Afia, na Akipo uulwa ubulwi bwa Mfumu pamo na ifwe." 
Philemon1:3 Icikuuku no mutende wakwa Lesa Shifwe na Yesu Kristu Imfumu yesu fingalaba na imwe. 
Philemon1:4 We munyinane Filemoni, ine ndatasha Lesa wandi lyonsefye ilyo ndekupepelako." 
Philemon1:5 Pantu ndeumfwa palwa citemwiko cobe ne cisumino wakwata mu Mfumu Yesu na ku bamushilo bonse. 
Philemon1:6 Ine mpepa ukuti ukwampana kwesu mu cisumino, kukalenga ukuti tumfwikishe ifisuma fyonse ifyo twashukila mu bumi bwesu ico twaampana na Kristu." 
Philemon1:7 We munyinefwe, icitemwiko cobe calindetela insansa no kunkoseleshako, pantu nausansamusha abamushilo." 
Philemon1:8 Kanshi eico apo uli munyinane muli Kristu, kuti napama ukukweba ifyo ufwile ukucita." 
Philemon1:9 Lelo pa mulandu wakuti nalikutemwa, awe nalakupapatafye. Ine ne Paulo ne mukote, kabili ndi mu cifungo pa mulandu wakwa Kristu." 
Philemon1:10 Kanshi ndekupapata pa mwana wandi Onesimo, uo nafyele muno mwine mu cifungo pakumuleta mu cisumino." 
Philemon1:11 Kale talekubombela nelyo cimo, lelo nomba aletubombela, iwe wine na ine." 
Philemon1:12 Ndemubwesesha kuli iwe, uo natemwa no mutima wandi onse." 
Philemon1:13 Kwena nalefwaya ukuti tuleikala nankwe kuno, pakuti alengafwilishako mu cifulo cobe ilyo ncili mu cifungo pa mulandu wa Mbila Nsuma." 
Philemon1:14 Lelo kwena nshalefwaya ukucita nelyo cimo ukwabula iwe ukuti usuminishe. Lelo nalefwaya ukuti wangafwilishako kukutemwafye kobe, ukwabula ukupatikishiwa." 
Philemon1:15 Nalimo ico Onesimo afumine kuli iwe pa nshita inono, ni pakuti ilyo abwela, ukaleikala nankwe inshita yonse." 
Philemon1:16 Nomba tali mushafye epela, lelo nacilapo nganshi pa musha. Ine, ni munyinane uo natemwa. Ine nalimutemwa nganshi, palibufi iwe taukamutemwa no kucilapo, apo muntu munobe kabili uo mwampana nankwe mu Mfumu!" 
Philemon1:17 Eico, iwe nga utila ine ndi mubomfi munobe, kanshi umusekelele nga filya fine wingansekelela." 
Philemon1:18 Nga alikulufyanyapo cimo, nangu alikongolapo cimo kuli iwe, ukandipilishe." 
Philemon1:19 Ine wine Paulo nalalemba no kuboko kwandi ukuti, NKAKULIPILA. Lelo nshili nakukucinkulako ukuti inkongole shobe kuli ine, mweo obe we mwine uwa bwina Kristu." 
Philemon1:20 Kanshi we munyinane, apo twaampana ne Mfumu, nakupapata ncitila ico ndelomba. Ala nsansamushako, ndi munonko muli Kristu." 
Philemon1:21 Ine ilyo ndelemba ifi, nincetekela ukuti ukacita ico ndekulomba. Kabili ninjishiba nokuti ukacita ne ficililepo." 
Philemon1:22 Elyo na cimbi nici, umpekanisheko umuputule. Pantu ndesubila ukuti Lesa akomfwa amapepo yenu bonse, kabinge akambwesesha na kuli imwe." 
Philemon1:23 Epafula, uo tuli nao mu cifungo pa mulandu wakwa Kristu Yesu, alekuposha." 
Philemon1:24 Mako, Alistako, Dema na Luka, ababomfi banandi, nabo bakuposha." 
Philemon1:25 Icikuuku ca Mfumu Yesu Kristu cileba na imwe bonse. 
Hebrews1:1 Kale Lesa atumine bakasesema, ebalelanda amashiwi yakwe ku fikolwe fyesu mu misango iyingi, kabili pa nshita ishalekana lekana." 
Hebrews1:2 Nomba muli ishi nshiku shakupelekeshako, alituma Mwane uwatulandila amashiwi yakwe. Ni ku maka yakwa Mwane, Lesa abumbila ifintu fyonse. Uyu wine Mwane eo Lesa asonta ukuti pakulekelesha akabe e mwine wa fintu fyonse." 
Hebrews1:3 Eo ukubengeshima kwa bucindami bwakwa Lesa kumonekelamo. Kabili aba e cata cakwa Lesa icapwililika. Eulenga nokuti ifintu fyonse fikonkanye ukubapo ku maka ye shiwi lyakwe. Ilyo apwile umulimo wakufumisha abantu ifyabubifi, elyo aya ikala mu mulu lubali lwa ku kulyo kwakwa Lesa uwa maka yonse." 
Hebrews1:4 Mwana Lesa alicila apakalamba pali bamalaika, nga filya fine ishina Lesa amupeele lyacila pa mashina yabo." 
Hebrews1:5 Pantu Lesa tatala ebapo umo pali bamalaika ati, “Iwe uli mwana wandi, ilelo naba wiso.” Nangu ukulanda pali malaika umo ati, “Ine nkaba wishi, nao akaba umwana wandi.”" 
Hebrews1:6 Kabili pakuleta Umwana wakwe ibeli muno calo, Lesa asosa ati, “Bamalaika bonse abakwa Lesa bali nokumupepa.”" 
Hebrews1:7 Lelo pali bamalaika bena, Lesa asosa ati, “Apanga bamalaika bakwe imyela na babomfi bakwe imingu sha mulilo.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Lelo pali Mwane pena, Lesa atila ati, “Icipuna cobe icabufumu, we Lesa, cabelelela pe na pe! Ne nkonto ya bufumu bobe ni nkonto yamulinganya." 
Hebrews1:9 Watemwa ifintu ifyalungama, wapata ububifi. Kanshi eico Lesa, Lesa obe akusalila pa babiyo bonse, no kukusuba amafuta yansansa.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Kabili atila nokuti, “Niwe, we Mfumu, wabumbile icalo pa citendekelo, na maboko yobe yene eyapanga imyulu." 
Hebrews1:11 Fyena fikaloba, lelo iwe ukabelelela pe. Fyena fikasapuka nge cakufwala." 
Hebrews1:12 Ukafifunga kwati mwingila, ukafifuula kwati ni filya bafuula ifyakufwala. Lelo iwe lyonse wabafye umo wabela, kabili ne myaka yobe tayakapwe nakalya.”" 
Hebrews1:13 Lesa tatala alanda kuli umo pali bamalaika bakwe ati, “Ikala ku kulyo kwandi, mpaka abalwani bobe nkabacite apakunyanta amakasa yobe.”" 
Hebrews1:14 Kanshi bamalaika finshi? Bamalaika mipashi iyibombela Lesa, kabili eyo atuma kukwafwa abantu abali nokupusuka." 
Hebrews2:1 Kanshi eico tuli nokuposako amano nganshi kuli fyonse ifyo twaumfwa, epakuti twikesa sendwa na fimbi." 
Hebrews2:2 Amashiwi bamalaika balandile, yali yacishinka. Elyo na onse uushaleyakonka nangu ukuyabeela, alekandilwapo ukulingana ne cilubo cakwe." 
Hebrews2:3 Nga kanshi ifwe kuti twafulumukila kwi, nga twasuula ipusukilo ilyakula ifi? Imfumu iyine eyabalilepo ukubila pali ili ipusukilo, elyo abo baumfwileko baishile landa kuli ifwe no kutushinina ukuti lyacishinka." 
Hebrews2:4 Kabili Lesa alibeminine bukambone ku fishibilo na ku fipeshamano ifya misango ne misango na ku finjelengwe alecita, elyo na pakubapeela ubupe bwakwa Mupashi Wamushilo ngomo alefwaila." 
Hebrews2:5 Lesa tasonta bamalaika ukuba bakateeka ba calo icili nokwisa, ico tulelandapo." 
Hebrews2:6 Lelo umo, pamo asosa ati, “Ngo muntunse wanshi uwakuti ulemutontonkanyapo? Umwana wa muntu nao wanshi uwakuti ulesakamana?" 
Hebrews2:7 Pa kashita akanono wamulengele ukuti abe uwacepapo pali bamalaika. Wamufwikile icisote cabufumu icamucinshi no bucindami. 
Hebrews2:8 Elyo walenga na fyonse ukulamukunkwila.” Apo Lesa kanshi acita umuntu kateeka wa fintu fyonse, kanshi tapaba nelyo cimo ico umuntu ashateeka. Lelo pali nomba tatumona ukuti umuntu ateeka ifintu fyonse." 
Hebrews2:9 Lelo uo tumona ni Yesu, uo pa kashita kanono Lesa amulengele ukuti abe uwacepa pali bamalaika, epakuti ku cikuuku cakwa Lesa, Yesu afwilile umuntu onse. Nomba tumona Yesu ukuti pali ico atufwilile bamufwika icisote cabufumu ica mucinshi no bucindami." 
Hebrews2:10 Kanshi Lesa uubumba ifintu fyonse kabili uo fyonse fibombela, alilungike pakulenga ukuti Yesu ku macushi aculile abe uwapwililika, epakuti alete bamwane abengi kukukwatako ubucindami bwakwe. Pantu ni Yesu eka eulenga abantu ukupusuka." 
Hebrews2:11 Yesu eusangulula abantu ukubafumya ku fyabubifi fyabo. Elyo umwine wine na bantu bene abasangululwa, bonse Shibo umo wine. Kanshi eico takwata nsoni shakubeta, bamunyina." 
Hebrews2:12 Asosa kuli Lesa ati, “Nakulashimikila bamunyinane peshina lyobe, nakulakulumbanya mu lukuta.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Kabili atila nokuti, “Ni muli Lesa emo nakulatetekela.” Kabili asosa nokuti, “Moneni epo ndi, ine pamo na bana abo Lesa ampeela.”" 
Hebrews2:14 Apo abo eta abana, bantu ababa no munofu no mulopa, kanshi Yesu nao ayalwike ngefyo baba, aba umuntu. Acitile ifi, pakuti ku mfwa yakwe onaule Ciwa, uwakwata amaka pa mfwa." 
Hebrews2:15 Elyo kabili epakuti alubule bonse abali abasha mu bumi bwabo bonse pa mulandu wakutiina imfwa. 
Hebrews2:16 Pantu kwena calishibikwafye bwino ukuti te bamalaika Yesu afwilishako, lelo ba mu lupwa lwakwa Abrahamu." 
Hebrews2:17 Eico kanshi Yesu ali nokwaluka ukuba nga bamunyina muli fyonse. Lyena epakuti abe Shimapepo mukalamba uwacine cine kabili uwaluse mukubombela Lesa wakwe, pakuti afute pa fyabubifi fya bantu." 
Hebrews2:18 Apo Yesu umwine alitunkilwe no kucula, kanshi nomba kuti ayafwa bonse abaletunkwa." 
Hebrews3:1 Kanshi bamunyinane, mwe bamushilo, imwe ni Lesa ewamwita! Imwe mulebika amano pali Yesu, umusole kabili Shimapepo mukalamba wa mu cisumino cesu." 
Hebrews3:2 Ali uwapetamina Lesa uwamusontele ukubomba uyu mulimo, nga filya Mose ali uwapetama mu milimo yonse iya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa." 
Hebrews3:3 Umuntu uwakuula iŋanda alacindikwa ukucila ne ŋanda ine. Efyo fine Yesu nao aliba nokucindikwa apakalamba ukucila Mose. 
Hebrews3:4 Cacine, iŋanda yonse uukuula muntu, lelo uwapanga fyonse ni Lesa." 
Hebrews3:5 Mose ali uwapetama mukubomba imilimo yonse mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa. Kabili ali kambone wa fintu Lesa ali nokwisa landa kuntanshi. 
Hebrews3:6 Lelo Kristu wena apo ni Mwane, apetaminafye pakusunga iŋanda yakwa Lesa. Nifwe iŋanda yakwa Lesa, kulila twaikatisha ukukoselela no kutetekela mufyo tusubila." 
Hebrews3:7 Kanshi Mupashi Wamushilo asosa ati, “Lelo line, nga mwaumfwa ishiwi lyakwa Lesa," 
Hebrews3:8 mwiumalala mitima, nga filya bacitile ilyo bansangukile, pa nshita batunkilwe ilyo bali mu matololo," 
Hebrews3:9 ilyo ifikolwe fyenu fyalenjesha no kunsonsomba, nangu pa myaka amakumi yane fyamwene ifyo nalecita." 
Hebrews3:10 Kanshi eco nafulilwe ilya nkulo, nasosa nokuti, ‘Aba bantu tababika mitima yabo pakungumfwila. Kabili tabaishiba nefyo mfwaya.’" 
Hebrews3:11 Kanshi nalifulilwe, nalapile no mulapo nati, ‘Tapakabe nelyo umo uwakwingila mu ncende yandi iyakutuushamo.’ ”" 
Hebrews3:12 Mwe bamunyinane, mulecenjela, peba nelyo umo pali imwe uwa mutima ubi, kabili uwabula icisumino icakuti aifumya na kuli Lesa wamweo." 
Hebrews3:13 Mulekoseleshanya cila bushiku ilyo baleti, “Ni lelo,” epakuti nelyo umo pali imwe eumalala mutima no kubepwa no bubifi." 
Hebrews3:14 Pantu ifwe twalyampana na Kristu, kumfwa nga twaikatilila pa maka mukutetekela kwine twakwete ukufumafye pakutampa pene, mpaka na ku mpela." 
Hebrews3:15 Ngefyo calembwa ukuti, “Lelo line nga mwaumfwa ishiwi lyakwa Lesa, mwiumalala mitima nga filya mwacitile ilyo mwasangukile Lesa.”" 
Hebrews3:16 Bantu nshi baumfwile ishiwi lyakwa Lesa, kabili bamusangukila? Bantu bonse balya Mose afumishe mu Egupto." 
Hebrews3:17 Nga ni bani balya Lesa afulilwe pa myaka amakumi yane? Bantu balya ababifishe ne fitumbi fyabo fyashele mu matololo. 
Hebrews3:18 Ni bani Lesa alelandapo ilyo alapile no mulapo ati, “Tapakabe nelyo umo uwakwingila mu ncende yandi iyakutuushamo,” bushe teabo bakeene ukubeela?" 
Hebrews3:19 Kanshi twamona ukuti, ico abo bantu bafililwe ukwingila, nico bashasumine." 
Hebrews4:1 Nomba apo icilayo cakutuusha ico Lesa alandapo epo cicili, kanshi natucenjele pakuti nelyo umo ekafilwa ukupokelela ukutusha batulaya." 
Hebrews4:2 Pantu na ifwe twalyumfwa Imbila Nsuma, nga filya fine nabo baumfwile. Balyumfwile amashiwi ya Mbila, lelo tayababombele nelyo cimo, pantu nangu baumfwile, tabaipokelele ne cisumino." 
Hebrews4:3 Apo ifwe twasumina, tulengila mu ncende yakutuushamo. Efyo Lesa asosa ukuti, “Nalifulilwe, elyo nalapile no mulapo nati, ‘Tapakabe nelyo umo uwakwingila mu ncende yandi iyakutuushamo.’ ” Asosele ifi nangu umulimo wakwe wapwilefye ukufuma ilyo abumbile icalo." 
Hebrews4:4 Pantu pamo calembwa palwa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali ukuti, “Mu bushiku ubwalenga cine lubali Lesa alituushishe, aleka imilimo yakwe yonse.”" 
Hebrews4:5 Uyu wine mulandu, aliulandapo nakabili ati, “Tapakabe nelyo umo uwakwingila mu ncende yandi iyakutuushamo.”" 
Hebrews4:6 Bamo kwena balengila mu ncende yakutuushamo. Lelo ababalilepo ukumfwa Imbila Nsuma tabaingile mu ncende yakutuusha, pantu balikeene ukubeela." 
Hebrews4:7 Ici ecalenga ukuti Lesa asale ubushiku bumbi, ubwitwa “Lelo line.” Ilyo papitile inshita iyitali, elyo Lesa aishile eba Davidi ukulanda nga mulya mwine amashiwi tulumbwile kale yasosa ukuti, “Lelo line nga mwaumfwa ishiwi lyakwa Lesa, mwiumalala mitima.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Nga cakuti Yoshua alipeele abantu incende yakutuushamo iyo Lesa abalaile, ninshi Lesa nga taishile landa nakabili pa bushiku bumbi." 
Hebrews4:9 Kanshi emukutila ukutuusha kwa pe Sabata kwashalilafye abantu bakwa Lesa. 
Hebrews4:10 Pantu uwaingila mukutuusha uko Lesa alaile, ninshi aleka ukubomba umulimo wakwe, nga filya Lesa alekele ukubomba umulimo wakwe." 
Hebrews4:11 Kanshi natulebombesha na maka yesu yonse pakuti twingile mu ncende yakutuushamo. Lyena epakuti umo pali ifwe ekafilwa nga filya bena bafililwe ico bashalebeela. 
Hebrews4:12 Ishiwi lyakwa Lesa lyamweo, kabili libomba na maka. Lyalitwa ukucila no lupanga ulwatwa kubili. Lilapitilila icakuti lyalekanya umweo no mupashi, lyalekanya no mwasuntanina amafupa ku bufyompo. Lilapelulula ififwaya ne fitontonkanya umutima wa muntu." 
Hebrews4:13 Tapaba nelyo cimo icafisama ku cinso cakwa Lesa. Ifibumbwa fyonse fyabafye pa lwalala, fyonse alafimona na menso yakwe. Kabili ni kuli uyu eko twaba nokulubulula pali fyonse ifyo tucita." 
Hebrews4:14 Kanshi natuleikatilila pa maka ku cisumino cesu ico twasuminamo. Pantu twalikwata Yesu, Mwana Lesa, Shimapepo mukalamba uwacindamisha uwapula mu myulu, aba na pa cinso cakwa Lesa." 
Hebrews4:15 Shimapepo wesu mukalamba tewakuti afilwe ukumfwa uluse pa bunasha bwesu. Lelo Shimapepo wesu mukalamba twakwata, untu nao atunkilwe mu misango yonse nga ifwe, lelo wena tabifishe." 
Hebrews4:16 Kanshi natulepalama ku cipuna cakwa Lesa ukwaba icikuuku, ukwabula ukutwishika. Kulya eko twingapokelela uluse no kusanga icikuuku icakutwafwilisha pa nshita tulecikabila." 
Hebrews5:1 Shimapepo mukalamba onse asalwa ukufuma pakati ka bantu. Kabili asontwa ukulaimininako abantu muli fyonse ifilolele kuli Lesa, ukulaleka amalambo no kutuula imituulo pa mulandu wa fyabubifi." 
Hebrews5:2 Apo umwine nao alomfwa ubunasha mu misango iyingi, kanshi kuti aba uwamutembo ku balecita ifyo bashishibe na ku balelufyanya." 
Hebrews5:3 Apo nao alomfwa ubunasha, kanshi ali nokulaleka amalambo te pa mulandufye wa fyabubifi fya bantu, lelo na pa mulandu wa fyabubifi fyakwe umwine." 
Hebrews5:4 Tapaba nelyo umo uuibuulila umwine uyu mucinshi wakuba Shimapepo mukalamba kanofye uo Lesa aita, nga filya aitile Aroni." 
Hebrews5:5 Cimo cine, na Kristu wine taibuulilefye umwine umucinshi wakuba Shimapepo mukalamba. Lelo ni Lesa uwamwebele ati, “Iwe uli mwana wandi ilelo naba wiso.”" 
Hebrews5:6 Elyo pambi napo Lesa asosele ati, “Iwe uli shimapepo wape, muli bushimapepo bwakwa Melikisedeki.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Ilyo Yesu acili pano calo, alepepa no kupapata Lesa mukukuuta ne filambapo, ico ewali na maka yakumupususha ku mfwa. Ico ali uwaicefya no kupetamina Lesa, Lesa alyumfwile amapepo yakwe." 
Hebrews5:8 Yesu nangu ali ni Mwana Lesa, asambilile ukunakila Lesa ku macushi alecula." 
Hebrews5:9 Ilyo asukile aba uwapwililika, ayalwike intulo ye pusukilo lya pe na pe kuli bonse abamunakila." 
Hebrews5:10 Lesa nao epakumusonta ukuba Shimapepo mukalamba, muli bushimapepo bwakwa Melikisedeki!" 
Hebrews5:11 Pali uyu mulandu tulipo ne fyakulanda ifingi, lelo cintu icayafya ukumulondolwela, pantu mwalikosa imitwe, tamumfwa bwangu." 
Hebrews5:12 Kwena pa nshita ino nimwe mufwile ukuba bakafundisha, lelo ukufika na nomba mucili mulekabila uwakumufunda ifyakutampilakofye ukwishiba pa mashiwi yakwa Lesa. Mu nshita yakulalya icakulya icikosele, imwe mpaka na nomba mucili muleonka ibele." 
Hebrews5:13 Umuntu uucili aleonka ibele, ninshi acili akanya, talati eshibe ukusala ifili bwino ne fishili bwino." 
Hebrews5:14 Abalya icakulya icakosa bakalamba, pantu bena mukubomfya ifi fintu, basuka baishiba ukusobolola ifisuma ne fibi." 
Hebrews6:1 Kanshi natubale tushe ifyo twasambilile pali Kristu ilyo twatampile, tubikefye amano pakwishiba amafunde ayalingile abakalamba. Twibwekeshapo nakabili amafundisho ayaba ngo mufula, ayakulapila no kutaluka ku fintu ifituletela imfwa na palwa kusumina muli Lesa." 
Hebrews6:2 Kabili twilabwekeshapo ukufunda palwa kubatishiwa, palwa kutambalikila amaboko, elyo na palwa kushukuka kwa bafwa na pakupingulwa kwa bantu bonse ukwakupelekeshako." 
Hebrews6:3 Kanshi ifi efyo tuli nokucita, nga Lesa alefwaya." 
Hebrews6:4 Bushe abantu abasuula ku cisumino cabo, kuti bababwesha shani nakabili kukulapila? Aba bantu kale bali mu lubuuto lwakwa Lesa, bantu abalyako na ku bupe ubwafuma ku mulu, kabili bantu abapokelelako na Mupashi Wamushilo." 
Hebrews6:5 Aba bantu bena balyumfwako ifyo amashiwi yakwa Lesa yawama kabili balyumfwako ne fya pa maka ya nshita iyileisa. 
Hebrews6:6 Elyo nomba balisangukila icisumino cabo! Kanshi tekuti cibombe icakubabwesha nakabili. Pantu bena nakabili baletanika Umwana wakwa Lesa, no kulamusebanya pa lwalala." 
Hebrews6:7 Lesa eupaala umushili apo imfula iloka libili libili, wakusha ne filimwa pakuti abo abalimine balefibomfya." 
Hebrews6:8 Lelo umushili uumesha imyunga na bacilasa, wena wafyefye ulifye mukuya mwishamo lyakutipwilwa. Na pakulekelesha bakaocafye no mulilo." 
Hebrews6:9 Lelo bacibusa bandi nangu twalanda ifi, pali imwe twalishininkisha. Twalishiba ukuti imwe muli ne fintu ifiwemepo ifilingile ipusukilo." 
Hebrews6:10 Lesa taba na lufyengo. Ala tekuti alabe imilimo mwabomba nangu icitemwiko mwalanga pa mulandu wakwe mukwafwa abantu abamushilo abo na nomba mucili muleafwa. 
Hebrews6:11 Ico ifwe tufwaisha cakuti cila umo pali imwe abe uwacincila mpaka na ku mpela, epakuti fyonse ifyo musubila fikafikilishiwe icine cine." 
Hebrews6:12 Tatulefwaya imwe ukuti mube abanaŋani. Lelo tulefwaya ukuti imwe mube nga filya abantu bacisumino baba abamutekatima, epakuti mukapokelele ifyo Lesa alaya." 
Hebrews6:13 Ilyo Lesa alaile icilayo kuli Abrahamu, ailapilefye umwine pakulaya ico cilayo. Apo kushali umbi uwacindama ukumucila, abomfeshefye ishina lyakwe pakulaya icilayo cakwe." 
Hebrews6:14 Atile ati, “Nkakupaala nganshi, kabili nkasandulula na ba mu lupwa lobe.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Abrahamu ali no mutekatima, asukile apokelela nefyo Lesa alaile." 
Hebrews6:16 Ilyo abantu balapa umulapo, babomfya ishina lya muntu uucindeme ukubacila, elyo no mulapo ulaputula ifikansa fyonse." 
Hebrews6:17 Eico ku bantu abali nokupokelela ifyo alaile, Lesa alundilepo no mulapo kufyo alaile, pakuti bashininkishe ukuti takatale alula ifyo apangile ukucita." 
Hebrews6:18 Kanshi kwaba ifi fintu fibili ifishingalulwa, kabili pafyo Lesa ashingabepa bufi. Kanshi ifwe fwe babutukila kuli Lesa pakumona ukupusuka, tulakwata icikoseleshi nganshi no kwikatilila pa maka kwisubilo ilili kuntanshi." 
Hebrews6:19 Icisubilo twakwata mu bumi bwesu caba kwati cela icafina ico baposa pali bemba pakulesha ubwato ukulaenda. Ici cisubilo cesu cintu cakosa, kabili te cakuteletenta. Cena cipula mu cisalu cakucingililako, cafika na mu muputule wamushilo uwamukati." 
Hebrews6:20 Pa mulandu wa ifwe, muli uyu muputule emo Yesu atutangilila ukwingila, kabili ayaluka Shimapepo mukalamba uwape, ukukonka na bushimapepo bwakwa Melikisedeki." 
Hebrews7:1 Uyu Melikisedeki ali ni mfumu ya Salemu, kabili ali shimapepo wakwa Lesa mukulu. Akumenye Abrahamu amupaala no kumupaala, ninshi Abrahamu alebwela ku bulwi uko acimfishe imfumu." 
Hebrews7:2 Abrahamu nao abuulile icintu cimo pekumi lyonse ilya fintu asendele, amupeela. Ishina lya Melikisedeki pakubala lyalola mukutila, “Imfumu yakaele,” elyo kabili ico ali ni mfumu ya Salemu, kanshi ishina yakwe lyalola na mukuti, “Imfumu yacibote.”" 
Hebrews7:3 Takwata wishi nangu nyina nangu ifikolwe fyakwe, kabili tapaba bushiku afyelwemo nangu ilyo afwile. Aba kwati ni Mwana Lesa, ni shimapepo wape." 
Hebrews7:4 Kanshi mwamona ukuti Melikisedeki ali umuntu uwacindama nganshi. Abrahamu icikolwe cesu icalumbuka nao amupeele icintu cimo cimo pekumi lyonse ilya fintu atapile mu bulwi. 
Hebrews7:5 Elyo Amafunde yakwa Mose yakonkomeshe ukuti aba mu lupwa lwakwa Levi bashimapepo, bali nokulapoka ku bena Israeli icintu cimo pekumi lyonse. Kanshi emukutila, bapoka kuli bamunyina, nangu bamunyina nabo ba mu lupwa lwakwa Abrahamu." 
Hebrews7:6 Melikisedeki wena tali wa mu lupwa lwakwa Levi, lelo apokele icintu cimo pekumi lyonse ukufuma kuli Abrahamu, elyo amupaala no kumupaala, umuntu uo Lesa alaile icilayo." 
Hebrews7:7 Cena ici te cakutwishika icakuti umukalamba eupaala umwaice. 
Hebrews7:8 Elyo nga ni bashimapepo bena, bantu abenakufwa, ebalepoka icintu cimo pekumi lyonse. Lelo Melikisedeki wena, amashiwi yakwa Lesa yasosa ukuti, aba umumi uwapokele icintu cimo pekumi lyonse." 
Hebrews7:9 Kanshi kuti twati apo Abrahamu apeele icintu cimo pekumi kuli Melikisedeki, Levi nao uupoka icintu cimo pekumi ku bena Israeli, ninshi nao alipeele icintu cimo pekumi kuli Melikisedeki." 
Hebrews7:10 Pantu ilyo Abrahamu akumenye Melikisedeki, ninshi Levi talafyalwa lelo ali muli Abrahamu icikolwe cakwe." 
Hebrews7:11 Pali bushimapepo bwa bena Levi, epashintilila Amafunde yakwa Mose ayo yapeelwe ku bena Israeli. Kanshi ifyo bushimapepo bwa bena Levi bwalebomba afiba ifyapwililika ninshi nga tacalekabilwa ukwisa kwa bushimapepo bumbi ubwaibela, ubushili ubwakwa Aroni, lelo bwakwa Melikisedeki."
