Hebrews7:12 Pantu kumfwa nga kwaba ukwalula bushimapepo, lyena ninshi na mafunde yene yali nokwaluka." 
Hebrews7:13 Elyo Imfumu yesu, iyo balandapo ifi fyonse ili iya mu luko lumbi, elyo mu luko lwaiko tamwali nelyo umo atalile abomba umulimo wa bushimapepo." 
Hebrews7:14 Calishibikwafye bwino ukuti Imfumu yesu yafyelwe mu luko lwakwa Yuda. Elyo ilyo Mose alandile pali bashimapepo, talandilepo pali ulu luko." 
Hebrews7:15 Uyu mulandu waishile ishibikwa bwino ukucilapo, ilyo kwaishile moneka Shimapepo uwaibela, uwaba nga Melikisedeki." 
Hebrews7:16 Uyu wena bamucita Shimapepo te mulandu wakukonka amafunde ne ntambi sha bantu, lelo ni ku maka ya mweo uushonaika." 
Hebrews7:17 Pantu Amalembo Yamushilo yatila, “Iwe uli shimapepo wape, muli bushimapepo bwakwa Melikisedeki.”" 
Hebrews7:18 Kanshi amafunde yakale yalisuulwa kabili tayalebomba nelyo cimo. 
Hebrews7:19 Pantu Amafunde yakwa Mose tekuti yalenge icintu nelyo cimo cibe icapwililika. Nomba pa malo ya mafunde, paisa isubilo ilyawamapo, ilyakutwafwa ukupalama kuli Lesa." 
Hebrews7:20 Teici ceka, Lesa alundapo no mulapo. Bambi bena, Lesa talapilepo mulapo ilyo abacitile bashimapepo." 
Hebrews7:21 Lelo Yesu ena ayalwike shimapepo ilyo Lesa alapile amweba ati, “Imfumu nailapa umulapo, kabili tayakafutuke. ‘Iwe uli shimapepo wape.’ ”" 
Hebrews7:22 Kanshi Yesu aba e cakushininkishishako icipangano icacilapo ukuwama. 
Hebrews7:23 Bashimapepo bambi bena balya bali abengi, pantu balifilwa ukukonkanyapo ukubomba umulimo wabo ico balefwa." 
Hebrews7:24 Lelo Yesu wena aba no mweo wakubelelela, kabili aba na bushimapepo bwakubelelela." 
Hebrews7:25 Eico kanshi wena aliba na maka yakupususha umupwilapo abantu abaleisa kuli ena pakufika kuli Lesa, pantu lyonse aikalilafye ukuba uwakutupapatilako kuli Lesa." 
Hebrews7:26 Yesu, kanshi e Shimapepo mukalamba untu tulingile ukukwata. Pantu wena wamushilo, taba na cilubo, wakaele, alipatulwa ku babifi kabili alicindikwa pakumusenda ukucila ne myulu yonse." 
Hebrews7:27 Yesu wena taba nga Bashimapepo bakalamba bambi. Takabila kuleka amalambo cila bushiku, pakubala pa fyabubifi fyakwe umwine elyo kabili na pa fyabubifi fya bantu. Ailekele ilambo umuku umo, ilyo aituulile umwine, no kupwa calipwa." 
Hebrews7:28 Amafunde yakwa Mose yasonta abantu abanakuka ukuba Bashimapepo bakalamba. Lelo icilayo Lesa alaile no mulapopo, icaishile panuma ya Mafunde yakwa Mose, cena casonta Mwana Lesa, uo alenga ukuba uwapwililika pe na pe." 
Hebrews8:1 Ico tulelandapofye nici icakuti ifwe twalikwata Shimapepo mukalamba uwa uyu musango. Aikala mu mulu lubali lwa ku kulyo kwa cipuna ca Mfumu iyacindama. 
Hebrews8:2 E Shimapepo mukalamba uutumika mu Ncende Yamushilo icine cine, emukutila ni mwi Tenti lyacine cine ilyapangwa na Lesa, te muntu iyoo." 
Hebrews8:3 Shimapepo mukalamba onse asontwa pakuti aletuula imituulo, aleleka na malambo ya nama kuli Lesa. Kanshi na Shimapepo mukalamba wesu nao afwile ukutuula ifintu fimo." 
Hebrews8:4 Nomba alaikala pano calo, nga tekuti abe shimapepo nakalya, pantu ukulingana na Mafunde yakwa Mose epo bali bashimapepo abatuula Lesa ifyabupe." 
Hebrews8:5 Incende Yamushilo umo aba bashimapepo babomba, yabafye icimpashanya cakwishibilako Incende Yamushilo ine ine iya mu mulu. Efyo fine cali na kuli Mose. Ilyo Mose alefwaya ukutampa ukupanga Itenti lyakwa Lesa umwakwikala Imbokoshi ya cipangano, Lesa amwebele ati, “Uli nokumona ukuti fyonse ukafipange ukulingana nefyo nakulangile pa lupili.”" 
Hebrews8:6 Lelo Yesu ena apeelwa umulimo wa bushimapepo uwacindamishapo ukucila imilimo yabo, pantu ne cipangano cine aleta pakati kakwa Lesa na bantu naco caliwamapo ukucila. Kabili cashintilila na mu filayo ifyawamapo ukucila." 
Hebrews8:7 Pantu mu cipangano capakubala fyonse afiba bwino, nga tekuti cifwaikwe ukukwata icabubili." 
Hebrews8:8 Pantu Lesa asangile icilubo ku bantu bakwe, ilyo asosele ati, “Imfumu yasosa ukuti, “‘Moneni, inshiku shikesa ilyo ine nkapangana icipangano icipya na ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, pamo na ba ŋanda yakwa Yuda." 
Hebrews8:9 Cena tacakabe nge cipangano ico napangene na bashibo, pa bushiku nabekete pa maboko pakubafumya mu calo ca Egupto. Pantu tabasungile icipangano napangene nabo, kanshi na ine epakubasuulako.’ Ifi efyasosa Imfumu." 
Hebrews8:10 ‘Ici e cipangano nkapangana na ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, ilyo isho nshiku shikapita. Ine ne Mfumu ndesosa nati, nkabika amafunde yandi mu mano yabo, kabili nkayalemba na mu mitima yabo. Ine nkaba Lesa wabo, elyo nabo bakaba abantu bandi." 
Hebrews8:11 Takwakabe nangu umo uwakufunda umwina mupalamano munankwe, nangu uwakufunda munyina ati, “Ishiba Imfumu,” awe nakalya. Pantu bonse bakanjishiba, ukufumafye ku munono ukufikafye na ku mukalamba." 
Hebrews8:12 Pantu nkababelelako uluse pa bubi bwabo, kabili nshakatale njibukisha ifyabubifi fyabo nakalya.’ ”" 
Hebrews8:13 Ilyo Lesa alanda palwa cipangano cipya, ninshi icapakubala nacipwa tekuti cibombe kantu. Elyo icintu icakota no kusapuka casapuka, ninshi bwangu bwangu calobelela." 
Hebrews9:1 Icipangano cakubalilapo calikwete amafunde pafyo bali nokulapepa, kabili calikwete ne ncende pano calo iyakupepelamo." 
Hebrews9:2 Incende bapangile iyakupepelamo, Litenti lyakwa Lesa. Umuputule wakubalilapo uwa ili Tenti waleitwa Incende Yamushilo. Umu emwaleba icakutekapo icisaniko, ne tebulo ne mikate yatuulwa kuli Lesa." 
Hebrews9:3 Panuma ya cisalu calecingililako kwali umuputule wabubili uwaleitwa Incende Yamushilo icine cine. 
Hebrews9:4 Muli iyi Ncende emwali ubulambo bwapangilwe na golide apo baleocela ububani, kabili emwali ne Mbokoshi ya cipangano iyakupilwefye yonse na golide. Mu Mbokoshi ya cipangano mwena emwali inongo ya golide umwali ubunga bwa mana. Kabili emwali ne nkonto yakwa Aroni ilya iyapukile amabula, elyo na amabwe ayapapatala apalembelwe amashiwi ya cipangano." 
Hebrews9:5 Pa mulu wa Mbokoshi ya cipangano pali ifimpashanya fibili fya bamalaika bakerubi abakulanga ubucindami bwakwa Lesa. Amapindo yabo yakupile pa mulu wa calecilika pa Mbokoshi ya cipangano apo baleita ukuti incende yakubelelwapo uluse ku fyabubifi. Lelo kwena ino taili nshita yakuti nalondolola fyonse bwino bwino. 
Hebrews9:6 Ilyo bapwile ukupekanya ifi fintu fyonse, bashimapepo nomba baleingila mu muputule wakubalilapo inshiku shonse kukubomba imilimo yabo." 
Hebrews9:7 Lelo mu muputule wa mukati uwabubili, mwena ni Shimapepo mukalamba eka ewingilamo, kabili umukufye umo pa mwaka. Kabili tafwile kwingila ukwabula ukusenda umulopa, uo atuula kuli Lesa pa mulandu wa fyabubifi fyakwe umwine na pa fyabubifi fya bantu ayo bacita ukwabula ukwishiba." 
Hebrews9:8 Kuli ifi, Mupashi Wamushilo aletulangafye bwino ukuti inshila yakwingila mu Ncende Yamushilo icine cine tailaisuka, ilyo Itenti lyakwa Lesa ilyakubalilapo licilipo." 
Hebrews9:9 Ici cishibilo cakutulanga ifyo cili pali ino nshita. Kanshi ciletulangafye ukuti imituulo na malambo ya nama batuula kuli Lesa tekuti yawamye umupwilapo umutima wa muntu uupepa. 
Hebrews9:10 Pantu ifi fintu fyabafye pa fyakulya, pa fyakunwa, elyo na pa misambile yakuisangulula ukwa misango ne misango. Aya mafunde ya fya ku mubilifye yali nokubapo mpaka na ku nshita Lesa akalula fyonse cipya cipya." 
Hebrews9:11 Lelo Kristu alisa Shimapepo mukalamba wa fintu fisuma ifilipo ndakai. Itenti lyakwa Lesa Kristu ena atumikilamo calicilapo ukucindama, kabili calicilapo ukupwililika ku busuma. Ili Tenti lyena te muntu wapanga, kabili talili lya pa fintu ifyabumbwa pano calo." 
Hebrews9:12 Kristu aingile umukufye umo epela mu Ncende Yamushilo icine cine. Kristu wena pakwingilamo tasendele mulopa wa mbushi no wa fiponti fya ŋombe, lelo asendele umulopa wakwe, epakutumwena ukulubuka kwamuyayaya." 
Hebrews9:13 Ukukonka ulutambi lwa Bayuda umulopa wa mbushi no wa ŋombe ishilume, elyo ne mito ya musepela wa ŋombe ilyo bafisansa pa bantu filasangulula abantu abakowela." 
Hebrews9:14 Apo ciba ifyo, palibufi umulopa wakwa Kristu! Ku maka yakwa Mupashi wa pe Kristu umwine aituulile kuli Lesa nge lambo ilyabula ubulema. Kanshi umulopa wakwe ulawamya kampingu wa mitima yesu pakuti tutaluke ku ficitwa ifileta imfwa, tuletumika na Lesa wamweo." 
Hebrews9:15 Kanshi ni Kristu ewalenga ukuti kube icipangano cipya. Lyena epakuti abo Lesa aita, bamone ukukwatako umuyayaya ifisuma Lesa alaile. Nomba Kristu ku mfwa yakwe alilubula abantu ku bubi babifishe ilyo bali mu cipangano cakubalilapo." 
Hebrews9:16 Ilyo kuli icilayo cakushila umuntu ifintu panuma yakufwa, cena cilefwaikwa ukushininkisha imfwa ya muntu uwalembele ico cilayo." 
Hebrews9:17 Pantu icilayo cakushila umuntu ifintu panuma yakufwa, tacibomba nelyo cimo ilyo umuntu uwalaya ico cilayo acili umumi. Ico cilayo cibombafye ilyo umuntu uwalaile afwa." 
Hebrews9:18 Eico cine ne cipangano cakubalilapo tacatampile kubomba apabula umulopa wa cintu bepeye. 
Hebrews9:19 Pakubala Mose alefunda abantu amafunde yonse ayalembwa mu citabo ica mafunde. Elyo alebuula umulopa wa ŋombe ishilume no wa mbushi aleusakanya mu menshi. Elyo aleukana pa citabo ca Mafunde yakwa Mose na pa bantu, alebomfya umusambo wa hisopo lwena na masako ya mpaanga ayakashika." 
Hebrews9:20 Alesosa ati, “Uyu e mulopa wa cipangano ico Lesa alemukonkomesha ukulasunga.”" 
Hebrews9:21 Kabili mu musango umo wine, Mose alekana umulopa kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa, alekana na pali fyonse ifyo balebomfya pakupepa." 
Hebrews9:22 Mu cacine ukulingana na Mafunde yakwa Mose, ni cikanga ifintu fyonse fyalesangululwafye no mulopa. Kabili elyo na mukubelelwa uluse ku fyabubifi, kano baipaya cimo, pasuuma umulopa." 
Hebrews9:23 Ifi fintu cimpashanyafye ca fintu fine fine ifya mu mulu, kanshi fyena fyali nokusangululwa mu musango uyo wine. Nomba ifintu ifya mu mulu fyena fikabila amalambo ayacilapo pali aya." 
Hebrews9:24 Pantu Kristu taingile mu Ncende Yamushilo iyapangwa no muntu, iyakuti yaba iyakupashanyakofye ku Ncende Yamushilo iyacine cine. Awe, wena aingile mu mulufye mwine, pakuti pa mulandu wa ifwe alemonekela pa cinso cakwa Lesa." 
Hebrews9:25 Shimapepo mukalamba wa Bayuda wena cila mwaka aleingila mu Ncende Yamushilo icine cine, nasenda umulopa wa nama, lelo Kristu wena tengila mu Ncende Yamushilo ku mulu imiku iyingi." 
Hebrews9:26 Aciba ifyo, ukufuma apo icalo cabumbilwe Kristu nga aba nokucula imiku iyingi. Lelo pa nshita ino, ilyo cili mupepi no kupwa kwa nshita, alimoneka umuku umo calipwa nokwisa ileka ilambo pakufumya ububifi." 
Hebrews9:27 Umuntu onse aba nokufwa umuku umo, elyo panuma yakufwa Lesa amupingula." 
Hebrews9:28 Efyo fine, Kristu ailekele lambo umuku umo pakufumya ifyabubifi fya bantu abengi. Akesa moneka umuku wabubili, lyena te pa mulandu wakufumya ububifi, lelo ni kukupususha abo abalemulolela." 
Hebrews10:1 Amafunde yakwa Mose yalifye icakwishibilako ifintu ifisuma ifyali nokwisa, lelo tayali e fintu fisuma fine iyoo. Eico kanshi amalambo ya mu Mafunde yakwa Mose, ayo baleka cila mwaka tekuti yalenge abantu abesa kukupepa Lesa ukuba abapwililika." 
Hebrews10:2 Pantu abo bantu abesa kukupepa Lesa abalashininkisha ukuti ifyabubifi fyabo nafifuma, nga balileka ukutuula amalambo yonse, ico baleumfwa ukuti tabali na cabubifi nelyo cimo." 
Hebrews10:3 Lelo mukutuula amalambo, cilenga abantu ukwibukisha ifyabubifi fyabo cila mwaka." 
Hebrews10:4 Pantu umulopa wa ŋombe ishilume no wa mbushi tekuti ufumye ifyabubifi nakalya, cakaana." 
Hebrews10:5 Eico Kristu pakwisa pano calo asosele ati, “Amalambo ne mituulo taufifwaya, lelo walinteyanishisha umubili." 
Hebrews10:6 Amalambo yakoca inama yonse nangu amalambo ya pa fyabubifi tayakusansamusha nakalya. 
Hebrews10:7 Na ine epakutila, ‘Mona naisa, we Lesa, kukucita ifyo ufwaya, nga filya fine calembwa palwa ine mu malembo.’ ”" 
Hebrews10:8 Ico abalilepo ukulanda, atile, “Amalambo ne mituulo, amalambo yakoca inama yonse, na malambo ya pa fyabubifi taufifwaya, kabili tafikusansamusha nakalya.” Amafunde yakwa Mose yena yalandile ukuti aya malambo yali nokutuulwa." 
Hebrews10:9 Kabili atile ati, “Mona naisa kukucita ifyo ufwaya.” Kanshi Kristu alifumyapo ilambo lyakale apyanikishapo ilambo ilyacibili." 
Hebrews10:10 Pantu Yesu Kristu acitile ifyo Lesa alefwaya ukuti acite. Ifwe bonse twalisangululwa twalifuma ku bubifi ku maka ye lambo ilya mubili wakwe umwine, ilyo alekele umukufye umo mpo." 
Hebrews10:11 Kabili cila bushiku shimapepo onse Umuyuda alabomba imilimo yakwe, alatuula na malambo yamo yene imiku iyingi. Lelo aya malambo teti yafumye fyabubifi nakalya." 
Hebrews10:12 Nomba Kristu wena atuulile ilambo limo ilyakubelelela pe ilifumya ifyabubifi. Elyo nomba aya ikala lubali lwa ku kulyo kwakwa Lesa. 
Hebrews10:13 Eko nomba alolela mpaka Lesa akacite abalwani bakwe apakunyanta amakasa yakwe. 
Hebrews10:14 Ku maka ye lambo limo, Kristu alenga ukuti abantu abo asangulula, abafumya ku bubifi, babe abapwililika pe na pe." 
Hebrews10:15 Mupashi Wamushilo nao ni kambone wesu pali uyu mulandu. Pakubalilapo atila ati," 
Hebrews10:16 “Imfumu yasosa ukuti, ‘Ici e cipangano nkapangana nabo ilyo isho nshiku shikapita. Nkabika amafunde yandi mu mitima yabo, nkayalemba na mu mano yabo.’ ”" 
Hebrews10:17 Kabili atila nokuti, “Ifyabubifi fyabo na bumpulamafunde bwabo bacita nshakaleibukisha nakalya.”" 
Hebrews10:18 Apo Lesa abelela abantu uluse pa fyabubifi, kanshi ilambo ilya pa fyabubifi talilekabilwa." 
Hebrews10:19 Mwe bamunyinane, kanshi tapaba cakutulesha ukwingila mu Ncende Yamushilo icine cine, apo Kristu alitufwilile." 
Hebrews10:20 Kristu alitwiswila inshila ipya, inshila yamweo, iyapula na mu cisalu cakucingililako, ici calola mukuti, umubili wakwe." 
Hebrews10:21 Twalikwata Shimapepo uwacindama uwangalila iŋanda yakwa Lesa. 
Hebrews10:22 Kanshi natulepalamina kuli Lesa ne mitima iyacishinka ne cisumino nganshi. Natulekwata imitima iyasangululwa, na kampingu wa mitima yesu uwabula ububi, ne mibili yesu iyasambwa na menshi ayalengama." 
Hebrews10:23 Natuleikatisha mwisubilo ilyo tulumbula ukuti lyesu, pantu twalishininkisha ukuti Lesa talaya bufi." 
Hebrews10:24 Natuletontonkanya pafyo twingalacincishanya mukutemwana na mukucita ifisuma. 
Hebrews10:25 Twilashala kukulongana pamo, nga filya bamo bacita. Lelo mufwile ukulakoseleshanya, palibufi apo mulemona ukuti Ubushiku bwa Mfumu bwile bulepalama." 
Hebrews10:26 Pantu ifwe fwe bapokelela icishinka, nga cakuti ku mufulofye twakonkanyapo ukubifya, awe takwakabe lambo nelyo limo ilyakufumya ifyabubifi." 
Hebrews10:27 Awe lyena icikashalakofye, kulolela mwenso mwenso ukupingulwa ukukaba nokwisa no mulilo uukali uukonaula abo abapata Lesa." 
Hebrews10:28 Umuntu onse uwapula Amafunde yakwa Mose, nga bantu babili nangu batatu bapeela bukambone, ninshi kumwipayafye ukwabula uluse." 
Hebrews10:29 Nga kanshi ni shani umuntu uwasuula Umwana wakwa Lesa? Ni shani uyo muntu uumona ukuti cafyefye umulopa wa cipangano cakwa Lesa uwamusangulwile ukufuma ku bubifi? Ni shani umuntu uusaalula Mupashi wacikuuku? Kanshi tontonkanyenipo pafyo cikalinga uyu muntu ukukandwa icabipisha! 
Hebrews10:30 Pantu twalishiba uwasosele ati, “Nine nkalandula, nine nkacita umulinganya.” Kabili atila nokuti, “Imfumu eikaputula imilandu ya bantu baiko.”" 
Hebrews10:31 Ala cintu cakutiina icakwikatwa mu minwe yakwa Lesa wamweo. 
Hebrews10:32 Muleibukisha shilya nshiku shakale ilyo mwapokelele ulubuuto. Lyena mwalishangile nganshi no kulwisha na maka nangu mwalecula. 
Hebrews10:33 Limo limo balemutukaula no kulamucusha pa menso ya bantu, elyo limbi mwaleikumika no kucula pamo nabo balecushiwa mu musango umo wine." 
Hebrews10:34 Mwalelangulukilako na bali mu cifungo, elyo kabili ilyo balemupokolola ifyuma fyenu, imwe mwalesansamuka, pantu mwalishibe ukuti mwalikwata icintu icicililepo ku busuma, kabili te cakonaika." 
Hebrews10:35 Kanshi mwilafupuka, icilambu mukapoka cikalamba." 
Hebrews10:36 Mulekoselela ukucita ifyo Lesa afwaya elyo mukapokelela ifyo alaya. 
Hebrews10:37 Pantu, “Mu kashitafye akanono, uuli nokwisa, akesa. Takakokole iyoo." 
Hebrews10:38 Umololoke ena akulaba umumi pa mulandu wa citetekelo. Lelo nga amfutatila, ninshi tekuti nsansamukile muli wena.”" 
Hebrews10:39 Lelo ifwe tatuli bantu abafutatila kuli Lesa kabili no kuloba baliloba. Ifwe tuli bantu abasumina no kupusuka twalipusuka. 
Hebrews11:1 Cisumino ecilenga tushininkishe ukupeelwa ifintu tusubila, tushininkishe nokuti ifintu tushimona eko fyaba." 
Hebrews11:2 Ni pa mulandu wa cisumino epo Lesa atashishe ifikolwe fyesu. 
Hebrews11:3 Ni pa mulandu wa cisumino ecalenga twiluke ukuti ni Lesa ewabumbile icalo kwishiwi lyakwe. Kanshi emukuti ifimoneka fyatula ku fishimoneka. 
Hebrews11:4 Cisumino calengele ukuti Abeli atuule Lesa ilambo ilyawamapo ukucila ilyakwa Kaini. Ni pa mulandu wa cisumino Lesa aebele Abeli ukuba uwakaele pa cinso cakwe, ilyo amutashishe pa mulandu wa mituulo yakwe. Ku cisumino cakwe, Abeli nangu afwa, acili alelanda." 
Hebrews11:5 Nico Enoki ali ne cisumino ecalengele nokuti efwa. Lelo Lesa amusendele umutuntulu ku mulu, tapali nangu umo uwakumumona pantu Lesa alimusendele. Pantu ilyo Enoki ali talasendwa, calishininkishiwa ukuti alesansamusha Lesa." 
Hebrews11:6 Pantu ukwabula icisumino umuntu tekuti asansamushe Lesa. Pantu umuntu pakwisa kuli Lesa, kano asumina ukuti Lesa eko aba, kabili alalambula na bamufwaya." 
Hebrews11:7 Cisumino calengele ukuti Noa, ilyo Lesa amusokele pa fintu ifyali nokwisa kuntanshi ifyo ashamwene pa nshita ilya, akwate akatiina kuli Lesa, apangile no bwato pakupususha ulupwa lwakwe. Noa ku cisumino cakwe ashinine abantu ba cino calo, kabili apokelele ne palo lyakuba uwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa ilyo Lesa apeela abantu abacisumino." 
Hebrews11:8 Cisumino calengele ukuti Abrahamu anakile Lesa uwamwitile ukuti ashe cilya calo aye ku calo ico Lesa alaile ukumupeela. Ashile icalo cakwe no kulaya uko ashaishibe. 
Hebrews11:9 Cisumino cakwe calengele ukuti ekale umweni mu calo Lesa amulaile. Aleikala mu matenti nga filya Isaki na Yakobo baleikala abo Lesa alaile icilayo cimo cine. 
Hebrews11:10 Pantu Abrahamu alelolela umusumba. Fundi uwalengele ifyo umufula uli nokuba na kakuula wine wa musumba, ni Lesa." 
Hebrews11:11 Cisumino calengele ukuti Abrahamu akwate umwana nangu ali umukote nganshi, elyo Sara nao ali ni ŋumba. Wena alitetekele ukuti Lesa wacishinka, akasunga icilayo cakwe." 
Hebrews11:12 Kanshi ecalengele ukuti ku muntu umofye, nao kwati untu wafwa, kufume ba lupwa lwakwe abafula kwati ni ntanda sha mu mulu, kabili kwati musensenga wa pa lulamba lwa bemba uushingapendwa na kupendwa." 
Hebrews11:13 Aba bantu bonse ilyo bafwile, bali ne cisumino. Kwena tabapokele ifintu Lesa alaile, lelo balifimwene akatalamukila no kufisekelela. Elyo basuminisha nokuti, cine cine tuli beni, kabili abalendo pano calo." 
Hebrews11:14 Abantu abalanda umusango uyu, balangafye bwino ukuti balefwaya icalo icakuti caba cabo." 
Hebrews11:15 Tabaletontonkanya pa calo ico bafuminemo pantu aciba ifyo nga balisangile inshila yakubwelelamo. 
Hebrews11:16 Lelo balefwaisha icalo iciwemepo, icalo ca ku mulu. Kanshi eco Lesa tomfwila nsoni ilyo balemwita ukuti ni Lesa wabo, pantu alibapekanishisha umusumba." 
Hebrews11:17 Cisumino calengele ukuti Abrahamu ilyo Lesa amweseshe, atuule ilambo umwana wakwe Isaki. Ni kuli Abrahamu Lesa alaile icilayo, lelo ali uwaipekanya ukutuula ilambo umwana wakwefye umo." 
Hebrews11:18 Lesa amwebele ati, “Ni kuli Isaki eko ukakwatila abantu ba mu lupwa lobe.”" 
Hebrews11:19 Abrahamu aletontonkanya ati Lesa kuti abusha umuntu uwafwa. Cacine kuti mwasosa nokuti Abrahamu ali kwati untu wapokelele Isaki ukufuma ku bafwa. 
Hebrews11:20 Cisumino calengele ukuti Isaki apaale Yakobo na Esau pa fintu ifyali nokwisa kuntanshi. 
Hebrews11:21 Cisumino calengele ukuti Yakobo ilyo ali mupepi nokufwa, apaale bamwana Yosefu umo umo. Abapaalile ninshi nashintilila pa nkonto alepepa." 
Hebrews11:22 Cisumino calengele ukuti, Yosefu ilyo ali pakufwa, alande ukuti abana bakwa Israeli bakafuma mu Egupto, elyo na pafyo bali nokucita na mafupa yakwe." 
Hebrews11:23 Cisumino calengele ukuti abafyashi bakwa Mose bamufise pa myeshi itatu ilyo afyelwe. Bamwene ukuti ali umwana umusuma nganshi, kanshi tabatiinine no kukanakonka ifunde imfumu yakonkomeshe." 
Hebrews11:24 Cisumino calengele ukuti Mose ilyo akulile akaane ukulamwita umwana wakwa mwana Falao umwanakashi. 
Hebrews11:25 Mose asalilepo ukucula pamo na bantu bakwa Lesa, ukucila ukubifya mukusansamuka pa kashita akanono." 
Hebrews11:26 Wena amwene ukuti umusaalula engacula pa mulandu wakwa Kristu wacindamapo ukucila ifyuma fyonse ifya mu Egupto, pantu ena aposele amenso yakwe ku cilambu ca kuntanshi." 
Hebrews11:27 Cisumino calengele ukuti Mose afume mu Egupto ukwabula ukutiina ubukali bwa mfumu. Alishipikishe kwati untu alemona Lesa uushimoneka. 
Hebrews11:28 Cisumino calengele ukuti Mose acite Pasaka, inshikunkulu ya Cakucilila. Akanine umulopa pa filu fya pa minshi ya mayanda pakuti malaika uwali nokwipaya, eipaya amabeli ya bana abaume aba bena Israeli." 
Hebrews11:29 Cisumino calengele abena Israeli babuke Bemba Wakashika kwati ni pa mushili uwauma ndi. Lelo abena Egupto bena ilyo baeseshe ukucita ifyo, bena babunda, banwena." 
Hebrews11:30 Cisumino calengele amalinga ya musumba wa Yeriko ukuti yabongoloke, ilyo abena Israeli bashingulwike umusumba pa nshiku cine lubali." 
Hebrews11:31 Cisumino calengele Rahabu cilende ukuti bemwipaila pamo na bashasumine Lesa, pa mulandu wakuti apokelele bwino inengu sha bena Israeli." 
Hebrews11:32 Finshi fimbi ifyo ningasosa? Awe tekuti nkwate inshita iyakulanda pali Gideoni, Baraki, Samsoni, Yefuta, Davidi, Samwele na pali bakasesema." 
Hebrews11:33 Aba bantu ku cisumino cabo bacimfishe ifyalo mu bulwi. Balecita ifyo Lesa afwaya, kabili bapokelele nefyo Lesa alaile. Balecilika no tunwa twa nkalamo." 
Hebrews11:34 Baleshimya no mulilo uukali uulebilima no kupusunsuka ku lupanga ilyo balefwaya ukubepaya. Bali imbulwamaka, lelo bayalwike abamaka. Bayalwike abakosa mu nkondo, balecimfya ifita fya balwani." 
Hebrews11:35 Pa mulandu wa cisumino, abanakashi bapokelele ba lupwa lwabo ababushiwe ku bafwa. Bambi bena bakeene nokuti babalekemo, lelo bacushiwe nganshi mpaka ne mfwa, ico balefwaya ukuti bakashukuke no mweo uwawamapo ukucila." 
Hebrews11:36 Bambi nabo babacushishe mukubaseka no kuboma ifikoti, elyo bambi bena babakakile iminyololo no kubaposa mu cifungo." 
Hebrews11:37 Balebepaya kukubalasa amabwe, bambi bena balebaputula pakati ne cela baputwilako imbao ico batila, soo. Elyo bambi nabo balebepaya ku lupanga. Bali abapina, baleendaukafye bafwele impapa sha mpaanga nangu imbushi, abantu abo basuulile no kulabacusha." 
Hebrews11:38 Aba bantu icalo tacabawamine. Baleseulukafye mu matololo na mu mpili kwati ni mbutushi, baleikala mu ncengo na mu mimba." 
Hebrews11:39 Aba bantu balabatasha pa mulandu wa cisumino cabo! Lelo tabapokelele ifyo Lesa alaile. 
Hebrews11:40 Pantu nifwe Lesa ateyanishishe ifyawamapo ukucila. Lesa ateyenye ukuti, pakuti babe abapwililika kano tuli nabo pamo." 
Hebrews12:1 Nomba ifwe twalishingulukwa ne bumba ilikalamba ilya bakambone. Kanshi natuitalushe kuli fyonse ifitufinya na ku bubifi bwine ubutukakatilafye bwangu. Natuleshipikisha mukubutuka ulubilo batuteyanishisha. 
Hebrews12:2 Natuletonta amenso yesu pali Yesu uwalengele ukuti tube ne cisumino, kabili eulenga nokuti cibe icapwililika. Wena asuulile na ku mfwa yamusebanya iya pa musalaba, lelo aculile amacushi ya pa musalaba pa mulandu wa nsansa ishali nokumwishila kuntanshi. Awe nomba aikala lubali lwa ku kulyo kwa cipuna cabufumu icakwa Lesa." 
Hebrews12:3 Muletontonkanya pafyo Yesu apitilemo. Wena aleshipikisha ilyo abantu babi bamupatile nganshi. Kanshi na imwe mwilanenuka, mwilafupuka." 
Hebrews12:4 Pantu mukulwisha ububifi, tamulalwisha icakuti bamwipailapo." 
Hebrews12:5 Bushe mwalilaba amashiwi yacikoseleshi ayo Lesa alanda kuli imwe bamwane ayakuti, “We mwana wandi, wilasuula ukukalipila kwa Mfumu, kabili wilanenuka ilyo yakwebaula." 
Hebrews12:6 Pantu Imfumu ilakalipila abo yena yatemwa, kabili ilasalapula umuntu onse yatila, ‘mwana wandi.’ ”" 
Hebrews12:7 Muleshipikisha mu macushi, pantu ekufundwa. Ayo macushi yenu yalanga ukuti, Lesa alemulela nga abana bakwe. Bushe kwaliba umwana uo wishi ashikalipila?" 
Hebrews12:8 Nga talemukalipila, ifyo akalipila abana bakwe bambi bonse, ninshi tamuli bana bakwe abene bene, muli nga bana ba mu bucende." 
Hebrews12:9 Nomba ifwe twalikwata abafyashi besu abantu, balatukalipila, no kubacindika tulabacindika pali ifyo. Palibufi tufwile ukunakila Shifwe wa mipashi yesu, pakuba abomi." 
Hebrews12:10 Bashifwe bantu batukalipila pa kashita akanono ukulingana nefyo bamwene ukuti ecilingile. Lelo Lesa ena alatukalipila pakuti cituwamine, tukakume kukuba abamushilo nga ena." 
Hebrews12:11 Kwena lyonsefye pa nshita tulekalipilwa, tacitusansamusha cilatukalipa. Lelo kuntanshi kwena abo baendele mukukalipilwa, bashukila umutende no kuba abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa." 
Hebrews12:12 Kanshi kosheni amaboko yenu ayanakuka na makufi yenu ayaletutuma. 
Hebrews12:13 Mulinganye inshila umwakupita amakasa yenu, epakuti ayalemana yeicena, lelo pakuti yamone ukupola." 
Hebrews12:14 Lyonse mulefwaya ukwikala no muntu onse mu mutende no kuba abamushilo, pantu ukwabula ukuba uwamushilo, umuntu nelyo umo takamone Imfumu." 
Hebrews12:15 Mulecenjela pakuti umuntu nelyo umo elafutatila cikuuku cakwa Lesa. Mwileka nelyo umo aluke umushila uwalula, uwakuti cilya wakula walacusha abantu no kubakowesha." 
Hebrews12:16 Mwileka nelyo umo abe cilende nangu uushisakamana Lesa nga Esau, uwashitishe insambu shakwe ishakuba ibeli pakulya icakulya umukufye umo." 
Hebrews12:17 Mwalishiba ukuti panuma alefwaya ukupoka ipaalo ilyabubeli kuli wishi, lelo alimukeenye. Pantu nangu alefwaisha ipaalo uku alelila ne filamba, alifililwe ukusanga inshila yakwalula ico acitile." 
Hebrews12:18 Imwe tamwatala amufika pa cintu icakuti mwaikatako ngo lupili lwa Sinai. Pali ulu lupili palebilima umulilo, lwakupilwe ne mfifi iyakutiina ne cimwela ica maka cilekuuka." 
Hebrews12:19 Kabili paleumfwika iciunda ce penga ne shiwi ilikalamba. Ilyo abantu baumfwile ishiwi, bapapete ukuti ishiwi lileke ukulanda." 
Hebrews12:20 Pantu abantu calibanshishe ukubeela icebo icasoselwe ukuti, “Nangu nga ni nama yakumya ku lupili, ninshi bali nokuipaya ku mabwe.”" 
Hebrews12:21 Cacine icamoneke ku lupili cali cakutiinya nganshi icakuti na Mose wine asosele ati, “Umwenso wanjikata nalatutuma!”" 
Hebrews12:22 Lelo imwe mwaisa ku lupili lwa Sioni, na ku musumba wakwa Lesa wamweo, Yerusalemu wa mu mulu. Kabili mwaisa kuli bamalaika imyandamishila abalongana ne nsansa." 
Hebrews12:23 Mwaisa ku lukuta lwa mabeli yakwa Lesa, ayo amashina yabo yalembwa mu mulu. Mwaisa kuli Lesa kaputula wa milandu ya bantu bonse, na ku mipashi ya bantu iyo Lesa alenga ukuba iyapwililika baba abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa." 
Hebrews12:24 Mwaisa kuli Yesu uwatuwikishanya na Lesa mu cipangano cipya. Mwaisa ku mulopa waitike uutusosela ifyawamapo ukucila umulopa wakwa Abeli. 
Hebrews12:25 Kanshi mulecenjela, mwilakaana kunakila uulelanda na imwe. Apo tapanishe abo bakeene ukunakila walebasokako pano isonde, palibufi takatupanye nga twasangukila uuletusoka ukufuma ku mulu!" 
Hebrews12:26 Pa nshita ilya, ishiwi lyakwe lyalengele icalo ukutenta. Lelo pali nomba alaya ati, “Nakabili nkalenga isonde ukutenta, lyena te sonde lyeka, lelo no mulu wine.”" 
Hebrews12:27 Pakusosa ati, “Nakabili” cilelanga ukuti akafumya ifintu ifitenta, emukutila, ifibumbwa, epakuti ifishitenta fyena fikashale." 
Hebrews12:28 Kanshi natuletasha Lesa, pantu tulepokelela ubufumu ubushili bwakutenta. Kabili tulemupepa no mucinshi, abakatiina mu musango uufwile ukumusansamusha." 
Hebrews12:29 Pantu Lesa wesu cine cine mulilo uoca fyonse. 
Hebrews13:1 Mwilanenuka mukutemwana nga bamunyina. 
Hebrews13:2 Mwilalaba ukusekelela abeni. Bamo abantu mukucita ifyo balisekelela bamalaika ukwabula ukwishiba. 
Hebrews13:3 Muleibukisha abali mu cifungo, muleimona kwati muli nabo mu cifungo. Muleibukisha abantu abo balecusha, muleimona kwati nimwe bene balecusha." 
Hebrews13:4 Bonse muli nokucindika icupo. Mwe balume na imwe mwe bakashi mube ne cishinka mu cupo cenu. Lesa akapingula abacita ubulalelale na babembuka. 
Hebrews13:5 Mu mikalile yenu mwilatemwa indalama, mulemona ifyo mukwete amuti nafitulinga. Pantu Lesa asosa ati, “Nshakatale musha. Nshakatale mulekelesha.”" 
Hebrews13:6 Kanshi natulecetekela Lesa, tulesosa atuti, “Imfumu e kafwa wandi, ine nshakatiine kantu nakalya. Finshi umuntu engancita.”" 
Hebrews13:7 Muleibukisha intungulushi shenu ishamushimikile amashiwi yakwa Lesa. Muletontonkanya pafyo bacitile mu bumi bwabo, elyo mulebapashanya na mu cisumino bakwete." 
Hebrews13:8 Yesu Kristu wena abafye cimo cine, ifyo ali mailo, efyo ali na lelo, efyo akaba umuyayaya." 
Hebrews13:9 Mwileka amafunde yambi yambifye, kabili ayapusana pusana yamutwale kumbi kumbifye. Icawama, kupoka amaka ukufuma ku cikuuku cakwa Lesa, temukukonka amafunde ya pa fyakulya. Ayo mafunde tayabafwako nakalya abayakonka." 
Hebrews13:10 Ifwe pa bulambo bwesu bashimapepo ababomba kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa tabakwata insambu shakulyako ifyelambo. 
Hebrews13:11 Shimapepo mukalamba asenda umulopa wa nama no kuutula ilambo lyakufuta pa fyabubifi mu Ncende Yamushilo icine cine. Lelo ifitumbi fya nama fyena bafyocela kunse ya nkambi. 
Hebrews13:12 Kanshi eico Yesu nao afwilile kunse ya musumba, pakuti ku mulopa wakwe asangulule abantu babe abamushilo." 
Hebrews13:13 Kanshi na ifwe natuleya kuli Yesu kunse ya nkambi, elyo tulesenda umusebanya uo asendele." 
Hebrews13:14 Pantu pano calo tatwakwata musumba wakubelelela, lelo tulelolela umusumba uli nokwisa." 
Hebrews13:15 Ku maka yakwa Yesu, kanshi ukutasha kwesu lyonse nakuleba ilambo tulelekela Lesa, emukutila mashiwi ya bantu abalumbula icisumino cabo muli Yesu." 
Hebrews13:16 Mwilalaba ukucita ifisuma no kwafwako abanenu kufyo mukwete, pantu ifi e malambo yasansamusha Lesa." 
Hebrews13:17 Mulebeela intungulushi shenu, mulekonka nefyo shilemweba. Intungulushi shenu eshisakamana ukusunga imyeo yenu, kabili shikaba nokulubulula pali uyu mulimo. Nga mwalashibeela, shikabomba uyu mulimo ne nsansa. Nga teifyo, shikalabomba no bulanda, elyo ico cena tacakamuwamine." 
Hebrews13:18 Muletupepelako na ifwe. Ifwe natushininkisha tatwaba nelyo cimo icakusakamika kampingu wa mitima yesu, pantu lyonse tulaicindika mu myendele yesu." 
Hebrews13:19 Kanshi ndemupapata nganshi mulempepelako ukuti Lesa akambweseshe bwangu kuli imwe. 
Hebrews13:20 Lesa alibusha ku bafwa Yesu Imfumu yesu. Uyu Yesu e kacema mukalamba wa mpaanga uo ku mulopa wakwe apangile icipangano cakubelelela. 
Hebrews13:21 Lesa wamutende engamupeela ifintu ifisuma fyonse ifyo mulekabila pakuti mulecita ifyo alefwaya, elyo na ku maka yakwa Yesu Kristu, Lesa alebomba muli ifwe ifilemusansamusha. Kristu nalelumbwa pe na pe! Ameni." 
Hebrews13:22 Mwe bamunyinane ndemupapata muteke imitima pakukutika kuli aya mashiwi ya cikoseleshi, pantu uyu kalata namulembela te mutali iyoo." 
Hebrews13:23 Ndefwaya mwishibe nokuti munyinefwe Timote balimufumya mu cifungo. Nga ayangufyanya ukwisa, ninshi tukaba nankwe pakwisa mumona." 
Hebrews13:24 Poshenipo intungulushi shenu shonse na bamushilo bonse. Bamunyinefwe abafuma ku Itali balemuposha. 
Hebrews13:25 Icikuuku cakwa Lesa cileba na imwe bonse. 
James1:1 Ine Yakobo, umusha wakwa Lesa ne Mfumu Yesu Kristu, namuposha bonse mwe nko ikumi limo na shibili isha bantu bakwa Lesa abasalangana icalo conse." 
James1:2 Mwe bamunyinane, amacushi ya misango ne misango nga yamwishila, mulemona ukuti lishuko nganshi!" 
James1:3 Pantu mwalishiba ukuti ilyo icisumino cenu cileeshiwa ku macushi, ici cilenga ukushipikisha." 
James1:4 Ukushipikisha kwenu kuli nokumoneka nganshi mufyo mulebomba, epakuti muleba abapwililika lyonse, abashabulisha nelyo cimo." 
James1:5 Umo pali imwe nga takwete amano, alombe kuli Lesa ukuti amupeele. Lesa nao uupeelesha ne nsansa onse uwamulomba, akamupeela." 
James1:6 Lelo uyu wine ilyo alepepa, afwile ukuba ne cisumino, ukwabula ukutwishika. Pantu umuntu uutwishika, apala itamba ilya pali bemba ilitumpauka no kusendwafye konse uko umwela wapuupila." 
James1:7 Uyo muntu uwaba ifi, tafwile kutontonkanya ati Imfumu kuti yamupeela ico alomba." 
James1:8 Abafye uwabula ukushininkisha ifyo ali nokucita, imicitile yakwe yaluka alukafye." 
James1:9 Uwabwananyina umupina afwile ukumfwa bwino pali ico Lesa amucindamika. 
James1:10 Umukankala uwabwananyina nao wine afwile ukumfwa bwino pali ico Lesa amupoka ubucindami. Pantu umukankala akalukuta nge luba lya cani. 
James1:11 Akasuba nga katula, katampa no kubalikisha, ukukaba kwakako kulenga icani ukuma. Amaluba ya cani yalalukuta no kuyemba kwaciko kwapwa. Mu musango umo wine efyo umukankala akonaulwa pa nshita apamfiwe na makwebo yakwe." 
James1:12 Alishuka umuntu uushipikisha mu macushi. Pantu nga acimya amacushi, akapokelela icilambu camweo ico Lesa alaya abo abamutemwa." 
James1:13 Umo nga atunkwa elatontonkanya ukuti ni Lesa eulemutunka. Pantu Lesa teti atunkwe ne fyabipa, elyo umwine wine tatunka muntu." 
James1:14 Lelo umuntu atunkwa ilyo ulunkumbwa lwakwe lwamusembeleka no kumwikata. 
James1:15 Ulunkumbwa nga lwakula, luleta ububifi. Ububifi nga bwakula, ninshi buleta imfwa." 
James1:16 Ala mwilabepwa mwe bamunyinane! 
James1:17 Ifyabupe fyonse ifisuma ifyo tupokelela ne fyawamisha umupwilapo fifuma ku mulu. Fifuma kuli Lesa Tata uwabumba ifya mu mulu ifipeela ulubuuto. Muli wena tamwaba imfifi, taluka." 
James1:18 Lesa umwine kukufwaya kwakwe ewatufyele kwishiwi lyakwe ilyacishinka. Acita ifi pantu alefwaya ukuti tube abantanshi pa fibumbwa fyakwe fyonse. 
James1:19 Mwalishiba mwe bamunyinane mwe batemwikwa bandi ukuti, onse afwile ukwanguka ukumfwa, lelo uwatekanya pakulanda, kabili uushifulwa bwangu." 
James1:20 Pantu icipyu ca muntu tacileta cisuma ico Lesa afwaya. 
James1:21 Kanshi lekeni ifyakowela fyonse ne misango ibi yonse mucili nayo. Mulenakila Lesa no kupokelela amashiwi yakwe ayo abyala mu mitima yenu ayaba na maka yakumupususha. 
James1:22 Mwilaibepa mukupelelafye pakumfwa amashiwi yakwe, lelo mulecita nefyo yalemweba." 
James1:23 Umuntu uumfwafye amashiwi lelo tacita ifyo yalemweba, aba kwati muntu uuilolesha pa menso mu mulolani." 
James1:24 Cilya apwa ukuilolesha afumapo, apopenefye alaba nefyo amoneka." 
James1:25 Lelo umuntu uulolekesha mwifunde ilyapwililika ilitulenga tube abantungwa, kabili akonkanyapo ukulinakila, tapelelafye mukumfwa alaba nako lelo alecita ifyo omfwa, ninshi Lesa akamupaala muli fyonse ifyo alecita." 
James1:26 Bushe utila ndi mwina Lesa? Nga waba cilandelande ninshi uibepafye no bwina Lesa bobe nabo bwafyefye. 
James1:27 Ubwina Lesa ubo Lesa Shifwe amona ukuti bwalipwililika ku busuma, kwafwa bakashiwa na bamukamfwilwa mufyo balekabila, no kuitalusha ku fyakowela fya pano calo." 
James2:1 Mwe bamunyinane, apo mwasumina mu Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu, Imfumu icindami, mwilaba na kapatulula." 
James2:2 Nga cakuti umukankala uufwele imbalaminwe ya golide ne nsalu shamutengo, nga aisa mu ŋanda mulongene, elyo no mupina uwasapula nao aisamo." 
James2:3 Nga mwapokelela bwino uufwele ubusaka, mwamweba amuti, “Ikaleni apa pa cipuna apaweme.” Umupina nao mwamweba amuti, “Keminine uko nangu ikala panshi mupepi na ine.”" 
James2:4 Bushe ninshi te kapatulula mwacita? Bushe ninshi te mano yabi mwabomfya mukupingula? 
James2:5 Umfweni mwe bamunyinane mwe batemwikwa bandi! Lesa asala aba bantu, abo abantu ba pano calo batila bapina ukuba abakankala mu cisumino. Abasala ukupyana ubufumu ubo Lesa alaya abamutemwa." 
James2:6 Lelo imwe mulasausha abapina! Ni bani bushe bamufyengelesha no kumupatikisha ukuya ku filye? Bushe te bakankala! 
James2:7 Bushe te bakankala basaalula ishina ilicindami lyakwa Kristu ilyo mwainikweko? 
James2:8 Nga mulalungika, amulanakila icebo icikalamba icalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo icitila, “Uletemwa umubiyo ifyo waitemwa we mwine.”" 
James2:9 Lelo nga mulacita akapatulula, ninshi mulabifya, kabili ukulingana na mafunde, ninshi muli bampulamafunde." 
James2:10 Uyo onse uusunga amafunde yakwa Lesa yonse, nga apulafye muli limo, ninshi ali no mulandu kwati apulafye muli yonse." 
James2:11 Lesa ewapeele icebo cakuti, “Wilabembuka” ne cakuti, “Wilaipaya.” Kanshi nangu taubembwike, lelo ulepaya abantu, ninshi uli mpulamafunde." 
James2:12 Imilandile ne micitile yenu ileba nge ya bantu abapingulwa ne funde ililenga tube abantungwa. 
James2:13 Pantu Lesa takabe na luse pakupingula umuntu uushakwete luse ku munankwe. Umuntu uwaluse tali nakutiina kupingulwa. 
James2:14 Mwe bamunyinane, umo nga atila nalikwata icisumino nomba talebomba nelyo cimo, bushe ici cisumino kuti camuwamina shani? Bushe ici cisumino cakwe kuti camupususha?" 
James2:15 Nomba nga cakuti munyinenwe, nangu nkashi yenu alisapula, elyo ne fyakulya takwete." 
James2:16 Bushe cikabawamina shani nga umo pali imwe abeba ati, “Mwende umutende, mulefwala mulekaba, mulelya muleikuta,” nga tamubapeele ifi fintu balekabila mu bumi bwabo?" 
James2:17 Kanshi efyo ne cisumino caba, nga tacilebomba imilimo ninshi califwa." 
James2:18 Nalimo umo kuti alanda ati, “Iwe walikwata icisumino, na ine ndabomba imilimo isuma.” Pakumwasuka kuti namweba nati, “Cisuma, iwe unange icisumino cobe ukwabula imilimo isuma, na ine nalakulanga icisumino candi ku milimo iyo ncita!”" 
James2:19 Bushe wasumina ukuti kwabafye Lesa umo? Cisuma! Ne mipashi yakowela nayo yalisumina, kabili ilatutuma no kututuma ku mwenso." 
James2:20 We cipumbu ca muntu we, bushe ulefwaya nkulange ukuti icisumino icabula imilimo isuma cafyefye?" 
James2:21 Bushe cinshi calengele ukuti Abrahamu icikolwe cesu abe uwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa? Ala ni pa milimo yakwe isuma, ilyo atuulile mwane Isaki pa bulambo pakuti amuleke ilambo." 
James2:22 Wamona ukuti cisumino ne milimo yakwe isuma fyabombele pamo. Milimo yakwe isuma yalengele ukuti icisumino cakwe cibe icapwililika. 
James2:23 Ne fyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo fyalifikilishiwa ifyakuti, “Abrahamu asumine Lesa, na pa mulandu wa cisumino cakwe, Lesa amumwene ukuba uwakaele pa cinso cakwe.” Kabili eco Abrahamu aleitilwa ukuti ni cibusa wakwa Lesa." 
James2:24 Mwamona nomba ukuti, Lesa tamona muntu ukuti wakaele pa cinso cakwe pa mulandu wa cisuminofye ceka, lelo na pa mulandu wa milimo isuma." 
James2:25 Epamo pene na ku mwanakashi Rahabu cilende. Lesa amumwene ukuti wakaele pa cinso cakwe pafyo acitile. Apokelele inengu sha bena Israeli shibili, ashafwilishako no kufyuka mukubomfya inshila imbi." 
James2:26 Nga filya umubili wa muntu ufwa ilyo umupashi wafumamo, efyo ne cisumino ciba icafwa nga tacilebomba milimo isuma." 
James3:1 Mwe bamunyinane, pali imwe peba bakafundisha abengi. Pantu ifwe fwe bakafundisha, Lesa takabe na luse pakutupingula." 
James3:2 Ifwe bonse ilingi tulalufyanya. Nomba umuntu nga talufyanya mufyo asosa, ninshi uyo aba uwapwililika. Kabili ninshi aba umuntu uwakwata amaka yakutungulula umubili wakwe onse." 
James3:3 Tubika icela mu kanwa kakwa kabalwe pakuti alecita ifyo tulefwaya. Nga twacita ifi tulenga kabalwe ukuya konse uko tulefwaya. 
James3:4 Tontonkanyeni pa cibwato icenda pali bemba. Nangu cikule shani, kabili nangu cisendwe ne cimwela icakosa shani, cipindululwafye kuli kanaosa akanono, no kuya konse uko kensha wa bwato alefwaya ukuti ciye." 
James3:5 Ululimi nalo efyo lwaba. Nangu lwaba akapande ka mubili akanono, lulailumbanya ukuti lucita ifyakupapa. Tontonkanyeni ifyo impanga ikalamba bayocafye ku kamulilo akanono." 
James3:6 Ululimi nalo lwaba kwati mulilo. Pa filundwa fya mibili yesu, ululimi lwaba kwati calo icaisulamo ububi bonse, lusalanganya ububi mu mubili onse. Lutanda umulilo mu bumi bwesu bonse ubwa pano calo kabili lwena lufumya uyu mulilo ku mulilo wape." 
James3:7 Umuntu kuti ateeka inama sha mpaanga, ifyuni, ifikulika pa mushili ne sabi ukuba ifitekwa fya mu mushi. Nakuba no kuteeka tulafiteeka fyonse ifi." 
James3:8 Lelo takwaba winganasha ululimi. Lwena talupema pa bubi, lwaisulamo no busungu ubwipaya." 
James3:9 Ku lulimi tulalumbanishishako Imfumu kabili Shifwe, elyo kabili tulapishishako abantu banensu abo Lesa abumba mu cata cakwe." 
James3:10 Mu kanwa kamo kene emufuma ukutasha no kulapisha. Bamunyinane ifi tefyo cilingile ukuba. 
James3:11 Mu kamfukumfuku kamo kene teti mufume amenshi ayasuma na yacicelecele. 
James3:12 Umukunyu, mwe bamunyinane, tekuti utwale ifitwalo fya muolifa, no mwangashi nao tekuti utwale amakunyu. Cimo na kamfukumfuku ka menshi yacicelecele tekuti kafumye amenshi ayasuma." 
James3:13 Ni ani pali imwe uwamano kabili uwacenjela? Uyo afwile ukulanga ukuti wamano kabili untu wacenjela ku micitile yakwe isuma mu fintu acita mu kuicefya ukwamano. 
James3:14 Lelo nga mwaba no mufimbila nganshi no kuisakamanafye mwe bene, ninshi mwilaibepa tapali cishinka cakuitakishishapo." 
James3:15 Amano ya uyu musango tekuli Lesa yafuma, mano ya pano calo yabuntunsefye, kabili yafuma ku mipashi yakowela." 
James3:16 Pantu uko kuli umufimbila no kuisakamanafye, ekuba ne cimfulunganya ne misango yonse iyabipa." 
James3:17 Lelo amano ayafuma kuli Lesa yena yaba ayapwililika, kabili yacibote, yamutembo no bufuke. Elyo kabili yakwatisha uluse, yacitafye ifisuma. Tayaba na mucishacinani, yaba pa cishinka." 
James3:18 Ukuba abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa, e fisabo abalenga icibote balobolola ilyo babyala mu cibote." 
James4:1 Bushe ifilenga ukuti muleumana no kulalwa fifuma kwi? Bushe temukukonkelela ulunkumbwa lubi ululwisha mu mibili yenu? 
James4:2 Mulafwaya ukukwata ifintu nomba tamukwata, eco mwipailapo na bantu. Mufimbila ukukwata ifintu lelo tamufikwata, eco muumanina no kulalwilapo. Tamukwata ifyo mufwaya pantu tamufilomba kuli Lesa." 
James4:3 Ico mushipokelela ifintu ilyo mulomba, nico mulomba na mapange yabi. Mulomba ifintu fyakumusansamushafye mwe bene." 
James4:4 Mwe bantu basangukila Lesa mwe! Bushe tamwaishiba ukuti ukubikana bucibusa ne calo kuba umulwani wakwa Lesa? Uufwaya bucibusa ne calo aicita umulwani wakwa Lesa. 
James4:5 Mwilatontonkanya ukuti te fyacishinka ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo ifitila, “Mupashi Lesa abika muli ifwe, alitutemwa, alatufubila no kutufubila.”" 
James4:6 Lelo kwena Lesa icikuuku atukwatila calicilapo. Eico calembwa ukuti, “Lesa acincintila abacilumba, lelo abaicefya bena alabakwatila icikuuku.”" 
James4:7 Kanshi mulenakila Lesa. Muleyansha Ciwa, nao akulamubutuka." 
James4:8 Mulepalama kuli Lesa, nao akulapalama kuli imwe. Sambeni iminwe yenu imwe mwe babi! Sangululeni imitima yenu mwe mfundabuteshi!" 
James4:9 Beni no bulanda, lileni no kuloosha. Lekeni inseko shenu shaluke imisowa, ne nsansa shibe ubulanda." 
James4:10 Muleba abafuuka pa cinso ca Mfumu, nayo ikamusansabalika." 
James4:11 Mwe bamunyinane, mwilayambana. Uyo onse uwamba umubiye nangu ukumupeela umulandu, asuula amafunde yakwa Lesa nangu ukuyalengulula. Eico nga ulalengulula amafunde, ninshi tauyakonka iyoo, ulayalengululafye." 
James4:12 Ni Lesa ekafye eupeela amafunde no kupingula abantu. Kabili ni ekafye ewaba na maka yakupususha abantu nangu ukubalofya. Nga iwe uli ani uwakupingula umunobe? 
James4:13 Umfweni imwe mwe batila, “Lelo atemwa mailo tukaya ku musumba kantwa. Tukaya pwako umwaka umo. Tukalacita amakwebo no kunonkako indalama.”" 
James4:14 Tamwaishiba nga cakuti mukaba abomi mailo. Imwe mwabafye nga fubefube uumoneka pa kashita akanono, kabili mwaluba napo ele." 
James4:15 Ifyo mulingile ukusosa nifi, “Imfumu nga ilefwaya tukaba abomi, tukacita fyakuti na fyakuti.”" 
James4:16 Nomba imwe mucita icilumba no kulaitakisha. Amataki yonse aya musango uyu, yantu yabipa." 
James4:17 Eico kanshi umuntu onse uwaishiba ifisuma fintu afwile ukulacita, nomba talecita, ninshi alabifya." 
James5:1 Umfweni mwe bakankala. Akulileni ifilamba, mupumepo ne misowa pa mulandu wa macushi ayalamwishila." 
James5:2 Ifyuma fyenu nafibola ne nsalu shenu nashiliwa ku fishishi. 
James5:3 Golide na silifa nafiliwa ne ndalawa. Neshi ndalawa shikaba e kambone wakumushinina. Shikonaula umubili wenu kwati mulilo. Imwe namuituntumanikila ifyuma muli shino nshiku shakupelekeshako. 
James5:4 Moneni, tamulipila babomfi ba mu mabala yenu amalipilo yabo. Kutikeni kufyo baleilishanya! Imfumu umwine wa fita fyonse nayumfwa inkuuta sha abo balobolola ifisabo fyenu." 
James5:5 Mu bumi bwenu pano calo muposa indalama ishingi pa fyakuisansamusha no kuilemena mwe bene. Eico nomba namuinya kukupekanya ku bushiku bwakwipaiwa. 
James5:6 Nimwe mupingwila abantu abakaele ukufwa, no kubepaya mulabepaya, nabo tabakaanako nakalya." 
James5:7 Mwe bamunyinane, ala muleteka umutima mpaka nelyo Imfumu ikabwela. Moneni ifyo umulimi ateka umutima pakulolela ifisabo fisuma fikule fipye mwibala lyakwe. Ateka umutima no kulolela imfula yakubalilapo ne yakulekelesha." 
James5:8 Eico kanshi na imwe muleteka umutima, mwilanenuka, pantu ubushiku bwa kwisa kwa Mfumu nabupalama." 
James5:9 Pali imwe bamunyinane, nelyo umo elaisosha pafyo umubiye acita, epakuti Lesa ekamupeela mulandu. Kaputula wamilandu napalama, ali pa mwinshi." 
James5:10 Mwe bamunyinane muleibukisha bakasesema abo Lesa atumine kukulanda amashiwi yakwe. Lekeni babe ifilangililo fyenu mukuteka umutima ilyo muli mu macushi. 
James5:11 Moneni balya baleshipikisha mu macushi, ebo tutila balishuka. Mwalyumfwa ukushipikisha kwakwa Yobo. Mwalishiba ifyo Imfumu yamulambwile pakulekelesha, pantu Imfumu yafulisha uluse ne cilela." 
James5:12 Bamunyinane ndemukonkomesha nganshi ukuti, mwilalapa mulapo pakulaya icilayo. Mwilalapa mulu, nelyo icalo, nelyofye umulapo umbi onse. Imwe muletilafye “Ee,” nga ni ee. “Iyoo,” nga ni iyoo. Epakuti Lesa ekamupeela umulandu." 
James5:13 Umo pali imwe nga ali mu macushi, nalepepa. Umo pali imwe nga ali ne nsansa, naembe inyimbo shakulumbanya Lesa." 
James5:14 Umo pali imwe nga nalwala, naete abakalamba ba lukuta, pakuti baisa mupepelako no kumusuba amafuta ku maka ya Mfumu." 
James5:15 No mulwele akapola ico abamupepelako bali ne cisumino. Imfumu ikamuposha no kumubelela uluse nga alibifya. 
James5:16 Kanshi muleebana ifyabubifi fyenu, no kulapepelana epakuti mulepola. Ipepo lya muntu uwakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa lyaliba na maka nganshi." 
James5:17 Eliya ali umuntufye nga ifwe. Alombele Lesa pa maka ukuti aleshe imfula ukuloka. Elyo na pa myaka itatu ne myeshi mutanda takwali mfula mu calo iyoo. 
James5:18 Aishile lomba nakabili, no mulu walokeshe imfula no mushili wameseshe ifisabo fyauko." 
James5:19 Mwe bamunyinane, umo pali imwe nga ayaluka, afuma na mu nshila yacishinka, elyo umbi amwalulula nakabili, ishibeni ici." 
James5:20 Uyu muntu uwayalulula umubifi ukufuma ku mibeele yakwe ibi, ninshi akapususha ulya muntu ku mfwa kabili akafimba pa fyabubifi ifingi." 
1Peter1:1 Ine Petelo, umusole wakwa Yesu Kristu, namulembela imwe mwe bekala kwati ni mbutushi, mwasalanganina mu fyalo fya Ponti, Galatia, Kapadokia, Asia na mu Betunia." 
1Peter1:2 Imwe Lesa Tata ku kufwaya kwakwe amusalile kale ukuba abantu bakwe. Mupashi wakwe nao amucita ukuba abantu abamushilo abanakila Yesu Kristu, kabili abasangululwa no mulopa wakwe. Icikuuku ne cibote cakwa Lesa fingalaba na imwe umupwilapo." 
1Peter1:3 Napaalwe na matotelo Lesa, Wishi wa Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu. Pantu pakubusha Yesu Kristu ku bafwa, Lesa alitukwatila uluse nganshi no kutufyala cipya cipya. Elyo ici naco cilenga ukuti tukwate isubilo ilyacishinka." 
1Peter1:4 Kanshi eico tulolela ukukwatako ifintu fikankala Lesa asungila abantu bakwe. Amusungila ifi fintu mu mulu, umo fishibola, nangu ukukowela nangu ukukota." 
1Peter1:5 Lesa ku maka yakwe ico imwe mwamusumina, alimusungila ifyo fintu bwino pakuti mukamone ipusukilo likasokololwa pa kupwa kwa nshita." 
1Peter1:6 Pali ici cena mulesansamuka, nangu pa kashita kano kuti mwaumfwa ubulanda pa mulandu wakucula amacushi ayalekana lekana." 
1Peter1:7 Aya macushi yakushininkishafye ukuti icisumino cenu cacine cine. Icela ca golide, iconaika, naco balacoca mu mulilo pakuti bashininkishe ukuti ni golide. Kanshi icisumino cenu icacindamisha ukucila na golide, naco bali nokucishininkisha ukuti cacine cine. Lyena epakuti bakamutashe no kumulumbanya no kumucindika pa Bushiku Yesu Kristu akasokolokelapo." 
1Peter1:8 Nangu mushamumona mwalimutemwa. Nangu mushilamumona mwalimusumina. Kanshi eico mulasansamuka ne nsansa ishikalamba nganshi isho umuntu ashingalondolola. 
1Peter1:9 Pantu mulepokelela ukupusuka kwa myeo yenu uko icisumino cenu cifwaya. 
1Peter1:10 Uko kwine kupusuka eko bakasesema basakamene no kufwailisha nganshi, kabili ubo bwine bupe balesesemapo e buntu Lesa ali nokumupeela." 
1Peter1:11 Umupashi wakwa Kristu uo bakwete ewalebeba pafyo Kristu ali nokwisa cula, elyo nefyo ali nokwisa peelwa umucinshi. Kanshi balefwaya ukwishiba inshita fikacitikilwapo elyo nefyo fikacitikwa." 
1Peter1:12 Lesa alisokolwele kuli aba bakasesema ukuti tabaleibombela abene mu mulimo wabo, lelo nimwe balebombela. Ifintu ifyo balandilepo, e fintu muleumfwa balemushimikila mu Mbila Nsuma kuli abo Mupashi Wamushilo wafumine ku mulu aishile langa. Ifi e fintu na bamalaika bene bengatemwa ukwishiba." 
1Peter1:13 Kanshi mu mitima yenu mube abaiteyanya kukubomba. Muletekanya, mulesubilafye pa maka mu cikuuku cikamwishila ilyo Yesu Kristu akasokoloka." 
1Peter1:14 Nga bana abanakila Shinwe, mwilakonkelela lunkumbwa lubi ulo mwali nalo ilyo mwali tamulaishiba Kristu." 
1Peter1:15 Filya Lesa uwamwita aba uwamushilo, efyo na imwe muli fyonse mulecita muleba abamushilo." 
1Peter1:16 Pantu calembwa ukuti, “Muleba abamushilo pantu ine ndi wamushilo.”" 
1Peter1:17 Apo ilyo mulepepa mwita Lesa amuti ni Shifwe, uyu uupingula umuntu onse no mulinganya pafyo acita, kanshi mu nshita yonse iya bumi bwenu mucili pano calo, mulemukwatila akatiina." 
1Peter1:18 Imwe mwalishiba ifyalipilwe pakumulubula ku misango ya buwelewele iyo ifikolwe fyenu fyamushilile. Tabomfeshe ifintu ifyonaika, ifili nga silifa nangu golide." 
1Peter1:19 Lelo imwe mwalubulwa no mulopa uwacindamisha uwakwa Kristu, uwali kwati mwana wa mpaanga uwabula ubulema nelyo akabi konse." 
1Peter1:20 Wena Lesa amusalile ne calo tacilabumbwa. Lelo pa mulandu wa ifwe, muli shino nshiku shakupelekeshako, Lesa alimusokolola." 
1Peter1:21 Ni ku maka yakwa Kristu mwakwatila icisumino muli Lesa. Uyu wine Lesa ewabushishe Kristu ku bafwa, kabili ewamucindamika. Eico kanshi icisumino cenu ne subilo fyabafye muli Lesa." 
1Peter1:22 Kanshi nomba mwalisangulula imitima yenu pali ico mwanakila icishinka, mwakwata ne citemwiko cacine cine icabwananyina. Kanshi bonse muletemwana nganshi ne mitima yenu yonse." 
1Peter1:23 Pantu mwafyalwa cipya cipya te ku mufyashi uufwa, lelo ni ku mufyashi uushifwa, kanshi emukutila ni kwishiwi lyakwa Lesa ilyamweo kabili ilyakubelelela." 
1Peter1:24 Pantu catila, “Abantu bonse baba kwati cani, no bucindami bwabo kwati maluba ya mu mpanga. Icani cilooma, na maluba yalalukuta," 
1Peter1:25 lelo ishiwi lya Mfumu lyena lilabelelela.” Ili shiwi, e Mbila Nsuma twaisa bila kuli imwe." 
1Peter2:1 Kanshi mutaluke ku fibi fyonse, ku bufi bonse, kuli bumfundabuteshi, ku mufimbila na kukubepeshanya." 
1Peter2:2 Mube kwati tunya tufyelwe nomba, mulefwaishafye ukonka ibele lyeka lyeka ilyakulisha imipashi yenu. Epakuti mukonka ilyo ibele mumone ukukula bwino mukupusuka." 
1Peter2:3 Pantu imwe mwaliyumfwila ifyo Imfumu yawama. 
1Peter2:4 Iseni ku Mfumu, ilibwe ilyumi, ilyo abantu basuulile abati lyafyefye, lelo Lesa elyo asala ukuba ilikankala." 
1Peter2:5 Imwe mube nga mabwe ayomi ayakuti Lesa abomfya pakukuula iŋanda yakwe. Muli iyi ŋanda yakwe emo imwe ku maka yakwa Yesu Kristu mwakulabombela Lesa nga bashimapepo bamushilo, pakulamulekela amalambo ya mapepo ya mitima yenu ayakusansamusha Lesa." 
1Peter2:6 Pantu ifyalembwa mu Malembo Yamushilo fitila, “Moneni ndebika ilibwe mu Sioni, ilibwe lya petungi ilyo nasala kabili ilyacindamisha. Elyo no muntu onse uwamucetekela, takatale ekatwa ne nsoni.”" 
1Peter2:7 Kuli imwe mwe basumina, ili libwe lyacindamisha. Lelo ku bashasumina bena, “Ilibwe ilyo bakakuula basuulile, lyaisa ba e libwe lyakwikasha petungi.”" 
1Peter2:8 Pambi napo catila, “Libwe ilyakulenga abantu ukuipununa, e libwe ilyakulenga abantu ukuwa.” Balaipununa pantu tabanakile mashiwi yakwa Lesa. Kwena nico efyo Lesa abateyanishishe." 
1Peter2:9 Lelo imwe muli mukowa Lesa asala, bashimapepo ba Mfumu, umushobo uwamushilo, abantu bakwa Lesa bene bene. Fyonse ifi ni pakuti muleba abakubila ku bantu ifintu ifyakupapa ifyo Lesa acita mukumwita ukufuma mu mfifi no kumuleta mu lubuuto lwakwe ulwakupapa." 
1Peter2:10 Kale tamwali bantu bakwa Lesa, lelo nomba muli bantu bakwe. Kale tamwapokelele luse lwakwa Lesa, lelo nomba mwalipokelela uluse lwakwe." 
1Peter2:11 Mwe batemwikwa bandi, apo mwaba abeni kabili abalendo muli cino calo, ndemupapata ukuti mwilakonkelela ulunkumbwa lubi ululwisha imyeo yenu." 
1Peter2:12 Ilyo muleikala na bantu abashaishiba Lesa, muleba ne mibeele isuma. Lyena epakuti nelyo balemubepesha ukucita ifibi, lelo bakese lumbanya Lesa pa Bushiku Imfumu ikabwela ico balemona ifisuma mucita." 
1Peter2:13 Pa mulandu wa Mfumu mulenakila ubuteko bonse ubwa bantu. Mulenakila kateeka mukalamba, pantu e mukalamba pali bonse." 
1Peter2:14 Mulenakila na balashi, pantu ebo kateeka mukalamba apeela amaka yakukanda abalelufyanya no kutasha abo abalecita ifisuma." 
1Peter2:15 Pantu Lesa afwaya ukuti, imwe ku ficitwa fyenu ifisuma, muputule umulomo wakusabaila kwa fipumbu fya bantu." 
1Peter2:16 Mu mikalile yenu mube abantungwa. Nomba mwilabomfya buntungwa bwenu ukuba akabepesho kakucitilako ifibi. Lelo mu mikalile yenu mube nga abasha bakwa Lesa. 
1Peter2:17 Mulecindika umuntu onse, muletemwa na babwananyina. Muleba na katiina kuli Lesa, mulecindika na kateeka mukalamba." 
1Peter2:18 Mwe babomfi mulebeela no kucindika bashikulwinwe. Mwilacita ifyo kuli abo aba luse no mutembo, lelo na ku bakali bene." 
1Peter2:19 Pantu nga mwaba no mutima wakucita ubufwayo bwakwa Lesa, ilyo muleshipikisha mu macushi ayakumufyengeleshafye, ninshi Lesa akamupaala." 
1Peter2:20 Lelo nga muleshipikisha impumo bamupuma ico mulufyenye, cinshi mwingamwenapo? Lelo nga muleshipikisha mu macushi ilyo mucitile icilungeme, ninshi lyena Lesa akamupaalilapo." 
1Peter2:21 Ala ni kuli ifi fine eko Lesa amwitilako. Pantu Kristu umwine alimuculile, amushilile ne cilangililo pakuti na imwe mulemupashanya." 
1Peter2:22 Kristu ena tabifishe, kabili tatalile alanda fyabufi." 
1Peter2:23 Kristu ilyo balemutuka, wena tabatukilemo. Kristu tapangile abalemucusha ilyo alecula, lelo alesubilafye muli Lesa Kapingula wamulinganya." 
1Peter2:24 Kristu umwine asendele ifyabubifi fyesu mu mubili wakwe pa musalaba, epakuti na ifwe tutaluke umupwilapo ku bubifi, tuleikala abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa. “Filonda fyakwe efyamundapa.”" 
1Peter2:25 Pantu kale mwali kwati ni mpaanga ishaleendafye icende ende, lelo nomba mwalibwelulukila kuli Kacema, kabili Kangalila wa myeo yenu." 
1Peter3:1 Mu musango umo wine abakashi balenakila abalume. Epakuti nga pali bamo abashanakila amashiwi yakwa Lesa, imyendele yenu iyisuma ibanashe ukwabula ukusosa nangu ishiwi nelyo limo." 
1Peter3:2 Pantu balemona ifyo imyendele yenu yakaele, kabili iyamucinshi." 
1Peter3:3 Lekeni ukuyemba kwenu kwiba ku fyakuisamika ifili ngo musango mulelukilamo imishishi, nangu ukulafwala ifisamo ifya golide nangu insalu ishaciyembelo." 
1Peter3:4 Lelo ukuyemba kwenu kuli nokuba mu mitima yenu. Muleba nokuyemba ukushonaika, ukwamutembo no mutima uwaikala tondolo. Ala ici e cintu cikankala pa cinso cakwa Lesa." 
1Peter3:5 Ifi efyo abanakashi aba pakale abamushilo baleisamika. Balesubila muli Lesa, kabili balenakila na balume babo." 
1Peter3:6 Efyo Sara alecita, alenakila Abrahamu, alemwita nokuti, “We mfumu.” Na imwe ninshi muli bana bakwa Sara nga mulecita ifisuma, tamukwete na mwenso wakutiina nelyo cimo." 
1Peter3:7 E cimo cine na imwe mwe balume, mu mikalile yenu mube na mano yasuma pa bakashi benu. Nangu abanakashi bantu abashakosa, mulebacindika, pantu pamo pene na imwe, nabo bene bapokelelako ubupe bwakwa Lesa ubwamweo wape. Ifi efyo mulecita, pakuti kwilaba nelyo cimo icakufulunganya amapepo yenu." 
1Peter3:8 Pakulekelesha ndeti, bonse muleba no mutima umo. Muleumfwilana uluse, mube ne citemwiko cabwananyina, mube ne cilela kabili muleicefya." 
1Peter3:9 Mwilalandula pa bubi bamucitila nangu ukulasaushanya, lelo mulebalombela ipaalo lyakwa Lesa. Ici eco Lesa amwitako pakuti na imwe mukapyaneko ipaalo lyakwe." 
1Peter3:10 Pantu calemba ukuti, “Umuntu uufwaya insansa mu bumi bwakwe no kukwata inshiku ishisuma, ali nokusunga ululimi lwakwe ukufuma ku bubifi, ne milomo yakwe kukubepa ubufi." 
1Peter3:11 Ali nokuleka ukucita ifyabipa, alecita ne fisuma. Ali nokufwaisha ukwikala mu mutende, no kucita efyo alecita." 
1Peter3:12 Pantu amenso ya Mfumu yaba pa bololoke, kabili amatwi yakwe yalakutika ku mapepo yabo. Lelo abacita ifyabipa, icinso ca Mfumu cilabafulilwa.”" 
1Peter3:13 Nomba nga mwalicincila mukucita ifisuma, nga nani engamucita icakumubipila?" 
1Peter3:14 Lelo nangu cakuti mulecula ico mulecita ifyo Lesa afwaya, ninshi mwalishuka. Mwilatiina abantu, nangu ukusakamikwa iyoo." 
1Peter3:15 Mulecindika Kristu no kumucita Imfumu ya bumi bwenu. Lyonse muleba abaiteyanya ukwasuka umuntu onse uwamwipusha ukumulondolwela pesubilo ilyo mwakwata. Muleyasuka uyo muntu mucinshi mucinshi no mutembo. 
1Peter3:16 Muleenda na kampingu wa mitima yenu umusuma, ukwabula akakumusakamika. Epakuti ilyo bamusaalula, abo bantu balelanda ifibi pa myendele yenu iya bwina Kristu, baleikatwa ne nsoni." 
1Peter3:17 Pantu cawamapo ukucula pakucita ifisuma, nga efyo Lesa alefwaya, ukucila ukuculila pakucita ifibi." 
1Peter3:18 Kristu afwile umuku umo pa fyabubifi, calipwa. Umuntu uwakaele afwilile abashaba abakaele pakuti atutwale kuli Lesa. Muli bumuntu balimwipeye, lelo mu mupashi wena ali uwamweo." 
1Peter3:19 Elyo ngo mupashi aile kukushimikila imipashi iyali mu cifungo. 
1Peter3:20 Iyi e mipashi ya bantu abo bakeene ukunakila Lesa mu nshiku shilya Noa alepanga icibwato, lelo Lesa wena alebapembela nateka umutima. Bantufye abanono abali mu cibwato ebapuswike ku menshi, bali cine konse konse." 
1Peter3:21 Ici cena cilangililo ca lubatisho ulumupususha imwe nomba. Ulu lubatisho talusamba ifiko ifya mubili iyoo, lelo cilayo umuntu alaya kuli Lesa muli kampingu musuma wa mutima wakwe. Lubatisho elutupususha ku maka yakushukuka kwakwa Yesu Kristu." 
1Peter3:22 Uyu Yesu alinina ku mulu, aikala lubali lwa ku kulyo kwakwa Lesa. Elyo alateeka bamalaika, bakateeka na bamaka aba mu mulu." 
1Peter4:1 Kanshi apo Kristu aculile mu mubili wakwe, na imwe imitontonkanishishe iyo akwete ifwile ukumukoselesha. Pantu uucula mu mubili wakwe ninshi nataluka ku bubifi." 
1Peter4:2 Pantu nomba inshiku shonse isha bumi bwakwe pano calo tekuti ateekwe no lunkumbwa lubi ulwabuntunse, lelo kanofye ukucita ififwaya Lesa." 
1Peter4:3 Kale mwaikele inshita ikalamba mulecita ifyo abantu abashaishiba Lesa batemwa ukucita. Mwaleikala mu bulalelale, mukukonkelela ulunkumbwa lubi, muli bucakolwa, mu kuipakisha kwa misango yonse, mu bunweshi na mukucita icintu icansoni nganshi icakupepa utulubi." 
1Peter4:4 Kanshi nomba abantu bashaishiba Lesa nacibapesha amano ico mushilebakonka mu mikalile ibi iyabuwelewele, kanshi e mulandu wine balemusaalwila." 
1Peter4:5 Lelo bakaba nokulubulula kuli Lesa, uwaipekanya ukuputula imilandu ya bomi na bafwa." 
1Peter4:6 Kanshi ecalengele ukuti na bafwa bene babililwe Imbila Nsuma pakuti, nelyo balebapingula pafyo bacitile ilyo bali abomi nga filya bapingula abantu bonse, imipashi yabo ibe no mweo Lesa akwata." 
1Peter4:7 Ukupwa kwa calo kuli mupepi. Kanshi muletekanya, mube abamano, epakuti mulepepa." 
1Peter4:8 Nomba ukucilapo pali fyonse muletemwana icine cine, pantu icitemwiko cifimba pa fyabubifi ifingi." 
1Peter4:9 Mulesekelelana mu mayanda yenu ukwabula ukuilishanya. 
1Peter4:10 Bonse umo umo Lesa alimupeela ubupe ubwaibela ibela. Kanshi mulebomfya ubo bupe Lesa amupeela kukutumika abanenu. Ukucita ifyo, ekuba kasunga musuma wa bupe bwalekana lekana ubo Lesa amupeela." 
1Peter4:11 Uulanda, nalelandafye amashiwi ayafuma kuli Lesa. Uuletumika bambi, naletumika na maka yonse Lesa amupeela, epakuti muli fyonse abantu bonse balelumbanya Lesa ku maka yakwa Yesu Kristu. Yesu Kristu e mwine bucindami na maka pe na pe. Ameni." 
1Peter4:12 Mwe bacibusa bandi, ala mwilasunguka ico muleeshiwa na macushi ayakali ayo muleculako. Mwilamona ayo macushi kwati cintu cimo icishifwile kumucitikila." 
1Peter4:13 Ala mulesansamukafye ico muleculako amacushi Kristu aculileko. Epakuti mukasansamuke nganshi ilyo ubucindami bwakwe bukasokoloka. 
1Peter4:14 Ala, mwalishuka abantu nga balamusaalula pa mulandu wakwa Kristu, pantu ninshi Mupashi Mucindami, Mupashi wakwa Lesa, aba na imwe icine cine." 
1Peter4:15 Pali imwe tapali nakuba uwakucula pa mulandu wakuba icipondo, nangu impupu, nangu mpulamafunde nangu ico muntu wacimfulunganya." 
1Peter4:16 Lelo umo nga alecula ico mwina Kristu, awe tali nakumfwa insoni pali ici, lelo alifye nokutasha Lesa pakuba uwakwa Kristu." 
1Peter4:17 Ubushiku bwabupingushi buli mupepi. Abo Lesa akabalilapo ukupingula bantu bakwe. Nga nifwe Lesa akabalilapo ukupingula, nga abo abashanakila Imbila Nsuma yakwa Lesa bena cikaba shani?" 
1Peter4:18 Calembwa ukuti, “Nga paliba ubwafya pakuti umololoke apusuke, nga cikaba shani ku muntu uushapetamina Lesa no mubifi.”" 
1Peter4:19 Kanshi eico, abo balecula pantu Lesa efyo alefwaya, baleituula kuli Lesa Kabumba wabo bakonkanyepo no kulacita ifisuma." 
1Peter5:1 Ine apo ndi mukalamba munenu, ndemupapata imwe mwe bakalamba ba nkuta. Ine ndi kambone pafyo Kristu aculile, kabili nalikumako ku bucindami ubukesa sokoloka." 
1Peter5:2 Kanshi mulecema umukuni uo Lesa amupeela ukwangalila, teico pantu muli nokubomba lelo nico mulefwaya ukubomba ifyo Lesa alefwaya mubombe. Mwilabomba icofye mulefwaya amalipilo iyoo, lelo mulebomba ico mulefwaisha ukutumika." 
1Peter5:3 Mwilaumya bufumu ku bantu abo mwapeelwa ukubaka, lelo muleba icilangililo icakuti umukuni wakwa Lesa ulepashanya." 
1Peter5:4 Ilyo Kacema mukalamba akamoneka, elyo mukapeelwa icilambu icacindama icishakonaike." 
1Peter5:5 Eifyo fine na imwe mwe balumendo mulenakila abakalamba. Elyo bonsefye muletumika abanenu mukuicefya. Pantu catila, “Lesa acincintila abacilumba, lelo abaicefya bena alabakwatila icikuuku.”" 
1Peter5:6 Kanshi muleicefya pa cinso cakwa Lesa uwamaka nganshi, umwine akamucindamika pa nshita alefwaya." 
1Peter5:7 Mulemutuula amasakamiko yenu yonse, pantu eumusunga." 
1Peter5:8 Muletekanya, kabili mulelola! Umulwani wenu Ciwa, endauka kwati ni nkalamo ilebuluma, ilefwaya uwakuti ikate imulye." 
1Peter5:9 Mube ne cisumino icakosa, mulemwansha. Kabili mwalishiba ukuti ababwananyina banenu isonde lyonse balepita mu macushi ya musango umo wine." 
1Peter5:10 Ala mukaculafye akashita akanono. Elyo Lesa wacikuuku conse, uwamwita ico tuli muli Kristu kukukuma ku bucindami bwakwe ubwakubelelela, akamuwamya umupwilapo, akamupeela amaka, akamukosha mukabe abashangila icine cine." 
1Peter5:11 Lesa e mwine maka pe na pe. Ameni. 
1Peter5:12 Uyu kalata namulembela, mwipi. Ni Sailasi uo ine mona ukuti ni munyinefwe uwacishinka ewangafwako ukulemba. Ndefwaya ukumukoselesha no kwiminina bukambone ukuti uyu kalata e cikuuku cacine cine icakwa Lesa. Kanshi mushangile mucikatishe." 
1Peter5:13 Ulukuta lunenu ulwa mu Babiloni ulo Lesa asala nga imwe bene, lwamuposha, elyo no mwana wandi Mako amuposha." 
1Peter5:14 Muleposhanya mukutomona kwa batemwana. Umutende ube na imwe bonse imwe mwe baba muli Kristu. 
2Peter1:1 Ine Simoni Petelo, musha kabili umusole wakwa Yesu Kristu, namulembela imwe mwebo pamo nga ifwe mwalipokelela icisumino icacindama pa mulandu wa bololoke bwakwa Lesa wesu kabili Umupusushi wesu Yesu Kristu." 
2Peter1:2 Icikuuku cakwa Lesa no mutende wakwe fileba na imwe umupwilapo pali ico mwaishiba Lesa na Yesu Imfumu yesu. 
2Peter1:3 Lesa ku maka yakwe alitupeela fyonse ifyakutwafwako ukwikala nga bantu bakwe icine cine. Atwita ku bucindami bwakwe na ku busuma bwakwe pali ico twalimwishiba. 
2Peter1:4 Ni ku bucindami bwakwe no busuma bwakwe eco atupeelela ifyabupe ifikankala ifyacindamisha nganshi ifyo atulaile. Pakuti kuli ifi fyabupe mumone ukukuma kuli Bulesa bwakwe, mupusuke na ku konaika kwa bantu ba pano calo ku mulandu wa lunkumbwa lubi." 
2Peter1:5 Eico kanshi na imwe muli nokubombesha, ku cisumino cenu mulundeko imibeele isuma, elyo ku mibeele isuma mulundeko ukwishiba Lesa." 
2Peter1:6 Elyo kukwishiba Lesa, mulundeko ukutekanya, kukutekanya nako mulundeko umukoosha. Elyo ku mukoosha nako mulundeko ubwina Lesa." 
2Peter1:7 Ku bwina Lesa, mulundeko icitemwiko cabwananyina. Elyo ku citemwiko cabwananyina, mulundeko icitemwiko cakutemwa abantufye bonse." 
2Peter1:8 Iyi e mibeele muli nokukwata. Nga mwakwata iyi imibeele kabili yalalundulukilako, lyena mukapambana no kumwenamo ukwishiba Imfumu yesu Yesu Kristu." 
2Peter1:9 Lelo umuntu onse uushakwata iyi mibeele, wena ni mpofu, ni ndoleshapepi, kabili alilaba nokuti alisangulwilwe ku fyabubifi fyakwe ifyakale." 
2Peter1:10 Mwe bamunyinane, mulekalabana pakulanga ukuti ni Lesa ewamwita kabili ewamusala. Pantu nga mwalacita ifyo ninshi tamwakawe mu cisumino cenu." 
2Peter1:11 Elyo ninshi lyena mukapeelwa insambu shonse shakwingila mu Bufumu bwakubelelela ubwa Mfumu yesu kabili Umupusushi wesu Yesu Kristu. 
2Peter1:12 Eico nakulamwibukishako ifi fintu, nangu kwena mwafishiba kale no kusumina pa maka mu cishinka mwafundilwe." 
2Peter1:13 Ine ndetontonkanya ukuti, inshiku shonse njikala mu nsakwe iyi ya pano icalo, umubili wandi, nacilinga ukuti ndemwibukishako pali ifi fintu." 
2Peter1:14 Pantu ine ninjishiba ukuti nalaswa mfume mu nsakwe iyi iya pano calo, efyo Imfumu yesu Yesu Kristu yansokolwela." 
2Peter1:15 Kanshi ndi nokwesha nganshi ukuti nga nafwa mukaleibukisha ifi ifintu inshita yonse. 
2Peter1:16 Ifwe ilyo twamushimikile pa kwisa ukwamaka ukwa Mfumu yesu Yesu Kristu tatwabomfeshe imilumbe iyakwelenganyafye iyoo. Ifwe twaliimwenene na menso yesu ubucindami bwakwe. 
2Peter1:17 Ifwe epo twali ilyo Lesa Wishi alemulumbanya no kumucindika. Ishiwi lyafumine kuli Lesa umwine bucindami aliti, “Uyu e mwana wandi, uo natemwa, uo nsekelamo.”" 
2Peter1:18 Ifwe fwe bene nifwe twaumfwile ili shiwi lilefuma ku mulu ilyo twali nankwe pa lupili lwamushilo. 
2Peter1:19 Kanshi calenga nokuti tucilileko mukushininkisha ukuti amashiwi yasosele bakasesema yacishinka. Elyo na imwe bene kuti cawama muleposako amano, kwati ni ku cisaniko icileyaka mu ncende umwafiita. Muleposako amano kuli ayo mashiwi mpaka bulya Bushiku bwaca no lutanda lwa lucelo lwalasanikila mu mitima yenu." 
2Peter1:20 Icakwibukisha pali fyonse nici icakuti, tapaba nangu umo uwingalondolola umwine amashiwi ya bakasesema ayaba mu Malembo Yamushilo." 
2Peter1:21 Pantu bakasesema tabaitendekefye abene pakulanda ayo mashiwi, lelo ni Mupashi Wamushilo ewalengele ukuti balande aya mashiwi yafumine kuli Lesa." 
2Peter2:1 Na kale line pa bantu ba mu Israeli epo bali bakasesema babufi. Epamo na pali imwe bene bakabapo bakafundisha babufi. Bakalamufunda amafundisho yabufi, ayakumonaula ukwabula ukuti mwishibe. Elyo bakakaana no kusumina Imfumu iyabalubwile, na mukucita ifyo, bakailetelela ukonaulwafye bwangu bwangu." 
2Peter2:2 Abengi bakakonka imisango yabo iyabupulumushi, elyo na mukucita ifyo cikalenga bamo ukulasuula inshila yacishinka." 
2Peter2:3 Aba bakafundisha babufi pa mulandu wakuba no lunkumbwa lwa fyuma, bakalamucenjesha pa fyuma fyenu mukulamufunda ifyabufi. Nomba kaputula wa milandu yabo apingula kale ukubakanda, no wakubonaula alolafye lyonse alebalindila." 
2Peter2:4 Ilyo bamalaika babifishe, Lesa tabapanishe nakalya. Lelo abaposele mu cifungo no kubakakila mu cifulo umwafiita fititi, emo abakakila balelolela Ubushiku bwabupingushi." 
2Peter2:5 Lesa tapanishe na bantu ba cino calo aba pakale, lelo aletele ilyeshi pa bantu ababi abali pa calo. Abo Lesa apuswishe, ni Noa umuntu uwaleeba abantu ifyo bali nokuba abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa, elyo na bantu bambi cine lubali." 
2Peter2:6 Lesa apingwilile ne misumba ya Sodoma na Gomora ukonaika, iyo aocele ku mulilo, yapya nakalya nakalya. Acitile ifyo ku misumba pakuti ibe icilangililo cafyo akacita ku bantu ababi." 
2Peter2:7 Lesa apuswishe umuntu umololoke Loti. Loti ena imisango yabupulumushi iya bantu ababi yalemuletela ubulanda. 
2Peter2:8 Uyu muntu umololoke Loti aleikala nabo, kanshi cila bushiku alecula nganshi mu mutima wakwe uusuma, ilyo alemona no kumfwa ifintu ifibi ifyo balecita." 
2Peter2:9 Kanshi Imfumu yalishiba ukupususha abantu abapetamina Lesa mu mafya yabo. Kabili yalishiba no kusunga abantu babi abali nokukandwa pa Bushiku bwabupingushi. 
2Peter2:10 Palibufi Lesa akakanda abantu abakonkelela ulunkumbwa lwabo lubi no kusuula amaka yakwa Lesa. Aba bakafundisha babufi baba abapama kabili abakamuka, tabakwata na mwenso wakutwala umusaalula ku fibumbwa fyacindama ifya mu mulu." 
2Peter2:11 Nangu ni bamalaika bene, abacilapo nganshi kukukosa na maka pali bakafundisha babufi, tababakwatila musaalula pakubebelela pa cinso ca Mfumu." 
2Peter2:12 Aba bakafundisha babufi balanda no musaalula pa fintu ifyo bashishibe. Baba kwati ni nama sha mpanga ishishaishiba ico shilecita. Shena shifyalwafye pakuti shikatwe no kwipaiwa. Naba bakafundisha babufi bakonaulwafye kwati ni nama sha mpanga. 
2Peter2:13 Bakacula pa mulandu wakucusha bambi. Bena insansa shabo kucita ifyakusansamusha imibili yabo pa lwalala. Baba kwati matoni ya fiko ayaleta insoni, pantu ilyo muli nabo pakulya, bena basansamukila mukucita ifyakumubepaika." 
2Peter2:14 Amenso yabo yabafye pa banakashi bakubembuka nabo. Baba no lunkumbwa ulushinaka ukufwaya ukubifya. Basembeleka abantu bashakosa pakuti babifye. Imitima yabo yateekwa no lunkumbwa. Aba bantu Lesa alibatipwila. 
2Peter2:15 Balisha inshila yacishinka no kuluba baliluba. Bakonka inshila yakonkele Balamu mwana Beori, uwatemenwe ukumwenamo indalama mukucita icilubo." 
2Peter2:16 Lelo asukile akalipilwa pa cilubo cakwe. Punda wakwe inama iyishilanda, alandile ne shiwi lya muntu, alesha kasesema Balamu ukulacita ifyabuwelewele." 
2Peter2:17 Aba bakafundisha babufi baba kwati tumfukumfuku twa menshi utwakama, kwati makumbi ayaleululwa ne cikuuku ca mwela. Ala Lesa alibapekanishisha icifulo camfifi." 
2Peter2:18 Pantu aba bantu pakuitasha balanda amashiwi yaciwelewele, kabili babomfya ulunkumbwa lubi ulwa mubili pakusembelela abantu abo batampilefye ukupusuka ku bantu abekala mu cilubo." 
2Peter2:19 Babalaya ukuba abantungwa, nomba abene bena bacili abasha ba misango yabo iyakubonaula, pantu umuntu musha wa ico conse icamucimfya." 
2Peter2:20 Ukwishiba Imfumu yesu kabili Umupusushi wesu Yesu Kristu kwalipususha abantu ku fibi fya pano isonde. Nomba umwine nga aitwalako, ne fibi fyamucimfya, abantu ba uyo musango baba nomba mu mibeele iyabipisha ukucila ilyo batampile ukwishiba Yesu Kristu." 
2Peter2:21 Kuli aba bantu bena, nga caweme ukukanaishiba nelyo panono ifyakuba abakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa, ukucila ukuti ilyo baishiba, elyo bayalukila ifunde lyamushilo bapeelwe." 
2Peter2:22 Ifyo bacita filanga ukuti aya mapinda yacishinka ayatila “Imbwa ibwelela ku malushi yaciluka,” ne litila, “Inkumba basamba, ibwelela kukwalangana mu matipa.”" 
2Peter3:1 Mwe batemwikwa bandi, uyu e kalata wabubili namulembela. Mu makalata aya yonse yabili ndemwibukishako ifi fintu pakuti muleba na matontonkanyo yasuma." 
2Peter3:2 Ndefwaya muleibukisha amashiwi bakasesema bamushilo balandile kale na mafunde ya Mfumu kabili Umupusushi ayo abasole benu bamupeele. 
2Peter3:3 Icapakubala ico muli nokwishiba nici icakuti mu nshiku shakupelekeshako kukesa abantu bamo abakalakonkelelafye ulunkumbwa lwabo lubi, bakalamuseka no kumuseka." 
2Peter3:4 Bakalasosa abati, “Bushe talaya ukuti akabwela? Nga ali kwi? Bashifwe bafwa kale, lelo ukufumafye apo icalo cabumbilwe ifintu fyonse fyabafye umo fyabeela.”" 
2Peter3:5 Aba bantu baba no mufulo, tabafwayafye kwibukisha ukuti Lesa kalefye alengele imyulu kwishiwi lyakwe. Lesa abumbile icalo ku menshi no kucifumya mu menshi." 
2Peter3:6 Kabili Lesa aonawile cilya calo ku menshi, acibishe mu menshi ye lyeshi." 
2Peter3:7 Lelo ishiwi limo line elisunga imyulu ne calo ifilipo nomba, pakuti fikese pya ku mulilo. Lesa akafisunga mpaka no bushiku bwabupingushi ilyo abantu ababi bakonaulwa." 
2Peter3:8 Mwe batemwikwa bandi tamuli nakulaba ici cintu cimo. Pa cinso ca Mfumu ubushiku bumo bwaba kwati myaka ikana limo, ne myaka ikana limo yaba kwati bushiku bumo." 
2Peter3:9 Abantu bamo batontonkanya ukuti Imfumu ilashingashinga pakufikilisha ifyo yalaya. Imwe kwena ilamutekela umutima, pantu taifwaya ukuti nelyo umo akalobelele, lelo ifwaya ukuti bonse balapile no kupilibuka." 
2Peter3:10 Lelo Ubushiku bwa Mfumu bukesa kwati mupupu. Pali ubo Bushiku imyulu ikapita ne congo icikalamba, ifyaba mu mulu fikapya ku mulilo fikonaike, elyo icalo na fyonse ifyabapo fikapya." 
2Peter3:11 Apo ifintu fyonse fikonaika umusango uyu, bushe imwe muli nokuba abantu ba musango shani? Mu bumi bwenu muli nokuba abamushilo, kabili abapetamina Lesa." 
2Peter3:12 Kanshi ilyo mulelolela Ubushiku bwakwa Lesa, mulecita ifyakuti bwaca bwangu. Pali ubu Bushiku imyulu ikonaika ku mulilo ne fyaba mu mulu fikasunguluka kukukaba kwa mulilo." 
2Peter3:13 Lelo ifwe tulolela ifintu Lesa alaya, emukuti imyulu ipya ne calo cipya umo bonse bakalacita ifyo Lesa afwaya." 
2Peter3:14 Eico kanshi mwe batemwikwa bandi, ilyo mulelolela ifi fintu, mulebomba na maka yenu yonse ukuba abakaele, ababula icilubo, kabili abekala mu mutende na Lesa." 
2Peter3:15 Mulemona iyi nshita Imfumu yesu iletekela abantu umutima, e nshita ye pusukilo. Paulo munyinefwe uo twatemwa, mukubomfya amano Lesa amupeele nao efyo amulembele." 
2Peter3:16 Ifi fine efyo alanda mu makalata yakwe yonse, ilyo alemba pali uyu mulandu. Mu makalata yakwa Paulo mwaliba ifintu fimo ifyayafya ukumfwa. Abantu abashasambilila kabili abashakosa mu cisumino balayonaula abene ilyo balufyanya ukufilondolola, nga filya balufyanya ukulondolola ifipande fimbi ifya Malembo Yamushilo." 
2Peter3:17 Mwe batemwikwa bandi, imwe ifi fintu balimusokako kale. Kanshi mulecenjela, mwileka ifilubo fya aba bantu babi fimusensenune mufume na mu cishinka mwashintililamo." 
2Peter3:18 Lelo mulekulilako mukuba ne cikuuku na mano yakwishiba Imfumu yesu kabili Umupusushi wesu Yesu Kristu. Kristu nalelumbwa pali nomba na pe na pe. Ameni. 
1John1:1 Uo twalalandapo ni Lishiwi upeela umweo. Wena ewabako ukufumafye na ku citendekelo. Twalimumfwa no kumumona twalimumona na menso yesu. Ee twalimumona no kumwikatamo ne minwe yesu. 
1John1:1 Uo twalalandapo ni Lishiwi upeela umweo. Wena ewabako ukufumafye na ku citendekelo. Twalimumfwa no kumumona twalimumona na menso yesu. Ee twalimumona no kumwikatamo ne minwe yesu. 
1John1:2 Ilyo uyu uupeela umweo aishile sokoloka, twalimumwene, kabili ifwe tuli bakambone. Tulemushimikila pa mweo uwape, uwali na Wishi uo aisa tusokolwela."
